Symphony of stars
The E16 star system is a star system floating somewhere in the M104 galaxy halo. This land is a new land where humans began immigrating from the Andromeda galaxy and the solar system in 3500, and it has now become the stage for the fierce evolution of these immigrants.
Gigapolis is a huge city that covers the entire planet. It is an economic hub with over 200,000 competing corporate states and a GDP of $1.4 quintillion. The towering skyscrapers at the heart of the city stand as a symbol of the majesty of a former empire, while at the same time representing the prosperity of a new corporate empire. However, deep disparities and the seeds of violence smolder behind the scenes.
In this era where technology and economy dominate everything, Allen, the CEO of the corporate nation ``Strawberry'', is struggling with the impasse of management and the challenge of the next generation. In a situation where he is about to be crushed by a meta company like ZAMLT, he hears a rumor. It was a huge project called "The Star of the End."
___________________


Chapter 1: Awakening of Alpha Cain
Alpha Cain woke up in the Tesla district in southern Gigapolis. Even though he was tired of his job at Strawberry, he managed to get through his daily life. However, one day, he is suddenly summoned by Allen.
"Alpha, I have something to ask of you."
Allen's words were serious. In order to help Strawberry with its financial difficulties, Alpha decides to participate in a strange tournament called the ``Warrior Tournament.'' In this tournament, strong people from all over the universe compete in their skills, and the winner will be given a huge reward and the right to participate in the ``Star of the End'' project.
However, what awaited Alpha was an unimaginable test.
Chapter 2: The beginning of the warrior battle
Hundreds of spectators gathered in the great square of Gigapolis, waiting for the final battle to begin. Even though Alpha Cain was overwhelmed by the crowd, he was still burning a quiet fighting spirit in his heart. The purpose of the tournament is to overcome a number of challenges and battles and ultimately take the top spot. However, when I looked around the venue, I noticed that all of the participants were fierce, and it seemed like it wasn't going to be easy.

﻿Symphony of stars
The E16 star system is a star system floating somewhere in the M104 galaxy halo. This land is a new land where humans began immigrating from the Andromeda galaxy and the solar system in 3500, and it has now become the stage for the fierce evolution of these immigrants.

﻿Symphony of stars
The E16 star system is a star system floating somewhere in the M104 galaxy halo. This land is a new land where humans began immigrating from the Andromeda galaxy and the solar system in 3500, and it has now become the stage for the fierce evolution of these immigrants.

___________________


Chapter 1: Awakening of Alpha Cain
Alpha Cain woke up in the Tesla district in southern Gigapolis. Even though he was tired of his job at Strawberry, he managed to get through his daily life. However, one day, he is suddenly summoned by Allen.
"Alpha, I have something to ask of you."
Allen's words were serious. In order to help Strawberry with its financial difficulties, Alpha decides to participate in a strange tournament called the ``Warrior Tournament.'' In this tournament, strong people from all over the universe compete in their skills, and the winner will be given a huge reward and the right to participate in the ``Star of the End'' project.
However, what awaited Alpha was an unimaginable test.
Chapter 2: The beginning of the warrior battle
Hundreds of spectators gathered in the great square of Gigapolis, waiting for the final battle to begin. Even though Alpha Cain was overwhelmed by the crowd, he was still burning a quiet fighting spirit in his heart. The purpose of the tournament is to overcome a number of challenges and battles and ultimately take the top spot. However, when I looked around the venue, I noticed that all of the participants were fierce, and it seemed like it wasn't going to be easy.

``Is this...do I have a chance of winning?'' Alpha took a deep breath and grabbed the electronic contract handed to him by Strawberry CEO Allen.
"Alpha!" Allen called out from the crowd. "Don't give up. Everything depends on you!"
Those words were both encouragement and pressure.
___________________


Prelude to the competition
The first round was a test of intelligence called ``Memory Labyrinth''. A three-dimensional hologram installed in the center of the venue projects a visually complex maze through which participants must find their way out. There are various traps and obstacles in the maze, and strict rules have been set that if you fail, you will immediately fall out.
Alpha stood at the entrance to the maze and looked around. Next to her was Ninny Offenbach, a tall, muscular female hero. She already has a look full of confidence in her victory. Meanwhile, next to Alpha, a small man was shaking with stress.
"Are you ready, warriors?" exclaimed the competition host. "3, 2, 1...Start!"
As the holograms emitted light and a maze was formed, the participants began running all at once.
アルファは慎重に一歩ずつ進んだが、迷路の構造は想像以上に複雑だった。 The path he takes often disappears and new ones appear. Furthermore, inside the maze there was a trap called the ``Gravity Reversal Zone,'' which was designed to disrupt the sense of verticality when passing through.
"Shit! This isn't going to be easy..." Alpha was pacing back and forth in the maze, looking for an exit.
On the other hand, Ninny memorized the structure of the maze in an instant and proceeded accurately. Her speed was so overwhelming that the other participants couldn't even see her back.
___________________


Alpha's awakening again
As Alpha approached the center of the maze, she suddenly noticed a pattern within the maze. They discovered that the patterns on the hologram walls can give clues as to which path will open next.

``Is this...do I have a chance of winning?'' Alpha took a deep breath and grabbed the electronic contract handed to him by Strawberry CEO Allen.
"Alpha!" Allen called out from the crowd. "Don't give up. Everything depends on you!"
Those words were both encouragement and pressure.

Prelude to the competition

As the holograms emitted light and a maze was formed, the participants began running all at once.
Alpha took one step at a time, but the structure of the maze was more complicated than she had imagined. The path he takes often disappears and new ones appear. Furthermore, inside the maze there was a trap called the ``Gravity Reversal Zone,'' which was designed to disrupt the sense of verticality when passing through.
"Shit! This isn't going to be easy..." Alpha was pacing back and forth in the maze, looking for an exit.
On the other hand, Ninny memorized the structure of the maze in an instant and proceeded accurately. Her speed was so overwhelming that the other participants couldn't even see her back.

Prelude to the competition
The first round was a test of intelligence called ``Memory Labyrinth''. A three-dimensional hologram installed in the center of the venue projects a visually complex maze through which participants must find their way out. There are various traps and obstacles in the maze, and strict rules have been set that if you fail, you will immediately fall out.

"Are you ready, warriors?" exclaimed the competition host. "3, 2, 1...Start!"
As the holograms emitted light and a maze was formed, the participants began running all at once.
Alpha took one step at a time, but the structure of the maze was more complicated than she had imagined. The path he takes often disappears and new ones appear. Furthermore, inside the maze there was a trap called the ``Gravity Reversal Zone,'' which was designed to disrupt the sense of verticality when passing through.
"Shit! This isn't going to be easy..." Alpha was pacing back and forth in the maze, looking for an exit.
On the other hand, Ninny memorized the structure of the maze in an instant and proceeded accurately. Her speed was so overwhelming that the other participants couldn't even see her back.
___________________


Alpha's awakening again
As Alpha approached the center of the maze, she suddenly noticed a pattern within the maze. They discovered that the patterns on the hologram walls can give clues as to which path will open next.

"This...!" Alpha breathed, carefully observing the maze's pattern as she moved on. As a result, he overtook other late participants one after another.
"We'll do it..." Allen was standing near the exit of the maze, watching Alpha's growth through the monitor. "You're not just an ordinary person."
Taking the final step, Alpha reached the exit of the maze. Although Ninny had already arrived at the finish line, Alpha was ranked second among the participants.
"Congratulations!" Ninny smiled and held out her hand. "You're really persistent."
Alpha grabbed her hand and smiled. "Thank you. But next time I won't lose."
___________________


The next challenge: combat arena
The participants who passed through the labyrinth of memory moved on to the next stage. This time it was a competition in the "battle arena". In this round, participants compete one-on-one and the last person standing is the winner.
"Alpha, your opponent is...him," Allen pointed at the monitor. The figure of Fabre, a gigantic man wearing a black armored suit, was reflected there.
"You want me to fight this guy?" Alpha's eyes widened. "You're kidding."
``You can do it.'' Allen laughed lightly, but there was a hint of anxiety in his smile.
Alpha and Fabre faced each other in the center of the arena. Fabre had a calm expression on his face as he carried a huge energy ax on his shoulder.
"Start!" At the same time as the referee's voice echoed, Fabre attacked Alpha all at once.
"Damn!" Alpha narrowly dodged the attack and got behind Fabre. But his attacks don't stop. Using gravity-manipulating technology, he tries to stop Alpha's movements.
"There's no way we can win this..." Alpha screamed in his mind. However, at that moment, the memory of reading the maze pattern came back to him.
"Wait... maybe there's a pattern to his attacks?"
Alpha began to calmly observe Fabre's movements. Then, finding a slight opening, he charged forward with all his might.

"This...!" Alpha breathed, carefully observing the maze's pattern as she moved on. As a result, he overtook other late participants one after another.
"We'll do it..." Allen was standing near the exit of the maze, watching Alpha's growth through the monitor. "You're not just an ordinary person."
Taking the final step, Alpha reached the exit of the maze. Although Ninny had already arrived at the finish line, Alpha was ranked second among the participants.
"Congratulations!" Ninny smiled and held out her hand. "You're really persistent."
Alpha grabbed her hand and smiled. "Thank you. But next time I won't lose."
___________________

The next challenge: combat arena

"There's no way we can win this..." Alpha screamed in his mind. However, at that moment, the memory of reading the maze pattern came back to him.
"Wait... maybe there's a pattern to his attacks?"
Alpha began to calmly observe Fabre's movements. Then, finding a slight opening, he charged forward with all his might.

"Fuck!" Alpha's fist hit Fabre's armor, shattering it into pieces.
The audience let out a cry of surprise.
___________________


The road to the final star
Alpha passed the trials one after another and advanced to the final round. Meanwhile, behind the venue, the masterminds of the ``Star of the End'' project were having a secret meeting.
"A man named Alpha Cain may be of use to our plans."
"But he is still immature. He is far from the person we are looking for."
"Still, there is a possibility. If we guide him, it may be the key that opens the door to a new world."
Alpha had no way of knowing what their conversation meant. But his journey continues. And at the end of that path, a fate that even he himself could not have imagined awaited him.
Chapter 3: Cosmic Conspiracy
"Alpha!"
Immediately after the match, Alpha returned to the waiting room and was immediately stopped by Allen. There is a look of impatience on his face.
``What's wrong?'' Alpha asked, wiping his sweat, and Allen quickly took him to a corner of the room and whispered, ``What's going on?''
"Listen to me. This tournament isn't just to determine warriors. There's a huge conspiracy behind it."
"Conspiracy?" Alpha looked confused. "It doesn't matter. I'm going to win and get the money. That's all."
"No!" cried Allen in a deep voice. "This is part of the 'Star of the End' plan. If you win this tournament, you will only receive a prize money, but in reality you will be secretly forced to participate in the plan. Moreover, it is a harsh, life-or-death situation."
Alpha listened to Allen's story silently. He knew that Allen's words weren't a lie, but he didn't know how to react.
“So what are you going to tell me to do?”
``I want you to play a role in finding the truth about the plan while winning this tournament.'' Allen's voice was full of earnest desire. "This is not just a story of individual victory. If the truth of the plan is not revealed, there is a possibility that the whole of Gigapolis will be destroyed."
___________________

"Fuck!" Alpha's fist hit Fabre's armor, shattering it into pieces.
The audience let out a cry of surprise.

Next Challenge: Space Combat Simulation
With the conversation with Allen still fresh in his mind, Alpha decides to take part in the next competition, ``Space Combat Simulation.'' The participants used state-of-the-art virtual reality equipment to conduct a mock battle in outer space. Participants pilot a customized fighter jet and earn points by destroying targets or surviving.
"A space battle..." Alpha thought. I have never been in a fighter jet before. However, he could no longer run away.
As each participant steps into the simulator, their view changes to outer space, covered in stars. The Alpha's cockpit was lined with complicated instruments, and I didn't know where to start.
``Participants, are you ready?'' the voice of the management staff echoed through the headsets. "The mock battle will now begin. Everyone, do your best and aim for victory!"
The countdown begins. "3, 2, 1...Start!"
___________________


unexpected enemy
The moment Alpha grabbed the control stick for the first time, a swarm of enemy aircraft appeared in his field of vision. Each aircraft emitted a red light, giving it an intimidating appearance.
``Hey, this happened all of a sudden!'' Alpha grumbled, desperately trying to control the vehicle. The first few minutes were spent dodging enemy attacks, but he gradually began to get used to the controls. They also succeeded in shooting down one enemy aircraft that had locked onto the front.
"Got it!" Alpha couldn't help but do a fist pump. However, at that moment, a warning sound rings out.
"Warning: Unidentified flying object approaching"
What was displayed on the monitor was a huge ship covered in a black shell. It had a structure that was clearly different from that of the enemy's aircraft, and it gave off a frightening and intimidating feeling.
"Is this...'EVILS'?" Alpha was stunned.
EVILS--It is a mysterious lifeform that has been seen in various parts of the universe, and is considered a threat to humanity. Alpha didn't know if it appeared as part of this mock battle or if it had another purpose.
___________________


Collaborate with friends

Next Challenge: Space Combat Simulation
With the conversation with Allen still fresh in his mind, Alpha decides to take part in the next competition, ``Space Combat Simulation.'' The participants used state-of-the-art virtual reality equipment to conduct a mock battle in outer space. Participants pilot a customized fighter jet and earn points by destroying targets or surviving.
"A space battle..." Alpha thought. I have never been in a fighter jet before. However, he could no longer run away.
As each participant steps into the simulator, their view changes to outer space, covered in stars. The Alpha's cockpit was lined with complicated instruments, and I didn't know where to start.
``Participants, are you ready?'' the voice of the management staff echoed through the headsets. "The mock battle will now begin. Everyone, do your best and aim for victory!"
The countdown begins. "3, 2, 1...Start!"
___________________


unexpected enemy
The moment Alpha grabbed the control stick for the first time, a swarm of enemy aircraft appeared in his field of vision. Each aircraft emitted a red light, giving it an intimidating appearance.
``Hey, this happened all of a sudden!'' Alpha grumbled, desperately trying to control the vehicle. The first few minutes were spent dodging enemy attacks, but he gradually began to get used to the controls. They also succeeded in shooting down one enemy aircraft that had locked onto the front.
"Got it!" Alpha couldn't help but do a fist pump. However, at that moment, a warning sound rings out.
"Warning: Unidentified flying object approaching"
What was displayed on the monitor was a huge ship covered in a black shell. It had a structure that was clearly different from that of the enemy's aircraft, and it gave off a frightening and intimidating feeling.
"Is this...'EVILS'?" Alpha was stunned.

___________________


Collaborate with friends

"Alpha, can you hear me?" A message came in. The owner of the voice was Ninny, who was participating in the same tournament as him.
"Ninny! What's going on with that black guy?"
"I don't know. But it seems like I can't move on unless I defeat this."
Ninny's voice had a hint of impatience, but also determination. It seemed like she was already at war with EVILS.
``It can't be helped, let's do it together.'' Alpha made up his mind and piloted the aircraft towards Ninny's coordinates.
___________________


fierce battle
The battle with EVILS was extremely fierce. This ship with giant tentacles launches attacks from all directions. Alpha and Ninny tried to attack in tandem, but its armor was surprisingly hard and normal weapons could do little damage.
"Damn, I can't even move!" Alpha yells.
"But there has to be a weakness somewhere!" Ninny replies.
At that moment, a ray of light entered the Alpha's cockpit. This was newly discovered data by a system that analyzes enemy movements.
"This is it!" Alpha found the weak spot and instructed Ninny. “The armor on the starboard side is thin, aim for that!”
The two of them took a breath and began a concentrated attack on the weak point. And finally, a direct hit on the core of EVILS.
"Did you...?"
The huge hull of EVILS exploded, and a flower of light bloomed in space.
___________________


shadow after battle
By the time Alpha and Ninny successfully finished the mock battle and got off the simulator, the entire venue was filled with excitement. Their performance captured the hearts of the audience and received applause.
However, behind the scenes, Allen was having a secret meeting elsewhere.
"They have potential," the mysterious man said in a low voice. "But the planning is just beginning."
"I know." Allen nodded. "But we need time to guide them."
``Time is limited.'' The man's eyes flashed coldly. "There are only a few days left until the 'Star of the End' begins to move."
Chapter 4: The truth about the Star of the End

Chapter 4: The truth about the Star of the End

The day after Alpha and Ninny achieved victory in the "Space Combat Simulation", Gigapolis was filled with the same commotion as usual. However, Alpha's feelings were complicated. Fragments of information about the Doomsday Star Project and Allen's words ran through my head, and I couldn't shake the feeling that something important was about to happen.
"Alpha!"
Allen appeared in the waiting room. A serious expression appears on his face.
"Are you ready? Today is your final test."
"The final test?" Alpha frowned. “What exactly are you going to do?”
``This is a practical test for the final selection of participants in the ``Star of the End.'''' Allen answered in a low voice. "However...the contents of the exam have not been made public at all by the administration. Apparently it will be announced locally."
___________________


Departure: To the final star
The participants boarded a special shuttle and headed for an orbiting station called the Ecclesion Satellite. This station was said to be home to the most advanced technology in the E16 system, and was rumored to contain the core of the plan.
Inside the shuttle, there was a tense atmosphere. Ninny was looking out the window, but her expression lacked its usual calmness. On the other hand, Alpha kept clenching his fists.
“Are you worried too?” asked the man sitting next to me.
"Well," Alpha answered honestly. “But we have no choice but to do it.”
"That's right," the man smiled. "I'm Yoshiro. I'm an old-fashioned warrior from Earth, but I'm going to do my best for this test."
"Are you from Earth?" Alpha looked surprised. "I heard that most people are immigrants now..."
"Yes, Earth is a relic of the past. But it's still home to me."
___________________


Test begins: Uncharted territory
Upon arriving at the Ecclesion satellite, the participants were assembled in a vast arena. At its center stood a transparent pillar over 10 meters high, with an irregularly rotating sphere floating inside.

The day after Alpha and Ninny achieved victory in the "Space Combat Simulation", Gigapolis was filled with the same commotion as usual. However, Alpha's feelings were complicated. Fragments of information about the Doomsday Star Project and Allen's words ran through my head, and I couldn't shake the feeling that something important was about to happen.

___________________


Departure: To the final star
The participants boarded a special shuttle and headed for an orbiting station called the Ecclesion Satellite. This station was said to be home to the most advanced technology in the E16 system, and was rumored to contain the core of the plan.
Inside the shuttle, there was a tense atmosphere. Ninny was looking out the window, but her expression lacked its usual calmness. On the other hand, Alpha kept clenching his fists.
“Are you worried too?” asked the man sitting next to me.
"Well," Alpha replied honestly. “But we have no choice but to do it.”
"That's right," the man smiled. "I'm Yoshiro. I'm an old-fashioned warrior from Earth, but I'm going to do my best for this test."
"Are you from Earth?" Alpha looked surprised. "I heard that most people are immigrants now..."
"Yes, Earth is a relic of the past, but it's still home to me."
___________________


Test begins: Uncharted territory
Upon arriving at the Ecclesion satellite, the participants were assembled in a vast arena. At its center stood a transparent pillar over 10 meters high, with an irregularly rotating sphere floating inside.

"This is the final exam," the administrative staff's voice rang out. "This sphere is a device called the ``Dimensional Key,'' and it is an important technology that forms the basis of the Doomsday Star Project.I ask you all to activate this device and open the door to a new dimension.''
"A door to another dimension?" Alpha couldn't help but blurt out.
“Yes,” the staff member continued. "However, activating the key requires an extremely high level of technical and mental ability. If you fail, you risk losing your life."
The participants were all excited. It became clear that this exam was not just a selection process, but a life-or-death challenge.
___________________


key test
The test was an individual competition. One by one, they stand in front of a transparent pillar and face the ``key of dimension.'' The key is a mechanism that reads the user's mental state and internal energy to determine suitability.
``Next is Alpha Cain!'' the staff called, and Alpha took a deep breath and stood in front of the pillar.
“Are you ready?” the staff member asks.
"Yeah," Alpha answered shortly, holding out his hand for the key.
Then, the sphere began to glow. At the same time, a mysterious voice echoed inside Alpha's head.
___________________


journey to the spiritual world
"Alpha Cain... who are you?"
Although it was a mechanical voice, it had a human sound to it.
"I'm...just a worker," Alpha replied.
“Why would a mere worker be here?”
"To survive. And...to make a difference."
“What is that?”
Alpha was at a loss for words for a moment. However, Allen's words and the memories of the trials up until now came to mind.
"I... want to correct the injustices in this world. I want to stand up against what controls this city, no, this entire universe."
Then, the light in the sphere became even stronger, and Alpha's consciousness completely disappeared.
___________________

___________________


Encounter in another dimension

When Alpha woke up, he was standing in a strange place. It was a strange dimension where the laws of physics didn't apply. There were countless dots of light floating around, each looking like an independent universe.
"Where... is this?"
Then, a woman appeared. She was wearing a white robe and had flowing silver hair.
"Alpha Cain," she smiled. "You have been chosen as the ``Dimensional Key.''
"Chosen?"
"That's right. You have a mission to correct the distortions in this world."
Alpha listened to her story with surprise. This place is the essence of the ``Star of the End'' project, and holds the key to opening up the future of humanity beyond dimensions.
___________________


Return and new determination
When Alpha regained consciousness, he was on his knees in the center of the arena. The participants around him were buzzing, witnessing his success.
"Alpha!" Ninny came running up to me. "Are you okay?"
"...Oh, it's okay." Alpha stood up and smiled at her.
At that moment, Allen approached. "You're doing great, Alpha. The plan is moving on to the next stage."
"Next step?" Alpha asked.
In Allen's eyes, there was determination for a new battle. "It's a battle to save this universe. Are you ready?"
"Of course," Alpha replied emphatically. "I will change this world."
Chapter 5: The road to the final star
Alpha attracted attention as one of the few participants who activated the "Dimensional Key," but he himself did not feel particularly satisfied with that fact. His experience in the spiritual world beyond dimensions was vivid, as he was able to directly see the "distortion" of the universe unfolding before his eyes. Now that he has returned, this reality has been emphasized even more, and a heavy responsibility has been placed on him.
Allen's words
"Alpha, we don't have much time. Get ready for this next step."
In the waiting room, Allen spoke quickly to himself.
"What do you mean?" Alpha frowned. "The dimensional key has already been activated. Isn't that the end of it?"

When Alpha woke up, he was standing in a strange place. It was a strange dimension where the laws of physics didn't apply. There were countless dots of light floating around, each looking like an independent universe.

"That's right. You have a mission to correct the distortions in this world."

Alpha attracted attention as one of the few participants who activated the "Dimensional Key," but he himself did not feel particularly satisfied with that fact. His experience in the spiritual world beyond dimensions was vivid, as he was able to directly see the "distortion" of the universe unfolding before his eyes. Now that he has returned, this reality has been emphasized even more, and a heavy responsibility has been placed on him.
Allen's words
"Alpha, we don't have much time. Get ready for this next step."
In the waiting room, Allen spoke quickly to himself.
"What do you mean?" Alpha frowned. "The dimensional key has already been activated. Isn't that the end of it?"

Allen took a deep breath and pointed to the electronic devices stacked on his desk. "What you have activated is only part of the key. Your next mission is to open the door to the Doomsday Planet. This can only be accomplished by you and the other chosen participants."
"The Star of the End..." Every time the words were uttered, the anxiety in Alpha's chest increased.
"What's there?"
アレンの目が鋭くなった。 "The cause of this universe's destruction is hidden there. And you are the only ones who can correct that cause."
___________________


the chosen ones
Other selected people were waiting in a separate room on the Ecclesion satellite. The lineup was diverse. Ninny Offenbach, Yoshiro, the newly revealed technological genius Linda, and the mysterious female swordsman Clementine have gathered together.
"Alpha!" Ninny called out. "You were chosen too."
"Apparently so." Alpha smiled slightly, but her expression remained hard. "But I don't know what I'm going to do yet."
Yoshiro opened his mouth. "When I heard about the Star of the End, I thought it was just an adventure, but it seems that's not the case."
"Yes," Linda answered. "Technically, there is high-dimensional energy in that star. It is likely that it is causing the distortion. The question is how that energy will affect us."
"What's the impact?" Alpha asked.
Linda tilted her head slightly. "I don't know. Theoretically, we risk destroying our very existence."
___________________


Preparation before departure
The chosen ones were guided to a state-of-the-art spaceship called the Stella Ship. This ship has special equipment that allows it to travel through dimensional rifts, allowing it to reach areas that are inaccessible to normal spacecraft.
``Is this our vehicle?'' Yoshiro exclaimed in admiration.
"You don't look reliable, though," Clementine joked lightly, to which Ninny responded with a laugh.

Allen took a deep breath and pointed to the electronic devices stacked on his desk. "What you have activated is only part of the key. Your next mission is to open the door to the Doomsday Planet. This can only be accomplished by you and the other chosen participants."
"The Star of the End..." Every time the words were uttered, the anxiety in Alpha's chest increased.
"What's there?"
Allen's eyes became sharp. "The cause of this universe's destruction is hidden there. And you are the only ones who can correct that cause."

Preparation before departure
The chosen ones were guided to a state-of-the-art spaceship called the Stella Ship. This ship has special equipment that allows it to travel through dimensional rifts, allowing it to reach areas that are inaccessible to normal spacecraft.
``Is this our vehicle?'' Yoshiro exclaimed in admiration.
"You don't look reliable, though," Clementine joked lightly, to which Ninny responded with a laugh.

Alpha quietly looked up at the hull. This shining silver structure was completely unknown to him, but it had a strange dignity about it.
Allen appeared and began a brief explanation. "This Stellar Ship was designed to travel through a dimensional rift. All members must wear special protective gear during the voyage. It is likely that the concepts of gravity and time are different within the rift."
"What do you mean by different?" Alpha asks.
"For example, one hour can be equivalent to 10 years of Earth time, and vice versa. What you do there can have a direct impact on the real world."
___________________


across the chasm
Once the Stellar Ship took off, participants enjoyed quiet sailing for a while. However, as they approached the dimensional rift, the ship's hull gradually began to tremble.
"Anomalous gravitational waves detected!" the ship's AI warned.
``Is this the effect of the rift?'' Linda checked the gauges with a nervous expression.
Suddenly, the vision in front of me began to distort. Colors and lights intersect like crazy, and the sense of reality is lost.
"Everyone, buckle up in your seats!" yelled Allen.
The Alphas donned protective suits and secured themselves to the safety equipment inside the ship. In the next moment, the entire ship was engulfed in tremendous energy.
___________________


Reaching the final star
After passing through the rift, the Alphas saw an incredible sight. There are no stars around. However, there was a huge structure floating in the darkness. At its center was a rotating red-black glowing sphere.
"Is this the Star of the End...?" Yoshiro muttered.
"No, that's not a star," Linda replied, looking at the analyzer. "That's an artifact. And it's made with extremely advanced technology."
Stellarship approached the structure and automatically entered a landing position. When the ship's door opened, the Alphas stepped onto unknown ground.
___________________


First Trial: Starwatcher
"Welcome," a voice said from somewhere.

Alpha quietly looked up at the hull. This shining silver structure was completely unknown to him, but it had a strange dignity about it.

___________________


First Trial: Starwatcher
"Welcome," a voice said from somewhere.

What appeared was a being that was neither human nor machine. Its entire body shines like metal, and its eyes emit a cold blue light. The being called himself the "Watcher."
"Who are you guys?" Alpha asks.
"I am the person who manages this planet. I am tasked with testing whether or not you are qualified to obtain the power of this planet."
"Would you like to try it?"
"That's right. If you can defeat me, you will be eligible to move on."
As the Observer finished speaking, the space around him shook. At the same time, several metal soldiers appeared in front of Alpha and his friends.
"Enter battle mode!" Ninny yelled, and everyone immediately took a fighting stance.
___________________


fierce battle
The Guardian soldiers were tough enough to withstand normal weapons. Alpha tried to attack many times, but all of them were nullified.
``Find the weak point!'' Linda shouted as she tried to read the enemy's data with the analyzer.
On the other hand, Clementine was making full use of her swordsmanship and brilliantly toying with the enemy. But everything changed the moment the Watcher himself took action. Its speed and destructive power far exceeded the expectations of the participants.
``Can I win this?'' Alpha couldn't suppress his inner anxiety.
However, there was still a fire burning in his heart that he would not give up.
Chapter 6: Death Struggle with the Watcher
The Alphas were challenging the metal guards and their soldiers standing in front of them. However, the watcher's movements were abnormally fast, and his attack boasted enough destructive power to gouge out the ground with a single blow. They fought back with all their might, but were gradually cornered by the enemy's overwhelming strength.
First wave: Clash with metal soldiers
The metal soldiers released by the watchers were completely invulnerable to normal weapons. Its armor was extremely hard, rendering even the high-energy bullet Linda was carrying ineffective.
"How hard...!" Linda gritted her teeth, trying to find another way to attack.
Clementine skillfully wielded her sword as she ran through the soldiers, looking for an opening to attack. However, the limits of this movement were beginning to appear.
"Damn, there are too many!" Ninny shouted as he was surrounded by enemies.

What appeared was a being that was neither human nor machine. Its entire body shines like metal, and its eyes emit a cold blue light. The being called himself the "Watcher."
"Who are you guys?" Alpha asks.
"I am the person who manages this planet. I am tasked with testing whether or not you are qualified to obtain the power of this planet."
"Would you like to try it?"
"That's right. If you can defeat me, you will be eligible to move on."
As the Observer finished speaking, the space around him shook. At the same time, several metal soldiers appeared in front of Alpha and his friends.
"Enter battle mode!" Ninny yelled, and everyone immediately took a fighting stance.

Chapter 6: Death Struggle with the Watcher
The Alphas were challenging the metal guards and their soldiers standing in front of them. However, the watcher's movements were abnormally fast, and his attack boasted enough destructive power to gouge out the ground with a single blow. First wave: Clash with metal soldiers
The metal soldiers released by the watchers were completely invulnerable to normal weapons. Its armor was extremely hard, rendering even the high-energy bullet Linda was carrying ineffective.
"How hard...!" Linda gritted her teeth, trying to find another way to attack.
Clementine skillfully wielded her sword as she ran through the soldiers, looking for an opening to attack. However, the limits of this movement were beginning to appear.
"Damn, there are too many!" Ninny shouted as he was surrounded by enemies.

Alpha was desperately trying to force herself not to lose her composure.
"Linda, can't you analyze the weaknesses in their armor?"
"They're doing it! But something isn't right...These guys are ignoring the laws of physics!"
According to Linda's analysis, it was discovered that the soldiers were using dimensional distortion to ward off attacks. Therefore, it cannot be defeated with normal attacks.
``Then we have no choice but to use the distortion itself!'' Alpha shouted out of an idea. "Linda, can you create a dimensional rift?"
``Try it!'' Linda manipulated the device in her hand and created a small rift in space. The rift engulfed the metal soldier and instantly annihilated him.
"It worked!" Yoshiro cheered. "At this rate, we'll take out all of them!"
___________________


Second Wave: Confronting the Watcher
After Alpha and his friends defeated the metal soldiers, the monitor finally began to move. Its entire body emits a pale light, distorting space as it approaches.
``You did a good job, but now it's time for the real thing.'' The supervisor's voice was mechanical, yet somehow tinged with coldness.
Alpha and the others launched an all-out attack, but an invisible barrier had been set up around the watchers, making all attacks null and void.
``This doesn't reveal my identity!'' Ninny yells.
The observer raised his right arm, and the space shook violently. The shockwave sent them flying and slammed them to the ground.
"Shit, what should I do..." Alpha thought as she stood up. There's no chance of winning if this continues.
At that moment, the observer suddenly stopped moving.
"Interesting, I didn't think you'd survive this long." The watcher's eyes fixed on Alpha. "It seems like there's something special about you."
"Something special?" Alpha frowned.
"That's right. It's the ability to naturally sense dimensional distortions. You just don't realize it, but there is a power within your body that resonates with the dimensional key."
___________________


Alpha's reawakening

Alpha was desperately trying to force herself not to lose her composure.
"Linda, can't you analyze the weaknesses in their armor?"

___________________


Alpha's reawakening

The moment Alpha heard the Watcher's words, the experience in the spirit world came back to her mind. A feeling that transcends dimensions, a distortion of the universe that spreads infinitely... It felt like they were now taking shape inside his body.
"Alpha!" Linda yelled. "Don't you have some special power? Try it!"
Alpha unconsciously spread his hands. Then, a pale light emitted from his palm and directly touched the Observer's barrier.
"What...!" The watcher seemed agitated for the first time.
"Can we do it?" Alpha asked himself, making the light even stronger. The power flowing through his body became more and more clear, and he felt the Observer's barrier gradually crumble.
"Is this... my power?"
"Yes," the Warden sneered. "However, it is up to you to fully utilize that power."
___________________


Settlement
Alpha believed in his own power and released all of his energy towards the watcher. A pale light completely broke through the watcher's barrier and penetrated his body.
The watcher finally said: “I’ll be waiting for you in the next test.”
With those words, the watcher's body turned into light and disappeared.
Alpha knelt there, breathing into his shoulder. "Is it finished...?"
Ninny came running up to me. "I did it! You defeated me!"
Linda and Yoshiro also smiled and clapped him on the shoulder.
___________________


new door
As the watcher disappeared, the red-black sphere at the center of the huge structure began to emit a bright light. It was a signal to open a new door to another dimension.
"Is this...the next step after Doomsday?" Alpha stood up and walked towards the door.
"You're going," Ninny said quietly.
"Yes," Alpha answered with determination in her voice. "We will open this door. That is the only way to save this universe."
They nodded to each other and started walking towards their new challenge. Beyond the door, a further unknown world and destiny awaits.
Chapter 7: Beyond the Dimensional Door

They nodded to each other and started walking towards their new challenge. Beyond the door, a further unknown world and destiny awaits.
Chapter 7: Beyond the Dimensional Door

The light emitted from the red-black sphere gradually grew stronger, and eventually the door to another dimension opened. Alpha and his friends gasped as they witnessed the unknown world that spread beyond the door. It was a distorted space filled with colors and shapes never seen in normal space. My sense of time and distance is disrupted, and everything I see keeps changing.
"This is the end of the dimensional door..." Linda muttered with a surprised expression. "It's an area where the laws of physics don't apply at all."
"I have no choice but to go." Alpha took a step forward and turned to his friends. "Our mission is to correct the distortions in this world, right?"
Yoshiro patted his shoulder and smiled. "That's right. There's no time for hesitation."
Everyone made up their minds and passed through the dimensional door. At that moment, their consciousness felt as if they were being torn apart.
___________________


A new dimension: the gap in time
When Alpha and his friends woke up, they were standing on the ground shaking unsteadily. A flowing, changing space spread out around them, and a huge mechanical structure was floating in the distance. It appeared to be part of the core of the "Star of the End."
"Where the hell is this...?" Alpha asked as she stood up, and Linda answered while observing her surroundings.
"This is a dimensional rift. An unstable space where time is not fixed." Her voice was laced with the excitement of a scientist. "That machine might be the center of the 'star'."
“Central?” Ninny frowns. “Does that mean we have to head there?”
"That's very likely." Linda nodded. "However, time and distance are not constant in this space. I think we will need some sort of breakthrough to get there."
___________________


labyrinth-like space
The Alphas started to move toward the center, but the space blocked them, as if it had a will. Every time I tried to move forward, the terrain changed, disorienting me.
"This is a trap," Yoshiro said, clutching his sword. "This world itself is testing us."
Alpha stared at the dot of light floating in front of her. “That might be a landmark.”

The light emitted from the red-black sphere gradually grew stronger, and eventually the door to another dimension opened. Alpha and his friends gasped as they witnessed the unknown world that spread beyond the door. It was a distorted space filled with colors and shapes never seen in normal space. My sense of time and distance is disrupted, and everything I see keeps changing.
"This is the end of the dimensional door..." Linda muttered with a surprised expression. "It's an area where the laws of physics don't apply at all."
"I have no choice but to go." Alpha took a step forward and turned to his friends. "Our mission is to correct the distortions in this world, right?"
Yoshiro patted his shoulder and smiled. "That's right. There's no time for hesitation."
Everyone made up their minds and passed through the dimensional door. At that moment, their consciousness felt as if they were being torn apart.

When Alpha and his friends woke up, they were standing on the ground shaking unsteadily. A flowing, changing space spread out around them, and a huge mechanical structure was floating in the distance. It appeared to be part of the core of the "Star of the End."
"Where the hell is this...?" Alpha asked as she stood up, and Linda answered while observing her surroundings.
"This is a dimensional rift. An unstable space where time is not fixed." Her voice was laced with the excitement of a scientist. "That machine might be the center of the 'star'."
“Central?” Ninny frowns. “Does that mean we have to head there?”
"That's very likely." Linda nodded. "However, time and distance are not constant in this space. I think we will need some sort of breakthrough to get there."
___________________


labyrinth-like space
The Alphas started to move toward the center, but the space blocked them, as if it had a will. Every time I tried to move forward, the terrain changed, disorienting me.
"This is a trap," Yoshiro said, clutching his sword. "This world itself is testing us."
Alpha stared at the dot of light floating in front of her. “That might be a landmark.”

The light emitted from the red-black sphere gradually grew stronger, and eventually the door to another dimension opened. Alpha and his friends gasped as they witnessed the unknown world that spread beyond the door. It was a distorted space filled with colors and shapes never seen in normal space. My sense of time and distance is disrupted, and everything I see keeps changing.
"This is the end of the dimensional door..." Linda muttered with a surprised expression. "It's an area where the laws of physics don't apply at all."
"I have no choice but to go." Alpha took a step forward and turned to his friends. "Our mission is to correct the distortions in this world, right?"
Yoshiro patted his shoulder and smiled. "That's right. There's no time for hesitation."
Everyone made up their minds and passed through the dimensional door. At that moment, their consciousness felt as if they were being torn apart.
___________________


A new dimension: the gap in time
When Alpha and his friends woke up, they were standing on the ground shaking unsteadily. A flowing, changing space spread out around them, and a huge mechanical structure was floating in the distance. It appeared to be part of the core of the "Star of the End."
"Where the hell is this...?" Alpha asked as she stood up, and Linda answered while observing her surroundings.

"That's very likely." Linda nodded. "However, time and distance are not constant in this space. I think we will need some sort of breakthrough to get there."
___________________


labyrinth-like space
The Alphas started to move toward the center, but the space blocked them, as if it had a will. Every time I tried to move forward, the terrain changed, disorienting me.
"This is a trap," Yoshiro said, clutching his sword. "This world itself is testing us."
Alpha stared at the dot of light floating in front of her. “That might be a landmark.”

They followed the light, but a gigantic being appeared along the way. It was a living creature of light with countless eyes, and was so large that it covered the entire space.
"What... is this?" Ninny stopped, wary.
The life form of light spoke to me in a low voice. "I am the Guardian of Time. I impose a test on those who pass through this space."
___________________


test of time
The Guardian's challenge was to find the key to stabilizing the dimensional rift. The key is hidden within space, and if they don't find it within a certain amount of time, they will be trapped in this space forever.
``Looking for the key in a space where time is not constant... how should I go about it?'' Alpha said, confused.
Linda calmly guessed. "This space seems to have a will. In other words, the position of the key can change depending on our actions and thoughts."
``Does that mean we have to proceed the right way?'' Yoshiro asks.
"That's right," Linda nodded. “But we need to understand how our thoughts affect the space.”
___________________


looking for the key
They dispersed and began searching for the key. Alpha proceeded alone, following her instincts. Then, suddenly, the surrounding scenery changed and his past self appeared in front of him.
“Is this… me?”
Alpha's past was reenacting her difficult life in Gigapolis. Poverty, loneliness, and anxiety about the future.
“What are you looking for?” My past self asked me.
Alpha clenched his fists. "I want the power to change this universe. That's why I'm here."
Then, his past self smiled and disappeared. A glowing key was floating in that place.
___________________


overcoming challenges
At the same time that Alpha got the key, the other friends were also finding it in their own ways. Ninny reaffirms her confidence as a warrior, Yoshiro faces the memories of his past battles, and Linda deepens her inquisitive spirit as a scientist, and as a result, all of them are able to obtain the key.

"Is this the end?" Yoshiro asked, and the Guardian of Time reappeared.
"You did well. But this is not all. The next challenge awaits."
With the guardian's words, space began to distort again. A door to a new dimension appeared before them.
___________________


Departing for the final test
"Let's go." Alpha took the lead, showing determination as he headed beyond the door. "This is our mission."
Everyone nodded silently and passed through the dimensional door. They intuitively sensed that even harsher trials and truths awaited them on the other side of the door.
What will they meet in the next world? What is the core of "The Star of the End"? The battle between Alpha and the others has only just begun.
Chapter 8: To the core of the final star
What the Alphas saw when they passed through the dimensional door was a magnificent and alien landscape. There was an ever-expanding space, and the sky was intertwined with gigantic bands of light, making it seem as if the universe itself was writhing. The ground is uneven, rippling like liquid, but it remains firm enough to support my feet.
"Is this...the center of the Doomsday Star?" Alpha muttered in shock.
Linda answered while activating the analysis device she had brought with her. "There's no doubt about it. You can think of this whole space as the star itself. We're inside the star right now."
Ninny looked up at the sky anxiously. "Can we make it home alive?"
"I can go home," Yoshiro answered emphatically. "But first we have to find the answer to what this planet is."
___________________


Center of Light: Path to the “Core”
A huge pillar of light visible in the distance. Linda's device shows that beyond that, there is an existence called the "core" of the Doomsday Star. They decided to move towards the pillar, but many trials awaited them along the way.
The first obstacle was the terrain itself. The undulating ground suddenly changed shape, creating deep valleys and steep cliffs, and even the dimensions themselves were twisted, frequently throwing you off course.
"Are we on the right path?" Ninny said in an irritated voice.

"Is this the end?" Yoshiro asked, and the Guardian of Time reappeared.
"You did well. But this is not all. The next challenge awaits."
With the guardian's words, space began to distort again. A door to a new dimension appeared before them.

___________________


Center of Light: Path to the “Core”
A huge pillar of light visible in the distance. Linda's device shows that beyond that, there is an existence called the "core" of the Doomsday Star. They decided to move towards the pillar, but many trials awaited them along the way.
The first obstacle was the terrain itself. The undulating ground suddenly changed shape, creating deep valleys and steep cliffs, and even the dimensions themselves were twisted, frequently throwing you off course.
"Are we on the right path?" Ninny said in an irritated voice.

Linda calmly checked the device and answered. "Don't think in terms of physical straight lines. Space itself is distorted here. Our position is just a concept of coordinates."
"You mean?" Alpha asked back.
"I guess you just have to trust your instincts," Linda shrugged lightly.
They proceeded cautiously, but along the way they encountered one unusual phenomenon after another.
___________________


a phantom that appears
As they progressed, the Alphas began to notice strange phenomena. The shadows and voices that appeared around them were the embodiment of their own past memories.
"Alpha..."
Alpha turned around in response to that voice and saw her mother there when she was young. She had a warm smile on her face and was holding out her hand.
"You don't have to come to a place like this. Come back and let's live together."
"Mom...?" Alpha was shaken and tried to take a step forward.
"Alpha!" Ninny stopped him in a sharp voice. "It's an illusion! Don't be fooled!"
Alpha was brought back to his senses by Ninny's voice and sensed a foreign energy lurking within the illusion. At that moment, the mother's appearance distorted and turned into a monster with countless tentacles.
"You shouldn't touch this planet..." A low, booming voice echoed around them.
``Looks like you're not welcome.'' Yoshiro readied his sword.
___________________


First Trial: Battle with the Illusionary Incarnation
The tentacled monster tried to use Alpha's memories to destabilize him. Apparitions of other companions appeared around them, and each of them spoke words that tested their hearts.
"I was wrong..." Visions of the victims of her failed experiments appeared before Linda.
“It all ended because of you!” The phantoms accuse in unison.
``That's not true!'' cried Linda, operating the device and beginning to analyze the illusion. "This was created using our memories. It's not real!"
Ninny was also facing her own illusions. In front of her, the figures of people who lost their lives on past battlefields appeared one after another.
“You killed it!”
"Are you prepared to bear that responsibility?"

Linda calmly checked the device and answered. "Don't think in terms of physical straight lines. Space itself is distorted here. Our position is just a concept of coordinates."
"You mean?" Alpha asked back.
"I guess you just have to trust your instincts," Linda shrugged lightly.
They proceeded cautiously, but along the way they encountered one unusual phenomenon after another.

First Trial: Battle with the Illusionary Incarnation
The tentacled monster tried to use Alpha's memories to destabilize him. Apparitions of other companions appeared around them, and each of them spoke words that tested their hearts.
"I was wrong..." Visions of the victims of her failed experiments appeared before Linda.
“It all ended because of you!” The phantoms accuse in unison.
``That's not true!'' cried Linda, operating the device and beginning to analyze the illusion. "This was created using our memories. It's not real!"
Ninny was also facing her own illusions. In front of her, the figures of people who lost their lives on past battlefields appeared one after another.
“You killed it!”
"Are you prepared to bear that responsibility?"

``I made up my mind a long time ago!'' Ninny slashed at the illusion, slicing through the monster that was lurking behind it.
Alpha also fought to shake off the doubts inside of herself. Rather than denying his past self, he accepted it, created a gap in the illusion, and worked with his friends to defeat the monster.
___________________


Access to the core
As soon as I defeated the monster, the surrounding landscape became silent, and the pillar of light that had been visible in the distance suddenly approached.
``Looks like you've made it through the ordeal,'' Linda said.
"But this isn't the end." Alpha said grimly. "There's something still waiting at the end of that pillar."
When they arrived at the base of the pillar, they found a huge spherical device sitting there. Complex patterns emerge on its surface, distorting the surrounding space itself.
``This is the core of the ``Star of the End''...?'' The moment Linda pointed the analysis device at it, the device emitted an error. "The energy is too strong... It's dangerous to get any closer."
"Still, it has to be done." Alpha stepped forward.
___________________


Core Existence: Star Will
The sphere suddenly began to emit light. The light takes shape and transforms into a human-like figure.
"Welcome, visitors," the being said in a cold voice. "The fact that you have arrived here means that you are ready to understand the will of this planet."
"The will of the stars?" Ninny asked back.
"That's right. This planet exists to maintain the balance of the universe. And it has the role of eliminating those who disturb that balance."
"Eliminate...?" Alpha exclaimed in surprise. "What are you guys doing? Why are you disturbing the balance?"
"The very existence of humanity is a threat to the universe," answered the will of the stars. "The more you prosper, the more the dimensional distortion will expand, and the universe itself will collapse."
"Does that mean you're going to destroy us?" Alpha yelled.

``I made up my mind a long time ago!'' Ninny slashed at the illusion, slicing through the monster that was lurking behind it.
Alpha also fought to shake off the doubts inside of herself. Rather than denying his past self, he accepted it, created a gap in the illusion, and worked with his friends to defeat the monster.

Core Existence: Star Will
The sphere suddenly began to emit light. The light takes shape and transforms into a human-like figure.
"Welcome, visitors," the being said in a cold voice. "The fact that you have arrived here means that you are ready to understand the will of this planet."
"The will of the stars?" Ninny asked back.
"That's right. This planet exists to maintain the balance of the universe. And it has the role of eliminating those who disturb that balance."
"Eliminate...?" Alpha exclaimed in surprise. "What are you guys doing? Why are you disturbing the balance?"
"The very existence of humanity is a threat to the universe," answered the will of the stars. "The more you prosper, the more the dimensional distortion will expand, and the universe itself will collapse."
"Does that mean you're going to destroy us?" Alpha yelled.

"That's one of your options," Hoshi's will said coldly. "But there is another option. We can use the power of this star to rebuild the entire universe."
___________________


final decision
“Reconstruction?” Linda doubts. “What exactly does that mean?”
"All dimensions will be destroyed once and then regenerated in a new form," replied the will of the stars. "But you may sacrifice yourself in return."
"That's it...!" Ninny looked shocked. "Then we're going to give our lives?"
Alpha quietly looked at the star's intentions. "Is that really the only way to save the universe?"
"The answer is yours to choose," answered Star Will. "You are the ones who decide whether to entrust the power of this planet to you, not me."
Everyone fell silent. Their decisions were important, affecting the future of the entire universe.
Chapter 9: Decision time
The Alphas were all silent in response to the options of ``rebuilding'' and ``accepting destruction'' presented by the will of the planet. The weight of their grand mission to recreate the universe itself seemed to be crushing them.
"Are you saying we have to choose...the fate of this entire universe is in our hands..." Alpha bit her lip.
``No one knows if rebuilding is really the right path.'' Linda said, scratching her head. "But it is also true that if we leave things as they are, the universe will collapse."
Ninny stabbed her sword into the ground, showing her frustration. "Isn't there a way out without making sacrifices? We fought our way through and came this far. Does that mean we still have to lose something?"
"That's the reality," Yoshiro said in a calm voice. "We don't have much time. No matter what we choose, if we don't act, this space itself will collapse."
At that moment, the entire space shook, and the energy emitted from the sphere began to run wild.
star's will
"You only have a short time left to make a choice. If this space becomes completely unstable, you and the universe will disappear."
___________________


beyond choice

___________________


beyond choice

Alpha looked at each of his friends' faces one by one. Every eye is a mixture of fear and determination. Then, I faced the doubts within myself.
"Wait," Alpha called out to the star's will. “Are these really the only two ways?”
Star Will was silent for a moment and answered in a cold voice. "If you want a different path, you have no choice but to carve it out for yourself. To do that, you will need the power of action and creativity that goes beyond our imagination."
``So, does that mean it's possible to increase your options?'' A light appeared in Alpha's eyes. "We're looking for a third way."
"Third way?" Linda asked in surprise. “Do you think such a thing exists?”
"I don't know if there is," Alpha replied. "However, if we completely control the power of this star, there should be a possibility that we can save the universe through methods other than rebuilding it."
"But that requires control of the star's core itself," Linda voiced her concerns. “Will the will of the stars allow that?”
``There's no need to forgive.'' Yoshiro stepped forward. "We have fought our way to this point. We are ready to take away that power."
___________________


Fusion with the star core
The Alphas once again stood in front of the sphere and held their hands up. Star Will said quietly, smiling coldly.
"If you desire that power, take the test of merging with the star itself. If you succeed, you will become part of the universe itself. But if you fail..."
Before he could finish speaking, countless threads of light began to extend from the sphere. It wrapped itself around the Alphas' bodies and poured intense energy into them.
"Aaah!" Alpha screamed. The light seemed to go beyond the body and erode the spirit itself.
``This is the test of fusion...!'' Linda also struggled to concentrate. "If we don't unite our minds, we will be swallowed up by the power of the stars!"
All Alphas were forced to face their memories, emotions, and fears. It was not just a test, but a journey to question the meaning of their own existence.
___________________

He was once again confronted with the ghost of his mother. It brings back the days when I suffered from poverty and lost hope for the future. But he held on to the memory.
"I don't deny my past self. It's because of that that I was able to come this far!"
The thread of light shined intensely, and a new power was awakened the moment Alpha's spirit became one with the star's power.
Ninny
She looked at her friends who had been lost on the battlefield. their voices are heard. "Don't forget us..."
"I'll never forget!" cried Ninny, raising his sword. "That's why I'm here to fight!"
The sword was enveloped in light, and her will became connected to the power of the stars.
linda
She was faced with the failure of a past experiment. The countless lives lost blame her.
``I will carry the burden of the sacrifices I made to you all for the rest of my life,'' Linda cried. “But I will use this power to ensure that my sacrifice is not in vain!”
Yoshiro
He was struggling with the contradiction between his past and present as a warrior. However, he remembered his friends and remembered his mission.
"I live to wield the sword. And with this sword, I will open up my future!"
___________________


Awakening of new power
The moment everyone passed the mental test, the threads of light converged into one, and the sphere released a huge amount of energy. The Alphas stood in the center, their entire bodies shining.
"This...the power of the stars..." Alpha muttered. His voice was calm, but it contained a certain determination.
The will of the stars has reappeared. "You have overcome the trials and obtained the power of the stars. Now you will be the ones who save the universe itself."
"No," Alpha said quietly. 「俺たちがやるのは救うことだけじゃない。この宇宙を新たな未来へと導くことだ。」
___________________


Reconstruction of the universe
Alpha and his friends, who had completely mastered the power of the stars, began to correct the dimensional distortions that were spreading throughout the universe. The process was fierce, but their power was definitely restored to balance.
やがて、次元の裂け目が閉じ、宇宙全体が穏やかさを取り戻した。
"Did you...?" Ninny muttered in a tired voice.

"That's one of your options," Hoshi's will said coldly. "But there is another option. We can use the power of this star to rebuild the entire universe."
___________________


final decision
“Reconstruction?” Linda doubts. “What exactly does that mean?”
"All dimensions will be destroyed once and then regenerated in a new form," replied the will of the stars. "But you may sacrifice yourself in return."
"That's it...!" Ninny looked shocked. "Then we're going to give our lives?"
Alpha quietly looked at the star's intentions. "Is that really the only way to save the universe?"
"The answer is yours to choose," answered Star Will. "You are the ones who decide whether to entrust the power of this planet to you, not me."
Everyone fell silent. Their decisions were important, affecting the future of the entire universe.
Chapter 9: Decision time
The Alphas were all silent in response to the options of ``rebuilding'' and ``accepting destruction'' presented by the will of the planet. The weight of their grand mission to recreate the universe itself seemed to be crushing them.
"Are you saying we have to choose...the fate of this entire universe is in our hands..." Alpha bit her lip.
``No one knows if rebuilding is really the right path.'' Linda said, scratching her head. "But it is also true that if we leave things as they are, the universe will collapse."
Ninny stabbed her sword into the ground, showing her frustration. "Isn't there a way out without making sacrifices? We fought our way through and came this far. Does that mean we still have to lose something?"
"That's the reality," Yoshiro said in a calm voice. "We don't have much time. No matter what we choose, if we don't act, this space itself will collapse."
At that moment, the entire space shook, and the energy emitted from the sphere began to run wild.
star's will
"You only have a short time left to make a choice. If this space becomes completely unstable, you and the universe will disappear."
___________________


beyond choice

He was once again confronted with the ghost of his mother. It brings back the days when I suffered from poverty and lost hope for the future. But he held on to the memory.
"I don't deny my past self. It's because of that that I was able to come this far!"
The thread of light shined intensely, and a new power was awakened the moment Alpha's spirit became one with the star's power.
Ninny
She looked at her friends who had been lost on the battlefield. their voices are heard. "Don't forget us..."
"I'll never forget!" cried Ninny, raising his sword. "That's why I'm here to fight!"

"This...the power of the stars..." Alpha muttered. His voice was calm, but it contained a certain determination.
The will of the stars has reappeared. "You have overcome the trials and obtained the power of the stars. Now you will be the ones who save the universe itself."
"No," Alpha said quietly. "What we do is not just save, but lead this universe to a new future."
___________________


Reconstruction of the universe
Alpha and his friends, who had completely mastered the power of the stars, began to correct the dimensional distortions that were spreading throughout the universe. The process was fierce, but their power was definitely restored to balance.
Eventually, the dimensional rift closed and the entire universe returned to peace.
"Did you...?" Ninny muttered in a tired voice.

"We're not done yet," Alpha smiled. "But this is a new beginning."
___________________


Epilogue: A new era
The Alphas were etched into history as heroes who saved the universe. However, they were not satisfied with this and vowed to continue their activities to prevent new distortions.
"We have become one with the universe itself," Alpha said, looking up at the stars. "We will continue to fight. That is our mission."
At the end of the universe, there is an unknown world that has not yet been seen. And Alpha's adventures will continue.
Chapter 10: New Challenge
Alpha and his friends accomplished their mission to save the universe and correct the dimensional distortion. As a result, the entire universe regained stability, and humanity seemed to have entered a new era of peace. However, the last words spoken by the star's will stuck in Alpha's heart.
"Equilibrium is temporary. Further challenges will be necessary to maintain a new equilibrium."
Before they can confirm the true meaning of those words, they are forced to face the next test. Peace in the universe is short-lived, as a new threat creeps in from another dimension.
___________________


anomaly in the universe
Immediately after the distortion correction was completed, strange phenomena began to be reported from various parts of the universe. It was a phenomenon in which matter suddenly disappeared or the flow of time abnormally accelerated. These phenomena were occurring at the edges of the modified dimension and were gradually expanding toward the center.
``What does this mean?'' Alpha visited Linda and received the report.
Linda pointed to the data displayed on the screen. "It is possible that the balance of the universe has changed as a result of correcting dimensional distortions. However, this phenomenon cannot be explained by that alone. The movement appears as if something is interfering from the outside."
“External…?”
"It could be an invasion from another dimension or even a new universe itself."
___________________


New Threat: Extradimensional Lifeforms

"We're not done yet," Alpha smiled. "But this is a new beginning."
___________________


Epilogue: A new era

“External…?”
"It could be an invasion from another dimension or even a new universe itself."
___________________


New Threat: Extradimensional Lifeforms

One day, a huge rift appeared in the sky above Gigapolis. What emerged from the rift was a being completely different from the creatures and machines that had existed up until now. They were called "extradimensional lifeforms" and had irregular shapes and physical laws, and had the power to erode reality itself.
"What are they...?" Ninny narrowed her eyes as she gripped her sword.
``Is this a new threat emerging from the dimensional rift?'' Yoshiro drew his sword. “We have no choice but to stop it.”
The lifeforms that emerge from the rift not only cause destruction, but also have the ability to randomly mutate the materials and lifeforms they come into contact with. As a result, parts of Gigapolis began to rapidly collapse.
___________________


Battle against extradimensional lifeforms
The alphas immediately started moving. They used the power of the stars to fight against the extradimensional life forms, but their existence was so alien that even the power of the stars could not fully penetrate them.
"Damn it! It's not working!" Ninny shouted as she saw the energy blade she shot towards the enemy being absorbed into the enemy's body.
``With this, you can't just use force.'' Linda began her analysis calmly. "Their structure is changing the dimensions themselves. We can't counter them unless we apply dimensional manipulation."
Alpha felt the power of the star flowing through his body and said to his friends. "Everyone, let's link the powers of the stars. If we become one, we might be able to stand against them."
___________________


Evolution of star power
The Alphas concentrated their consciousness and gathered the power of the stars. As a result, a new ability to use dimensional distortion in reverse was awakened. It was a technology called ``dimensional integration,'' and it was the only means that could nullify the power of extradimensional lifeforms.
"This is our new power!" cried Alpha, unleashing the power of dimensional integration.
That energy enveloped the extradimensional life form, harmonizing the other party's very existence with the universe. Living organisms were not destroyed, but transformed into part of the universe.
"You fused them instead of killing them?" Ninny said, looking surprised.

One day, a huge rift appeared in the sky above Gigapolis. What emerged from the rift was a being completely different from the creatures and machines that had existed up until now. They were called "extradimensional lifeforms" and had irregular shapes and physical laws, and had the power to erode reality itself.
"What are they...?" Ninny narrowed her eyes as she gripped her sword.

That energy enveloped the extradimensional life form, harmonizing the other party's very existence with the universe. Living organisms were not destroyed, but transformed into part of the universe.
"You fused them instead of killing them?" Ninny said, looking surprised.

"Destruction is a last resort," Alpha answered quietly. "In order to protect the universe, I want to choose a path that is in harmony with all existence."
___________________


Further Truth: The Purpose of Extradimensional Lifeforms
After the battle, information was collected from the extradimensional remains. As a result of analyzing the data, a surprising fact was revealed.
"They weren't the enemy..." Linda said with a stunned expression. "Rather, I was trying to repair the universe itself."
``What do you mean?'' Yoshiro asked with a grim look on his face.
"Extradimensional lifeforms are beings outside of our universe. They have intervened to repair the crumbling dimension, but their methods have seemed destructive to us."
"So you're saying you misunderstood?" Alpha mused.
"That's true, but the problem is that their method of repair is intolerable for our universe," Linda continued. "So we have to create new ways to coexist with them."
___________________


space integration program
Alpha and his friends attempted to communicate with extradimensional life forms. Using the power of the stars as a medium, he sought a way for disparate beings to communicate beyond words. The results showed that the extradimensional lifeforms were not hostile, and that they were also desperate to protect their own universe.
"Let's find a way to coexist with each other," Alpha said to the center of the life form. "We are not enemies. We are guardians of the same universe."
The life form emitted light in response, and that light opened the door to a new dimension. That door was a bridge connecting the universe of Alphas and the universe of extradimensional life forms.
___________________


Departing for a new adventure
The Space Integration Plan begins, and Alpha and his friends decide to embark on a new journey to build a cooperative relationship with extradimensional life forms. It was an adventure to explore unknown dimensions and uncover the truth of the larger universe.
"Our mission is never over," Alpha said to his companions. "We will continue to fight to protect this universe and create a new future."

"We're not done yet," Alpha smiled. "But this is a new beginning."
___________________


Epilogue: A new era
The Alphas were etched into history as heroes who saved the universe. However, they were not satisfied with this and vowed to continue their activities to prevent new distortions.

More Truth: The Purpose of Extradimensional Lifeforms
After the battle, information was collected from the extradimensional remains. As a result of analyzing the data, a surprising fact was revealed.
"They weren't the enemy..." Linda said with a stunned expression. "Rather, I was trying to repair the universe itself."

space integration program
