The results showed that the extradimensional lifeforms were not hostile, and that they were also desperate to protect their own universe.
"Let's find a way to coexist with each other," Alpha said to the center of the life form. "We are not enemies. We are guardians of the same universe."
The life form emitted light in response, and that light opened the door to a new dimension. That door was a bridge connecting the universe of Alphas and the universe of extradimensional life forms.
___________________


Departing for a new adventure
The Space Integration Plan begins, and Alpha and his friends decide to embark on a new journey to build a cooperative relationship with extradimensional life forms. It was an adventure to explore unknown dimensions and uncover the truth of the larger universe.
"Our mission is never over," Alpha said to his companions. "We will continue to fight to protect this universe and create a new future."

Although their story has come to an end here, it will continue into an even grander future.
Chapter 11: Emergence of Christoffel Dimension
Several months have passed since Alpha and the others began building a cooperative system with extradimensional life forms. The dimensional distortion gradually subsided, and the entire universe seemed to have regained stability. However, as if to break the silence, a new anomaly was reported in the far reaches of space. It was the appearance of a dimension that had never been observed before.
"Alpha, I have a report." Linda pointed to the data on the screen. "A dimension that was supposed to be unobservable suddenly came into contact with our universe."
Alpha frowned. "An unobservable dimension? What does that mean?"
``It's a place that cannot exist under normal physics or dimensional theory,'' Linda continued, with a serious look on her face. "However, the observation equipment does show a response. This dimension has been named the 'Christoffel dimension.'"
"Christoffel...is it someone's name?" Yoshiro asked.
"No," Linda shook her head. "It's a name taken from a mathematical concept used to describe the distortion of a curved space or dimension. This dimension itself represents a state of extreme distortion."
___________________


Singularity of Christoffel dimension
According to Linda's explanation, the Christoffel dimension was fundamentally different from existing dimensions. Inside, time and space are completely fused, creating a situation where the past and future exist simultaneously. Furthermore, this dimension had the property of growing autonomously and absorbing surrounding dimensions.
"If left unchecked, the Christoffel dimension could swallow our universe," Linda warned.
``So I guess we'll just have to go out there and do something about it.'' Ninny readjusted his sword.
"But it's dangerous to go inside," Linda continued. "We cannot predict how the laws within a dimension will affect us."
"But if we don't go, the universe itself will be in jeopardy," Alpha said with a determined look on his face. “We have no choice but to do it.”

___________________


Invading the Christoffel dimension
Alpha and his friends boarded a state-of-the-art dimensional navigation ship called "Stellaship Altair" and headed to the Christoffel dimension. This ship was strengthened with the power of stars and was designed to survive in unknown dimensional environments.
"Coordinates fixed complete." Linda reported. "We'll reach the dimensional boundary in three minutes."
``Brace yourselves.'' Yoshiro placed his sword on his hip and was alert to his surroundings. "It might be even more troublesome than with extradimensional lifeforms."
The moment the ship entered the dimensional boundary, Alpha and the others were engulfed in a completely alien space with an intense light.
___________________


Anomalous space within dimensions
The interior of the Christoffel dimension was unlike any other space before. Countless clock-like gears were floating in the sky, and the horizon was distorted and continued on endlessly. Furthermore, in the distance, they could see another figure of themselves acting in a different time axis.
"Is this...ourselves?" Alpha muttered curiously.
"Looks like it," Linda replied, checking the analyzer. "In this dimension, time branches out infinitely. Past selves, future selves, and all possible selves exist here."
``Then where is the enemy?'' Ninny looked around.
At that moment, the entire space trembled and a huge shadow appeared. It was an existence composed of countless gears and distorted light.
___________________


Dimensional administrator "Aurora"
"Welcome to my realm, travelers," a deep voice called out, and the shadows began to take shape. It looked like a human, but its entire body was made up of clock parts and fragments of light.
"I am Aurora, the administrator of Christoffel dimension."
"Administrator?" Alpha asked. "Who are you? Why is this dimension trying to invade our universe?"
Aurora looked at Alpha with cold eyes. "It's not erosion. My dimension is just trying to maintain balance. As long as your universe continues to expand, it will affect our dimension as well."

"Destruction is a last resort," Alpha answered quietly. "In order to protect the universe, I want to choose a path that is in harmony with all existence."
___________________


More Truth: The Purpose of Extradimensional Lifeforms
After the battle, information was collected from the extradimensional remains. As a result of analyzing the data, a surprising fact was revealed.
"They weren't the enemy..." Linda said with a stunned expression. "Rather, I was trying to repair the universe itself."
``What do you mean?'' Yoshiro asked with a grim look on his face.
"Extradimensional lifeforms are beings outside of our universe. They have intervened to repair the crumbling dimension, but their methods have seemed destructive to us."
"So you're saying you misunderstood?" Alpha mused.
"That's true, but the problem is that their method of repair is intolerable for our universe," Linda continued. "So we have to create new ways to coexist with them."

space integration program

``Brace yourselves.'' Yoshiro placed his sword on his hip and was alert to his surroundings. "It might be even more troublesome than with extradimensional lifeforms."
The moment the ship entered the dimensional boundary, Alpha and the others were engulfed in a completely alien space with an intense light.
___________________


Anomalous space within dimensions
The interior of the Christoffel dimension was unlike any other space before. Countless clock-like gears were floating in the sky, and the horizon was distorted and continued on endlessly. Furthermore, in the distance, they could see another figure of themselves acting in a different time axis.
"Is this...ourselves?" Alpha muttered curiously.
"Looks like it," Linda replied, checking the analyzer. "In this dimension, time branches out infinitely. Past selves, future selves, and all possible selves exist here."
``Then where is the enemy?'' Ninny looked around.
At that moment, the entire space trembled and a huge shadow appeared. It was an existence composed of countless gears and distorted light.
___________________


Dimensional administrator "Aurora"
"Welcome to my realm, travelers," a deep voice called out, and the shadows began to take shape. It looked like a human, but its entire body was made up of clock parts and fragments of light.
"I am Aurora, the administrator of Christoffel dimension."
"Administrator?" Alpha asked. "Who are you? Why is this dimension trying to invade our universe?"
Aurora looked at Alpha with cold eyes. "It's not erosion. My dimension is just trying to maintain balance. As long as your universe continues to expand, it will affect our dimension as well."

"So you're planning on swallowing our universe?" Linda exclaimed. "Even if you do that, you won't maintain balance!"
"It's no wonder you guys think so," Aurora said quietly. "But unless you understand the true nature of this dimension, you have no choice."
___________________


The beginning of the trial
Aurora tells Alpha and the others that she will put them through a "trial of choice." In this trial, they will have to face their own past and future, as well as the possibilities they did not choose.
"Only those who can overcome this trial will gain the power to change the future of the dimension."
At that moment, the Alphas were separated into different spaces.
Alpha's Trial
Alpha stood at the moment where his former self had failed. The poor days in Gigapolis and the regret of not being able to protect my mother come back to me. The person in front of me was another me.
"What do you want?" asked the Alpha of the past. "Glory? Revenge? Or escape?"
"What I want..." Alpha clenched his fists. "It's about protecting the future of the entire universe!"
At that moment, my past self smiled and disappeared.
___________________


Ninny's Trial
Ninny was dealing with the comrades she lost on the battlefield. Their corpses spread out before my eyes, and my heart tightens with remorse.
"Stop fighting," the phantom whispers. "If we fight, we'll just make more sacrifices."
``I'll still fight!'' Ninny cried as she brandished her sword. “Because that’s the reason I exist!”
___________________


fusion of dimensions
After overcoming the ordeal, the Alphas gathered together again and stood in front of Aurora. There was no hesitation in their eyes.
"We accept your will," Aurora said quietly. "But the trial is not over yet. You must make a final decision to protect this dimension."
"A decision?" Alpha asked back.
"That's right. Do you want to close this dimension or integrate it in a new way? It's up to you."
The Alphas look at each other, searching for the best way to save the entire universe.

Chapter 12: Compound Conjugation - Acquiring the ability to manipulate the phase of space-time
After confronting Aurora, the administrator of the Christoffel dimension, Alpha and his friends realized that they were the ones who should be tested. In order to manipulate the dimension itself and choose between integration or extinction, he felt that he needed a new power that exceeded his current abilities. At that time, the power of the stars and the energy of the Christoffel dimension resonated, showing them new possibilities.
``Alpha, can you feel this?'' Linda held her hand over the distorted space around her. "This dimension has the potential to manipulate space and time itself."
"I can feel it." Alpha closed her eyes and concentrated on the dimensional fluctuations. "It feels like time and space have merged into one."
Aurora spoke to me quietly. "You are qualified to learn this dimension's 'complement conjugate'. This is the power to manipulate the phase of space-time itself. However, gaining this power comes at a price. Are you prepared to accept that?"
___________________


Compound conjugate--its true power
"What is companion conjugate?" Alpha asked Aurora.
``The companion conjugate is a power that directly manipulates the phase of space-time, that is, the fluctuations of time and space.'' Aurora raised her hand and distorted the space around her. "With this power, it is possible to alter the past and reconstruct the future. However, at the same time, this power also carries the risk of destroying reality and creating a new dimension of distortion."
"Does that mean it will be a powerful weapon?" Yoshiro asked curiously.
"Yes," Aurora nodded. "However, if this power cannot be controlled, the user himself will collapse under its influence."
___________________


Trials to obtain partner conjugate
In order to obtain companion conjugate, it was necessary to resonate with the dimension itself and to perfectly match the distortion of one's own mind and space-time. It will be a severe test both physically and mentally.
``Now, if you desire power, follow me.'' Aurora pointed the way like a giant gear turning. Beyond that, a strange space filled with swirling light and shadow spread out.
The Alphas proceeded along the path without hesitation and arrived at the testing ground.

"So you're planning on swallowing our universe?" Linda exclaimed. "Even if you do that, you won't maintain balance!"
"It's no wonder you guys think so," Aurora said quietly. "But unless you understand the true nature of this dimension, you have no choice."
___________________


The beginning of the trial
Aurora tells Alpha and the others that she will put them through a "trial of choice." In this trial, they will have to face their own past and future, as well as the possibilities they did not choose.
"Only those who can overcome this trial will gain the power to change the future of the dimension."
At that moment, the Alphas were separated into different spaces.
Alpha's Trial
Alpha stood at the moment where his former self had failed. The poor days in Gigapolis and the regret of not being able to protect my mother come back to me. The person in front of me was another me.
"What do you want?" asked the Alpha of the past. "Glory? Revenge? Or escape?"
"What I want..." Alpha clenched his fists. "It's about protecting the future of the entire universe!"
At that moment, my past self smiled and disappeared.
___________________


Ninny's Trial
Ninny was dealing with the comrades she lost on the battlefield. Their corpses spread out before my eyes, and my heart tightens with remorse.
"Stop fighting," the phantom whispers. "If we fight, we'll just make more sacrifices."
``I'll still fight!'' Ninny cried as she brandished her sword. “Because that’s the reason I exist!”
___________________


fusion of dimensions
After overcoming the ordeal, the Alphas gathered together again and stood in front of Aurora. There was no hesitation in their eyes.
"We accept your will," Aurora said quietly. "But the trial is not over yet. You must make a final decision to protect this dimension."
"A decision?" Alpha asked back.
"That's right. Do you want to close this dimension or integrate it in a new way? It's up to you."
The Alphas look at each other, searching for the best way to save the entire universe.

___________________


First stage of the trial: Fragment of Time
The first test was a "fragment of time" that intertwined memories of the past and the future. In this space, each person is forced to experience their own most painful memories and the future based on them.
In front of Alpha's eyes, the days in Gigapolis came back to life. I can see myself as a boy, suffering from poverty and losing hope for the future. And beyond that, a ruinous future was projected if he had not obtained the power of the stars.
"This is a future I didn't choose..." Alpha clenched his fists. "But if you don't face this future, you won't get this power."
Linda, Ninny, and Yoshiro also accepted their memories while facing their past and future.
___________________


Second stage of the trial: Manipulating space and time
The next test required ``tuning the phase'' in distorted space-time. This attunement adjusts the dimensional disturbance into the correct form, and if it fails, the tester himself will be swallowed up by the turbulence of space and time.
``Keep calm...feel the flow of space.'' Linda instructed while analyzing the surrounding space. "If you rush, it's over."
Alpha used the power of the stars to reach out to the flickering space in front of him. As if pulling an invisible thread, the phase of the space is adjusted.
"Okay, the dimension has stabilized!" At the moment Alpha shouted, the surrounding scenery changed completely, and an even deeper testing ground appeared.
___________________


Awakening of partner conjugate
In the final stage, all the Alphas felt as if they were merging into one consciousness. This was an experience that touched on the essence of ``coupling'', and was only possible when everyone's minds were completely synchronized.
"This is the power of companion conjugation..." Alpha closed his eyes and immersed himself in the sensation of the stars' power and the phase of space-time becoming one. "With this power, I can freely manipulate space and time itself."
Ninny raised his sword and created a blade of light. "This sword is also imbued with the power of time and space!"
With an analysis device in hand, Linda has acquired the technology to control turbulence in space and time. "With this, any distortion can be corrected."

Yoshiro also sensed that his sword had the power to cut through space and time. "I can defeat any enemy with this."
___________________


Practicing companion conjugation: The final test with Aurora
After gaining power, Alpha and his friends took on the final challenge against Aurora. Aurora unleashed her full power and launched an attack using space-time itself as a weapon.
"See if you can control this power!" Aurora shouted, and a dimension-shattering shockwave was released.
"Everyone, join forces!" Alpha shouted, and everyone activated their companion conjugate powers.
As if reweaving space, he manipulated the phase of space-time to nullify Aurora's attack, and counterattacked by absorbing his energy.
"This is the power of companion conjugate!" Alpha shouted with all his might, completely controlling the dimensional disturbance that occurred around Aurora.
___________________


Stabilization of Christoffel dimension
After completing their trials, Alpha and the others returned to order in the Christoffel dimension and prepared to create a new balance in the universe. Aurora said with a satisfied smile.
"You have fully obtained the partner conjugate. Use that power to open up a new future for the universe."
Alpha and his friends crossed the dimensional boundary and began walking towards a new adventure. Behind them, the Christoffel dimension regained stability while emitting a gentle light.
Chapter 13: The final enemy - the battle against EVILS
Immediately after Alpha and his friends, who had acquired the power of companion conjugate, stabilized the Christoffel dimension, a new incident was reported that shook the entire universe. The extradimensional life form "EVILS" has become active again, causing unprecedented destruction throughout the universe.
``Wasn't EVILS supposed to be gone?'' Ninny looked irritated at the image of the destroyed stars on the monitor.
Linda answers while frowning. "Technically, EVILS has only temporarily ceased its activity, but this pattern of activity is clearly different from before."
"What do you mean?" Alpha asked.

Chapter 13: The final enemy - the battle against EVILS
Immediately after Alpha and his friends, who had acquired the power of companion conjugate, stabilized the Christoffel dimension, a new incident was reported that shook the entire universe. The extradimensional life form "EVILS" has become active again, causing unprecedented destruction throughout the universe.
``Wasn't EVILS supposed to be gone?'' Ninny looked irritated at the image of the destroyed stars on the monitor.
Linda answers while frowning. "Technically, EVILS has only temporarily ceased its activity, but this pattern of activity is clearly different from before."
"What do you mean?" Alpha asked.

Linda pointed to the analysis data. "Look at this. EVILS aren't just about destruction. They're targeting specific dimensional rifts and expanding them."
``Will you widen the rift?'' Yoshiro frowned. "Then, does this mean that EVILS' purpose is not just to invade, but to distort the universe itself?"
Linda nods. "Yes. They are likely trying to fundamentally rewrite the dimension itself."
___________________


the beginning of the battle
Alpha and his friends headed to the center of EVILS's activities on the Stella Ship Altair. It was a dangerous area called the ``dimensional fault zone'' where countless dimensional rifts were floating. The normal laws of physics had broken down in this space, and everything was at risk of being swallowed up by the distortion.
``Just getting close can be life-threatening.'' Yoshiro looked around cautiously.
``We have the power of companion conjugation,'' Linda answered confidently. "If we use that, we should be able to stabilize this space."
The moment they entered the dimensional fault zone, a huge shadow appeared. It was a particularly powerful existence among EVILS, a leader-like life form called "Abyss Road". Its body was made up of countless tentacles and distorted light, giving off an intimidating feeling that made you feel uneasy just by looking at it.
"Here we come! That's the Abyss Lord!" cried Alpha.
___________________


First match against Abyss Road
Abyss Road spread its tentacles as if to control the entire dimensional fault zone, and each blow had enough power to collapse the dimension itself.
"Everyone, spread out!" Alpha ordered, and his companions immediately sprang into action.
Ninny brandished her sword and attacked the Abyss Lord's tentacles. However, the blade disappeared as if absorbed by the tentacles.
"How hard is it...!?" Ninny exclaims in surprise.
Linda began her analysis. "Tentacles aren't ordinary substances. They're masses of energy that make up the dimension itself! Attacks won't work unless you use companion conjugate!"

Yoshiro also sensed that his sword had the power to cut through space and time. "I can defeat any enemy with this."
___________________


Practicing companion conjugation: The final test with Aurora
After gaining power, Alpha and his friends took on the final challenge against Aurora. Aurora unleashed her full power and launched an attack using space-time itself as a weapon.
"See if you can control this power!" Aurora shouted, and a dimension-shattering shockwave was released.
"Everyone, join forces!" Alpha shouted, and everyone activated their companion conjugate powers.
As if reweaving space, he manipulated the phase of space-time to nullify Aurora's attack, and counterattacked by absorbing his energy.
"This is the power of companion conjugate!" Alpha shouted with all his might, completely controlling the dimensional disturbance that occurred around Aurora.
___________________


Stabilization of Christoffel dimension
After completing their trials, Alpha and the others returned to order in the Christoffel dimension and prepared to create a new balance in the universe. Aurora said with a satisfied smile.
"You have fully obtained the partner conjugate. Use that power to open up a new future for the universe."
Alpha and his friends crossed the dimensional boundary and began walking toward a new adventure. Behind them, the Christoffel dimension regained stability while emitting a gentle light.
Chapter 13: The final enemy - the battle against EVILS
Immediately after Alpha and his friends, who had acquired the power of companion conjugate, stabilized the Christoffel dimension, a new incident was reported that shook the entire universe. The extradimensional life form "EVILS" has become active again, causing unprecedented destruction throughout the universe.
``Wasn't EVILS supposed to be gone?'' Ninny looked irritated at the image of the destroyed stars on the monitor.
Linda answers while frowning. "Technically, EVILS has only temporarily ceased its activity, but this pattern of activity is clearly different from before."
"What do you mean?" Alpha asked.

Linda pointed to the analysis data. "Look at this. EVILS aren't just about destruction. They're targeting specific dimensional rifts and expanding them."
``Will you widen the rift?'' Yoshiro frowned. "Then, does this mean that EVILS' purpose is not just to invade, but to distort the universe itself?"
Linda nods. "Yes. They are likely trying to fundamentally rewrite the dimension itself."
___________________


the beginning of the battle
Alpha and his friends headed to the center of EVILS's activities on the Stella Ship Altair. It was a dangerous area called the ``dimensional fault zone'' where countless dimensional rifts were floating. The normal laws of physics had broken down in this space, and everything was at risk of being swallowed up by the distortion.
``Just getting close can be life-threatening.'' Yoshiro looked around cautiously.
``We have the power of companion conjugation,'' Linda answered confidently. "If we use that, we should be able to stabilize this space."
The moment they entered the dimensional fault zone, a huge shadow appeared. It was a particularly powerful existence among EVILS, a leader-like life form called "Abyss Road". Its body was made up of countless tentacles and distorted light, giving off an intimidating feeling that made you feel uneasy just by looking at it.
"Here we come! That's the Abyss Lord!" cried Alpha.
___________________


First match against Abyss Road
Abyss Road spread its tentacles as if to control the entire dimensional fault zone, and each blow had enough power to collapse the dimension itself.
"Everyone, spread out!" Alpha ordered, and his companions immediately sprang into action.
Ninny brandished her sword and attacked the Abyss Lord's tentacles. However, the blade disappeared as if absorbed by the tentacles.
"How hard is it...!?" Ninny exclaims in surprise.
Linda began her analysis. "Tentacles aren't ordinary substances. They're masses of energy that make up the dimension itself! Attacks won't work unless you use companion conjugate!"

Linda pointed to the analysis data. "Look at this. EVILS aren't just about destruction. They're targeting specific dimensional rifts and expanding them."
``Will you widen the rift?'' Yoshiro frowned. "Then, does this mean that EVILS' purpose is not just to invade, but to distort the universe itself?"
Linda nods. "Yes. They are likely trying to fundamentally rewrite the dimension itself."

___________________


First match against Abyss Road
アビスロードは次元断層帯全体を支配するかのように触手を広げ、その一撃一撃が次元そのものを崩壊させるほどの威力を持っていた。
"Everyone, spread out!" Alpha ordered, and his companions immediately sprang into action.
Ninny brandished her sword and attacked the Abyss Lord's tentacles. However, the blade disappeared as if absorbed by the tentacles.
"How hard is it...!?" Ninny exclaims in surprise.
Linda began her analysis. "Tentacles aren't ordinary substances. They're masses of energy that make up the dimension itself! Attacks won't work unless you use companion conjugate!"

``Then we have no choice but to do it!'' Yoshiro readied his sword and released the power of the partner conjugate. His sword glowed blue-white and slashed at the Abyss Lord's tentacles, cutting through space and time. With that blow, part of the tentacle disappears.
“It worked!” Yoshiro yells.
___________________


Crisis of dimensional collapse
The Abysslord launched a counterattack, releasing a dimensional-shattering energy wave throughout space. The wave instantly engulfed the surroundings and tried to pull Alpha and the others into the dimensional rift.
"Damn, this is going to swallow us all!" Ninny yells.
"I'll stop it!" Alpha activated the power of companion conjugate, manipulating the distortion of space and neutralizing the energy wave. However, in return, his own energy is rapidly depleted.
"Alpha!" Linda rushes over. "Don't overdo it! If you use too much partner conjugate, you will destroy yourself!"
"I know. But if we don't do it now...everyone is in danger!" Alpha desperately tried to keep the space stable.
___________________


A reversal: Application of partner conjugate
As the war situation reaches a stalemate, Linda proposes a new strategy.
"The Abyss Lord is using dimensional energy itself. If that's the case, we might be able to manipulate the dimensional phase and trap him."
``Are you locking me up?'' Yoshiro asked in question.
"That's right. We'll use the dimensional fault zone to seal the Abyss Road into another dimension." Linda began operating the device. "But for that to happen, we need to combine the power of everyone's partner conjugates."
"Okay, we'll all do it!" Alpha shouted, and his friends released their power one by one.
Ninny brandishes her sword and creates a trajectory that cuts through space and time. Yoshiro expands the orbit, and Linda fixes the space. Then, Alpha stood in the center and combined everyone's power to create a dimensional cage.
"This is the end!" Alpha activated his partner conjugate with all his might, sealing the Abyss Lord inside the dimensional rift.
___________________


Victory and new mysteries

``Then we have no choice but to do it!'' Yoshiro readied his sword and released the power of the partner conjugate. His sword glowed blue-white and slashed at the Abyss Lord's tentacles, cutting through space and time. With that blow, part of the tentacle disappears.
“It worked!” Yoshiro yells.

___________________


Victory and new mysteries

The moment the Abysslord disappeared into the dimensional rift, the dimensional fault zone fell silent. The distortions that had spread throughout the universe gradually subsided, and the crisis was temporarily averted.
"Did you...?" Ninny asked breathlessly.
"Ah, it's over." Alpha nodded, looking exhausted.
However, Linda had not let her guard down yet. "But this doesn't mean everything has been resolved. New data has been obtained during this battle."
"What?" Yoshiro asked.
Linda pointed to the data displayed on the screen. "There is a high possibility that Abyss Road was just a prelude. Behind EVILS, there is an even bigger presence."
"What do you mean by that?" Alpha said with a grim expression.
"The purpose of EVILS is still not fully understood, but there is a consistent pattern to their activities, which may be aimed at rebuilding the dimension itself."
Alpha and his friends renewed their determination to prepare for further threats. Their fight continues to protect the future of the universe.
Chapter 14: Invitation from ZAMLT Leader
The battle with Abyss Road is over, and Alpha and his friends have gained a temporary victory. However, they sensed a further threat that existed behind EVILS, and were worried that the situation had not been resolved. Meanwhile, he was contacted by a being beyond his imagination. It was an invitation from the leader of ZAMLT, the giant corporate alliance that controls Gigapolis behind the scenes.
___________________


arrival of invitation
One morning, an encrypted message arrived on the Stellar Ship Altair. It was protected by a sophisticated code that even Linda's analysis equipment couldn't easily decipher.
"What is this?" Ninny frowned, staring at the communication device.
Linda analyzed the data at high speed and revealed the content of the communication. "This...is from ZAMLT, a consortium of companies located in the heart of Gigapolis."

The moment the Abysslord disappeared into the dimensional rift, the dimensional fault zone fell silent. The distortions that had spread throughout the universe gradually subsided, and the crisis was temporarily averted.

___________________


arrival of invitation
One morning, an encrypted message arrived on the Stellar Ship Altair. It was protected by a sophisticated code that even Linda's analysis equipment couldn't easily decipher.
"What is this?" Ninny frowned, staring at the communication device.
Linda analyzed the data at high speed and revealed the content of the communication. "This...is from ZAMLT, a consortium of companies located in the heart of Gigapolis."

"ZAMLT?" Yoshiro asked in question. ``On the surface, they support space development and the economy, but behind the scenes it is rumored that they are a conspiracy organization that controls this world.''
Linda read out more details. “To summarize, they are inviting us to come to the ZAMLT headquarters.The purpose is to talk about the future of space.”
"The future of the universe?" Alpha mused, crossing his arms. “Anyway, why are you calling us now?”
___________________


The true meaning of the invitation
Alpha and the others exchanged opinions on how to accept the invitation from ZAMLT.
"This is definitely a trap," Ninny protested in a strong tone. "ZAMLT has always acted in its own interest."
"That's certainly a possibility," Linda agrees. "However, it is true that they are deeply involved in the movements of the universe as a whole. It is possible that they know something about the activities of EVILS and the expansion of the dimensional rift."
Yoshiro said, crossing his arms. "We don't have many options. If they're the enemy, we can fight them, and if we can get information, we can use it. That's all."
After listening to everyone's opinions, Alpha made a decision. "Let's go. We should see what they're thinking. If it's a trap, we have the power of companion conjugate."
___________________


Arrival at ZAMLT headquarters
The ZAMLT headquarters towering in the center of Gigapolis was covered in countless holograms and layers of light, as if symbolizing the dimension itself. Its structure far surpassed any architectural technology on earth, and seemed to reflect the future itself.
"This is ZAMLT's headquarters..." Alpha muttered, widening his eyes.
When the group stepped into the headquarters, all the doors opened automatically and they were guided inside. Along the way, an artificial intelligence that acts as a guide appears and speaks to them with an inorganic voice.
"Lady Alpha Cain and his companions. Our leader is waiting for you. Please proceed to the conference room."

"ZAMLT?" Yoshiro asked in question. ``On the surface, they support space development and the economy, but behind the scenes it is rumored that they are a conspiracy organization that controls this world.''
Linda read out more details. “To summarize, they are inviting us to come to the ZAMLT headquarters.The purpose is to talk about the future of space.”
"The future of the universe?" Alpha mused, crossing his arms. “Anyway, why are you calling us now?”
___________________

Arrival at ZAMLT headquarters

"This is ZAMLT's headquarters..." Alpha muttered, widening his eyes.
When the group stepped into the headquarters, all the doors opened automatically and they were guided inside. Along the way, an artificial intelligence that acts as a guide appears and speaks to them with an inorganic voice.
"Lady Alpha Cain and his companions. Our leader is waiting for you. Please proceed to the conference room."

"You're being unnecessarily polite," Yoshiro muttered warily.
___________________


Meeting with ZAMLT leaders
Alpha and the others were taken to the conference room and were shocked to see the person waiting there. He was Elliott Strass, the leader of ZAMLT and the founder of this huge organization. With his graying hair and piercing eyes, he has been known as the shadowy ruler of Gigapolis for many years.
"Nice to meet you, Alpha Cain." Elliot stood up slowly and gave a gentle smile. "I am Elliott Strass, and I have invited you all to consider the future of this universe together."
"You mean the future of the universe?" Alpha gave him a cold stare. "It's not like I don't know what ZAMLT is thinking. It's not like I don't know what ZAMLT is thinking. It's not like you guys are manipulating this world."
Elliot answered without losing his smile. "It is true that we control the space economy and dimensional technology, but our purpose is not destruction. Our original goal is to save this universe."
"Save it?" Linda exclaimed in surprise. "Aren't you the ones causing the collapse of the universe?"
Elliot said in a grave tone. "The reason the universe is collapsing is due to dimensional distortion. And we, ZAMLT, were the first to discover this distortion."
___________________


Relationship with EVILS
Elliot continued speaking. "EVILS are products of dimensional distortion. They are expanding the distortion and trying to engulf our universe. However, they cannot be completely wiped out because they are also necessary to maintain the balance of the universe."
``Do you think it's necessary?'' Yoshiro frowned. "Is there such a foolish story?"
"The Abyss Road you sealed away is part of it," Elliot answered calmly. "EVILS hold the key to the evolution of the entire universe. However, if we let them go unchecked, everything will collapse."
"So what do you want us to do?" asked Ninny, clutching his sword.

``Then we have no choice but to do it!'' Yoshiro readied his sword and released the power of the partner conjugate. His sword glowed blue-white and slashed at the Abyss Lord's tentacles, cutting through space and time. With that blow, part of the tentacle disappears.
“It worked!” Yoshiro yells.

___________________


Protocol X risks
Linda interjected after hearing Elliot's explanation. "If that's true, that's great. But what risks are there with that device?"
Elliot was silent for a moment, then answered in a low voice. "In order to activate Protocol
"The power of Christoffel's dimension?" Alpha was surprised. "If you use it, you risk causing another dimensional collapse!"
"That's right," Elliot nodded. "However, we cannot save the universe without that power. I would like to entrust you with its activation."
___________________


time of decision
Alpha and the others left the conference room for a while and exchanged opinions.
"What are we going to do? We can't rule out the possibility that this is a trap," said Ninny, irritated.
"But it's also true that ZAMLT is the only one who has a way to control EVILS," Linda answered calmly. "If Protocol X is successful, it might really save the universe."
“If we succeed,




Na. ” Yoshiro said in a low voice. "If we fail, we will destroy the universe with our own hands."
After listening to everyone's opinions, Alpha took a deep breath and made a decision. "Let's go. But we don't trust them. We'll find out what Protocol X is and protect the universe by our own means if necessary."
___________________


The beginning of a new battle
Alpha and his friends decide to go with ZAMLT to launch Protocol X. Their decision opened the door to a new battle. Further trials await as they approach the true purpose of EVILS and the true intentions of ZAMLT.
Chapter 15: Operation 3 quintillion dollars

Elliot narrowed his eyes. "We want you to work with us to activate a new dimensional stabilization device called 'Protocol X.' Using this device, we can control EVILS and completely suppress dimensional distortion."
___________________


Protocol X risks
Linda interjected after hearing Elliot's explanation. "If that's true, that's great. But what risks are there with that device?"
Elliot was silent for a moment, then answered in a low voice. "In order to activate Protocol
"The power of Christoffel's dimension?" Alpha was surprised. "If you use it, you risk causing another dimensional collapse!"
"That's right," Elliot nodded. "However, we cannot save the universe without that power. I would like to entrust you with its activation."

Chapter 15: Operation 3 quintillion dollars

"ZAMLT?" Yoshiro asked in question. ``On the surface, they support space development and the economy, but behind the scenes it is rumored that they are a conspiracy organization that controls this world.''
Linda read out more details. “To summarize, they are inviting us to come to the ZAMLT headquarters.The purpose is to talk about the future of space.”
"The future of the universe?" Alpha mused, crossing his arms. “Anyway, why are you calling us now?”
___________________


The true meaning of the invitation
Alpha and the others exchanged opinions on how to accept the invitation from ZAMLT.
"This is definitely a trap," Ninny protested in a strong tone. "ZAMLT has always acted in its own interest."
"That's certainly a possibility," Linda agrees. "However, it is true that they are deeply involved in the movements of the universe as a whole. It is possible that they know something about the activities of EVILS and the expansion of the dimensional rift."
Yoshiro said, crossing his arms. "We don't have many options. If they're the enemy, we can fight them, and if we can get information, we can use it. That's all."
After listening to everyone's opinions, Alpha made a decision. "Let's go. We should see what they're thinking. If it's a trap, we have the power of companion conjugate."
___________________


Arrival at ZAMLT headquarters
The ZAMLT headquarters towering in the center of Gigapolis was covered in countless holograms and layers of light, as if symbolizing the dimension itself. Its structure far surpassed any architectural technology on earth, and seemed to reflect the future itself.
"This is ZAMLT's headquarters..." Alpha muttered, widening his eyes.
When the group stepped into the headquarters, all the doors opened automatically and they were guided inside. Along the way, an artificial intelligence that acts as a guide appears and speaks to them with an inorganic voice.
"Lady Alpha Cain and his companions. Our leader is waiting for you. Please proceed to the conference room."

Alpha and his friends decided to launch Protocol One of the conditions set by ZAMLT was to ``mobilize all the resources of space to enable operations on the scale of $3 trillion.'' In order to raise this huge amount of money in a short period of time, ZAMLT proposes a ``3 quintillion dollar operation'', but the contents are so spectacular that Alpha and the others are faced with a new conflict.
___________________


Overview of the 3 quintillion dollar operation
At a briefing held at ZAMLT headquarters, Elliott Strass explained the details of the operation. A giant hologram screen in the conference room shows the economic structure and resource distribution throughout the universe.
"Operation 3 quintillion dollars is the largest fundraising project in human history," Elliot began speaking in a calm voice. "In order for this plan to succeed, ZAMLT must control economic activity throughout the universe and distribute resources efficiently. However, this alone is not enough."
What he next showed was an unexplored area in every corner of the universe. It contained hitherto untouched mineral resources, energy veins, and even unknown energy hidden within dimensional faults.
"The crux of this plan is the development of dimensional fault energy," Elliot continued, pointing. "We will commercialize these energies and make profits in a short period of time. Furthermore, we will use the activities of EVILS to create a crisis situation and obtain emergency loans from planetary governments and private companies."
"Wait!" Ninny said, getting up from her seat and showing her anger. "Taking advantage of a crisis? That's at the expense of people!"
Elliot gave her a cold look. "Please understand. What we are facing is a problem that concerns the survival of the universe itself. Protecting a large future with small sacrifices. That is the essence of Operation 3 quintillion dollars."
___________________


divisive opinions
After listening to Elliot's explanation, Alpha and the others moved to a separate room and discussed how to respond to the operation.

"You're being unnecessarily polite," Yoshiro muttered warily.
___________________


Meeting with ZAMLT leaders
Alpha and the others were taken to the conference room and were shocked to see the person waiting there. He was Elliott Strass, the leader of ZAMLT and the founder of this huge organization. With his graying hair and piercing eyes, he has been known as the shadowy ruler of Gigapolis for many years.
"Nice to meet you, Alpha Cain." Elliot stood up slowly and gave a gentle smile. "I am Elliott Strass, and I have invited you all to consider the future of this universe together."
"You mean the future of the universe?" Alpha gave him a cold stare. "It's not like I don't know what ZAMLT is thinking. It's not like I don't know what ZAMLT is thinking. It's not like you guys are manipulating this world."
Elliot answered without losing his smile. "It is true that we control the space economy and dimensional technology, but our purpose is not destruction. Our original goal is to save this universe."
"Save it?" Linda exclaimed in surprise. "Aren't you the ones causing the collapse of the universe?"
Elliot said in a grave tone. "The reason the universe is collapsing is due to dimensional distortion. And we, ZAMLT, were the first to discover this distortion."
___________________


Relationship with EVILS
Elliot continued speaking. "EVILS are products of dimensional distortion. They are expanding the distortion and trying to engulf our universe. However, they cannot be completely wiped out because they are also necessary to maintain the balance of the universe."
``Do you think it's necessary?'' Yoshiro frowned. “Is there such a foolish story?”
"The Abyss Road you sealed away is part of it," Elliot answered calmly. "EVILS hold the key to the evolution of the entire universe. However, if we let them go unchecked, everything will collapse."
"So what do you want us to do?" asked Ninny, clutching his sword.

Elliot narrowed his eyes. "We want you to work with us to activate a new dimensional stabilization device called 'Protocol X.' Using this device, we can control EVILS and completely suppress dimensional distortion."
___________________


Protocol X risks
Linda interjected after hearing Elliot's explanation. "If that's true, that's great. But what risks are there with that device?"
Elliot was silent for a moment, then answered in a low voice. "In order to activate Protocol
"The power of Christoffel's dimension?" Alpha was surprised. "If you use it, you risk causing another dimensional collapse!"
"That's right," Elliot nodded. "However, we cannot save the universe without that power. I would like to entrust you with its activation."
___________________


time of decision

"What are we going to do? We can't rule out the possibility that this is a trap," said Ninny, irritated.

Chapter 15: Operation 3 quintillion dollars

``This is clearly wrong!'' Ninny said, unable to contain her anger. “Raising money by putting people at risk is no different from the dirty methods used by ZAMLT!”
“But look at the reality,” Linda replies calmly. "We don't have time. Is there any other way to launch Protocol X other than raising $3 quintillion?"
``So, does that justify the sacrifice?'' Yoshiro interjects with a grim expression. "Our mission is not only to protect the universe, but also to protect the future of people."
Alpha listened to everyone's opinions in silence, but eventually spoke up. "We will find another way ourselves. If we can't do that, we shouldn't proceed with this operation."
"How?" Ninny asks, irritated.
Alpha quietly closed his eyes and felt the power of his partner conjugate. "There is still undiscovered potential in this universe. We will use the power of companion conjugation to find that potential. If we do that, we may not have to make unnecessary sacrifices."
___________________


Exploring dimensional faults
Using some of ZAMLT's financial support, Alpha and his friends made a plan to explore new energy resources within the dimensional fault. The project aimed to use the linkage conjugate to secure a safe route, discover unknown energy deposits, and monetize them.
"If this is successful, we won't have to rely on ZAMLT's $3 trillion operation," Linda explained as she operated the device. "However, the environment within the dimensional fault is unstable, so we must proceed with caution."
"Be careful," Ninny laughed sarcastically. "Something always happens, but I hope nothing happens this time."
___________________


Discovery within the dimensional fault
Stellaship Altair has entered the dimensional fault. It was a strange space, like a mixture of reality and illusion. Time seemed to slow down or speed up, and the surrounding terrain was constantly changing.
"Don't let your guard down," Alpha warned everyone. “You never know what will happen in this space.”

Discovery within the dimensional fault
Stellaship Altair has entered the dimensional fault. It was a strange space, like a mixture of reality and illusion. Time seemed to slow down or speed up, and the surrounding terrain was constantly changing.
"Don't let your guard down," Alpha warned everyone. “You never know what will happen in this space.”

As the ship went deeper into the depths, a huge crystal of light appeared. It radiated an energy never seen before, and seemed to have the power to stabilize dimensional distortions.
"Is this...an unknown energy mine?" Linda exclaimed in surprise. “If we can monetize this, we can raise more funds than ZAMLT plans!”
"Alright, let's collect this and escape!" Yoshiro said, keeping an eye on his surroundings.
___________________


EVILS RAID
However, just as the recovery of the energy veins began, the entire space began to shake. Then, a group of EVILS suddenly appeared. It was a being called "Distortor" whose fighting power far exceeded that of the previous Abyss Lord.
"You're here...!" Alpha immediately activated companion conjugate and took a defensive stance.
Distorter launched an attack while absorbing the energy of the dimensional fault. Its tentacles warped space with just a touch, causing an explosive shockwave.
"Alpha! If we don't do something to stop him, the energy mine will collapse!" Linda yelled.
``We have no choice but to do it!'' Alpha activated his partner conjugate with all his might and used the dimensional distortion to contain Distortor's movements.
___________________


A reversal
Ninny and Yoshiro also cooperated and carried out a coordinated attack that applied the partner conjugate. Ninny's sword cuts through Distorter's tentacles, and Yoshiro's sword aims at its core.
"This is the end!" Yoshiro unleashed a blow with all his might, completely annihilating the Distorter.
At that moment, the entire dimensional fault regained stability, and the energy in the vein could be safely recovered.
___________________


Successful fundraising
After recovering the unknown energy, Alpha and his friends created a way to commercialize it efficiently and succeeded in raising a huge amount of money without relying on ZAMLT's 3 trillion dollar operation. With this success, Protocol

"There's no need to let ZAMLT dance with you now," Alpha said confidently. "We will save this universe in our own way."
___________________


However, behind them, the new leader of EVILS was watching Alpha and his friends from the shadows of the dimension. The activation of Protocol X signified the beginning of a new threat and battle.
Chapter 16: Meeting between EVILS leaders and ZAMLT company leaders
Just as Protocol The leaders of ZAMLT have received an invitation from the true ruler "EVILS Leader" who exists behind EVILS. The top leaders of ZAMLT companies gather together, and a meeting is held between the leaders of humanity, the most powerful people on earth, and the unknown leader of EVILS. The setting is the "Tower of Void", the most secretly constructed building in Gigapolis. This place was located at a singularity, which could be called the dimensional center of the universe.
___________________


Tower of Void: The intersection of humanity and EVILS
The Tower of Nothingness was a huge building located on the outer periphery of Gigapolis, whose existence was not even known to the general public. At its center was a singularity where dimensional faults and physical space intersected, and it functioned as a passageway for beings across dimensions to come into contact. Inside the tower, the space was distorted and the boundary between the ceiling and floor was vague, as if it symbolized another dimension itself.
"Is this the venue...?" Raphael Drake, one of the members of ZAMLT and the leader of Tron Inc., frowned at the strange scene that spread before his eyes.
"Brace yourselves." Aloe Oil CEO Iris Nova calmly observed her surroundings. "I've never had a chance to come into contact with EVILS."
"But whether that's a good thing or not is another matter," Carlos Vandam, leader of Mammon Corp., responded in a deep voice. "Since we can't read their intentions, we need to move carefully."

``This is clearly wrong!'' Ninny said, unable to contain her anger. “Raising money by putting people at risk is no different from the dirty methods used by ZAMLT!”
“But look at the reality,” Linda replies calmly. "We don't have time. Is there any other way to launch Protocol X other than raising $3 quintillion?"
``So, does that justify the sacrifice?'' Yoshiro interjects with a grim expression. "Our mission is not only to protect the universe, but also to protect the future of people."
Alpha listened to everyone's opinions in silence, but eventually spoke up. "We will find another way ourselves. If we can't do that, we shouldn't proceed with this operation."
"How?" Ninny asks, irritated.
Alpha quietly closed his eyes and felt the power of his partner conjugate. "There is still undiscovered potential in this universe. We will use the power of companion conjugation to find that potential. If we do that, we may not have to make unnecessary sacrifices."
___________________


Exploring dimensional faults
Using some of ZAMLT's financial support, Alpha and his friends made a plan to explore new energy resources within the dimensional fault. The project aimed to use the linkage conjugate to secure a safe route, discover unknown energy deposits, and monetize them.
"If this is successful, we won't have to rely on ZAMLT's $3 trillion operation," Linda explained as she operated the device. "However, the environment within the dimensional fault is unstable, so we must proceed with caution."
"Be careful," Ninny laughed sarcastically. "Something always happens, but I hope nothing happens this time."
___________________


Discovery within the dimensional fault
Stellaship Altair has entered the dimensional fault. It was a strange space, like a mixture of reality and illusion. Time seemed to slow down or speed up, and the surrounding terrain was constantly changing.
"Don't let your guard down," Alpha warned everyone. “You never know what will happen in this space.”

The leaders of the five major companies that make up ZAMLT were already seated at a huge oval table set in the center of the tower. Rafael, Iris, and Carlos will be joined by Zebra CEO Arthur Grimm and Lurenz Technology Director Elizabeth Lindbergh. All of them were filled with tension.
"Let's begin," Rafael said, taking a deep breath. "We should confirm our position before the EVILS leader appears."
___________________


Dialogue between ZAMLT leaders
``First of all, let me confirm, what is the purpose of this meeting?'' Carlos looked around with sharp eyes. "We control the space economy, but will contact with EVILS be beneficial or dangerous?"
"It's foolish to think of it in terms of profit," Elizabeth interjected calmly. "EVILS are entities that are involved in the dimension itself. No matter how much technology and resources we have, we are powerless in front of them. We should recognize that and listen to their proposals."
"Suggestion?" Iris laughed slightly. "I doubt such a being would want to do business with us."
Arthur said, drumming his fingers on the table. "However, we must also take action. If the dimensional rift continues to expand, everything will end. From that point of view, there is no reason to deny dialogue with them."
___________________


Introducing the EVILS leader
As their discussion continued, the space in the center of the tower suddenly began to distort. There was a sound as if reality was being torn apart, and a huge shadow appeared from the darkness. Its appearance resembled that of a human, but it was made up of countless tentacles and fragments of light.
"Human," the EVILS leader began speaking in a low, yet piercing voice. "I am Omega Ulysses. I am a being who has watched over this universe from beyond the dimensional rift."
Its appearance seemed to contain all the possibilities of dimension, and gave an overwhelming feeling of intimidation to those who saw it.
"Omega Ulysses..." Iris says the name.

As the ship went deeper into the depths, a huge crystal of light appeared. It radiated an energy never seen before, and seemed to have the power to stabilize dimensional distortions.
"Is this...an unknown energy mine?" Linda exclaimed in surprise. “If we can monetize this, we can raise more funds than ZAMLT plans!”
"Alright, let's collect this and escape!" Yoshiro said, keeping an eye on his surroundings.
___________________


EVILS RAID
However, just as the recovery of the energy veins began, the entire space began to shake. Then, a group of EVILS suddenly appeared. It was a being called "Distortor" whose fighting power far exceeded that of the previous Abyss Lord.
"You're here...!" Alpha immediately activated companion conjugate and took a defensive stance.
Distorter launched an attack while absorbing the energy of the dimensional fault. Its tentacles warped space with just a touch, causing an explosive shockwave.
"Alpha! If we don't do something to stop him, the energy mine will collapse!" Linda yelled.
``We have no choice but to do it!'' Alpha activated his partner conjugate with all his might and used the dimensional distortion to contain Distortor's movements.
___________________


A reversal
Ninny and Yoshiro also cooperated and carried out a coordinated attack that applied the partner conjugate. Ninny's sword cuts through Distorter's tentacles, and Yoshiro's sword aims at its core.
"This is the end!" Yoshiro unleashed a blow with all his might, completely annihilating the Distorter.
At that moment, the entire dimensional fault regained stability, and the energy in the vein could be safely recovered.
___________________


Successful fundraising
After recovering the unknown energy, Alpha and his friends created a way to commercialize it efficiently and succeeded in raising a huge amount of money without relying on ZAMLT's 3 trillion dollar operation. With this success, Protocol

``This is clearly wrong!'' Ninny said, unable to contain her anger. “Raising money by putting people at risk is no different from the dirty methods used by ZAMLT!”
“But look at the reality,” Linda replies calmly. "We don't have time. Is there any other way to launch Protocol X other than raising $3 quintillion?"
``So, does that justify the sacrifice?'' Yoshiro interjects with a grim expression. "Our mission is not only to protect the universe, but also to protect the future of people."
Alpha listened to everyone's opinions in silence, but eventually spoke up. "We will find another way ourselves. If we can't do that, we shouldn't proceed with this operation."
"How?" Ninny asks, irritated.
Alpha quietly closed his eyes and felt the power of his partner conjugate. "There is still undiscovered potential in this universe. We will use the power of companion conjugation to find that potential. If we do that, we may not have to make unnecessary sacrifices."
___________________


Exploring dimensional faults
Using some of ZAMLT's financial support, Alpha and his friends made a plan to explore new energy resources within the dimensional fault. The project aimed to use the linkage conjugate to secure a safe route, discover unknown energy deposits, and monetize them.
"If this is successful, we won't have to rely on ZAMLT's $3 trillion operation," Linda explained as she operated the device. "However, the environment within the dimensional fault is unstable, so we must proceed with caution."
"Be careful," Ninny laughed sarcastically. "Something always happens, but I hope nothing happens this time."
___________________


Discovery within the dimensional fault
Stellaship Altair has entered the dimensional fault. It was a strange space, like a mixture of reality and illusion. Time seemed to slow down or speed up, and the surrounding terrain was constantly changing.
"Don't let your guard down," Alpha warned everyone. “You never know what will happen in this space.”

As the ship went deeper into the depths, a huge crystal of light appeared. It radiated an energy never seen before, and seemed to have the power to stabilize dimensional distortions.

Chapter 16: Meeting between EVILS leaders and ZAMLT company leaders
Just as Protocol The leaders of ZAMLT have received an invitation from the true ruler "EVILS Leader" who exists behind EVILS. The top leaders of ZAMLT companies gather together, and a meeting is held between the leaders of humanity, the most powerful people on earth, and the unknown leader of EVILS. The setting is the "Tower of Void", the most secretly constructed building in Gigapolis. This place was located at a singularity, which could be called the dimensional center of the universe.
___________________


Tower of Void: The intersection of humanity and EVILS
The Tower of Nothingness was a huge building located on the outer periphery of Gigapolis, whose existence was not even known to the general public. At its center was a singularity where dimensional faults and physical space intersected, and it functioned as a passageway for beings across dimensions to come into contact. Inside the tower, the space was distorted and the boundary between the ceiling and floor was vague, as if it symbolized another dimension itself.
"Is this the venue...?" Raphael Drake, one of the members of ZAMLT and the leader of Tron Inc., frowned at the strange scene that spread before his eyes.
"Brace yourselves." Aloe Oil CEO Iris Nova calmly observed her surroundings. "I've never had a chance to come into contact with EVILS."
"But whether that's a good thing or not is another matter," Carlos Vandam, leader of Mammon Corp., responded in a deep voice. "Since we can't read their intentions, we need to move carefully."

The leaders of the five major companies that make up ZAMLT were already seated at a huge oval table set in the center of the tower. Rafael, Iris, and Carlos will be joined by Zebra CEO Arthur Grimm and Lurenz Technology Director Elizabeth Lindbergh. All of them were filled with tension.
"Let's begin," Rafael said, taking a deep breath. "We should confirm our position before the EVILS leader appears."
___________________


Dialogue between ZAMLT leaders
``First of all, let me confirm, what is the purpose of this meeting?'' Carlos looked around with sharp eyes. "We control the space economy, but will contact with EVILS be beneficial or dangerous?"
"It's foolish to think of it in terms of profit," Elizabeth interjected calmly. "EVILS are entities that are involved in the dimension itself. No matter how much technology and resources we have, we are powerless in front of them. We should recognize that and listen to their proposals."
"Suggestion?" Iris laughed slightly. "I doubt such a being would want to do business with us."
Arthur said, drumming his fingers on the table. "However, we must also take action. If the dimensional rift continues to expand, everything will end. From that point of view, there is no reason to deny dialogue with them."
___________________


Introducing the EVILS leader
As their discussion continued, the space in the center of the tower suddenly began to distort. There was a sound as if reality was being torn apart, and a huge shadow appeared from the darkness. Its appearance resembled that of a human, but it was made up of countless tentacles and fragments of light.
"Human," the EVILS leader began speaking in a low, yet piercing voice. "I am Omega Ulysses. I am a being who has watched over this universe from beyond the dimensional rift."
Its appearance seemed to contain all the possibilities of dimension, and gave an overwhelming feeling of intimidation to those who saw it.
"Omega Ulysses..." Iris says the name.

"Good to meet you, representatives of humanity," continued Omega-Ulysses. "What I seek is balance in the universe. For that purpose, I need your cooperation."
"You mean cooperation?" Carlos asked with sharp eyes. "Aren't you EVILs expanding the dimensional rift?"
"The rift is the natural result of distortions in the universe," Omega-Ulysses answered. "Your human activities are shaking the dimension. However, we need your technology and resources to repair it."
___________________


Start of negotiations
The leaders of ZAMLT proceeded to talk with Omega-Ulysses, unable to hide their nervousness.
"What will happen to the universe if we work together?" Rafael asks carefully.
"Stabilize the rift and create a new level of balance." Omega-Ulysses' voice echoed. "But in order to do that, we need to activate 'Protocol X' and capture my energy."
"Protocol X is a technology developed by ZAMLT," Elizabeth exclaimed. "How do you know that?"
"Everything is observed," Omega-Ulysses answered calmly. "Protocol X is the key to coexistence between you and me."
___________________


Decisions of ZAMLT leaders
As the talks progressed, the leaders became increasingly at odds over their respective positions.
"This is a trap," Carlos declared. "It's too stupid to believe in EVILS."
"But there's no other way," Arthur counters. “If you leave the rift alone, everything will end.”
"You're just being used as tools," Iris declares coldly. "But if we take the initiative, we can control EVILS."
In the end, they agreed to proceed with the activation of Protocol
"Very well," Omega-Ulysses answered. "However, if that control upsets the balance, I will engulf this universe again."

Chapter 17: Allen's Death and the Trap in the Shendberg Dimension
As Alpha and his friends prepare to launch Protocol X, shocking news arrives. Allen Crawford - Alpha's former benefactor and the key person who informed him of the power of the stars and the existence of dimensional distortion, suddenly lost his life. The situation was extremely unnatural, and the mystery only deepened.
___________________


Report of Allen's death
``What...Aren's dead?'' Alpha stood up from his chair in shock.
Linda continued her report with a serious look on her face. "His body has never been found, only traces left in the location of his last transmission - the Shendburg dimension."
"Shendberg dimension?" Yoshiro asked with a grim face. "I've never heard of such a dimension."
``Of course.'' Linda projected the dimensional structure data onto the screen. "The Schendberg dimension is an extremely closed singularity. Not only is it inaccessible through normal means, but its existence is only known in theory."
"So Allen's trapped in there?" Ninny said.
"That makes sense," Linda nodded. "The question is why did he go there and who is involved?"
___________________


The mystery of the Schendberg dimension

Alpha and the others immediately began investigating the Shendberg dimension. Linda uses the power of companion conjugate to explore dimensional fluctuations and discovers a path to the singularity that exists deep within the dimensional fault.
``This dimension has a completely different structure than normal space,'' Linda said as she continued her analysis. “Time is not fixed, and the past and future exist as if they overlap.”
"Are you saying there's evidence of Allen there?" Alpha asked.
"Yes, but it's dangerous territory so we need to proceed with caution."
They departed the Stellaship Altair for the Shendberg dimension.
___________________


Entering the Schendberg dimension
When Alpha and his friends entered the Shendberg dimension, what unfolded before them was an unstable and chaotic space. Phenomena where time goes backwards or forwards occur frequently, and the space itself is collapsing like a crack.
"This is the Shendberg dimension..." Alpha muttered. "It's like dreams and reality are intertwined."
``I'm going to look for the communication logs.'' Linda operated the device and began searching for the data Allen had left behind.
Then, Allen's last communication record was played back from among the data scattered like fragments.
"...Alpha, if you're watching this, I have something to tell you. ZAMLT, especially Zebra Corporation, is the culprit behind disturbing the balance of this universe..."
Communication was cut off there, and the dimension itself began to shake violently.
___________________


Discovery of Allen's body
As they advanced deeper into the dimension, they encountered a strange sight. It was Allen's corpse, trapped in a dimensional rift and floating in space. His body was frozen solid, and dimensional-warping energy swirled around him.
"Allen...!" Alpha clenched his fists. "Who the hell did something like this...!"
Linda proceeds with the analysis. "His body clearly bears traces of artificial interference. And these traces...are very similar to Zebra Corporation's dimensional manipulation technology."
``What about Zebra?'' Yoshiro yelled, unable to contain his anger. "Did they send Allen here?"

"It's very possible," Linda nodded. "Zebra is a company that has a monopoly on dimensional technology within ZAMLT."
___________________


Zebra's secret maneuvers
As Linda investigates further, the name of Zebra Corp.'s secret operative Ray VanDelt comes to mind as a person involved in Allen's death. He was one of the most cruel agents within ZAMLT, famous for trapping his targets in dimensions and completely destroying evidence.
"Ray Vandelt..." Ninny whispered the name. "Is that the one who trapped Allen here?"
"Absolutely," Linda said, checking the data. ``Zebra Corporation determined that Allen had some important information and removed him.''
"I can't forgive...!" Alpha shook his fist in anger. “We will stop Zebra Corporation from stealing Allen like this!”
___________________


Escape from the Schendberg dimension
The moment they tried to retrieve Allen's body, the entire dimension began to collapse. A dimensional distortion device set up by Zebra Corporation was activated and was about to destroy space itself.
"Hurry! This dimension is collapsing!" Linda shouted.
Alpha and the others attempted to escape while temporarily suppressing the dimensional collapse using the power of companion conjugate. Yoshiro cut through the dimensional rift, and everyone worked together, with Ninny acting as a defender.
"Almost there...!" Alpha shouted, mustering the last of his strength to open the exit of space. They narrowly managed to escape from the Shendberg dimension.
___________________


Towards a showdown with ZAMLT
After confirming Allen's death and discovering that Zebra Corporation was behind it, Alpha and his friends decided to make the entire ZAMLT their enemy.
"Zebra Corporation isn't the only one," Alpha told his friends. "ZAMLT as a whole is trying to distort the future of this universe."
"It takes more than activating Protocol X to stop them," Linda said calmly. "We must expose their very plans and involve the entire universe in countering them."

"There's no need to let ZAMLT dance with you now," Alpha said confidently. "We will save this universe in our own way."
___________________


However, behind them, the new leader of EVILS was watching Alpha and his friends from the shadows of the dimension. The activation of Protocol X signified the beginning of a new threat and battle.

Contact from TECHROSUS

"What is this communication...?" Linda glared at the monitor in surprise.
``It looks like someone is trying to contact us directly.'' Yoshiro said, wary. "Enemy or ally?"
When the transmission was decoded, the TECHROSUS logo and a single person appeared on the screen. The person was a mysterious masked leader who called himself ``Chrono Valent''.
"Alpha Cain, I've been waiting for an opportunity to contact you." Chrono's voice was low and calm. "We propose an alliance to counter the ZAMLT conspiracy."
"Alliance?" Alpha asked carefully. “Who the hell are you guys?”

The key to the entrusted dimension

"The Dimensional Key is necessary to break through the Silver Plant's barrier," Chrono said while showing the key. "However, in order to master it, we need the power of your partner conjugates."
"We...?" Alpha muttered, staring at the key.
"Yes." Chrono nodded vigorously. "With your help, we can fully activate this key."
___________________


Forming new alliances
The Alphas debated fiercely whether to accept TECHROSUS' proposal or not.
``Can we trust them?'' Yoshiro questioned. “Although they are competing against ZAMLT, TECHROSUS may also be acting in their own interests.”
"I can't deny that," Linda answered calmly. "But right now, we need someone to help us stop ZAMLT."
"We don't have time," Alpha concluded. "We will work with TECHROSUS to first weaken ZAMLT. Then, we will find the best way to protect this universe."
___________________


Infiltrating the Silver Plant

Alpha and the others immediately began investigating the Shendberg dimension. Linda uses the power of companion conjugate to explore dimensional fluctuations and discovers a path to the singularity that exists deep within the dimensional fault.
``This dimension has a completely different structure than normal space,'' Linda said as she continued her analysis. “Time is not fixed, and the past and future exist as if they overlap.”
"Are you saying there's evidence of Allen there?" Alpha asked.
"Yes, but it's dangerous territory so we need to proceed with caution."
They departed the Stellaship Altair for the Shendberg dimension.
___________________


Entering the Schendberg dimension
When Alpha and his friends entered the Shendberg dimension, what unfolded before them was an unstable and chaotic space. Phenomena where time goes backwards or forwards occur frequently, and the space itself is collapsing like a crack.
"This is the Shendberg dimension..." Alpha muttered. "It's like dreams and reality are intertwined."
``I'm going to look for the communication logs.'' Linda operated the device and began searching for the data Allen had left behind.
Then, Allen's last communication record was played back from among the data scattered like fragments.
"...Alpha, if you're watching this, I have something to tell you. ZAMLT, especially Zebra Corporation, is the culprit behind disturbing the balance of this universe..."
Communication was cut off there, and the dimension itself began to shake violently.
___________________


Discovery of Allen's body
As they advanced deeper into the dimension, they encountered a strange sight. It was Allen's corpse, trapped in a dimensional rift and floating in space. His body was frozen solid, and dimensional-warping energy swirled around him.
"Allen...!" Alpha clenched his fists. "Who the hell did something like this...!"
Linda proceeds with the analysis. "His body clearly bears traces of artificial interference. And these traces...are very similar to Zebra Corporation's dimensional manipulation technology."
``What about Zebra?'' Yoshiro yelled, unable to contain his anger. "Did they send Allen here?"

"It's very possible," Linda nodded. "Zebra is a company that has a monopoly on dimensional technology within ZAMLT."
___________________


Zebra's secret maneuvers
As Linda investigates further, the name of Zebra Corp.'s secret operative Ray VanDelt comes to mind as a person involved in Allen's death. He was one of the most cruel agents within ZAMLT, famous for trapping his targets in dimensions and completely destroying evidence.
"Ray Vandelt..." Ninny whispered the name. "Is that the one who trapped Allen here?"
"Absolutely," Linda said, checking the data. ``Zebra Corporation determined that Allen had some important information and removed him.''
"I can't forgive...!" Alpha shook his fist in anger. “We will stop Zebra Corporation from stealing Allen like this!”
___________________


Escape from the Schendberg dimension
The moment they tried to retrieve Allen's body, the entire dimension began to collapse. A dimensional distortion device set up by Zebra Corporation was activated and was about to destroy space itself.
"Hurry! This dimension is collapsing!" Linda shouted.
Alpha and the others attempted to escape while temporarily suppressing the dimensional collapse using the power of companion conjugate. Yoshiro cut through the dimensional rift, and everyone worked together, with Ninny acting as a defender.
"Almost there...!" Alpha shouted, mustering the last of his strength to open the exit of space. They narrowly managed to escape from the Shendberg dimension.

Contact from TECHROSUS
One night, while Alpha and his friends were analyzing the data left behind by Allen, an unregistered communication entered the Stellar Ship Altair. The communication was highly encrypted, and it took even Linda several minutes to decipher it.
"What is this communication...?" Linda glared at the monitor in surprise.
``It looks like someone is trying to contact us directly.'' Yoshiro said, wary. "Enemy or ally?"
When the transmission was decoded, the TECHROSUS logo and a single person appeared on the screen. That person was a mysterious masked leader who called himself ``Chrono Valent''.
"Alpha Cain, I've been waiting for an opportunity to contact you." Chrono's voice was low and calm. "We propose an alliance to counter the ZAMLT conspiracy."
"Alliance?" Alpha asked carefully. “Who the hell are you guys?”
"We are TECHROSUS -- an independent organization working to liberate the universe from the control of ZAMLT," Chrono answered. "And I also know that you guys are hostile to ZAMLT."
``You're getting some information, aren't you?'' Linda said with a sharp look. "So what do you want from us?"

``Cooperate.'' Chrono said clearly. "ZAMLT's planned activation of Protocol X will push this universe into further crisis. We have the means to stop it, but we need your help."

However, lurking there are not only Zebra Corporation and other ZAMLT security forces, but also a new form of EVILS that has evolved using the distortions of the universe.

Preparation for infiltration
``The structure of the Silver Plant is a vast facility spanning from the surface to 10 layers underground,'' Linda began to explain during the pre-operation briefing. He continued while pointing at the diagram of the facility displayed on the hologram. "The aboveground part is just a fake research facility, but deep underground there is a nuclear facility that manages dimensional fault energy. The core data of Protocol X is stored inside."
"10 floors underground..." Yoshiro frowned. "How strictly are you guarding it?"
``It's almost too strict.'' Linda nodded. "This facility is packed with ZAMLT's highest technology. A frontal breakthrough is impossible."
"So you're using the Dimensional Key, right?" Ninny said as she readied her weapon. "Maybe we can break through the defense system with that key?"
"In theory," Linda answered, a little nervous. "However, the power of the partner conjugate is essential to using the key. If we fail, not only will the key not respond, but there is a risk that the entire facility will go into alert mode."
