___________________


The beginning of a fierce battle

"Come, Alpha Cain. And your friends." Omega's voice spoke, giving the illusion of echoing from all directions. "Your efforts are commendable, but it ends here."
"You are the one who will end it!" cried Alpha, wrapping his entire body in the power of his partner conjugate. "I won't let this universe be destroyed!"
___________________


The beginning of the battle
The battle with Omega-Ulysses was to take place throughout Dimension Tower. The battle transcended the normal laws of physics, and was a battle in another dimension where space and time itself became the battlefield.
"Be careful!" Celia, who had taken over from Linda, warned. "Omega controls dimensional energy itself. His every blow collapses space!"
``I know!'' Yoshiro drew his sword and took advantage of the moment to charge.
However, before Yoshiro's attack could reach Omega's body, space itself was distorted, blocking his movement.
"It's no use," Omega's voice echoes. "In this dimension, my will takes precedence over everything else."
"I won't let you say that!" Ninny brandished her sword and activated the companion conjugate to cut through the dimensional distortion.
Although the attack damaged part of Omega, it immediately regenerated and the counterattack tentacles approached Ninny.
"It's dangerous!" Alpha rescued Ninny in the nick of time, blocking the attack with a shield covered in dimensional energy.
___________________


Omega's true power
"As expected, the difference in our power is obvious." Omega says calmly. "With your power, you can't stop me."
With that, Omega condensed dimensional energy and released it throughout space. The wave shakes the entire dimensional tower, causing time and space to collapse at the same time.
"What is this...!" Ninny exclaimed in shock. “Time… is flowing backwards!”
The scene around you changes rapidly, and the past and future appear before your eyes at the same time. The Alphas are forced to confront their past and possible future.
"This is the truth of the dimension." Omega smiles coldly. "I know everything about you, and I have the power to turn it all into nothing."

"You have regenerative abilities...!" Ninny yells as she holds up her sword. "With this, a proper attack won't work!"
"Use the companion conjugate to immobilize the golems!" Alpha instructed, manipulating the flow of dimensions to immobilize the golems.
___________________


Craston's counterattack
However, Craston's own power was overwhelming. With just a wave of his hand, he freezes the space itself, restricting Alpha's movement.
"You can't reach me with your strength," Claston sneers. "Everything is powerless in the face of the power of this dimension."
As he said, his attack utilized the dimensional distortion itself, and was something that could not be prevented by normal defense.
"What strength...!" Yoshiro said as he backed away. "I can't fight properly like this!"
“Use the data Linda left behind!” Celia yells. "You should be able to use his energy against him and stop him from moving!"
"I understand!" Alpha received instructions from Celia and further strengthened the power of the companion conjugate.
___________________


Reuse of dimensional energy
In order to stop Claston from moving, Alpha and the others carried out a strategy to suppress his regenerative abilities by reusing dimensional energy. By analyzing Dead Hollow's structure and manipulating the energy flow inside the prison, Celia succeeds in temporarily blocking Craston's source of power.
"Now!" Alpha yelled, and they all launched a simultaneous attack.
Ninny swings his sword and Yoshiro cuts Claston's body with his sword. Taking advantage of this gap, Alpha concentrated the power of the companion conjugate and launched a direct attack into Craston's core.
"This is the end...!" Alpha unleashed a blow with all his might, and Craston's body shattered, dispersing the dimensional energy that comprised him.
___________________


Victory and new crisis
The defeat of Craston temporarily knocked down the defense system within the dimensional prison, creating an opportunity for escape. However, the entire prison was on the verge of collapse as the energy began to run out of control.

The battle began with a fierce battle that utilized dimensional energy. Iris uses the abilities of her dimensional energy suit to unleash an attack that distorts space itself.
``In this space, my power takes precedence over everything else.'' Iris said with a sneer as she unleashed an attack, and the surrounding terrain changed drastically, blocking the Alphas' movements.
"Damn, they're reading my movements!" Ninny swings her sword, but Iris's attack blocks her.
"She's manipulating the flow of dimensions!" Celia yells as she analyzes the data. "We can't win if this continues!"
``In that case, we have no choice but to use our side conjugate with all our might!'' Alpha activated his side conjugate and tried to counterattack while canceling out the distortion of space.
Ninny and Yoshiro approached Iris and launched a coordinated attack with their swords. However, Iris's suit had an advanced defense system built into it, making it difficult for her to even be harmed.
"This is the power of Aloe Oil...!" Yoshiro said through gritted teeth.
"Still, I won't give up!" Ninny yells, drawing out the power of the partner conjugate to the maximum and trying to block Iris' movements.
"It's no use resisting," Iris said coldly, and her suit released dimensional energy, collapsing the space around it.
"It's bad, the space will collapse!" Celia warns.
"Don't give up!" Alpha yells. "Use the data Linda left behind to stabilize the space!"
___________________


Clues to counterattack
Celia analyzes the weaknesses in Iris' suit based on the data Linda left behind. As a result, the suit's dimensional energy source was found to be overloaded in a regular rhythm.
"If we target the source, we can break down her defenses!" Celia yells.
"Alright, leave it to me!" Alpha attacked with all her might, creating an opening to break through Iris' defense.
"This is the end!" Yoshiro and Ninny launch attacks at the same time, causing fatal damage to Iris' suit.
___________________


Iris' defeat and escape
Due to damage to her suit, Iris lost control of her dimensional energy, and the battlefield went out of control.

"Hurry! The prison is collapsing!" Celia shouted, trying to activate the dimensional stabilizer.
``Can we really escape with this?'' Yoshiro asks in a panicked voice.
"We have no choice but to do it!" Alpha replied emphatically. “To protect the future Linda entrusted to us!”
When Celia activated the device, the entire prison began to shake violently and a dimensional rift opened. Alpha and his friends barely manage to escape through the rift.
___________________


Become free again
After escaping Dead Hollow, Alpha and his friends stood in a ruined space. As they take heavy breaths, they realize that they have finally gained freedom.
"Did you...?" Ninny said breathlessly.
"Oh, we're free," Alpha replied quietly. "But this is not the end. ZAMLT and EVILS are still coming after us."
"What's next?" Yoshiro asked.
Alpha looked around at his friends and said forcefully. "We will fight. Until the end. And so that Linda's sacrifice will not be in vain, we will protect this universe."
Chapter 26: Fierce Battle - Final Battle with Aloe Oil Company
After escaping Dead Hollow, Alpha and his friends successfully escape from a clever trap set by Aloe Oil. However, what awaited them after regaining their freedom was an even fiercer battle. Aloe Oil, under the direction of its leader Iris Nova, thoroughly pursues the Alphas and attempts to eliminate them.
This battle develops into a fierce battle that involves dimensions, and Alpha and the others have Linda's will in mind and a direct confrontation with Iris, who is using the full power of Aloe Oil Company.
___________________


Aloe Oil Company's pursuit
Immediately after escaping, Alpha and his friends hid in a part of the dimensional fault, thinking about their next move.
"This is not the end of Aloe Oil's attacks," Celia said, staring at the monitor. "They're not going to let up until they eliminate us completely."
"We can't keep running away," Alpha answered quietly. "We'll settle things with them here."

___________________


Struggle of friends
"Even with that kind of power, we won't stop!" Yoshiro shouted, swinging his sword in a way that resonated with his future self. The blow succeeded in severing part of Omega's tentacles.
"You did it...!"
However, the severed tentacle immediately regenerated and evolved into an even larger form.
"No use," Omega said quietly. "My existence is infinite. All your efforts will be in vain."
"That can't happen!" Ninny said angrily, brandishing her sword and launching attacks one after another to protect her friends.
___________________


Awakening of Alpha
While his friends continue to struggle, Alpha seeks a breakthrough to get closer to Omega. He believed in the possibility of merging the data left behind by Linda and the power of their companion conjugate, and concentrated all his energy on it.
“Everyone, please lend us your strength!” Alpha shouts.
Ninny, Yoshiro, and Celia send their respective energies to Alpha. After receiving that power, Alpha's body began to emit an unprecedented amount of light.
"This is all we have!" Alpha clenched his fists and charged towards Omega's center.
___________________


Climax of the decisive battle
The moment Alpha's attack reached Omega's core, the entire Dimensional Tower began to shake violently. Omega's body begins to disintegrate, and his dimensional energy goes out of control.
"Oh my god, this is the end!" Alpha yells.
However, Omega mustered up his last strength and began absorbing the space around him at once.
"It's not over..." Omega's voice echoes. "I am infinite and part of this universe. Even if you destroy me, the dimension itself will rebuild me."
"Still...!" Alpha looked back at his friends and shouted loudly. "We'll stop you!"
___________________


Dimensional collapse and rebirth
Through their battle with Omega, Alpha and his friends found a way to eliminate the distortions in the dimension itself. Their goal was to use the power of partner conjugation to unite everyone's will and restore balance to the entire universe.

The battle began with a fierce battle that utilized dimensional energy. Iris uses the abilities of her dimensional energy suit to unleash an attack that distorts space itself.
``In this space, my power takes precedence over everything else.'' Iris said with a sneer as she unleashed an attack, and the surrounding terrain changed drastically, blocking the Alphas' movements.
"Damn, they're reading my movements!" Ninny swings her sword, but Iris's attack blocks her.
"She's manipulating the flow of dimensions!" Celia yells as she analyzes the data. "We can't win if this continues!"
``In that case, we have no choice but to use our side conjugate with all our might!'' Alpha activated his side conjugate and tried to counterattack while canceling out the distortion of space.
Ninny and Yoshiro approached Iris and launched a coordinated attack with their swords. However, Iris's suit had an advanced defense system built into it, making it difficult for her to even be harmed.
"This is the power of Aloe Oil...!" Yoshiro said through gritted teeth.
"Still, I won't give up!" Ninny yells, drawing out the power of the partner conjugate to the maximum and trying to block Iris' movements.
"It's no use resisting," Iris said coldly, and her suit released dimensional energy, collapsing the space around it.
"It's bad, the space will collapse!" Celia warns.
"Don't give up!" Alpha yells. "Use the data Linda left behind to stabilize the space!"
___________________


Clues to counterattack
Celia analyzes the weaknesses in Iris' suit based on the data Linda left behind. As a result, the suit's dimensional energy source was found to be overloaded in a regular rhythm.
"If we target the source, we can break down her defenses!" Celia yells.
"Alright, leave it to me!" Alpha attacked with all her might, creating an opening to break through Iris' defense.
"This is the end!" Yoshiro and Ninny launch attacks at the same time, causing fatal damage to Iris' suit.
___________________


Iris' defeat and escape
Due to damage to her suit, Iris lost control of her dimensional energy, and the battlefield went out of control.

"This is...the future that Linda has entrusted to me!" Alpha released the dimensional energy with all her might.
As a result, Omega-Ulysses was sealed within the dimension, and the entire Dimensional Tower returned to silence.
___________________


end of the battle
Alpha and his friends escaped from the dimensional tower and succeeded in restoring a peaceful universe.
"Did you...?" Ninny asked breathlessly.
"Oh, it's over," Alpha answered in a tired voice. "But this is not the end. The fight to protect the future of the universe will continue."
Chapter 24: Trap - Detention by Aloe Oil Company Agents
After the fierce battle with Omega-Ulysses, Alpha and his friends seemed to be able to rest for a while. However, as the aftereffects of the battle and the exhaustion of their friends remain, they find themselves trapped in a new trap. It was a clever ploy by Aloe Oil, a subsidiary of ZAMLT.
___________________


watching eyes
After the battle with Omega, Alpha and the others returned to TECHROSUS headquarters and began discussing dimensional stabilization and future plans.
"Even if the EVILS threat is temporarily gone, ZAMLT is still active," Celia said, pointing at the data on the hologram. "Aloe Oil, Zebra, and Lurenz are all probably looking for their next move."
"We don't have time," Yoshiro said, staring at the sword. "We need to hit them before they start moving again."
"In order to do that, we first have to find out where and what the remnants of ZAMLT are planning," Ninny answered, crossing her arms. "But the battle in the Dimensional Tower has exhausted us too. We need to prepare."
Alpha nodded silently. "That's right. Now it's time to get things fixed."
However, that peace did not last long.
___________________


Arrival of Aloe Oil's agent
It was that night that an abnormality occurred in the guarded area around TECHROSUS. The surveillance system suddenly goes down, causing a power outage in parts of the base.

"Are you sane?" Yoshiro asked with a grim look on his face. "Our opponent is Aloe Oil, which has the strongest military power in ZAMLT. If we challenge them head-on, we have little chance of winning."
"But running around like this will only make things worse," said Ninny, clutching her sword. “We have no choice but to fight.”
"That's right." Alpha nodded vigorously. "Defeat Iris Nova and destroy Aloe Oil Company. That is the first step to ending this war."
___________________


Iris Nova's Declaration of War
Aloe Oil Co., which sensed Alpha's movements, began a large-scale military operation that transcended dimensions. They mobilized special forces armed with battleships and dimensional energy, and surrounded and cornered Alpha and the others.
"Alpha Cain," Iris Nova's cold voice rang out from the communications terminal. "As the leader of Aloe Oil Company, I have a mission to eliminate you. I will never allow anyone to bring chaos to this universe."
“You guys are the ones causing the chaos!” Alpha yells in anger.
"We're just keeping order," Iris sneered. "If there are no rebels like you, the universe will be stable."
“How many sacrifices have you been forced to make for that stability?” Celia asked in a sharp voice. "Your order is a false peace."
"That's all for the wordplay," Iris said coldly. "It will be settled on the battlefield."
___________________


Battlefield Stage: Dimensional Wilderness
Iris set up a battlefield in a special space called the Dimensional Wilderness, and lured Alpha and the others in. This space was a place where the dimensional energy was unstable and the terrain and environment changed every moment, making battle extremely difficult.
"We'll bury you here." Iris appeared. She wore Aloe Oil's state-of-the-art dimensional energy suit, and looked like a dimensional incarnation.
"Come on, Iris!" Alpha raised her fist. “Let’s settle it here!”
___________________


The beginning of a fierce battle

"I never thought I'd push you this far..." Iris muttered in frustration. "But this is not the end."
Alpha and his friends attempt to escape from the battlefield to escape the rampaging dimensional energy. Iris barely leaves the scene, and the battle comes to a temporary end.
Although Alpha and the others were victorious, the battle against Aloe Oil and ZAMLT as a whole was not over.
"This isn't how we defeated Aloe Oil," Celia said. "Iris is still alive."
"Yeah, but we've definitely taken a step forward," Alpha said emphatically. "Next, it's your turn to hit ZAMLT itself."
Chapter 27: A new threat - Mammon's attack and Yoshiro's death
Alpha and the others have just finished their fierce battle with Aloe Oil, and before they can take a short break, they are faced with a new threat. Mammon, a member of ZAMLT, immediately took action to prevent any counterattack and launched a surprise attack that transcended dimensions.
Their attack was based on a cold-hearted plan different from that of Aloe Oil, and cornered Alpha and the others with merciless force. In this battle, one of his comrades, Yoshiro, loses his life and Ninny is seriously injured.
___________________


The beginning of a surprise attack
Immediately after the battle with Aloe Oil Company, Alpha and his friends are recovering their strength and figuring out their next move in the ruined dimensional wasteland.
"Iris escaped, but she must have caused great damage to Aloe Oil Company," Celia said with a tired expression. "But I don't think ZAMLT as a whole will remain silent."
"I know." Alpha responds with a grim expression. "They'll make their next move, but we still have time."
However, before he could finish his words, the entire space began to tremble with an eerie sound.
"This is...!" Ninny raised her sword in alarm.
A dimensional rift opened and a huge fleet appeared from within. The fleet's flag was engraved with the emblem of Mammon Corporation, and in the center of it was the figure of the ruthless executive Carlos Vandam.

"I never thought I'd push you this far..." Iris muttered in frustration. "But this is not the end."
Alpha and his friends attempt to escape from the battlefield to escape the rampaging dimensional energy. Iris barely leaves the scene, and the battle comes to a temporary end.
Although Alpha and the others were victorious, the battle against Aloe Oil and ZAMLT as a whole was not over.
"This isn't how we defeated Aloe Oil," Celia said. "Iris is still alive."
"Yeah, but we've definitely taken a step forward," Alpha said emphatically. "Next, it's your turn to hit ZAMLT itself."
Chapter 27: A new threat - Mammon's attack and Yoshiro's death

"Your victory ends here," Carlos announced in a cold voice over the comm. “You will be punished for going against ZAMLT.”
___________________


The overwhelming power of Mammon
Carlos used Mammon's most advanced combat weapons to surround Alpha and the others. It was an autonomous weapon that utilized dimensional energy, and used the surrounding space itself as a means of attack.
``These guys... they're not just machines!'' Yoshiro shouts, swinging his sword and destroying one of them, but a new weapon soon appears.
"They have an endless supply," Carlos said cruelly. "No matter how much you try to resist, it's all in vain."
"That can't happen!" Ninny brandishes her sword and attacks with dimensional energy. However, he is blocked by the enemy's defense system and is unable to deal proper damage.
“Damn, this is so poor!” Celia screams. "Buy time to analyze the enemy's system!"
``I'm the one who buys time!'' Yoshiro stood up and rushed to the front line.
___________________


Yoshiro's determination
Yoshiro himself became a decoy and began moving to attract all enemies. His sword handling is excellent and he cuts down enemies one after another.
"I'll protect you!" Yoshiro yells. "Get ready to escape quickly!"
``Don't be stupid!'' Ninny screams in tears. "You're sure we'll escape together!"
``No, if I don't stop them now, everyone will be killed!'' Yoshiro said without looking back. "For Linda's sake and to end our fight, leave this to me!"
___________________


the last battle
Yoshiro put all his energy into his sword and used his special skill of manipulating dimensional energy to the fullest to face the enemy. However, the number of enemies is huge, and his physical strength gradually reaches its limit.
"Not yet...!" Yoshiro swung his sword down with all his might, destroying the enemy's main force with the final blow. However, at that moment, a bombardment of dimensional energy fired by one of the enemies hit his body directly.
"Yoshiro!" Alpha yelled as he ran towards him.

The battle began with a fierce battle that utilized dimensional energy. Iris uses the abilities of her dimensional energy suit to unleash an attack that distorts space itself.

"I'm sorry...Alpha..." Yoshiro said in a weak voice. "That's all for me. But you guys...must win..."
After saying that, Yoshiro's body collapsed weakly.
___________________


Ninny's injury
Taking advantage of Alpha and the others who were upset by Yoshiro's death, Carlos launched another attack. The attack hit Ninny, seriously injuring her left shoulder.
"Ninny!" Alpha runs up.
"It's okay... I can still do it...!" Ninny stands up, enduring the pain.
"Don't be reckless!" Celia yells. "If you fall, it's over!"
``But... Yoshiro risked his life to protect me!'' Ninny clenched her sword, tears streaming down her face. “I can’t collapse here…!”
___________________


Direct confrontation with Carlos
The Alphas stood up to Carlos while protecting the injured Ninny. In order not to let Yoshiro's sacrifice be in vain, they used all their power and made full use of their partner conjugates to launch an attack.
"This is the end, Carlos!" Alpha swings his fist and slams the conjugate energy into Carlos' core.
"Damn...I never thought your powers were this great...!" Carlos barely managed to retreat from the scene, but his fleet was annihilated.
___________________


victory and loss
Although the attack by Mammon Corporation was repelled, deep sadness remained in the hearts of Alpha and his friends.
"Yoshiro..." Ninny burst into tears.
"His sacrifice will not be in vain," Alpha said quietly. "Yoshiro risked his life to protect us. Carrying that desire, I will definitely defeat ZAMLT."
``There's no turning back now.'' Celia nodded quietly. "Our battle begins from here."

Chapter 28: Meeting Cypher, the Goddess of Healing and Recovery

With the loss of Yoshiro and Ninny being seriously injured, Alpha and the others are suffering from a sense of loss and fatigue that makes it impossible for them to endure the fight against ZAMLT. The group's unity was beginning to waver due to a significant drop in military strength and heartache. The legendary goddess of healing and recovery, Cypher, appears before them. Meeting her becomes a new light of hope for Alpha and the others.
___________________


prayer in the wilderness
After finishing the battle with Mammon Corporation, Alpha and his friends landed on the desolate planet "Seris". This planet is located near a dimensional rift and was once full of life, but due to the war, most of its inhabitants were evacuated and it was left in ruins.
"We need to rest here for a little while," Alpha said quietly. "Let's make Ninny's treatment our top priority."
"But this planet has almost no resources." Celia frowns as she looks around. "We don't have the necessary medical equipment..."
"It's okay," Ninny said with a pained smile. “Think about your future strategy more than about me.”
"Shut up," Alpha retorts with a grim look on his face. "I can't lose you."
___________________


Sign of Cypher
One night while the group was camping among the ruins, Ninny's wound began to worsen. He develops a high fever, and it becomes clear that he is being contaminated by dimensional energy.
"It's dangerous if things continue like this...!" Alpha exclaims in an impatient voice.
"There is no cure on this planet," Celia said, feeling helpless. "What should I do...?"
At that moment, I heard something like a beautiful singing voice riding on the wind. It was so pure that it seemed unbecoming of a devastated planet, and had a somewhat mysterious sound to it.
"What's this voice...?" Ninny opens her eyes in pain.
"Something is approaching." Alpha readies his sword. However, there was no hint of hostility in his voice; in fact, there was a warmth that gave him comfort.
___________________


Encounter with Cypher

With the loss of Yoshiro and Ninny being seriously injured, Alpha and the others are suffering from a sense of loss and fatigue that makes it impossible for them to endure the fight against ZAMLT. The group's unity was beginning to waver due to a significant drop in military strength and heartache. The legendary goddess of healing and recovery, Cypher, appears before them. Meeting her becomes a new light of hope for Alpha and the others.
___________________

prayer in the wilderness

Sign of Cypher
One night while the group was camping among the ruins, Ninny's wound began to worsen. He develops a high fever, and it becomes clear that he is being contaminated by dimensional energy.
"It's dangerous if things continue like this...!" Alpha exclaims in an impatient voice.
"There is no cure on this planet," Celia said, feeling helpless. "What should I do...?"
At that moment, I heard something like a beautiful singing voice riding on the wind. It was so pure that it seemed unbecoming of a devastated planet, and had a somewhat mysterious sound to it.
"What's this voice...?" Ninny opens her eyes in pain.
"Something is approaching." Alpha readies his sword. However, there was no hint of hostility in his voice; in fact, there was a warmth that gave him comfort.
___________________


Encounter with Cypher

The owner of the voice appeared in a ruined central square a little far from the camp where the group was. A woman was standing there, surrounded by a white glow. Her appearance was so divine that it was completely unbecoming of this devastated world, and beautiful wings of light spread out from her back.
"You are all looking for healing," she says in a gentle voice. "I am Cypher. I am the guardian of the remaining life on this planet."
"Cipher..." Alpha repeated the name. "Are you the owner of this voice?"
"Yes." Cipher nods. "Your suffering has been transmitted to me through the residual energies of this planet. I am here to help you."
"Help...?" Celia asked cautiously. "Who are you? You're not affiliated with ZAMLT or EVILS, right?"
"I'm just a being. I have healing powers that transcend dimensions." Cypher smiles. "Don't worry about anything else."
___________________


treatment of ninny
Cypher quietly approached Ninny and placed his hand over her wound. The light emitted from her hands neutralizes the pollution of dimensional energy and heals wounds.
"What a warm light..." Ninny murmured with a calm expression. "This is my first time feeling something like this..."
"It's okay," Cypher replied kindly. "Your wounds will heal. It will take some time, but your injuries are not life-threatening."
Alpha breathed a sigh of relief as he watched the scene.
___________________


Prayer to Yoshiro
As the treatment progressed, Alpha decided to ask Cypher.
"Cipher, if you can...could you save our friend Yoshiro?"
Cypher quietly closed his eyes and made a prayer-like gesture. However, the next time he spoke, his expression was filled with sadness.
"His soul has already traveled to the other dimension," Cypher answered quietly. "Reviving him as a physical body would greatly distort the laws of nature."
"No way..." Alpha clenched his fists.

The owner of the voice appeared in a ruined central square a little far from the camp where the group was. A woman was standing there, surrounded by a white glow. Her appearance was so divine that it was completely unbecoming of this devastated world, and beautiful wings of light spread out from her back.
"You are all looking for healing," she says in a gentle voice. "I am Cypher. I am the guardian of the remaining life on this planet."
"Cipher..." Alpha repeated the name. "Are you the owner of this voice?"
"Yes." Cipher nods. "Your suffering has been transmitted to me through the residual energies of this planet. I am here to help you."
"Help...?" Celia asked cautiously. "Who are you? You're not affiliated with ZAMLT or EVILS, right?"
"I'm just a being. I have healing powers that transcend dimensions." Cypher smiles. "Don't worry about anything else."

"It's okay," Cypher replies gently. "Your wounds will heal. It will take some time, but your injuries are not life-threatening."
Alpha breathed a sigh of relief as he watched the scene.
___________________


Prayer to Yoshiro
As the treatment progressed, Alpha decided to ask Cypher.
"Cipher, if you can...could you save our friend Yoshiro?"
Cypher quietly closed his eyes and made a prayer-like gesture. However, the next time he spoke, his expression was filled with sadness.
"His soul has already traveled to the other dimension," Cypher answered quietly. "Reviving him as a physical body would greatly distort the laws of nature."
"No way..." Alpha clenched his fists.

"But his will is still with you," Cypher continues. “If there is a way to make that will a reality, I may be able to lend you my power.”
___________________


new power
Cipher took Yoshiro's sword and imbued it with the power of healing and protection. The sword emits a stronger light than before, gaining new power to cut through dimensional distortions.
"His will resides in this sword." Cipher hands Alpha the sword. "Please borrow his power and continue the fight to protect this universe."
"Thank you..." Alpha gripped his sword and quietly expressed his gratitude.
___________________


Farewell and fresh start
After Ninny's wounds were completely healed, Cipher said goodbye to the group.
"I will remain on this planet and continue to protect the remaining life here." Cypher smiles gently. “When you face difficulties, my strength will surely reach you.”
``I believe we'll see each other again,'' Ninny said through tears. "Thank you so much."
Cypher disappears into the light once again, and the group departs for the next battle with new strength and hope in their hearts.
Chapter 29: Encounter with Ishroth, the goddess of wisdom and attack
Although Alpha and his friends regained healing and hope through their encounter with Cipher, the threat of ZAMLT and EVILS still cornered them. In preparation for the next battle, the group embarks on a journey to find new power, and encounters Ishroth, a being hidden in the depths of space known as the "goddess of wisdom and attack." This encounter brings a new dimension of wisdom and tactics to Alpha and his friends, and changes the face of the battle forever.
___________________


voice of guidance
After parting ways with Cypher, Alpha and his friends rely on the flow of dimensional energy to arrive at the asteroid "Kanmes" floating in space. In mythology, this planet is said to be the home of beings who control wisdom and power, and is dotted with ruins from ancient times.
"This is Kanmes..." Alpha said, looking out over the vast wasteland. "I feel some kind of power."

"But his will is still with you," Cypher continues. “If there is a way to make that will a reality, I may be able to lend you my power.”
___________________


new power

"Thank you..." Alpha gripped his sword and quietly expressed his gratitude.

Chapter 29: Encounter with Ishroth, the goddess of wisdom and attack
Although Alpha and his friends regained healing and hope through their encounter with Cipher, the threat of ZAMLT and EVILS still cornered them. In preparation for the next battle, the group embarks on a journey to find new power, and encounters Ishroth, a being hidden in the depths of space known as the "goddess of wisdom and attack." This encounter brings a new dimension of wisdom and tactics to Alpha and his friends, and changes the face of the battle forever.
___________________


voice of guidance
After parting ways with Cypher, Alpha and his friends rely on the flow of dimensional energy to arrive at the asteroid "Kanmes" floating in space. In mythology, this planet is said to be the home of beings who control wisdom and power, and is dotted with ruins from ancient times.
"This is Kanmes..." Alpha said, looking out over the vast wasteland. "I feel some kind of power."

"It's definitely not a normal planet," Celia answered while scanning the data. "The concentration of dimensional energy is abnormally high. I've never seen a place like this before."
``But where is the important goddess?'' asked Ninny, looking around cautiously. "I'm sure it's not just a legend."
At that moment, a strong light suddenly emitted from the center of the ruins, and the wind began to blow violently.
"It's here...!" Celia exclaims in surprise.
What appeared from the light was a woman whose entire body was covered in golden armor and wielding sharp twin swords. His eyes were sharp, and he gave off an overwhelming sense of intimidation just by standing there.
"I'm Ishroth," the woman introduced herself in a cold but somewhat intelligent voice. "Goddess of wisdom and attack. What purpose did you guys come here for?"
___________________


Dialogue with the Goddess Ishroth
"We are looking for the power to fight ZAMLT and EVILS," Alpha answered, taking a step forward. "We need your power to protect this universe."
"My power?" Ishroth thrust his twin swords into the ground and looked at the Alphas with sharp eyes. "Why should I believe that your fight is right?"
"We lost friends and overcame many crises," Alpha says in a serious voice. 「だが、それでもこの宇宙を救うために戦い続ける覚悟がある。」
“Preparation alone is not enough,” Ishroth declared coldly. "Wisdom is necessary in battle. Those who proceed with reckless courage alone will eventually lose everything."
``Then tell me,'' Celia said, stepping forward. “How can we achieve victory?”
"Okay." Ishroth nodded quietly. "However, in order to obtain my power, you must overcome my trials. Let me test your wisdom and strength."
___________________


labyrinth of trials
Ishroth wields his twin swords, distorting the space around him. Then, suddenly, the ground beneath Alpha's feet cracked open, and they were drawn into a huge labyrinth that spread beneath the ruins.
"This is my testing ground," Ishroth's voice echoes. "We will determine whether you are worthy of wisdom and attack power."

"But his will is still with you," Cypher continues. 「その意志を形にする方法なら、私に力を貸せるかもしれません。」
___________________


new power
Cipher took Yoshiro's sword and imbued it with the power of healing and protection. The sword emits a stronger light than before, gaining new power to cut through dimensional distortions.
"His will resides in this sword." Cipher hands Alpha the sword. "Please borrow his power and continue the fight to protect this universe."
"Thank you..." Alpha gripped his sword and quietly expressed his gratitude.
___________________


Farewell and fresh start
After Ninny's wounds were completely healed, Cipher said goodbye to the group.
"I will remain on this planet and continue to protect the remaining life here." Cypher smiles gently. “When you face difficulties, my strength will surely reach you.”
``I believe we'll see each other again,'' Ninny said through tears. "Thank you so much."
Cypher disappears into the light once again, and the group departs for the next battle with new strength and hope in their hearts.
Chapter 29: Encounter with Ishroth, the goddess of wisdom and attack
Although Alpha and his friends regained healing and hope through their encounter with Cipher, the threat of ZAMLT and EVILS still cornered them. In preparation for the next battle, the group embarks on a journey to find new power, and encounters Ishroth, a being hidden in the depths of space known as the "goddess of wisdom and attack." This encounter brings a new dimension of wisdom and tactics to Alpha and his friends, and changes the face of the battle forever.
___________________


voice of guidance
After parting ways with Cipher, Alpha and his friends rely on the flow of dimensional energy to arrive at the asteroid "Kanmes" floating in space. In mythology, this planet is said to be the home of beings who control wisdom and power, and is dotted with ruins from ancient times.
"This is Kanmes..." Alpha said, looking out over the vast wasteland. "I feel some kind of power."

``This labyrinth... its structure is as if the dimensions themselves have been rearranged.'' Celia attempts to scan, but the data is distorted and she is unable to obtain accurate information.
“The road has changed!” Ninny exclaims in surprise. “I don’t know which direction to go in now!”
"Calm down," Alpha orders calmly. “We have no choice but to believe in our strength and move forward.”
Inside the labyrinth, many tricks and mysteries await. Code-like puzzles, traps created by spatial distortions, and even phantom enemies made up of dimensional energy - the group progressed deep into the labyrinth, overcoming them one by one.
___________________


trial of battle
In the deepest part of the labyrinth, Ishroth himself was waiting for the group. She held her twin swords, and there was a testing light in her eyes.
"I'll give you credit for getting this far," Ishroth said quietly. "But to obtain my power, you must overcome the final test."
"Come, Ishroth!" Alpha raised his fist. "We will overcome any challenge!"
Ishroth smiled, brandished his twin swords, and unleashed an attack that seemed to cut through space itself. The blow was overwhelming, and it was too powerful for mere defense to withstand.
“I have to read her movements!” Celia yells. "You can't win even if you just fight with brute force!"
"I know!" Alpha responded, and launched an attack in coordination with his friends.
Ninny uses her sword to fend off Ishroth's attacks, while Celia manipulates the surrounding dimensional energy to create a defensive opening. Alpha took advantage of this gap and unleashed a blow that contained the power of a partner conjugate.
"This is the end!" Alpha's fist smashed Ishroth's twin swords, stopping her from moving.
___________________


inheritance of power
"Excellent." Ishroth lowered his sword and smiled. "You are worthy of inheriting my power."
Ishroth held up his hand and gave the group a golden light. That light brought new wisdom and power to the group, further evolving their companion conjugate powers.
"This is my wisdom and the power of my attacks," Ishroth says quietly. "Don't use it incorrectly."

"It's definitely not a normal planet," Celia answered while scanning the data. "The concentration of dimensional energy is abnormally high. I've never seen a place like this before."
``But where is the important goddess?'' asked Ninny, looking around cautiously. "I'm sure it's not just a legend."
At that moment, a strong light suddenly emitted from the center of the ruins, and the wind began to blow violently.
"It's here...!" Celia exclaims in surprise.
What appeared from the light was a woman whose entire body was covered in golden armor and wielding sharp twin swords. His eyes were sharp, and he gave off an overwhelming sense of intimidation just by standing there.
"I'm Ishroth," the woman introduced herself in a cold but somewhat intelligent voice. "Goddess of wisdom and attack. What purpose did you guys come here for?"
___________________


Dialogue with the Goddess Ishroth
"We are looking for the power to fight ZAMLT and EVILS," Alpha answered, taking a step forward. "We need your power to protect this universe."
"My power?" Ishroth thrust his twin swords into the ground and looked at the Alphas with sharp eyes. "Why should I believe that your fight is right?"
"We lost friends and overcame many crises," Alpha says in a serious voice. "However, I am determined to continue fighting to save this universe."
“Preparation alone is not enough,” Ishroth declared coldly. "Wisdom is necessary in battle. Those who proceed with reckless courage alone will eventually lose everything."
``Then tell me,'' Celia said, stepping forward. “How can we achieve victory?”
"Okay." Ishroth nodded quietly. "However, in order to obtain my power, you must overcome my trials. Let me test your wisdom and strength."
___________________


labyrinth of trials
Ishroth wields his twin swords, distorting the space around him. Then, suddenly, the ground beneath Alpha's feet cracked open, and they were drawn into a huge labyrinth that spread beneath the ruins.
"This is my testing ground," Ishroth's voice echoes. "We will determine whether you are worthy of wisdom and attack power."

"It's definitely not a normal planet," Celia answered while scanning the data. 「次元エネルギーの濃度が異常に高い。これほどの場所は初めて見た。」
``But where is the important goddess?'' Ninny asked, looking around cautiously. "I'm sure it's not just a legend."
At that moment, a strong light suddenly emitted from the center of the ruins, and the wind began to blow violently.
"It's here...!" Celia exclaims in surprise.
光の中から現れたのは、全身を黄金の鎧で包み、鋭い双剣を持つ一人の女性だった。その眼光は鋭く、ただ立っているだけで圧倒的な威圧感を放っていた。
"I'm Ishroth," the woman introduced herself in a cold but somewhat intelligent voice. "Goddess of wisdom and attack. What purpose did you guys come here for?"
___________________


Dialogue with the Goddess Ishroth
"We are looking for the power to fight ZAMLT and EVILS," Alpha answered, taking a step forward. 「この宇宙を守るために、お前の力が必要だ。」
「私の力を？」イシュロスが双剣を地面に突き立て、鋭い目でアルファたちを見つめた。 「お前たちの戦いが正しいと、なぜ私が信じなければならない？」
"We lost friends and overcame many crises," Alpha says in a serious voice. "However, I am determined to continue fighting to save this universe."
「覚悟だけでは足りない。」イシュロスが冷たく言い放つ。 "Wisdom is necessary in battle. Those who proceed with reckless courage alone will eventually lose everything."
``Then tell me,'' Celia said, stepping forward. 「私たちがどうすれば勝利を掴めるのかを！」
「いいだろう。」イシュロスが静かに頷いた。 "However, in order to obtain my power, you must overcome my trials. Let me test your wisdom and strength."
___________________


labyrinth of trials
Ishroth wields his twin swords, distorting the space around him.すると、突然、アルファたちの足元が割れ、彼らは遺跡の地下に広がる巨大な迷宮に引き込まれた。
「ここは私の試練の場。」イシュロスの声が響く。 "We will determine whether you are worthy of wisdom and attack power."

``This labyrinth... its structure is as if the dimensions themselves have been rearranged.'' Celia attempts to scan, but the data is distorted and she is unable to obtain accurate information.
“The road has changed!” Ninny exclaims in surprise. “I don’t know which direction to go in now!”
"Calm down," Alpha orders calmly. “We have no choice but to believe in our strength and move forward.”
Inside the labyrinth, many tricks and mysteries await. Code-like puzzles, traps created by spatial distortions, and even phantom enemies made up of dimensional energy - the group progressed deep into the labyrinth, overcoming them one by one.
___________________


trial of battle
In the deepest part of the labyrinth, Ishroth himself was waiting for the group. She held her twin swords, and there was a testing light in her eyes.
"I'll give you credit for getting this far," Ishroth said quietly. "But to obtain my power, you must overcome the final test."
"Come, Ishroth!" Alpha raised his fist. "We will overcome any challenge!"
Ishroth smiled, brandished his twin swords, and unleashed an attack that seemed to cut through space itself. The blow was overwhelming, and it was too powerful for mere defense to withstand.
“I have to read her movements!” Celia yells. "You can't win even if you just fight with brute force!"
"I know!" Alpha responded, and launched an attack in coordination with his friends.
Ninny uses her sword to fend off Ishroth's attacks, while Celia manipulates the surrounding dimensional energy to create a defensive opening. Alpha took advantage of this gap and unleashed a blow that contained the power of a partner conjugate.
"This is the end!" Alpha's fist smashed Ishroth's twin swords, stopping her from moving.
___________________


inheritance of power
"Excellent." Ishroth lowered his sword and smiled. "You are worthy of inheriting my power."
Ishroth held up his hand and gave the group a golden light. That light brought new wisdom and power to the group, further evolving their companion conjugate powers.
"This is my wisdom and the power of my attacks," Ishroth says quietly. "Don't use it incorrectly."

"Thank you, Ishroth." Alpha bowed deeply. "I will definitely protect the universe with this power."
"Go then." Ishroth turned his back and disappeared into the depths of the labyrinth once again. "We will carve out your future."
___________________


new resolve
Through their encounter with Ishroth, the Alphas gained new powers and prepared to move on to the next stage of the battle.
"Now we can win the next battle," Ninny said with a smile. "I'm sure Yoshiro is watching too."
"Next is a real battle with ZAMLT," Alpha said emphatically. "With this power, I will not let Linda and Yoshiro's sacrifice go to waste."
They set out once again, determined to take on a new battle.
Chapter 30: The fateful showdown--Ninny vs. Iris, time for the end
Alpha and the others who gained new power from Ishroth resumed their actions with the aim of destroying ZAMLT. Their next target is to eliminate Iris Nova, who is aiming to reorganize and revive Aloe Oil Company.
Iris has developed a new dimensional energy weapon and plans to control the entire universe. In order to stop her actions, Alpha and his friends head to Iris's base, "Central Cradle." But this battle was more than just a strategy; it was also a personal showdown for Ninny.
___________________


To Iris' base
The Central Cradle was the new home of the Aloe Oil Corporation, built around a massive dimensional energy generator, and the center of Iris's ambitions to control the dimensions of the entire universe.
"Is this the whole story of Iris' plan..." Celia muttered as she analyzed the blueprint of the base reflected in the hologram. "She intends to concentrate dimensional energy and control all of ZAMLT."
"Then I'll stop here." Alpha clenched his fists. "We will never forgive those who try to steal our friends and destroy this universe."
"Especially Iris...!" Ninny gripped her sword, her eyes shining sharply. "She took Yoshiro away. I will settle the matter with my own hands."

``This labyrinth... its structure is as if the dimensions themselves have been rearranged.'' Celia attempts to scan, but the data is distorted and she is unable to obtain accurate information.
“The road has changed!” Ninny exclaims in surprise. “I don’t know which direction to go in now!”
"Calm down," Alpha orders calmly. “We have no choice but to believe in our strength and move forward.”
Inside the labyrinth, many tricks and mysteries await. Code-like puzzles, traps created by spatial distortions, and even phantom enemies made up of dimensional energy - the group progressed deep into the labyrinth, overcoming them one by one.
___________________


trial of battle
In the deepest part of the labyrinth, Ishroth himself was waiting for the group. She held her twin swords, and there was a testing light in her eyes.
"I'll give you credit for getting this far," Ishroth said quietly. "But to obtain my power, you must overcome the final test."
"Come, Ishroth!" Alpha raised his fist. "We will overcome any challenge!"
Ishroth smiled, brandished his twin swords, and unleashed an attack that seemed to cut through space itself. The blow was overwhelming, and it was too powerful for mere defense to withstand.
“I have to read her movements!” Celia yells. "You can't win even if you just fight with brute force!"
"I know!" Alpha responded, and launched an attack in coordination with his friends.
Ninny uses her sword to fend off Ishroth's attacks, while Celia manipulates the surrounding dimensional energy to create a defensive opening. Alpha took advantage of this gap and unleashed a blow that contained the power of a partner conjugate.
"This is the end!" Alpha's fist smashed Ishroth's twin swords, stopping her from moving.
___________________


inheritance of power
"Excellent." Ishroth lowered his sword and smiled. "You are worthy of inheriting my power."
Ishroth held up his hand and gave the group a golden light. That light brought new wisdom and power to the group, further evolving their companion conjugate powers.
"This is my wisdom and the power of my attacks," Ishroth says quietly. "Don't use it incorrectly."

"Thank you, Ishroth." Alpha bowed deeply. "I will definitely protect the universe with this power."
"Go then." Ishroth turned his back and disappeared into the depths of the labyrinth once again. "We will carve out your future."
___________________


new resolve
Through their encounter with Ishroth, the Alphas gained new powers and prepared to move on to the next stage of the battle.
"Now we can win the next battle," Ninny said with a smile. "I'm sure Yoshiro is watching too."
"Next is a real battle with ZAMLT," Alpha said emphatically. "With this power, I will not let Linda and Yoshiro's sacrifice go to waste."
They set out once again, determined to take on a new battle.
Chapter 30: The fateful showdown--Ninny vs. Iris, time for the end
Alpha and the others who gained new power from Ishroth resumed their actions with the aim of destroying ZAMLT. Their next target is to eliminate Iris Nova, who is aiming to reorganize and revive Aloe Oil Company.
Iris has developed a new dimensional energy weapon and plans to control the entire universe. In order to stop her actions, Alpha and his friends head to Iris's base, "Central Cradle." But this battle was more than just a strategy; it was also a personal showdown for Ninny.

___________________


To Iris' base
The Central Cradle was the new home of the Aloe Oil Corporation, built around a massive dimensional energy generator, and the center of Iris's ambitions to control the dimensions of the entire universe.
"Is this the whole story of Iris' plan..." Celia muttered as she analyzed the blueprint of the base reflected in the hologram. "She intends to concentrate dimensional energy and control all of ZAMLT."
"Then I'll stop here." Alpha clenched his fists. "We will never forgive those who try to steal our friends and destroy this universe."
"Especially Iris...!" Ninny gripped her sword, her eyes shining sharply. "She took Yoshiro away. I will settle the matter with my own hands."

"Don't push yourself too hard," Alpha said, looking at her. "We're a team. Don't keep it to yourself."
"I know," Ninny smiled. "But this is also my fight."
___________________


Infiltrating the Central Cradle
Alpha and his friends begin infiltrating Central Cradle. A defense system using dimensional energy and the elite troops of Aloe Oil Company were waiting for them, but the group was able to break through the enemies one after another thanks to the power bestowed by Ishros.
"This is the power of Ishroth's wisdom..." Celia said while dodging the enemy's attacks. "I can understand the defense system's algorithm intuitively."
``We will exploit that gap!'' Alpha released the energy of the partner conjugate and opened the way. “Hurry up!”
They proceeded to the center of the base and finally reached the control room where Iris was waiting.
___________________


Reunion with Iris
Iris stood in the center of the control room, wearing a new dimensional energy suit and smiling coldly.
``You've come this far,'' Iris said sharply. "Alpha Cain and his friends. Especially you—Ninny."
"Iris...!" Ninny readied her sword. “Today, I will let you avenge Yoshiro!”
"An enemy? That's not true," Iris said with a sneer. "Yoshiro died because of your own helplessness. If you hadn't interfered with my plans, he might still be alive."
"Shut up!" Ninny said angrily. "I'll never let you open that mouth again!"
"Okay." Iris readied her twin swords. "I was planning on ending you guys with this too."
___________________


Ninny vs Iris
Ninny brandished her sword and charged towards Iris. Meanwhile, Iris uses dimensional energy to distort space and evade her attacks while launching a counterattack.
"You can't beat me with brute force," Iris said with a sneer. "My suit manipulates dimensional distortion itself. All of your attacks will be nullified."

"Don't push yourself too hard," Alpha said, looking at her. "We're a team. Don't keep it to yourself."
"I know," Ninny smiled. "But this is also my fight."
___________________


Infiltrating the Central Cradle

They proceeded to the center of the base and finally reached the control room where Iris was waiting.

Reunion with Iris

"Iris...!" Ninny readied her sword. “Today, I will let you avenge Yoshiro!”

"Shut up!" Ninny said angrily. "I'll never let you open that mouth again!"
"Okay." Iris readied her twin swords. "I was planning on ending you guys with this too."
___________________


Ninny vs Iris
Ninny brandished her sword and charged towards Iris. Meanwhile, Iris uses dimensional energy to distort space and evade her attacks while launching a counterattack.
"You can't beat me with brute force," Iris said with a sneer. "My suit manipulates dimensional distortion itself. All of your attacks will be nullified."

``Then try it!'' Ninny released the power of companion conjugate and stabilized the space around her, canceling out Iris's distortion.
"I see...it seems like it'll do a bit." Iris swings her twin swords down and unleashes a blow imbued with dimensional energy.
The attack sends Ninny flying and slams her into the wall.
"Ninny!" Alpha yells.
"It's okay... I can still do it!" Ninny stood up despite being injured and readied her sword again. "I will never lose until I defeat you!"
___________________


decisive blow
Ninny regained her composure and used the power of Ishroth's wisdom to analyze Iris' attack patterns. She saw that there was a slight gap in Iris's supply of dimensional energy, and took advantage of that timing to launch a counterattack.
"Now...!"
Ninny swung her sword down with all her might, hitting Iris directly at the core of her suit. At that moment, the suit is damaged and Iris stops moving.
"I never expected...in a place like this...!" Iris muttered.
``That's it!'' Ninny delivered another blow, knocking Iris out completely.
When Iris fell, the entire Central Cradle began to collapse. Alpha and his friends quickly escape from the control room and barely manage to escape from the base.
"Is this... the end?" Ninny muttered, staring at the sword.
"Iris can't stand up anymore," Alpha answered. "You win, Ninny."
"Yoshiro...did you hear that? I...I took your revenge," Ninny murmured quietly, tears streaming down her face.
___________________


The fierce alpha group
By defeating Iris, ZAMLT's power has further weakened. However, there were still threats from Zebra, Lurenz, and even EVILS.
"This is the end of a battle," Alpha said, looking over his friends. "However, the battle to save the universe still continues."
"We won't stop," Ninny said, nodding vigorously. “I will fight to the end for both Yoshiro and Linda.”
They set out on a journey again, aiming for the complete destruction of ZAMLT and EVILS.

Chapter 31: Goddess Power and Complete Victory - Destruction of Aloe Oil
Alpha's party defeated Iris Nova, but the power of Aloe Oil Company was not completely wiped out. Even after Iris's defeat, the Aloe Oil Company reorganized its military power using dimensional energy and aimed for a revival under the orders of ZAMLT.
If things continued as they were, there was a danger that Aloe Oil would once again threaten the universe. With the help of the goddess Cipher and Ishros, the group plans to completely destroy Aloe Oil Company. This will be the final attack that will involve the entire universe.
___________________


Aloe Oil Company's revival base "Reverse Tower"
The base where Aloe Oil Company was reorganized was a huge facility called "Reverse Tower". This tower, centered on dimensional energy and demonstrating overwhelming power in both attack and defense, was a further enhancement of Iris' previous research results.
"This is their last stronghold," Celia said, pointing to the analysis data from the Reverse Tower. "If this facility becomes operational, it will absorb the dimensional energy of the entire universe and put everything under their control."
"I won't let that happen." Alpha clenched his fists. “This is where Aloe Oil Company will be completely wiped out.”
"But we're not just a company," Ninny said grimly. "The Reverse Tower is like a dimension itself. If we attack it squarely, we will be swallowed up."
"That's why we borrow the power of the goddesses," Alpha replied in a strong tone. "We will use the power Cipher and Ishroth have given us to end this battle."
___________________


Reunion with the goddesses
Before heading to the Reverse Tower, the group headed to the former ruins in order to contact Cipher and Ishroth again. The two goddesses respond to the Alphas' call and appear to bestow their respective powers on them.
"I see you guys are determined to move forward," Cypher said with a quiet smile. "How you use your healing power on the battlefield is up to you."

"I am the one who controls the battle itself." Ishroth looks at the group with sharp eyes. "I have seen that you have shown the determination to deserve this power. Use my power once more."
Cipher gave the group the technology to stabilize dimensional energy, and Ishroth gave them tactics and attack power. It was the key needed to directly destroy Aloe Oil's Reverse Tower.
"Thank you, Cipher, Ishroth." Alpha bowed deeply. "I will definitely lead this battle to victory."
___________________


All-out attack on Reverse Tower
Alpha and his friends, having gained the power of the goddesses, launched an all-out attack on the Reverse Tower. Aloe Oil's strongest weapons and elite troops were stationed around the tower, but by making full use of Ishroth's wisdom and attack power, he was able to break through their defenses one after another.
"I've disabled the enemy's defense system!" Celia yells. "Now we can rush inside the tower!"
"Alright, let's all rush in!" Alpha gave the command, and the group proceeded to the center of the tower.
Inside the tower, dimensional energy was swirling everywhere, and if you made a mistake you risked being swallowed up by space itself. However, Cypher's healing power stabilized the distortion in space and helped the group proceed.
"We couldn't have gotten this far without Cipher's help," Ninny said.
"Still, don't let your guard down," Alpha responded. "This is their home base. We don't know what awaits us."
___________________


Final Battle - Reverse Tower Core
When the group reached the deepest part of the tower, they found a huge energy core installed there. This core was a center built by Aloe Oil to manipulate dimensional energy, and was the key to a plan to absorb and control the energy of the entire universe.
"This is their heart...!" Alpha clenched his fist.
"But it won't be easy to destroy it," Celia said calmly. "A defense system is in operation to protect the core. It probably also has a self-repair function."

"I am the one who controls the battle itself." Ishroth looks at the group with sharp eyes. "I have seen that you have shown the determination to deserve this power. Use my power once more."
Cipher gave the group the technology to stabilize dimensional energy, and Ishroth gave them tactics and attack power. It was the key needed to directly destroy Aloe Oil's Reverse Tower.
"Thank you, Cipher, Ishroth." Alpha bowed deeply. "I will definitely lead this battle to victory."
___________________


All-out attack on Reverse Tower
Alpha and his friends, having gained the power of the goddesses, launched an all-out attack on the Reverse Tower. Aloe Oil's strongest weapons and elite troops were stationed around the tower, but by making full use of Ishroth's wisdom and attack power, he was able to break through their defenses one after another.
"I've disabled the enemy's defense system!" Celia yells. "Now we can rush inside the tower!"
"Alright, let's all rush in!" Alpha gave the command, and the group proceeded to the center of the tower.
Inside the tower, dimensional energy was swirling everywhere, and if you made a mistake you risked being swallowed up by space itself. However, Cypher's healing power stabilized the distortion in space and helped the group proceed.
"We couldn't have gotten this far without Cipher's help," Ninny said.
"Still, don't let your guard down," Alpha responded. "This is their home base. We don't know what awaits us."
___________________


Final Battle - Reverse Tower Core
When the group reached the deepest part of the tower, they found a huge energy core installed there. This core was a center built by Aloe Oil to manipulate dimensional energy, and was the key to a plan to absorb and control the energy of the entire universe.
"This is their heart...!" Alpha clenched his fist.
"But it won't be easy to destroy it," Celia said calmly. "A defense system is in operation to protect the core. It probably also has a self-repair function."

``That's why we need your help.'' Ninny readied her sword. "If I don't give it my all here, I won't know what I've been fighting for."
The defense system that protects the core is activated, and countless automatic weapons and dimensional energy traps attack the group. However, by making full use of Ishroth's tactical strength and Cipher's healing power, the group withstood the overwhelming attack and launched a counterattack.
___________________


destruction of the core
Eventually, the group succeeded in disabling the core's self-healing system and launched an attack with all its might.
"This is the end!" Alpha releases the power of the companion conjugate and slams his fist into the center of the core.
Following that blow, Ninny severed the energy line with her sword, and Celia shut down the entire system.
"I did it...!" Ninny muttered under her breath. "This is the end of Aloe Oil Company."
"The core will collapse!" Celia yells. “Hurry up and escape!”
___________________


complete destruction
Alpha and his friends escaped from the tower and watched the Reverse Tower collapse behind them. The explosion was sucked into a dimensional rift, and the Aloe Oil Company's base and forces were completely wiped out.
"It's... done," Alpha muttered quietly. “Aloe Oil Company can no longer stand up.”
``Yoshiro, look at me.'' Ninny cries as she stares at the sword. "Now I've taken revenge."
Chapter 32: Prelude to Collapse - Complete Destruction of Lurenz Company
After destroying Aloe Oil Company, Alpha and his friends chose Lurenz Company as their next target in order to subdue the other forces of ZAMLT. Lurenz controlled the energy supply network throughout the universe, and could be said to be the brain behind ZAMLT's overall strategy with its technological capabilities and knowledge. Defeating this company would be a blow that would shake the foundations of ZAMLT.

``That's why we need your help.'' Ninny readied her sword. "If I don't give it my all here, I won't know what I've been fighting for."
The defense system that protects the core is activated, and countless automatic weapons and dimensional energy traps attack the group. However, by making full use of Ishroth's tactical strength and Cipher's healing power, the group withstood the overwhelming attack and launched a counterattack.

Chapter 32: Prelude to Collapse - Complete Destruction of Lurenz Company
After destroying Aloe Oil Company, Alpha and his friends chose Lurenz Company as their next target in order to subdue the other forces of ZAMLT. Lurenz controlled the energy supply network throughout the universe, and could be said to be the brain behind ZAMLT's overall strategy with its technological capabilities and knowledge. Defeating this company would be a blow that would shake the foundations of ZAMLT.

"It's definitely not a normal planet," Celia answered while scanning the data. "The concentration of dimensional energy is abnormally high. I've never seen a place like this before."
``But where is the important goddess?'' Ninny asked, looking around cautiously. "I'm sure it's not just a legend."
At that moment, a strong light suddenly emitted from the center of the ruins, and the wind began to blow violently.
"It's here...!" Celia exclaims in surprise.
What appeared from the light was a woman whose entire body was covered in golden armor and wielding sharp twin swords. His eyes were sharp, and he gave off an overwhelming sense of intimidation just by standing there.
"I'm Ishroth," the woman introduced herself in a cold but somewhat intelligent voice. "Goddess of wisdom and attack. What purpose did you guys come here for?"
___________________


Dialogue with the Goddess Ishroth
"We are looking for the power to fight ZAMLT and EVILS," Alpha answered, taking a step forward. "We need your power to protect this universe."
"My power?" Ishroth thrust his twin swords into the ground and looked at the Alphas with sharp eyes. "Why should I believe that your fight is right?"
"We lost friends and overcame many crises," Alpha says in a serious voice. "However, I am determined to continue fighting to save this universe."
“Preparation alone is not enough,” Ishroth declared coldly. "Wisdom is necessary in battle. Those who proceed with reckless courage alone will eventually lose everything."
``Then tell me,'' Celia said, stepping forward. “How can we achieve victory?”
"Okay." Ishroth nodded quietly. "However, in order to obtain my power, you must overcome my trials. Let me test your wisdom and strength."
___________________


labyrinth of trials
Ishroth wields his twin swords, distorting the space around him. Then, suddenly, the ground beneath Alpha's feet cracked open, and they were drawn into a huge labyrinth that spread beneath the ruins.
"This is my testing ground," Ishroth's voice echoes. "We will determine whether you are worthy of wisdom and attack power."

However, Lurenz had the most advanced AI technology and tactics among ZAMLT, and was better at information manipulation and strategic encirclement networks than direct combat. Therefore, Alpha's group needed to mobilize all their wisdom and strength to take on the challenge. And they understood that this battle was an important phase leading to the final battle with ZAMLT.
___________________


Lurenz's base "Metacore City"
"Metacore City", the home base of Lurenz Corporation, is a completely artificially constructed floating city, and is directly connected to "EON", the largest AI network in the universe. This city was responsible for monitoring the energy supply network throughout the universe and manipulating the flow of dimensional energy.
"If we destroy this place, the energy supply for the entire ZAMLT will be disrupted and their control system will collapse," Celia explained, pointing to the structure of the city reflected in the hologram. "However, the entire city is under complete control of the AI. There's no way they can invade through direct attack."
"Then think of a way to use that AI to your advantage," Alpha said with determination. "Completely destroy Metacore City and eliminate Lurenz Corporation."
"However, it's a big risk." Celia continued with a grim expression. "If the AI is discovered before it reaches its core, the entire city will go into defense mode and there will be no escape."
"I'm not running away," Ninny said, clutching her sword. "I'm going with the determination to end everything here."
___________________


guidance of the goddesses
As they prepared for battle, Alpha and the others contacted Cipher and Ishroth again. The two goddesses recognized that this battle would determine the future of the entire universe, and offered further assistance to the group.
``Lurenz is an entity that manipulates knowledge and technology,'' Cipher says quietly. “To break their control, you must become more than yourselves in wisdom and power.”
"I lend you my power once more," said Ishroth, brandishing his twin swords. “Now that you have shown your determination to fight for this universe, I will do my best.”

``This labyrinth... its structure is as if the dimensions themselves have been rearranged.'' Celia attempts to scan, but the data is distorted and she is unable to obtain accurate information.
“The road has changed!” Ninny exclaims in surprise. “I don’t know which direction to go in now!”
"Calm down," Alpha orders calmly. “We have no choice but to believe in our strength and move forward.”

Infiltrating Metacore City

The entire city is being monitored by the AI ​​"EON", and a momentary mistake could have fatal consequences. However, thanks to Celia's advanced hacking techniques and covert operations that suppressed the distortion with the power of Cypher, the group approached the central part of the city.
"The whole city is like one giant computer," Celia muttered as she scanned the data. "I've never seen a network of this size."
"Then hit that core," Alpha said calmly. "If we stop EON, Lurenz will collapse."
___________________


Confrontation with AI “EON”
When the group arrived at the center of Metacore City, what appeared in front of them was something like a gigantic mass of light. That was the AI ​​"EON" that controlled the entire city.
"Confirm the intruder." EON's cold voice echoed. "Those who threaten the survival of Lurenz will be eliminated."
"You are the one who will be eliminated!" Alpha released the power of the companion conjugate and charged towards EON.
However, EON used the energy of the entire city to strengthen its defenses, and then attacked the group using countless weapons created from dimensional energy.
"This isn't just an AI!" Ninny shouts as she cuts down the enemy with her sword. “It feels like it’s alive!”
“EON is a self-learning AI,” Celia explains. "We'll evolve as we fight. If it lasts too long, we'll be at a disadvantage!"
"So let's finish this quickly!" Alpha swung his fist, trying to break through EON's defenses.
___________________


Combining tactics and wisdom
Using the power of Ishroth's wisdom, Celia discovered a hidden vulnerability in EON's algorithm. It was a misadjustment of the energy supply equipment installed to control the entire city.

"Thank you, Ishroth." Alpha bowed deeply. "I will definitely protect the universe with this power."
"Go then." Ishroth turned his back and disappeared into the depths of the labyrinth once again. "We will carve out your future."

new resolve

They set out once again, determined to take on a new battle.

Iris has developed a new dimensional energy weapon and plans to control the entire universe. In order to stop her actions, Alpha and his friends head to Iris's base, "Central Cradle." But this battle was more than just a strategy; it was also a personal showdown for Ninny.

"Thank you, Cipher, Ishroth." Alpha bowed deeply. “We will definitely win.”

"The whole city is like one giant computer," Celia muttered as she scanned the data. "I've never seen a network of this size."
"Then hit that core," Alpha said calmly. "If we stop EON, Lurenz will collapse."

Collapse of Lurenz
Due to EON's cessation, the entire Metacore City lost control, and dimensional energy began to run wild. Alpha and his friends destroy the city while carving a way to escape.

"Yoshiro, please watch over me," Alpha said quietly. "We've taken another step forward."
With the complete collapse of the city and the disappearance of Lurenz's base, the entire foundation of ZAMLT is shaken. As a result, ZAMLT will be on the path to destruction.
The destruction of Lurenz was a major victory in the battle against ZAMLT. However, the threat of Zebra and EVILS still remained.
"This isn't the end," Alpha said quietly. "Next is Zebra Corporation. We will defeat them and end this battle."
With new determination in their hearts, the group moves forward to further battles.
Chapter 33: Final Situation - Alpha VS Zebra & EVILS Alliance
After destroying Lurenz Company, Alpha and his friends set Zebra Company, ZAMLT's last stronghold, as their next target. However, Zebra Corporation boasted the strongest military power and control power among ZAMLT, and had an elite unit called the "Dimensional Domination Alliance" led by leader Arthur Grimm.
Furthermore, Zebra Corporation has formed an alliance with EVILS, which seeks to control the dimensional energy of the universe itself, and the most difficult battle for Alpha and his friends is at hand.

Zebra's base "Omega Spiral"

"Don't push yourself too hard," Alpha said, looking at her. "We're a team. Don't keep it to yourself."

Infiltrating the Central Cradle
Alpha and his friends begin infiltrating Central Cradle. A defense system using dimensional energy and the elite troops of Aloe Oil Company were waiting for them, but the group was able to break through the enemies one after another thanks to the power bestowed by Ishros.
"This is the power of Ishroth's wisdom..." Celia said while dodging the enemy's attacks. "I can understand the defense system's algorithm intuitively."
``We will exploit that gap!'' Alpha released the energy of the partner conjugate and opened the way. “Hurry up!”
They proceeded to the center of the base and finally reached the control room where Iris was waiting.
___________________


Reunion with Iris
Iris stood in the center of the control room, wearing a new dimensional energy suit and smiling coldly.
``You've come this far,'' Iris said sharply. "Alpha Cain and his friends. Especially you—Ninny."
"Iris...!" Ninny readied her sword. “Today, I will let you avenge Yoshiro!”
"An enemy? That's not true," Iris said with a sneer. "Yoshiro died because of your own helplessness. If you hadn't interfered with my plans, he might still be alive."
"Shut up!" Ninny said angrily. "I'll never let you open that mouth again!"
"Okay." Iris readied her twin swords. "I was planning on ending you guys with this too."
___________________


Ninny vs Iris
Ninny brandished her sword and charged towards Iris. Meanwhile, Iris uses dimensional energy to distort space and evade her attacks while launching a counterattack.
"You can't beat me with brute force," Iris said with a sneer. "My suit manipulates dimensional distortion itself. All of your attacks will be nullified."

``Then try it!'' Ninny released the power of companion conjugate and stabilized the space around her, canceling out Iris's distortion.
"I see...it seems like it'll do a bit." Iris swings her twin swords down and unleashes a blow imbued with dimensional energy.
The attack sends Ninny flying and slams her into the wall.
"Ninny!" Alpha yells.
"It's okay... I can still do it!" Ninny stood up despite being injured and readied her sword again. "I will never lose until I defeat you!"
___________________


decisive blow
Ninny regained her composure and used the power of Ishroth's wisdom to analyze Iris' attack patterns. She saw that there was a slight gap in Iris's supply of dimensional energy, and took advantage of that timing to launch a counterattack.
"Now...!"
Ninny swung her sword down with all her might, hitting Iris directly at the core of her suit. At that moment, the suit is damaged and Iris stops moving.
"I never expected...in a place like this...!" Iris muttered.
``That's it!'' Ninny delivered another blow, knocking Iris out completely.
When Iris fell, the entire Central Cradle began to collapse. Alpha and his friends quickly escape from the control room and barely manage to escape from the base.
"Is this... the end?" Ninny muttered, staring at the sword.
"Iris can't stand up anymore," Alpha answered. "You win, Ninny."
"Yoshiro...did you hear that? I...I took your revenge," Ninny murmured quietly, tears streaming down her face.
___________________


The fierce alpha group
By defeating Iris, ZAMLT's power has further weakened. However, there were still threats from Zebra, Lurenz, and even EVILS.

"We won't stop," Ninny said, nodding vigorously. “I will fight to the end for both Yoshiro and Linda.”
They set out on a journey again, aiming for the complete destruction of ZAMLT and EVILS.

Zebra Corporation's home base, ``Omega Spiral,'' is a gigantic dimensional ring floating in the center of the universe. This ring was composed of infinitely circulating energy and had a defense system that automatically eliminated intruders. Furthermore, there was information that Omega Ulysses, the leader of EVILS, was using the energy of this ring to strengthen his own power.
"This is their last stronghold..." Alpha muttered, staring at the ring reflected in the hologram. "There's no doubt about it. If we destroy this place, ZAMLT and EVILS will end."
"But it's going to be a tougher battle than ever before," Celia said grimly. "Since Omega Ulysses is involved, you need to be prepared to make the dimension itself your enemy."

"And we will save the universe," Alpha said with determination. "I'll finish it here."

Chapter 31: Goddess Power and Complete Victory - Destruction of Aloe Oil

___________________


Aloe Oil Company's revival base "Reverse Tower"
The base where Aloe Oil Company was reorganized was a huge facility called "Reverse Tower". This tower, centered on dimensional energy and demonstrating overwhelming power in both attack and defense, was a further enhancement of Iris' previous research results.
"This is their last stronghold," Celia said, pointing to the analysis data from the Reverse Tower. "If this facility becomes operational, it will absorb the dimensional energy of the entire universe and put everything under their control."
"I won't let that happen." Alpha clenched his fists. “This is where Aloe Oil Company will be completely wiped out.”
"But we're not just a company," Ninny said grimly. "The Reverse Tower is like a dimension itself. If we attack it squarely, we will be swallowed up."
"That's why we borrow the power of the goddesses," Alpha replied in a strong tone. "We will use the power Cipher and Ishroth have given us to end this battle."

Confronting Arthur Grimm

"It's your turn to finish!" Alpha yells. "I'll stop the chaos you've caused right here!"
