Alpha's all-out war
The Alphas used all their strength to confront Arthur. Ninny uses her sword to break down the defense, Celia stabilizes the dimensional distortion, and Alpha aims for a decisive blow using companion conjugate.
"We'll end this here!" Alpha swung his fist, severely damaging Arthur's suit.
"Idiot...!" Arthur muttered as he fell to his knees. “I’m like this…!”
"This is our power!" Alpha yells, delivering the final blow. Arthur's body was enveloped in light and disintegrated.
___________________


Awakening of Omega Ulysses
However, the battle was not over yet. After Arthur's death, the ring's energy began to go out of control, and Omega Ulysses appeared from its center. His body became one with the ring's energy itself, evolving into a dimensional god-like being.
"I've shown you your power," Omega says in a deep voice. "But I don't think you can beat me."
His blow shakes the entire space, and the dimension itself begins to collapse.

"I am the one who controls the battle itself." Ishroth looks at the group with sharp eyes. "I have seen that you have shown the determination to deserve this power. Use my power once more."
Cipher gave the group the technology to stabilize dimensional energy, and Ishroth gave them tactics and attack power. It was the key needed to directly destroy Aloe Oil's Reverse Tower.
"Thank you, Cipher, Ishroth." Alpha bowed deeply. "I will definitely lead this battle to victory."

All-out attack on Reverse Tower
Alpha and his friends, having gained the power of the goddesses, launched an all-out attack on the Reverse Tower. Aloe Oil's strongest weapons and elite troops were stationed around the tower, but by making full use of Ishroth's wisdom and attack power, he was able to break through their defenses one after another.
"I've disabled the enemy's defense system!" Celia yells. "Now we can rush inside the tower!"
"Alright, let's all rush in!" Alpha gave the command, and the group proceeded to the center of the tower.
Inside the tower, dimensional energy was swirling everywhere, and if you made a mistake you risked being swallowed up by space itself. However, Cypher's healing power stabilized the distortion in space and helped the group proceed.
"We couldn't have gotten this far without Cipher's help," Ninny said.
"Still, don't let your guard down," Alpha responded. "This is their home base. We don't know what awaits us."
___________________


Final Battle - Reverse Tower Core
When the group reached the deepest part of the tower, they found a huge energy core installed there. This core was a center built by Aloe Oil to manipulate dimensional energy, and was the key to a plan to absorb and control the energy of the entire universe.
"This is their heart...!" Alpha clenched his fist.
"But it won't be easy to destroy it," Celia said calmly. "A defense system is in operation to protect the core. It probably also has a self-repair function."

"That's all...!" Ninny said, almost falling over.
"Don't give up!" Alpha stood up and looked around at his friends. "We have the power of the goddesses!"
Alpha and his friends combined the power of Cypher and Ishloth and challenged Omega-Ulysses to a final all-out war.
"This is the end!" Alpha releases his partner conjugate and charges into Omega's center.
"I never thought you'd come this far...but the dimensions are infinite...!" Omega yells.
"Even if it's infinite, we won't give up!" Ninny and Celia join forces to deliver a decisive blow to Omega.
At that moment, Omega-Ulysses' body shattered and the entire ring was enveloped in light.

victory and rebirth
The Zebra Corporation and EVILS alliance was completely destroyed, and peace returned to the universe. The group stands up quietly and looks to the future while thinking about the sacrifices of their friends.
"I guess it's over now," Ninny said through tears.
"Well, this is the beginning," Alpha smiled. "We move on to create a new universe."

"However, it's a big risk." Celia continued with a grim expression. "If the AI is discovered before it reaches its core, the entire city will go into defense mode and there will be no escape."
"I'm not running away," Ninny said, clutching her sword. "I'm going with the determination to end everything here."
___________________


guidance of the goddesses
As they prepared for battle, Alpha and the others contacted Cipher and Ishroth again. The two goddesses recognized that this battle would determine the future of the entire universe, and offered further assistance to the group.
``Lurenz is an entity that manipulates knowledge and technology,'' Cipher says quietly. “To break their control, you must become more than yourselves in wisdom and power.”
"I lend you my power once more," said Ishroth, brandishing his twin swords. “Now that you have shown your determination to fight for this universe, I will do my best.”

His goal was to take control of the dimension itself, establish a new order, and achieve complete domination. In order to accomplish this, he led the ZAMLT companies and worked hand in hand with EVILS to advance the plan.
"I think it's time for me to move," Elliot said calmly. "Alpha Kain, your resistance is admirable, but it must end here."
___________________


A disturbing shadow on peace
A few days after the destruction of Zebra Corporation, Alpha and his friends enjoy temporary peace, but they sense a new threat.
"Something isn't right," Celia said as she analyzed the data. "The flow of dimensional energy is unnaturally distorted."
"Even though we defeated Zebra Corporation and EVILS, the dimension is still not stable..." Ninny said with a grim expression. "It's like someone was deliberately distorting it."
"Of course," Alpha answered quietly. "This is Elliott Strass, the last leader of ZAMLT. He made the next move."
"Elliot Strass..." Ninny repeated the name. "Just hearing that name gives me chills."
"This battle won't end unless we defeat him," Alpha said with determination. "I'll end it all here."
___________________


Elliot's attack
While Alpha and the others were planning their next move, the entire space suddenly trembled and a powerful wave of energy shot through space.
"What...is this power?" Alpha exclaims with a shocked expression.
"The dimension itself is shaking...!" Celia warns. "This isn't just an energy wave. Someone is interfering with the center of the dimension!"
At that moment, a huge rift appeared in space, and a person clad in black light appeared from it. That person was Elliott Strass.
"It's nice to finally meet you, Alpha Cain," Elliot spoke quietly. "Honestly, I didn't expect you to come this far."
"Elliot Strass...!" Alpha clenched his fist. "You're the culprit behind everything!"

"Thank you, Cipher, Ishroth." Alpha bowed deeply. “We will definitely win.”
___________________


Infiltrating Metacore City
Using Cypher's healing power to stabilize the flow of dimensional energy, the group used Ishroth's tactical knowledge to begin infiltrating Metacore City.
The entire city is being monitored by the AI ​​"EON", and a momentary mistake could have fatal consequences. However, thanks to Celia's advanced hacking techniques and covert operations that suppressed the distortion with the power of Cypher, the group approached the central part of the city.
"The whole city is like one giant computer," Celia muttered as she scanned the data. "I've never seen a network of this size."
"Then hit that core," Alpha said calmly. "If we stop EON, Lurenz will collapse."
___________________


Confrontation with AI “EON”
When the group arrived at the center of Metacore City, what appeared in front of them was something like a gigantic mass of light. That was the AI ​​"EON" that controlled the entire city.
"Confirm the intruder." EON's cold voice echoed. "Those who threaten the survival of Lurenz will be eliminated."
"You are the one who will be eliminated!" Alpha released the power of the companion conjugate and charged towards EON.
However, EON used the energy of the entire city to strengthen its defenses, and then attacked the group using countless weapons created from dimensional energy.
"This isn't just an AI!" Ninny shouts as she cuts down the enemy with her sword. “It feels like it’s alive!”
“EON is a self-learning AI,” Celia explains. "We'll evolve as we fight. If it lasts too long, we'll be at a disadvantage!"
"So let's finish this quickly!" Alpha swung his fist, trying to break through EON's defenses.
___________________


Combining tactics and wisdom
Using the power of Ishroth's wisdom, Celia discovered a hidden vulnerability in EON's algorithm. It was a misadjustment of the energy supply equipment installed to control the entire city.

"Thank you, Cipher, Ishroth." Alpha bowed deeply. “We will definitely win.”

``Then try it!'' Ninny released the power of companion conjugate and stabilized the space around her, canceling out Iris's distortion.
"I see...it seems like it'll do a bit." Iris swings her twin swords down and unleashes a blow imbued with dimensional energy.
The attack sends Ninny flying and slams her into the wall.
"Ninny!" Alpha yells.
"It's okay... I can still do it!" Ninny stood up despite being injured and readied her sword again. "I will never lose until I defeat you!"
___________________


decisive blow
Ninny regained her composure and used the power of Ishroth's wisdom to analyze Iris' attack patterns. She saw that there was a slight gap in Iris's supply of dimensional energy, and took advantage of that timing to launch a counterattack.
"Now...!"
Ninny swung her sword down with all her might, hitting Iris directly at the core of her suit. At that moment, the suit is damaged and Iris stops moving.
"I never expected...in a place like this...!" Iris muttered.
``That's it!'' Ninny delivered another blow, knocking Iris out completely.
When Iris fell, the entire Central Cradle began to collapse. Alpha and his friends quickly escape from the control room and barely manage to escape from the base.
"Is this... the end?" Ninny muttered, staring at the sword.
"Iris can't stand up anymore," Alpha answered. "You win, Ninny."
"Yoshiro...did you hear that? I...I took your revenge," Ninny murmured quietly, tears streaming down her face.
___________________


The fierce alpha group
By defeating Iris, ZAMLT's power has further weakened. However, there were still threats from Zebra, Lurenz, and even EVILS.
"This is the end of a battle," Alpha said, looking over his friends. "However, the battle to save the universe still continues."
"We won't stop," Ninny said, nodding vigorously. “I will fight to the end for both Yoshiro and Linda.”
They set out on a journey again, aiming for the complete destruction of ZAMLT and EVILS.

"You're right," Elliot sneered. "My mission is to unify ZAMLT and take control of all dimensions. And since you are standing in the way of that, I need to eliminate you here."
___________________


Elliot's overwhelming power
Without putting up a fight, Elliot manipulated the dimension itself with a single movement of his finger, trapping Alpha and the others in an alternate dimension. That space was like an endless labyrinth where time and space continued to distort.
"I want you all to understand how absolute my power is," Elliot's voice echoed throughout the space. "See how pointless it is to disobey me."
"Damn...what the heck is this place!" Ninny yells as she raises her sword. “Everything looks distorted!”
"He controls the dimension itself..." Celia calmly analyzes. "Our normal attacks won't work in this space."
"Then we have no choice but to use the power of Cypher and Ishroth!" Alpha shouted, activating the companion conjugate.
___________________


Help of the goddesses
Cypher and Ishroth, sensing Alpha's crisis, appear in another dimension and support them.
"Elliot Strass' power is one that warps dimensions themselves," Cipher said. "To defeat him, we need to bring out your full strength."
"Use my sword," Ishroth said to Alpha. "This sword contains the power to cut through dimensions and destroy his control."
"Thank you." Alpha gripped his sword. "I will defeat him with this power."
___________________


final battle
The battle with Elliot became a fierce one that involved the entire universe. His ability to control dimensions causes the space to constantly change, making it difficult for the group to find the right timing to attack.
"I have to read his movements...!" Celia yells as she analyzes the data. “There is a certain rhythm to the distortion of space!”
"Tell me that!" cried Alpha, raising his sword. “Take advantage of that gap!”

"If we overload the energy supply system, we can shut down EON!" Celia yells.
"Okay, aim for that!" Alpha commanded his friends and launched an attack with all their might towards the energy supply device.
Ninny cuts through the defensive weapon with her sword, and Alpha destroys the device with the power of companion conjugate. Eventually, EON's defense systems collapsed, rendering the AI ​​itself powerless.
___________________


Collapse of Lurenz
Due to EON's cessation, the entire Metacore City lost control, and dimensional energy began to run wild. Alpha and his friends destroy the city while carving a way to escape.
"This is the end...!" Ninny muttered, staring at the sword. "The Lurenz company can no longer stand up."
"Yoshiro, please watch over me," Alpha said quietly. "We've taken another step forward."
With the complete collapse of the city and the disappearance of Lurenz's base, the entire foundation of ZAMLT is shaken. As a result, ZAMLT will be on the path to destruction.
The destruction of Lurenz was a major victory in the battle against ZAMLT. However, the threat of Zebra and EVILS still remained.
"This isn't the end," Alpha said quietly. "Next is Zebra Corporation. We will defeat them and end this battle."
With new determination in their hearts, the group moves forward to further battles.
Chapter 33: Final Situation - Alpha VS Zebra & EVILS Alliance
After destroying Lurenz Company, Alpha and his friends set Zebra Company, ZAMLT's last stronghold, as their next target. However, Zebra Corporation boasted the strongest military power and control power among ZAMLT, and had an elite unit called the "Dimensional Domination Alliance" led by leader Arthur Grimm.
Furthermore, Zebra Corporation has formed an alliance with EVILS, which seeks to control the dimensional energy of the universe itself, and the most difficult battle for Alpha and his friends is at hand.

If things continued as they were, there was a danger that Aloe Oil would once again threaten the universe. With the help of the goddess Cipher and Ishros, the group plans to completely destroy Aloe Oil Company. This will be the final attack that will involve the entire universe.
___________________


Aloe Oil Company's revival base "Reverse Tower"
The base where Aloe Oil Company was reorganized was a huge facility called "Reverse Tower". This tower, centered on dimensional energy and demonstrating overwhelming power in both attack and defense, was a further enhancement of Iris' previous research results.
"This is their last stronghold," Celia said, pointing to the analysis data from the Reverse Tower. "If this facility becomes operational, it will absorb the dimensional energy of the entire universe and put everything under their control."
"I won't let that happen." Alpha clenched his fists. “This is where Aloe Oil Company will be completely wiped out.”
"But we're not just a company," Ninny said grimly. "The Reverse Tower is like a dimension itself. If we attack it squarely, we will be swallowed up."
"That's why we borrow the power of the goddesses," Alpha replied in a strong tone. "We will use the power Cipher and Ishroth have given us to end this battle."

Reunion with the goddesses
Before heading to the Reverse Tower, the group headed to the former ruins in order to contact Cipher and Ishroth again. The two goddesses respond to the Alphas' call and appear to bestow their respective powers on them.
"I see you guys are determined to move forward," Cypher said with a quiet smile. "How you use your healing power on the battlefield is up to you."

Zebra Corporation's home base, ``Omega Spiral,'' is a gigantic dimensional ring floating in the center of the universe. This ring was composed of infinitely circulating energy and had a defense system that automatically eliminated intruders. Furthermore, there was information that Omega Ulysses, the leader of EVILS, was using the energy of this ring to strengthen his own power.
"This is their last stronghold..." Alpha muttered, staring at the ring reflected in the hologram. "There's no doubt about it. If we destroy this place, ZAMLT and EVILS will end."
"But it's going to be a tougher battle than ever before," Celia said grimly. "Since Omega Ulysses is involved, you need to be prepared to make the dimension itself your enemy."
``If you're determined, you're already ready.'' Ninny gripped her sword. "I will not stop until I avenge Yoshiro."
"And we will save the universe," Alpha said with determination. "I'll finish it here."

Cypher and Ishroth's final support
Before sortieing, Alpha and the others visited Cypher and Ishroth again. The two goddesses tell them that this battle will decide the fate of the universe, and bestow upon them the greatest power.
"Alpha, Ninny, Celia," Cypher says in a calm voice. "I have seen your determination and will. This is the final power I will bestow upon you."
"I also entrust everything to you," Ishroth said, holding out his twin swords. "This sword contains all of my power and wisdom. Use it to cut through your enemies."
"Thank you..." Alpha bowed her head. “With your help, we will definitely win.”

The beginning of the final battle
Alpha and his friends who entered the Omega Spiral were attacked by Zebra Corporation's strongest defense force, the Dimensional Domination Alliance. Countless soldiers armed with dimensional energy were waiting, blocking Alpha's progress.
“Is this Zebra Inc. serious?” Ninny yells, brandishing her sword. “There are too many!”

"I am the one who controls the battle itself." Ishroth looks at the group with sharp eyes. "I have seen that you have shown the determination to deserve this power. Use my power once more."
Cipher gave the group the technology to stabilize dimensional energy, and Ishroth gave them tactics and attack power. It was the key needed to directly destroy Aloe Oil's Reverse Tower.
"Thank you, Cipher, Ishroth." Alpha bowed deeply. "I will definitely lead this battle to victory."

Alpha and his friends, having gained the power of the goddesses, launched an all-out attack on the Reverse Tower. "I've disabled the enemy's defense system!" Celia yells. "Now we can rush inside the tower!"
"Alright, let's all rush in!" Alpha gave the command, and the group proceeded to the center of the tower.
Inside the tower, dimensional energy was swirling everywhere, and if you made a mistake you risked being swallowed up by space itself. However, Cypher's healing power stabilized the distortion in space and helped the group proceed.
"We couldn't have gotten this far without Cipher's help," Ninny said.
"Still, don't let your guard down," Alpha responded. "This is their home base. We don't know what awaits us."

"But it won't be easy to destroy it," Celia said calmly. "A defense system is in operation to protect the core. It probably also has a self-repair function."

Chapter 32: Prelude to Collapse - Complete Destruction of Lurenz Company
After destroying Aloe Oil Company, Alpha and his friends chose Lurenz Company as their next target in order to subdue the other forces of ZAMLT. Defeating this company would be a blow that would shake the foundations of ZAMLT.

"That's all...!" Ninny said, almost falling over.
"Don't give up!" Alpha stood up and looked around at his friends. "We have the power of the goddesses!"
Alpha and his friends combined the power of Cypher and Ishloth and challenged Omega-Ulysses to a final all-out war.
"This is the end!" Alpha releases his partner conjugate and charges into Omega's center.
"I never thought you'd come this far...but the dimensions are infinite...!" Omega yells.
"Even if it's infinite, we won't give up!" Ninny and Celia join forces to deliver a decisive blow to Omega.
At that moment, Omega-Ulysses' body shattered and the entire ring was enveloped in light.

victory and rebirth
The Zebra Corporation and EVILS alliance was completely destroyed, and peace returned to the universe. The group stands up quietly and looks to the future while thinking about the sacrifices of their friends.
"I guess it's over now," Ninny said through tears.
"Well, this is the beginning," Alpha smiled. "We move on to create a new universe."

Alpha and the others were defeating the Zebra Corporation and EVILS alliance and were restoring peace to the universe. However, their battle was not over. "Elliot Strass", the leader of ZAMLT and the true mastermind who controlled the entire universe from the shadows, appears before them with his greatest power.
This battle is different in scale and severity than any previous battle, and will be the last and greatest test for Alpha and his friends.
___________________


The existence of Elliott Strass
Elliott Strass was the leader who unified ZAMLT, and was known as the ``Dimension Ruler'' who pursued knowledge and power to the extreme. His intelligence exceeds that of humans, and he has the ability to calculate the future, and has used that power to manipulate everything in the universe.

"That's all...!" Ninny said, almost falling over.
"Don't give up!" Alpha stood up and looked around at his friends. "We have the power of the goddesses!"
Alpha and his friends combined the power of Cypher and Ishloth and challenged Omega-Ulysses to a final all-out war.
"This is the end!" Alpha releases his partner conjugate and charges into Omega's center.
"I never thought you'd come this far...but the dimensions are infinite...!" Omega yells.
"Even if it's infinite, we won't give up!" Ninny and Celia join forces to deliver a decisive blow to Omega.
At that moment, Omega-Ulysses' body shattered and the entire ring was enveloped in light.
___________________


victory and rebirth
The Zebra Corporation and EVILS alliance was completely destroyed, and peace returned to the universe. The group stands up quietly and looks to the future while thinking about the sacrifices of their friends.
"I guess it's over now," Ninny said through tears.
"Well, this is the beginning," Alpha smiled. "We move on to create a new universe."
Chapter 34: The Arrival of the Nemesis--The Attack of ZAMLT Leader Elliott Strass
Alpha and the others were defeating the Zebra Corporation and EVILS alliance and were restoring peace to the universe. However, their battle was not over. "Elliot Strass", the leader of ZAMLT and the true mastermind who controlled the entire universe from the shadows, appears before them with his greatest power.
This battle is different in scale and severity than any previous battle, and will be the last and greatest test for Alpha and his friends.
___________________


The existence of Elliott Strass
Elliott Strass was the leader who unified ZAMLT, and was known as the ``Dimension Ruler'' who pursued knowledge and power to the extreme. His intelligence exceeds that of humans, and he has the ability to calculate the future, and has used that power to control everything in the universe.

His goal was to take control of the dimension itself, establish a new order, and achieve complete domination. In order to accomplish this, he led the ZAMLT companies and worked hand in hand with EVILS to advance the plan.
"I think it's time for me to move," Elliot said calmly. "Alpha Kain, your resistance is admirable, but it must end here."
___________________


A disturbing shadow on peace
A few days after the destruction of Zebra Corporation, Alpha and his friends enjoy temporary peace, but they sense a new threat.
"Something isn't right," Celia said as she analyzed the data. "The flow of dimensional energy is unnaturally distorted."
"Even though we defeated Zebra Corporation and EVILS, the dimension is still not stable..." Ninny said with a grim expression. "It's like someone was deliberately distorting it."
"Of course," Alpha answered quietly. "This is Elliott Strass, the last leader of ZAMLT. He made the next move."
"Elliot Strass..." Ninny repeated the name. "Just hearing that name gives me chills."
"This battle won't end unless we defeat him," Alpha said with determination. "I'll end it all here."
___________________


Elliot's attack
While Alpha and the others were planning their next move, the entire space suddenly trembled and a powerful wave of energy shot through space.
"What...is this power?" Alpha exclaims with a shocked expression.
"The dimension itself is shaking...!" Celia warns. "This isn't just an energy wave. Someone is interfering with the center of the dimension!"
At that moment, a huge rift appeared in space, and a person clad in black light appeared from it. That person was Elliott Strass.
"It's nice to finally meet you, Alpha Cain," Elliot spoke quietly. "Honestly, I didn't expect you to come this far."
"Elliot Strass...!" Alpha clenched his fist. "You're the culprit behind everything!"

His goal was to take control of the dimension itself, establish a new order, and achieve complete domination. In order to accomplish this, he led the ZAMLT companies and worked hand in hand with EVILS to advance the plan.
"I think it's time for me to move," Elliot said calmly. "Alpha Kain, your resistance is admirable, but it must end here."
___________________


A disturbing shadow on peace
A few days after the destruction of Zebra Corporation, Alpha and his friends enjoy temporary peace, but they sense a new threat.
"Something isn't right," Celia said as she analyzed the data. "The flow of dimensional energy is unnaturally distorted."
"Even though we defeated Zebra Corporation and EVILS, the dimension is still not stable..." Ninny said with a grim expression. "It's like someone was intentionally distorting it."
"Of course," Alpha answered quietly. "This is Elliott Strass, the last leader of ZAMLT. He made the next move."
"Elliot Strass..." Ninny repeated the name. "Just hearing that name gives me chills."
"This battle won't end unless we defeat him," Alpha said with determination. "I'll end it all here."
___________________


Elliot's attack
While Alpha and the others were planning their next move, the entire space suddenly trembled and a powerful wave of energy shot through space.
"What...is this power?" Alpha exclaims with a shocked expression.
"The dimension itself is shaking...!" Celia warns. "This isn't just an energy wave. Someone is interfering with the center of the dimension!"
At that moment, a huge rift appeared in space, and a person clad in black light appeared from it. That person was Elliott Strass.
"It's nice to finally meet you, Alpha Cain," Elliot spoke quietly. "Honestly, I didn't expect you to come this far."
"Elliot Strass...!" Alpha clenched his fist. "You're the culprit behind everything!"

"You're right," Elliot sneered. "My mission is to unify ZAMLT and take control of all dimensions. And since you are standing in the way of that, I need to eliminate you here."
___________________


Elliot's overwhelming power
Without putting up a fight, Elliot manipulated the dimension itself with a single movement of his finger, trapping Alpha and the others in an alternate dimension. That space was like an endless labyrinth where time and space continued to distort.
"I want you all to understand how absolute my power is," Elliot's voice echoed throughout the space. "See how pointless it is to disobey me."
"Damn...what the heck is this place!" Ninny yells as she raises her sword. “Everything looks distorted!”
"He controls the dimension itself..." Celia calmly analyzes. "Our normal attacks won't work in this space."
"Then we have no choice but to use the power of Cypher and Ishroth!" Alpha shouted, activating the companion conjugate.
___________________


Help of the goddesses
Cypher and Ishroth, sensing Alpha's crisis, appear in another dimension and support them.
"Elliot Strass' power is one that warps dimensions themselves," Cipher said. "To defeat him, we need to bring out your full strength."
"Use my sword," Ishroth said to Alpha. "This sword contains the power to cut through dimensions and destroy his control."
"Thank you." Alpha gripped his sword. "I will defeat him with this power."
___________________


final battle
The battle with Elliot became a fierce one that involved the entire universe. His ability to control dimensions causes the space to constantly change, making it difficult for the group to find the right timing to attack.
"I have to read his movements...!" Celia yells as she analyzes the data. “There is a certain rhythm to the distortion of space!”
"Tell me that!" cried Alpha, raising his sword. “Take advantage of that gap!”

His goal was to take control of the dimension itself, establish a new order, and achieve complete domination. In order to accomplish this, he led the ZAMLT companies and worked hand in hand with EVILS to advance the plan.
"I think it's time for me to move," Elliot said calmly. "Alpha Kain, your resistance is admirable, but it must end here."

final battle

"I have to read his movements...!" Celia yells as she analyzes the data. “There is a certain rhythm to the distortion of space!”
"Tell me that!" cried Alpha, raising his sword. “Take advantage of that gap!”

Based on Celia's analysis results, Alpha and the others strengthen their cooperation and block Elliot's movements. Finally, Alpha unleashes a blow that combines the power of Cipher and Ishroth, dealing fatal damage to Elliot.
"This is the end, Elliot!" Alpha yells, swinging his sword down.
"Idiot...if I...defeated...!" Elliot was enveloped in light and disappeared into a dimensional rift.
___________________


rebirth of the universe
With Eliot's disappearance, the dimensional distortion was resolved and peace began to return to the entire universe. The group quietly looked up at the sky, feeling the battle coming to an end.
"It's really over now," Ninny said through tears.
"Yeah." Alpha nodded. "Linda, Yoshiro...look, we won."
Chapter 35: Desolate Gigapolis - Rebirth from destruction
After the decisive battle with Elliott Strass, Alpha and his friends return to "Gigapolis", which was once the center of the world, as the first step towards restoring peace. However, what awaited them there was a ruined city that had been devastated by the control of ZAMLT and the dimensional battle.
Once home to more than 4 trillion people and producing half the world's GDP, this metropolis is now reduced to rubble, and its survivors barely survive in chaos and fear. In this land where the scars of battle still remain, Alpha and his friends decide to help the people rise again.
___________________


ruined city
When the Alphas reached the sky above Gigapolis, everyone was speechless at the sight that spread out below them.
"Is this...Gigapolis?" Ninny muttered in disbelief.
"I can't believe something like this could have happened to a place that was once the center of the world." Celia frowned. “The control of ZAMLT and the runaway dimensional energy caused so much damage.”
"It's because we were too slow to stop it." Alpha clenched his fists. “But there is still more we can do.”
They landed among the collapsed buildings and decided to investigate the city, looking for survivors.

"You're right," Elliot sneered. "My mission is to unify ZAMLT and take control of all dimensions. And since you are standing in the way of that, I need to eliminate you here."

Chapter 35: Desolate Gigapolis - Rebirth from destruction

___________________


ruined city
When the Alphas reached the sky above Gigapolis, everyone was speechless at the sight that spread out below them.
"Is this...Gigapolis?" Ninny muttered in disbelief.
"I can't believe something like this could have happened to a place that was once the center of the world." Celia frowned. "The control of ZAMLT and the runaway dimensional energy caused so much damage."
"It's because we were too slow to stop it." Alpha clenched his fists. “But there is still more we can do.”
They landed among the collapsed buildings and decided to investigate the city, looking for survivors.

___________________


Meeting a survivor
Moving through the rubble, the group gradually discovered survivors living in hiding. They were struggling to survive with little food and water, and suffered deep physical and mental injuries from the war.
"Please... please help me." An old man clung to the Alphas. "We are at our limit... we have no food, no medicine, nothing."
"It's okay," Alpha kneels down and speaks to the old man. "We'll help you. You don't have to worry anymore."
“But how?” asked Ninny in a whisper. "In a situation like this, there's only so much we can do on our own."
"That's why we start here," Alpha answered quietly. "First of all, we need to save the people in front of us."
___________________


The first step towards recovery
The group focused on using Cypher's healing powers to treat the injured, and using Ishroth's wisdom to find resources among the rubble.
"There may be supplies in this basement." Celia pointed to the area she had discovered using the dimensional scanner. "We may have water and food reserves left."
"Alright, let's dig it out," Alpha called out, and everyone started moving away the rubble.
What they eventually found was a miraculously preserved tank of drinking water and dried food. This discovery was a ray of hope for the survivors.
``Thank you so much.'' Ninny smiled slightly as she saw the people thanking her through tears. "I didn't think we could be of any help."
"This is the first step," Alpha said. "There's still a lot of work to do."
___________________


Dimensional Claw
While proceeding with the reconstruction work, the group realized that the serious damage caused by the runaway dimensional energy was spreading throughout Gigapolis. In some areas, the space was unstable and at risk of suddenly collapsing if people approached.
"I can't believe the dimensional distortion is this bad..." Celia said while looking at the data. "If we leave things as they are, the entire city may disappear."

___________________


Meeting a survivor
Moving through the rubble, the group gradually discovered survivors living in hiding. They were struggling to survive with little food and water, and suffered deep physical and mental injuries from the war.

___________________


Dimensional Claw
While proceeding with the reconstruction work, the group realized that the serious damage caused by the runaway dimensional energy was spreading throughout Gigapolis. In some areas, the space was unstable and at risk of suddenly collapsing if people approached.
"I can't believe the dimensional distortion is this bad..." Celia said while looking at the data. "If we leave things as they are, the entire city may disappear."

"But how do we stop it?" asked Ninny. "We don't have the technology to repair this."
"In that case, we have no choice but to enlist the help of Cipher," Alpha said with determination. "She can stabilize this dimensional distortion."
___________________


Advent of Cypher
Alpha and his friends summoned Cipher and asked for help in repairing the dimensional distortion. She spread her healing powers throughout the city and attempted to stabilize the space.
"I believe that the day will come when peace will return to this land," Cipher said quietly. "I'll do what's in my power."
With her power, the dimensional distortion was gradually repaired and the crisis of collapse was averted.
"Thank you, Cipher." Alpha bowed. "Without you, we couldn't have saved this city."
___________________


hope for the future
As the reconstruction work of Gigapolis progresses, Alpha and his friends gradually succeed in restoring the smiles of the people.
"This isn't the end," Ninny said, clutching her sword. "We still have to clean up after the battle."
"But at least there's hope left here," Celia replied with a smile. "That's the most important thing."
"Our battle is over." Alpha quietly looked up at the sky. “From now on, I will live to protect.”
Chapter 36: The new ruler of Gigapolis - Alpha's group's challenge
Even after the battle with Elliott Strass ended and the threat of ZAMLT disappeared, the universe did not return to complete peace. In particular, "Gigapolis", which was once the center of the world and supported half of the space economy, had been devastated by runaway dimensional energy and the scars of war, and was in a state of chaos as it searched for a way to rebuild.

"But how do we stop it?" asked Ninny. "We don't have the technology to repair this."
"In that case, we have no choice but to enlist the help of Cipher," Alpha said with determination. "She can stabilize this dimensional distortion."
___________________

Chapter 36: The new ruler of Gigapolis - Alpha's group's challenge
Even after the battle with Elliott Strass ended and the threat of ZAMLT disappeared, the universe did not return to complete peace. In particular, "Gigapolis", which was once the center of the world and supported half of the space economy, had been devastated by runaway dimensional energy and the scars of war, and was in a state of chaos as it searched for a way to rebuild.

Among them, Alpha's group, who continued to fight for the universe despite refusing to become rulers of the dimension, accepted the role of leading the land as the new rulers of Gigapolis at the request of the surviving citizens. However, what awaited them was not only the difficulty of rebuilding, but also challenges beyond their expectations, such as values ​​distorted by the effects of the war and new forces acting behind the scenes.
___________________


determination as a ruler
On the same day that the survivors of Gigapolis held a public assembly, the group was formally welcomed as rulers.
“Alpha Cain, please let me ask you one thing,” an elder representing the survivors speaks from the stage. "Why are you leading Gigapolis? We have been betrayed by many powerful people in the past. How can you say otherwise?"
Alpha took a deep breath and looked out at the crowd on the stage.
"We're not here to wield power," Alpha says forcefully. "We are here to make this land a place worth living in again. Gigapolis was once the center of the universe. It was responsible for the economy, technology, and culture. And it was destroyed by war because of the rulers who were addicted to power."
"We're different," Alpha continued, clenching his fists. "We don't use force to destroy, we use force to protect. Together with you, we will rebuild this city and create a new future. That is our mission."
Applause erupted from the crowd, and the voices gradually turned into cheers.
___________________


The first step in rebuilding
Having accepted their responsibilities as rulers, the group began rebuilding Gigapolis.
``The first priority is to create an environment where the residents can live in peace,'' Celia said as she spread out the materials. "Water, food, shelter - everything is in short supply."
"And control of dimensional energy," Ninny added. "Because of that battle, some areas are still unstable. If we leave this unaddressed, another large-scale collapse could occur."

Among them, Alpha's group, who continued to fight for the universe despite refusing to become rulers of the dimension, accepted the role of leading the land as the new rulers of Gigapolis at the request of the surviving citizens. However, what awaited them was not only the difficulty of rebuilding, but also challenges beyond their expectations, such as values ​​distorted by the effects of the war and new forces acting behind the scenes.
___________________


determination as a ruler
On the same day that the survivors of Gigapolis held a public assembly, the group was formally welcomed as rulers.
“Alpha Cain, please let me ask you one thing,” an elder representing the survivors speaks from the stage. "Why are you leading Gigapolis? We have been betrayed by many powerful people in the past. How can you say otherwise?"
Alpha took a deep breath and looked out at the crowd on the stage.
"We're not here to wield power," Alpha says forcefully. "We are here to make this land a place worth living in again. Gigapolis was once the center of the universe. It was responsible for the economy, technology, and culture. And it was destroyed by war because of the rulers who were addicted to power."
"We're different," Alpha continued, clenching his fists. "We don't use force to destroy, we use force to protect. Together with you, we will rebuild this city and create a new future. That is our mission."
Applause erupted from the crowd, and the voices gradually turned into cheers.

___________________


The first step in rebuilding
Having accepted their responsibilities as rulers, the group began rebuilding Gigapolis.
``The first priority is to create an environment where the residents can live in peace,'' Celia said as she spread out the materials. "Water, food, shelter - everything is in short supply."
"And control of dimensional energy," Ninny added. "Because of that battle, some areas are still unstable. If we leave this unaddressed, another large-scale collapse could occur."

"But we have the power of the goddesses," Alpha said quietly. "Let's work on stabilizing the dimension with the cooperation of Cipher and Ishroth."
The group used Cypher's healing powers to repair the dimensional distortions and utilized Ishroth's wisdom to rebuild the energy management system. Together with the survivors, they dug out usable resources from the rubble and gradually restored the necessary infrastructure.
___________________


New Challenges: Power Struggles and Conflicts of Values
As Gigapolis embarks on the road to rebuilding, the group is faced with new problems. It was a conflict over values ​​and interests that had been divided by the war.
"Alpha, it seems some factions are dissatisfied." Celia warns. "They're demanding a fair share for recovery, but they're actually trying to monopolize resources."
"That's not all," Ninny continued grimly. "There is a possibility that former ZAMLT officials are still alive and are plotting revenge in the shadows."
"I know." Alpha nodded vigorously. "But we will protect all residents. We will not tolerate any faction or conspiracy."
While emphasizing dialogue, the group took a firm stance when necessary to resolve issues. He continued his efforts to maintain stability in the city, sometimes destroying plots set up by former ZAMLT remnants, and sometimes mediating conflicts between factions.
___________________


Looking to the future
As Gigapolis is rebuilt little by little and its inhabitants begin a new life, Alpha and his friends begin to aim to make this place a new model city for the entire universe.
"It's not enough just to put it back together," Celia said. "We should make Gigapolis a base for the peaceful use of dimensional energy."
"And we will form cooperative relationships with other planets," Ninny continued. "To prevent wars from happening again."
"Yes," Alpha said with a smile. "Gigapolis will once again become the center of the universe, but this time as a center of coexistence rather than domination."

"But we have the power of the goddesses," Alpha said quietly. "Let's work on stabilizing the dimension with the cooperation of Cipher and Ishroth."
The group used Cypher's healing powers to repair the dimensional distortions and utilized Ishroth's wisdom to rebuild the energy management system. Together with the survivors, they dug out usable resources from the rubble and gradually restored the necessary infrastructure.

"Yes," Alpha said with a smile. "Gigapolis will once again become the center of the universe, but this time as a center of coexistence rather than domination."

___________________


Meeting a survivor
Moving through the rubble, the group gradually discovered survivors living in hiding. They were struggling to survive with little food and water, and suffered deep physical and mental injuries from the war.
"Please... please help me." An old man clung to the Alphas. "We are at our limit... we have no food, no medicine, nothing."
"It's okay," Alpha kneels down and speaks to the old man. "We'll help you. You don't have to worry anymore."
“But how?” asked Ninny in a whisper. "In a situation like this, there's only so much we can do on our own."
"That's why we start here," Alpha answered quietly. "First of all, we need to save the people in front of us."
___________________


The first step towards recovery
The group focused on using Cypher's healing powers to treat the injured, and using Ishroth's wisdom to find resources among the rubble.
"There may be supplies in this basement." Celia pointed to the area she had discovered using the dimensional scanner. "We may have water and food reserves left."
"Alright, let's dig it out," Alpha called out, and everyone started moving away the rubble.
What they eventually found was a miraculously preserved tank of drinking water and dried food. This discovery was a ray of hope for the survivors.
``Thank you so much.'' Ninny smiled slightly as she saw the people thanking her through tears. "I didn't think we could be of any help."
"This is the first step," Alpha said. "There's still a lot of work to do."
___________________


Dimensional Claw
While proceeding with the reconstruction work, the group realized that the serious damage caused by the runaway dimensional energy was spreading throughout Gigapolis. In some areas, the space was unstable and at risk of suddenly collapsing if people approached.
"I can't believe the dimensional distortion is this bad..." Celia said while looking at the data. "If we leave things as they are, the entire city may disappear."

"But we have the power of the goddesses," Alpha said quietly. "Let's work on stabilizing the dimension with the cooperation of Cipher and Ishroth."
The group used Cypher's healing powers to repair the dimensional distortions and utilized Ishroth's wisdom to rebuild the energy management system. Together with the survivors, they dug out usable resources from the rubble and gradually restored the necessary infrastructure.

Their efforts bore fruit, and Gigapolis began to shine again. And that city became a symbol for the entire universe, trying to overcome the scars of battle and build a new future.
Chapter 37: Cosmic goods and visitors - Alpha and Ninny's new challenge
While governing and restoring Gigapolis, Alpha and Ninny ended up acquiring vast amounts of wealth that exceeded their expectations. Alpha was in a position to manage a fortune of 2,000 trillion dollars, and Ninny was in a position to manage a fortune of 1,300 trillion dollars, and their power began to affect not only Gigapolis but the entire universe.
Meanwhile, a visitor from an unknown star system called the "J13 system" suddenly visits Alpha and the others, bringing new suggestions and mysteries. Meeting these visitors brought them further challenges and possibilities.
___________________


Utilization of huge assets
With the end of the war and the progress of reconstruction, Alpha and Ninny began to receive support and investment from all over the universe. These funds were expected to be used not only for the restoration of Gigapolis, but also for projects aimed at building a new cosmic order.
"Alpha, this is the financial report for this period," Celia explained as she operated the giant hologram display. "Currently, we have allocated $800 trillion for the Gigapolis Recovery Fund. In addition, we have committed $300 trillion to dimensional energy technology development projects."
"We still have plenty of funds left over," Alpha said, nodding. "The next step is to improve education and medical care. We must create an environment in which people affected by war can build a future."
"In parallel, we should promote economic cooperation with other regions of space," Ninny suggested. "Our assets must benefit not only Gigapolis, but the universe as a whole."
"That's right," Alpha smiled. "However, there is a lot of work to be done. We cannot afford to make any more mistakes at this point."
___________________


Visitors from J13 series

___________________


Visitors from J13 series

"But how do we stop it?" asked Ninny. "We don't have the technology to repair this."
"In that case, we have no choice but to enlist the help of Cipher," Alpha said with determination. "She can stabilize this dimensional distortion."
___________________


Advent of Cypher
Alpha and his friends summoned Cipher and asked for help in repairing the dimensional distortion. She spread her healing powers throughout the city and attempted to stabilize the space.
"I believe that the day will come when peace will return to this land," Cipher said quietly. "I'll do what's in my power."
With her power, the dimensional distortion was gradually repaired and the crisis of collapse was averted.
"Thank you, Cipher." Alpha bowed. "Without you, we couldn't have saved this city."
___________________


hope for the future
As the reconstruction work of Gigapolis progresses, Alpha and his friends gradually succeed in restoring the smiles of the people.
"This isn't the end," Ninny said, clutching her sword. "We still have to clean up after the battle."
"But at least there's hope left here," Celia replied with a smile. "That's the most important thing."
"Our battle is over." Alpha quietly looked up at the sky. “From now on, I will live to protect.”
Chapter 36: The new ruler of Gigapolis - Alpha's group's challenge
Even after the battle with Elliott Strass ended and the threat of ZAMLT disappeared, the universe did not return to complete peace. In particular, "Gigapolis", which was once the center of the world and supported half of the space economy, had been devastated by runaway dimensional energy and the scars of war, and was in a state of chaos as it searched for a way to rebuild.

Their efforts bore fruit, and Gigapolis began to shine again. And that city became a symbol for the entire universe, trying to overcome the scars of battle and build a new future.
Chapter 37: Cosmic goods and visitors - Alpha and Ninny's new challenge
While governing and restoring Gigapolis, Alpha and Ninny ended up acquiring vast amounts of wealth that exceeded their expectations. Alpha was in a position to manage a fortune of 2,000 trillion dollars, and Ninny was in a position to manage a fortune of 1,300 trillion dollars, and their power began to affect not only Gigapolis but the entire universe.
Meanwhile, a visitor from an unknown star system called the "J13 system" suddenly visits Alpha and the others, bringing new suggestions and mysteries. Meeting these visitors brought them further challenges and possibilities.
___________________


Utilization of huge assets

"Alpha, this is the financial report for this period," Celia explained as she operated the giant hologram display. "Currently, we have allocated $800 trillion for the Gigapolis Recovery Fund. In addition, we have committed $300 trillion to dimensional energy technology development projects."

determination as a ruler
On the same day that the survivors of Gigapolis held a public assembly, the group was formally welcomed as rulers.
“Alpha Cain, please let me ask you one thing,” an elder representing the survivors speaks from the stage. "Why are you leading Gigapolis? We have been betrayed by many powerful people in the past. How can you say otherwise?"

"We're not here to wield power," Alpha says forcefully. "We are here to make this land a place worth living in again. Gigapolis was once the center of the universe. It was responsible for the economy, technology, and culture. And it was destroyed by war because of the rulers who were addicted to power."
"We're different," Alpha continued, clenching his fists. "We don't use force to destroy, we use force to protect. Together with you, we will rebuild this city and create a new future. That is our mission."

___________________


The first step in rebuilding
Having accepted their responsibilities as rulers, the group began rebuilding Gigapolis.
``The first priority is to create an environment where the residents can live in peace,'' Celia said as she spread out the materials. "Water, food, shelter - everything is in short supply."
"And control of dimensional energy," Ninny added. "Because of that battle, some areas are still unstable. If we leave this unaddressed, another large-scale collapse could occur."

While the reconstruction of Gigapolis is progressing smoothly, a visitor from an unknown star system called J13 suddenly appears. The visitors were aliens with advanced technology and profound knowledge, and they were about to bring new proposals to the entire universe.
The visitors boarded a jet-black ship that did not reflect light. The ship floated silently above Gigapolis, overwhelming the group with its presence alone.
"A visitor from the J13 series...?" Celia exclaimed in surprise. "There is no record of such a system existing."
"And yet they're here." Alpha looked up at the ship grimly. “What on earth is your purpose?”
At that moment, a visitor disembarked from the ship. Although its appearance was humanoid, its entire body was covered with a smooth metal-like substance, and its eyes emitted a pale blue light.
"Alpha Kain and the rulers of Gigapolis," the visitor began in a soft voice. "We are Kuvaris, representative of the J13 series. We are seeking dialogue with you."
___________________


unknown proposal
In the conference room of Gigapolis, Alpha and his friends had a conversation with Kvaris. Kvaris had brought an important proposal that would affect the future of the entire universe.
"Your defeat of ZAMLT and the restoration of Gigapolis were extremely important events for the entire universe," Kvaris said quietly. "However, further challenges are needed to maintain peace in the universe."
"A challenge...?" Ninny frowned. "What exactly are you talking about?"
"It's about repairing the distortions in the very fabric of the universe," Kvaris answered. "Your battles are not the cause. This is a fundamental problem in the history of the universe itself. We, the J13 series, have come here to help repair it."
"Repairing the structure of the universe...?" Celia looked surprised. "Is that possible?"
"It's possible." Kvaris nodded. “However, your cooperation is essential for this.”
___________________


Alpha's decision

___________________


Alpha's decision

"Okay," Alpha spoke quietly. "Maybe this is why we have been fighting to save the universe. We will work with you."
"Thank you," Kvaris smiled. "First of all, I would like to share a technology for stabilizing dimensional energy. Using this technology, it will be possible to repair the distortions in the entire universe little by little."
``I don't think that's all there is to it,'' said Ninny grimly. "Isn't there something dangerous going on?"
"Yes, there are risks," Kvaris answered. "In the process of repairing the distortions in the universe, new threats may arise. We need your help to prevent these threats."
___________________


The beginning of a new journey
In cooperation with Kvaris, Alpha and his friends decide to embark on a journey to repair the dimensional distortions throughout the universe. This journey will be an epic one as you explore unknown star systems, dangerous territories, and meet new allies and enemies.
"This is our next mission," Alpha said with determination. "Proceed to save the entire universe while protecting Gigapolis."
``It's time for another battle,'' Ninny said with a smile as she grabbed her sword. "But this time it's our turn to save the universe itself."

Chapter 38: Farewell and new departure - Ninny's determination and Alpha's choice
As the restoration of Gigapolis progressed and peace was returning to the entire universe, Ninny made a decision. Through her battles so far, she had a desire to use her powers not just for a single city or planet, but for the entire universe. And in order to do that, he became convinced that he needed to leave Gigapolis and embark on a new adventure.

"Okay," Alpha spoke quietly. "Maybe this is why we have been fighting to save the universe. We will work with you."
"Thank you," Kvaris smiled. "First of all, I would like to share a technology for stabilizing dimensional energy. Using this technology, it will be possible to repair the distortions in the entire universe little by little."
``I don't think that's all there is to it,'' said Ninny grimly. "Isn't there something dangerous going on?"
"Yes, there are risks," Kvaris answered. "In the process of repairing the distortions in the universe, new threats may arise. We need your help to prevent these threats."

Chapter 38: Farewell and new departure - Ninny's determination and Alpha's choice

And in order to do that, he became convinced that he needed to leave Gigapolis and embark on a new adventure.

Their efforts bore fruit, and Gigapolis began to shine again. And that city became a symbol for the entire universe, trying to overcome the scars of battle and build a new future.
Chapter 37: Cosmic goods and visitors - Alpha and Ninny's new challenge
While governing and restoring Gigapolis, Alpha and Ninny ended up acquiring vast amounts of wealth that exceeded their expectations. Alpha was in a position to manage a fortune of 2,000 trillion dollars, and Ninny was in a position to manage a fortune of 1,300 trillion dollars, and their power began to affect not only Gigapolis but the entire universe.
Meanwhile, a visitor from an unknown star system called the "J13 system" suddenly visits Alpha and the others, bringing new suggestions and mysteries. Meeting these visitors brought them further challenges and possibilities.
___________________


Utilization of huge assets
With the end of the war and the progress of reconstruction, Alpha and Ninny began to receive support and investment from all over the universe. These funds were expected to be used not only for the restoration of Gigapolis, but also for projects aimed at building a new cosmic order.
"Alpha, this is the financial report for this period," Celia explained as she operated the giant hologram display. "Currently, we have allocated $800 trillion for the Gigapolis Recovery Fund. In addition, we have committed $300 trillion to dimensional energy technology development projects."
"We still have plenty of funds left over," Alpha said, nodding. "The next step is to improve education and medical care. We must create an environment in which people affected by war can build a future."
"In parallel, we should promote economic cooperation with other regions of space," Ninny suggested. "Our assets must benefit not only Gigapolis, but the universe as a whole."
"That's right," Alpha smiled. "However, there is a lot of work to be done. We cannot afford to make any more mistakes at this point."
___________________


Visitors from J13 series

"Okay," Alpha spoke quietly. "Maybe this is why we have been fighting to save the universe. We will work with you."
"Thank you," Kvaris smiled. "First of all, I would like to share a technology for stabilizing dimensional energy. Using this technology, it will be possible to repair the distortions in the entire universe little by little."
``I don't think that's all there is to it,'' said Ninny grimly. "Isn't there something dangerous going on?"
"Yes, there are risks," Kvaris answered. "In the process of repairing the distortions in the universe, new threats may arise. We need your help to prevent these threats."

 Ninny entrusts all of her assets to Celia and says she will go to another planetary system as a space hero. Alpha accepts and decides to remain in Gigapolis with Celia.


Chapter 38: Farewell and new departure - Ninny's determination and Alpha's choice
As the restoration of Gigapolis progressed and peace was returning to the entire universe, Ninny made a decision. Through her battles so far, she had a desire to use her powers not just for a single city or planet, but for the entire universe. And in order to do that, he became convinced that he needed to leave Gigapolis and embark on a new adventure.

While the reconstruction of Gigapolis is progressing smoothly, a visitor from an unknown star system called J13 suddenly appears. The visitors were aliens with advanced technology and profound knowledge, and they were about to bring new proposals to the entire universe.
The visitors boarded a jet-black ship that did not reflect light. The ship floated silently above Gigapolis, overwhelming the group with its presence alone.
"A visitor from the J13 series...?" Celia exclaimed in surprise. "There is no record of such a system existing."
"And yet they're here." Alpha looked up at the ship grimly. “What on earth is your purpose?”
At that moment, a visitor disembarked from the ship. Although its appearance was humanoid, its entire body was covered with a smooth metal-like substance, and its eyes emitted a pale blue light.
"Alpha Kain and the rulers of Gigapolis," the visitor began in a soft voice. "We are Kuvaris, representative of the J13 series. We are seeking dialogue with you."
___________________


unknown proposal
In the conference room of Gigapolis, Alpha and his friends had a conversation with Kvaris. Kvaris had brought an important proposal that would affect the future of the entire universe.
"Your defeat of ZAMLT and the restoration of Gigapolis were extremely important events for the entire universe," Kvaris said quietly. "However, further challenges are needed to maintain peace in the universe."
"A challenge...?" Ninny frowned. "What exactly are you talking about?"
"It's about repairing the distortions in the very fabric of the universe," Kvaris answered. "Your battles are not the cause. This is a fundamental problem in the history of the universe itself. We, the J13 series, have come here to help repair it."
"Repairing the structure of the universe...?" Celia looked surprised. "Is that possible?"
"It's possible." Kvaris nodded. “However, your cooperation is essential for this.”
___________________


Alpha's decision

___________________


Ninny's confession
One day, after a meeting to discuss the governance of Gigapolis, Ninny called Alpha and Celia. There was a look of determination on his face.
"Alpha, Celia," Ninny spoke quietly. "I need to talk to you about something."
"What's wrong?" Alpha asked, noticing her condition.
"I...have decided to leave Gigapolis," Ninny said in a strong voice. "I've been fighting for this city and this star system, but now I feel like I have something to do in the wider universe."
"What are you talking about?" Celia said in a surprised voice. "Gigapolis still needs you. Reconstruction is still in progress, and without you..."
"Celia, I understand," Ninny said with a gentle smile. "That's why I entrust all of my assets to you. I want you to use 1,300 trillion dollars for the future of this city and its people."
"It's that easy..." Celia was speechless. "I have such a responsibility..."
"Celia, you can do it." Ninny put a hand on her shoulder. "Because we've fought together so far, I've come to believe in your wisdom and strength."
___________________


Alpha's consent
Hearing Ninny's decision, Alpha looked at her silently, then took a deep breath.
"Okay, Ninny," Alpha said in a deep voice. "I respect your decision."
"Alpha...thank you," Ninny replied tearfully. "You have helped me many times. I believe that I am able to embark on this journey because of you."
"But remember this," Alpha said with a serious look on his face. "No matter what happens, you are not alone. We are always on your side."
"Yes, I know." Ninny nodded with a smile. "And I won't forget you either."
___________________


time of parting
Ninny's farewell was held in the central square of Gigapolis. Residents and friends gathered to express their gratitude and words of encouragement to her.

"Okay," Alpha spoke quietly. "Maybe this is why we have been fighting to save the universe. We will work with you."
"Thank you," Kvaris smiled. "First of all, I would like to share a technology for stabilizing dimensional energy. Using this technology, it will be possible to repair the distortions in the entire universe little by little."
``I don't think that's all there is to it,'' said Ninny grimly. "Isn't there something dangerous going on?"
"Yes, there are risks," Kvaris answered. "In the process of repairing the distortions in the universe, new threats may arise. We need your help to prevent these threats."
___________________


The beginning of a new journey
In cooperation with Kvaris, Alpha and his friends decide to embark on a journey to repair the dimensional distortions throughout the universe. This journey will be an epic one as you explore unknown star systems, dangerous territories, and meet new allies and enemies.
"This is our next mission," Alpha said with determination. "Proceed to save the entire universe while protecting Gigapolis."
``It's time for another battle,'' Ninny said with a smile as she grabbed her sword. "But this time it's our turn to save the universe itself."
