Chapter 38: Farewell and new journey - Ninny's determination and Alpha's choice
As the restoration of Gigapolis progressed and peace was returning to the entire universe, Ninny made a decision. Through her battles so far, she had a desire to use her powers not just for a single city or planet, but for the entire universe. And in order to do that, he became convinced that he needed to leave Gigapolis and embark on a new adventure.

___________________


Ninny's confession
ある日、Gigapolisの統治を話し合う会議の後、ニニーはアルファとセリアを呼び出した。その顔には覚悟の色が浮かんでいた。
「アルファ、セリア。」ニニーが静かに口を開いた。 "I need to talk to you about something."
「どうした？」アルファが彼女の様子に気づいて尋ねる。
"I...have decided to leave Gigapolis," Ninny said in a strong voice. "I've been fighting for this city and this star system, but now I feel like I have something to do in the wider universe."
「何を言ってるの？」セリアが驚いた声を上げた。 「Gigapolisにはまだあなたが必要よ。復興もまだ途中だし、あなたがいなければ…」
「セリア、分かってるわ。」ニニーが優しく微笑む。 "That's why I entrust all of my assets to you. I want you to use 1,300 trillion dollars for the future of this city and its people."
"It's that easy..." Celia was speechless. "I have such a responsibility..."
"Celia, you can do it." Ninny put a hand on her shoulder. "Because we've fought together so far, I've come to believe in your wisdom and strength."
___________________


Alpha's consent
ニニーの決意を聞いたアルファは、静かに彼女を見つめた後、深く息をついた。
"Okay, Ninny," Alpha said in a deep voice. "I respect your decision."
「アルファ…ありがとう。」ニニーが涙ぐみながら答えた。 "You have helped me many times. I believe that I am able to embark on this journey because of you."
"But remember this," Alpha said with a serious look on his face. "No matter what happens, you are not alone. We are always on your side."
「ええ、分かってるわ。」ニニーが笑顔で頷いた。 「そして、私もあなたたちを忘れない。」
___________________


time of parting
Ninny's farewell was held in the central square of Gigapolis.住民たちや仲間たちが集まり、彼女に感謝と激励の言葉を送った。

"Ninny, we couldn't have come this far without you," one citizen expressed his gratitude. "Please help as many people as possible in other star systems as well."
"Of course," Ninny replied kindly. "But everyone, please protect Gigapolis. This is my spiritual home."
Alpha and Celia approached her for the last time and exchanged farewell words.
"Live your life, Ninny." Alpha held out his fist. "We're waiting for you here."
"Thank you, Alpha." Ninny met his fist with her own. "Until we meet again, stay well."
"Be careful," Celia said quietly. "And you can come back anytime."
"Yes," Ninny smiled and climbed into the spaceship. And Alpha and Celia continued to watch as the ship quietly disappeared into the sky.
___________________


A new era for Gigapolis
After Ninny's departure, Alpha and Celia used the assets she left behind to further rebuild and develop Gigapolis. A huge amount of $1.3 trillion was invested in education, healthcare, infrastructure development, and even cosmic cooperation projects, and Gigapolis began to regain its position as the center of the universe.
``I wonder if Ninny would be happy if I had him.'' Celia suddenly murmured.
"I'm sure," Alpha replied with a smile. "His soul remains here. That's why we will protect this city for him."
___________________


Ninny's new journey
Meanwhile, Ninny begins an adventure in a new planetary system. She called herself a "Space Hero" and continued to work to help people suffering from war and dimensional energy distortions.
``Okay, where is the next star?'' Ninny smiles while looking at the star map on the ship. "No matter how difficult it is, I won't give up."
Chapter 39: The road to the revival of Gigapolis - Establishment of venture capital "NEWVE" and mass immigration plan

___________________


Ninny's confession
One day, after a meeting to discuss the governance of Gigapolis, Ninny called Alpha and Celia. There was a look of determination on his face.
"Alpha, Celia," Ninny spoke quietly. "I need to talk to you about something."
"What's wrong?" Alpha asked, noticing her condition.
"I...have decided to leave Gigapolis," Ninny said in a strong voice. "I've been fighting for this city and this star system, but now I feel like I have something to do in the wider universe."
"What are you talking about?" Celia said in a surprised voice. "Gigapolis still needs you. Reconstruction is still in progress, and without you..."
"Celia, I understand," Ninny said with a gentle smile. "That's why I entrust all of my assets to you. I want you to use 1,300 trillion dollars for the future of this city and its people."
"It's that easy..." Celia was speechless. "I have such a responsibility..."
"Celia, you can do it." Ninny put a hand on her shoulder. "Because we've fought together so far, I've come to believe in your wisdom and strength."
___________________


Alpha's consent
Hearing Ninny's decision, Alpha looked at her silently, then took a deep breath.
"Okay, Ninny," Alpha said in a deep voice. "I respect your decision."
"Alpha...thank you," Ninny replied tearfully. "You have helped me many times. I believe that I am able to embark on this journey because of you."
"But remember this," Alpha said with a serious look on his face. "No matter what happens, you are not alone. We are always on your side."
"Yes, I know." Ninny nodded with a smile. "And I won't forget you either."
___________________


time of parting
Ninny's farewell was held in the central square of Gigapolis.住民たちや仲間たちが集まり、彼女に感謝と激励の言葉を送った。

After Ninny departed and Alpha and Celia were entrusted with Gigapolis, a large-scale plan to rebuild it was put forward. Of particular importance was strengthening the economic infrastructure to make cities sustainable and vibrant. As part of this effort, the two have established a new venture capital called NEWVE, which aims to attract resources and talent from across the universe, and have also announced plans for mass immigration. This plan will be a decisive move to completely revive Gigapolis, which has been devastated by war.
___________________


Establishment of NEWVE - Investing in the future
NEWVE, founded by Alpha and Celia, was a venture capital firm aimed at reviving Gigapolis as a center of future technology and industry. The organization was established to support innovation in a variety of areas, including dimensional energy technology, space infrastructure, and new energy resource development.
"To revive Gigapolis, it's not enough to just throw money at it," Alpha said at its first launch press conference. "We support entrepreneurs who are creating new industries and technologies, and together we build the future."
NEWVE allocated $1,000 trillion of Alpha's $2,000 trillion in assets as operating funds and began gathering entrepreneurs with great talent and ideas from across the universe. This funding not only brought a wave of innovation to Gigapolis, but also contributed to the development of the universe as a whole.
"We're not just sharing money, we're sharing knowledge and networks," Celia added. “Gigapolis will become the center of the future, and we are committed to providing the power to make that happen.”
___________________


Announcing immigration plans – welcoming new residents
In order to rebuild Gigapolis, it was essential not only to strengthen its economic base, but also to bring in immigrants to replace the lost population. In order to restore the population that had drastically decreased due to the war, Alpha and his friends came up with a plan to accept mass immigration from all over the universe.

"Gigapolis will once again be a city of opportunity for all," Alpha declared at the launch of its immigration plan. "We welcome people who want to start a new life in this city."
The plan was comprehensive, including the rapid construction of housing and infrastructure using dimensional energy technology, and educational and vocational training programs to help the immigrants integrate into society.
“Our goal is not just to bring people together,” Celia explained. “That is the essence of this plan: to make Gigapolis a place where everyone has equal opportunities and can build a new future.”
___________________


The arrival of immigrants and entrepreneurs
After the immigration plan was announced, many people from all over the universe began to flock to Gigapolis. People who lost their homelands due to wars or dimensional energy disasters, young people with dreams seeking new lands, and scientists and engineers interested in dimensional energy technology - people from various backgrounds have come in search of a new future.
"Alpha, report," Celia said as she operated the hologram. “To date, more than 5 million people have arrived as migrants, and the number of applications for NEWVE funding is also increasing. We have already received over 100,000 project proposals.”
"That's a good trend." Alpha nodded. "But the real impact of this is yet to come. We will support them and rebuild Gigapolis as the center of the future."
Immigrants were not only employed in companies and projects established with NEWVE funding, but also developed their skills and built new lives through educational programs.
___________________


Investing in the future – concrete results
Thanks to NEWVE's activities, new technologies and industries began to emerge one after another in Gigapolis. Clean energy technology that utilizes dimensional energy, self-sufficient urban design that utilizes space, and communication networks based on dimensional energy - these projects transformed Gigapolis into a city that was more developed than before.

"Ninny, we couldn't have come this far without you," one citizen expressed his gratitude. "Please help as many people as possible in other star systems as well."
"Of course," Ninny replied kindly. "But everyone, please protect Gigapolis. This is my spiritual home."
Alpha and Celia approached her for the last time and exchanged farewell words.
"Live your life, Ninny." Alpha held out his fist. "We're waiting for you here."
"Thank you, Alpha." Ninny met his fist with her own. "Until we meet again, stay well."
「気をつけて。」セリアが静かに言った。 "And you can come back anytime."
"Yes," Ninny smiled and climbed into the spaceship. And Alpha and Celia continued to watch as the ship quietly disappeared into the sky.
___________________


A new era for Gigapolis
After Ninny's departure, Alpha and Celia used the assets she left behind to further rebuild and develop Gigapolis. A huge amount of $1.3 trillion was invested in education, healthcare, infrastructure development, and even cosmic cooperation projects, and Gigapolis began to regain its position as the center of the universe.
``I wonder if Ninny would be happy if I had him.'' Celia suddenly murmured.
"I'm sure," Alpha replied with a smile. "His soul remains here. That's why we will protect this city for him."
___________________


Ninny's new journey
Meanwhile, Ninny begins an adventure in a new planetary system. She called herself a "Space Hero" and continued to work to help people suffering from war and dimensional energy distortions.
``Okay, where is the next star?'' Ninny smiles while looking at the star map on the ship. "No matter how difficult it is, I won't give up."
Chapter 39: The road to the revival of Gigapolis - Establishment of venture capital "NEWVE" and mass immigration plan

After Ninny departed and Alpha and Celia were entrusted with Gigapolis, a large-scale plan to rebuild it was put forward. Of particular importance was strengthening the economic infrastructure to make cities sustainable and vibrant. As part of this effort, the two have established a new venture capital called NEWVE, which aims to attract resources and talent from across the universe, and have also announced plans for mass immigration. This plan will be a decisive move to completely revive Gigapolis, which has been devastated by war.
___________________


Establishment of NEWVE - Investing in the future
NEWVE, founded by Alpha and Celia, was a venture capital firm aimed at reviving Gigapolis as a center of future technology and industry. The organization was established to support innovation in a variety of areas, including dimensional energy technology, space infrastructure, and new energy resource development.
"To revive Gigapolis, it's not enough to just throw money at it," Alpha said at its first launch press conference. "We support entrepreneurs who are creating new industries and technologies, and together we build the future."
NEWVE allocated $1,000 trillion of Alpha's $2,000 trillion in assets as operating funds and began gathering entrepreneurs with great talent and ideas from across the universe. This funding not only brought a wave of innovation to Gigapolis, but also contributed to the development of the universe as a whole.
"We're not just sharing money, we're sharing knowledge and networks," Celia added. “Gigapolis will become the center of the future, and we are committed to providing the power to make that happen.”
___________________


Announcing immigration plans – welcoming new residents
In order to rebuild Gigapolis, it was essential not only to strengthen its economic base, but also to bring in immigrants to replace the lost population. In order to restore the population that had drastically decreased due to the war, Alpha and his friends came up with a plan to accept mass immigration from all over the universe.

"Look, Alpha," Celia pointed to a hologram showing the progress of a new construction project. "This area will be able to use energy more efficiently than before the war. Once this is completed, it will become a model case for the entire universe."
"Great," Alpha smiled. "Gigapolis has come this far because of everyone's efforts."
___________________


New challenges: friction between immigrants and challenges for the future
On the other hand, there were many challenges, such as cultural friction caused by the diversity of immigrants and the clash between new technology and old values.
"Skirmishes between immigrants are increasing," Celia reported. "There is a particularly large difference in values between people who have lost their hometowns and entrepreneurs who have sought new challenges."
"We have no choice but to emphasize dialogue," Alpha replied. "Now that we have promised to make Gigapolis a new land of hope, we cannot leave anyone behind."
Alphas established a community center to promote dialogue among citizens and promoted multicultural exchange events and joint projects. Through this, a relationship of trust was gradually built.
With the success of venture capital NEWVE and the progress of immigration plans, Gigapolis was once again establishing itself as the center of the universe.
"Gigapolis is more than just a city," Alpha said to the citizens gathered in the plaza. "This place is the very hope for the future. We will do everything in our power to protect and nurture this city."
"And everyone here is part of that," Celia continued. “It is not just us who will build this city, but all of you.”
Cheers spread among the citizens, and Gigapolis took a new step toward the future.
Chapter 40: Ninny's new mission - Arrival at the ultra-poverty planet Solaris

“Gigapolis will once again be a city of opportunity for all,” Alpha declared at the launch of its immigration plan. "We welcome people who want to start a new life in this city."
The plan was comprehensive, including the rapid construction of housing and infrastructure using dimensional energy technology, and educational and vocational training programs to help the immigrants integrate into society.
“Our goal is not just to bring people together,” Celia explained. “That is the essence of this plan: to make Gigapolis a place where everyone has equal opportunities and can build a new future.”
___________________


The arrival of immigrants and entrepreneurs
After the immigration plan was announced, many people from all over the universe began to flock to Gigapolis. People who lost their homelands due to wars or dimensional energy disasters, young people with dreams seeking new lands, and scientists and engineers interested in dimensional energy technology - people from various backgrounds have come in search of a new future.

"That's a good trend." Alpha nodded. "But the real impact of this is yet to come. We will support them and rebuild Gigapolis as the center of the future."
Immigrants were not only employed in companies and projects established with NEWVE funding, but also developed their skills and built new lives through educational programs.
___________________


Investing in the future – concrete results
Thanks to NEWVE's activities, new technologies and industries began to emerge one after another in Gigapolis. Clean energy technology that utilizes dimensional energy, self-sufficient urban design that utilizes space, and communication networks based on dimensional energy - these projects transformed Gigapolis into a city that was more developed than before.

Ninny left Gigapolis and embarked on a new adventure, traveling around the universe and continuing to work to heal the disasters caused by the instability of dimensional energy and the scars caused by war. Meanwhile, she arrives at a planet called "Solaris". This planet is said to be the poorest planet in the universe, and its civilization has almost collapsed, lacking even the bare minimum resources for survival.
Ninny is determined to take on a new challenge on this planet in order to fulfill her mission.
___________________


Solaris - Planet of Despair
Solaris was once a lush planet with many life forms, but due to environmental destruction caused by war and the misuse of dimensional energy, most of it has turned into a desert. Temperatures were extremely high, and residents took shelter in underground caves and some oases.
"This is Solaris..." Ninny muttered, looking down at the planet through the ship's window. “Are people really living in a place like this?”
As soon as her ship landed, the local population gathered. Their faces were gaunt with exhaustion and hunger, and their clothes were in tatters.
"Who are you?" A middle-aged man who appeared to be the leader asked warily. "There's nothing left on this planet. There's nothing left to take away."
"I'm here to help." Ninny held out her arms, still carrying her sword. "I brought you some food and water. Would you mind letting me talk?"
"You mean to help...?" The man narrowed his eyes. "We are not naive enough to believe such a story."
"That's fine," Ninny replied firmly. "Even if you don't believe me, I won't abandon you."
The residents were shaken by these words and gradually began to lower their guard.
___________________


Local situation
Ninny was guided by the residents to the underground living quarters, where she witnessed firsthand their living conditions. In the dark, damp cave, the inhabitants survived by sharing the meager amount of water and food they had.
“Is this what life is all about?” Ninny asks, wide-eyed.

"Look, Alpha," Celia pointed to a hologram showing the progress of a new construction project. "This area will be able to use energy more efficiently than before the war. Once this is completed, it will become a model case for the entire universe."
"Great," Alpha smiled. "Gigapolis has come this far because of everyone's efforts."
___________________


New challenges: friction between immigrants and challenges for the future
On the other hand, there were many challenges, such as cultural friction caused by the diversity of immigrants and the clash between new technology and old values.
"Skirmishes between immigrants are increasing," Celia reported. "There is a particularly large difference in values between people who have lost their hometowns and entrepreneurs who have sought new challenges."
"We have no choice but to emphasize dialogue," Alpha replied. "Now that we have promised to make Gigapolis a new land of hope, we cannot leave anyone behind."
Alphas established a community center to promote dialogue among citizens and promoted multicultural exchange events and joint projects. Through this, a relationship of trust was gradually built.
With the success of venture capital NEWVE and the progress of immigration plans, Gigapolis was once again establishing itself as the center of the universe.
"Gigapolis is more than just a city," Alpha said to the citizens gathered in the plaza. "This place is the very hope for the future. We will do everything in our power to protect and nurture this city."
"And everyone here is part of that," Celia continued. “It is not just us who will build this city, but all of you.”
Cheers spread among the citizens, and Gigapolis took a new step toward the future.

Solaris was once a lush planet with many life forms, but due to environmental destruction caused by war and the misuse of dimensional energy, most of it has turned into a desert. Temperatures were extremely high, and residents took shelter in underground caves and some oases.
"This is Solaris..." Ninny muttered, looking down at the planet through the ship's window. “Are people really living in a place like this?”
As soon as her ship landed, the local population gathered. Their faces were gaunt with exhaustion and hunger, and their clothes were in tatters.
"Who are you?" A middle-aged man who appeared to be the leader asked warily. "There's nothing left on this planet. There's nothing left to take away."
"I'm here to help." Ninny held out her arms, still carrying her sword. "I brought you some food and water. Would you mind letting me talk?"
"You mean to help...?" The man narrowed his eyes. "We are not naive enough to believe such a story."
"That's fine," Ninny replied firmly. "Even if you don't believe me, I won't abandon you."
The residents were shaken by these words and gradually began to lower their guard.
___________________


Local situation
Ninny was guided by the residents to the underground living quarters, where she witnessed firsthand their living conditions. In the dark, damp cave, the inhabitants survived by sharing the meager amount of water and food they had.
“Is this what life is all about?” Ninny asks, wide-eyed.

“Yes,” the male leader replies with a bitter expression. "Our planet was once rich. But when dimensional energy was used for war, everything was lost. Now we have no choice but to live underground."
"Anyway...this is awful," Ninny said, staring at her clenched fist. "I think it's fate that brought me here. I'll think of a way to help you guys."
___________________


First aid – water and food supplies
Ninny shared the emergency water and food he had on his ship with the residents. It was a high-quality source of nutrition that they had not had access to for years.
"Is this... really for us?" one resident asked with tears in his eyes.
"Of course," Ninny smiled and nodded. "But this is temporary. Our real goal is to help you become independent and get back to living your life."
``Is that possible?'' the male leader asked with a grim look on his face. "This planet is dead. How can we expect it to become independent?"
"It's my job to think about that," Ninny replied emphatically. "Let's think about it together."
___________________


Environmental restoration plan
Ninny began investigating the current state of the planet and searching for ways to regenerate the environment. Air pollution and the depletion of water sources due to the misuse of dimensional energy turn out to be Solaris' biggest problems.
``To purify this planet's atmosphere and restore its water sources, we will need to harness dimensional energy.'' Ninny plans to work with the residents to install a purification system.
Using her assets, she ordered the latest purification technology developed at Gigapolis. Together with the residents, they set up a device in the desert and began work to purify the dimensional energy.
"Don't do it alone, let's all work together," Ninny urged residents. "You, the people who live here, can save this planet."
___________________


Awakening of the residents

“Yes,” the male leader replies with a bitter expression. "Our planet was once rich. But when dimensional energy was used for war, everything was lost. Now we have no choice but to live underground."
"Anyway...this is awful," Ninny said, staring at her clenched fist. "I think it's fate that brought me here. I'll think of a way to help you guys."
___________________

Ninny shared the emergency water and food he had on his ship with the residents. It was a high-quality source of nutrition that they had not had access to for years.
"Is this... really for us?" one resident asked with tears in his eyes.
"Of course," Ninny smiled and nodded. "But this is temporary. Our real goal is to help you become independent and get back to living your life."
``Is that possible?'' the male leader asked with a grim look on his face. "This planet is dead. How can we expect it to become independent?"
"It's my job to think about that," Ninny replied emphatically. "Let's think about it together."
___________________


Environmental restoration plan
Ninny began investigating the current state of the planet and searching for ways to regenerate the environment. Air pollution and the depletion of water sources due to the misuse of dimensional energy turn out to be Solaris' biggest problems.
``To purify this planet's atmosphere and restore its water sources, we will need to harness dimensional energy.'' Ninny plans to work with the residents to install a purification system.
Using her assets, she ordered the latest purification technology developed at Gigapolis. Together with the residents, they set up a device in the desert and began work to purify the dimensional energy.
"Don't do it alone, let's all work together," Ninny urged residents. "You, the people who live here, can save this planet."
___________________


Awakening of the residents

At first, the residents were suspicious of Ninny, but after seeing her actions, they gradually opened up and began to work with her to restore the environment.
``Ninny, how many years has it been since I had such hope?'' the male leader said with deep emotion. "We thought it was over. But since you came, everything has changed."
"Now it's time for the real thing," Ninny replied with a smile. "You are the ones who will save this planet. I'm just helping you do it."
The residents gradually banded together and worked together. As a few months passed, a small amount of greenery began to return to the withered desert area, and water sources gradually began to show signs of recovery.
___________________


light for the future
Thanks to Ninny's work, Solaris has started on the path of rebirth, albeit slightly. The inhabitants have renewed hope and are determined to build a new life on this planet.
"Ninny, without you we wouldn't even have survived," the leader expressed his gratitude. "Thank you so much."
"You're welcome," Ninny replied with a smile. "But this is the real start. I'm going on the road again, but I'll always be back."
``You are a hero of this planet,'' the residents said as they saw her off.
___________________


A new journey
Ninny had a new determination in her heart as she left Solaris. The journey to save people and planets suffering from the effects of dimensional energy is far from over.
"Now, where shall we go next?" she smiled, looking at the star map. "There are still many people who need help."
And so, Ninny's new adventure begins again.
Chapter 41: Calamity Planet Finger - The final challenge amidst the meteorites
Ninny continues to travel through space, visiting planets in need and working to save lives. However, this time she visited a planet with a hopeless situation unlike anything she had ever seen before. That planet is called "Finger."

Finger was once a planet with abundant nature and life, but due to recent generations of resource extraction and war, its environment has deteriorated to the extreme, and the existence of life is now in jeopardy. But what's even worse is that Finger's orbit takes him into a destructive meteor shower, with only an hour left.
The meteorites had already approached the planet's atmosphere, making it impossible for them to leave Finger's orbit. As it is, Finger is destined to become a piece of cosmic scum. But I can't give up. Ninny knew someone had to do something about this situation.
___________________


Finger's hopeless situation
When Ninny's ship entered Finger's atmosphere, the landscape was hellish. The sky was dyed bright red, and the atmosphere was showing signs of abnormality to the point where cracks appeared. What could be seen in the distance was a scene of countless meteorites approaching Finger.
"Is this the current state of Finger..." Ninny muttered silently as she brought the ship into a steep dive.
Ignoring the warning sounds blaring inside the ship, she heads towards the planet's control center. Waiting there are the people who hold the planet's last hope.
"We only have an hour left..." a government official from Finger spoke to Ninny in a trembling voice. "The speed of the meteorite swarm is abnormal, and none of our defense systems are effective. If the meteorite continues to impact us, all civilization will be wiped out."
"Isn't there a way to destroy the meteorite?" Ninny asks calmly.
"Yes." Another researcher manipulates the screen to display system data. "However, with our defense system, it is impossible to destroy all of the meteorites at once. Moreover, if we try to attack by concentrating energy, other meteorites will arrive in the meantime."
"Then I'll do it," Ninny said with determination. “If there is a way to do something about those meteorites, I will try.”

"Ninny, we couldn't have come this far without you," one citizen expressed his gratitude. "Please help as many people as possible in other star systems as well."
"Of course," Ninny replied kindly. "But everyone, please protect Gigapolis. This is my spiritual home."
Alpha and Celia approached her for the last time and exchanged farewell words.
"Live your life, Ninny." Alpha held out his fist. "We're waiting for you here."
"Thank you, Alpha." Ninny met his fist with her own. "Until we meet again, stay well."
"Be careful," Celia said quietly. "And you can come back anytime."
"Yes," Ninny smiled and climbed into the spaceship. And Alpha and Celia continued to watch as the ship quietly disappeared into the sky.
___________________


A new era for Gigapolis
After Ninny's departure, Alpha and Celia used the assets she left behind to further rebuild and develop Gigapolis. A huge amount of $1.3 trillion was invested in education, healthcare, infrastructure development, and even cosmic cooperation projects, and Gigapolis began to regain its position as the center of the universe.
``I wonder if Ninny would be happy if I had him.'' Celia suddenly murmured.
"I'm sure," Alpha replied with a smile. "His soul remains here. That's why we will protect this city for him."
___________________


Ninny's new journey
Meanwhile, Ninny begins an adventure in a new planetary system. She called herself a "Space Hero" and continued to work to help people suffering from war and dimensional energy distortions.
``Okay, where is the next star?'' Ninny smiles while looking at the star map on the ship. "No matter how difficult it is, I won't give up."
Chapter 39: The road to the revival of Gigapolis - Establishment of venture capital "NEWVE" and mass immigration plan

At first, the residents were suspicious of Ninny, but after seeing her actions, they gradually opened up and began to work with her to restore the environment.
``Ninny, how many years has it been since I had such hope?'' the male leader said with deep emotion. "We thought it was over. But since you came, everything has changed."
"Now it's time for the real thing," Ninny replied with a smile. "You are the ones who will save this planet. I'm just helping you do it."

Chapter 41: Calamity Planet Finger - The final challenge amidst the meteorites
Ninny continues to travel through space, visiting planets in need and working to save lives. However, this time she visited a planet with a hopeless situation unlike anything she had ever seen before. That planet is called "Finger."

After Ninny departed and Alpha and Celia were entrusted with Gigapolis, a large-scale plan to rebuild it was put forward. Of particular importance was strengthening the economic infrastructure to make cities sustainable and vibrant. As part of this effort, the two have established a new venture capital called NEWVE, which aims to attract resources and talent from across the universe, and have also announced plans for mass immigration. This plan will be a decisive move to completely revive Gigapolis, which has been devastated by war.
___________________


Establishment of NEWVE - Investing in the future
NEWVE, founded by Alpha and Celia, was a venture capital firm aimed at reviving Gigapolis as a center of future technology and industry. The organization was established to support innovation in a variety of areas, including dimensional energy technology, space infrastructure, and new energy resource development.
"To revive Gigapolis, it's not enough to just throw money at it," Alpha said at its first launch press conference. "We support entrepreneurs who are creating new industries and technologies, and together we build the future."
NEWVE allocated $1,000 trillion of Alpha's $2,000 trillion in assets as operating funds and began gathering entrepreneurs with great talent and ideas from across the universe. This funding not only brought a wave of innovation to Gigapolis, but also contributed to the development of the universe as a whole.
"We're not just sharing money, we're sharing knowledge and networks," Celia added. “Gigapolis will become the center of the future, and we are committed to providing the power to make that happen.”
___________________


Announcing immigration plans – welcoming new residents
In order to rebuild Gigapolis, it was essential not only to strengthen its economic base, but also to bring in immigrants to replace the lost population. In order to restore the population that had drastically decreased due to the war, Alpha and his friends came up with a plan to accept mass immigration from all over the universe.

Finger was once a planet with abundant nature and life, but due to recent generations of resource extraction and war, its environment has deteriorated to the extreme, and the existence of life is now in jeopardy. But what's even worse is that Finger's orbit takes him into a destructive meteor shower, with only an hour left.

Finger's hopeless situation

"We only have an hour left..." a government official from Finger spoke to Ninny in a trembling voice. "The speed of the meteorite swarm is abnormal, and none of our defense systems are effective. If the meteorite continues to impact us, all civilization will be wiped out."
"Isn't there a way to destroy the meteorite?" Ninny asks calmly.
"Yes." Another researcher manipulates the screen to display system data. "However, with our defense system, it is impossible to destroy all of the meteorites at once. Moreover, if we try to attack by concentrating energy, other meteorites will arrive in the meantime."
"Then I'll do it," Ninny said with determination. “If there is a way to do something about those meteorites, I will try.”

"Gigapolis will once again be a city of opportunity for all," Alpha declared at the launch of its immigration plan. "We welcome people who want to start a new life in this city."
The plan was comprehensive, including the rapid construction of housing and infrastructure using dimensional energy technology, and educational and vocational training programs to help the immigrants integrate into society.
“Our goal is not just to bring people together,” Celia explained. “That is the essence of this plan: to make Gigapolis a place where everyone has equal opportunities and can build a new future.”
___________________


The arrival of immigrants and entrepreneurs
After the immigration plan was announced, many people from all over the universe began to flock to Gigapolis. People who lost their homelands due to wars or dimensional energy disasters, young people with dreams seeking new lands, and scientists and engineers interested in dimensional energy technology - people from various backgrounds have come in search of a new future.
"Alpha, report," Celia said as she operated the hologram. “To date, more than 5 million people have arrived as migrants, and the number of applications for NEWVE funding is also increasing. We have already received over 100,000 project proposals.”
"That's a good trend." Alpha nodded. "But the real impact of this is yet to come. We will support them and rebuild Gigapolis as the center of the future."
Immigrants were not only employed in companies and projects established with NEWVE funding, but also developed their skills and built new lives through educational programs.
___________________


Investing in the future – concrete results
Thanks to NEWVE's activities, new technologies and industries began to emerge one after another in Gigapolis. Clean energy technology that utilizes dimensional energy, self-sufficient urban design that utilizes space, and communication networks based on dimensional energy - these projects transformed Gigapolis into a city that was more developed than before.

"Look, Alpha," Celia pointed to a hologram showing the progress of a new construction project. "This area will be able to use energy more efficiently than before the war. Once this is completed, it will become a model case for the entire universe."
"Great," Alpha smiled. "Gigapolis has come this far because of everyone's efforts."
___________________


New challenges: friction between immigrants and challenges for the future
On the other hand, there were many challenges, such as cultural friction caused by the diversity of immigrants and the clash between new technology and old values.
"Skirmishes between immigrants are increasing," Celia reported. "There is a particularly large difference in values between people who have lost their hometowns and entrepreneurs who have sought new challenges."
"We have no choice but to emphasize dialogue," Alpha replied. "Now that we have promised to make Gigapolis a new land of hope, we cannot leave anyone behind."
Alphas established a community center to promote dialogue among citizens and promoted multicultural exchange events and joint projects. Through this, a relationship of trust was gradually built.
With the success of venture capital NEWVE and the progress of immigration plans, Gigapolis was once again establishing itself as the center of the universe.
"Gigapolis is more than just a city," Alpha said to the citizens gathered in the plaza. "This place is the very hope for the future. We will do everything in our power to protect and nurture this city."
"And everyone here is part of that," Celia continued. “It is not just us who will build this city, but all of you.”
Cheers spread among the citizens, and Gigapolis took a new step toward the future.
Chapter 40: Ninny's new mission - Arrival at the ultra-poverty planet Solaris

Ninny left Gigapolis and embarked on a new adventure, traveling around the universe and continuing to work to heal the disasters caused by the instability of dimensional energy and the scars caused by war. Meanwhile, she arrives at a planet called "Solaris". This planet is said to be the poorest planet in the universe, and its civilization has almost collapsed, lacking even the bare minimum resources for survival.
Ninny is determined to take on a new challenge on this planet in order to fulfill her mission.
___________________


Solaris - Planet of Despair
Solaris was once a lush planet with many life forms, but due to environmental destruction caused by war and the misuse of dimensional energy, most of it has turned into a desert. Temperatures were extremely high, and residents took shelter in underground caves and some oases.

___________________


Awakening of the residents

``But that's suicidal!'' one of the people involved shouted in shock. "The size of the meteorite shower is so large that it covers the entire planet. Jumping into it like that would be like throwing away your life!"
"Don't tell me you're going to throw your life away," Ninny replied calmly. "I can still do it. I will protect the reason you are here and the future of Finger."
Everyone fell silent at those words. Ninny's eyes exuded the determination and experience she gained from her many past battles. If she says it, her words certainly have power.
___________________


Aiming for a breakthrough in meteorite showers
Ninny operated the Finger's defense system console and determined the best approach, taking into account the meteorite's exact location and speed. Her goal was to destroy the "Leader Meteorite," the largest of the meteorites and the one with the highest risk of collision.
"Here we go," Ninny murmured, accelerating the ship again. Her ship hurtled toward the center of the meteorite. All around me, gigantic meteorites flew by without making any sound of impact, and bands of light seemed to cut through the space.
“You’re in danger, Ninny!” a Finger staff member yells over the communicator. “It would be suicidal to just rush in like that!”
"Don't worry," Ninny replied calmly. “I will break through.”
The spaceship plunged into a group of meteorites and continued forward, avoiding collisions. In front of me is a huge meteorite that looks exactly like the Grim Reaper.
"Now...!" Ninny further strengthened the ship's control and guided it to the optimal position. At that moment, the energy inside the ship concentrated all at once, and the ship's hull emitted an intense light as it launched towards the most dangerous meteorite.
The shock wave of light hit the meteorite directly. With an explosion sound, the meteorite broke into pieces, spreading to the surrounding meteorites.
"Alright, just a little more!" Ninny gasped. At that moment, another large meteorite approached from the front. She took the helm calmly and attacked again while dodging sharply.
The explosion sound continued, and the surrounding meteorites gradually lost their momentum.
___________________


miraculous moment

At first, the residents were suspicious of Ninny, but after seeing her actions, they gradually opened up and began to work with her to restore the environment.
``Ninny, how many years has it been since I had such hope?'' the male leader said with deep emotion. "We thought it was over. But since you came, everything has changed."
"Now it's time for the real thing," Ninny replied with a smile. "You are the ones who will save this planet. I'm just helping you do it."

Chapter 41: Calamity Planet Finger - The final challenge amidst the meteorites
Ninny continues to travel through space, visiting planets in need and working to save lives. However, this time she visited a planet with a hopeless situation unlike anything she had ever seen before. That planet is called "Finger."

The moment Ninny destroyed the last meteorite, the meteorite group stopped moving and silence fell over the surrounding space. Finger's staff cheered over the communicator, and words of praise for Ninny's accomplishments were delivered one after another.
"You did it! Ninny, you did it!"
“Finger…saved!”
"I didn't do it," Ninny replied, smiling over the comm. "This was only possible because of everyone's help."
By destroying the meteorite, Finger once again survived and was spared a devastating impact. The planet's atmosphere has stabilized, and its living area is once again protected.
___________________


return and gratitude
Ninny left Finger's orbit and returned to a base stationed around the planet. Inside the base, residents gathered to welcome her.
"Ninny, if you hadn't come, we wouldn't be here right now..." the leader speaks through tears.
"That's all in the past," Ninny said with a smile. "This is the true beginning. I will leave here, but I will spare no effort in supporting you so that you can become independent here."
"Thank you, Ninny. Thank you so much." The leader held out his hand to thank her.
"It's okay, we can open up the future with your help." Ninny smiled and boarded the ship again.
The sight of her flying off into the darkness of space was a source of hope for the people of Finger, and for Ninny herself, it meant that a mission in a new star system was awaiting her.
___________________


To the next star system
Ninny leaves Finger and travels into the vast expanses of space. The next destination has not yet been decided. But she was sure in her heart. Wherever there is a need for help, I will go there and do my best.
"I wonder where next..." Ninny muttered as she looked at the star map. "I'm sure there's still something I can do."
Chapter 42: Crisis on the planet Jedi - Encounter between the "crossbow nuclear battleship" and the stalemate saucer

"Okay," Alpha spoke quietly. "Maybe this is why we have been fighting to save the universe. We will work with you."
"Thank you," Kvaris smiled. "First of all, I would like to share a technology for stabilizing dimensional energy. Using this technology, it will be possible to repair the distortions in the entire universe little by little."
``I don't think that's all there is to it,'' said Ninny grimly. "Isn't there something dangerous going on?"
"Yes, there are risks," Kvaris answered. "In the process of repairing the distortions in the universe, new threats may arise. We need your help to prevent these threats."
___________________


The beginning of a new journey
In cooperation with Kvaris, Alpha and his friends decide to embark on a journey to repair the dimensional distortions throughout the universe. This journey will be an epic one as you explore unknown star systems, dangerous territories, and meet new allies and enemies.
"This is our next mission," Alpha said with determination. "Proceed to save the entire universe while protecting Gigapolis."
``It's time for another battle,'' Ninny said with a smile as she grabbed her sword. "But this time it's our turn to save the universe itself."

 Ninny entrusts all of her assets to Celia and says she will go to another planetary system as a space hero. Alpha accepts and decides to remain in Gigapolis with Celia.


Chapter 38: Farewell and new journey - Ninny's determination and Alpha's choice
As the restoration of Gigapolis progressed and peace was returning to the entire universe, Ninny made a decision. Through her battles so far, she had a desire to use her powers not just for a single city or planet, but for the entire universe. And in order to do that, he became convinced that he needed to leave Gigapolis and embark on a new adventure.

Finger was once a planet with abundant nature and life, but due to recent generations of resource extraction and war, its environment has deteriorated to the extreme, and the existence of life is now in jeopardy. “You’re in danger, Ninny!” a Finger staff member yells over the communicator. “It would be suicidal to just rush in like that!”
"Don't worry," Ninny replied calmly. “I will break through.”
The spaceship plunged into a group of meteorites and continued forward, avoiding collisions. In front of me is a huge meteorite that looks exactly like the Grim Reaper.
"Now...!" Ninny further strengthened the ship's control and guided it to the optimal position. At that moment, the energy inside the ship concentrated all at once, and the ship's hull emitted an intense light as it launched towards the most dangerous meteorite.
The shock wave of light hit the meteorite directly. With an explosion sound, the meteorite broke into pieces, spreading to the surrounding meteorites.
"Alright, just a little more!" Ninny gasped. At that moment, another large meteorite approached from the front. She took the helm calmly and attacked again while dodging sharply.
The explosion sound continued, and the surrounding meteorites gradually lost their momentum.
___________________


miraculous moment

___________________


Ninny's confession
One day, after a meeting to discuss the governance of Gigapolis, Ninny called Alpha and Celia. There was a look of determination on his face.
"Alpha, Celia," Ninny spoke quietly. "I need to talk to you about something."
"What's wrong?" Alpha asked, noticing her condition.
"I...have decided to leave Gigapolis," Ninny said in a strong voice. "I've been fighting for this city and this star system, but now I feel like I have something to do in the wider universe."
"What are you talking about?" Celia said in a surprised voice. "Gigapolis still needs you. Reconstruction is still in progress, and without you..."
"Celia, I understand," Ninny said with a gentle smile. "That's why I entrust all of my assets to you. I want you to use 1,300 trillion dollars for the future of this city and its people."
"It's that easy..." Celia was speechless. "I have such a responsibility..."
"Celia, you can do it." Ninny put a hand on her shoulder. "Because we've fought together so far, I've come to believe in your wisdom and strength."
___________________


Alpha's consent
Hearing Ninny's decision, Alpha looked at her silently, then took a deep breath.
"Okay, Ninny," Alpha said in a deep voice. "I respect your decision."
"Alpha...thank you," Ninny replied tearfully. "You have helped me many times. I believe that I am able to embark on this journey because of you."
"But remember this," Alpha said with a serious look on his face. "No matter what happens, you are not alone. We are always on your side."
"Yes, I know." Ninny nodded with a smile. "And I won't forget you either."
___________________


time of parting
Ninny's farewell was held in the central square of Gigapolis. Residents and friends gathered to express their gratitude and words of encouragement to her.

time of parting
Ninny's farewell was held in the central square of Gigapolis. Residents and friends gathered to express their gratitude and words of encouragement to her.

The moment Ninny destroyed the last meteorite, the meteorite group stopped moving and silence fell over the surrounding space. Finger's staff cheered over the communicator, and words of praise for Ninny's accomplishments were delivered one after another.
"You did it! Ninny, you did it!"
“Finger…saved!”
"I didn't do it," Ninny replied, smiling over the comm. "This was only possible because of everyone's help."
By destroying the meteorite, Finger once again survived and was spared a devastating impact. The planet's atmosphere has stabilized, and its living area is once again protected.
___________________


return and gratitude
Ninny left Finger's orbit and returned to a base stationed around the planet. Inside the base, residents gathered to welcome her.
"Ninny, if you hadn't come, we wouldn't be here right now..." the leader speaks through tears.
"That's all in the past," Ninny said with a smile. "This is the true beginning. I will leave here, but I will spare no effort in supporting you so that you can become independent here."
"Thank you, Ninny. Thank you so much." The leader held out his hand to thank her.
"It's okay, we can open up the future with your help." Ninny smiled and boarded the ship again.
The sight of her flying off into the darkness of space was a source of hope for the people of Finger, and for Ninny herself, it meant that a mission in a new star system was awaiting her.
___________________


To the next star system
Ninny leaves Finger and travels into the vast expanses of space. The next destination has not yet been decided. But she was sure in her heart. Wherever there is a need for help, I will go there and do my best.
"I wonder where next..." Ninny muttered as she looked at the star map. "I'm sure there's still something I can do."
Chapter 42: Crisis on the planet Jedi - Encounter between the "crossbow nuclear battleship" and the stalemate saucer

"Ninny, we couldn't have come this far without you," one citizen expressed his gratitude. "Please help as many people as possible in other star systems as well."
"Of course," Ninny replied kindly. "But everyone, please protect Gigapolis. This is my spiritual home."
Alpha and Celia approached her for the last time and exchanged farewell words.
"Live your life, Ninny." Alpha held out his fist. "We're waiting for you here."
"Thank you, Alpha." Ninny met his fist with her own. "Until we meet again, stay well."
"Be careful," Celia said quietly. "And you can come back anytime."
"Yes," Ninny smiled and climbed into the spaceship. And Alpha and Celia continued to watch as the ship quietly disappeared into the sky.
___________________


A new era for Gigapolis
After Ninny's departure, Alpha and Celia used the assets she left behind to further rebuild and develop Gigapolis. A huge amount of $1.3 trillion was invested in education, healthcare, infrastructure development, and even cosmic cooperation projects, and Gigapolis began to regain its position as the center of the universe.
``I wonder if Ninny would be happy if I had him.'' Celia suddenly murmured.
"I'm sure," Alpha replied with a smile. "His soul remains here. That's why we will protect this city for him."
___________________


Ninny's new journey
Meanwhile, Ninny begins an adventure in a new planetary system. She called herself a "Space Hero" and continued to work to help people suffering from war and dimensional energy distortions.
``Okay, where is the next star?'' Ninny smiles while looking at the star map on the ship. "No matter how difficult it is, I won't give up."

Chapter 39: The road to the revival of Gigapolis - Establishment of venture capital "NEWVE" and mass immigration plan

After Ninny departed and Alpha and Celia were entrusted with Gigapolis, a large-scale plan to rebuild it was put forward. Of particular importance was strengthening the economic infrastructure to make cities sustainable and vibrant. As part of this effort, the two have established a new venture capital called NEWVE, which aims to attract resources and talent from across the universe, and have also announced plans for mass immigration. This plan will be a decisive move to completely revive Gigapolis, which has been devastated by war.
___________________


Establishment of NEWVE - Investing in the future
NEWVE, founded by Alpha and Celia, was a venture capital firm aimed at reviving Gigapolis as a center of future technology and industry. The organization was established to support innovation in a variety of areas, including dimensional energy technology, space infrastructure, and new energy resource development.
"To revive Gigapolis, it's not enough to just throw money at it," Alpha said at its first launch press conference. "We support entrepreneurs who are creating new industries and technologies, and together we build the future."
NEWVE allocated $1,000 trillion of Alpha's $2,000 trillion in assets as operating funds and began gathering entrepreneurs with great talent and ideas from across the universe. This funding not only brought a wave of innovation to Gigapolis, but also contributed to the development of the universe as a whole.
"We're not just sharing money, we're sharing knowledge and networks," Celia added. “Gigapolis will become the center of the future, and we are committed to providing the power to make that happen.”
___________________


Announcing immigration plans – welcoming new residents
In order to rebuild Gigapolis, it was essential not only to strengthen its economic base, but also to bring in immigrants to replace the lost population. In order to restore the population that had drastically decreased due to the war, Alpha and his friends came up with a plan to accept mass immigration from all over the universe.

After Ninny departed and Alpha and Celia were entrusted with Gigapolis, a large-scale plan to rebuild it was put forward. ___________________


Announcing immigration plans – welcoming new residents
In order to rebuild Gigapolis, it was essential not only to strengthen its economic base, but also to bring in immigrants to replace the lost population. In order to restore the population that had drastically decreased due to the war, Alpha and his friends came up with a plan to accept mass immigration from all over the universe.

Ninny was once again traveling through the depths of space. After saving Finger, she traveled to numerous planets and faced challenges that awaited her one after the other. This time, they were headed to the famous "Planet Jedi" in space. The Jedi head to a planet where scientists who make full use of dimensional energy technology gather to solve problems occurring there.
However, just before arriving at the Jedi, she faces an unexpected and serious problem. It was a situation in which a superweapon called the ``Nuclear Battleship'' got lost in a stalemate disk in space due to an unexpected accident. A stalemate disk is a place where countless meteorites, gas, and dust swirl due to the influence of gravity over millions of years, creating a space that appears as if time has stopped. If a battleship got lost in it, there was a risk that its very existence would disappear completely.
Ninny learns of this emergency and decides to rush to the scene. If the battleship is safe, they may be able to use its power to stabilize the Jedi's dimensional energy. However, everything in the stalemate disc is full of danger, and it is difficult to rescue them alone, so Ninny recruits new allies and begins the operation.
___________________


Appearance of crossbow nuclear battleships
Ninny reached the outer edge of the stalemate disk and located the battleship while avoiding the numerous dust and asteroids floating around. Crossbow nuclear battleships are said to be the most destructive weapons in the universe, and because of their extraordinary size and powerful attacks using dimensional energy, it was considered dangerous for other ships to even approach them.
"A battleship is in this place...?" Ninny confirmed through the communicator, carefully observing the stalemate disk in front of her. Gravity inside the stalemate disk is abnormally strong, making it impossible to proceed at all using normal navigation systems. However, the battleship was trying to force its way forward, moving closer and closer to the center of the stalemate disk. If the battleship had continued to ram, it would have been engulfed by gravity, and there was a high possibility that it would never be able to escape.

“Gigapolis will once again be a city of opportunity for all,” Alpha declared at the launch of its immigration plan. "We welcome people who want to start a new life in this city."
The plan was comprehensive, including the rapid construction of housing and infrastructure using dimensional energy technology, and educational and vocational training programs to help the immigrants integrate into society.
“Our goal is not just to bring people together,” Celia explained. “That is the essence of this plan: to make Gigapolis a place where everyone has equal opportunities and can build a new future.”
___________________


The arrival of immigrants and entrepreneurs
After the immigration plan was announced, many people from all over the universe began to flock to Gigapolis. People who lost their homelands due to wars or dimensional energy disasters, young people with dreams seeking new lands, and scientists and engineers interested in dimensional energy technology - people from various backgrounds have come in search of a new future.
"Alpha, report," Celia said as she operated the hologram. “To date, more than 5 million people have arrived as migrants, and the number of applications for NEWVE funding is also increasing. We have already received over 100,000 project proposals.”
"That's a good trend." Alpha nodded. "But the real impact of this is yet to come. We will support them and rebuild Gigapolis as the center of the future."
Immigrants were not only employed in companies and projects established with NEWVE funding, but also developed their skills and built new lives through educational programs.
___________________


Investing in the future – concrete results
Thanks to NEWVE's activities, new technologies and industries began to emerge one after another in Gigapolis. Clean energy technology that utilizes dimensional energy, self-sufficient urban design that utilizes space, and communication networks based on dimensional energy - these projects transformed Gigapolis into a city that was more developed than before.

“Gigapolis will once again be a city of opportunity for all,” Alpha declared at the launch of its immigration plan. "We welcome people who want to start a new life in this city."

Investing in the future – concrete results
Thanks to NEWVE's activities, new technologies and industries began to emerge one after another in Gigapolis. Clean energy technology that utilizes dimensional energy, self-sufficient urban design that utilizes space, and communication networks based on dimensional energy - these projects transformed Gigapolis into a city that was more developed than before.

"We need to act fast." Ninny clicks her tongue and quickly comes up with a plan. If a battleship were to be pulled in by gravity, its powerful energy would run wild within the stalemate disk, causing enormous damage to the entire surrounding star system.
``At this rate, we have to do something before the battleships are drawn in.'' Ninny hurriedly uses her communicator to contact the Jedi leader. "This is Ninny. We've arrived at the Jedi. A crossbow battleship has entered a stalemate disc. We request assistance."
A few seconds later, a reply came from the Jedi leader, Dr. Alice. "Ninny, I'm glad you came. However, operating within the stalemate saucer is extremely dangerous. You can't do it alone. We are preparing to send support, but time is limited. Please proceed with caution."
___________________


Start of rescue operation
Ninny reconsidered her plan and immediately began a rescue mission to receive assistance from the Jedi. It was extremely difficult to move within the stalemate disk, so it was decided that they would attempt to approach the battleship using special space equipment that had been prepared in advance.
``First of all, in order to loosen the gravitational pull as much as possible, we will adjust the dimensional energy and control the battleship's gravitational field as much as possible,'' Ninny said to himself. "Then we'll look for ways to send in energy from outside to pull the battleship back."
In order to neutralize the battleship's powerful energy, Ninny brought his spaceship close to the battleship and began supplying it with energy using a tether. This process was extremely precise, and despite being affected by gravitational waves within the stalemate disk, as well as surrounding dust and meteorites, they were able to successfully begin supplying energy.
"Connection completed. Next, reverse the battleship's direction of travel," Ninny calmly orders, taking control of the ship. Before the battleship began to move, it tried to use its energy to ride the waves of gravity and correct its trajectory little by little. However, an unexpected problem occurs along the way.
"Why...! There's a sudden change in the gravitational field...!" Ninny exclaimed. The surrounding dust and meteorites were trying to force the battleship's direction of travel.
___________________


A desperate moment

"Look, Alpha," Celia pointed to a hologram showing the progress of a new construction project. "This area will be able to use energy more efficiently than before the war. Once this is completed, it will become a model case for the entire universe."
"Great," Alpha smiled. "Gigapolis has come this far because of everyone's efforts."
___________________


New challenges: friction between immigrants and challenges for the future
On the other hand, there were many challenges, such as cultural friction caused by the diversity of immigrants and the clash between new technology and old values.
"Skirmishes between immigrants are increasing," Celia reported. "There is a particularly large difference in values between people who have lost their hometowns and entrepreneurs who have sought new challenges."
"We have no choice but to emphasize dialogue," Alpha replied. "Now that we have promised to make Gigapolis a new land of hope, we cannot leave anyone behind."
Alphas established a community center to promote dialogue among citizens and promoted multicultural exchange events and joint projects. Through this, a relationship of trust was gradually built.
With the success of venture capital NEWVE and the progress of immigration plans, Gigapolis was once again establishing itself as the center of the universe.
"Gigapolis is more than just a city," Alpha said to the citizens gathered in the plaza. "This place is the very hope for the future. We will do everything in our power to protect and nurture this city."
"And everyone here is part of that," Celia continued. “It is not just us who will build this city, but all of you.”
Cheers spread among the citizens, and Gigapolis took a new step toward the future.
Chapter 40: Ninny's new mission - Arrival at the ultra-poverty planet Solaris

Chapter 40: Ninny's new mission - Arrival at the ultra-poverty planet Solaris

Ninny left Gigapolis and embarked on a new adventure, traveling around the universe and continuing to work to heal the disasters caused by the instability of dimensional energy and the scars caused by war. Meanwhile, she arrives at a planet called "Solaris". This planet is said to be the poorest planet in the universe, and its civilization has almost collapsed, lacking even the bare minimum resources for survival.
Ninny is determined to take on a new challenge on this planet in order to fulfill her mission.
___________________


Solaris - Planet of Despair
Solaris was once a lush planet with many life forms, but due to environmental destruction caused by war and the misuse of dimensional energy, most of it has turned into a desert. Temperatures were extremely high, and residents took shelter in underground caves and some oases.
"This is Solaris..." Ninny muttered, looking down at the planet through the ship's window. “Are people really living in a place like this?”
As soon as her ship landed, the local population gathered. Their faces were gaunt with exhaustion and hunger, and their clothes were in tatters.
"Who are you?" A middle-aged man who appeared to be the leader asked warily. "There's nothing left on this planet. There's nothing left to take away."
"I'm here to help." Ninny held out her arms, still carrying her sword. "I brought you some food and water. Would you mind letting me talk?"
"You mean to help...?" The man narrowed his eyes. "We are not naive enough to believe such a story."
"That's fine," Ninny replied firmly. "Even if you don't believe me, I won't abandon you."
The residents were shaken by these words and gradually began to lower their guard.
___________________


Local situation
Ninny was guided by the residents to the underground living quarters, where she witnessed firsthand their living conditions. In the dark, damp cave, the inhabitants survived by sharing the meager amount of water and food they had.
“Is this what life is all about?” Ninny asks, wide-eyed.

``But that's suicidal!'' one of the people involved shouted in shock. "The size of the meteorite shower is so large that it covers the entire planet. Jumping into it like that would be like throwing away your life!"
"Don't tell me you're going to throw your life away," Ninny replied calmly. "I can still do it. I will protect the reason you are here and the future of Finger."
Everyone fell silent at those words. Ninny's eyes exuded the determination and experience she gained from her many past battles. If she says it, her words certainly have power.
___________________


Aiming for a breakthrough in meteorite showers
Ninny operated the Finger's defense system console and determined the best approach, taking into account the meteorite's exact location and speed. Her goal was to destroy the "Leader Meteorite," the largest of the meteorites and the one with the highest risk of collision.
"Here we go," Ninny murmured, accelerating the ship again. Her ship hurtled toward the center of the meteorite. All around me, gigantic meteorites flew by without making any sound of impact, and bands of light seemed to cut through the space.
“You’re in danger, Ninny!” a Finger staff member yells over the communicator. “It would be suicidal to just rush in like that!”
"Don't worry," Ninny replied calmly. “I will break through.”
The spaceship plunged into a group of meteorites and continued forward, avoiding collisions. In front of me is a huge meteorite that looks exactly like the Grim Reaper.
"Now...!" Ninny further strengthened the ship's control and guided it to the optimal position. At that moment, the energy inside the ship concentrated all at once, and the ship's hull emitted an intense light as it launched towards the most dangerous meteorite.
The shock wave of light hit the meteorite directly. With an explosion sound, the meteorite broke into pieces, spreading to the surrounding meteorites.
"Alright, just a little more!" Ninny gasped. At that moment, another large meteorite approached from the front. She took the helm calmly and attacked again while dodging sharply.
The explosion sound continued, and the surrounding meteorites gradually lost their momentum.
___________________


miraculous moment

Unable to stop the battleship from hurtling toward the center of the stalemate, Ninny temporarily lost control of the battleship. At that moment, the gravitational pull of the stalemate disk became even stronger, and the battleship's advance accelerated.
``Wait a little longer!'' Ninny tried desperately. "Why so much...?"
At that moment, what she saw was a red warning light emitted from the bridge of the battleship. Almost all systems on the ship went down, and the ship's movements became unpredictable. If the battleship were to be swallowed up by the center of gravity, everything would disappear.
``I can't retreat any further...!'' Ninny desperately gripped the control stick, sweating all over her body. At that moment, a band of light suddenly appeared from behind the battleship, and powerful energy was released.
"This is support from the Jedi...!" Ninny realized. Jedi scientists were directing energy into the battleship's direction. As a result, the battleship's advancing speed gradually slowed down, and it finally succeeded in escaping from the stalemate disk without being affected by gravity.
"Success!" Ninny cheered as she returned to the bridge of the battleship and breathed a sigh of relief along with the rest of the crew. The battleship was able to safely escape the stalemate disk and return to a stable orbit.
___________________


End and restart
After the battleship was safely evacuated, Ninny contacted the Jedi leaders.
"Ninny, well done," Dr. Alice called over the comm. "We're proud of you too."
"It's just a job," Ninny replies with a smile. "However, because the battleship was safe, it also helped stabilize the Jedi's dimensional energy. We were able to do this because of everyone's cooperation."
After receiving words of gratitude from the battleship's crew, Ninny prepared to depart for the next system.
``I wonder what kind of planet will be waiting for us next?'' Ninny smiled as she looked at the star map while sitting in the pilot's seat of the spaceship. “No matter where I am, I will always help.”
Chapter 43: The darkness of the black hole - beyond the swallowed universe

“Yes,” the male leader replies with a bitter expression. "Our planet was once rich. But when dimensional energy was used for war, everything was lost. Now we have no choice but to live underground."
"Anyway...this is awful," Ninny said, staring at her clenched fist. "I think it's fate that brought me here. I'll think of a way to help you guys."
___________________


First aid – water and food supplies
Ninny shared the emergency water and food he had on his ship with the residents. It was a high-quality source of nutrition that they had not had access to for years.
"Is this... really for us?" one resident asked with tears in his eyes.
"Of course," Ninny smiled and nodded. "But this is temporary. Our real goal is to help you become independent and get back to living your life."
``Is that possible?'' the male leader asked with a grim look on his face. "This planet is dead. How can we expect it to become independent?"
"It's my job to think about that," Ninny replied emphatically. "Let's think about it together."
___________________


Environmental restoration plan
Ninny began investigating the current state of the planet and searching for ways to regenerate the environment. Air pollution and the depletion of water sources due to the misuse of dimensional energy turn out to be Solaris' biggest problems.
``To purify this planet's atmosphere and restore its water sources, we will need to harness dimensional energy.'' Ninny plans to work with the residents to install a purification system.
Using her assets, she ordered the latest purification technology developed at Gigapolis. Together with the residents, they set up a device in the desert and began work to purify the dimensional energy.
"Don't do it alone, let's all work together," Ninny urged residents. "You, the people who live here, can save this planet."
___________________


Awakening of the residents

At first, the residents were suspicious of Ninny, but after seeing her actions, they gradually opened up and began to work with her to restore the environment.
``Ninny, how many years has it been since I had such hope?'' the male leader said with deep emotion. "We thought it was over. But since you came, everything has changed."
"Now it's time for the real thing," Ninny replied with a smile. "You are the ones who will save this planet. I'm just helping you do it."
The residents gradually banded together and worked together. As a few months passed, a small amount of greenery began to return to the withered desert area, and water sources gradually began to show signs of recovery.
___________________


light for the future
Thanks to Ninny's work, Solaris has started on the path of rebirth, albeit slightly. The inhabitants have renewed hope and are determined to build a new life on this planet.
"Ninny, without you we wouldn't even have survived," the leader expressed his gratitude. "Thank you so much."
"You're welcome," Ninny replied with a smile. "But this is the real start. I'm going on the road again, but I'll always be back."
``You are a hero of this planet,'' the residents said as they saw her off.
___________________


A new journey
Ninny had a new determination in her heart as she left Solaris. The journey to save people and planets suffering from the effects of dimensional energy is far from over.
"Now, where shall we go next?" she smiled, looking at the star map. "There are still many people who need help."
And so, Ninny's new adventure begins again.
Chapter 41: Calamity Planet Finger - The final challenge amidst the meteorites
Ninny continues to travel through space, visiting planets in need and working to save lives. However, this time she visited a planet with a hopeless situation unlike anything she had ever seen before. That planet is called "Finger."

After rescuing the battleship and receiving words of gratitude from the Jedi, Ninny is about to depart for a new mission. There is still little information about the star system they are heading to next, so they don't know what dangers await them. Still, Ninny was determined to go anywhere.
``No matter how difficult it is, I will help.'' Ninny sits in the pilot's seat of the spaceship, steering it toward its next destination. Beyond the window, the endless stars shone quietly. In her mind are images of unseen planets and suffering people. However, at that time, something happened that instantly destroyed the peace of the universe.
Suddenly, a band of light appeared in front of them, and space began to distort. My vision became blurry, as if space itself was being distorted, and the positions of the stars began to gradually change. Ninny instantly sensed the danger and gripped the control stick.
"What... is this?!" Ninny quickly operated the console and checked the warning system. "This space is like being swallowed up by the gravitational waves of a black hole...!"
In front of me, pitch black darkness began to spread, and a huge black hole appeared at its center. The dark vortex that sucked everything in had the power to pull Ninny's spaceship towards its center.
___________________


black hole gravity
``Why is there a black hole in a place like this!?'' Ninny was worried, but calmly checked the status of the spaceship. However, no matter how hard we turned the rudder, the gravitational force was stronger and the spaceship was gradually drawn into the vortex.
``I can't escape from this...!'' Ninny continues to frantically operate the control stick, but the black hole's gravitational field is even stronger, and she intuitively understands that there is no way to escape.
"Alpha, Celia, everyone...are you okay?" Ninny murmured in her mind. Her space friends were also on board her ship. I pray that Celia, Alpha, and the crew of the battleship are safe, but my hopes are in vain. The entire ship is drawn to the black hole's gravitational pull, moving closer and closer to its center.

At first, the residents were suspicious of Ninny, but after seeing her actions, they gradually opened up and began to work with her to restore the environment.
