Chapter 41: Calamity Planet Finger - The final challenge amidst the meteorites
Ninny continues to travel through space, visiting planets in need and working to save lives. However, this time she visited a planet with a hopeless situation unlike anything she had ever seen before. That planet is called "Finger."

Finger was once a planet with abundant nature and life, but due to recent generations of resource extraction and war, its environment has deteriorated to the extreme, and the existence of life is now in jeopardy. But what's even worse is that Finger's orbit takes him into a destructive meteor shower, with only an hour left.
The meteorites had already approached the planet's atmosphere, making it impossible for them to leave Finger's orbit. As it is, Finger is destined to become a piece of cosmic scum. But I can't give up. Ninny knew someone had to do something about this situation.
___________________


Finger's hopeless situation
When Ninny's ship entered Finger's atmosphere, the landscape was hellish. The sky was dyed bright red, and the atmosphere showed signs of abnormality to the point where cracks appeared. What could be seen in the distance was a scene of countless meteorites approaching Finger.
"Is this the current state of Finger..." Ninny muttered silently as she brought the ship into a steep dive.
Ignoring the warning sounds blaring inside the ship, she heads towards the planet's control center. Waiting there are the people who hold the planet's last hope.
"We only have an hour left..." a government official from Finger spoke to Ninny in a trembling voice. "The speed of the meteorite swarm is abnormal, and none of our defense systems are effective. If the meteorite continues to impact us, all civilization will be wiped out."
"Isn't there a way to destroy the meteorite?" Ninny asks calmly.
"Yes." Another researcher manipulates the screen to display system data. "However, with our defense system, it is impossible to destroy all of the meteorites at once. Moreover, if we try to attack by concentrating energy, other meteorites will arrive in the meantime."
"Then I'll do it," Ninny said with determination. “If there is a way to do something about those meteorites, I will try.”

``This is not just a coincidence... something is being drawn together intentionally.'' Even though Ninny is worried, she tries to analyze the situation calmly. However, as the surrounding space becomes more distorted and stars burst apart, Ninny finally faces a hopeless situation.
"The outer space itself is changing...! Is the black hole attracting something?"
___________________


To the center of the black hole
Just like that, Ninny's spaceship entered the center where everything was drawn to it. Visibility becomes completely black, and all the objects inside the ship float up due to the force of gravity and start rampaging. Amid the vibrations and sounds, Ninny tries desperately to control the ship, but it is no longer in her control.
“If this continues...everyone will be swallowed up...!”
The spacecraft will never return to its original state. Gradually, even the sense of time and space within the ship disappeared, and all I could do was feel everything around me accelerating, weightless.
"Is this...the center of a black hole...?" Ninny closes her eyes and intuitively senses the abnormality of this space. Her ship was completely engulfed by its gravitational pull.
___________________


Waking up in a strange space
Suddenly, everything seemed to stop and there was silence, and Ninny woke up. My vision went dark, and when the light returned, I found myself in an unfamiliar place. She was supposed to have been swallowed up by the center of the black hole, but she was standing in a strange space. Countless stars seemed to be floating nearby, and I felt as if time and space were distorted.
"Is this...?" Ninny looked around in surprise. She must have been swallowed up by the black hole. However, what unfolded before my eyes was a strange landscape that looked like nothing more than a fragment of space. It feels like countless parallel dimensions are interfering with each other in space.

Finger was once a planet with abundant nature and life, but due to recent generations of resource extraction and war, its environment has deteriorated to the extreme, and the existence of life is now in jeopardy. But what's even worse is that Finger's orbit takes him into a destructive meteor shower, with only an hour left.
The meteorites had already approached the planet's atmosphere, making it impossible for them to leave Finger's orbit. As it is, Finger is destined to become a piece of cosmic scum. But I can't give up. Ninny knew someone had to do something about this situation.
___________________


Finger's hopeless situation

"Yes." Another researcher manipulates the screen to display system data. "However, with our defense system, it is impossible to destroy all of the meteorites at once. Moreover, if we try to attack by concentrating energy, other meteorites will arrive in the meantime."
"Then I'll do it," Ninny said with determination. “If there is a way to do something about those meteorites, I will try.”

``But that's suicidal!'' one of the people involved shouted in shock. "The size of the meteorite shower is so large that it covers the entire planet. Jumping into it like that would be like throwing away your life!"
"Don't tell me you're going to throw your life away," Ninny replied calmly. "I can still do it. I will protect the reason you are here and the future of Finger."
Everyone fell silent at those words. Ninny's eyes exuded the determination and experience she gained from her many past battles. If she says it, her words certainly have power.
___________________


Aiming for a breakthrough in meteorite showers
Ninny operated the Finger's defense system console and determined the best approach, taking into account the meteorite's exact location and speed. Her goal was to destroy the "Leader Meteorite," the largest of the meteorites and the one with the highest risk of collision.
"Here we go," Ninny murmured, accelerating the ship again. Her ship hurtled toward the center of the meteorite. All around me, gigantic meteorites flew by without making any sound of impact, and bands of light seemed to cut through the space.
“You’re in danger, Ninny!” a Finger staff member yells over the communicator. “It would be suicidal to just rush in like that!”
"Don't worry," Ninny replied calmly. “I will break through.”
The spaceship plunged into a group of meteorites and continued forward, avoiding collisions. In front of me is a huge meteorite that looks exactly like the Grim Reaper.
"Now...!" Ninny further strengthened the ship's control and guided it to the optimal position. At that moment, the energy inside the ship concentrated all at once, and the ship's hull emitted an intense light as it launched towards the most dangerous meteorite.
The shock wave of light hit the meteorite directly. With an explosion sound, the meteorite broke into pieces, spreading to the surrounding meteorites.
"Alright, just a little more!" Ninny gasped. At that moment, another large meteorite approached from the front. She took the helm calmly and attacked again while dodging sharply.
The explosion sound continued, and the surrounding meteorites gradually lost their momentum.
___________________


miraculous moment

``Could it be... has this come to another dimension?'' Ninny was speechless as she began to walk through the mysterious space. It feels like no physical laws govern anywhere in that space. Gravity, time, space - I felt like everything had been pushed into a different dimension.
"What are you doing here..." Ninny muttered. "All I wanted to do was help the planet..."
At that moment, a huge shadow suddenly appeared in front of me. It was not a human-shaped being, but a gigantic being made up of countless fluid energies. When the figure appeared as if breathing in light, Ninny was overwhelmed by its presence.
"I didn't know you were meant to be here," the being said in a deep voice to Ninny.
___________________


contact with new forces
"Are you...?" Ninny calmly asked the giant being. Its existence was a mass of countless energies, and even though it had no form, it felt like it contained a certain will.
"I am a being that transcends this universe. I am the one who transcends the walls of time and space and gives trials to those who are swallowed by the black hole."
When Ninny heard those words, she felt something shake inside her chest. “Trial?”
"Yes, a trial." the being continued. "It is not just a coincidence that you are standing here now. Your mission is to know the power of this dimension and master it."
"Dimensional power?" Ninny said, mulling over the words. "I still don't know what that means..."
The being beamed a beam of light towards Ninny, and the light permeated her body. Suddenly, something strange happened to Ninny's body, and she felt her inner power awaken.
"Is this...dimensional power?" Ninny felt the power in surprise. The energy flowing through her body began to move as if it were able to transcend dimensions and manipulate time and space, and she realized that she had acquired a new power.

``But that's suicidal!'' one of the people involved shouted in shock. "The size of the meteorite shower is so large that it covers the entire planet. Jumping into it like that would be like throwing away your life!"

The explosion sound continued, and the surrounding meteorites gradually lost their momentum.
___________________


miraculous moment

The moment Ninny destroyed the last meteorite, the meteorite group stopped moving and silence fell over the surrounding space. Finger's staff cheered over the communicator, and words of praise for Ninny's accomplishments were delivered one after another.
"You did it! Ninny, you did it!"
“Finger…saved!”
"I didn't do it," Ninny replied, smiling over the comm. "This was only possible because of everyone's help."
By destroying the meteorite, Finger once again survived and was spared a devastating impact. The planet's atmosphere has stabilized, and its living area is once again protected.
___________________


return and gratitude
Ninny left Finger's orbit and returned to a base stationed around the planet. Inside the base, residents gathered to welcome her.
"Ninny, if you hadn't come, we wouldn't be here right now..." the leader speaks through tears.
"That's all in the past," Ninny said with a smile. "This is the true beginning. I will leave here, but I will spare no effort in supporting you so that you can become independent here."
"Thank you, Ninny. Thank you so much." The leader held out his hand to thank her.
"It's okay, we can open up the future with your help." Ninny smiled and boarded the ship again.
The sight of her flying off into the darkness of space was a source of hope for the people of Finger, and for Ninny herself, it meant that a mission in a new star system was awaiting her.
___________________


To the next star system
Ninny leaves Finger and travels into the vast expanses of space. The next destination has not yet been decided. But she was sure in her heart. Wherever there is a need for help, I will go there and do my best.
"I wonder where next..." Ninny muttered as she looked at the star map. "I'm sure there's still something I can do."

Chapter 42: Crisis on the planet Jedi - Encounter between the "crossbow nuclear battleship" and the stalemate saucer

Ninny was once again traveling through the depths of space. After saving Finger, she traveled to numerous planets and faced challenges that awaited her one after the other. This time, they were headed to the famous "Planet Jedi" in space. The Jedi head to a planet where scientists who make full use of dimensional energy technology gather to solve problems occurring there.
However, just before arriving at the Jedi, she faces an unexpected and serious problem. It was a situation in which a superweapon called the ``Nuclear Battleship'' got lost in a stalemate disk in space due to an unexpected accident. A stalemate disk is a place where countless meteorites, gas, and dust swirl due to the influence of gravity over millions of years, creating a space that appears as if time has stopped. If a battleship got lost in it, there was a risk that its very existence would disappear completely.
Ninny learns of this emergency and decides to rush to the scene. If the battleship is safe, they may be able to use its power to stabilize the Jedi's dimensional energy. However, everything in the stalemate disc is full of danger, and it is difficult to rescue them alone, so Ninny recruits new allies and begins the operation.
___________________


Appearance of crossbow nuclear battleships
Ninny reached the outer edge of the stalemate disk and located the battleship while avoiding the numerous dust and asteroids floating around. Crossbow nuclear battleships are said to be the most destructive weapons in the universe, and because of their extraordinary size and powerful attacks using dimensional energy, it was considered dangerous for other ships to even approach them.
"A battleship is in this place...?" Ninny confirmed through the communicator, carefully observing the stalemate disk in front of her. Gravity inside the stalemate disk is abnormally strong, making it impossible to proceed at all using normal navigation systems. However, the battleship was trying to force its way forward, moving closer and closer to the center of the stalemate disk. If the battleship had continued to ram, it would have been engulfed by gravity, and there was a high possibility that it would never be able to escape.

``If you master this power, you will be able to uncover the true nature of black holes.'' The being said with a smile. "But in the end, it's up to you whether you use it or not."
___________________


Beyond the darkness of dimension
Once Ninny obtains this power, she sets out to challenge the mysteries hidden deep within the black hole and the truth of dimensions. She knew that no matter how powerful she was, there were still trials ahead.
"I won't stop until it's time to use this power," Ninny vowed to herself.
Chapter 44: NEWVE's success and Gigapolis' recovery - the future moving forward with a new group of companies
Gigapolis has successfully begun its recovery from the effects of the war and runaway dimensional energy. Alpha and Celia have been devising a plan for its revival, and have been making steady progress over the past few years. However, in order to truly rebuild Gigapolis as the center of the universe, the current methods were insufficient.
Therefore, Alpha proposed the establishment of a venture capital called ``NEWVE'' to attract cutting-edge technology from across the universe and bring together innovative companies. NEWVE was the key to the economic revitalization of Gigapolis, and its success was to become an important factor in determining the future of the city.
___________________


Establishment of NEWVE and its results
Based on Alpha's $2,000 trillion in assets, NEWVE gathered investments from all over the universe and provided funds to create a group of companies in a wide variety of fields, including dimensional energy technology, space infrastructure construction, and ecosystem restoration. Within a few months of its establishment, the number of companies participating in NEWVE has rapidly increased, with greater success than expected.
"I can't believe it..." Celia exclaimed in shock when she saw the latest data from NEWVE. "Over 100 huge companies have joined this project in just a few months."

Ninny was once again traveling through the depths of space. After saving Finger, she traveled to numerous planets and faced challenges that awaited her one after the other. This time, they were headed to the famous "Planet Jedi" in space. The Jedi head to a planet where scientists who make full use of dimensional energy technology gather to solve problems occurring there.
However, just before arriving at the Jedi, she faces an unexpected and serious problem. It was a situation in which a superweapon called the ``Nuclear Battleship'' got lost in a stalemate disk in space due to an unexpected accident. A stalemate disk is a place where countless meteorites, gas, and dust swirl due to the influence of gravity over millions of years, creating a space that appears as if time has stopped. If a battleship got lost in it, there was a risk that its very existence would disappear completely.
Ninny learns of this emergency and decides to rush to the scene. If the battleship is safe, they may be able to use its power to stabilize the Jedi's dimensional energy. However, everything in the stalemate disc is full of danger, and it is difficult to rescue them alone, so Ninny recruits new allies and begins the operation.
___________________


Appearance of crossbow nuclear battleships
Ninny reached the outer edge of the stalemate disk and located the battleship while avoiding the numerous dust and asteroids floating around. Crossbow nuclear battleships are said to be the most destructive weapons in the universe, and because of their extraordinary size and powerful attacks using dimensional energy, it was considered dangerous for other ships to even approach them.
"A battleship is in this place...?" Ninny confirmed through the communicator, carefully observing the stalemate disk in front of her. Gravity inside the stalemate disk is abnormally strong, making it impossible to proceed at all using normal navigation systems. However, the battleship was trying to force its way forward, moving closer and closer to the center of the stalemate disk. If the battleship had continued to ram, it would have been engulfed by gravity, and there was a high possibility that it would never be able to escape.

"We need to act fast." Ninny clicks her tongue and quickly comes up with a plan. If a battleship were to be pulled in by gravity, its powerful energy would run wild within the stalemate disk, causing enormous damage to the entire surrounding star system.
``At this rate, we have to do something before the battleships are drawn in.'' Ninny hurriedly uses her communicator to contact the Jedi leader. "This is Ninny. We've arrived at the Jedi. A crossbow battleship has entered a stalemate disc. We request assistance."
A few seconds later, a reply came from the Jedi leader, Dr. Alice. "Ninny, I'm glad you came. However, operating within the stalemate saucer is extremely dangerous. You can't do it alone. We are preparing to send support, but time is limited. Please proceed with caution."
___________________


Start of rescue operation
Ninny reconsidered her plan and immediately began a rescue mission to receive assistance from the Jedi. It was extremely difficult to move within the stalemate disk, so it was decided that they would attempt to approach the battleship using special space equipment that had been prepared in advance.
``First of all, in order to loosen the gravitational pull as much as possible, we will adjust the dimensional energy and control the battleship's gravitational field as much as possible,'' Ninny said to himself. "Then we'll look for ways to send in energy from outside to pull the battleship back."
In order to neutralize the battleship's powerful energy, Ninny brought his spaceship close to the battleship and began supplying it with energy using a tether. This process was extremely precise, and despite being affected by gravitational waves within the stalemate disk, as well as surrounding dust and meteorites, they were able to successfully begin supplying energy.
"Connection completed. Next, reverse the battleship's direction of travel," Ninny calmly orders, taking control of the ship. Before the battleship began to move, it tried to use its energy to ride the waves of gravity and correct its trajectory little by little. However, an unexpected problem occurs along the way.
"Why...! There's a sudden change in the gravitational field...!" Ninny exclaimed. The surrounding dust and meteorites were trying to force the battleship's direction of travel.
___________________


A desperate moment

``This is more than I ever imagined.''Although he couldn't believe his eyes, Alpha was satisfied with his success. “There is no doubt that this will further accelerate the recovery of Gigapolis.”
The success brought by NEWVE was not only an increase in the number of companies, but also an unrivaled quality. Gigapolis gradually established itself as the economic and technological center of space, with companies at the forefront of dimensional energy technology, companies providing ultra-efficient clean energy, and companies dominating space communications technology participating.
"NEWVE was successful because we were heading in the right direction," Celia continued, analyzing the data. "It means that the efforts we have made so far have borne fruit. The day is near when Gigapolis' energy problems will be solved by making full use of dimensional energy technology."
___________________


Impact of over 100 participating companies
Among the companies participating in NEWVE, a particularly noteworthy group of companies were those related to dimensional energy technology and quantum communications. These companies have provided Gigapolis with the latest energy supply systems and technologies that dramatically improve energy efficiency. The impact has been to significantly reduce energy costs for the city as a whole, laying the foundations for a sustainable city.
"With this technology, we won't have to worry about energy problems anymore," Alpha said with satisfaction. "We can meet all of Gigapolis' energy needs. This will allow the city to achieve further development."
Furthermore, the development of space infrastructure using dimensional energy technology has begun, and a group of huge space stations will be constructed around Gigapolis. These stations were intended to support commercial operations throughout the universe, with Gigapolis gradually serving as an orbital hub.
``The position as the center of the universe will definitely belong to Gigapolis.'' Celia was confident in this vision as she looked to the city's future. "But we're just getting started."
___________________

Unable to stop the battleship from hurtling toward the center of the stalemate, Ninny temporarily lost control of the battleship. At that moment, the gravitational pull of the stalemate disk became even stronger, and the battleship's advance accelerated.
``Wait a little longer!'' Ninny tried desperately. "Why so much...?"
At that moment, what she saw was a red warning light emitted from the bridge of the battleship. Almost all systems on the ship went down, and the ship's movements became unpredictable. If the battleship were to be swallowed up by the center of gravity, everything would disappear.
``I can't retreat any further...!'' Ninny desperately gripped the control stick, sweating all over her body. At that moment, a band of light suddenly appeared from behind the battleship, and powerful energy was released.
"This is support from the Jedi...!" Ninny realized. Jedi scientists were directing energy into the battleship's direction. As a result, the battleship's advancing speed gradually slowed down, and it finally succeeded in escaping from the stalemate disk without being affected by gravity.
"Success!" Ninny cheered as she returned to the bridge of the battleship and breathed a sigh of relief along with the rest of the crew. The battleship was able to safely escape the stalemate disk and return to a stable orbit.
___________________


End and restart
After the battleship was safely evacuated, Ninny contacted the Jedi leaders.
"Ninny, well done," Dr. Alice called over the comm. "We're proud of you too."
"It's just a job," Ninny replies with a smile. "However, because the battleship was safe, it also helped stabilize the Jedi's dimensional energy. We were able to do this because of everyone's cooperation."
After receiving words of gratitude from the battleship's crew, Ninny prepared to depart for the next system.
``I wonder what kind of planet will be waiting for us next?'' Ninny smiled as she looked at the star map while sitting in the pilot's seat of the spaceship. “No matter where I am, I will always help.”
Chapter 43: The darkness of the black hole - beyond the swallowed universe

"We need to act fast." Ninny clicks her tongue and quickly comes up with a plan. If a battleship were to be pulled in by gravity, its powerful energy would run wild within the stalemate disk, causing enormous damage to the entire surrounding star system.
``At this rate, we have to do something before the battleships are drawn in.'' Ninny hurriedly uses her communicator to contact the Jedi leader. "This is Ninny. We've arrived at the Jedi. A crossbow battleship has entered a stalemate disc. We request assistance."
A few seconds later, a reply came from the Jedi leader, Dr. Alice. "Ninny, I'm glad you came. However, operating within the stalemate saucer is extremely dangerous. You can't do it alone. We are preparing to send support, but time is limited. Please proceed with caution."
___________________


Start of rescue operation
Ninny reconsidered her plan and immediately began a rescue mission to receive assistance from the Jedi. It was extremely difficult to move within the stalemate disk, so it was decided that they would attempt to approach the battleship using special space equipment that had been prepared in advance.
``First of all, in order to loosen the gravitational pull as much as possible, we will adjust the dimensional energy and control the battleship's gravitational field as much as possible,'' Ninny said to himself. "Then we'll look for ways to send energy from outside to pull the battleship back."
In order to neutralize the battleship's powerful energy, Ninny brought his spaceship close to the battleship and began supplying it with energy using a tether. This process was extremely precise, and despite being affected by gravitational waves within the stalemate disk, as well as surrounding dust and meteorites, they were able to successfully begin supplying energy.
"Connection completed. Next, reverse the battleship's direction of travel," Ninny calmly orders, taking control of the ship. Before the battleship began to move, it tried to use its energy to ride the waves of gravity and correct its trajectory little by little. However, an unexpected problem occurs along the way.
"Why...! There's a sudden change in the gravitational field...!" Ninny exclaimed. The surrounding dust and meteorites were trying to force the battleship's direction of travel.
___________________


A desperate moment

Unable to stop the battleship from hurtling toward the center of the stalemate, Ninny temporarily lost control of the battleship. At that moment, the gravitational pull of the stalemate disk became even stronger, and the battleship's advance accelerated.
``Wait a little longer!'' Ninny tried desperately. "Why so much...?"
At that moment, what she saw was a red warning light emitted from the bridge of the battleship. Almost all systems on the ship went down, and the ship's movements became unpredictable. If the battleship were to be swallowed up by the center of gravity, everything would disappear.
``I can't retreat any further...!'' Ninny desperately gripped the control stick, sweating all over her body. At that moment, a band of light suddenly appeared from behind the battleship, and powerful energy was released.
"This is support from the Jedi...!" Ninny realized. Jedi scientists were directing energy into the battleship's direction. As a result, the battleship's advancing speed gradually slowed down, and it finally succeeded in escaping from the stalemate disk without being affected by gravity.
"Success!" Ninny cheered as she returned to the bridge of the battleship and breathed a sigh of relief along with the rest of the crew. The battleship was able to safely escape the stalemate disk and return to a stable orbit.
___________________


End and restart
After the battleship was safely evacuated, Ninny contacted the Jedi leaders.
"Ninny, well done," Dr. Alice called over the comm. "We're proud of you too."
"It's just a job," Ninny replies with a smile. "However, because the battleship was safe, it also helped stabilize the Jedi's dimensional energy. We were able to do this because of everyone's cooperation."
After receiving words of gratitude from the battleship's crew, Ninny prepared to depart for the next system.
``I wonder what kind of planet will be waiting for us next?'' Ninny smiled as she looked at the star map while sitting in the pilot's seat of the spaceship. “No matter where I am, I will always help.”
Chapter 43: The darkness of the black hole - beyond the swallowed universe

After rescuing the battleship and receiving words of gratitude from the Jedi, Ninny is about to depart for a new mission. There is still little information about the star system they are heading to next, so they don't know what dangers await them. Still, Ninny was determined to go anywhere.
``No matter how difficult it is, I will help.'' Ninny sits in the pilot's seat of the spaceship, steering it toward its next destination. Beyond the window, the endless stars shone quietly. In her mind are images of unseen planets and suffering people. However, at that time, something happened that instantly destroyed the peace of the universe.
Suddenly, a band of light appeared in front of them, and space began to distort. My vision became blurry, as if space itself was being distorted, and the positions of the stars began to gradually change. Ninny instantly sensed the danger and gripped the control stick.
"What... is this?!" Ninny quickly operated the console and checked the warning system. "This space is like being swallowed up by the gravitational waves of a black hole...!"
In front of me, pitch black darkness began to spread, and a huge black hole appeared at its center. The dark vortex that sucked everything in had the power to pull Ninny's spaceship towards its center.
___________________


black hole gravity
``Why is there a black hole in a place like this!?'' Ninny was worried, but calmly checked the status of the spaceship. However, no matter how hard we turned the rudder, the gravitational force was stronger and the spaceship was gradually drawn into the vortex.
``I can't escape from this...!'' Ninny continues to frantically operate the control stick, but the black hole's gravitational field is even stronger, and she intuitively understands that there is no way to escape.
"Alpha, Celia, everyone...are you okay?" Ninny murmured in her mind. Her space friends were also on board her ship. I pray that Celia, Alpha, and the crew of the battleship are safe, but my hopes are in vain. The entire ship is drawn to the black hole's gravitational pull, moving closer and closer to its center.

After rescuing the battleship and receiving words of gratitude from the Jedi, Ninny is about to depart for a new mission. There is still little information about the star system they are heading to next, so they don't know what dangers await them. Still, Ninny was determined to go anywhere.

black hole gravity

"Alpha, Celia, everyone...are you okay?" Ninny murmured in her mind. Her space friends were also on board her ship. I pray that Celia, Alpha, and the crew of the battleship are safe, but my hopes are in vain. The entire ship is drawn to the black hole's gravitational pull, moving closer and closer to its center.

``This is not just a coincidence... something is being drawn together intentionally.'' Even though Ninny is worried, she tries to analyze the situation calmly. However, as the surrounding space becomes more distorted and stars burst apart, Ninny finally faces a hopeless situation.
"The outer space itself is changing...! Is the black hole attracting something?"
___________________


To the center of the black hole
Just like that, Ninny's spaceship entered the center where everything was drawn to it. Visibility becomes completely black, and all the objects inside the ship float up due to the force of gravity and start rampaging. Amid the vibrations and sounds, Ninny tries desperately to control the ship, but it is no longer in her control.
“If this continues...everyone will be swallowed up...!”
The spacecraft will never return to its original state. Gradually, even the sense of time and space within the ship disappeared, and all I could do was feel everything around me accelerating, weightless.
"Is this...the center of a black hole...?" Ninny closes her eyes and intuitively senses the abnormality of this space. Her ship was completely engulfed by its gravitational pull.
___________________


Waking up in a strange space
Suddenly, everything seemed to stop and there was silence, and Ninny woke up. My vision went dark, and when the light returned, I found myself in an unfamiliar place. She was supposed to have been swallowed up by the center of the black hole, but she was standing in a strange space. Countless stars seemed to be floating nearby, and I felt as if time and space were distorted.
"Is this...?" Ninny looked around in surprise. She must have been swallowed up by the black hole. However, what unfolded before my eyes was a strange landscape that looked like nothing more than a fragment of space. It feels like countless parallel dimensions are interfering with each other in space.

``This is not just a coincidence... something is being drawn together intentionally.'' Even though Ninny is worried, she tries to analyze the situation calmly. However, as the surrounding space becomes more distorted and stars burst apart, Ninny finally faces a hopeless situation.
"The outer space itself is changing...! Is the black hole attracting something?"
___________________


To the center of the black hole
Just like that, Ninny's spaceship entered the center where everything was drawn to it. Visibility becomes completely black, and all the objects inside the ship float up due to the force of gravity and start rampaging. Amid the vibrations and sounds, Ninny tries desperately to control the ship, but it is no longer in her control.
“If this continues...everyone will be swallowed up...!”
The spacecraft will never return to its original state. Gradually, even the sense of time and space within the ship disappeared, and all I could do was feel everything around me accelerating, weightless.
"Is this...the center of a black hole...?" Ninny closes her eyes and intuitively senses the abnormality of this space. Her ship was completely engulfed by its gravitational pull.
___________________


Waking up in a strange space
Suddenly, everything seemed to stop and there was silence, and Ninny woke up. My vision went dark, and when the light returned, I found myself in an unfamiliar place. She was supposed to have been swallowed up by the center of the black hole, but she was standing in a strange space. Countless stars seemed to be floating nearby, and I felt as if time and space were distorted.
"Is this...?" Ninny looked around in surprise. She must have been swallowed up by the black hole. However, what unfolded before my eyes was a strange landscape that looked like nothing more than a fragment of space. It feels like countless parallel dimensions are interfering with each other in space.

``Could it be... has this come to another dimension?'' Ninny was speechless as she began to walk through the mysterious space. It feels like no physical laws govern anywhere in that space. Gravity, time, space - I felt like everything had been pushed into a different dimension.
"What are you doing here..." Ninny muttered. "All I wanted to do was help the planet..."
At that moment, a huge shadow suddenly appeared in front of me. It was not a human-shaped being, but a gigantic being made up of countless fluid energies. When the figure appeared as if breathing in light, Ninny was overwhelmed by its presence.
"I didn't know you were meant to be here," the being said in a deep voice to Ninny.
___________________


contact with new forces
"Are you...?" Ninny calmly asked the giant being. Its existence was a mass of countless energies, and even though it had no form, it felt like it contained a certain will.
"I am a being that transcends this universe. I am the one who transcends the walls of time and space and gives trials to those who are swallowed by the black hole."
When Ninny heard those words, she felt something shake inside her chest. “Trial?”
"Yes, a trial." the being continued. "It is not just a coincidence that you are standing here now. Your mission is to know the power of this dimension and master it."
"Dimensional power?" Ninny said, mulling over the words. "I still don't know what that means..."
The being beamed a beam of light towards Ninny, and the light permeated her body. Suddenly, something strange happened to Ninny's body, and she felt her inner power awaken.
"Is this...dimensional power?" Ninny felt the power in surprise. The energy flowing through her body began to move as if it were able to transcend dimensions and manipulate time and space, and she realized that she had acquired a new power.

``Could it be... has this come to another dimension?'' Ninny was speechless as she began to walk through the mysterious space. It feels like no physical laws govern anywhere in that space. Gravity, time, space - I felt like everything had been pushed into a different dimension.
"What are you doing here..." Ninny muttered. "All I wanted to do was help the planet..."
At that moment, a huge shadow suddenly appeared in front of me. It was not a human-shaped being, but a gigantic being made up of countless fluid energies. When the figure appeared as if breathing in light, Ninny was overwhelmed by its presence.
"I didn't know you were meant to be here," the being said in a deep voice to Ninny.
___________________


contact with new forces
"Are you...?" Ninny calmly asked the giant being. Its existence was a mass of countless energies, and even though it had no form, it felt like it contained a certain will.
"I am a being that transcends this universe. I am the one who transcends the walls of time and space and gives trials to those who are swallowed by the black hole."
When Ninny heard those words, she felt something shake inside her chest. “Trial?”
"Yes, a trial." the being continued. "It is not just a coincidence that you are standing here now. Your mission is to know the power of this dimension and master it."
"Dimensional power?" Ninny said, mulling over the words. "I still don't know what that means..."
The being beamed a beam of light towards Ninny, and the light permeated her body. Suddenly, something strange happened to Ninny's body, and she felt her inner power awaken.
"Is this...dimensional power?" Ninny felt the power in surprise. The energy flowing through her body began to move as if it were able to transcend dimensions and manipulate time and space, and she realized that she had acquired a new power.

``If you master this power, you will be able to uncover the true nature of black holes.'' The being said with a smile. "But in the end, it's up to you whether you use it or not."
___________________


Beyond the darkness of dimension
Once Ninny obtains this power, she sets out to challenge the mysteries hidden deep within the black hole and the truth of dimensions. She knew that no matter how powerful she was, there were still trials ahead.
"I won't stop until it's time to use this power," Ninny vowed to herself.
Chapter 44: NEWVE's success and Gigapolis' recovery - the future moving forward with a new group of companies
Gigapolis has successfully begun its recovery from the effects of the war and runaway dimensional energy. Alpha and Celia have been devising a plan for its revival, and have been making steady progress over the past few years. However, in order to truly rebuild Gigapolis as the center of the universe, the current methods were insufficient.
Therefore, Alpha proposed the establishment of a venture capital called ``NEWVE'' to attract cutting-edge technology from across the universe and bring together innovative companies. NEWVE was the key to the economic revitalization of Gigapolis, and its success was to become an important factor in determining the future of the city.
___________________


Establishment of NEWVE and its results
Based on Alpha's $2,000 trillion in assets, NEWVE gathered investments from all over the universe and provided funds to create a group of companies in a wide variety of fields, including dimensional energy technology, space infrastructure construction, and ecosystem restoration. Within a few months of its establishment, the number of companies participating in NEWVE has rapidly increased, with greater success than expected.
"I can't believe it..." Celia exclaimed in shock when she saw the latest data from NEWVE. "Over 100 huge companies have joined this project in just a few months."

``This is not just a coincidence... something is being drawn together intentionally.'' Even though Ninny is worried, she tries to analyze the situation calmly. However, as the surrounding space becomes more distorted and stars burst apart, Ninny finally faces a hopeless situation.
"The outer space itself is changing...! Is the black hole attracting something?"
___________________


To the center of the black hole
Just like that, Ninny's spaceship entered the center where everything was drawn to it. Visibility becomes completely black, and all the objects inside the ship float up due to the force of gravity and start rampaging. Amid the vibrations and sounds, Ninny tries desperately to control the ship, but it is no longer in her control.
“If this continues...everyone will be swallowed up...!”
The spacecraft will never return to its original state. Gradually, even the sense of time and space within the ship disappeared, and all I could do was feel everything around me accelerating, weightless.
"Is this...the center of a black hole...?" Ninny closes her eyes and intuitively senses the abnormality of this space. Her ship was completely engulfed by its gravitational pull.

Waking up in a strange space
Suddenly, everything seemed to stop and there was silence, and Ninny woke up. My vision went dark, and when the light returned, I found myself in an unfamiliar place. She was supposed to have been swallowed up by the center of the black hole, but she was standing in a strange space. Countless stars seemed to be floating nearby, and I felt as if time and space were distorted.
"Is this...?" Ninny looked around in surprise. She must have been swallowed up by the black hole. However, what unfolded before my eyes was a strange landscape that looked like nothing more than a fragment of space. It feels like countless parallel dimensions are interfering with each other in space.

``Could it be... has this come to another dimension?'' Ninny was speechless as she began to walk through the mysterious space. It feels like no physical laws govern anywhere in that space. Gravity, time, space - I felt like everything had been pushed into a different dimension.

At that moment, a huge shadow suddenly appeared in front of me. It was not a human-shaped being, but a gigantic being made up of countless fluid energies. When the figure appeared as if breathing in light, Ninny was overwhelmed by its presence.
"I didn't know you were meant to be here," the being said in a deep voice to Ninny.
___________________


contact with new forces
"Are you...?" Ninny calmly asked the giant being. Its existence was a mass of countless energies, and even though it had no form, it felt like it contained a certain will.
"I am a being that transcends this universe. I am the one who transcends the walls of time and space and gives trials to those who are swallowed by the black hole."
When Ninny heard those words, she felt something shake inside her chest. “Trial?”
"Yes, a trial." the being continued. "It is not just a coincidence that you are standing here now. Your mission is to know the power of this dimension and master it."
"Dimensional power?" Ninny said, mulling over the words. "I still don't know what that means..."
The being beamed a beam of light towards Ninny, and the light permeated her body. Suddenly, something strange happened to Ninny's body, and she felt her inner power awaken.
"Is this...dimensional power?" Ninny felt the power in surprise. The energy flowing through her body began to move as if it were able to transcend dimensions and manipulate time and space, and she realized that she had acquired a new power.

``This is more than I ever imagined.''Although he couldn't believe his eyes, Alpha was satisfied with his success. “There is no doubt that this will further accelerate the recovery of Gigapolis.”
The success brought by NEWVE was not only an increase in the number of companies, but also an unrivaled quality. Gigapolis gradually established itself as the economic and technological center of space, with companies at the forefront of dimensional energy technology, companies providing ultra-efficient clean energy, and companies dominating space communications technology participating.
"NEWVE was successful because we were heading in the right direction," Celia continued, analyzing the data. "It means that the efforts we have made so far have borne fruit. The day is near when Gigapolis' energy problems will be solved by making full use of dimensional energy technology."
___________________


Impact of over 100 participating companies
Among the companies participating in NEWVE, a particularly noteworthy group of companies were those related to dimensional energy technology and quantum communications. These companies have provided Gigapolis with the latest energy supply systems and technologies that dramatically improve energy efficiency. The impact has been to significantly reduce energy costs for the city as a whole, laying the foundations for a sustainable city.
"With this technology, we won't have to worry about energy problems anymore," Alpha said with satisfaction. "We can meet all of Gigapolis' energy needs. This will allow the city to achieve further development."
Furthermore, the development of space infrastructure using dimensional energy technology has begun, and a group of huge space stations will be constructed around Gigapolis. These stations were intended to support commercial operations throughout the universe, with Gigapolis gradually serving as an orbital hub.
``The position as the center of the universe will definitely belong to Gigapolis.'' Celia was confident in this vision as she looked to the city's future. "But we're just getting started."
___________________

New challenges and growth
Due to the success of NEWVE, Gigapolis rapidly expanded in size and strengthened its economic ties to the entire universe. However, this rapid growth also brought new challenges. The rapid expansion of cities has caused social unrest and widening disparities, necessitating further management and coordination.
"We have to be careful with this rapid growth," Alpha said in the council chambers. "Our goal is not just economic growth, but equal opportunity for all citizens."
Celia agreed with that point. "Indeed. While new companies and people with wealth are emerging, traditional citizens are not enjoying the benefits. I think it is necessary to introduce a new social system."
``How do we make that happen?'' Alpha muses.
“First of all, we need to improve education and welfare,” Celia continued. "Giving equal educational opportunities to all citizens. I think that is the first step to making Gigapolis a truly equal society."
``Okay, then I'll create a new budget that focuses on education and welfare.'' Alpha makes a decision. “Let's use NEWVE's funding and technology to create a plan to improve the quality of life for all citizens.”
___________________


Social reform and next steps
Alpha and Celia began making concrete plans for social reform in Gigapolis. By utilizing financial resources from the success of NEWVE and improving educational institutions and welfare facilities, the aim was to strengthen support for the poor and low-income groups and ensure that all citizens have an equal starting line.
Additionally, many of the companies participating in NEWVE are actively engaged in social contribution activities, and community contribution activities and environmental protection projects were carried out in collaboration with these companies.
``In order for Gigapolis to prosper in the truest sense, it is necessary to achieve harmony not only in the economy, but also in society as a whole.'' Alpha looked toward the future of the city with this thought in mind.

``If you master this power, you will be able to uncover the true nature of black holes.'' The being said with a smile. "But in the end, it's up to you whether you use it or not."
___________________


Beyond the darkness of dimension
Once Ninny obtains this power, she sets out to challenge the mysteries hidden deep within the black hole and the truth of dimensions. She knew that no matter how powerful she was, there were still trials ahead.
"I won't stop until it's time to use this power," Ninny vowed to herself.

___________________


The future of Gigapolis and the outlook of the universe
The success of NEWVE has opened new possibilities for Gigapolis. With over 100 companies participating, and dimensional energy technology and advanced infrastructure supporting the city, Gigapolis was achieving development that lived up to its name. Its position as the economic and technological center of the entire universe became more and more solid, and the city's reconstruction accelerated rapidly.
"What kind of future awaits us?" Alpha said quietly. "But we have the power to carve out that future."
"Yes," Celia nodded. "Gigapolis will become more than just a city, it will become a symbol of hope for the entire universe."
The future is expanding, and the rebirth of Gigapolis was just the first step in bringing new light to the universe. Beyond that, there are challenges and possibilities that are yet to be seen.
Chapter 44: Far Away - Alpha and Ninny's Farewell
She was keenly aware that Ninny had been caught up in a black hole and was completely separated physically from Alpha and the others. At that moment, her sense of time and space became distorted, and she was engulfed in darkness. In front of her was an overwhelming force that seemed to tear everything apart, but Ninny was not afraid of anything. It was like coming face to face with the truth of the universe. Even as she felt the sensation of transcending dimensions and disappearing from existence, she was ready for something new.

New challenges and growth
Due to the success of NEWVE, Gigapolis rapidly expanded in size and strengthened its economic ties to the entire universe. However, this rapid growth also brought new challenges. The rapid expansion of cities has caused social unrest and widening disparities, necessitating further management and coordination.
"We have to be careful with this rapid growth," Alpha said in the council chambers. "Our goal is not just economic growth, but equal opportunity for all citizens."
Celia agreed with that point. "Indeed. While new companies and people with wealth are emerging, traditional citizens are not enjoying the benefits. I think it is necessary to introduce a new social system."
``How do we make that happen?'' Alpha muses.
“First of all, we need to improve education and welfare,” Celia continued. "Giving equal educational opportunities to all citizens. I think that is the first step to making Gigapolis a truly equal society."
``Okay, then I'll create a new budget that focuses on education and welfare.'' Alpha makes a decision. “Let's use NEWVE's funding and technology to create a plan to improve the quality of life for all citizens.”
___________________


Social reform and next steps
Alpha and Celia began making concrete plans for social reform in Gigapolis. By utilizing financial resources from the success of NEWVE and improving educational institutions and welfare facilities, the aim was to strengthen support for the poor and low-income groups and ensure that all citizens have an equal starting line.
Additionally, many of the companies participating in NEWVE are actively engaged in social contribution activities, and community contribution activities and environmental protection projects were carried out in collaboration with these companies.
``In order for Gigapolis to prosper in the truest sense, it is necessary to achieve harmony not only in the economy, but also in society as a whole.'' Alpha looked toward the future of the city with this thought in mind.

However, within that consciousness, Ninny's heart was aware of a certain fact. That means that Alpha, Celia, and the people of Gigapolis will continue to believe in their reunion. Knowing this, Ninny faced the moment with a deep sense of relief. If we could meet again, it would be a miracle of the universe, and even if we could never meet physically, we were determined to keep that bond alive in our hearts.
___________________


Alpha Ignorance and Mind Acceptance
Meanwhile, Alpha didn't know that Ninny was caught in the black hole. After she disappeared, Alpha felt helpless. For several months after the battle, they tried everything possible to find her, but were unable to find any clues. In his heart, the hope that Ninny would come back was slowly fading, but he still believed that somewhere, somewhere, she was alive, or that he would see her again somewhere.
However, as Alpha looked at reality, he gradually realized that the possibility of that happening was extremely small. Somewhere in his heart, he began to realize that Ninny's return was no more than a hope. And that realization was Alpha's only way to maintain peace of mind, and became his motivation to continue fighting again.
"Ninny, no matter where you are, I'll never forget you," Alpha murmured quietly, imagining her in his mind. "I believe that wherever you are, you will be watching over me."
Gradually, he came to accept his "final farewell." He knew that even though he would never be able to see her physically, she would live on in his heart and the days they fought together would last forever. Alpha decides to continue believing that no matter where Ninny is, they will meet again someday, and secretly accepts their separation.
___________________


The flow of time and a new reality

"Utilizing dimensional energy and the latest technology to create the foundation that supports our society. This is the future we are aiming for," Celia said, renewing her determination to move forward to a new stage for the city.
___________________


The future of Gigapolis and the outlook of the universe
The success of NEWVE has opened new possibilities for Gigapolis. With over 100 companies participating, and dimensional energy technology and advanced infrastructure supporting the city, Gigapolis was achieving development that lived up to its name. Its position as the economic and technological center of the entire universe became more and more solid, and the city's reconstruction accelerated rapidly.
"What kind of future awaits us?" Alpha said quietly. "But we have the power to carve out that future."
"Yes," Celia nodded. "Gigapolis will become more than just a city, it will become a symbol of hope for the entire universe."
The future is expanding, and the rebirth of Gigapolis was just the first step in bringing new light to the universe. Beyond that, there are challenges and possibilities that are yet to be seen.
Chapter 44: Far Away - Alpha and Ninny's Farewell
She was keenly aware that Ninny had been caught up in a black hole and was completely separated physically from Alpha and the others. At that moment, her sense of time and space became distorted, and she was engulfed in darkness. In front of her was an overwhelming force that seemed to tear everything apart, but Ninny was not afraid of anything. It was like coming face to face with the truth of the universe. Even as she felt the sensation of transcending dimensions and disappearing from existence, she was ready for something new.

However, within that consciousness, Ninny's heart was aware of a certain fact. That means that Alpha, Celia, and the people of Gigapolis will continue to believe in their reunion. Knowing this, Ninny faced the moment with a deep sense of relief. If we could meet again, it would be a miracle of the universe, and even if we could never meet physically, we were determined to keep that bond alive in our hearts.
___________________


Alpha Ignorance and Mind Acceptance
Meanwhile, Alpha didn't know that Ninny was caught in the black hole. After she disappeared, Alpha felt helpless. For several months after the battle, they tried everything possible to find her, but were unable to find any clues. In his heart, the hope that Ninny would come back was slowly fading, but he still believed that somewhere, somewhere, she was alive, or that he would see her again somewhere.
However, as Alpha looked at reality, he gradually realized that the possibility of that happening was extremely small. Somewhere in his heart, he began to realize that Ninny's return was no more than a hope. And that realization was Alpha's only way to maintain peace of mind, and became his motivation to continue fighting again.
"Ninny, no matter where you are, I'll never forget you," Alpha murmured quietly, imagining her in his mind. "I believe that wherever you are, you will be watching over me."
Gradually, he came to accept his "final farewell." He knew that even though he would never be able to see her physically, she would live on in his heart and the days they fought together would last forever. Alpha decides to continue believing that no matter where Ninny is, they will meet again someday, and secretly accepts their separation.
___________________


The flow of time and a new reality

Alpha and Celia continued to rebuild Gigapolis. Amid the rapid economic growth and technological innovation brought about by NEWVE, the city's reconstruction progressed day by day. A group of newly participating companies utilized dimensional energy technology and quantum communication technology, and commercial activities aimed at the entire universe had begun in earnest.
``Gigapolis is rapidly developing,'' Celia said with great enthusiasm. ``But how reassuring it would have been if Ninny was there at that time.''
"I think about her more often," Alpha said, silently staring out the window. “But I believe she is still fighting somewhere.”
The two of them each held in their hearts the idea that Ninny was living on a distant planet, and together they built a future together. Even though they may not be able to physically meet each other for the rest of their lives, they worked hard in their respective places, feeling that their hearts were with each other. Both Alpha and Celia held her presence in their hearts as they continued to face their daily battles.
___________________


Ninny's choice - new power and the path to aim for
Ninny was swallowed by a black hole and ended up in an extradimensional space that seemed to transcend all of the universe. There, she felt the flow of countless particles of light and energy, and felt herself melting into one being. Power beyond dimensions flows, time and space become one, and her body gains new power within it.
``I wonder if I can't go back...'' Ninny asks herself as she is enveloped by that power. "But my presence will never disappear," she was sure. What I experienced at the center of a black hole was not just an end, but a sign of a new beginning. Her soul seemed to be guided by some great power that transcended her previous boundaries.
"Alpha, Celia..." Ninny called in her mind. She believed that the day would come when she would connect with them again and join forces. She understood that in order to do that, she must first overcome this dimensional barrier and obtain true power.

By mastering dimensional energy and awakening new powers, Ninny is no longer bound by physical limitations and has infinite possibilities. However, he also understood that using that power came at a price. Still, she was determined to keep going.
``My path is not finished yet.'' Ninny kept this power within her as she stepped forward into the unknown, in order to move on to the next moment.
___________________


Two people connected in their hearts
Alpha and Ninny were never physically able to meet again. However, their hearts were always connected. The path Ninny chose, and the path Alpha is walking. Even though they seemed to be going in different directions, their hearts were forever bound together by one bond.
``I'm sure you're still fighting somewhere.'' Alpha felt a ninny in his heart as he continued to walk forward.
``I will never forget the time I spent walking with you.'' Ninny also continued to think of Alpha in her heart. “Even if we are far apart, I can move forward because you are with me.”
As each of them built their future in their respective places, the love and trust they had for each other remained in their hearts forever. Although we may never be able to meet physically, our spiritual connection will never be severed.
And in its infinite expanses, the universe continued to quietly wait for the two to meet again.

Alpha made an important decision as the reconstruction of Gigapolis progressed. The goal was to create a place to pass on to future generations the chaos and destruction caused by the past ZAMLT (Zebra Aloe Oil Mammon Lurenz Tron) corporate alliance. The purpose is to record the many wars and abuses of dimensional energy caused by ZAMLT, and the sacrifices and suffering of people as a result, so that future generations can learn lessons to avoid repeating those mistakes.

___________________


Beyond the darkness of dimension
Once Ninny obtains this power, she sets out to challenge the mysteries hidden deep within the black hole and the truth of dimensions. She knew that no matter how powerful she was, there were still trials ahead.
"I won't stop until it's time to use this power," Ninny vowed to herself.
Chapter 44: NEWVE's success and Gigapolis' recovery - the future moving forward with a new group of companies
Gigapolis has successfully begun its recovery from the effects of the war and runaway dimensional energy. Alpha and Celia have been devising a plan for its revival, and have been making steady progress over the past few years. However, in order to truly rebuild Gigapolis as the center of the universe, the current methods were insufficient.
Therefore, Alpha proposed the establishment of a venture capital called ``NEWVE'' to attract cutting-edge technology from across the universe and bring together innovative companies. NEWVE was the key to the economic revitalization of Gigapolis, and its success was to become an important factor in determining the future of the city.
___________________


Establishment of NEWVE and its results
Based on Alpha's $2,000 trillion in assets, NEWVE gathered investments from all over the universe and provided funds to create a group of companies in a wide variety of fields, including dimensional energy technology, space infrastructure construction, and ecosystem restoration. Within a few months of its establishment, the number of companies participating in NEWVE has rapidly increased, with greater success than expected.
"I can't believe it..." Celia exclaimed in shock when she saw the latest data from NEWVE. "Over 100 huge companies have joined this project in just a few months."

``This is more than I ever imagined.''Although he couldn't believe his eyes, Alpha was satisfied with his success. “There is no doubt that this will further accelerate the recovery of Gigapolis.”
The success brought by NEWVE was not only an increase in the number of companies, but also an unrivaled quality. Gigapolis gradually established itself as the economic and technological center of space, with companies at the forefront of dimensional energy technology, companies providing ultra-efficient clean energy, and companies dominating space communications technology participating.
"NEWVE was successful because we were heading in the right direction," Celia continued, analyzing the data. "It means that the efforts we have made so far have borne fruit. The day is near when Gigapolis' energy problems will be solved by making full use of dimensional energy technology."
___________________


Impact of over 100 participating companies
Among the companies participating in NEWVE, a particularly noteworthy group of companies were those related to dimensional energy technology and quantum communications. These companies have provided Gigapolis with the latest energy supply systems and technologies that dramatically improve energy efficiency. The impact has been to significantly reduce energy costs for the city as a whole, laying the foundations for a sustainable city.
"With this technology, we won't have to worry about energy problems anymore," Alpha said with satisfaction. "We can meet all of Gigapolis' energy needs. This will allow the city to achieve further development."
Furthermore, the development of space infrastructure using dimensional energy technology has begun, and a group of huge space stations will be constructed around Gigapolis. These stations were intended to support commercial operations throughout the universe, with Gigapolis gradually serving as an orbital hub.
``The position as the center of the universe will definitely belong to Gigapolis.'' Celia was confident in this vision as she looked to the city's future. "But we're just getting started."
___________________

___________________

New challenges and growth
Due to the success of NEWVE, Gigapolis rapidly expanded in size and strengthened its economic ties to the entire universe. However, this rapid growth also brought new challenges. The rapid expansion of cities has caused social unrest and widening disparities, necessitating further management and coordination.
"We have to be careful with this rapid growth," Alpha said in the council chambers. "Our goal is not just economic growth, but equal opportunity for all citizens."
Celia agreed with that point. "Indeed. While new companies and people with wealth are emerging, traditional citizens are not enjoying the benefits. I think it is necessary to introduce a new social system."
``How do we make that happen?'' Alpha muses.
“First of all, we need to improve education and welfare,” Celia continued. "Giving equal educational opportunities to all citizens. I think that is the first step to making Gigapolis a truly equal society."
``Okay, then I'll create a new budget that focuses on education and welfare.'' Alpha makes a decision. “Let's use NEWVE's funding and technology to create a plan to improve the quality of life for all citizens.”
___________________


Social reform and next steps
Alpha and Celia began making concrete plans for social reform in Gigapolis. By utilizing financial resources from the success of NEWVE and improving educational institutions and welfare facilities, the aim was to strengthen support for the poor and low-income groups and ensure that all citizens have an equal starting line.
Additionally, many of the companies participating in NEWVE are actively engaged in social contribution activities, and community contribution activities and environmental protection projects were carried out in collaboration with these companies.
``In order for Gigapolis to prosper in the truest sense, it is necessary to achieve harmony not only in the economy, but also in society as a whole.'' Alpha looked toward the future of the city with this thought in mind.
