Chapter 45: Facing the past - Establishment of ZAMLT Museum
Alpha made an important decision as the reconstruction of Gigapolis progressed. The goal was to create a place to pass on to future generations the chaos and destruction caused by the past ZAMLT (Zebra Aloe Oil Mammon Lurenz Tron) corporate alliance. The purpose is to record the many wars and abuses of dimensional energy caused by ZAMLT, and the sacrifices and suffering of people as a result, so that future generations can learn lessons to avoid repeating those mistakes.

``Never forget the past.'' Alpha was deep in thought as he stood in front of the vast area in the center of Gigapolis. "Looking back at the time when ZAMLT was ruled by ZAMLT, how much it took away people's lives and affected the entire universe. The reason we are standing here now is because we overcame that past."
With this in mind, Alpha decided to establish the ``ZAMLT Archive'' to record in detail the past domination and collapse of the ZAMLT corporate alliance and pass it on to future generations. This museum aimed to be more than just an exhibition of the past, but also a place to delve deeper into ZAMLT's legacy and the impact it had.
___________________


Establishment of the museum and its purpose
The ZAMLT Museum was a huge structure built in the center of Gigapolis, and its design was a combination of futuristic beauty and traces of the past. The building made extensive use of metal and glass, and the interior displayed documents from the ZAMLT-era companies, war records, and materials related to the destructive use of dimensional energy technology. The exhibit also included speeches from top company leaders at the time and a detailed report on ZAMLT's impact around the world.
In establishing the museum, Alpha collaborated with Celia and experts and historians from the ZAMLT era to collect and verify information from the time. The process wasn't easy. Many of the materials had been destroyed or falsified. However, Alpha never gave up and remained determined to uncover ZAMLT's secrets.
``It was really difficult to collect all this material,'' Celia said as she organized a huge amount of data in a corner of the museum. “I am once again realizing how important it is to dig up the records of those who lived during that time.”

After rescuing the battleship and receiving words of gratitude from the Jedi, Ninny is about to depart for a new mission. There is still little information about the star system they are heading to next, so they don't know what dangers await them. Still, Ninny was determined to go anywhere.
``No matter how difficult it is, I will help.'' Ninny sits in the pilot's seat of the spaceship, steering it toward its next destination. Beyond the window, the endless stars shone quietly. In her mind are images of unseen planets and suffering people. However, at that time, something happened that instantly destroyed the peace of the universe.
Suddenly, a band of light appeared in front of them, and space began to distort. My vision became blurry, as if space itself was being distorted, and the positions of the stars began to gradually change. Ninny instantly sensed the danger and gripped the control stick.
"What... is this?!" Ninny quickly operated the console and checked the warning system. "This space is like being swallowed up by the gravitational waves of a black hole...!"
In front of me, pitch black darkness began to spread, and a huge black hole appeared at its center. The dark vortex that sucked everything in had the power to pull Ninny's spaceship towards its center.
___________________


black hole gravity
``Why is there a black hole in a place like this!?'' Ninny was worried, but calmly checked the status of the spaceship. However, no matter how hard we turned the rudder, the gravitational force was stronger and the spaceship was gradually drawn into the vortex.
``I can't escape from this...!'' Ninny continues to frantically operate the control stick, but the black hole's gravitational field is even stronger, and she intuitively understands that there is no way to escape.
"Alpha, Celia, everyone...are you okay?" Ninny murmured in her mind. Her space friends were also on board her ship. I pray that Celia, Alpha, and the crew of the battleship are safe, but my hopes are in vain. The entire ship is drawn to the black hole's gravitational pull, moving closer and closer to its center.

"There is much we need to learn and pass on to the next generation," Alpha replied, staring at a giant hologram posted on the museum's wall. "To what extent ZAMLT has distorted the universe and put our future in jeopardy. In order to prevent that mistake from happening again, we need to reveal everything here."
At the entrance of the museum, the most important events and turning points of the ZAMLT era were displayed along the chronological axis, allowing visitors to follow and learn about the history. At the center of the exhibit is a record of the development of dimensional energy technology and the wars and social collapse it caused.
"The misuse of dimensional energy during the ZAMLT era was a technological innovation, but it cost people their lives," Celia said, looking at materials related to dimensional energy. "We have to recognize the danger and think about how to deal with it in the future."
___________________


Reactions and social impact of museums
When the establishment and contents of the ZAMLT Museum were reported, it caused a huge reaction not only in Gigapolis but throughout the universe. Politicians, scholars, and citizens from many planets in the universe visited this museum to learn about its history, reflect on it, and confirm that it should sound an alarm for the future.
"It's amazing how much detailed information has been collected," a Jedi scholar said as he looked at the museum's exhibits. "You can learn how ZAMLT gained power on a cosmic scale and how profound the impact it had."
"And the challenge for the future is how we deal with that past," continued another scholar. "No matter how advanced ZAMLT technology is, it must be used within morally permissible limits."
Through this museum, Gigapolis not only records the past, but also spreads its significance throughout the universe, serving as a place to guide the future. Learning about the violent corporate control of the ZAMLT era and its effects has become a very important issue for the next generation, and Gigapolis has taken on a new role as a place of education.

By mastering dimensional energy and awakening new powers, Ninny is no longer bound by physical limitations and has infinite possibilities.しかし、その力を使うことには代償が伴うことも理解していた。それでも、彼女は進み続ける決意を固めた。
``My path is not finished yet.'' Ninny kept this power within her as she stepped forward into the unknown, in order to move on to the next moment.
___________________


Two people connected in their hearts
アルファとニニー、物理的には再び会うことはできなかった。だが、彼らの心はいつも繋がっていた。 The path Ninny chose, and the path Alpha is walking.それぞれが違う方向に進んでいるように見えても、二人の心は永遠に一つの絆で結ばれていた。
``I'm sure you're still fighting somewhere.'' Alpha felt a ninny in his heart as he continued to walk forward.
``I will never forget the time I spent walking with you.'' Ninny also continued to think of Alpha in her heart. “Even if we are far apart, I can move forward because you are with me.”
As each of them built their future in their respective places, the love and trust they had for each other remained in their hearts forever.物理的には一生会うことができないとしても、精神的な繋がりは決して断たれることはなかった。
そして、宇宙はその無限の広がりの中で、二人の再会を静かに待ち続けていた。
第四十五章: 過去と向き合う――ZAMLT資料館の設立
アルファは、Gigapolisの復興が進む中で一つの重要な決断を下した。 The goal was to create a place to pass on to future generations the chaos and destruction caused by the past ZAMLT (Zebra Aloe Oil Mammon Lurenz Tron) corporate alliance. The purpose is to record the many wars and abuses of dimensional energy caused by ZAMLT, and the sacrifices and suffering of people as a result, so that future generations can learn lessons to avoid repeating those mistakes.

``This is not just a coincidence... something is being drawn together intentionally.'' Even though Ninny is worried, she tries to analyze the situation calmly. However, as the surrounding space becomes more distorted and stars burst apart, Ninny finally faces a hopeless situation.
"The outer space itself is changing...! Is the black hole attracting something?"
___________________


To the center of the black hole
Just like that, Ninny's spaceship entered the center where everything was drawn to it. Visibility becomes completely black, and all the objects inside the ship float up due to the force of gravity and start rampaging. Amid the vibrations and sounds, Ninny tries desperately to control the ship, but it is no longer in her control.
“If this continues...everyone will be swallowed up...!”
The spacecraft will never return to its original state. Gradually, even the sense of time and space within the ship disappeared, and all I could do was feel everything around me accelerating, weightless.
"Is this...the center of a black hole...?" Ninny closes her eyes and intuitively senses the abnormality of this space. Her ship was completely engulfed by its gravitational pull.
___________________


Waking up in a strange space
Suddenly, everything seemed to stop and there was silence, and Ninny woke up. My vision went dark, and when the light returned, I found myself in an unfamiliar place. She was supposed to have been swallowed up by the center of the black hole, but she was standing in a strange space. Countless stars seemed to be floating nearby, and I felt as if time and space were distorted.
"Is this...?" Ninny looked around in surprise. She must have been swallowed up by the black hole. However, what unfolded before my eyes was a strange landscape that looked like nothing more than a fragment of space. It feels like countless parallel dimensions are interfering with each other in space.

``Could it be... has this come to another dimension?'' Ninny was speechless as she began to walk through the mysterious space. It feels like no physical laws govern anywhere in that space. Gravity, time, space - I felt like everything had been pushed into a different dimension.
"What are you doing here..." Ninny muttered. "All I wanted to do was help the planet..."
At that moment, a huge shadow suddenly appeared in front of me. It was not a human-shaped being, but a gigantic being made up of countless fluid energies. When the figure appeared as if breathing in light, Ninny was overwhelmed by its presence.
"I didn't know you were meant to be here," the being said in a deep voice to Ninny.
___________________


contact with new forces
"Are you...?" Ninny calmly asked the giant being. Its existence was a mass of countless energies, and even though it had no form, it felt like it contained a certain will.
"I am a being that transcends this universe. I am the one who transcends the walls of time and space and gives trials to those who are swallowed by the black hole."
When Ninny heard those words, she felt something shake inside her chest. “Trial?”
"Yes, a trial." the being continued. "It is not just a coincidence that you are standing here now. Your mission is to know the power of this dimension and master it."
"Dimensional power?" Ninny said, mulling over the words. "I still don't know what that means..."
The being beamed a beam of light towards Ninny, and the light permeated her body. Suddenly, something strange happened to Ninny's body, and she felt her inner power awaken.
"Is this...dimensional power?" Ninny felt the power in surprise. The energy flowing through her body began to move as if it were able to transcend dimensions and manipulate time and space, and she realized that she had acquired a new power.

``Visiting this allows us to take the past not just as a lesson, but as a warning,'' Celia said with satisfaction as she spoke with citizens who visited the museum. "The time will come when everyone will be required to make the right decisions based on this history."
Alpha also sympathized with these words and felt that ``this will be the foundation for building the next era.'' I was confident that the ZAMLT Museum would continue to have a great impact, not just as an exhibition facility, but as a place for re-education about the universe as a whole for the future.
___________________


The final blow hidden in the museum
However, there was another side to the ZAMLT museum. That is the fact that the secret data that ZAMLT had hidden was hidden deep within the museum. Alpha and Celia discovered the data and were carefully analyzing it. The data contained blueprints for a ``dimensional control device'' that ZAMLT had previously attempted. It was a device for intentionally manipulating dimensional energy, and if it had been completed, the balance of the universe could have been completely disrupted and ZAMLT's rule could have continued forever.
"If you use this, you will be able to manipulate dimensional energy..." Celia muttered while staring at the blueprint. "But if we were to create this device again, it would truly destroy the entire universe."
「だが、これを知ることができてよかった。」アルファが冷静に言った。 "From now on, we need to completely contain this technology to prevent it from being misused."
Alpha and Celia erased that data and took all possible measures to ensure that the "dimensional control device" that ZAMLT had previously attempted would never be revived again. The museum will continue to remain open and will play an important role in ensuring that the mistakes of the past are not repeated for future generations.
___________________


A new era and future for Gigapolis

The establishment of the ZAMLT Museum and the discussions it sparked had a new impact on the evolution of Gigapolis, and also sent a strong message to the universe as a whole. Recognizing the importance of looking back on the past and applying its lessons to the future, cities continued to value peace and harmony and moved forward to build the next era.
As Alpha and Celia continue to fight to create the future, they never forget the mistakes of the past, and with that weight in their hearts, they lead Gigapolis to the center of a new era.
Chapter 46: Creation of the Ceria Knights and new power struggle
While the reconstruction of Gigapolis is progressing and the city is steadily developing, new problems are also emerging. Alpha and Celia strive to learn from ZAMLT's past and create a new order for the entire universe, but not everything is smooth sailing. In particular, a faction that did not like Alpha appeared in Gigapolis and gradually strengthened its influence.
Meanwhile, Celia created a new organization, the "Knights of Celia," to protect the safety and order of Gigapolis. This organization organized military forces to protect the city, and was equipped with armaments that made full use of dimensional energy technology, and was structured to be able to respond not only to threats from external enemies, but also to internal rebellions and disorder.
"To protect the future of Gigapolis, we need our own strength," Celia said in her speech at the establishment of the Order. "We need to be prepared to fight not only external attacks, but also internal corruption and fraud."

Birth of the Ceria Knights

The Order of Celia gathered together warriors, strategists, and scientists with expertise in dimensional energy technology, and rapidly established an organization.

``The Knights are the guardians of Gigapolis, and at the same time they are responsible for maintaining its order.'' Celia conveys this philosophy to the members. "Our role is to confront any threat, stabilize the city, and protect its future."
As the name suggests, the Knights are a group of people who have undergone rigorous training and education, and have become an entity that keeps an eye on every corner of Gigapolis. They not only defended the city, but also functioned as watchdogs against injustice and corruption in society, and gradually became powerful within the city.
"We will protect the city with a different approach than Alpha," Celia said with emphasis. "But the ultimate goal is the same: to protect the peace and prosperity of Gigapolis and build its future."
___________________


Rise of a new enemy
As the Ceria Knights strengthened their power, forces that did not have a good opinion of Alpha gradually began to appear. These forces were wary of the growing power of capitalism and corporate alliances within Gigapolis, and questioned Alpha's leadership. In particular, those who did not support the peaceful methods advocated by Alpha and the spread of dimensional energy technology gradually became more and more opposed.
``Without Alpha, Gigapolis would run more efficiently.'' The leader of this faction, Katrina Veiros, was secretly expanding her influence by recruiting wealthy people and those with financial interests who did not support the city's reforms. Katrina criticized Alpha's idealism and insisted that the city's economic development should be given top priority.
"No matter how idealistic Alpha may be, we are the ones who actually run the city," Katrina said during a meeting with some corporate coalition leaders. "There are ways to make more money and run cities more efficiently using dimensional energy technology."

Conflict between the positions of the Ceria Knights and Alpha
The Ceria Knights were wary of the rise of those who took a different approach from Alpha, and gradually strengthened their presence. However, while the power of the Knights grows, the relationship between Alpha and Celia also becomes delicate. Alpha was concerned that the activities of the Celia Knights were going too far.
``Ceria, I think your method is certainly effective for maintaining order in the city,'' Alpha said at a meeting one day. "However, I'm worried that the Knights becoming too powerful will eventually lead to the division of Gigapolis."
"I understand that, too," Celia answered carefully. "But, Alpha, we need to be strong so we don't repeat the mistakes of that era. I think Gigapolis should become more independent."
"I know that, but having power and how you use it is important," Alpha replies. "What we want to create is a peaceful and fair society where everyone can live in peace. I'm sure you want that too."
Celia remained silent, but in her mind the conflict continued between Alpha's idealism and her own realistic approach. Celia believed that strong measures were needed to protect Gigapolis, but Alpha was concerned that doing so would lead to the city being divided.
___________________


The beginning of a new power struggle

As a subtle rift developed between Alpha and Celia, the power of Katrina Veiros and her supporters grew stronger. They sought to reform Gigapolis in a way that expanded the commercial use of dimensional energy and maximized the freedom of individual companies and individuals.
"The society Alpha is aiming for will only suppress individual freedom and slow the development of cities," Katrina said passionately among her forces. "With our reforms, Gigapolis can become more vibrant and shine as the economic center of space."
His words captured the hearts of many entrepreneurs and business people, and gradually gained their support. However, conflict with Alpha's desired society became inevitable, and Gigapolis became the stage for a new power struggle.
"The commercial use of dimensional energy can benefit the entire universe," Katrina said confidently, continuing to criticize Alpha's idealism. “We will create freer and more efficient cities.”
The future of Gigapolis is now at stake as a new power struggle centers around Alpha, Celia, and Katrina. Who is right and which will lead Gigapolis to a better future? That will be determined by the fierce battles to come.
Chapter 47: Establishment of the Knights of Katrina and intensifying conflict with Celia - new cultural changes in Gigapolis
As Gigapolis continued to develop, new contradictions and conflicts began to surface in the economy, politics, and society. In response to Alpha and Celia's vision of a society of peace and harmony, Katrina Veiros and her supporters have gradually strengthened their power, forming a force that seeks to take the future of the city into their own hands. In particular, Katrina rebelled against Alpha and Celia's policies, advocating "commercial use of dimensional energy," "expansion of free markets," and "independence of individual companies."

Finally, Katrina decided to establish a new knight order under her own flag, the Knights of Katrina. This Order is not just a defense organization, but a group with strong military and political power to protect Katrina's new ideals and economic freedom, and was established to usher in a new era for Gigapolis.
Birth of the Knights of Katrina
The Order of Katrina was originally founded to protect economic freedom and the expansion of new markets in Gigapolis. However, their activities gradually became more political and moved in the opposite direction from Alpha's ideals. Katrina gradually expanded her influence by recruiting her own corporate groups and supporters as members.
"We must have the power necessary to protect Gigapolis," Katrina said in the Order's inaugural speech. "Ours is an era of free markets and economic prosperity. We must not be ruled by Alpha's idealism. We must use our power to lead this city into a new future."
Within just a few months of its founding, the Knights of Katrina quickly gained power and began to exert their influence in strategic locations within the city. Her knights became a hindrance to Alpha and Celia's peaceful policy, and the conflict gradually deepened.
"If a being like Katrina were to take over Gigapolis, the city we aim for would be destroyed," Celia said, worrying about the progress. "She is in direct opposition to our ideals of an egalitarian society."
The Celia Knights continued to struggle to maintain order in Gigapolis, but as the Catrina Knights expanded their influence, the conflict gradually intensified and a clear division emerged between the two. Celia warns that the economic freedom and individualism advocated by Katrina will have a negative impact on the entire city, risking the collapse of order.

The escalating conflict between Celia and Katrina

The conflict between the Ceria Knights and the Catrina Knights was not just a battle over military strength, but began to become so intense that it shook the very foundations of society in Gigapolis. The Knights of Celia fought to protect order and equality, and the Knights of Catrina fought to protect free markets and corporate rights. Both sides believed that they were the most righteous and engaged in conflict.
"Celia, your idealism is a thing of the past," Katrina declared to Celia. "What we need now is free markets and competition. Gigapolis will not develop if we cling to idealists like Alpha."
``What I aim for is a society where everyone can live equally,'' Celia answered calmly. "Katrina, the freedom you speak of only benefits a few wealthy people. And as a result, society as a whole becomes distorted."
"That distortion is the proof of freedom," Katrina said firmly. "What we seek is true freedom. To compete, to grow, and to gain power. That's how we can make Gigapolis stronger and more prosperous."
The conflict between the two gradually caused social friction within the city, and citizens were also watching the developments closely. The Knights of Katrina gained support from businessmen and the wealthy, backed by powerful military power, and began to influence politics within the city. On the other hand, the Seria Knights continued to operate in a position closer to that of citizens, and continued to fight every day to protect order and equality.
Meanwhile, a new cultural shift was taking hold in Gigapolis. This gradually began to manifest itself in the form of the expansion of a ``feminine and masculine culture''.
___________________


Gigapolis's female-dominated culture
Under the influence of the Ceria Knights, a culture of ``female dominance'' was gradually spreading within Gigapolis. Celia herself became a symbol of this, and the number of citizens who supported her leadership increased. Under these circumstances, organizations and policies centered on women gradually became mainstream, and the expectations and responsibilities placed on men gradually increased, while at the same time women began to be given more authority.

``What we are aiming for is not a society where all genders are equally respected, but now a society centered on the power of women.'' Celia was working with this idea in mind. "We will put an end to the past history of male domination and create an era in which women will take leadership."
Katrina strongly objected to this. While emphasizing free markets and competition, she also argued that individuals should contribute to society through their abilities, regardless of gender. The ``free market'' that Katrina was referring to was a society in which all people had equal opportunities and free competition, and the position that those with power should rule, regardless of gender or social status.
"Gigapolis is a world of freedom and competition," Katrina openly stated. “There should be no discrimination based on gender, and people should be evaluated based on merit.”
This conflict gradually sparked a debate over gender and roles throughout the city. In industries and occupations that have traditionally been dominated by men, women have taken on more leadership positions, while men's roles have been reduced, and society's male-dominated culture has gradually changed, and instead a trend of ``female dominance'' has begun to spread.
This cultural change fundamentally shook the social structure of Gigapolis, and the conflict between Celia and Katrina was not just economic or political, but developed into a major conflict that changed the values ​​and structure of the entire society.
___________________


The next battle and the road to the future
The fierce conflict between Celia and Katrina has a huge impact on the future of Gigapolis, and which side wins will decide the fate of the entire city. The differences between Celia's female-dominated society and Katrina's free market society extend to the use of dimensional energy, economic development, and the structure of society as a whole, making the future of Gigapolis an increasingly important topic.

While Alpha quietly watched these changes, he continued to think about how to move Gigapolis forward in true prosperity and peace, according to the ideals he believed in. Chapter 45: Facing the past - Establishment of ZAMLT Museum
Alpha made an important decision as the reconstruction of Gigapolis progressed. The goal was to create a place to pass on to future generations the chaos and destruction caused by the past ZAMLT (Zebra Aloe Oil Mammon Lurenz Tron) corporate alliance. The purpose is to record the many wars and abuses of dimensional energy caused by ZAMLT, and the sacrifices and suffering of people as a result, so that future generations can learn lessons to avoid repeating those mistakes.

``Never forget the past.'' Alpha was deep in thought as he stood in front of the vast area in the center of Gigapolis. "Looking back at the time when ZAMLT was ruled by ZAMLT, how much it took away people's lives and affected the entire universe. The reason we are standing here now is because we overcame that past."
With this in mind, Alpha decided to establish the ``ZAMLT Archive'' to record in detail the past domination and collapse of the ZAMLT corporate alliance and pass it on to future generations. This museum aimed to be more than just an exhibition of the past, but also a place to delve deeper into ZAMLT's legacy and the impact it had.
___________________


Establishment of the museum and its purpose
The ZAMLT Museum was a huge structure built in the center of Gigapolis, and its design was a combination of futuristic beauty and traces of the past. The building made extensive use of metal and glass, and the interior displayed documents from the ZAMLT-era companies, war records, and materials related to the destructive use of dimensional energy technology. The exhibit also included speeches from top company leaders at the time and a detailed report on ZAMLT's impact around the world.
In establishing the museum, Alpha collaborated with Celia and experts and historians from the ZAMLT era to collect and verify information from the time. The process wasn't easy.多くの資料は破棄され、あるいは改竄されていたからだ。しかし、アルファは決して諦めることなく、ZAMLTの秘密を明らかにすることに執念を燃やし続けた。
``It was really difficult to collect all this material,'' Celia said as she organized a huge amount of data in a corner of the museum. 「あの時代を生きた人たちの記録を掘り起こすことが、どれほど重要か、改めて実感しているわ。」

"There is much we need to learn and pass on to the next generation," Alpha replied, staring at a giant hologram posted on the museum's wall. "To what extent ZAMLT has distorted the universe and put our future in jeopardy. In order to prevent that mistake from happening again, we need to reveal everything here."
At the entrance of the museum, the most important events and turning points of the ZAMLT era were displayed along the chronological axis, allowing visitors to follow and learn about the history. At the center of the exhibit is a record of the development of dimensional energy technology and the wars and social collapse it caused.
"The misuse of dimensional energy during the ZAMLT era was a technological innovation, but it cost people their lives," Celia said, looking at materials related to dimensional energy. "We have to recognize the danger and think about how to deal with it in the future."
___________________


Reactions and social impact of museums
When the establishment and contents of the ZAMLT Museum were reported, it caused a huge reaction not only in Gigapolis but throughout the universe. Politicians, scholars, and citizens from many planets in the universe visited this museum to learn about its history, reflect on it, and confirm that it should sound an alarm for the future.
"It's amazing how much detailed information has been collected," a Jedi scholar said as he looked at the museum's exhibits. "You can learn how ZAMLT gained power on a cosmic scale and how profound the impact it had."
"And the challenge for the future is how we deal with that past," continued another scholar. "No matter how advanced ZAMLT technology is, it must be used within morally permissible limits."
Through this museum, Gigapolis not only records the past, but also spreads its significance throughout the universe, serving as a place to guide the future. Learning about the violent corporate control of the ZAMLT era and its effects has become a very important issue for the next generation, and Gigapolis has taken on a new role as a place of education.

``Visiting this allows us to take the past not just as a lesson, but as a warning,'' Celia said with satisfaction as she spoke with citizens who visited the museum. "The time will come when everyone will be required to make the right decisions based on this history."
Alpha also sympathized with these words and felt that ``this will be the foundation for building the next era.'' I was confident that the ZAMLT Museum would continue to have a great impact, not just as an exhibition facility, but as a place for re-education about the universe as a whole for the future.

It was a device for intentionally manipulating dimensional energy, and if it had been completed, the balance of the universe could have been completely disrupted and ZAMLT's rule could have continued forever.
"If you use this, you will be able to manipulate dimensional energy..." Celia muttered while staring at the blueprint. "But if we were to create this device again, it would truly destroy the entire universe."
"But it's good to know this," Alpha said calmly. "From now on, we need to completely contain this technology to prevent it from being misused."

As Alpha and Celia continue to fight to create the future, they never forget the mistakes of the past, and with that weight in their hearts, they lead Gigapolis to the center of a new era.
Chapter 46: Creation of the Ceria Knights and new power struggle
While the reconstruction of Gigapolis is progressing and the city is steadily developing, new problems are also emerging. Alpha and Celia strive to learn from ZAMLT's past and create a new order for the entire universe, but not everything is smooth sailing. In particular, a faction that did not like Alpha appeared in Gigapolis and gradually strengthened its influence.
Meanwhile, Celia created a new organization, the "Knights of Celia," to protect the safety and order of Gigapolis. This organization organized military forces to protect the city, and was equipped with armaments that made full use of dimensional energy technology, and was structured to be able to respond not only to threats from external enemies, but also to internal rebellions and disorder.
"To protect the future of Gigapolis, we need our own strength," Celia said in her speech at the establishment of the Order. "We need to be prepared to fight not only external attacks, but also internal corruption and injustice."
___________________


Birth of the Ceria Knights
Although Alpha supported the establishment of the Ceria Knights, their objectives and activities were quite different. Alpha had always aimed for a peaceful resolution, and while Celia respected that philosophy, she felt the need for a stronger defense force and an organization with independent authority. The Order of Celia gathered together warriors, strategists, and scientists with expertise in dimensional energy technology, and rapidly established an organization.

``The Knights are the guardians of Gigapolis, and at the same time they are responsible for maintaining its order.'' Celia conveys this philosophy to the members. "Our role is to confront any threat, stabilize the city, and protect its future."
As the name suggests, the Knights are a group of people who have undergone rigorous training and education, and have become an entity that keeps an eye on every corner of Gigapolis. They not only defended the city, but also functioned as watchdogs against injustice and corruption in society, and gradually became powerful within the city.
"We will protect the city with a different approach than Alpha," Celia said with emphasis. "But the ultimate goal is the same: to protect the peace and prosperity of Gigapolis and build its future."
___________________


Rise of a new enemy
As the Ceria Knights strengthened their power, forces that did not have a good opinion of Alpha gradually began to appear. These forces were wary of the growing power of capitalism and corporate alliances within Gigapolis, and questioned Alpha's leadership. In particular, those who did not support the peaceful methods advocated by Alpha and the spread of dimensional energy technology gradually became more and more opposed.
``Without Alpha, Gigapolis would run more efficiently.'' The leader of this faction, Katrina Veiros, was secretly expanding her influence by recruiting wealthy people and those with financial interests who did not support the city's reforms. Katrina criticized Alpha's idealism and insisted that the city's economic development should be given top priority.
"No matter how idealistic Alpha may be, we are the ones who actually run the city," Katrina said during a meeting with some corporate coalition leaders. "There are ways to make more money and run cities more efficiently using dimensional energy technology."

Katrina and her supporters gradually began to influence the core of the city, forming a force that opposed Alpha and Celia. They sought further expansion of dimensional energy technology and its commercial use, deregulation of individual corporations, and new economic freedom. Their goal was to gain control of the city and transform it into a city that prioritized economic growth rather than the egalitarian society that Alpha was aiming for.
"The society Alpha dreams of would limit individual freedom and interests," Katrina said coldly. "We should transform Gigapolis into a freer and more vibrant city."
___________________


Conflict between the positions of the Ceria Knights and Alpha
The Ceria Knights were wary of the rise of those who took a different approach from Alpha, and gradually strengthened their presence. However, while the power of the Knights grows, the relationship between Alpha and Celia also becomes delicate. Alpha was concerned that the activities of the Celia Knights were going too far.
``Ceria, I think your method is certainly effective for maintaining order in the city,'' Alpha said at a meeting one day. "However, I'm worried that the Knights becoming too powerful will eventually lead to the division of Gigapolis."
"I understand that, too," Celia answered carefully. "But, Alpha, we need to be strong so we don't repeat the mistakes of that era. I think Gigapolis should become more independent."
"I know that, but having power and how you use it is important," Alpha replies. "What we want to create is a peaceful and fair society where everyone can live in peace. I'm sure you want that too."
Celia remained silent, but in her mind the conflict continued between Alpha's idealism and her own realistic approach. Celia believed that strong measures were needed to protect Gigapolis, but Alpha was concerned that doing so would lead to the city being divided.
___________________


The beginning of a new power struggle

As a subtle rift developed between Alpha and Celia, the power of Katrina Veiros and her supporters grew stronger. They sought to reform Gigapolis in a way that expanded the commercial use of dimensional energy and maximized the freedom of individual companies and individuals.
"The society Alpha is aiming for will only suppress individual freedom and slow the development of cities," Katrina said passionately among her forces. "With our reforms, Gigapolis can become more vibrant and shine as the economic center of space."
His words captured the hearts of many entrepreneurs and business people, and gradually gained their support. However, conflict with Alpha's desired society became inevitable, and Gigapolis became the stage for a new power struggle.
"The commercial use of dimensional energy can benefit the entire universe," Katrina said confidently, continuing to criticize Alpha's idealism. “We will create freer and more efficient cities.”
The future of Gigapolis is now at stake as a new power struggle centers around Alpha, Celia, and Katrina. Who is right and which will lead Gigapolis to a better future? That will be determined by the fierce battles to come.
Chapter 47: Establishment of the Knights of Katrina and intensifying conflict with Celia - new cultural changes in Gigapolis
As Gigapolis continued to develop, new contradictions and conflicts began to surface in the economy, politics, and society. In response to Alpha and Celia's vision of a society of peace and harmony, Katrina Veiros and her supporters have gradually strengthened their power, forming a force that seeks to take the future of the city into their own hands. In particular, Katrina rebelled against Alpha and Celia's policies, advocating "commercial use of dimensional energy," "expansion of free markets," and "independence of individual companies."

Finally, Katrina decided to establish a new knight order under her own flag, the Knights of Katrina. This Order is not just a defense organization, but a group with strong military and political power to protect Katrina's new ideals and economic freedom, and was established to usher in a new era for Gigapolis.
Birth of the Knights of Katrina
The Order of Katrina was originally founded to protect economic freedom and the expansion of new markets in Gigapolis. However, their activities gradually became more political and moved in the opposite direction from Alpha's ideals. Katrina gradually expanded her influence by recruiting her own corporate groups and supporters as members.
"We must have the power necessary to protect Gigapolis," Katrina said in the Order's inaugural speech. "Ours is an era of free markets and economic prosperity. We must not be ruled by Alpha's idealism. We must use our power to lead this city into a new future."
Within just a few months of its founding, the Knights of Katrina quickly gained power and began to exert their influence in strategic locations within the city. Her knights became a hindrance to Alpha and Celia's peaceful policy, and the conflict gradually deepened.
"If a being like Katrina were to take over Gigapolis, the city we aim for would be destroyed," Celia said, worrying about the progress. "She is in direct opposition to our ideals of an egalitarian society."
The Celia Knights continued to struggle to maintain order in Gigapolis, but as the Catrina Knights expanded their influence, the conflict gradually intensified and a clear division emerged between the two. Celia warns that the economic freedom and individualism advocated by Katrina will have a negative impact on the entire city, risking the collapse of order.
___________________


The escalating conflict between Celia and Katrina

The conflict between the Ceria Knights and the Catrina Knights was not just a battle over military strength, but began to become so intense that it shook the very foundations of society in Gigapolis. The Knights of Celia fought to protect order and equality, and the Knights of Catrina fought to protect free markets and corporate rights. Both sides believed that they were the most righteous and engaged in conflict.
"Celia, your idealism is a thing of the past," Katrina declared to Celia. "What we need now is free markets and competition. Gigapolis will not develop if we cling to idealists like Alpha."
``What I aim for is a society where everyone can live equally,'' Celia answered calmly. "Katrina, the freedom you speak of only benefits a few wealthy people. And as a result, society as a whole becomes distorted."
"That distortion is the proof of freedom," Katrina said firmly. "What we seek is true freedom. To compete, to grow, and to gain power. That's how we can make Gigapolis stronger and more prosperous."
The conflict between the two gradually caused social friction within the city, and citizens were also watching the developments closely. The Knights of Katrina gained support from businessmen and the wealthy, backed by powerful military power, and began to influence politics within the city. On the other hand, the Seria Knights continued to operate in a position closer to that of citizens, and continued to fight every day to protect order and equality.
Meanwhile, a new cultural shift was taking hold in Gigapolis. This gradually began to manifest itself in the form of the expansion of a ``feminine and masculine culture''.
___________________


Gigapolis's female-dominated culture
Under the influence of the Ceria Knights, a culture of ``female dominance'' was gradually spreading within Gigapolis. Celia herself became a symbol of this, and the number of citizens who supported her leadership increased. Under these circumstances, organizations and policies centered on women gradually became mainstream, and the expectations and responsibilities placed on men gradually increased, while at the same time women began to be given more authority.

``What we are aiming for is not a society where all genders are equally respected, but now a society centered on the power of women.'' Celia was working with this idea in mind. "We will put an end to the past history of male domination and create an era in which women will take leadership."
Katrina strongly objected to this. While emphasizing free markets and competition, she also argued that individuals should contribute to society through their abilities, regardless of gender. The ``free market'' that Katrina was referring to was a society in which all people had equal opportunities and free competition, and the position that those with power should rule, regardless of gender or social status.
"Gigapolis is a world of freedom and competition," Katrina openly stated. “There should be no discrimination based on gender, and people should be evaluated based on merit.”
This conflict gradually sparked a debate over gender and roles throughout the city. In industries and occupations that have traditionally been dominated by men, women have taken on more leadership positions, while men's roles have been reduced, and society's male-dominated culture has gradually changed, and instead a trend of ``female dominance'' has begun to spread.
This cultural change fundamentally shook the social structure of Gigapolis, and the conflict between Celia and Katrina was not just economic or political, but developed into a major conflict that changed the values ​​and structure of the entire society.
___________________


The next battle and the road to the future
The fierce conflict between Celia and Katrina has a huge impact on the future of Gigapolis, and which side wins will decide the fate of the entire city. The differences between Celia's female-dominated society and Katrina's free market society extend to the use of dimensional energy, economic development, and the structure of society as a whole, making the future of Gigapolis an increasingly important topic.

Katrina and her supporters gradually began to influence the core of the city, forming a force that opposed Alpha and Celia. They sought further expansion of dimensional energy technology and its commercial use, deregulation of individual corporations, and new economic freedom. Their goal was to gain control of the city and transform it into a city that prioritized economic growth rather than the egalitarian society that Alpha was aiming for.
"The society Alpha dreams of would limit individual freedom and interests," Katrina said coldly. "We should transform Gigapolis into a freer and more vibrant city."

The escalating conflict between Celia and Katrina

The conflict between the Ceria Knights and the Catrina Knights was not just a battle over military strength, but began to become so intense that it shook the very foundations of society in Gigapolis. The Knights of Celia fought to protect order and equality, and the Knights of Catrina fought to protect free markets and corporate rights. Both sides believed that they were the most righteous and engaged in conflict.
"Celia, your idealism is a thing of the past," Katrina declared to Celia. "What we need now is free markets and competition. Gigapolis will not develop if we cling to idealists like Alpha."
``What I aim for is a society where everyone can live equally,'' Celia answered calmly. "Katrina, the freedom you speak of only benefits a few wealthy people. And as a result, society as a whole becomes distorted."
"That distortion is the proof of freedom," Katrina said firmly. "What we seek is true freedom. To compete, to grow, and to gain power. That's how we can make Gigapolis stronger and more prosperous."
The conflict between the two gradually caused social friction within the city, and citizens were also watching the developments closely. The Knights of Katrina gained support from businessmen and the wealthy, backed by powerful military power, and began to influence politics within the city. On the other hand, the Seria Knights continued to operate in a position closer to that of citizens, and continued to fight every day to protect order and equality.
Meanwhile, a new cultural shift was taking hold in Gigapolis. This gradually began to manifest itself in the form of the expansion of a ``feminine and masculine culture''.

Chapter 48: Katrina's proposal and Alpha's decision - Birth of a new alliance
Although Gigapolis was rapidly developing, internal power struggles were becoming more and more intense. As the conflict between the Celia Knights and Katrina Knights deepens, the big question is how to guide the future of the city. Celia's social reforms and Katrina's free market principles collide, and as each expands their support base, Alpha's position becomes increasingly difficult.
Catrina Veiros gradually expanded her influence and became a strong voice in Gigapolis' economic and political affairs. She gathers people who want to counter Celia's idealism and take a more realistic approach, and begins to rebuild the city. Finally, he decides to negotiate directly with Alpha.
Without telling Celia, Katrina approached Alpha and proposed an alliance. This alliance was of great importance to Katrina, not just politically, but also in the fight for economic gain and control of the city.
___________________


Katrina's favorable conditions
Alpha valued a cooperative relationship with Celia, but the conditions Katrina brought to the table contained very attractive elements. Katrina has a concrete plan to strengthen Gigapolis's economy, and has demonstrated a more efficient way to use Alpha's proposed dimensional energy technology for commercial use.
"Alpha, if we join hands, we can develop this city further," Katrina said firmly. "I can provide the foundation for the peaceful society you aspire to. We should work together to bring about economic freedom and prosperity."

While Alpha quietly watched these changes, he continued to think about how to move Gigapolis forward in true prosperity and peace, according to the ideals he believed in. The difference in leadership between Celia and Katrina, while both of them are necessary for the city, creates a great conflict at the same time.
Chapter 48: Katrina's proposal and Alpha's decision - Birth of a new alliance
Although Gigapolis was rapidly developing, internal power struggles were becoming more and more intense. As the conflict between the Celia Knights and Katrina Knights deepens, the big question is how to guide the future of the city. Celia's social reforms and Katrina's free market principles collide, and as each expands their support base, Alpha's position becomes increasingly difficult.
Catrina Veiros gradually expanded her influence and became a strong voice in Gigapolis' economic and political affairs. She gathers people who want to counter Celia's idealism and take a more realistic approach, and begins to rebuild the city. Finally, he decides to negotiate directly with Alpha.
Without telling Celia, Katrina approached Alpha and proposed an alliance. This alliance was of great importance to Katrina, not just politically, but also in the fight for economic gain and control of the city.
___________________


Katrina's favorable conditions
Alpha valued a cooperative relationship with Celia, but the conditions Katrina brought to the table contained very attractive elements. Katrina has a concrete plan to strengthen Gigapolis's economy, and has demonstrated a more efficient way to use Alpha's proposed dimensional energy technology for commercial use.
"Alpha, if we join hands, we can develop this city further," Katrina said firmly. "I can provide the foundation for the peaceful society you aspire to. We should work together to bring about economic freedom and prosperity."

While Alpha quietly watched these changes, he continued to think about how to move Gigapolis forward in true prosperity and peace, according to the ideals he believed in. The difference in leadership between Celia and Katrina, while both of them are necessary for the city, creates a great conflict at the same time.
Chapter 48: Katrina's proposal and Alpha's decision - Birth of a new alliance
Although Gigapolis was rapidly developing, internal power struggles were becoming more and more intense. As the conflict between the Celia Knights and Katrina Knights deepens, the big question is how to guide the future of the city. Celia's social reforms and Katrina's free market principles collide, and as each expands their support base, Alpha's position becomes increasingly difficult.
Catrina Veiros gradually expanded her influence and became a strong voice in Gigapolis' economic and political affairs. She gathers people who want to counter Celia's idealism and take a more realistic approach, and begins to rebuild the city. Finally, he decides to negotiate directly with Alpha.
Without telling Celia, Katrina approached Alpha and proposed an alliance. This alliance was of great importance to Katrina, not just politically, but also in the fight for economic gain and control of the city.
___________________


Katrina's favorable conditions
Alpha valued a cooperative relationship with Celia, but the conditions Katrina brought to the table contained very attractive elements. Katrina has a concrete plan to strengthen Gigapolis's economy, and has demonstrated a more efficient way to use Alpha's proposed dimensional energy technology for commercial use.
"Alpha, if we join hands, we can develop this city further," Katrina said firmly. "I can provide the foundation for the peaceful society you aspire to. We should work together to bring about economic freedom and prosperity."

「君が言う経済的自由というのは、どういうことだ？」アルファは慎重に尋ねた。 Although he was skeptical of Katrina's rapid growth and aggressive attitude, he listened calmly to the proposal.
「私は、次元エネルギーを商業的に活用し、都市のインフラを全面的に再構築するプランを持っている。」カトリーナは続けた。 「君の理想を尊重し、僕が支援することで、君が目指す平等な社会を支えるための経済的基盤を作り上げる。」
カトリーナは、アルファが求めている社会的な公正と平等を守りつつ、自由市場によって都市をより効率的に運営する方法を提案してきた。その方法は、次元エネルギー技術を利用して、産業の基盤を強化し、Gigapolisを宇宙全体の経済圏として成長させるというものだった。
「君の理想と私の現実的なアプローチが組み合わさることで、Gigapolisは完全に新しい段階へと進む。」カトリーナはその目を輝かせて言った。 "By joining forces, we can tear down the old ruling structure and create a new order."
___________________


Alpha decisions and conditions
Alpha was deeply worried about Katrina's proposal.セリアと協力しながら進めてきた都市の発展計画に対し、カトリーナの提案があまりにも魅力的に思えたからだ。 Free market principles and the commercial use of dimensional energy technology had the power to drastically change the economy of Gigapolis.しかし、同時にその方法がセリアの目指す平等な社会と衝突する可能性も高いことをアルファは感じていた。
"I find your proposal appealing," Alpha spoke carefully after a long pause. 「しかし、セリアが目指す社会とどう折り合いをつけるかが問題だ。私は君の方法が正しいとは思うが、セリアとの協力関係を壊すわけにはいかない。」
Katrina followed up on this by saying: 「だからこそ、君に条件を提示したい。私たちが協力することで、セリアに対しても一定の譲歩を与え、彼女の理念を完全に否定しない形で進めていくことができる。」

``What do you mean by financial freedom?'' Alpha asked cautiously. Although he was skeptical of Katrina's rapid growth and aggressive attitude, he listened calmly to the proposal.
"I have a plan to harness dimensional energy commercially and completely rebuild the city's infrastructure," Katrina continued. "By respecting your ideals and supporting you, we will create an economic foundation to support the equal society you aspire to."
Katrina has proposed ways to run the city more efficiently through the free market, while preserving the social justice and equality that Alpha seeks. The method was to use dimensional energy technology to strengthen the industrial base and grow Gigapolis as a space-wide economic zone.
"Your ideals combined with my realistic approach will take Gigapolis to a completely new level," Katrina said with a twinkle in her eye. "By joining forces, we can tear down the old ruling structure and create a new order."
___________________


Alpha decisions and conditions
Alpha was deeply worried about Katrina's proposal. This is because Katrina's proposal seemed too attractive to the city development plan that he had been working on in cooperation with Celia. Free market principles and the commercial use of dimensional energy technology had the power to drastically change the economy of Gigapolis. However, at the same time, Alpha felt that there was a high possibility that this method would conflict with the egalitarian society that Celia was aiming for.
"I find your proposal appealing," Alpha spoke carefully after a long pause. "However, the problem is how to reconcile with the society Celia is aiming for. I think your method is the right one, but we cannot destroy our cooperative relationship with Celia."
Katrina followed up on this by saying: "That's why I would like to present you with some conditions. By working together, we can make certain concessions to Celia and move forward without completely denying her ideals."

``What do you mean by financial freedom?'' Alpha asked cautiously. Although he was skeptical of Katrina's rapid growth and aggressive attitude, he listened calmly to the proposal.
"I have a plan to harness dimensional energy commercially and completely rebuild the city's infrastructure," Katrina continued. "By respecting your ideals and supporting you, we will create an economic foundation to support the equal society you aspire to."
Katrina has proposed ways to run the city more efficiently through the free market, while preserving the social justice and equality that Alpha seeks. The method was to use dimensional energy technology to strengthen the industrial base and grow Gigapolis as a space-wide economic zone.
"Your ideals combined with my realistic approach will take Gigapolis to a completely new level," Katrina said with a twinkle in her eye. "By joining forces, we can tear down the old ruling structure and create a new order."
___________________

___________________


Alpha decisions and conditions
Alpha was deeply worried about Katrina's proposal. This is because Katrina's proposal seemed too attractive to the city development plan that he had been working on in cooperation with Celia. Free market principles and the commercial use of dimensional energy technology had the power to drastically change the economy of Gigapolis. However, at the same time, Alpha felt that there was a high possibility that this method would conflict with the egalitarian society that Celia was aiming for.
"I find your proposal appealing," Alpha spoke carefully after a long pause. "However, the problem is how to reconcile with the society Celia is aiming for. I think your method is the right one, but we cannot destroy our cooperative relationship with Celia."
Katrina followed up on this by saying: "That's why I would like to present you with some conditions. By working together, we can make certain concessions to Celia and proceed without completely denying her ideals."

Katrina proposed that Alpha and Katrina would take the lead in Gigapolis's economy, reducing the scope of the Celia Knights' activities. However, he has added the condition that he does not completely ignore Celia's authority and the social justice she was aiming for.
"We will take the lead, and Celia will continue to maintain security and order in the city," Katrina further explained. "And, as you wish, I will take measures to correct social disparities in the development of Gigapolis. To that end, I promise to use dimensional energy technology to expand its educational and medical infrastructure."
The proposal was easy for Alpha to accept. He felt that by combining his ideals with Katrina's realistic approach, Celia's ideals could be protected to some extent.
"Okay," Alpha agreed, albeit reluctantly. "I accept your proposal. However, I will respect Celia's opinion and proceed without conflicting with her."
___________________


Signs of conflict with Celia
Word of Alpha's agreement to an alliance with Katrina spread quickly within Gigapolis, and Celia saw it as almost a betrayal. Celia fears that with Alpha and Katrina joining forces, the future of the city will move more and more in the direction of capitalism and free marketism. Celia felt that this alliance would take Alpha away from his ideals and drastically change his political stance.
"Alpha, I can't believe you're teaming up with Katrina like this," Celia said quietly to him, deeply disappointed in his decision. "You swore back then that you would walk with me."
"Ceria, your ideals are not wrong," Alpha answered carefully. "However, when I think about it realistically, in order to lead Gigapolis to where it is now, we need to join forces with Katrina."

Katrina proposed that Alpha and Katrina would take the lead in Gigapolis's economy, reducing the scope of the Celia Knights' activities. However, he has added the condition that he does not completely ignore Celia's authority and the social justice she was aiming for.
"We will take the lead, and Celia will continue to maintain security and order in the city," Katrina further explained. "And, as you wish, I will take measures to correct social disparities in the development of Gigapolis. "Okay," Alpha agreed, albeit reluctantly. "I accept your proposal. However, I will respect Celia's opinion and proceed without conflicting with her."

___________________


Signs of conflict with Celia
Word of Alpha's agreement to an alliance with Katrina spread quickly within Gigapolis, and Celia saw it as almost a betrayal. Celia fears that with Alpha and Katrina joining forces, the future of the city will move more and more in the direction of capitalism and free marketism. Celia felt that this alliance would take Alpha away from his ideals and drastically change his political stance.
"Alpha, I can't believe you're teaming up with Katrina like this," Celia said quietly to him, deeply disappointed in his decision. "You swore back then that you would walk with me."
"Ceria, your ideals are not wrong," Alpha answered carefully. "However, when I think about it realistically, in order to lead Gigapolis to where it is now, we need to join forces with Katrina."

Celia was silent for a while, but then calmly spoke. "What we've been striving for is equality and order in Gigapolis. I can't accept that we're abandoning that."
At this moment, the two of them strongly felt that there was a distance between Celia and Alpha. His alliance with Katrina caused a serious rift in their relationship. What kind of consequences this would bring will become the biggest challenge for Gigapolis in the future.
___________________


The dawn of a new era and the next challenge
The alliance between Katrina and Alpha breathed new life into Gigapolis, while at the same time creating a conflict with Celia. The balance of power in the city's economy and politics has been disrupted, and its future course has become even more uncertain. As the commercial use of dimensional energy technology accelerates and free marketism becomes the dominant ideal of the city, the question becomes how Celia's ideals and Alpha's harmony will be realized.
"No matter what path we choose, conflict is inevitable," Alpha muses to himself. "But in the end, we must overcome any difficulties to protect the future of Gigapolis."
Celia, Katrina, and Alpha. The political battle between the three leaders and the social changes it brings will greatly influence the future of Gigapolis.
Chapter 49: The appearance of a new DAO force and the upheaval in Gigapolis
Gigapolis is reeling from a power struggle between Alpha, Celia, and Katrina, and a cultural shift as new forces emerge that will determine the city's future. These were a group called ``Jones Seifert,'' which advocated a new political and economic structure called a DAO (Decentralized Autonomous Organization), and another DAO called ``Lupinas,'' which emerged in opposition.

Celia was silent for a while, but then calmly spoke. "What we've been striving for is equality and order in Gigapolis. I can't accept that we're abandoning that."
At this moment, the two of them strongly felt that there was a distance between Celia and Alpha. His alliance with Katrina caused a serious rift in their relationship. What kind of consequences this would bring will become the biggest challenge for Gigapolis in the future.

Chapter 49: The appearance of a new DAO force and the upheaval in Gigapolis
Gigapolis is reeling from a power struggle between Alpha, Celia, and Katrina, and a cultural shift as new forces emerge that will determine the city's future. These were a group called ``Jones Seifert,'' which advocated a new political and economic structure called a DAO (Decentralized Autonomous Organization), and another DAO called ``Lupinas,'' which emerged in opposition.

DAO is an organization that aims for completely decentralized management and operation without a centralized government structure, and will use virtual currency and dimensional energy technology to expand its influence. These DAOs rapidly spread within Gigapolis, increasing their social and economic influence. The first to attract attention was an ultra-liberal DAO called ``Jones Seifert.''
___________________


The Rise of Jones-Seifert
Jones-Seifert was an organization with a strong affinity for the free marketism of Katrina Veiros, and their basic philosophy was based on ``total liberalism'' and ``the establishment of a decentralized economic zone.'' The members aimed to promote free trade and business activities within Gigapolis and eliminate government interference. They aimed to build a new economic zone based on dimensional energy and realize a society that respected individual freedom and independence to the utmost.
"Eliminate government interference and establish true market freedom." Jones-Seifert's statement resonated with many of the city's entrepreneurs and businessmen. "We will create a society where all citizens can compete freely, not a city ruled by idealists like Alpha."
Jones-Seifert quickly gained attention as his radical liberal ideas were supported by the ultra-liberal faction within Gigapolis. They attempted to use dimensional energy commercially and expand new economic activities through it, deepening their joint struggle with the Katrina faction.
“Katrina and our thoughts are one in the same,” Samuel Jones, president of Jones-Seifert, said at a press conference. "Free markets, personal responsibility and competition are the paths that will lead Gigapolis to true prosperity."
On the other hand, Jones-Seifert was often criticized for his radical liberalism. Their ideals aroused concerns that they would widen social disparities, and the Celia faction and its supporters were extremely wary.

DAO is an organization that aims for completely decentralized management and operation without a centralized government structure, and will use virtual currency and dimensional energy technology to expand its influence. These DAOs rapidly spread within Gigapolis, increasing their social and economic influence. The first to attract attention was an ultra-liberal DAO called ``Jones Seifert.''
___________________


The Rise of Jones-Seifert
Jones-Seifert was an organization with a strong affinity for the free marketism of Katrina Veiros, and their basic philosophy was based on ``total liberalism'' and ``the establishment of a decentralized economic zone.'' ___________________


The Rise of Jones-Seifert
Jones-Seifert was an organization with a strong affinity for the free marketism of Katrina Veiros, and their basic philosophy was based on ``total liberalism'' and ``the establishment of a decentralized economic zone.'' The members aimed to promote free trade and business activities within Gigapolis and eliminate government interference. They aimed to build a new economic zone based on dimensional energy and realize a society that respected individual freedom and independence to the utmost.
"Eliminate government interference and establish true market freedom." Jones-Seifert's statement resonated with many of the city's entrepreneurs and businessmen. "We will create a society where all citizens can compete freely, not a city ruled by idealists like Alpha."
Jones-Seifert quickly gained attention as his radical liberal ideas were supported by the ultra-liberal faction within Gigapolis. They attempted to use dimensional energy commercially and expand new economic activities through it, deepening their joint struggle with the Katrina faction.
“Katrina and our thoughts are one in the same,” Samuel Jones, president of Jones-Seifert, said at a press conference. "Free markets, personal responsibility and competition are the paths that will lead Gigapolis to true prosperity."
On the other hand, Jones-Seifert was often criticized for his radical liberalism. Their ideals aroused concerns that they would widen social disparities, and the Celia faction and its supporters were extremely wary.

``If the liberalism proposed by Jones-Seifert advances, the rich will end up with more power and the poor will be further left behind.'' Celia strongly refuted that statement. "Our goal is a society in which all citizens have equal opportunity."
However, Jones-Seifert gradually expanded his influence in the media in the city, and gained a lot of support, especially among young people.
___________________


Appearance of Lupinas and formation of counterforce
On the other hand, a new DAO called "Lupinas" emerged to counter the rise of Jones-Seifert. Lupines, unlike Jones-Seifert, was a group of people who placed greater emphasis on social justice and promoted economic freedom, but were wary of extreme free marketism. Their ideals called for ``balanced liberalism'' and ``regulations to protect social equality,'' aiming to achieve both economic development and social justice.
Lupinas' leadership is very mysterious, and it has not been revealed who the mastermind of the DAO is. As a result, Lupinas have been described as mysterious and fascinating by some, and have often attracted attention in the media. However, the people and organizations behind them were still shrouded in mystery, and their purpose and true nature were unclear.
“We aim to balance freedom and justice,” a Lupinas representative said in an interview. "Unlimited freedom only creates social inequality. We want to use dimensional energy to prevent uneven distribution of wealth and build a society where all citizens have equal opportunities."
Lupinas' argument was a departure from the free market doctrine advocated by Jones-Seifert, and aimed at building a more harmonious society. They argued that while utilizing dimensional energy, regulations and controls should be strengthened to curb excessive competition and guide corporate activities to fulfill their social responsibilities.

``If the liberalism proposed by Jones-Seifert advances, the rich will end up with more power and the poor will be further left behind.'' Celia strongly refuted that statement. "Our goal is a society in which all citizens have equal opportunity."
However, Jones-Seifert gradually expanded his influence in the media in the city, and gained a lot of support, especially among young people.
___________________

However, the people and organizations behind them were still shrouded in mystery, and their purpose and true nature were unclear.
“We aim to balance freedom and justice,” a Lupinas representative said in an interview. "Unlimited freedom only creates social inequality. We want to use dimensional energy to prevent uneven distribution of wealth and build a society where all citizens have equal opportunities."
Lupinas' argument was a departure from the free market doctrine advocated by Jones-Seifert, and aimed at building a more harmonious society. They argued that while utilizing dimensional energy, regulations and controls should be strengthened to curb excessive competition and guide corporate activities to fulfill their social responsibilities.

Lupinas' rise rapidly gained support within Gigapolis and began to challenge Jones-Seifert's influence. In particular, those who took a cautious stance on the ethical issues surrounding the use of dimensional energy gathered in Lupinas, and their activities rapidly spread.
___________________


Media influence and urban division
The media in Gigapolis gradually became a source of conflict between these two DAO factions, causing a situation in which the consciousness of the entire city was divided into two. Advocates of the "free market" doctrine promoted by Katrina and Jones-Seifert, who believed that free trade and competition would develop cities, came to fear Lupinas' "more regulation."
"What Jones-Seifert is aiming for is a free economic zone," some media outlets reported. "The commercialization of dimensional energy they promote will accelerate the prosperity of the city."
On the other hand, Lupine media outlets sounded the alarm about the social inequality brought about by Jones-Seifert's excessive free marketism. "Unlimited freedom ends up favoring the rich and making the poor poorer."
The media treated the two claims as contradictory, creating a deep division among the citizens of Gigapolis. As a result, political conflicts within the city intensified, and the issue of how to use dimensional energy technology and how much freedom it should have became a major issue.
___________________


Alpha's choice and future direction
Alpha was unsure which path to take as two forces, Jones Seyfert and Lupinas, rose to prominence. He worked with Celia to build the future of Gigapolis, but he was also drawn to Jones-Seifert's rapid economic growth and the allure of its free market principles. However, he also sympathized with Lupinas' approach to protecting social harmony and equality, and deciding which side to side with was a big decision.

Lupinas' rise rapidly gained support within Gigapolis and began to challenge Jones-Seifert's influence. In particular, those who took a cautious stance on the ethical issues surrounding the use of dimensional energy gathered in Lupinas, and their activities rapidly spread.

___________________


Alpha's choice and future direction
Alpha was unsure which path to take as two forces, Jones Seyfert and Lupinas, rose to prominence. He worked with Celia to build the future of Gigapolis, but he was also drawn to Jones-Seifert's rapid economic growth and the allure of its free market principles. However, he also sympathized with Lupinas' approach to protecting social harmony and equality, and deciding which side to side with was a big decision.

``Which path should I choose that will allow Gigapolis to truly prosper and maintain peace?'' Alpha was faced with his choice, surrounded by deep worries. He needed to see that both factions had their own values ​​and how to shape the future of Gigapolis.
Chapter 50: Celia's disappointment and the division of Gigapolis - Fierce battle between Celia faction and Catrina faction
The future of Gigapolis is greatly affected by Alpha's choices. The ongoing power struggle between the Jones-Seifert and Lupinas factions intensified, and Alpha's alliance with Katrina created a decisive rift in the city's political and social framework. Celia was deeply disappointed in Alpha, and this led to a complete breakdown in her relationship with Alpha.
The conflict between the Celia and Katrina factions was no longer limited to political disputes within the city, but developed into violent clashes throughout the city. The faction that sought to protect the equality and order that Celia aimed for opposed the radical free marketism of the Katrina faction, which had joined forces with Alpha, and gradually began to engage in violent conflict. On the street corners, Celia and Catrina factions were arguing, sometimes leading to physical confrontations, and the entire Gigapolis was being engulfed in turmoil.
Celia's decision and complete breakdown
Celia felt deeply that her relationship with Alpha was completely over. The idealism of Alpha, who once tried to build Gigapolis with her, has now chosen to join forces with Katrina to push for radical free-market reforms, a betrayal she cannot forgive. Celia was deeply disappointed in Alpha and completely lost trust in him.
"Alpha, I don't understand why you made this choice," Celia muttered to herself in the silence of the night. "You were supposed to walk with us, but by joining forces with Katrina, your ideals were destroyed."

``Which path should I choose that will allow Gigapolis to truly prosper and maintain peace?'' Alpha was faced with his choice, surrounded by deep worries. He needed to see that both factions had their own values ​​and how to shape the future of Gigapolis.
