Chapter 50: Celia's disappointment and the division of Gigapolis - Fierce battle between Celia faction and Catrina faction
The future of Gigapolis is greatly affected by Alpha's choices. The ongoing power struggle between the Jones-Seifert and Lupinas factions intensified, and Alpha's alliance with Katrina created a decisive rift in the city's political and social framework. Celia was deeply disappointed in Alpha, and this led to a complete breakdown in her relationship with Alpha.
The conflict between the Celia and Katrina factions was no longer limited to political disputes within the city, but developed into violent clashes throughout the city. The faction that sought to protect the equality and order that Celia aimed for opposed the radical free marketism of the Katrina faction, which had joined forces with Alpha, and gradually began to engage in violent conflict. On the street corners, Celia and Catrina factions were arguing, sometimes leading to physical confrontations, and the entire Gigapolis was being engulfed in turmoil.
Celia's decision and complete breakdown
Celia felt deeply that her relationship with Alpha was completely over. The idealism of Alpha, who once tried to build Gigapolis with her, has now chosen to join forces with Katrina to push for radical free-market reforms, a betrayal she cannot forgive. Celia was deeply disappointed in Alpha and completely lost trust in him.
"Alpha, I don't understand why you made this choice," Celia muttered to herself in the silence of the night. "You were supposed to walk with us, but by joining forces with Katrina, your ideals were destroyed."

Celia decided to stand by her beliefs in response to Alpha's actions. In order to protect her goal of social justice, she gave up on trying to get closer to Alpha and broke up with him completely. As a result, the Celia faction completely split from the Alpha faction, and Celia was forced to follow her own path.
"I believe that Gigapolis can still be saved," Celia told her friends. "I will continue to fight to prove Alpha's choice is wrong."
The Celia faction continued its activities to protect order and justice within the city, and gradually strengthened its presence as a force that opposed the Katrina faction. Celia believed that Katrina's radical free-market reforms would only destroy Gigapolis and widen social disparities. As a result, the Celia faction rebelled against the Katrina faction, and the conflict gradually surfaced throughout the city.
___________________


Gigapolis' Intensifying Conflict
As the conflict between the Celia and Catrina factions intensified, clashes began to occur frequently in the streets of Gigapolis. Pro-Celia activists began taking to the streets to demonstrate and protest in order to prevent the free-market policies promoted by the pro-Katrina movement. In response, the Katrinaists sought to use force to counter those who rebelled in defense of free-market ideals.
One day, a pro-Celian protest in the center of Gigapolis turned into a riot. Members of the Celia faction strongly opposed the Katrina faction, which was promoting commercial use of dimensional energy technology, and tried to protect their freedom of speech, while the Katrina faction insisted that the free market should be protected, and the two sides clashed. This caused chaos throughout the city, and the police and Knights intervened to try to quell the riots.
"We can't let this happen again!" a member of the Celia faction shouted as he charged toward the Katrina faction's base. “The future of Gigapolis is what we create!”

Celia decided to stand by her beliefs in response to Alpha's actions. In order to protect her goal of social justice, she gave up on trying to get closer to Alpha and broke up with him completely. As a result, the Celia faction completely split from the Alpha faction, and Celia was forced to follow her own path.
"I believe that Gigapolis can still be saved," Celia told her friends. "I will continue to fight to prove Alpha's choice is wrong."
The Celia faction continued its activities to protect order and justice within the city, and gradually strengthened its presence as a force that opposed the Katrina faction. Celia believed that Katrina's radical free-market reforms would only destroy Gigapolis and widen social disparities. As a result, the Celia faction rebelled against the Katrina faction, and the conflict gradually surfaced throughout the city.
___________________


Gigapolis' Intensifying Conflict
As the conflict between the Celia and Catrina factions intensified, clashes began to occur frequently in the streets of Gigapolis. Pro-Celia activists began taking to the streets to demonstrate and protest in order to prevent the free-market policies promoted by the pro-Katrina movement. In response, the Katrinaists sought to use force to counter those who rebelled in defense of free-market ideals.
One day, a pro-Celian protest in the center of Gigapolis turned into a riot. Members of the Celia faction strongly opposed the Katrina faction, which was promoting commercial use of dimensional energy technology, and tried to protect their freedom of speech, while the Katrina faction insisted that the free market should be protected, and the two sides clashed. This caused chaos throughout the city, and the police and Knights intervened to try to quell the riots.
"We can't let this happen again!" a member of the Celia faction shouted as he charged toward the Katrina faction's base. “The future of Gigapolis is what we create!”

Following the voice, pro-Seria groups surrounded pro-Katrina facilities and clashes intensified. The entire city was divided into two factions, and battles were fought in various locations. In the streets, troops carrying pro-Catrina and pro-Serian flags were pitted against each other, and the struggle seemed to be getting out of control.
___________________


A new strategy for the Katrina faction and the mobilization of NEWVE
The Katrina faction sought to strengthen its position and further expand its influence amidst the violence and conflict. They began to develop new strategies to strengthen Gigapolis' economic base and increase their influence over the city's core. In the midst of this, the Katrina faction decided to join forces with NEWVE, a group of start-up companies. NEWVE utilized dimensional energy technology to promote new commercial activities and sympathized with the free market ideals of the Katrina school.
“NEWVE will be a powerful weapon to protect our free markets,” Katrina said in a meeting with NEWVE representatives. "We will use dimensional energy commercially to accelerate the economy of Gigapolis. The future of the city we aim for can only be realized in freedom and competition."
NEWVE has succeeded in expanding its influence within Gigapolis, backed by its strong capital and dimensional energy technology. Katrina brought the startups into her fold and sought to transform the city's economy into one based on a free market.
“With the support of NEWVE, our free market will be even stronger,” Katrina said in front of the newly formed economic union. "The future of Gigapolis is in our hands."
___________________


Celia reaction and counterbuilding
The Celia faction strongly opposed the Catrina faction's inclusion of NEWVE, and began to strengthen its own position in response. Celia feared that the expansion of free marketism would destroy social justice in the city, and was determined not to allow the commercial use of dimensional energy technology to further marginalize poorer populations.

Celia decided to stand by her beliefs in response to Alpha's actions. In order to protect her goal of social justice, she gave up on trying to get closer to Alpha and broke up with him completely. As a result, the Celia faction completely split from the Alpha faction, and Celia was forced to follow her own path.
"I believe that Gigapolis can still be saved," Celia told her friends. "I will continue to fight to prove Alpha's choice is wrong."
The Celia faction continued its activities to protect order and justice within the city, and gradually strengthened its presence as a force that opposed the Katrina faction. Celia believed that Katrina's radical free-market reforms would only destroy Gigapolis and widen social disparities. As a result, the Celia faction rebelled against the Katrina faction, and the conflict gradually surfaced throughout the city.

___________________


Celia reaction and counterbuilding
The Celia faction strongly opposed the Catrina faction's inclusion of NEWVE, and began to strengthen its own position in response. Celia feared that the expansion of free marketism would destroy social justice in the city, and was determined not to allow the commercial use of dimensional energy technology to further marginalize poorer populations.

"We cannot give in to the free market that the Katrinaists are trying to advance," Celia told her comrades. "The future of Gigapolis lies in a society where all citizens thrive equally."
The Celia faction decided to create an extensive network throughout the city, regulate the use of dimensional energy technology, and institute new policies to protect social equality. They began to gather new supporters who agreed with Celia's cause, aiming for an even stronger unity to counter the radical reforms of the Catrina faction.
___________________


Gigapolis' Choice for the Future
Gigapolis is currently in turmoil in a battle based on two different visions. The difference in influence brought about by the Celia faction, the Katrina faction, and NEWVE behind them will greatly influence the future of the city. How will the fate of Gigapolis be decided as Celia's fight for social justice and equality intersects with Katrina's desire for prosperity through free markets and competition? That will be determined by the fierce struggle ahead.
Chapter 51: Outbreak of all-out war - Fierce battle between the Celia Knights and Katrina Knights
Gigapolis was no longer just a political conflict, but was about to erupt into an all-out war. The rift between Celia and Katrina deepens beyond repair, and war finally begins. Celia finally decides to fight, unable to allow Katrina to destroy social justice in Gigapolis by promoting free market principles.
``I can't stay silent any longer,'' Celia muttered to herself in front of the mirror. "Katrina's economic reforms will lead to the destruction of this city. The time has come for me to step down."
The Ceria Knights have been fighting for a long time to maintain order in Gigapolis, but the time has finally come for them to take their fight directly to the Catrina faction, namely the Catrina Knights. Celia became more determined than ever and instructed the soldiers of the Knights to prepare for battle.

"We cannot give in to the free market that the Katrinaists are trying to advance," Celia told her comrades. "The future of Gigapolis lies in a society where all citizens thrive equally."
The Celia faction decided to create an extensive network throughout the city, regulate the use of dimensional energy technology, and institute new policies to protect social equality. They began to gather new supporters who agreed with Celia's cause, aiming for an even stronger unity to counter the radical reforms of the Catrina faction.

Chapter 51: Outbreak of all-out war - Fierce battle between the Celia Knights and Katrina Knights
Gigapolis was no longer just a political conflict, but was about to erupt into an all-out war. The rift between Celia and Katrina deepens beyond repair, and war finally begins. Celia finally decides to fight, unable to allow Katrina to destroy social justice in Gigapolis by promoting free market principles.
``I can't stay silent any longer,'' Celia muttered to herself in front of the mirror. "Katrina's economic reforms will lead to the destruction of this city. The time has come for me to step down."
The Ceria Knights have been fighting for a long time to maintain order in Gigapolis, but the time has finally come for them to take their fight directly to the Catrina faction, namely the Catrina Knights. Celia became more determined than ever and instructed the soldiers of the Knights to prepare for battle.

"The time for battle has come," Celia tells the knight commander. "We cannot allow Katrina's free marketism. We will win this war to protect Gigapolis."
___________________


Intensification of fighting and destruction of NEWVE companies
When the Knights of Celia and Knights of Catrina finally clashed, Gigapolis was instantly engulfed in the vortex of war. The battle quickly spread from the city center to the outskirts, and explosive shockwaves using dimensional energy technology severely affected the city's infrastructure. The Celia Knights fought with all their might to completely defeat the Catrina faction, and occupied the Catrina Knights' strongholds one after another.
The battle continued day and night, with fierce engagements taking place in various parts of Gigapolis. The Ceria Knights used dimensional energy weapons to whittle down the Katrina faction's military strength, and gradually achieved victory after victory. However, the damage caused by this war was enormous, with the city infrastructure of Gigapolis destroyed and countless buildings collapsed. Many civilians were killed, and the city entered into a long battle to rebuild its economy and society.
In particular, the "NEWVE" group of companies, which the Katrina faction is proud of, was hit hard by the attack by the Celia Knights. NEWVE carried out commercial activities using dimensional energy technology and played an important role within the city, but its facilities suffered devastating damage one after another. A large number of mechanical facilities controlled by dimensional energy were destroyed by the Celia Knights' assault, and more than half of NEWVE's companies suffered catastrophic damage.
"I can't believe NEWVE was destroyed so easily," Celia's staff officer said while reporting on the situation. "The economic freedom and competition that Katrina was all about ended here."
After that, the Celia Knights continued to attack the remaining forces of the Katrina faction, and took control of the entire city. Celia was determined to completely stop those who were pushing for the commercial use of dimensional energy.
___________________


Katrina's counterattack and defeat

"The time for battle has come," Celia tells the knight commander. "We cannot allow Katrina's free marketism. We will win this war to protect Gigapolis."
___________________


Intensification of fighting and destruction of NEWVE companies
When the Knights of Celia and Knights of Catrina finally clashed, Gigapolis was instantly engulfed in the vortex of war. The battle quickly spread from the city center to the outskirts, and explosive shockwaves using dimensional energy technology severely affected the city's infrastructure. The Celia Knights fought with all their might to completely defeat the Catrina faction, and occupied the Catrina Knights' strongholds one after another.
The battle continued day and night, with fierce engagements taking place in various parts of Gigapolis. The Ceria Knights used dimensional energy weapons to whittle down the Katrina faction's military strength, and gradually achieved victory after victory. However, the damage caused by this war was enormous, with the city infrastructure of Gigapolis destroyed and countless buildings collapsed. Many civilians were killed, and the city entered into a long battle to rebuild its economy and society.
In particular, the "NEWVE" group of companies, which the Katrina faction is proud of, was hit hard by the attack by the Celia Knights. NEWVE carried out commercial activities using dimensional energy technology and played an important role within the city, but its facilities suffered devastating damage one after another. A large number of mechanical facilities controlled by dimensional energy were destroyed by the Celia Knights' assault, and more than half of NEWVE's companies suffered catastrophic damage.
"I can't believe NEWVE was destroyed so easily," Celia's staff officer said while reporting on the situation. "The economic freedom and competition that Katrina was all about ended here."
After that, the Celia Knights continued to attack the remaining forces of the Katrina faction, and took control of the entire city. Celia was determined to completely stop those who were pushing for the commercial use of dimensional energy.
___________________

___________________


Katrina's counterattack and defeat

Katrina was initially attacked by the Celia Knights and suffered an overwhelming blow, but the Katrina Knights, led by herself, desperately tried to fight back. Katrina rearranged her forces and prepared for the final battle to protect the free market of Gigapolis.
``I can't give in to Celia.'' Katrina renewed her resolve and gave words of encouragement to the soldiers of the Knights. "We are fighting to carve out a future for Gigapolis in freedom and competition. Our ideals will never give up."
However, due to the overwhelming superiority of the Celia Knights, Katrina's counterattack gradually lost its effectiveness. The soldiers of the Katrina Knights were at a disadvantage in terms of dimensional energy weapons and strategies, and were unable to withstand the attacks of the Ceria Knights, and were annihilated one by one. Eventually, Katrina's home base is taken over, and she herself is on the verge of being captured.
"We've come this far," Katrina muttered as the last stronghold was destroyed and the battle was coming to an end. "I believed that Gigapolis could be revived through free market principles, but I never expected it to end like this..."
Katrina was forced to admit defeat. Because Celia's strategy worked perfectly and her ideals won. The Ceria Knights completely took control of Gigapolis, and the Katrina faction suffered a devastating blow.
___________________


Victory of the Celia Knights and Rebirth of Gigapolis
With the victory of the Celia Knights, Gigapolis returned to a society based on Celia's ideals. Celia is determined to advance policies to protect order and fairness within the city and prevent excessive disparity caused by free market principles. Stricter regulations have been established for the commercial use of dimensional energy technology, encouraging its use in ways that prioritize the public interest.

Victory of the Celia Knights and Rebirth of Gigapolis

Stricter regulations have been established for the commercial use of dimensional energy technology, encouraging its use in ways that prioritize the public interest.

``Even though we won, we still don't know what will happen to the society we tried to build,'' Celia calmly said to Katrina after her defeat. "What we should aim for is equality and harmony throughout Gigapolis."
Even after the war ended, Celia continued to work hard to rebuild the city. Many challenges remained, including the restoration of the city's infrastructure, which had suffered catastrophic damage, support for victims, and efforts to find new uses for dimensional energy technology. Celia took steps to rebuild Gigapolis and create a more just and equal society.
___________________


Postwar Gigapolis and hope for the future
After the war ended, Gigapolis finally began to regain stability. Under the leadership of the Ceria Knights, the city was rebuilt, and policies were enacted one after another to protect order and equality. The free-market influence promoted by the Catrinaists was dispelled during post-war reconstruction, and Celia's philosophy that building a city's future required a society with equal opportunities for all citizens once again took over.
``This battle was a turning point for Gigapolis,'' Celia thought to herself as she walked through the city. “The time will come to test whether the society we have been striving for is really the right one.”
After that, Gigapolis continued to advance through many trials, but through Celia's faith and fight, they were able to find hope for a new future. Gradually, Gigapolis will be reborn as a society where all citizens can equally prosper, rather than a free-market one, and will pass on that ideal to the next generation of leaders.

Chapter 52: Alpha's downfall and Celia's complete control

Gigapolis entered a new era as post-war reconstruction progressed with the victory of the Seria Knights. However, in the process, Alpha's position gradually weakened, and eventually his presence was no longer tolerated in the city. Alpha, who once built Gigapolis together, completely split due to differences in ideology with Celia, and was ultimately destined to be exiled.
Alpha had a strong respect for Celia, but her alliance with Katrina, which promoted free market principles and the commercial use of dimensional energy, was a fatal mistake for him. It became clear to Celia and other citizens how much the path Alpha had chosen had had a negative impact on Gigapolis' society and economy.
"Alpha, Gigapolis has changed forever since you turned your back on us," Celia said to her former comrade. Her eyes were filled with sadness at having to get rid of her former friend. "But your presence here any longer will only be harmful to the city."
Only later did Alpha realize how much the decisions he made had an impact on the city's future. His alliance with Katrina to promote free markets not only upsets Gigapolis, but also completely destroys his own reputation.
Alpha's banishment
Alpha's reputation within Gigapolis plummeted, and his presence became increasingly unstable. Under Celia's guidance, the forces that supported Alpha gradually left, and Alpha finally lost his place. Celia makes the decision to completely eliminate Alpha in order to protect peace and order in the city.
"Alpha, your ideals are outdated," Celia said coldly. "The future you aimed for is not needed in the current Gigapolis. You should leave this city."
When Alpha heard those words, he felt deep disappointment in Celia, his former comrade and friend. However, he did not go against the decision and decided to leave Gigapolis.

Celia makes the decision to completely eliminate Alpha in order to protect peace and order in the city.
"Alpha, your ideals are outdated," Celia said coldly. "The future you aimed for is not needed in the current Gigapolis. You should leave this city."
When Alpha heard those words, he felt deep disappointment in Celia, his former comrade and friend. However, he did not go against the decision and decided to leave Gigapolis.

"I know," Alpha replied quietly. "My ideas don't fit with the future of Gigapolis that you're aiming for. That's why I should leave here."
Alpha has decided to leave Gigapolis. After that, no one knew where he was going. The leaders with whom Gigapolis was once built have now left the city and become a thing of the past. The consequences of his decisions and actions left deep scars on the city, but Celia was determined to continue on her own path.
___________________


Establishing control of Seria and incorporating NEWVE
Following Alpha's downfall, Celia established herself as the absolute ruler of Gigapolis. The Ceria Knights exercised their power and began to take unified control of the city's operations. Under Celia's leadership, Gigapolis gradually stabilized and began its path to prosperity.
With the Katrina faction almost completely disbanded, Celia was able to use the remaining resources and support to completely incorporate the NEWVE group of companies into her camp. Using dimensional energy technology, NEWVE became the most influential corporate group within Gigapolis, and their power was incorporated into Celia's control.
NEWVE's corporate group valued the free market, and Celia used their technology and funds to rebuild the city and create a foundation for a more just and orderly society. By supervising NEWVE's companies, Celia was able to establish complete control over the economy as well as control political power.
“By incorporating NEWVE, we have become even stronger,” said Celia, proud of her accomplishments. "Gigapolis is now in our hands."
Celia restructured the economy and society of the entire city by controlling NEWVE's corporate group and appropriately regulating the commercial use of dimensional energy technology. Under her leadership, Gigapolis gradually became the most stable city and enjoyed prosperity and peace.

___________________


Female-dominated society and Celia's policies

Under Celia's rule, Gigapolis underwent further transformation. Celia decided to give important positions to women in controlling the city's politics and economy, resulting in 90% of Gigapolis' key executives being women. This female-dominated society was established as part of Celia's goal of an equal society, and women's role within the city was increasingly strengthened.
"Gigapolis should be a place where women have power and lead society," Celia said with confidence in this policy. “We will build a society in which all citizens can thrive equally, never discriminated against based on gender.”
This change had a major impact on the social structure of the city, and Gigapolis took a new step as a society aiming for gender equality. Under his guidance, Celia developed a policy that prioritized fairness and harmony in society as a whole, while utilizing dimensional energy technology, and realized that philosophy.
Dissolution of Katrina faction and DAO faction
The Katrina faction and its supporting faction, the DAO faction, were completely disbanded. Katrina suffered a crushing defeat in the battle with the Celia Knights, and never regained her power. The city was wiped out of all insurgents and opposition, most of the Catrina factions were eliminated by Celia, and the remaining forces gradually lost power.
Katrina finally paid the price for her actions. She was captured and imprisoned in a prison within Gigapolis. Katrina, who once tried to guide the future of the city by advocating free market principles, was ultimately completely defeated by Celia, and her ideals were completely eliminated from the city.
"Your cause has had a profound impact on this city," Celia said as she met with Katrina in prison. "But the future we're aiming for doesn't need a mindset like yours."

Dissolution of Katrina faction and DAO faction
The Katrina faction and its supporting faction, the DAO faction, were completely disbanded. Katrina suffered a crushing defeat in the battle with the Celia Knights, and never regained her power. The city was wiped out of all insurgents and opposition, most of the Catrina factions were eliminated by Celia, and the remaining forces gradually lost power.
Katrina finally paid the price for her actions. She was captured and imprisoned in a prison within Gigapolis. Katrina, who once tried to guide the future of the city by advocating free market principles, was ultimately completely defeated by Celia, and her ideals were completely eliminated from the city.
"Your cause has had a profound impact on this city," Celia said as she met with Katrina in prison. "But the future we're aiming for doesn't need a mindset like yours."

Katrina had no choice but to accept his words silently. Her former power is gone, and she is unable to impose her ideals on the city's future. And the future of Gigapolis will move forward based on Celia's ideals.
___________________


A new era of Gigapolis
Under Celia's rule, Gigapolis entered a new era. A female-dominated society, regulation of dimensional energy technology, and a fair and harmonious society were realized, and cities rapidly developed. Celia did everything she could to protect the city's future, and as a result, Gigapolis became known throughout the universe as one of the most stable cities.
"The society we aspire to is one where all citizens can equally prosper," Celia said as she watched the city move forward. "This is our future."
Chapter 53: Celia's Golden Age and Alpha's Shadow
Two years have passed since Celia took control of Gigapolis. The city has achieved unprecedented economic, social, and cultural development, surpassing the glory of the ZAMLT era and now boasting a GDP of 20 quintillion dollars. Under Celia's leadership, Gigapolis has realized a new economic model that balances the proper use of dimensional energy technology with social justice, and the city has come to occupy an important position in the economic sphere of the entire universe.
Celia's net worth has also increased tremendously, reaching $5 trillion. By seizing control of the former ZAMLT group of companies and the emerging company NEWVE, and successfully operating dimensional energy technology commercially and stably, Celia has become a presence with tremendous influence both within and outside the city. Her wealth and power have become incomparable to the $340 trillion that Alpha once held, and the difference between them can be described as the difference between heaven and earth.

Katrina had no choice but to accept his words silently. Her former power is gone, and she is unable to impose her ideals on the city's future. And the future of Gigapolis will move forward based on Celia's ideals.

Chapter 53: Celia's Golden Age and Alpha's Shadow

Her wealth and power have become incomparable to the $340 trillion that Alpha once held, and the difference between them can be described as the difference between heaven and earth.

Several years have already passed since Alpha left Gigapolis. The former hero now lives a retired life, regretting his past decisions and distancing himself from the city. Alpha had lost its former reputation and its influence was rapidly declining. He lives a quiet life, remembering his past self, when he teamed up with Celia to build an ideal city.
``If I hadn't made the right choice then, I might have stayed in Gigapolis even now.'' Alpha thought while looking out the window in his room alone. "But I can't go back to that choice."
And Katrina remained in prison. Katrina, a former free marketist who tried to transform Gigapolis, completely lost her presence in the postwar city. Now that Celia's leadership is fully established, Katrina is unable to regain her influence and spends her days alone in prison.
``The future I was aiming for has completely disappeared,'' Katrina whispers in the prison where she is imprisoned. “At that time, if I had moved forward with Celia instead of rebelling against her, a different future might have been waiting for me.”

The Golden Age of Gigapolis

The staggering GDP of $20 quintillion was achieved by commercializing and efficiently operating dimensional energy technology. This success established Celia as a city leader with economic influence throughout the universe.
The NEWVE group of companies played an important role behind Celia's success. NEWVE commercialized dimensional energy and breathed new life into Gigapolis' economy. The group of companies utilized dimensional energy technology to achieve efficient production and infrastructure development, dramatically improving the productivity of the entire city. As a result, Gigapolis quickly became one of the most powerful cities in the cosmic economy, and its growth never stopped.

The Golden Age of Gigapolis
As the complete ruler of Gigapolis's economy and society, Celia led the city to stable prosperity. The staggering GDP of $20 quintillion was achieved by commercializing and efficiently operating dimensional energy technology. This success established Celia as a city leader with economic influence throughout the universe.
The NEWVE group of companies played an important role behind Celia's success. NEWVE commercialized dimensional energy and breathed new life into Gigapolis' economy. The group of companies utilized dimensional energy technology to achieve efficient production and infrastructure development, dramatically improving the productivity of the entire city. As a result, Gigapolis quickly became one of the most powerful cities in the cosmic economy, and its growth never stopped.

"I never thought this city could surpass the ZAMLT era," Celia said with satisfaction as she looked around the city. “This is the moment when our efforts take shape.”
While Celia made dimensional energy technology a commercial success, she established strict regulations for its ethical use and consistently promoted policies to protect social justice. Her policies succeeded in reducing social disparities while achieving urban prosperity. Under Celia's leadership, Gigapolis achieved both advanced technology and a fair social system, ushering in a truly new era.
“Gigapolis is in the hands of all of us,” Celia proudly said, passing on this belief to the next generation of leaders. "The future we aspire to should be one where all citizens can equally prosper."
___________________


Alpha's retired life and reflections
Meanwhile, Alpha is now living a quiet, retired life. Without regaining his former glory, Alpha deeply regrets that his choices were wrong. He vowed to build Gigapolis with Celia and agreed to commercialize dimensional energy technology. However, he was keenly aware of the fact that he ultimately teamed up with Katrina and tilted towards free marketism, causing chaos in the city.
``If I had fully supported Celia's policy back then, the outcome might have been different.'' Alpha muttered to herself in the quiet room where she had retired. "Gigapolis ended up in this shape because I was lost."
Alpha's wealth was vast, but it no longer satisfied him. He lost his reputation by abandoning his responsibility for the future of the city he once built, Gigapolis, and by joining forces with Katrina. Now, Alpha can only regret his past decisions and live a quiet life.

"I never thought this city could surpass the ZAMLT era," Celia said with satisfaction as she looked around the city. “This is the moment when our efforts take shape.”

``Ceria was really strong.'' Even though Alpha was living a retired life, he remembered the comrades he once walked with. "The society she was aiming for has now become a reality, and my decision has destroyed everything."
Alpha looked at himself, who had lost his past glory, and had no choice but to live out his days quietly. His thoughts no longer have the power to rebuild the city.
___________________


Katrina's imprisonment and endless regret
Katrina was once known as a reformer of the city who advocated free market principles, but with the defeat of the war and Celia's complete victory, her fate was completely sealed. The Katrina faction and its DAO forces suffered a devastating blow, and Katrina was eventually imprisoned in the Gigapolis prison.
"What was I doing?" Katrina muttered, alone in her prison cell. "You were supposed to be trying to change Gigapolis, and now you're spending your time in prison."
Katrina, who once tried to change the future of the city by advocating a free market, now realizes that her ideals have been defeated and that she too has met her end. As a result of her attempts to reform the city, she is isolated and completely excluded by Celia. In prison, Katrina has no choice but to regret her mistakes and accept that there is nothing else she can do.
"Was I wrong? Or...is the society Celia is aiming for really the right one?" Katrina asked helplessly, but the answer never came.

The future of Gigapolis

Now that Alpha and Katrina and their influence are a thing of the past, Gigapolis has taken a new step toward its future, growing even further as a city that aims to become the center of the universe in line with Celia's ideals.
Chapter 54: The Golden Age of Selinopolis and Selia's Rule as Emperor of the New Dimension
Several years have passed since Celia took full control of Gigapolis, and its economy and society entered an unprecedented golden age. Under Celia's leadership, the city has undergone rapid development, surpassing the glory of the former ZAMLT era and achieving astonishing growth with GDP reaching 2.5 quintillion dollars. In the process, the name Gigapolis gradually became obsolete and was renamed Selinopolis. Celia ascended the throne as the "Emperor of a New Dimension" in order to build the future of the city, and under that name declared the beginning of a new era.
``Gigapolis is now a city of the past. From now on, a new future will be carved out in our hands.'' Celia spoke these words at the Selinopolis renaming ceremony, symbolically proclaiming the city's transformation. "As the Emperor of the new dimension, I will lead this city to the center of the universe."
Celia's accession to the throne was not just symbolic, but actually the first step toward building a new system to govern the entire city in a unified manner. The commercialization of dimensional energy technology, its regulation, and policies to protect social justice are on track, and Selinopolis, as its name suggests, has established itself as a new dimensional city.
Celia's accession to the throne as a new-dimensional emperor and the reform of the city
With Selia's accession to the throne as Emperor of the New Dimension, Selinopolis was ruled under a more consistent policy than ever before. Under Celia's leadership, the city achieved even more advanced technology and sustainable economic development, while optimizing dimensional energy technology and maintaining strict regulations for its ethical use. She took control of the city's economy and society and made it her top priority to create a society where all citizens could equally prosper.

Now that Alpha and Katrina and their influence are a thing of the past, Gigapolis has taken a new step toward its future, growing even further as a city that aims to become the center of the universe in line with Celia's ideals.

Chapter 54: The Golden Age of Selinopolis and Selia's Rule as Emperor of the New Dimension

Celia's accession to the throne as a new-dimensional emperor and the reform of the city

Under Celia's leadership, the city achieved even more advanced technology and sustainable economic development, while optimizing dimensional energy technology and maintaining strict regulations for its ethical use. She took control of the city's economy and society and made it her top priority to create a society where all citizens could equally prosper.

``As Emperor of the New Dimension, I will create an environment where all citizens can live equally.'' Celia once again expressed this belief in her speech. ``The society I aim for must be one that values freedom and competition, but also one where everyone has opportunities.''
Selia's reforms put Selinopolis on a new economic foundation using dimensional energy technology, and its GDP grew tremendously. The efficient use of dimensional energy has dramatically improved the infrastructure of entire cities, accelerating the development of commercial activities and industry. As a result, the GDP of 2.5 quintillion dollars is no longer just a number, but an actual reflection of the city's economic strength.
Additionally, in order to support her own policies, Celia focused her efforts on building infrastructure using dimensional energy in order to build the foundations of a new city. In order to create a society where all citizens had equal access to education and medical care, she reformed the education and welfare systems, and Selinopolis became a city that was socially enriched in proportion to its economic development.
___________________


The dismantling of NEWVE and the birth of Phovos
As Seria's reforms progressed, the former NEWVE corporate group was completely disbanded, and a new super-giant corporate nation, Phovos, was born. Phovos formed a new economic zone based on dimensional energy technology, and its scale and influence far exceeded that of NEWVE. Phovos further commercialized dimensional energy, expanding its influence within and beyond the city.
"The NEWVE group of companies has been disbanded and a new national group of companies called Phovos has been created," Celia announced, declaring that Phovos would become the core of Selinopolis' economy. "Phovos is a group of companies at the cutting edge of dimensional energy technology that will be essential to the development of our cities."

``As Emperor of the New Dimension, I will create an environment where all citizens can live equally.'' Celia once again expressed this belief in her speech. ``The society I aim for must be one that values freedom and competition, but also one where everyone has opportunities.''
Selia's reforms put Selinopolis on a new economic foundation using dimensional energy technology, and its GDP grew tremendously. The efficient use of dimensional energy has dramatically improved the infrastructure of entire cities, accelerating the development of commercial activities and industry. As a result, the GDP of 2.5 quintillion dollars is no longer just a number, but an actual reflection of the city's economic strength.
Additionally, in order to support her own policies, Celia focused her efforts on building infrastructure using dimensional energy in order to build the foundations of a new city. In order to create a society where all citizens had equal access to education and medical care, she reformed the education and welfare systems, and Selinopolis became a city that was socially enriched in proportion to its economic development.
___________________


The dismantling of NEWVE and the birth of Phovos
As Seria's reforms progressed, the former NEWVE corporate group was completely disbanded, and a new super-giant corporate nation, Phovos, was born. Phovos formed a new economic zone based on dimensional energy technology, and its scale and influence far exceeded that of NEWVE. Phovos further commercialized dimensional energy, expanding its influence within and beyond the city.
"The NEWVE group of companies has been disbanded and a new national group of companies called Phovos has been created," Celia announced, declaring that Phovos would become the core of Selinopolis' economy. "Phovos is a group of companies at the cutting edge of dimensional energy technology that will be essential to the development of our cities."

``As Emperor of the New Dimension, I will create an environment where all citizens can live equally.'' Celia once again expressed this belief in her speech. ``The society I aim for must be one that values freedom and competition, but also one where everyone has opportunities.''
Selia's reforms put Selinopolis on a new economic foundation using dimensional energy technology, and its GDP grew tremendously. The dismantling of NEWVE and the birth of Phovos
As Seria's reforms progressed, the former NEWVE corporate group was completely disbanded, and a new super-giant corporate nation, Phovos, was born. Phovos formed a new economic zone based on dimensional energy technology, and its scale and influence far exceeded that of NEWVE. Phovos further commercialized dimensional energy, expanding its influence within and beyond the city.
"The NEWVE group of companies has been disbanded and a new national group of companies called Phovos has been created," Celia announced, declaring that Phovos would become the core of Selinopolis' economy. "Phovos is a group of companies at the cutting edge of dimensional energy technology that will be essential to the development of our cities."

Through the advanced operation of dimensional energy technology, Phovos accelerated commercial activities and played an important role in supporting Selinopolis' GDP. A new group of companies provided products and services that efficiently utilized dimensional energy, and strengthened their influence in various areas of the city. Due to its size, Phovos began to have influence comparable to that of the government, effectively controlling the city's economy.
"The success of Phovos is the power that will support our future." Celia spoke in front of the newly born Phovos, talking about the endless possibilities of urban prosperity and the commercialization of dimensional energy technology. "This is the key to unlocking the future of dimensions."
___________________


Women-led societies and the dominance of Phovos
In Selinopolis, under Selia's rule, women increasingly played important roles as social leaders. Ninety percent of key executives were women, and women demonstrated leadership in all areas of the city. The advancement of women was not just symbolic; it actually became a driving force in the city's economy and politics.
"Gigapolis, or rather Selinopolis, has become a city where women are empowered," Celia said, proud of the policy. "We are overcoming the unequal society of the past and building a new era led by women."
Celia became a symbol of a female-dominated society, continuing to pursue policies of social equality and harmony while commercializing dimensional energy technology. Selinopolis boasted an overwhelming advantage over other city-states as a new society that combined the technological innovations of dimensional energy and the power of women.
Phovos became a strong backbone for women's leadership within the city, further expanding their economic power and influence. By making dimensional energy technology a commercial success, Phovos supported the economy of Selinopolis and created the foundation for a new society centered around women.

___________________


The fate of Katrina and the stability of Selinopolis
Meanwhile, Katrina, the former free marketer and reformer of Gigapolis, remains in prison. Completely powerless due to the war and subsequent defeat, Katrina is now imprisoned as a shadow of her past, and her ideas have been completely eliminated from the city.
``The future I was aiming for is now completely gone,'' Katrina thought in prison, thinking about her failure. "I have no power in a city ruled by Celia."
Katrina had no choice but to resign herself to her fate, feeling deep remorse for the new order that Celia had built. Her ideals no longer reach anyone's hearts, and she no longer has any influence on the future of Gigapolis, or indeed Selinopolis.
___________________


The future of Selinopolis
With Selia's accession to the throne and subsequent reforms, Selinopolis entered a completely new era. By commercializing dimensional energy technology and creating a society led by women, cities achieved unprecedented development. As Emperor of the New Dimension, Celia demonstrated her leadership, created a super-giant corporate state called Phovos, and restructured the economy and society of the entire city.
"We have the power to open up the future," Celia said, looking toward that future with confidence. "Selinopolis becomes the center of a new era of dimensional energy and feminine power."
Selinopolis established itself as the center of the universe through its technology, philosophy, and new social order, and used dimensional energy to open up a new future.
Chapter 55: The Visit of Kvaris and the Future of Selinopolis

The future of Selinopolis
With Selia's accession to the throne and subsequent reforms, Selinopolis entered a completely new era. By commercializing dimensional energy technology and creating a society led by women, cities achieved unprecedented development. As Emperor of the New Dimension, Celia demonstrated her leadership, created a super-giant corporate state called Phovos, and restructured the economy and society of the entire city.
"We have the power to open up the future," Celia said, looking toward that future with confidence. "Selinopolis will be the center of a new era of dimensional energy and feminine power."
Selinopolis established itself as the center of the universe through its technology, philosophy, and new social order, and used dimensional energy to open up a new future.
Chapter 55: The Visit of Kvaris and the Future of Selinopolis

Selinopolis has flourished under Celia's strong leadership, spreading its presence throughout the universe as a city of a new era that balances the commercialization of dimensional energy technology with social justice. However, no matter how much a city developed, it was necessary to aim for evolution to the next stage. Celia looks to the future and decides to make the next big move. That person was Kvaris, a visitor from the J13 system who had once reached out to Gigapolis.
Kvaris built a huge ecosystem called "Ronaworld" in the J13 series with a GDP of 1.3 quintillion dollars, and its economic influence was comparable to Selinopolis. Ronaworld has achieved overwhelming dominance within the J13 system by creating an innovative ecosystem that makes full use of dimensional energy technology and efficiently circulating materials and supplying energy. The size of the economic zone was also remarkable for Selinopolis.
Celia thought that they should pursue economic cooperation with Ronaworld and aim for further development of Selinopolis. The J13 series is one of the top in the universe in terms of its economic scale, and Celia believed that the partnership with this huge ecosystem, established under Kvaris's leadership, would be an important element in determining the next stage of Selinopolis.
Therefore, Celia decided to send a formal invitation to Kvaris and made preparations for his visit to Selinopolis. Kvaris accepted the invitation and traveled to Selinopolis to explore the possibility of economic cooperation on a cosmic scale.
___________________


Arrival of Kvaris and its background

Selinopolis has flourished under Celia's strong leadership, spreading its presence throughout the universe as a city of a new era that balances the commercialization of dimensional energy technology with social justice. ___________________


Arrival of Kvaris and its background

The city of Selinopolis became even more lively in preparation for Kvaris' arrival, and preparations were made in the city center to welcome him. Kvaris's arrival was a moment of great political and economic significance, and everyone could see how powerful his influence would be. His decision to take control of the economy within the J13 system could be the key to opening up a new future for Selinopolis.
Kvaris led a huge economic zone called Ronaworld and was building an ecosystem using dimensional energy technology. Under his leadership, Ronaworld has achieved efficient energy supply, circular resource use, and sustainable development, and has grown to a size that dwarfs other economies within the J13 system. This economic zone is characterized by a system that utilizes dimensional energy, and its operation is extremely efficient, with thorough optimization of energy consumption and resource management.
"If the collaboration between Selinopolis and Ronaworld materializes, it will revolutionize the use of dimensional energy throughout the universe." Before her meeting with Kvaris, Celia thought deeply about the potential for interoperability between dimensional energy technology and economic spheres. "If we do this, our cities can be at the heart of the next era and influence the entire space economy."
Through her meeting with Kvaris, Selia intended to create a path for the further development of Selinopolis by promoting the efficient use of dimensional energy technology and resource sharing between cities.
___________________


Economic cooperation and new partnerships
When Kvaris arrived in Selinopolis and met Celia for the first time, his presence and commanding presence immediately changed the atmosphere in the room. He was a person who spoke in a very calm and calculated manner, and one could feel the weight of the huge economic sphere behind his speech. Celia was confident that Selinopolis would achieve further development if she cooperated with him.

The city of Selinopolis became even more lively in preparation for Kvaris' arrival, and preparations were made in the city center to welcome him. ___________________


Economic cooperation and new partnerships
When Kvaris arrived in Selinopolis and met Celia for the first time, his presence and commanding presence immediately changed the atmosphere in the room. He was a person who spoke in a very calm and calculated manner, and one could feel the weight of the huge economic sphere behind his speech. Celia was confident that Selinopolis would achieve further development if she cooperated with him.

"Selia, Selinopolis joining forces with us will bring great benefits to both parties," Kvaris said in a calm voice. "Ronaworld is making full use of dimensional energy technology to increase energy efficiency and realize a circular economy of resources. If Selinopolis joins this, our ecosystem will be further strengthened and we will make even more efficient use of dimensional energy."
Celia nodded deeply while listening to Kvaris's words. As he said, she thought that if Ronaworld and Selinopolis worked together, they could further advance dimensional energy technology and solve energy problems on a cosmic scale.
"Our city has the infrastructure in place to efficiently harness dimensional energy. By working with your ecosystem, Selinopolis can contribute to the overall space economy," Celia answered with determination. "And the future we are aiming for is a sustainable and fair society. Your cooperation is essential to achieving this."
Afterwards, the two sides discussed a concrete cooperative structure and began making plans aimed at joint development using dimensional energy technology, sharing resources, and improving the efficiency of energy supply. Together with Kvaris, Celia charted a path for Selinopolis to grow into an ever more powerful economic zone.
___________________


Building a new economic model in cooperation with Ronaworld
The collaboration between Selinopolis and Ronaworld is more than just a commercial partnership; it is the creation of a new economic model using dimensional energy technology. The technology and knowledge brought by Kvaris revolutionized Selinopolis' use of dimensional energy, creating a more efficient energy supply system.

"Selia, Selinopolis joining forces with us will bring great benefits to both parties," Kvaris said in a calm voice. "Ronaworld is making full use of dimensional energy technology to increase energy efficiency and realize a circular economy of resources. If Selinopolis joins this, our ecosystem will be further strengthened and we will make even more efficient use of dimensional energy."
Celia nodded deeply while listening to Kvaris's words. As he said, she thought that if Ronaworld and Selinopolis worked together, they could further advance dimensional energy technology and solve energy problems on a cosmic scale.
"Our city has the infrastructure in place to efficiently harness dimensional energy. By working with your ecosystem, Selinopolis can contribute to the overall space economy," Celia answered with determination. "And the future we are aiming for is a sustainable and fair society. Your cooperation is essential to achieving this."
Afterwards, the two sides discussed a concrete cooperative structure and began making plans aimed at joint development using dimensional energy technology, sharing resources, and improving the efficiency of energy supply. Together with Kvaris, Celia charted a path for Selinopolis to grow into an ever more powerful economic zone.

Building a new economic model in cooperation with Ronaworld
The collaboration between Selinopolis and Ronaworld is more than just a commercial partnership; it is the creation of a new economic model using dimensional energy technology. The technology and knowledge brought by Kvaris revolutionized Selinopolis' use of dimensional energy, creating a more efficient energy supply system.

"Selia, Selinopolis joining forces with us will bring great benefits to both parties," Kvaris said in a calm voice. "Ronaworld is making full use of dimensional energy technology to increase energy efficiency and realize a circular economy of resources. If Selinopolis joins this, our ecosystem will be further strengthened and we will make even more efficient use of dimensional energy."
Celia nodded deeply while listening to Kvaris's words. As he said, she thought that if Ronaworld and Selinopolis worked together, they could further advance dimensional energy technology and solve energy problems on a cosmic scale.
"Our city has the infrastructure in place to efficiently harness dimensional energy. By working with your ecosystem, Selinopolis can contribute to the overall space economy," Celia answered with determination. "And the future we are aiming for is a sustainable and fair society. Your cooperation is essential to achieving this."
Afterwards, the two sides discussed a concrete cooperative structure and began making plans aimed at joint development using dimensional energy technology, sharing resources, and improving the efficiency of energy supply. Together with Kvaris, Celia charted a path for Selinopolis to grow into an ever more powerful economic zone.
___________________


Building a new economic model in cooperation with Ronaworld
The collaboration between Selinopolis and Ronaworld is more than just a commercial partnership; it is the creation of a new economic model using dimensional energy technology. The technology and knowledge brought by Kvaris revolutionized Selinopolis' use of dimensional energy, creating a more efficient energy supply system.

"This cooperation is about more than just economic benefits," Kvaris said to Celia. "By joining forces with Ronaworld and Selinopolis, we will be able to take dimensional energy technology to a new level and benefit the entire universe. That is our ultimate goal."
With the new energy supply system in place, Selinopolis further strengthened its economic base and accelerated industrial and commercial activity within the city. Additionally, the collaboration with Ronaworld has enabled the circular use of resources and efficient energy management throughout the city, laying the foundation for sustainable development.
This new economic model has succeeded in dramatically improving productivity by efficiently using dimensional energy and eliminating waste. The stable energy supply also allowed Selinopolis to carry out a wider range of commercial activities, further increasing the city's economic size.

Looking to the future and expanding our influence on a cosmic scale
In cooperation with Kvaris, Selinopolis built a new economic zone using dimensional energy technology, further expanding its influence across the universe. Together with Kvaris, Celia aims to use dimensional energy technology to create a new form of society on a cosmic scale.
``If this cooperation comes to fruition, our city will move to the next stage.'' Celia was convinced of this vision as she spoke with Kvaris. "Dimensional energy will be the key to shaping our future, and Selinopolis will be at the center of it."
The economic cooperation between Selinopolis and Ronaworld goes beyond a mere commercial relationship and is the first step toward realizing a new social system based on dimensional energy technology. Celia had strong expectations for the new possibilities that this cooperation would bring, and took steps toward the future.

Chapter 56: Appearance of Orbifold Journeys and new development of E16 series

Selinopolis' economy was rapidly developing through dimensional energy technology and innovations, and its influence began to spread throughout the universe. Under Celia's leadership, the city rapidly prospered and pioneered the commercial use of dimensional energy, while she was always looking to the next challenge. As the city grows, Celia seeks new economic opportunities and considers venturing into uncharted territory. The first step was taken by an unexpected visitor.
The visitor was a new corporate group called Orbifold Journeys. Orbifold Journeys has come forward with a proposal to develop tourism resources for space travel for the entire E16 series and to launch a tourism industry covering the entire universe. This proposal had the potential not only to develop the tourism industry but also to transform the entire E16 system into a planetary system rich in space travel.
As the name suggests, Orbifold Journeys is a group of companies whose main theme is traveling to unknown places in space, and in particular promotes the commercialization of space travel. They aimed to provide new spaceships and means of travel using dimensional energy technology, allowing people to travel between planets. Orbifold Journeys has come up with a plan to develop the E16 system planet group as a tourist resource and spread its charm all over the world.
Orbifold Journeys proposal
Orbifold Journeys representative Daria Keraldi made the proposal to Celia. She detailed her plan to use dimensional energy to create new bases for space travel throughout the E16 series and revitalize tourism.
"Ceria-dono, we see the potential to transform the E16 system beyond a mere economic zone into a rich tourist planetary system in space," Dahlia said in a confident voice. “Our goal is to use state-of-the-art spacecraft powered by dimensional energy technology to provide new adventures and experiences for visitors to the E16 system of planets.”

Selinopolis' economy was rapidly developing through dimensional energy technology and innovations, and its influence began to spread throughout the universe. Under Celia's leadership, the city rapidly prospered and pioneered the commercial use of dimensional energy, while she was always looking to the next challenge. As the city grows, Celia seeks new economic opportunities and considers venturing into uncharted territory. The first step was taken by an unexpected visitor.

This proposal had the potential not only to develop the tourism industry but also to transform the entire E16 system into a planetary system rich in space travel.
As the name suggests, Orbifold Journeys is a group of companies whose main theme is traveling to unknown places in space, and in particular promotes the commercialization of space travel. They aimed to provide new spaceships and means of travel using dimensional energy technology, allowing people to travel between planets. Orbifold Journeys has come up with a plan to develop the E16 system planet group as a tourist resource and spread its charm all over the world.
Orbifold Journeys proposal
Orbifold Journeys representative Daria Keraldi made the proposal to Celia. She detailed her plan to use dimensional energy to create new bases for space travel throughout the E16 series and revitalize tourism.
"Ceria-dono, we see the potential to transform the E16 system beyond a mere economic zone into a rich tourist planetary system in space," Dahlia said in a confident voice. “Our goal is to use state-of-the-art spacecraft powered by dimensional energy technology to provide new adventures and experiences for visitors to the E16 system of planets.”

"I understand how important it is for the E16 series to develop tourism resources," Celia answered, interested in the proposal. “But if this were to happen, what would be the economic impact on our city and the E16 system as a whole?”
Dahlia smiled and explained her plan in more detail. "The growth of the space travel industry means deepening exchanges between planets and creating many new businesses centered on tourism. There are a variety of planets in the E16 system, each with its own culture and natural environment. If we develop this as a tourism resource, the economy of each planet will be revitalized, and as a result, the GDP of the entire E16 system will increase dramatically."
Celia listened to the explanation and thought deeply. Space travel is a new frontier, and creating a new tourism-based economy would be of great benefit to Selinopolis and its surrounding planets. Celia sensed the possibility and decided to take a positive stance on this proposal.
"If this plan comes to fruition, the economy of the E16 series will develop dramatically, and our city and surrounding areas will also benefit from it," Celia replied. "I choose to accept this proposal."
Dahlia smiled at this answer and supported Celia's decision. "Thank you, Celia-dono. If this plan is realized, the entire E16 series will reach a new level of prosperity, and it will have a great impact on the entire universe."
___________________


Development of the E16 series and the future of the space travel industry
After receiving Celia's consent, Orbifold Journeys immediately began developing a space travel industry. Their first task was to develop a new spaceship that utilized dimensional energy technology, and then create infrastructure to develop each planet in the E16 system as a tourist destination.

"I understand how important it is for the E16 series to develop tourism resources," Celia answered, interested in the proposal. “But if this were to happen, what would be the economic impact on our city and the E16 system as a whole?”
Dahlia smiled and explained her plan in more detail. "The growth of the space travel industry means deepening exchanges between planets and creating many new businesses centered on tourism. Development of the E16 series and the future of the space travel industry

Orbifold Journeys proposal
Orbifold Journeys representative Daria Keraldi made the proposal to Celia. She detailed her plan to use dimensional energy to create new bases for space travel throughout the E16 series and revitalize tourism.
"Ceria-dono, we see the potential to transform the E16 system beyond a mere economic zone into a rich tourist planetary system in space," Dahlia said in a confident voice. “Our goal is to use state-of-the-art spacecraft powered by dimensional energy technology to provide new adventures and experiences for visitors to the E16 system of planets.”

Spacecraft using dimensional energy technology boasted speed and efficiency that set them apart from conventional spacecraft, and could significantly reduce travel time between planets. This new technology held the key to making space travel easier and more accessible than ever before. Furthermore, the spacecraft was designed to be environmentally friendly, taking into consideration the natural environment of each planet in the E16 system.
"We don't want to just create a tourist destination," Daria told Celia. "Our goal is to make the planets in the E16 system new hubs for cultural and commercial exchange, and to create tourist destinations that take advantage of the unique characteristics of each region. By doing so, the E16 system as a whole will become a center for enjoying space travel, and this will also lead to the revitalization of the interplanetary economy."
Celia sympathized with this idea and devised a plan to transform the entire E16 series into a center for space travel as the city developed. The city's infrastructure was developed with the aim of building new tourist facilities based on dimensional energy, as well as hotels and resort facilities for space travel. As a result, the E16 series was establishing itself not just as a commercial center, but as a base for cultural exchange on a cosmic scale.
___________________


E16 tourism resource development and interplanetary economic revitalization
With the creation of a new economic zone centered on the tourism industry, the E16 series achieved rapid development. Each planet was developed as a tourist destination by taking advantage of its unique characteristics, and facilities were built one after another to enjoy space travel. With the spread of means of transportation that utilizes dimensional energy, access to sightseeing spots has improved significantly, and many travelers have come to visit the E16 series.
``The growth of the E16 system as the center of the universe will be of great benefit to our city,'' said Celia, excited about the formation of a new commercial zone. "The space travel industry has the potential for sustained growth unlike any other industry."

Spacecraft using dimensional energy technology boasted speed and efficiency that set them apart from conventional spacecraft, and could significantly reduce travel time between planets. Development of the E16 series and the future of the space travel industry
After receiving Celia's consent, Orbifold Journeys immediately began developing a space travel industry. Their first task was to develop a new spaceship that utilized dimensional energy technology, and then create infrastructure to develop each planet in the E16 system as a tourist destination.

As the tourism industry spread throughout the E16 system, interplanetary commercial activity also became active, expanding the economic scale of the city as a whole. In particular, demand for facilities and services that utilize dimensional energy has increased, creating new markets, and Selinopolis and its surrounding planets have become an extremely influential entity in the space economy.
The development of the tourism industry also had a major impact on the social structure of E16, and it became a place for the exchange of various cultures and technologies. Celia believed that this cultural exchange would contribute to economic development and create new possibilities for the city and its surrounding planets.
___________________


Looking to the future and expanding Selinopolis
As the development of E16 tourism resources progressed, Selinopolis became the central city, further expanding its size and influence. With the development of new means of transportation and tourist facilities that make full use of dimensional energy technology, Selinopolis established itself as a center of space travel, and economic growth, centered on tourism, accelerated.
As Celia watches this new development, she begins to think about her next big step. He believed that the E16 series would become the new commercial center of the universe, and Selinopolis would be positioned as its pioneer.
``The future of Selinopolis will be more than just an economic zone,'' Celia thought as she looked out into space. “We will foster cultural and economic exchange on a cosmic scale and build a future where all citizens can prosper in abundance and equality.”
How much growth and prosperity this new era of space travel will bring to Selinopolis and its surrounding planets will be etched into the future and will have an impact on the entire universe.

Chapter 57: Alpha's Reclusion and Preparation for Revenge

Even though Alpha lived a retired life, he continued to formulate a cold plan in his heart. Losing his former glory and being banished from Selinopolis, he did not accept his fate. The path he chose was not just a quiet retirement, but preparation for revenge and a comeback. Alpha, who began to secretly move from a hidden place, was planning a grand surprise attack on Celia with the former leaders of ZAMLT. It was the flame of revenge that had been burning in his heart for a long time, and it was the only way to avenge the humiliation of the past that he could never forget.
Generation of fully organic clones
At Alpha's place of retirement, a secret facility was set up to recreate people similar to the former rulers of ZAMLT. He had successfully created a "fully organic clone" using dimensional energy technology. These clones were not just genetic copies; they were meant to reproduce the knowledge, memories, and personality of the original person. By making full use of Alpha's technical ability and knowledge, he was producing people with the spirit and abilities of ZAMLT's leaders one after another.
"It's time to show Celia our power," Alpha said coldly as she watched the clones wake up. "Now is the time to take back the humiliation of being deprived of the city we once built and being exiled."
The clones created by Alpha had the same abilities as ZAMLT's past leaders and were able to recreate all their memories and skills. They were being cultivated as a necessary force for Alpha to rise again under its guidance. And Alpha's plan was steadily progressing. The clones received combat training and economic management education, and were preparing to rebuild ZAMLT.
Planning a surprise attack on Celia

As the tourism industry spread throughout the E16 system, interplanetary commercial activity also became active, expanding the economic scale of the city as a whole. In particular, demand for facilities and services that utilize dimensional energy has increased, creating new markets, and Selinopolis and its surrounding planets have become an extremely influential entity in the space economy.
The development of the tourism industry also had a major impact on the social structure of E16, and it became a place for the exchange of various cultures and technologies. Celia believed that this cultural exchange would contribute to economic development and create new possibilities for the city and its surrounding planets.

It was the flame of revenge that had been burning in his heart for a long time, and it was the only way to avenge the humiliation of the past that he could never forget.
Generation of fully organic clones
At Alpha's place of retirement, a secret facility was set up to recreate people similar to the former rulers of ZAMLT. He had successfully created a "fully organic clone" using dimensional energy technology. These clones were not just genetic copies; they were meant to reproduce the knowledge, memories, and personality of the original person. By making full use of Alpha's technical ability and knowledge, he was producing people with the spirit and abilities of ZAMLT's leaders one after another.
"It's time to show Celia our power," Alpha said coldly as she watched the clones wake up. "Now is the time to take back the humiliation of being deprived of the city we once built and being exiled."
The clones created by Alpha had the same abilities as ZAMLT's past leaders and were able to recreate all their memories and skills. They were being cultivated as a necessary force for Alpha to rise again under its guidance. And Alpha's plan was steadily progressing. The clones received combat training and economic management education, and were preparing to rebuild ZAMLT.
Planning a surprise attack on Celia

Alpha made careful preparations to regain his power and take revenge against the new order that Selia had established, Selinopolis. Their strategy was far more than just an act of violence, it was a grand plan to shake the city's economic foundations and use dimensional energy technology to bring Selinopolis back under ZAMLT's control.
"As long as Celia rules this city, my existence is a thing of the past. However, the time will come when I will rebuild ZAMLT and take back this city as its true ruler." Alpha spoke to the clones. "The raid we are launching against this city is more than just a battle. It is a plan to shake the economy, society, and dimensional energy technology to its core."
Alpha's plan began by destroying the economic foundations of Selinopolis. He found a way to exploit dimensional energy technology and planned to destroy the energy supply system that Celia had built. In addition, he sought to identify political and economic instability within Selinopolis and use them to disrupt the entire city.
"Our surprise attack is more than just a war," Alpha said quietly. "We will shake the very social structure of Selinopolis and disrupt Selia's rule."
To that end, Alpha gave the clones various missions. They were preparing to infiltrate companies that were central to the city's economy and destroy the financial system. A plan was also underway to use dimensional energy technology to hack into the city's energy supply system and paralyze the entire city.
___________________


Preparing and training the clones
Alpha's clones had the same abilities as ZAMLT's leaders, so their training was extremely rigorous and practical. In addition to combat training, they acquired advanced knowledge of dimensional energy technology and learned strategies for controlling the economy and politics. All of these were necessary elements for Alpha's surprise attack to be successful.

Even though Alpha lived a retired life, he continued to formulate a cold plan in his heart. Losing his former glory and being banished from Selinopolis, he did not accept his fate. The path he chose was not just a quiet retirement, but preparation for revenge and a comeback. Alpha, who began to secretly move from a hidden place, was planning a grand surprise attack on Celia with the former leaders of ZAMLT. It was the flame of revenge that had been burning in his heart for a long time, and it was the only way to avenge the humiliation of the past that he could never forget.

Preparing and training the clones
Alpha's clones had the same abilities as ZAMLT's leaders, so their training was extremely rigorous and practical. In addition to combat training, they acquired advanced knowledge of dimensional energy technology and learned strategies for controlling the economy and politics. All of these were necessary elements for Alpha's surprise attack to be successful.

"Our goal is not just victory in battle," said one of the clones. "In order to fundamentally destroy Celia's control, we must gain control of the energy system at the heart of her plan."
Under Alpha's guidance, the clones analyzed the blueprints of the dimensional energy system and learned how to infiltrate and seize control of the system. They established a method to destroy the energy supply network that Celia relied on, and developed the skills and knowledge to do so.
"We must remain calm in battle," Alpha told the clones. "This war is important to all our plans. To be successful, we must prepare thoroughly down to the last detail and fight with all our might."
The clones took those words to heart and steadily proceeded with their preparations. They followed Alpha's strategy and prepared to take Selinopolis.
___________________


Ceria precautions and countermeasures
On the other hand, Celia was becoming increasingly wary of this new movement. Although she had no idea what Alpha had been doing during his time in seclusion, she had an intuitive feeling that his presence might be active again. Celia knew that Alpha had the power to greatly influence the city, just like when she controlled ZAMLT.
``Alpha is planning something. He's not a man who will ever give up.'' Celia trusted her instincts and continued to be cautious. She began taking steps to further strengthen the city's energy supply system and economic infrastructure, eliminating the possibility of Alpha.
``We have to stay one step ahead in order to prepare for any surprise attacks he may launch.'' Celia made up her mind and ordered the security system to be strengthened throughout the city. She vowed to predict what Alpha would do and to be fully prepared for it.
___________________

As Alpha's plans are put into motion and a surprise attack on Selinopolis is in preparation, Celia senses the movement and decides to strengthen the city's defenses. No matter how many preparations Alpha had made or how much power she had, Celia intended to do everything in her power to protect the city and its economic foundation that she had built up until now.
"I fought to protect Gigapolis," Celia swore in her heart. "Once again, we will fight to protect this city."
