Chapter 58: Alpha's surprise attack and the collapse of Celia Protections
Alpha and the fully organic clones he created made all preparations and finally launched a surprise attack on Celia. The clones, who have recreated the memories of the former rulers of ZAMLT, follow Alpha's orders and prepare for the most important moment. Celia Protections - the defense force led by Celia - was deployed to protect the front lines of Selinopolis' new dimension Palace, but Alpha's clever tactics to break through the defense lines were about to succeed.
Alpha has been waiting for this moment to regain its former glory. What he is trying to regain is not just control of the city, but the collapse of Selinopolis itself and the new order that Selia has built. For Celia, this attack was the moment when all her efforts were wasted, and the Protections she trusted the most to protect everything lost their power in an instant.

Chapter 58: Alpha's surprise attack and the collapse of Celia Protections
Alpha and the fully organic clones he created made all preparations and finally launched a surprise attack on Celia. The clones, who have recreated the memories of the former rulers of ZAMLT, follow Alpha's orders and prepare for the most important moment. Celia Protections - the defense force led by Celia - was deployed to protect the front lines of Selinopolis' new dimension Palace, but Alpha's clever tactics to break through the defense lines were about to succeed.
Alpha has been waiting for this moment to regain its former glory. What he is trying to regain is not just control of the city, but the collapse of Selinopolis itself and the new order that Selia has built. For Celia, this attack was the moment when all her efforts were wasted, and the Protections she trusted the most to protect everything lost their power in an instant.
___________________


Invading the new dimension Palace

The new dimension Palace where Celia lives is the most solid defense facility in Selinopolis, surrounded by a shield that makes full use of dimensional energy technology, and the most elite defense force, Celia Protections, is deployed inside. This facility was a symbol of the city and the heart of Seria's governance. However, the preparations by Alpha and his clones were carried out with far greater speed and precision than expected.
Alpha had found a way to use the properties of dimensional energy to interfere with the Palace's shields and exploit their weaknesses. Together with his fully organic clones, he carefully sabotaged the shield system and infiltrated through the gap. The clones possessed the memories of the former ZAMLT leaders and, using their tactical knowledge, prepared to quickly take control of the Palace's interior.
"This is the final battle," Alpha said quietly. "Celia will try to protect this city, but it is beyond her control."
The clones, under Alpha's guidance, infiltrated the Palace and set out to instantly disable Celia Protections' shield system. Their movements were perfect, like a calculated dance, and before the Protections could react, they were inside.
___________________


Collapse of Celia Protections
Celia Protections has overcome numerous trials as the strongest defense force based on dimensional energy technology. However, no matter how prepared they were, they were no match for Alpha and his clones' surprise attack. This unit, created using dimensional energy, lost its existence too soon before it could demonstrate its power.

Collapse of Celia Protections
Celia Protections has overcome numerous trials as the strongest defense force based on dimensional energy technology. However, no matter how prepared they were, they were no match for Alpha and his clones' surprise attack. This unit, created using dimensional energy, lost its existence too soon before it could demonstrate its power.

At the same time as giving instructions to the clones, Alpha perfectly executed tactics to overwhelm Celia Protections' most elite forces. Although Celia Protections boasted dimensional energy-enhanced equipment and technology, they were no match for the combat skills and strategic knowledge possessed by the clones. In a short amount of time, they broke through the front lines and took control of every sector within.
"Is this Celia's line of defense?" Alpha said coldly. "We are powerless. Her control is in our hands."
The Protections were repulsed in an instant, and the shield system was completely disabled. There was no one to stand in the way of Alpha and the clones, and the control of the new dimension Palace, the heart of Seria, rapidly progressed.
___________________


Celia's isolation
Due to Alpha's surprise attack, the new dimension Palace, which was a symbol of Selinopolis's defense, instantly collapsed, leaving Selia completely isolated inside. Celia realized the situation she was facing as the alarms sounded inside the Palace. Even as she remained calm, she knew that the moment had come.
"Alpha has finally started to move." Celia muttered to herself. "Does my plan end here?"
Celia had taken many defensive measures by making full use of dimensional energy, but Alpha's superior tactics and plans were defeated in an instant. She lost the Protections she trusted the most, and the battle was completely in Alpha's hands.
``But I won't give up yet.'' Celia renewed her determination. "I will fight to protect Selinopolis."
Although she felt helpless, as a last resort, she made full use of her dimensional energy technology and began preparing to confront Alpha and his clones. However, at that moment, Alpha's voice echoed within the Palace.
"Celia, it's all over. The city you built, your rule, is in our hands."

At the same time as giving instructions to the clones, Alpha perfectly executed tactics to overwhelm Celia Protections' most elite forces. Although Celia Protections boasted dimensional energy-enhanced equipment and technology, they were no match for the combat skills and strategic knowledge possessed by the clones. In a short amount of time, they broke through the front line and took control of every sector within.
"Is this Celia's line of defense?" Alpha said coldly. "We are powerless. Her control is in our hands."

"Celia, it's all over. The city you built, your rule, is in our hands."

Alpha's voice sounded cold, and as Celia listened to it, she realized once again how hopeless her position was. She had finally reached her moment.
___________________


Alpha's control and Celia's decision
Alpha and his clones have completely taken control of the new dimension Palace, and Celia is the only one left among them. All around her, her former confidence was now replaced by a feeling of helplessness, and anxiety and fear about her future spread. But Celia had to overcome it.
"This isn't the end of everything," Celia said quietly, taking a deep breath. "I have fought to protect this city. I will fight to the end."
Celia made full use of her dimensional energy technology and decided to make a final counterattack. Despite Alpha's surprise attack, she never gave up and planned to take everything back with her own power.
"Selinopolis is what I built," Celia declared firmly. "You can't destroy it."
Chapter 59: Activation of "Dimension Seria" and deadly battle with Alpha
With the new dimension Palace falling into the hands of Alpha and his clones, Celia appears to be completely alone. The defense force she believed in, Celia Protections, was destroyed, and control of the dimensional energy system was lost. However, Celia never gave up and still believed in the power she had left in her hands. In order to counter Alpha's surprise attack, she chooses the last resort.
"Dimension Seria" - It was a technology that Seria completed as the ultimate form of her dimensional energy technology, which allowed her to control entire cities, bend the laws of physics, and unify all energy. This technology allows Celia to infinitely draw out her own energy and freely manipulate the space and time around her. She was now fully prepared to activate that power.
"This is my last resort," Celia muttered to herself. "If this doesn't work, I'll just end up being just another human being."

Alpha's voice sounded cold, and as Celia listened to it, she realized once again how hopeless her position was. She had finally reached her moment.
___________________


Alpha's control and Celia's decision
Alpha and his clones have completely taken control of the new dimension Palace, and Celia is the only one left among them. All around her, her former confidence was now replaced by a feeling of helplessness, and anxiety and fear about her future spread. But Celia had to overcome it.
"This isn't the end of everything," Celia said quietly, taking a deep breath. "I have fought to protect this city. I will fight to the end."

Chapter 59: Activation of "Dimension Seria" and deadly battle with Alpha
With the new dimension Palace falling into the hands of Alpha and his clones, Celia appears to be completely alone. The defense force she believed in, Celia Protections, was destroyed, and control of the dimensional energy system was lost. However, Celia never gave up and still believed in the power she had left in her hands. In order to counter Alpha's surprise attack, she chooses the last resort.
"Dimension Seria" - It was a technology that Seria completed as the ultimate form of her dimensional energy technology, which allowed her to control entire cities, bend the laws of physics, and unify all energy. This technology allows Celia to infinitely draw out her own energy and freely manipulate the space and time around her. She was now fully prepared to activate that power.
"This is my last resort," Celia muttered to herself. "If this doesn't work, I'll just end up being just another human being."

Celia's body was surrounded by dimensional energy, and the space around her was instantly distorted. As space expanded and time slowed down, she completely released the power of "Dimension Seria". The laws of physics around her collapsed, and Celia was able to master that power and gain absolute control within space. By using this power, she was prepared to sacrifice her life and devote all her energies to the defense of the city.
___________________


Gathering of Celia's loyal executives
Gathered around Celia were 200 of her most loyal executives who had supported her. They all began to move at once following Celia's instructions. Working under her command, these executives risked their lives to use dimensional energy to protect all citizens of Celnopolis and its defenses.
``For Celia, we will fight with our lives on the line.'' When one of the executives spoke, his companions around him nodded. "If she decides to resort to this last resort, we must support her with all our might."
Seria activated "Dimension Seria" and they accessed the entire city and prepared to confront Alpha and his clones. Now that Celia Protections has collapsed, the executives decide to fight with what power they have left, and devised a strategy to repel Alpha's clones by making full use of dimensional energy technology.
``This is the final battle.'' Under Celia's guidance, the executives united and began using all their power to suppress the ZAMLT clones. "We must do everything in our power to stop their power."
The battle was over in an instant, and ZAMLT's clones were destroyed one after another by the cooperative play of the executives who made full use of dimensional energy. Even the precision combat power and tactics of Alpha's clones were powerless against Seria's loyal executives.
___________________


Destruction of ZAMLT clones

Celia's body was surrounded by dimensional energy, and the space around her was instantly distorted. As space expanded and time slowed down, she completely released the power of "Dimension Seria". The laws of physics around her collapsed, and Celia was able to master that power and gain absolute control within space. By using this power, she was prepared to sacrifice her life and devote all her energies to the defense of the city.

___________________


Destruction of ZAMLT clones

With the collapse of Celia Protections, Celia's leaders began to make full use of dimensional energy to wipe out Alpha's clones. The clones were combat experts with memories of former ZAMLT leaders, and their combat abilities were extraordinary. However, Celia's executives have found a way to use dimensional energy to counteract that power and take advantage of the clones' abilities.
"They're just copying our technology," said one executive. "That's why we can use the power of our dimensional energy to bring out their limits."
In a space distorted by dimensional energy, Seria's executives defeated ZAMLT clones one after another. By using energy waves to reduce the fighting power of the clones and physically overwhelming them, he was able to ultimately destroy them all.
The ZAMLT clones were all defeated and became powerless in the face of the power of Celia and her loyal executives.
___________________


Alpha's Prisoner
With the destruction of the clones, Alpha finds himself in a predicament. He continued to fight with all his might to revive ZAMLT and take revenge, but his strength finally ran out and he was captured by Celia. He was unable to regain his former glory and was eventually taken prisoner by Celia.
"Alpha, your plan is over," Celia declared coldly. "No matter how prepared you are, this city is in my hands."
Alpha was captured and completely incapacitated by dimensional energy. The dreams of revenge he once pursued have now completely collapsed, and he has no choice but to succumb before Celia's control. With her cold-hearted attitude, Celia kept an eye on Alpha and prepared to bring thorough judgment against him.
"The future you aimed for is different from the future I chose," Celia told him. "But the future I have chosen is one where all citizens can equally prosper."
As Alpha listened to those words, he no longer had the strength to argue and gradually accepted his fate.

___________________


Celia's victory and future prospects
With the destruction of Alpha and his clones, and his capture, Selinopolis was once again under Celia's complete control. Celia vowed to protect the peace and order of the city and continue to use dimensional energy technology to aim for further development. Her leadership was unwavering, and the future of the city was completely in her hands.
"Selinopolis will continue to be built and protected by our efforts." After overcoming everything, Celia renewed her vow. “Our future is a society in which all citizens can equally prosper.”
Chapter 60: Alpha's public execution and Celia's decision
Alpha once ruled Gigapolis, and although he overcame many trials, his ambitions were ultimately destroyed. His pursuit of revenge and control of the city was completely thwarted by Celia's cold-hearted strategy and strength. As a result, Alpha was captured as a traitor and met his fate as a threat to Celia.
Tens of thousands of people gathered at the public execution site in the square of Selinopolis, and there was a quiet tension in the air. Celia's decision was already widely known, and support for her leadership was strong. However, the reason Alpha was decided to be executed was not simply revenge or a show of power. There was a part of Celia that continued to carry the burden of her own past, which would be released by judging him.
"Alpha, your ambition has not been fulfilled." Celia spoke quietly at Alpha's feet, as if squeezing out the words. "What you wanted to get was something other than the Selinopolis we built."
Alpha didn't respond to Celia's words, just felt her gaze. Celia continued to stare at Alpha, as if the time they shared together was connected to this moment. There was not a hint of regret or sadness in his eyes. Alpha just stood there, unwavering.
___________________

___________________

Past memories and Celia's emotional conflict
In Celia's mind, her past with Alpha was vividly reliving. The former glory of Gigapolis, the days when we were drawing our future together, and the complex emotions that were nurtured through the many battles with him. All of that was coming to an end right before my eyes. At that moment, Celia made a decision in her heart.
"When we met, you and I were trying to build a future together," Celia began, thinking back. "But the path you chose and the path I chose never crossed paths in the end. Still, I decided not to hate you and just forget everything."
With those words, Celia decided in her heart to let go of everything in the past. When Celia thought about how her relationship with Alpha would affect the future of Selinopolis, she came to one conclusion. The idea was that it was important to look to the future without being bound by the past.
"This is the end," Celia whispered to herself. "I will forget everything. Your existence and all the regrets I have."
That determination freed her heart and paved the way for her future.
___________________


Celia shows her gratitude
Celia stood in front of Alpha and looked at him one last time. The citizens who had gathered at the place of the public execution watched silently, feeling a sense of respect and a little surprise at Celia's cold-hearted judgment. However, Celia had more than just that, she also felt gratitude toward Alpha. Without his actions, Selinopolis would not be what it is today. That was one truth for Celia, and she could not deny the influence that Alpha's existence had on her.
"Alpha, I am grateful to you," Celia said slowly. "Your challenge to me has made me stronger and helped me build Selinopolis."

In Celia's mind, her past with Alpha was vividly reliving. ___________________


Celia shows her gratitude
Celia stood in front of Alpha and looked at him one last time. The citizens who had gathered at the place of the public execution watched silently, feeling a sense of respect and a little surprise at Celia's cold-hearted judgment. However, Celia had more than just that, she also felt gratitude toward Alpha. Without his actions, Selinopolis would not be what it is today. That was one truth for Celia, and she could not deny the influence that Alpha's existence had on her.
"Alpha, I am grateful to you," Celia said slowly. "Your challenge to me has made me stronger and helped me build Selinopolis."

Alpha didn't respond to those words and just stood there silently. However, few people would have known what kind of influence Celia's words had on him. In Celia's eyes, there seemed to be a little warmth and strength that transcended something within the coldness.
"It was my mission to crush your ambitions," Celia continued. "But because of you, we were able to aim for the future we should achieve. Thank you."
At that moment, Celia mentally said goodbye to Alpha. The fact that she felt gratitude towards him, rather than regret or hatred, at the failure of his ambitions was proof of her growth. And Celia decided to say something that she would never forget in her heart.
"Thank you, Alpha. Thanks to you, I was able to stand here."
With those words, Alpha was to receive the final judgment.
___________________


Public Execution and Celia's Choice
While the public execution was being carried out, Celia remained calm as she was in a position to witness everything. Her leadership and decisiveness have been respected by many citizens in the past, but this time was a test, a moment in which her determination was tested. How many people her choices would affect, and how she would lead Selinopolis from now on, depended on this moment.
"I'm no longer bound by the past," Celia whispered to herself. "The future of this city is in my hands."
At that time, Alpha's public execution was finally completed, and Celia quietly left the scene. After finishing everything, she was determined to start walking towards the next future.
___________________


Towards a new future
Due to Celia's decision, Alpha's influence completely disappeared, and Selinopolis was once again at peace. After that, Celia aimed for further development of the city and proceeded with the application of dimensional energy technology, creating a new economic and cultural zone. She learned from her past battles and vowed to do everything in her power to protect the city she built this time.

Towards a new future
Due to Celia's decision, Alpha's influence completely disappeared, and Selinopolis was once again at peace. After that, Celia aimed for further development of the city and proceeded with the application of dimensional energy technology, creating a new economic and cultural zone. She learned from her past battles and vowed to do everything in her power to protect the city she built this time.

``I will no longer carry the burden of my past.'' Celia renewed her resolve. “From now on, we will move forward with everything toward the future.”
Selinopolis has once again developed under the hands of Selia, making its name known throughout the universe as the center of a new era that makes full use of dimensional energy technology. Celia's vision of the future will surpass the old Gigapolis and become the foundation for building the next generation of urban society.
Chapter 61: Selia's rule and the further prosperity of Selinopolis
After Alpha finally died and his influence completely disappeared, Celia took his death as a new starting point and devoted all her efforts to the further development of Selinopolis. The city she led grew to an unimaginable size compared to the former Gigapolis, and by making full use of dimensional energy technology and advanced economic models, it became famous throughout the universe. Celia's control power had become so strong that there was no doubt about it, and her management power was like that of a god.
"There's nothing left of Alpha anymore," Celia said quietly to herself. “Now in my hands everything moves and everything is built.”
True to his word, Selinopolis expanded rapidly, and its economic scale increased dramatically. The growth of the city, which has infinite possibilities by making full use of dimensional energy technology, has never stopped. Selinopolis' GDP had finally reached $40 quintillion, and its size and influence was beginning to surpass that of the entire universe. This huge economic zone built by Celia functioned not only as a commercial center, but also as a foundation for culture, science, education, and the development of society as a whole.
The development of the city's infrastructure, public facilities, and industry that made full use of the latest technology using dimensional energy was all proceeding systematically and efficiently. Sustainable energy supply through dimensional energy, efficient use of resources, and the accompanying industrial revolution were all made possible by Celia's leadership.

``I will no longer carry the burden of my past.'' Celia renewed her resolve. “From now on, we will move forward with everything toward the future.”
Selinopolis has once again developed under the hands of Selia, making its name known throughout the universe as the center of a new era that makes full use of dimensional energy technology. Celia's vision of the future will surpass the old Gigapolis and become the foundation for building the next generation of urban society.

Chapter 61: Selia's rule and the further prosperity of Selinopolis
After Alpha finally died and his influence completely disappeared, Celia took his death as a new starting point and devoted all her efforts to the further development of Selinopolis. The development of the city's infrastructure, public facilities, and industry that made full use of the latest technology using dimensional energy was all proceeding systematically and efficiently. Sustainable energy supply through dimensional energy, efficient use of resources, and the accompanying industrial revolution were all made possible by Celia's leadership.

"I have surpassed Alpha," Celia thought as she looked down at the vast wealth and prosperous city. "His ambition was just a process for me."
As expected, after Alpha's death, Celia went beyond his ambitions for revenge and power and instead worked purely towards the prosperity and development of the city. Her management skills, leadership, and way of utilizing dimensional energy technology were all in perfect harmony. Under her rule, Selinopolis became the most important and influential city in the universe, and its growth continues.
___________________


Analysis of Celia's subordinates and Alpha's rebellion
Celia's loyal subordinates are forced to think deeply and analyze why Alpha's rebellion occurred. They sought to discover the true reason for Alpha's rebellion and investigated its effects within and outside the city. Many of his subordinates thought that behind Alpha's rebellion was "Ceria's success."
``The reason Alpha rebelled was simply because he couldn't allow Celia to succeed,'' said one of the executives who was Celia's right-hand man. "He intended to assert his power and reign as ruler of Gigapolis. However, Celia grew the city so quickly and so overwhelmingly that Alpha feared losing his position."
Celia's subordinates were satisfied with that analysis. It turns out that Alpha's rebellion was not simply out of fear that his ambitions would crumble, but out of jealousy and a sense of crisis that those who ruled the city, like Celia, were gaining power too quickly.
"Alpha became impatient after Celia became so successful and began to take control of the city that she chose to rebel," one of the executives continued. "He recognized Celia's power, but instead of following her, he aimed to defeat Celia and regain control."

"I have surpassed Alpha," Celia thought as she looked down at the vast wealth and prosperous city. "His ambition was just a process for me."
As expected, after Alpha's death, Celia went beyond his ambitions for revenge and power and instead worked purely towards the prosperity and development of the city. Her management skills, leadership, and way of utilizing dimensional energy technology were all in perfect harmony. Under her rule, Selinopolis became the most important and influential city in the universe, and its growth continues.
___________________

They sought to discover the true reason for Alpha's rebellion and investigated its effects within and outside the city. Many of his subordinates thought that behind Alpha's rebellion was "Ceria's success."

"Alpha became impatient after Celia became so successful and began to take control of the city that she chose to rebel," one of the executives continued. "He recognized Celia's power, but instead of following her, he aimed to defeat Celia and regain control."

Understanding this, Celia realized once again that Alpha's rebellion stemmed from his own limitations and powerlessness. Celia continued to think about what she should do in order to overcome his rebellion and establish even stronger control.
"Alpha's Rebellion has taught me one lesson," Celia said to herself. "I must continue to evolve and continue to grow the city in new ways. To the extent that my success is a threat to someone else, I must continue to have the strength to overcome that threat."
Having solidified her resolve, Celia began to formulate a new plan to further strengthen her control.
___________________


Further development of Selinopolis and new challenges
Celia's strategy for further developing the city focused on improving technology, education, culture, and the quality of society as a whole, rather than just economic growth. Selinopolis needed to be more than just a huge economic zone, it needed to remain a place where people could thrive, learn, and grow. Celia was ready to take the next step to make that vision a reality.
``Our city cannot be just a commercial center,'' Celia told herself. "Selinopolis must be a place of knowledge, culture and peace and harmony."
To that end, Celia has launched a new plan to further deepen dimensional energy technology and emphasize the educational system and cultural exchange. She pioneered new technological innovations that harnessed dimensional energy and created an infrastructure that allowed all citizens to live a better life. In particular, the educational system for developing the next generation of leaders was an important element in determining the future of Selinopolis.
"We must look to the future," Celia said, guiding the city's development. "And it is our children, the next generation of citizens, who will be responsible for that future."

Understanding this, Celia realized once again that Alpha's rebellion stemmed from his own limitations and powerlessness. Celia continued to think about what she should do in order to overcome his rebellion and establish even stronger control.
"Alpha's Rebellion has taught me one lesson," Celia said to herself. "I must continue to evolve and continue to grow the city in new ways. To the extent that my success is a threat to someone else, I must continue to have the strength to overcome that threat."
Having solidified her resolve, Celia began to formulate a new plan to further strengthen her control.
___________________


Further development of Selinopolis and new challenges
Celia's strategy for further developing the city focused on improving technology, education, culture, and the quality of society as a whole, rather than just economic growth. Selinopolis needed to be more than just a huge economic zone, it needed to remain a place where people could thrive, learn, and grow. Celia was ready to take the next step to make that vision a reality.
``Our city cannot be just a commercial center,'' Celia told herself. "Selinopolis must be a place of knowledge, culture and peace and harmony."
To that end, Celia has launched a new plan to further deepen dimensional energy technology and emphasize the educational system and cultural exchange. She pioneered new technological innovations that harnessed dimensional energy and created an infrastructure that allowed all citizens to live a better life. In particular, the educational system for developing the next generation of leaders was an important element in determining the future of Selinopolis.
"We must look to the future," Celia said, guiding the city's development. "And it is our children, the next generation of citizens, who will be responsible for that future."

Understanding this, Celia realized once again that Alpha's rebellion stemmed from his own limitations and powerlessness. Celia continued to think about what she should do in order to overcome his rebellion and establish even stronger control.
"Alpha's Rebellion has taught me one lesson," Celia said to herself. "I must continue to evolve and continue to grow the city in new ways. To the extent that my success is a threat to someone else, I must continue to have the strength to overcome that threat."
Having solidified her resolve, Celia began to formulate a new plan to further strengthen her control.
___________________

Culturally, Selinopolis also values ​​diversity and interaction, embracing cultural influences from different planets. New expressions of art and music using dimensional energy technology were born, and the entire city evolved with the aim of fusing art and science.
``Selinopolis should go beyond mere economic control and function as a cultural hub that contributes to the universe as a whole.'' With this vision in mind, Celia worked hard to further develop the city.
___________________


Celia's vision and prospects for the future
The future Celia envisioned was not just physical domination, but also included the spiritual growth of the entire city. As a city leader, she aimed to create a society where all citizens could equally prosper, learn, and grow. That was her vision for Selinopolis, and it pointed the way to the future.
``I built everything,'' Celia thought thoughtfully as she looked out over the city. "And I will continue to strive to further develop this city so that all citizens can live happy and peaceful lives."
Through Selia's vision and hard work, Selinopolis has grown into one of the most developed cities in the entire universe.
Chapter 62: The Pride of Selinopolis and the Declaration of the “Great Universe Leaders Meeting”
After the battle with Alpha and the years of development that followed, Selinopolis was at the very pinnacle of dimensional energy technology and advanced economic systems. The city's GDP reached $42 quintillion, one of the highest in the entire galaxy, proving Selinopolis to be an advanced planetary system with its economic and technological power. In contrast, Earth's GDP was only 1.5 quintillion dollars, and the difference was clear. Earth is still technologically backward, and compared to the metropolitan area built by Selinopolis, it has been reaffirmed that it is the most advanced civilization in the galaxy.

Culturally, Selinopolis also values ​​diversity and interaction, embracing cultural influences from different planets. New expressions of art and music using dimensional energy technology were born, and the entire city evolved with the aim of fusing art and science.

Chapter 62: The Pride of Selinopolis and the Declaration of the “Great Universe Leaders Meeting”
After the battle with Alpha and the years of development that followed, Selinopolis was at the very pinnacle of dimensional energy technology and advanced economic systems. The city's GDP reached $42 quintillion, one of the highest in the entire galaxy, proving Selinopolis to be an advanced planetary system with its economic and technological power. In contrast, Earth's GDP was only 1.5 quintillion dollars, and the difference was clear. Earth is still technologically backward, and compared to the metropolitan area built by Selinopolis, it has been reaffirmed that it is the most advanced civilization in the galaxy.

With this momentum, Seria set the goal of further expanding Selinopolis and building the largest civilization in the entire universe. In order to take over the economic sphere of the entire universe, she proposed a new social system based on dimensional energy technology, and decided to hold a ``Great Space Leaders Meeting'' as the first step to making it a reality.
Convening of “Great Space Leaders Meeting”
The ``Great Space Leaders Meeting'' was an international conference where major civilizations from all over the universe and their leaders gathered to discuss future cooperation and development on a cosmic scale. Celia decided to host the meeting, given that Selinopolis already has leadership in its development. The purpose of this conference was to create a new space economic zone using dimensional energy technology, exchange of culture and science, and create new rules to realize peace and prosperity on a galactic scale.
Civilizations from across the galaxy and beyond were invited to the meeting, with representatives from dozens of planetary systems. In the capital of Selinopolis, NewPalace, a huge hall powered by dimensional energy was prepared, and thousands of participants gathered. Among them were leaders of countries with civilizations that transcended the galaxy, engineers with influence on a cosmic scale, and thinkers.
Before the meeting began, Celia had prepared her declaration with great determination in her heart. She professed to create the largest civilization in the entire universe, and intended to show the policies and vision necessary for that purpose. Before the meeting began, Celia was quietly thinking about the path to a new future.
___________________


Selinopolis economic zone and dimensional energy technology
At the meeting, Celia spoke in a sincere but dignified manner about Selinopolis' growth to date and her vision for the next big step.

With this momentum, Seria set the goal of further expanding Selinopolis and building the largest civilization in the entire universe. Convening of “Great Space Leaders Meeting”
The ``Great Space Leaders Meeting'' was an international conference where major civilizations from all over the universe and their leaders gathered to discuss future cooperation and development on a cosmic scale. Celia decided to host the meeting, given that Selinopolis already has leadership in its development. She professed to create the largest civilization in the entire universe, and intended to show the policies and vision necessary for that purpose. Before the meeting began, Celia was quietly thinking about the path to a new future.
___________________


Selinopolis economic zone and dimensional energy technology
At the meeting, Celia spoke in a sincere but dignified manner about Selinopolis' growth to date and her vision for the next big step.

"We will use dimensional energy technology and an innovative economic system to make Selinopolis more than just a city-state," Celia said to the assembled leaders. "Our goal is to build the largest civilization in the entire universe, and the center of that is right here in Selinopolis."
Among the leaders gathered there, some could not hide their surprise at Celia's confident words, but at the same time, many were impressed by her powerful leadership. Rather than making this meeting just a place for discussion, Celia was trying to share a concrete vision that should be put into action.
"Currently, Selinopolis' GDP exceeds 40 quintillion dollars, and with the commercialization of dimensional energy technology, we have an overwhelming economic advantage over other civilizations," Celia continued. "Using this power, we intend to build a new economic zone that connects the entire universe. If this economic zone functions, the entire galaxy will prosper and achieve peace and development."
Celia explained the benefits of commercializing dimensional energy technology. He said that this would make the energy supply more efficient and enable the circulation of resources throughout space, making the development of the economic zone sustainable. He presented a vision of how dimensional energy could be used to instantly transport goods and transmit information, and to dramatically expand trade and cooperation between planets.
``We are aiming for more than just commercial success,'' Celia emphasized. “We will connect the cultures, knowledge, and technologies of the entire universe to create societies that thrive together.”
___________________


Celia's declaration and reaction
After Celia finished her declaration, a moment of silence spread across the venue. Her words completely changed the atmosphere, and each participant waited for her next words, absorbing their meaning. Some strongly supported the vision, while others remained skeptical of its potential.
The first person to speak was a representative of the Orion Federation, which has influence within the galaxy.

"Your vision is amazing, Celia, and we would like to help make it a reality. However, we must carefully assess how long it will take and how much risk it will involve."
"That's right," Celia answered calmly. "But I believe, as Selinopolis has already proven, that dimensional energy technology can enable us to do things previously thought impossible. We have the power."
After that, leaders from all over the universe expressed their opinions from their respective positions, and the meeting became more heated. However, Celia's words were consistently imbued with conviction, and the number of admirers for her strong leadership increased.
As the meeting progressed, the number of people who agreed with Celia's plan gradually increased, and in the end, preparations were made to proceed with the construction of an economic zone on a galaxy-wide scale as a resolution of the "Great Space Leaders Meeting". This resolution was the first step in bringing a new order to civilizations throughout the universe.
___________________


Towards the realization of the largest civilization in the entire universe
After that, Selia continued to commercialize dimensional energy technology and took concrete steps to build a space economic zone centered on Selinopolis. The new economic zone aimed to build a system that would allow all citizens to enjoy benefits equally, centered on technological innovation based on dimensional energy.
``The future is not just about economic prosperity,'' Celia said, holding up her vision. “We will create a society that connects the entire universe and builds the coexistence of culture, knowledge and people.”
Many leaders who gathered sympathized with these words and vowed to introduce dimensional energy technology and support the development of a new space economic zone.
"Selinopolis will not only be a commercial area, but a center of civilization that will contribute to the entire universe," Celia said with conviction, her voice echoing throughout the venue.
Chapter 63: Development of economic disparity and diplomatic stability of Selinopolis

"We will use dimensional energy technology and an innovative economic system to make Selinopolis more than just a city-state," Celia said to the assembled leaders. "Our goal is to build the largest civilization in the entire universe, and the center of that is right here in Selinopolis."
Among the leaders gathered there, some could not hide their surprise at Celia's confident words, but at the same time, many were impressed by her powerful leadership. Rather than making this meeting just a place for discussion, Celia was trying to share a concrete vision that should be put into action.
"Currently, Selinopolis' GDP exceeds 40 quintillion dollars, and with the commercialization of dimensional energy technology, we have an overwhelming economic advantage over other civilizations," Celia continued. "Using this power, we intend to build a new economic zone that connects the entire universe. If this economic zone functions, the entire galaxy will prosper and achieve peace and development."
Celia explained the benefits of commercializing dimensional energy technology. He said that this would make the energy supply more efficient and enable the circulation of resources throughout space, making the development of the economic zone sustainable. He presented a vision of how dimensional energy could be used to instantly transport goods and transmit information, and to dramatically expand trade and cooperation between planets.
``We are aiming for more than just commercial success,'' Celia emphasized. “We will connect the cultures, knowledge, and technologies of the entire universe to create societies that thrive together.”
___________________


Celia's declaration and reaction
After Celia finished her declaration, a moment of silence spread across the venue. Her words completely changed the atmosphere, and each participant waited for her next words, absorbing their meaning. Some strongly supported the vision, while others remained skeptical of its potential.
The first person to speak was a representative of the Orion Federation, which has influence within the galaxy.

While Selinopolis was rapidly growing as the center of the entire universe's economic zone, the problem of economic disparity was becoming more serious as expected. By making full use of dimensional energy technology, the city's economic scale steadily expanded, and its GDP increased by several orders of magnitude, reaching 42 quintillion dollars. However, behind this rapid development was a huge disparity between the rich and the poor.
The person with the most assets was Celia herself, with her assets amounting to 1.5 quintillion dollars. Because of this, Celia is a dominant presence in the economic system that makes full use of dimensional energy, and her influence never wavers. However, the growing disparity within the city was becoming a serious problem for more and more citizens. While some people had access to luxury resorts, housing, and advanced technology, the poor were unable to enjoy these benefits and were forced to live a harsh life.
``I never expected that the economic disparity would widen so much in the city I built.'' Celia felt this reality as she watched the city's day-to-day operations. "But if we don't address this issue, our future is in jeopardy."
She hoped to create an egalitarian and prosperous society under her rule, but reality was far from that ideal. Although an efficient economic system using dimensional energy technology certainly brought many benefits, it was inevitable that the benefits would be unevenly distributed among a few people. How to correct this disparity became a new challenge for Celia.
___________________


miraculous social stability
Surprisingly, however, there were no riots, brawls, or social unrest within Selinopolis. Despite facing severe economic disparities, the citizens remained surprisingly calm about the stability of their society. On many other planets, such widening inequality would likely lead to widespread social unrest and violence. But that didn't happen in Selinopolis. Why exactly was that?

The reason was that Selinopolis was not isolated. Celia continued to share the city's economic prosperity with other planetary systems, and continued to forge relationships with new planetary systems every month. Because dimensional energy technology and its operational capabilities were attractive to other planets, Selinopolis constantly connected to new economies and deepened cooperation with other civilizations. This allowed Selinopolis to maintain close ties with the outer planets and maintain economic stability.
"As long as we continue to build relationships with other planetary systems, we can minimize economic instability." Celia watched the city's development as she considered new diplomatic strategies. "If other planets seek Selinopolis' technology and offer their cooperation, we can continue to develop steadily."
As expected, Selinopolis was diplomatically active, increasing its trade and technological cooperation with new planets on a daily basis. This made it possible to somewhat alleviate the problem of disparity within the city, and by linking it with the outside economy, it was possible to resolve internal contradictions from the outside.
___________________


Interaction with 400 planets
Currently, Selinopolis has contact with over 400 planets, and its network is expanding every day. A new economic system based on dimensional energy technology was spreading, and trade with each planet was active. As a result, Selinopolis was able to go beyond a mere city-state and create a powerful economic zone that influenced the entire universe.
"Having contact with 400 planets proves how influential we are," Celia said, reaffirming our size and influence. “By continuing to deepen this relationship and connect with even more planets, our economic zone will become even stronger.”

Selinopolis provided products and services that utilized dimensional energy, and exchanged technology with other planets for mutual benefit. As a result, the economies of other planets developed, and Selinopolis itself continued to grow. This unilateral growth was of great benefit to other planets, who actively supported this partnership.
For example, by exchanging the metal resources of one planetary system with the technology of Selinopolis, the economies of both countries experienced rapid growth, and in another planetary system, the communication infrastructure using dimensional energy provided by Selinopolis dramatically improved the exchange of information between planets. These exchanges further strengthened Selinopolis' economy and contributed to reducing inequality.
___________________


Celia's new strategy and the future of the city
Celia understood that she still needed to continue resolving the internal and external contradictions of Selinopolis. Her most important task was not only to create a new economic zone, but also to distribute its development equally to all citizens. In order to spread economic prosperity to all citizens, Celia decided to reconsider the method of distribution and create a system in which benefits would be distributed not only to the rich but also to the poor.
``If our prosperity is concentrated in the hands of a few people, we cannot call it true prosperity.'' Celia announced a new policy aimed at urban development and eliminating disparities. "From now on, we will create a society where the benefits of technology are shared equally among all citizens."
To this end, it was decided to promote policies to improve education and social welfare with the aim of building a new social system based on dimensional energy technology. Celia's goal was to build a life support system using dimensional energy, especially for the poor, and to create a social foundation for all citizens to lead a stable life.
``The future we aspire to is one in which all citizens can equally prosper.'' With this vision in mind, Celia decided to move forward with a new plan.
___________________


Outlook for the future

Selinopolis provided products and services that utilized dimensional energy, and exchanged technology with other planets for mutual benefit. Outlook for the future

Despite facing internal and external problems, Selinopolis continued to evolve without stopping its growth. Despite facing the problem of economic disparity, Celia attempts to achieve social stability and prosperity by tackling the problem head-on and introducing a new solution that utilizes dimensional energy technology. Her leadership and determination became stronger and stronger, and the city's future became brighter and brighter.
``Selinopolis is more than just an economic zone,'' Celia thought to herself. "Our goal is the most equal and prosperous society in the entire universe."
Chapter 64: The division of Selinopolis and the concept of a large intergalactic exchange sphere
In order to further develop Selinopolis, Selia has decided to drastically change the city's management structure. She decided to aim for more efficient management and further development by dividing the city into four sections and assigning a leader to each. This transformation was an important step to accommodate the city's rapid growth and better accommodate different demographics and economic activities.
The new division names were "Seria A," "Seria B," "Seria C," and "Seria D," and each was given its own role. Celia hoped that this division would further strengthen the city's management system, and that each division would cooperate with each other while developing with its own characteristics and specialized fields. Additionally, this new organizational structure was a means to ensure more equal opportunities for all citizens.
Partitioning of Selinopolis and appointment of new leader
Celia decided to select a leader for each division and give each division responsibility in a specific area. This new partition structure was intended to provide advanced infrastructure using dimensional energy technology and economic independence for each partition.
Seria A (political/administrative district)

Despite facing internal and external problems, Selinopolis continued to evolve without stopping its growth. Despite facing the problem of economic disparity, Celia attempts to achieve social stability and prosperity by tackling the problem head-on and introducing a new solution that utilizes dimensional energy technology. Her leadership and determination became stronger and stronger, and the city's future became brighter and brighter.
``Selinopolis is more than just an economic zone,'' Celia thought to herself. "Our goal is the most equal and prosperous society in the entire universe."
Chapter 64: The division of Selinopolis and the concept of a large intergalactic exchange sphere
In order to further develop Selinopolis, Selia has decided to drastically change the city's management structure. She decided to aim for more efficient management and further development by dividing the city into four sections and assigning a leader to each. This transformation was an important step to accommodate the city's rapid growth and better accommodate different demographics and economic activities.
The new division names were "Seria A," "Seria B," "Seria C," and "Seria D," and each was given its own role. Celia hoped that this division would further strengthen the city's management system, and that each division would cooperate with each other while developing with its own characteristics and specialized fields. Additionally, this new organizational structure was a means to ensure more equal opportunities for all citizens.
Partitioning of Selinopolis and appointment of new leader
Celia decided to select a leader for each division and give each division responsibility in a specific area. This new partition structure was intended to provide advanced infrastructure using dimensional energy technology and economic independence for each partition.
Seria A (political/administrative district)

Seria A was the district responsible for the politics and administration of the city, and became the central place where strategic decisions and policies for the entire city were decided. The most trusted executives were placed in Seria A to coordinate each section of the city and manage dimensional energy technology. This section will play an important role in supporting the future growth of Selinopolis as a whole.
Adrian Lang, a person Celia has trusted for many years and has expertise in the efficient use of dimensional energy, has been appointed as the leader. Adrian was expected to utilize the experience he has gained through city management to promote overall coordination and policies centered on Seria A.
Seria B (economic/commercial zone)
Seria B was the zone responsible for the economic activities and commercial aspects of the city, with a particular focus on industrial development using dimensional energy technology. In this area, new industries using dimensional energy technology will be born, and market expansion and economic growth will proceed.
Liam Crane, who has great experience in the fields of energy technology and commerce, has been appointed as the leader of Seria B. Liam was responsible for driving the commercialization of dimensional energy technology and creating a strategy for Selinopolis to build an even stronger economy. His goal is for Selinopolis to become more prosperous through trade and commerce with other planetary systems.
Seria C (Cultural and Educational District)
Seria C will be the cultural and educational hub of the city, a place to develop the next generation of citizens and promote cultural prosperity. It was hoped that new educational methods using dimensional energy and cultural exchange would take place here. Seria C will play an important role in providing a place for the city's spiritual growth and civic learning.
Saira Elman was chosen as the leader of Celia C. Saira had the ability to innovate in the fields of education and culture, and was expected to use dimensional energy to improve the educational level of all citizens. She aimed to make Selinopolis a place of learning and create a cultural network that spanned the entire universe.

Seria D (Environment/Resource District)
Seria D is the division responsible for managing the environment and resources of Selinopolis, with particular emphasis on the energy supply system using dimensional energy technology and the sustainable management of the city's resources as a whole. In this area, environmental management using dimensional energy was carried out, and the city was required to develop in a sustainable manner.
Karim Vargas was appointed as the leader. Karim is an expert in environmental technology and resource management, and was expected to use dimensional energy to efficiently manage the city's resources and do his best to build a sustainable society. His goal was to establish Selinopolis as the greenest city in the universe.
___________________


Concept of a large intergalactic exchange sphere
As the division of Selinopolis was completed and the city's operations became more efficient, Celia had even grander visions. It was not just an expansion of the economic zone, but a large-scale initiative that connected different galaxies. Celia announced a new concept called a "Great Intergalactic Exchange Sphere." It would link the current M104 galactic halo with other neighboring galaxies, creating a vast economic zone based on dimensional energy technology that would further increase GDP by a factor of four.
"Our goal is for Selinopolis to continue to have an impact beyond the galaxy and throughout the universe," Celia announced her vision and addressed the assembled leaders. "Our next goal is to strengthen ties not only with the M104 galaxy halo but also with neighboring galaxies and create an economic zone on a galactic scale."
This announcement was met with surprise and approval from the audience. The realization of the ``Great Intergalactic Exchange Sphere'' proposed by Selia has the potential to create an economic zone of unprecedented scale, and it is immeasurable how much benefit its success will bring to Selinopolis.

Seria D (Environment/Resource District)
Seria D is the division responsible for managing the environment and resources of Selinopolis, with particular emphasis on the energy supply system using dimensional energy technology and the sustainable management of the city's resources as a whole. In this area, environmental management using dimensional energy was carried out, and the city was required to develop in a sustainable manner.
Karim Vargas was appointed as the leader. Karim is an expert in environmental technology and resource management, and was expected to use dimensional energy to efficiently manage the city's resources and do his best to build a sustainable society. His goal was to establish Selinopolis as the greenest city in the universe.
___________________


Concept of a large intergalactic exchange sphere
As the division of Selinopolis was completed and the city's operations became more efficient, Celia had even grander visions. It was not just an expansion of the economic zone, but a large-scale initiative that connected different galaxies. Celia announced a new concept called a "Great Intergalactic Exchange Sphere." It would link the current M104 galactic halo with other neighboring galaxies, creating a vast economic zone based on dimensional energy technology that would further increase GDP by a factor of four.
"Our goal is for Selinopolis to continue to have an impact beyond the galaxy and throughout the universe," Celia announced her vision and addressed the assembled leaders. "Our next goal is to strengthen ties not only with the M104 galaxy halo but also with neighboring galaxies and create an economic zone on a galactic scale."
This announcement was met with surprise and approval from the audience. The realization of the ``Great Intergalactic Exchange Sphere'' proposed by Selia has the potential to create an economic zone of unprecedented scale, and it is immeasurable how much benefit its success will bring to Selinopolis.

“If this initiative becomes a reality, our GDP will further increase fourfold,” Celia continued. "Not only that, but a society will be created in which all civilizations in the universe will be connected in one economic zone, resources and knowledge will be exchanged freely, and the entire universe will prosper."
This vision was not just to expand the economic sphere, but to bring about cultural exchange, technological innovation, and social development across the galaxy. Celia believed that the efficiency of trade and resource supply using dimensional energy technology would benefit civilizations throughout the galaxy.
___________________


The future of Selinopolis and the growth of the universe
Selia's concept of a "Great Intergalactic Exchange Sphere" was a new challenge for Selinopolis, and had the potential to become a large-scale project involving the entire universe. To achieve this, Celia began to devise a concrete strategy to connect all galaxies by making full use of dimensional energy technology.
"We're not just aiming for the prosperity of the city," Celia said, reaffirming that goal. "Our goal is to unite the cultures and economies of the entire universe to create societies that thrive together."
Chapter 65: Encounter with Evatron and start of negotiations
Selinopolis further accelerated its development and succeeded in building a galactic-scale economic zone by making full use of dimensional energy technology. Based on Celia's vision, construction of a large intergalactic exchange zone is underway, and the next target is a huge galaxy called "Evatron". As its name suggests, Evatron is a galaxy with a culture that is dominated by men and women, and has a very unique set of values ​​and social structure. The culture was particularly rooted in gender-based domination and division of roles, which was the exact opposite of the egalitarian society advocated by Celia.

"Your vision is amazing, Celia, and we would like to help make it a reality. However, we must carefully assess how long it will take and how much risk it will involve."
"That's right," Celia answered calmly. "But I believe, as Selinopolis has already proven, that dimensional energy technology can enable us to do things previously thought impossible. We have the power."
After that, leaders from all over the universe expressed their opinions from their respective positions, and the meeting became more heated. However, Celia's words were consistently imbued with conviction, and the number of admirers for her strong leadership increased.
As the meeting progressed, the number of people who agreed with Celia's plan gradually increased, and in the end, preparations were made to proceed with the construction of an economic zone on a galaxy-wide scale as a resolution of the "Great Space Leaders Meeting". This resolution was the first step in bringing a new order to civilizations throughout the universe.
___________________


Towards the realization of the largest civilization in the entire universe
After that, Selia continued to commercialize dimensional energy technology and took concrete steps to build a space economic zone centered on Selinopolis. The new economic zone aimed to build a system that would allow all citizens to enjoy benefits equally, centered on technological innovation based on dimensional energy.
``The future is not just about economic prosperity,'' Celia said, holding up her vision. “We will create a society that connects the entire universe and builds the coexistence of culture, knowledge and people.”
Many leaders who gathered sympathized with these words and vowed to introduce dimensional energy technology and support the development of a new space economic zone.
"Selinopolis will not only be a commercial area, but a center of civilization that will contribute to the entire universe," Celia said with conviction, her voice echoing throughout the venue.
Chapter 63: Development of economic disparity and diplomatic stability of Selinopolis

“If this initiative becomes a reality, our GDP will further increase fourfold,” Celia continued. "Not only that, but a society will be created in which all civilizations in the universe will be connected in one economic zone, resources and knowledge will be exchanged freely, and the entire universe will prosper."
This vision was not just to expand the economic sphere, but to bring about cultural exchange, technological innovation, and social development across the galaxy. Celia believed that the efficiency of trade and resource supply using dimensional energy technology would benefit civilizations throughout the galaxy.
___________________


The future of Selinopolis and the growth of the universe
Selia's concept of a "Great Intergalactic Exchange Sphere" was a new challenge for Selinopolis, and had the potential to become a large-scale project involving the entire universe. To achieve this, Celia began to devise a concrete strategy to connect all galaxies by making full use of dimensional energy technology.
"We're not just aiming for the prosperity of the city," Celia said, reaffirming that goal. "Our goal is to unite the cultures and economies of the entire universe to create societies that thrive together."
Chapter 65: Encounter with Evatron and start of negotiations
Selinopolis further accelerated its development and succeeded in building a galactic-scale economic zone by making full use of dimensional energy technology. Based on Celia's vision, construction of a large intergalactic exchange zone is underway, and the next target is a huge galaxy called "Evatron". As its name suggests, Evatron is a galaxy with a culture that is dominated by men and women, and has a very unique set of values ​​and social structure. The culture was particularly rooted in gender-based domination and division of roles, which was the exact opposite of the egalitarian society advocated by Celia.

While Selinopolis was rapidly growing as the center of the entire universe's economic zone, the problem of economic disparity was becoming more serious as expected. By making full use of dimensional energy technology, the city's economic scale steadily expanded, and its GDP increased by several orders of magnitude, reaching 42 quintillion dollars. However, behind this rapid development was a huge disparity between the rich and the poor.
The person with the most assets was Celia herself, with her assets amounting to 1.5 quintillion dollars. Because of this, Celia is a dominant presence in the economic system that makes full use of dimensional energy, and her influence never wavers. However, the growing disparity within the city was becoming a serious problem for more and more citizens. While some people had access to luxury resorts, housing, and advanced technology, the poor were unable to enjoy these benefits and were forced to live a harsh life.
``I never expected that the economic disparity would widen so much in the city I built.'' Celia felt this reality as she watched the city's day-to-day operations. "But if we don't address this issue, our future is in jeopardy."
She hoped to create an egalitarian and prosperous society under her rule, but reality was far from that ideal. Although an efficient economic system using dimensional energy technology certainly brought many benefits, it was inevitable that the benefits would be unevenly distributed among a few people. How to correct this disparity became a new challenge for Celia.
___________________


miraculous social stability
Surprisingly, however, there were no riots, brawls, or social unrest within Selinopolis. Despite facing severe economic disparities, the citizens remained surprisingly calm about the stability of their society. On many other planets, such widening inequality would likely lead to widespread social unrest and violence. But that didn't happen in Selinopolis. Why exactly was that?

The leaders of Evatron valued power and war to maintain order in order to rule their galaxy. Although its economic size was only 3.3 quintillion dollars, its combat power and political influence were enormous, and it was highly respected within the galaxy. Celia was exploring how Selinopolis and Evatron could form a cooperative relationship. However, it was clear that cultural differences were likely to be an obstacle and negotiations would be difficult.
Negotiations between the leader of Evatron and Celia
Negotiations with Evatron were to be conducted very carefully. Celia decided to have a meeting with its leader, Grim Dargos. Grimm was a symbolic figure in Evatron's male-dominated society, and his authority was absolute. He placed the utmost importance on maintaining order through force, and had particularly strong prejudices regarding the ``social status of women.'' These values ​​were exactly what caused Celia's backlash, but negotiations had to proceed one step at a time.
"Ceria Leader," Grim Dargos said with a deadpan expression as he faced Celia. "Your planet, Selinopolis, is interesting, but it is a far cry from our Evatron culture. We value power and order most. We have no interest in ideals of equality or harmony."
Celia was momentarily surprised by Grimm's words, but quickly regained her composure. She knew how difficult this negotiation would be, but she still agreed.
"Dear Grimm, I believe that in the future shown in Selinopolis, it is important for all civilizations to cooperate with each other and prosper. Your galaxy should also be part of this, and by growing together and sharing resources, we should be able to gain common benefits."
"Common interests?" Grim said with a sarcastic smile. "What you think of as profit is completely different from our values."
Celia nodded silently, but continued with a sparkle in her eyes.

"It is true that our values are different. However, it is true that the economic zone we have built using dimensional energy technology has brought great benefits to other civilizations. This technology and economic model have the power to bring prosperity to all planets."
Celia's words were filled with conviction and strength. She positioned this negotiation not as a mere exchange of resources, but as the first step toward sharing a common goal that civilizations across the universe should have.
"I am ready to provide dimensional energy technology to your galaxy and support the development of Evatron. Of course, what we seek is cooperation and coexistence. Rather than one side dominating, we grow together and share resources."
Grimm listened to Celia's words silently, and after being silent for a while, he finally spoke.
"The coexistence you speak of is a heretical idea for us at Evatron. However, we are interested in the dimensional energy technology you speak of. It is essential to further improve our technological capabilities and expand our economy."
Celia heard those words and was convinced of victory in her heart. Negotiations were likely to be difficult, but I felt that at least I had taken the first step.
"Then let's start by providing some of the technology as a test case. This way we can see how effective our cooperation will be," Celia suggested.
Grim thought about Celia's proposal for a while, but finally nodded.
"You're right. Let's start with a small cooperation."
___________________


Establishment of exchange relationships and their effects
After the negotiations were concluded, Selinopolis and Evatron established their first real exchange relationship. It was decided to provide dimensional energy technology at an early stage, and the introduction of the technology on the Evatron side proceeded. Although Evatron was skilled in its combat power and resource management, it had problems with its efficient energy supply system and commercial activities using dimensional energy. It was clear that Selinopolis' technology would be of great help to Evatron in this regard.

``This is the beginning of a new era.'' Celia privately celebrated the deal. "Working with Evatron is a step toward expanding our space-scale economy and making our vision a reality."
As this relationship progressed, the collaboration between Selinopolis and Evatron deepened. Evatron was able to incorporate dimensional energy technology to improve economic efficiency and resource management, and Selinopolis was able to learn combat techniques and resource utilization available from Evatron. This is truly a win-win situation for both parties, as their skills and knowledge complement each other, setting the stage for building a stronger economic zone.
It was also hoped that by deepening the relationship with Evatron, they would be able to further expand their influence on other galaxies. Selia sought to solidify Selinopolis' leadership throughout the universe through enhanced dimensional energy technology and commercial systems.
___________________


Future prospects and new challenges
``Now comes the real challenge.'' Celia began thinking about her next move as her cooperative relationship with Evatron progressed. "We are not just aiming to expand our economic zone. Our ultimate goal is to build a society where all civilizations in the universe can develop together."
However, Celia already understood that this vision was far from easy. While the cooperative relationship with Evatron deepened, cultural differences and conflicting values ​​became apparent, and it was predicted that various obstacles would continue to be faced. However, Celia was determined to overcome these difficulties and move forward in order to build a system of cooperation on a cosmic scale.
Chapter 66: The Emergence of the Phalanx and the Crisis of Selinopolis

The leaders of Evatron valued power and war to maintain order in order to rule their galaxy.その経済規模は33京ドルに過ぎなかったが、それでもその戦闘力と政治的影響力は非常に大きく、銀河系内では一目置かれていた。 Celia was exploring how Selinopolis and Evatron could form a cooperative relationship. However, it was clear that cultural differences were likely to be an obstacle and negotiations would be difficult.

"Ceria Leader," Grim Dargos said with a deadpan expression as he faced Celia. 「あなたの星、Selinopolisは興味深い。しかし、私たちエヴァトロンの文化とはかけ離れたものだ。私たちは力と秩序を最も重んじる。平等や調和といった理念には関心がない。」
