``In order to shake Celia's control, we need to take control of this area.'' Katrina calmly gave instructions to the knights. "Our goal is to disrupt her system and take it back into our hands."
When the riots began, the Celia D section was quickly engulfed in chaos. Katrina's Knights developed a tactic that utilized dimensional energy to penetrate Celia's defenses and disable her energy supply systems. Katrina was extremely superior tactically, and in the battle within Seria D sector, she boasted an overwhelming advantage over Seria's troops.
After the control center in Seria D was destroyed and the energy supply became unstable, the entire city's systems gradually began to shut down. Katrina cleverly took advantage of the chaos and succeeded in spreading a wave of rebellion.
"Celia, your reign is now over," Katrina said confidently. “We will take back this city.”
___________________


Celia’s response and dispatch of senior executives
Celia understood that this situation was too serious. The capture of the prison, the riot in Seria D section, and the destabilization of the entire city. It was no longer just a rebellion, but had developed into a critical situation that threatened the survival of Selinopolis.
Celia calmly analyzed the situation and decided to immediately dispatch a senior executive. Led by her trusted subordinate, Adrian Lang, she assembled her most elite troops and prepared to take action against the rebels.
"The situation in Celia D Section is serious. Ninny, who has succeeded in taking control of the prison, is on the move again." Celia immediately coordinates with Adrian and instructs him to accurately grasp the situation within the city. "Our first priority is to contain Katrina and Ninny's movements."
Adrian Lang received the instructions and immediately started moving. Celia's forces were equipped with the latest tactics using dimensional energy and were ready to confront the rebels. Celia herself believed that she should take action before the chaos spread any further, and began to take calm measures to bring the situation under control.

"It's not that I don't know anything, but this meteorite attack was not directed by me," Helios answered calmly. "I work in accordance with the objectives of the Phalanx, but I know nothing about meteorites."
Celia showed a moment of surprise at those words. It was an unexpected fact that he was not involved in the meteorite attack. Although Celia did not immediately understand the contradiction, she was convinced that she needed to investigate further.
"What do you mean you're not involved?" Celia continued to ask. "If you were working to destroy this city, I thought you were involved in the use of meteorites. How do you not know that?"
Helios answered calmly. "Meteorites were not part of our plans. Our goal was to destroy Selinopolis economically. The meteorite attack was the work of an entirely different force."
At that moment, Celia remembered something. The location of the meteorite and its planned nature. Celia realized that there was another being behind it. It was not just the actions of terrorists, but someone with deeper intentions.
“Another force?” Celia thought as she reflected on those words. "If so, who would do this...?"
Helios sighed for a moment, then said something even more surprising. "It's just as you think. It was 'Ninny' who sent that meteorite."
"Ninny?" When Celia heard that name, she was surprised and felt a cold sweat run down her face. "By any chance, that ninny...?"
Helios continued without expression. "Yes, Ninny was once in Gigapolis and was heavily involved in our plans. However, she left us at some point and went her own way. Now she is working on her own agenda. She decided to use that meteorite to attack Selinopolis."

Katrina has formed her own order of knights and trained selected warriors. These warriors were truly loyal and unafraid of death, and none of the ones she chose went into battle without cutting corners. Under Katrina's guidance, they made full use of dimensional energy, and their tactics set them apart from other knights.
The fighting style of the Knights of Katrina was not one of simply showing off their strength, but one of using clever traps and tricks to defeat their opponents. She taught her knights to make calm decisions in all situations and avoid unnecessary battles. Therefore, as soon as Celia's troops set foot in Katrina's base, they immediately began to demonstrate their power.
___________________


Great escalation of fighting
The moment Celia's knights reached Katrina's base, Katrina's knights surrounded them, as if they had predicted it beforehand. Celia's unit stopped for a moment in surprise, but at that moment Katrina's unit attacked.
"Attack on!" At the same time as the squad leader shouted, an attack that released dimensional energy hit Celia's knights. An explosive wave of energy spread, and Celia's troops were overwhelmed by its power. Katrina's knights skillfully manipulated dimensional energy and did not allow any counterattack by Celia's troops.
"Your tactics are old," Katrina said calmly. Those eyes were already dominating the battlefield in front of them. "Our tactics are relentless until we completely neutralize our opponent."
Celia's troops continued to fight desperately, but Katrina's elite knights overwhelmed them one after another with their speed, attack power, and tactical dexterity. They made full use of long-range attacks using dimensional energy, leaving no chance for Celia's knights to counterattack. Although they were a small and elite group, Katrina's knights repeatedly attacked like a storm, and Celia's troops were swamped by the waves.
``Why are you doing this?'' cried a member of Celia's squad, falling to the ground. "Why are you so strong...!"

"It's not that I don't know anything, but this meteorite attack was not directed by me," Helios answered calmly. "I work in accordance with the objectives of the Phalanx, but I know nothing about meteorites."
Celia showed a moment of surprise at those words. It was an unexpected fact that he was not involved in the meteorite attack. Although Celia did not immediately understand the contradiction, she was convinced that she needed to investigate further.

Helios answered calmly. "Meteorites were not part of our plans. Our goal was to destroy Selinopolis economically. The meteorite attack was the work of an entirely different force."
At that moment, Celia remembered something. The location of the meteorite and its planned nature. Celia realized that there was another being behind it. It was not just the actions of terrorists, but someone with deeper intentions.
“Another force?” Celia thought as she reflected on those words. "If so, who would do this...?"
Helios sighed for a moment, then said something even more surprising. "It's just as you think. It was 'Ninny' who sent that meteorite."
"Ninny?" When Celia heard that name, she was surprised and felt a cold sweat run down her face. "By any chance, that ninny...?"
Helios continued without expression. "Yes, Ninny was once in Gigapolis and was heavily involved in our plans. However, she left us at some point and went her own way. Now she is working on her own agenda. She decided to use that meteorite to attack Selinopolis."

Celia was shocked by those words. I had heard the name Ninny once during my Gigapolis days. She was once an important person who ruled the city along with Alpha, and then disappeared somewhere. Celia never expected her to appear again. However, it has now become clear that she is targeting Selinopolis.
"Ninny..." Celia mumbled the name. Ninny had a place in her memory that she would never forget. She was a person with a unique tactical mind and a cold will. She and Celia once ruled the same city and pursued their goals together, but their values ​​gradually diverged.
``I understand why Ninny showed up.'' Celia turned to Helios with a deep sigh. "But why did you choose a meteorite attack? Why did it have to cause us such massive destruction?"
Helios was silent for a moment, then answered. "Ninny harbors a deep grudge against you. During your time together in Gigapolis, she respected you as a leader, but that respect has turned to hatred. She feels that the path you have chosen and the path she believes in are completely at odds with each other. That is why she has attacked Selinopolis to destroy your vision."
Those words weigh heavily on Celia. She couldn't help but think about how cold-hearted her former companion Ninny had become. Ninny isn't just a traitor, he has a deeper purpose in attacking Selinopolis.
"Ninny..." Celia repeated those words as she thought back to her past memories. "At that time, I thought she chose to walk with me. But now she is working to defeat me."
Celia took a deep breath, regained her composure, and decided to take action immediately.

"I cannot tolerate this rebellion," Celia vowed in her heart. "I will fight at all costs to protect the future of Selinopolis."
___________________


To the final battle between Celia and the rebels
Celia immediately decided to confront the rebels in order to protect the city she had built. Ninny takes control of the prison, Katrina goes on a rampage with Celia D, and the plan behind it all. All of these were challenges that Celia could not tolerate.
Chapter 75: Celia D’s emergency alert and wanted list
For Selinopolis as a whole, the riots in Seria D have escalated beyond expectations and become a crisis that shakes the very foundations of the city's economy and operations. The social framework that Celia had built, and the city's infrastructure that made full use of dimensional energy, had temporarily stopped, directly impacting the lives of all citizens. It became clear that this was not just a riot by rebels, but a planned attack aimed at taking control of the city.
Former allies Katrina Veiros and Ninny Offenbach have rebelled once again, and their ambitions threaten Selinopolis. Although Celia was deeply shaken by this fact, she made a calm decision.
``If this continues, everything will collapse.'' Celia took a deep breath and immediately issued instructions. "Issue an emergency alert for Celia D sector and formulate a top-priority operation to capture the rebels. Put Katrina Veiros and Ninny Offenbach on the wanted list, and make capturing them the most important mission."
Celia's decision was a very tough one, proving once again her cold-heartedness and leadership ability. The rebels once again threaten his rule, and thwarting their plans is a top priority. In her heart, she felt that putting down this rebellion was essential to the future of Selinopolis. And if he could capture them, he was planning to execute them just like Alpha.

___________________


Reunion and decisive battle with Ninny
Celia was convinced that Ninny was attacking Selinopolis and made preparations to go after her. Although Celia had mixed feelings about being reunited with her former comrades, she calmly faced her mission. Ninny was once a powerful strategist in Gigapolis, and his tactical mind was extraordinary. There was no doubt that there was a definite purpose and plan behind her reappearance.
Celia followed Ninny's footsteps, using dimensional energy to choose the most efficient tracking method. Her presence lurks somewhere in Selinopolis, and Celia does her best to find her hidden location.
"Ninny, I don't know what your plans are," Celia said to herself as she continued her pursuit. "But I will not allow you to destroy Selinopolis."
Eventually, Celia finally finds out where Ninny is and meets her again. The location, an abandoned area just outside the center of Selinopolis, was the perfect place to hide. Ninny stood there, as if waiting for Celia to arrive.
"Celia..." Ninny said quietly, smiling coldly. "The time has finally come for you to meet me face to face."
Celia looked into his eyes and said calmly. "Ninny, why did you do this? Why did you choose to destroy our path?"
Ninny replied, turning her cold eyes on Celia. "Because you chose the wrong path. The glory of Selinopolis is not what we built together. You took control of the city and abandoned the past. This is the result."
Celia calmly accepted those words and prepared for the confrontation with Ninny while thinking tactically about her next move. Now, a battle between the two had become inevitable.

"I'm going after her." Celia prepared to leave, leaving Helios captive. "If Ninny is coming to Selinopolis, I must confront her personally and protect this city."

Chapter 69: Direct confrontation with Ninny's curse
Celia is once again faced with a confrontation with Ninny, her former comrade, who is now desperately trying to exact revenge. When they arrived at the hideout, Ninny stood quietly waiting for Celia. There was something cold about his appearance, and it gave her the feeling of something completely different from the passion and friendship she had before. All she saw in her eyes was deep hatred and a desire for destruction.
Celia realized how much Ninny had changed. The days when we walked together in Gigapolis, the days when we fought with the same aspirations. Celia felt firsthand how much anger and curse that had turned into. Ninny can feel the curse of Alpha's death swirling in her eyes.
"Celia..." Ninny's voice sounded cold and sharp. "You betrayed Alpha back then. Killing him was the greatest betrayal for me."
Although Celia calmly accepted those words, she felt deep pain inside. Alpha's death was certainly shocking, but defeating him was just a tactical decision. It was precisely because his ambitions were in danger of destroying the city that Celia laid down her hand on him. But for Ninny, it became an unbearable betrayal and a curse that consumed her heart.
"Ninny, I didn't betray Alpha," Celia answered calmly. "His path was wrong then. We had the same goal, but in the end the path you chose and the path I chose did not intersect."
Ninny silently walked forward without reacting to those words. In her hand was a weapon that was once used in Gigapolis. The sword that manipulated dimensional energy was familiar to Celia as well. He was once a partner who fought alongside him, and now he is using that weapon to exact his own revenge.
``Your words have no meaning.'' Ninny said coldly. "Alpha is dead and you must die now too."

"I will not die." Celia took a step forward and used dimensional energy to prepare her own weapon. "No matter how much you curse me, I have something to protect."
With those words as a signal, the battle began.
___________________


The beginning of a fierce battle
Ninny was the first to move. She looked at Celia with sharp eyes and immediately swung the sword. The blade, which was condensed with dimensional energy, tore apart space and approached Celia with an explosive shock wave. Celia dodged the attack and immediately launched a counterattack. Her weapons also used dimensional energy, but Ninny's attacks were a step above in terms of power and speed.
``I can't lose like this.'' Celia understood Ninny's strength that she felt during the battle, and increased her dimensional energy even more. Her attacks gradually became more intense, and the space around Celia became distorted. Even so, Ninny reacted one after another with her speed and strength, dodging Celia's attacks and never letting up on counterattacks.
Celia remembered the old Ninny. At that time, Ninny still had his own beliefs and was a friend who fought together to develop the city. However, from the sword she wields now, I can only feel revenge and hatred. Although Celia felt a strong pain in her heart due to the difference, she continued to fight.
"I never thought you'd fall this far, Ninny," Celia said with a breath. "I wonder how much time you and I spent together, and now it's all wasted..."
"Shut up!" Ninny yelled, attacking Celia again. Her attack was merciless, and a sharp blow was fired that pierced Celia's body. Celia took a step back and fully utilized her dimensional energy to block the blade, but Ninny's attack continued without stopping.

Celia took those words seriously and made up her mind to face the coldhearted man. He knew how much hatred Ninny had, but he still couldn't let her destroy Selinopolis.
"I will not die." Celia took a step forward and used dimensional energy to prepare her own weapon. "No matter how much you curse me, I have something to protect."

"Because you betrayed me, I lost everything!" Ninny shouted as she continued to swing her sword. "Alpha and I were robbed of everything by the path you chose!"
Although Celia was deeply hurt by those words, she did not stop fighting and began a counterattack. At the moment when she concentrated her dimensional energy and released all her power, Celia's sword glowed and released a force that seemed to tear apart the distortions in space.
"Ninny, I can't respond to your hatred," Celia said, keeping her cool as she delivered the final blow. "No matter how much you curse me, I will protect Selinopolis and its future."
The blow knocked Ninny's sword away, and the violent impact sent her flying backwards. Ninny fell to the ground and glared at Celia, even though her face showed pain.
"You...knocked me out...?" Ninny said, breathing heavily. In his eyes, I could feel his strong will to defeat Celia with his final strength.
"Ninny, you've lost your way," Celia said quietly. "The only thing I can do for you is to stop you."
After that, Celia spent a few quiet moments looking down at Ninny without catching her. Ninny was completely defeated in that battle. However, deep sadness spread within Celia's heart. Sadness over her former comrade who had ultimately chosen the path of revenge and hatred enveloped her.
Chapter 70: Dialogue with Ninny and final decision
Things temporarily quieted down after a direct confrontation with Ninny, in which she was defeated and captured by Celia. Although Selinopolis' economic activity and social order were once again returning to stability, Celia felt the deep pain left behind by the battle with Ninny. The sadness that his former comrade and the person with whom he had pursued his dreams had fallen to this point never went away.

Celia took those words seriously and made up her mind to face the coldhearted man. He knew how much hatred Ninny had, but he still couldn't let her destroy Selinopolis.
"I will not die." Celia took a step forward and used dimensional energy to prepare her own weapon. "No matter how much you curse me, I have something to protect."
With those words as a signal, the battle began.
___________________


The beginning of a fierce battle
Ninny was the first to move. She looked at Celia with sharp eyes and immediately swung the sword. The blade, which was condensed with dimensional energy, tore apart space and approached Celia with an explosive shock wave. Celia dodged the attack and immediately launched a counterattack. Her weapons also used dimensional energy, but Ninny's attacks were a step above in terms of power and speed.
``I can't lose like this.'' Celia understood Ninny's strength that she felt during the battle, and increased her dimensional energy even more. Her attacks gradually became more intense, and the space around Celia became distorted. Even so, Ninny reacted one after another with her speed and strength, dodging Celia's attacks and never letting up on counterattacks.
Celia remembered the old Ninny. At that time, Ninny still had his own beliefs and was a friend who fought together to develop the city. However, from the sword she wields now, I can only feel revenge and hatred. Although Celia felt a strong pain in her heart due to the difference, she continued to fight.
"I never thought you'd fall this far, Ninny," Celia said with a breath. "I wonder how much time you and I spent together, and now it's all wasted..."
"Shut up!" Ninny yelled, attacking Celia again. Her attack was merciless, and a sharp blow was fired that pierced Celia's body. Celia took a step back and fully utilized her dimensional energy to block the blade, but Ninny's attack continued without stopping.

"Because you betrayed me, I lost everything!" Ninny shouted as she continued to swing her sword. "Alpha and I were robbed of everything by the path you chose!"
Although Celia was deeply hurt by those words, she did not stop fighting and began a counterattack. At the moment when she concentrated her dimensional energy and released all her power, Celia's sword glowed and released a force that seemed to tear apart the distortions in space.
"Ninny, I can't respond to your hatred," Celia said, keeping her cool as she delivered the final blow. "No matter how much you curse me, I will protect Selinopolis and its future."
The blow knocked Ninny's sword away, and the violent impact sent her flying backwards. Ninny fell to the ground and glared at Celia, even though her face showed pain.
"You...knocked me out...?" Ninny said, breathing heavily. In his eyes, I could feel his strong will to defeat Celia with his final strength.
"Ninny, you've lost your way," Celia said quietly. "The only thing I can do for you is to stop you."
After that, Celia spent a few quiet moments looking down at Ninny without catching her. Ninny was completely defeated in that battle. However, deep sadness spread within Celia's heart. Sadness over her former comrade who had ultimately chosen the path of revenge and hatred enveloped her.
Chapter 70: Dialogue with Ninny and final decision

The sadness that his former comrade and the person with whom he had pursued his dreams had fallen to this point never went away.

Ninny was later taken to prison. Under the close surveillance of Selinopolis, she was physically and mentally restrained for some time. However, rather than just treating Celia as a prisoner, he decided to have a dialogue with her. Even though Celia understood how difficult this conversation would be for her, she chose to face it. There was hope that by finding some kind of solution, Ninny's desire for revenge could be suppressed, and she could look to the future.
___________________


dialogue in prison
When Celia went to the prison, she saw Ninny sitting there with cold eyes. Her former calmness, calculation, and sharpness as a tactician are still intact. However, his eyes were filled with deep hatred and anger, and his gaze was pressing down on Celia.
Celia stopped a short distance away and looked at Ninny. Her face had already lost the glow it once had when they dreamed together, and was now filled with anger and despair.
"Ninny, I want to talk to you," Celia said quietly. There was no fear in his voice, just seriousness. Celia looked firmly into Ninny's cold-looking eyes and said with strong will. "There's one last thing I'd like to ask you."
Ninny listened to Celia's words and sat in silence for a while. The silence felt very heavy to Celia. Eventually, Ninny answered in a cold voice.
"There's nothing to tell me." Her voice clearly held strong hatred and anger at past betrayals. "Because you betrayed Alpha, I lost everything. Because of you, my path was completely closed and my ideals were destroyed."
Celia took a deep breath at those words. No matter how much she understood what had led up to this situation, Ninny's hatred never subsided. However, Celia dared to accept his cold words and strengthened her resolve to go further.

"Because you betrayed me, I lost everything!" Ninny shouted as she continued to swing her sword. "Alpha and I were robbed of everything by the path you chose!"
Although Celia was deeply hurt by those words, she did not stop fighting and began a counterattack. At the moment when she concentrated her dimensional energy and released all her power, Celia's sword glowed and released a force that seemed to tear apart the distortions in space.

dialogue in prison
When Celia went to the prison, she saw Ninny sitting there with cold eyes. Her former calmness, calculation, and sharpness as a tactician are still intact. However, his eyes were filled with deep hatred and anger, and his gaze was pressing down on Celia.
Celia stopped a short distance away and looked at Ninny. Her face had already lost the glow it once had when they dreamed together, and was now filled with anger and despair.
"Ninny, I want to talk to you," Celia said quietly. There was no fear in his voice, just seriousness. Celia looked firmly into Ninny's cold-looking eyes and said with strong will. "There's one last thing I'd like to ask you."
Ninny listened to Celia's words and sat in silence for a while. The silence felt very heavy to Celia. Eventually, Ninny answered in a cold voice.
"There's nothing to tell me." Her voice clearly held strong hatred and anger at past betrayals. "Because you betrayed Alpha, I lost everything. Because of you, my path was completely closed and my ideals were destroyed."
Celia took a deep breath at those words. No matter how much she understood what had led up to this situation, Ninny's hatred never subsided. However, Celia dared to accept his cold words and strengthened her resolve to go further.

``I didn't betray you.'' Celia looked at Ninny seriously. "My decision to defeat Alpha was to protect the city and its future. Like you, I thought there was only one future for us to aim for. However, you pursued it in a different way, and I chose that path."
Even after Ninny heard those words, she didn't try to open her heart to Celia in front of her. She sneered and spat out the following words:
"Whatever you say, it's too late," Ninny said bitterly. "When Alpha died, I lost everything. The path you chose hurt me so deeply and made me feel betrayed. I can't get back what I risked everything for."
Celia didn't react to those words and just stared at her face for a while. Her face showed memories of the past as well as deep regret for her choices, but at the same time, she also understood how much of a desire for revenge she herself was.
"Ninny, revenge solves nothing," Celia said quietly but with determination. "The deeper the hatred inside you, the more you yourself will break down."
Ninny's eyes sharpened when she heard those words. She glared at Celia for a moment, then closed her eyes and took a deep breath.
"You've... really changed." Ninny's voice was tinged with a hint of loneliness. "Back then, you were pursuing ideals just like me. But now you are different. You sacrificed everything to protect your people."
Celia felt touched by those words, but she answered calmly.
"The path I chose was right. I made every choice to protect Selinopolis. And if you had chosen a different path, we might still be building a future together."
At those words, Ninny fell silent again and just quietly turned her head away. Celia waited for that silent answer for a while and took a deep breath.

``I didn't betray you.'' Celia looked at Ninny seriously. "My decision to defeat Alpha was to protect the city and its future. Like you, I thought there was only one future for us to aim for. However, you pursued it in a different way, and I chose that path."

Chapter 70: Dialogue with Ninny and final decision
Things temporarily quieted down after a direct confrontation with Ninny, in which she was defeated and captured by Celia. The sadness that his former comrade and the person with whom he had pursued his dreams had fallen to this point never went away.

"Your desire for revenge is already controlling you," Celia finally said. "I am very sad to see the future we once built together now crumbling in your hands."
Ninny listened to Celia's words without saying anything back. There were faint tears in his eyes. However, she just looked forward without wiping her tears.
"Unless I stop seeking revenge, nothing will change," Ninny murmured quietly. "But, Celia, I won't forgive you anymore."
Those words sounded as if they were decisive. Although Celia could feel his determination, she understood it in her heart. Ninny chose to follow that path to the end without letting go of her desire for revenge.
___________________


Going to prison and a new future
Afterwards, Ninny was officially imprisoned in a prison under Celia's instructions. The path she chose was one of destruction and hatred, and no matter how much Celia tried to change that path, her heart remained trapped in it. However, Celia never found hope in that future. Rather, her heart was filled with deep sadness.
"Ninny, no matter how much revenge you seek, I will not accept that curse," Celia vowed firmly in her heart at the moment that decided Ninny's fate. "Even if I were to defeat you, your wounds will never heal."
After that, Celia started walking again with her eyes set on the future of Selinopolis. The path she chose was not an easy one, but she never gave up. In order to protect the peace and prosperity of Selinopolis, and to walk the path that her former companions did not choose, Celia stood up again.
Chapter 71: Encounter between Ninny and Katrina
Ninny, who was confined in a dimly lit cell in a prison, was no longer trapped by the bonds of the past and a desire for revenge. The conversation with Celia caused her deep distress, and she began to look back on the events of that time and the path she had chosen. However, unforgivable thoughts were still swirling in his heart. Meanwhile, a new person appears in front of her.

Chapter 71: Encounter between Ninny and Katrina
Ninny, who was confined in a dimly lit cell in a prison, was no longer trapped by the bonds of the past and a desire for revenge. The conversation with Celia caused her deep distress, and she began to look back on the events of that time and the path she had chosen. However, unforgivable thoughts were still swirling in his heart. Meanwhile, a new person appears in front of her.

``I didn't betray you.'' Celia looked at Ninny seriously. "My decision to defeat Alpha was to protect the city and its future. Like you, I thought there was only one future for us to aim for. However, you pursued it in a different way, and I chose that path."
Even after Ninny heard those words, she didn't try to open her heart to Celia in front of her. She sneered and spat out the following words:
"Whatever you say, it's too late," Ninny said bitterly. "When Alpha died, I lost everything. The path you chose hurt me so deeply and made me feel betrayed. I can't get back what I risked everything for."
Celia didn't react to those words and just stared at her face for a while. Her face showed memories of the past as well as deep regret for her choices, but at the same time, she also understood how much of a desire for revenge she herself was.
"Ninny, revenge solves nothing," Celia said quietly but with determination. "The deeper the hatred inside you, the more you yourself will break down."
Ninny's eyes sharpened when she heard those words. She glared at Celia for a moment, then closed her eyes and took a deep breath.
"You've... really changed." Ninny's voice was tinged with a hint of loneliness. "Back then, you were pursuing ideals just like me. But now you are different. You sacrificed everything to protect your people."
Celia felt touched by those words, but she answered calmly.
"The path I chose was right. I made every choice to protect Selinopolis. And if you had chosen a different path, we might still be building a future together."
At those words, Ninny fell silent again and just quietly turned her head away. Celia waited for that silent answer for a while and took a deep breath.

That person's name is Katrina Veiros. Although she was deeply involved in various events that happened in Gigapolis in the past, she had no direct connection with Ninny. Katrina devises a new plan with Alpha, and has become a person who has a great influence on the fate of the city. However, after Ninny's relationship with Alpha broke down, many years had passed since she left Gigapolis, and she had completely forgotten about Katrina.
Katrina entered Ninny's cell and stood in front of him, as calm as any other prisoner, without showing any emotion. Ninny stared at her, and there was silence for a moment. Looking into Ninny's cold eyes, Katrina sensed how burdened Ninny was with her past, but she did not allow herself to be held back by such a past.
"You're Ninny," Katrina said matter-of-factly. Without emotion in his voice, he confirmed his name to Ninny.
"Yes," Ninny replied calmly. "Are you Katrina Veiros?"
"I've heard about you," Katrina said after a pause. "But I don't know why you're here."
Ninny smiled bitterly and lowered her eyes. Even though Katrina says she knows herself, it's only superficial. It's probably only a fleeting moment that you remember that someone like her was ever in the same city as you.
"Do you know Alpha?" Ninny said suddenly. Katrina frowned a little, but quickly answered.
"Alpha? Of course I do. He was once the leader of Gigapolis and was part of our time together."
At that moment, Ninny's expression changed slightly. As she closed her eyes and took a quiet breath as if remembering something, the events of the past came back to her mind. The moment of parting with Alpha brought back her memories.
___________________


Final farewell to Alpha

That person's name is Katrina Veiros. Although she was deeply involved in various events that happened in Gigapolis in the past, she had no direct connection with Ninny. Katrina devises a new plan with Alpha, and has become a person who has a great influence on the fate of the city. However, after Ninny's relationship with Alpha broke down, many years had passed since she left Gigapolis, and she had completely forgotten about Katrina.
Katrina entered Ninny's cell and stood in front of him, as calm as any other prisoner, without showing any emotion. Ninny stared at her, and there was silence for a moment. Looking into Ninny's cold eyes, Katrina sensed how burdened Ninny was with her past, but she did not allow herself to be held back by such a past.
"You're Ninny," Katrina said matter-of-factly. Without emotion in his voice, he confirmed his name to Ninny.
"Yes," Ninny replied calmly. "Are you Katrina Veiros?"
"I've heard about you," Katrina said after a pause. "But I don't know why you're here."
Ninny smiled bitterly and lowered her eyes. Even though Katrina says she knows herself, it's only superficial. It's probably only a fleeting moment that you remember that someone like her was ever in the same city as you.
"Do you know Alpha?" Ninny said suddenly. Katrina frowned a little, but quickly answered.
"Alpha? Of course I do. He was once the leader of Gigapolis and was part of our time together."
At that moment, Ninny's expression changed slightly. As she closed her eyes and took a quiet breath as if remembering something, the events of the past came back to her mind. The moment of parting with Alpha brought back her memories.
___________________


Final farewell to Alpha

That was back when Gigapolis was still in its glory. Ninny supported the city along with Alpha and had a deep relationship with him. However, the path Alpha chooses gradually begins to conflict with her values. In order to protect the city, he began to distance himself from Alpha in support of Celia's choice, and ultimately decided to part ways.
"Ninny, I have a favor to ask of you," Alpha finally said. At that moment, the two were standing in front of the iconic tower of Gigapolis. The building, built using dimensional energy, symbolized the future of the city. However, beneath that beautiful scenery, a gap had formed between the two that could never be crossed.
"I believed in your path," Ninny answered quietly. "But I have come to understand that your path is wrong. I can no longer walk with you."
Alpha heard those words and took a deep breath. There was a sense of emptiness in his eyes. However, he still nodded silently without answering Ninny.
"Okay," Alpha murmured. "I respect the path you have chosen."
Those were my last words with Alpha. Ninny then decides to leave Gigapolis and pursue a new path, but what awaits her is deep loneliness and a desire for revenge.
___________________


Conversation with Katrina
Katrina noticed that Ninny was reminiscing about her breakup with Alpha. Ninny's expression showed the emotion it once had, and for a moment, its coldness almost disappeared. Katrina reacted sharply to the change and decided to ask further questions.
``You must have had such deep meaning in parting with Alpha.'' Katrina could sense that Ninny was remembering something. "I thought the relationship with him was over at that point, but why are you bringing this up now?"

That was back when Gigapolis was still in its glory. Ninny supported the city along with Alpha and had a deep relationship with him. However, the path Alpha chooses gradually begins to conflict with her values. In order to protect the city, he began to distance himself from Alpha in support of Celia's choice, and ultimately decided to part ways.
"Ninny, I have a favor to ask of you," Alpha finally said. At that moment, the two were standing in front of the iconic tower of Gigapolis. The building, built using dimensional energy, symbolized the future of the city. However, beneath that beautiful scenery, a gap had formed between the two that could never be crossed.
"I believed in your path," Ninny answered quietly. "But I have come to understand that your path is wrong. I can no longer walk with you."
Alpha heard those words and took a deep breath. There was a sense of emptiness in his eyes. However, he still nodded silently without answering Ninny.
"Okay," Alpha murmured. "I respect the path you have chosen."
Those were my last words with Alpha. Ninny then decides to leave Gigapolis and pursue a new path, but what awaits her is deep loneliness and a desire for revenge.
___________________


Conversation with Katrina
Katrina noticed that Ninny was reminiscing about her breakup with Alpha. Ninny's expression showed the emotion it once had, and for a moment, its coldness almost disappeared. Katrina reacted sharply to the change and decided to ask further questions.
``You must have had such deep meaning in parting with Alpha.'' Katrina could sense that Ninny was remembering something. "I thought the relationship with him was over at that point, but why are you bringing this up now?"

Ninny was silent for a moment, then slowly spoke. "Alpha was everything to me." Her voice was quiet, with a hint of a faraway look. "The path he believed in, the path he walked. I thought I should have followed that path and walked with him. But in the end, we both chose different paths."
"The path you chose, and the path Alpha chose." Katrina repeated those words, thinking silently for a moment. "I don't know now which one was right."
Ninny didn't answer and fell silent again. The conflict with Celia, parting with Alpha, and the path of revenge that he has taken. Everything became a curse for her, and she could never be released. However, the Katrina in front of her now was an unexpected presence for her. Katrina had a deep connection with Alpha, but unlike Ninny, she was cold-hearted and never lost sight of her purpose.
"The reason I believed in Alpha back then," Ninny finally continued. "That's because the power and vision he had somehow resonated within me. But when he didn't believe in my path, I lost everything."
Katrina heard these words and was silent for a while, but then she spoke. "I didn't choose Alpha's path, but the path he chose shaped my future. I just followed it."
Those words reflected Katrina's unique beliefs and the depth of her relationship with Alpha. For Ninny, it was a different vision than the one she had once believed in with Alpha. However, Ninny couldn't help but feel that their differences had become an irresistible gap that separated their futures.
___________________


Ninny goes to jail
After finishing her conversation with Katrina, Ninny returned to her room. She felt a deep gap between the person she was then, who was filled with a desire for revenge, and the person she was sitting here now. He ends up in prison and begins to regret choosing the path of revenge.

Ninny was silent for a moment, then slowly spoke. "Alpha was everything to me." Her voice was quiet, with a hint of a faraway look. "The path he believed in, the path he walked. I thought I should have followed that path and walked with him. But in the end, we both chose different paths."
"The path you chose, and the path Alpha chose." Katrina repeated those words, thinking silently for a moment. "I don't know now which one was right."
Ninny didn't answer and fell silent again. The conflict with Celia, parting with Alpha, and the path of revenge that he has taken. Everything became a curse for her, and she could never be released. "I can't go back now," Ninny said quietly. Celia's words, Katrina's words echoed in her heart. No matter how intensely vengeful you are, you often realize too late that it will destroy you and bring you nothing.
In the end, Ninny was left alone in the prison, unable to be freed from the curse. After talking with Celia, she felt that something had changed slightly in her heart, but she still couldn't overturn her past.
Chapter 72: The flame of revenge burns again and the formation of a new order of knights
Ninny lives alone inside the dark walls of the prison. Her past conversation with Celia still echoed deeply in her heart, but the echoes gradually turned into anger and a desire for revenge. At that time, the coldness that Celia showed, and the words she said, ``The deeper your desire for revenge, the more you yourself will break down,'' ignited a fire in Ninny's heart. This intensified her desire for revenge, and once again engraved her hatred towards Celia.
As Celia continues to prosper as the ruler of Selinopolis, Ninny decides to once again plot to subjugate Celia. I wasn't satisfied with just putting my hands down like before. This time, I needed to make preparations to definitely defeat Celia on a much larger scale. Selia's influence became stronger and stronger, and Selinopolis' GDP exceeded 52 quintillion dollars, creating an overwhelming economic zone in the entire universe. However, Ninny could not accept that power. On the contrary, he believed that he could only complete his revenge by overthrowing everything Celia had built and completely destroying the path she had walked.

___________________


Reunion with Katrina and formation of the Knights

Ninny spends her days in prison quietly making plans, but eventually Katrina Veiros shows up to her. At that time, Katrina ruled Selinopolis with Alpha, but due to the path she chose and the consequences of her separation from Alpha, she was gradually forced to make a different choice. As Alpha falls in a confrontation with Celia and Selinopolis grows in power, a new motivation grows in Katrina's mind.
Katrina learns of her former comrade Ninny's desire for revenge and decides to join forces with her again to take down Celia. As long as Celia continues to have great power, she believes that destroying her beliefs and ideals is the only way to regain the dream she once built with Alpha. And in order to subjugate Celia, a powerful organization was needed.
"Ninny, I want to help you too," Katrina said quietly through the prison door. "In order to take your revenge, let's combine our powers and form the Knights again."
Ninny thought about Katrina's proposal for a moment, but then agreed. To re-form the Katrina Knights and set their purpose as subjugating Celia. Because he felt that was the most important thing for Ninny's revenge right now.
"Katrina, with you, we can join forces once again to defeat Celia," Ninny said. There was a cold light in his eyes. "Let's retrace the path we once walked together and get everything back."
Thus, Katrina and Ninny teamed up again to form a new order of knights. In order to exact revenge on Celia and Selinopolis, the girls secretly prepare and quietly grow the seeds of rebellion.

___________________


Formation of the Knights of Katrina

The Katrina Knights, while maintaining their former prosperity and pride, aimed to gather people who harbored a fierce hatred and desire for revenge against Celia. All of the people gathered had strong combat skills, and they were all veterans of battles who had overcome any challenge. Under Ninny and Katrina, they vowed to fight with all their might towards the goal of overthrowing Celia.
"We have one purpose," Katrina said to the new members of the Order. "The goal is to defeat Celia and destroy Selinopolis. And after that, we will build a new order."
Ninny nodded silently next to him and continued. "We will bring back the days when we fought together and the glory of Gigapolis. I will give everything to that end."
The Katrina Knights secretly devised a plan to defeat Celia, and gradually expanded their power. Using dimensional energy technology, Ninny and Katrina developed a strategy against Selinopolis and devised a plan to exploit its weaknesses.
The plan included detailed tactics to defeat the most important target: Celia herself. Preparations were made for her trusted subordinates, a method to neutralize the dimensional energy defense system, and the subsequent takeover of the city.
___________________


Celia's preparations and new challenges
Meanwhile, Celia of Selinopolis was already preparing for the next threat, no matter how strong her control was. Despite continued economic prosperity, she was constantly wary of internal and external rebellions and destabilizing factors. The power that ruled the city seemed to be absolute, but Celia, who had experienced many major rebellions in the past, knew that letting her guard down could be fatal.

Celia's preparations and new challenges
Meanwhile, Celia of Selinopolis was already preparing for the next threat, no matter how strong her control was. Despite continued economic prosperity, she was constantly wary of internal and external rebellions and destabilizing factors. The power that ruled the city seemed to be absolute, but Celia, who had experienced many major rebellions in the past, knew that letting her guard down could be fatal.

``Something is moving.'' Celia sensed this through her intuition as a leader. Through a monitoring system that makes full use of dimensional energy, they were able to detect abnormal movements, but were unable to pinpoint where exactly they were coming from. Celia continued to follow the signs and was sure that her rule was under threat.
``Katrina and Ninny are planning something,'' Celia thought calmly. Her knowledge of past enemy movements allowed her to prepare for their tactical methods. But this time, he sensed that a new rebellion was being planned outside the city.
``I will never lose.'' Celia renewed her determination and began to plan her next move. In order to protect Selinopolis and its future, I am determined to stop the rebellion by any means necessary. Her belief remained the same, and now was the time to prove it.
Chapter 73: The End of the Celia Knights VS Katrina's Overwhelming Victory
Since the formation of a new order of knights led by Katrina Veiros, Selia, the ruler of Selinopolis, has been keeping a close eye on their movements. However, it is difficult to fully grasp Katrina's intentions, and although Celia herself had a vague sense of how she was strengthening the Knights, she never actually knew the full story. Celia nipped the rebellion in the bud by maintaining her power over the entire city, but she underestimated how elite the Katrina Knights were, which later turned out to be a huge miscalculation.
After that, Katrina used the members of the Knights to carry out a thorough infiltration operation inside Selinopolis. Assassination squads began operating in various places, particularly targeting important people under Celia. Like a shadow, she continued to expand her influence and little by little caused chaos within the city.

Chapter 73: The End of the Celia Knights VS Katrina's Overwhelming Victory
Since the formation of a new order of knights led by Katrina Veiros, Selia, the ruler of Selinopolis, has been keeping a close eye on their movements. However, it is difficult to fully grasp Katrina's intentions, and although Celia herself had a vague sense of how she was strengthening the Knights, she never actually knew the full story. Celia nipped the rebellion in the bud by maintaining her power over the entire city, but she underestimated how elite the Katrina Knights were, which later turned out to be a huge miscalculation.
After that, Katrina used the members of the Knights to carry out a thorough infiltration operation inside Selinopolis. Assassination squads began operating in various places, particularly targeting important people under Celia. Like a shadow, she continued to expand her influence and little by little caused chaos within the city.

But Celia was already aware of the effects. She senses that something is wrong inside and begins to investigate, but gradually begins to make preparations to counter the movements of Katrina's Knights. Then, Celia summoned her knights and tried to completely eliminate the rebels. However, whether Katrina knew it or not, she was showing off her tactics, which were a few steps above her.
On that day, the fringe units of Celia's Knights decided to challenge Katrina's power. Celia's unit was made up of dozens of elite soldiers and was the most reliable unit. However, the opponent is Katrina's new knight order, and they are warriors who have been trained through numerous battles they have experienced.
___________________


Departure of the Ceria Knights' final unit
The end units of Celia's Knights have secretly begun working to overthrow Katrina's Knights. At first glance, they look like ordinary soldiers, but in reality they have advanced combat techniques and a fighting style that makes full use of dimensional energy, and have completed many missions to maintain order within the city. However, this mission is extremely dangerous, and under Celia's orders, a direct attack on Katrina's Knights begins.
"Our goal is to capture Katrina," the squad leader calmly instructed. "Defeating her will end this rebellion. But remain vigilant. Katrina's Knights are unlike any previous enemy."
Celia's troops approached Katrina's base, carefully keeping track of their footsteps. Although the knights led by Katrina were small in number, their fighting ability was exceptionally high. The opponents that Celia's knights will take on are elite men who have been trained by the former Alpha and Ninny, and they will never lag behind in battle.

___________________


Katrina Knights' combat power

Katrina has formed her own order of knights and trained selected warriors. These warriors were truly loyal and unafraid of death, and none of the ones she chose went into battle without cutting corners. Under Katrina's guidance, they made full use of dimensional energy, and their tactics set them apart from other knights.
The fighting style of the Knights of Katrina was not one of simply showing off their strength, but one of using clever traps and tricks to defeat their opponents. She taught her knights to make calm decisions in all situations and avoid unnecessary battles. Therefore, as soon as Celia's troops set foot in Katrina's base, they immediately began to demonstrate their power.
___________________


Great escalation of fighting
The moment Celia's knights reached Katrina's base, Katrina's knights surrounded them, as if they had predicted it beforehand. Celia's unit stopped for a moment in surprise, but at that moment Katrina's unit attacked.
"Attack on!" At the same time as the squad leader shouted, an attack that released dimensional energy hit Celia's knights. An explosive wave of energy spread, and Celia's troops were overwhelmed by its power. Katrina's knights skillfully manipulated dimensional energy and did not allow any counterattack by Celia's troops.
"Your tactics are old," Katrina said calmly. Those eyes were already dominating the battlefield in front of them. "Our tactics are relentless until we completely neutralize our opponent."
Celia's troops continued to fight desperately, but Katrina's elite knights overwhelmed them one after another with their speed, attack power, and tactical dexterity. They made full use of long-range attacks using dimensional energy, leaving no chance for Celia's knights to counterattack. Although they were a small and elite group, Katrina's knights repeatedly attacked like a storm, and Celia's troops were swamped by the waves.
``Why are you doing this?'' cried a member of Celia's squad, falling to the ground. "Why are you so strong...!"

Great escalation of fighting

``Why are you doing this?'' cried a member of Celia's squad, falling to the ground. "Why are you so strong...!"

"Power isn't just power," Katrina answered quietly. "Our power is fueled by the power of our minds and will. That's the difference between your power and yours."
True to his words, Celia's troops were pushed step by step, and eventually most of them collapsed to the ground. The victory of Katrina's Knights was now indisputable.
___________________


Defeat of Celia's Knights and Victory of Katrina
After several hours of fierce fighting, the Knights of Celia suffered an almost crushing defeat. Katrina's knights displayed overwhelming power in the battle, completely defeating Celia's elite forces. Celia's unit leader fought until the end, but was finally struck by Katrina and was unable to fight.
Chapter 74: Conquest of the prison and fierce battle in Seria D
Selinopolis, ruled by Selia, boasted great influence throughout the galaxy, supported by its vast economic and technological power. However, despite its might, there are always rebels lurking in the shadows, and Celia is sensitive to their movements. Even she could not allow the city built under Celia's leadership to be threatened. Especially now that Catrina Veiros and Ninny are colluding again and planning to cause a riot, Celia is determined to do everything in her power to counter it.
And finally, the time has come. Ninny has taken control of the prison, and Katrina is causing a riot in the Celia D section. Seria D was one of the most important sections of Selinopolis, and was the area responsible for urban resource management and environmental protection. If this area is disrupted, the entire Selinopolis will be in grave danger. Celia took the situation seriously and decided to immediately dispatch senior executives to take countermeasures.
___________________

However, despite its might, there are always rebels lurking in the shadows, and Celia is sensitive to their movements. Even she could not allow the city built under Celia's leadership to be threatened. Especially now that Catrina Veiros and Ninny are colluding again and planning to cause a riot, Celia is determined to do everything in her power to counter it.
And finally, the time has come. Ninny has taken control of the prison, and Katrina is causing a riot in the Celia D section. Seria D was one of the most important sections of Selinopolis, and was the area responsible for urban resource management and environmental protection. If this area is disrupted, the entire Selinopolis will be in grave danger. Celia took the situation seriously and decided to immediately dispatch senior executives to take countermeasures.
___________________


Conquest of Ninny's Prison

Ninny was imprisoned in the depths of a prison, and after months of confinement, he was ready to start moving again. In order to avoid Celia's surveillance, she cleverly devised a plan and put it all into action. Her desire for revenge runs deep, and her only goal is to defeat Celia, and she is willing to do whatever it takes to achieve that goal.
In order to establish control within the prison, Ninny made contact with the prisoners inside and prepared to start a rebellion. She built her own network within the prison while maintaining her dignity as a former leader. Those under her direction quietly carried out the plan and took steps to neutralize the prison's security.
"This is the final blow against Celia," Ninny said quietly. Her hands held the coolness and calculation of a former tactician. At the moment when her power inside the prison was expanding and the security began to crumble, Ninny commanded her troops and began to take control of the prison.
At first, the prison guards failed to notice any signs of rebellion, but Ninny's forces acted quickly and quickly captured key positions within the prison. Celia's security forces suffered devastating damage due to attacks using dimensional energy and weapons hidden within the prison.
"Celia, my revenge begins here," said Ninny, feeling a deep sense of satisfaction at the moment of victory. His eyes shone with confidence that the moment he had been waiting for so long had finally arrived.
___________________


Riots in Seria D
Meanwhile, Katrina Veiros was in charge of a large-scale riot in Selinopolis' Seria D section. In order to strengthen her alliance with Ninny, Katrina targets important resource management areas within Selinopolis and plans to throw the city into chaos. Selia D is responsible for the energy supply and environmental management of the entire city, and Katrina calculated that if a riot broke out there, it would affect all of Selinopolis' systems.

"Power isn't just power," Katrina answered quietly. "Our power is fueled by the power of our minds and will. That's the difference between your power and yours."
True to his words, Celia's troops were pushed step by step, and eventually most of them collapsed to the ground. The victory of Katrina's Knights was now indisputable.
___________________


Defeat of Celia's Knights and Victory of Katrina
After several hours of fierce fighting, the Knights of Celia suffered an almost crushing defeat. Katrina's knights displayed overwhelming power in the battle, completely defeating Celia's elite forces. Celia's unit leader fought until the end, but was finally struck by Katrina and was unable to fight.
Chapter 74: Conquest of the prison and fierce battle in Seria D
Selinopolis, ruled by Selia, boasted great influence throughout the galaxy, supported by its vast economic and technological power. However, despite its might, there are always rebels lurking in the shadows, and Celia is sensitive to their movements. Riots in Seria D
Meanwhile, Katrina Veiros was in charge of a large-scale riot in Selinopolis' Seria D section. In order to strengthen her alliance with Ninny, Katrina targets important resource management areas within Selinopolis and plans to throw the city into chaos. Selia D is responsible for the energy supply and environmental management of the entire city, and Katrina calculated that if a riot broke out there, it would affect all of Selinopolis' systems.

``In order to shake Celia's control, we need to take control of this area.'' Katrina calmly gave instructions to the knights. "Our goal is to disrupt her system and take it back into our hands."
When the riots began, the Celia D section was quickly engulfed in chaos. Katrina's Knights developed a tactic that utilized dimensional energy to penetrate Celia's defenses and disable her energy supply systems. Katrina was extremely superior tactically, and in the battle within Seria D sector, she boasted an overwhelming advantage over Seria's troops.
After the control center in Seria D was destroyed and the energy supply became unstable, the entire city's systems gradually began to shut down. Katrina cleverly took advantage of the chaos and succeeded in spreading a wave of rebellion.
"Celia, your reign is now over," Katrina said confidently. “We will take back this city.”
___________________


Celia’s response and dispatch of senior executives
Celia understood that this situation was too serious. The capture of the prison, the riot in Seria D section, and the destabilization of the entire city. It was no longer just a rebellion, but had developed into a critical situation that threatened the survival of Selinopolis.
Celia calmly analyzed the situation and decided to immediately dispatch a senior executive. Led by her trusted subordinate, Adrian Lang, she assembled her most elite troops and prepared to take action against the rebels.
"The situation in Celia D Section is serious. Ninny, who has succeeded in taking control of the prison, is on the move again." Celia immediately coordinates with Adrian and instructs him to accurately grasp the situation within the city. "Our first priority is to contain Katrina and Ninny's movements."
Adrian Lang received the instructions and immediately started moving. Celia's forces were equipped with the latest tactics using dimensional energy and were ready to confront the rebels. Celia herself believed that she should take action before the chaos spread any further, and began to take calm measures to bring the situation under control.

"I cannot tolerate this rebellion," Celia vowed in her heart. "I will fight at all costs to protect the future of Selinopolis."
___________________


To the final battle between Celia and the rebels
Celia immediately decided to confront the rebels in order to protect the city she had built. Ninny takes control of the prison, Katrina goes on a rampage with Celia D, and the plan behind it all. All of these were challenges that Celia could not tolerate.
Chapter 75: Celia D’s emergency alert and wanted list
For Selinopolis as a whole, the riots in Seria D have escalated beyond expectations and become a crisis that shakes the very foundations of the city's economy and operations. The social framework that Celia had built, and the city's infrastructure that made full use of dimensional energy, had temporarily stopped, directly impacting the lives of all citizens. It became clear that this was not just a riot by rebels, but a planned attack aimed at taking control of the city.
Former allies Katrina Veiros and Ninny Offenbach have rebelled once again, and their ambitions threaten Selinopolis. Although Celia was deeply shaken by this fact, she made a calm decision.
``If this continues, everything will collapse.'' Celia took a deep breath and immediately issued instructions. "Issue an emergency alert for Celia D sector and formulate a top-priority operation to capture the rebels. Put Katrina Veiros and Ninny Offenbach on the wanted list, and make capturing them the most important mission."
Celia's decision was a very tough one, proving once again her cold-heartedness and leadership ability. The rebels once again threaten his rule, and thwarting their plans is a top priority. In her heart, she felt that putting down this rebellion was essential to the future of Selinopolis. And if he could capture them, he was planning to execute them just like Alpha.

___________________


Emergency warning issued for Seria D section

To demonstrate her leadership once again, Celia immediately issued an emergency alert for Celia D section. A warning was sent to all citizens using all communication systems in the city, and preparations were made to hunt down the rebels. The city's defense systems were strengthened and an operation was launched to track Katrina and Ninny's movements and take them into custody.
"Capture the rebels and bring them to justice." Celia instructed her unit commander, ordering her to hunt down the rebels no matter where they were hiding. "We will not allow them to destroy this city again."
To avoid any confusion caused by the temporary shutdown of the Seria D sector's control center, she quickly dispatched a new commander to rebuild it, while at the same time organizing a force to capture the rebels. Her plan was perfect and everyone came together and prepared to carry out the operation.
___________________


The aim of the rebels and Celia's decision
Katrina and Ninny have only one goal. Their goal was to overthrow Selia's rule and take Selinopolis back into their own hands. They were trying to throw the city under Celia's control into chaos, seize control of dimensional energy, and take control of the city. However, Celia was determined not to give in to the attempt.
"Once we capture them, we will bring them to justice immediately. Remember how much Alpha has sacrificed." Celia murmured in her heart as she continued to think coldly. Alpha's death was not in vain. Celia understood that the path he chose was wrong. However, the world could not afford to waste the lessons brought by his death.
If Katrina and Ninny are captured, they will face the same fate as Alpha. That was the "justice" Celia believed in.
___________________

Fierce battle at Seria D

The troops following Celia's instructions quickly arrived at Celia D section and prepared to corner the rebels. Katrina's Knights had extremely high fighting power and could not easily end the battle. However, Celia's forces used their dimensional energy and tactical knowledge to cautiously approach and land a blow.
At that time, a fierce battle took place inside Seria D section. Katrina's troops calmly counterattacked and confronted Celia's troops with overwhelming force. Collisions continued in various places within Seria D section, and dimensional energies were violently intersecting. As explosions rang out, buildings collapsed, and smoke filled the air, Katrina used cold-hearted tactics to cut through Celia's forces.
“We will win,” Katrina said without missing a beat. "I will never give up until I defeat Celia and take this city back into our hands."
Believing those words, Katrina and her knights continued their attack, and Celia's troops were gradually forced to retreat. Thanks to Katrina's clever tactics and cold command, Celia D sector was completely under Katrina's control, and Celia's troops finally suffered a crushing defeat.
___________________


Celia's final decision
Katrina's victory was decisive, and Celia's troops were forced to retreat. In response to this situation, Celia decided to take things one step further. She immediately reorganized her senior leadership and ordered more troops to be mobilized to pursue and suppress the rebels.
"I will never forgive the rebels," Celia said, once again becoming determined. "Eliminate Katrina and Ninny and everyone lurking behind them."
Celia intended to exact revenge on Katrina and Ninny, just as she had done on previous rebels. Retribution for the way they destroyed all order and threatened the future she believed in could not be taken lightly.
___________________

The troops following Celia's instructions quickly arrived at Celia D section and prepared to corner the rebels. The beginning of a new battle

As Celia issues instructions and the operation to suppress the rebels begins again, Katrina and Ninny prepare for a new battle that will await them. The girls could sense how tough Celia's decision was. However, this will decide their fate.
Chapter 76: Confrontation between Jester and Floyd
After Celia's cold decision was made, she decided to make the next move. As the counteroffensive against Katrina Veiros and Ninny Offenbach begins, Celia decides to dispatch two fighters from the J13 series. The J13 series was a group of people with unusual fighting abilities that were once feared by rebels. They all boasted incredible strength and were extremely dangerous. By sending these two, Celia intended to completely stop Katrina and Ninny from rebelling.
Jester's appearance and battle with Katrina
The first person sent was a brawler called "Jester." Jester was known to have the most unusual and unpredictable fighting style among the J13 series. He was characterized by prioritizing emotion over tactical thinking during battle, and unleashing reckless attacks. Jester's unusual fighting methods and almost insane fighting style made him feared on many battlefields.
The Jester sneaked into the Celia D sector within Selinopolis and attacked the Knights of Katrina's stronghold. The members of Katrina's Order suffered from the unpredictability of Jester's attacks. Jester used dimensional energy violently to engage in battles that destroyed everything around him. Amidst the chaos, Katrina manages to maintain her composure and devise a strategy to defeat Jester.
"I don't have time for anything wasted." Katrina frowned, watching Jester's fighting style. Although she was a little surprised by his unusual fighting style, she never backed down and thought of a response. Jester forcibly released the dimensional energy and approached Katrina.

As Celia issues instructions and the operation to suppress the rebels begins again, Katrina and Ninny prepare for a new battle that will await them. The girls could sense how tough Celia's decision was. However, this will decide their fate.

Chapter 76: Confrontation between Jester and Floyd
After Celia's cold decision was made, she decided to make the next move. As the counteroffensive against Katrina Veiros and Ninny Offenbach begins, Celia decides to dispatch two fighters from the J13 series. Jester's appearance and battle with Katrina
The first person sent was a brawler called "Jester." Jester was known to have the most unusual and unpredictable fighting style among the J13 series. He was characterized by prioritizing emotion over tactical thinking during battle, and unleashing reckless attacks. Jester's unusual fighting methods and almost insane fighting style made him feared on many battlefields.
The Jester sneaked into the Celia D sector within Selinopolis and attacked the Knights of Katrina's stronghold. The members of Katrina's Order suffered from the unpredictability of Jester's attacks. Jester used dimensional energy violently to engage in battles that destroyed everything around him. Amidst the chaos, Katrina manages to maintain her composure and devise a strategy to defeat Jester.
"I don't have time for anything wasted." Katrina frowned, watching Jester's fighting style. Although she was a little surprised by his unusual fighting style, she never backed down and thought of a response. Jester forcibly released the dimensional energy and approached Katrina.

"Come on, let's have fun!" Jester shouted with an innocent smile as he charged at Katrina, his entire body covered in dimensional energy.
Katrina dodged in an instant, dodging Jester's reckless attack. She attempted to release the dimensional energy from her body and find a way to tactically stop the Jester's attacks. However, with its unpredictable movements, Jester continued to circle Katrina and attack her. A truly crazy battle unfolded, and Katrina continued to try to remain calm amidst it all.
"This guy is totally out of control...!" Katrina said breathlessly. She couldn't help but feel pain as she dodged Jester's attacks. Katrina already had a plan. In order to defeat Jester, you need to counterattack to match his attacks. At first he struggled with its unreasonable movements, but gradually he began to adapt to its unpredictable movements.
``This is it!'' Katrina finally got her chance. At the moment when Jester showed an opening, Katrina released an explosive burst of dimensional energy and launched an attack against Jester. Jester was unable to predict the attack, but even with his unusual strength, he withstood it once. However, Katrina finally delivered a decisive blow and succeeded in defeating Jester.
"Now you can't fight anymore," Katrina said quietly after defeating Jester. There was satisfaction in his eyes, as well as the calmness of having won the battle.
___________________


Appearance of Floyd and fight with Ninny
After Jester collapsed, Celia sent in an explosive magician called "Floyd" from the J13 series to take the next step. Floyd specialized in magical explosions using dimensional energy, and his powers could cause massive destruction in just one blow. Celia thought that Floyd was the perfect person to defeat a powerful tactician like Ninny.

Floyd specialized in magical explosions using dimensional energy, and his powers could cause massive destruction in just one blow. Celia thought that Floyd was the perfect person to defeat a powerful tactician like Ninny.

"Come on, let's have fun!" Jester shouted with an innocent smile as he charged at Katrina, his entire body covered in dimensional energy.
Katrina dodged in an instant, dodging Jester's reckless attack. She attempted to release the dimensional energy from her body and find a way to tactically stop the Jester's attack. However, with its unpredictable movements, Jester continued to circle Katrina and attack her. A truly crazy battle unfolded, and Katrina continued to try to remain calm amidst it all.
"This guy is totally out of control...!" Katrina said breathlessly. She couldn't help but feel pain as she dodged Jester's attacks. Katrina already had a plan. In order to defeat Jester, you need to counterattack to match his attacks. At first he struggled with its unreasonable movements, but gradually he began to adapt to its unpredictable movements.
``This is it!'' Katrina finally got her chance. At the moment when Jester showed an opening, Katrina released an explosive burst of dimensional energy and launched an attack against Jester. Jester was unable to predict the attack, but even with his unusual strength, he withstood it once. However, Katrina finally delivered a decisive blow and succeeded in defeating Jester.
"Now you can't fight anymore," Katrina said quietly after defeating Jester. There was satisfaction in his eyes, as well as the calmness of having won the battle.
___________________


Appearance of Floyd and fight with Ninny
After Jester collapsed, Celia sent in an explosive magician called "Floyd" from the J13 series to take the next step. Floyd specialized in magical explosions using dimensional energy, and his powers could cause massive destruction in just one blow. Celia thought that Floyd was the perfect person to defeat a powerful tactician like Ninny.

Floyd immediately heads to where he thinks Ninny is hiding and prepares to take her down. Ninny was already driven by his own desire for revenge, but there was no way he could remain defenseless in the face of Floyd's explosive magic. Floyd has explosive power and can convert dimensional energy into explosive magic to unleash its full potential.
"This is the end," Floyd declared coldly, and began gathering dimensional energy. "Your revenge will end with this explosion."
Ninny heard those words and calmly thought of a strategy. She is not defenseless against that explosive magic. Her tactical reaction using dimensional energy was to anticipate and evade Floyd's attacks. However, Floyd's magic was extremely clever and was released with greater precision than he had imagined.
"You're here!" Ninny tried to avoid the attack, but the shockwave of the explosion hit her. He tried to defend himself using dimensional energy, but was unable to withstand the explosive force. But Ninny never fell. She fought through the pain, stood up and began fighting back against Floyd.
``Your power has no effect on me!'' Ninny exploded her anger and counterattacked with all her might. Skillfully uses dimensional energy to respond to Floyd's explosion magic. Eventually, Ninny caught Floyd's movement and took advantage of the opportunity to take him down.
"Celia's money..." Ninny said coldly, staring at Floyd's fallen form. "But I still have things to finish."
___________________


Celia's decision and the fate of the rebels
Katrina and Ninny, who defeated two J13-type fighters named Jester and Floyd, continue to act as rebels. However, Celia finally made the decision. We cannot allow further rebellion. She resolved to capture Katrina and Ninny with her own hands and definitively end their future.
"Next time, I'll take care of it myself," Celia muttered in her heart as she made all the preparations again.

Chapter 77: Vargas and Miyamoto's Challenge

Celia prepared for the final showdown against the rebels. Even after sending Jester and Floyd, Katrina Veiros and Ninny Offenbach remained undefeated and continued to threaten Selinopolis. Unable to tolerate any more resistance, Celia decides to take the next step. She decided to send in even more powerful combatants from the E16 series. Those people were the E16 series' strongest swordsman ``Vargas'' and the strongest samurai ``Miyamoto.''
Vargas and Miyamoto had outstanding abilities among the E16 series, and their names were known throughout the galaxy. Vargas was a man who conquered numerous battlefields with his swordsmanship and fighting style that made full use of dimensional energy. Miyamoto was also a genius in combat, boasting invincible strength, especially in the way he fought based on Bushido. Celia planned to use them to completely eliminate Katrina and Ninny and eradicate the rebellion.
___________________


Appearance of Vargas and battle with Katrina
Vargas begins his journey through the tight security to reach Katrina, who is in a safe house far from the center of Selinopolis. Katrina had already spread her rebellion, but as soon as she was informed of Vargas' arrival, she began preparing for a fighting force.
"Vargas..." Katrina said the name and thought about it for a moment. "The strongest swordsman Celia sent to defeat me. However, I will not fall easily."
Katrina prepares her own dimensional energy and calmly prepares for a battle with Vargas, determined to intercept him. As soon as she sensed Vargas approaching, she began to formulate her strategy. Her fighting style was to use the opponent's strength to counterattack, and she never daunted, even against a strong opponent like Vargas.
"Here you are, Vargas," Katrina said quietly. I could feel the determination shining in his eyes. He was confident that he could make full use of dimensional energy and stay one step ahead tactically.

Celia prepared for the final showdown against the rebels. Even after sending Jester and Floyd, Katrina Veiros and Ninny Offenbach remained undefeated and continued to threaten Selinopolis.
