Appearance of Vargas and battle with Katrina
Vargas begins his journey through the tight security to reach Katrina, who is in a safe house far from the center of Selinopolis. Katrina had already spread her rebellion, but as soon as she was informed of Vargas' arrival, she began preparing for a fighting force.
"Vargas..." Katrina said the name and thought about it for a moment. "The strongest swordsman Celia sent to defeat me. However, I will not fall easily."
Katrina prepares her own dimensional energy and calmly prepares for a battle with Vargas, determined to intercept him. As soon as she sensed Vargas approaching, she began to formulate her strategy. Her fighting style was to use the opponent's strength to counterattack, and she never daunted, even against a strong opponent like Vargas.
"Here you are, Vargas," Katrina said quietly. I could feel the determination shining in his eyes. He was confident that he could make full use of dimensional energy and stay one step ahead tactically.

Vargas readied his sword and stood there, staring coldly at Katrina. "I'm here to defeat you." Vargas' voice was cold, but there was unwavering faith in it.
As the battle began, Vargas' sword flashed. The sword's blow, coated in dimensional energy, cut through space and was fired towards Katrina. However, Katrina quickly reacted and blocked Vargas' attack with dimensional energy. She then quickly distanced herself and tried to fight back again.
"He's strong after all," Katrina said calmly. "But I won't give up."
The battle between Vargas and Katrina became a fierce battle that seemed to transcend dimensions, and the collision of dimensional energy overwhelmed the surroundings. Vargas' sword attacked with great precision, trying to break through Katrina's defenses, but Katrina continued to fight back with her clever tactics.
The fight lasted for a long time, with both players making no concessions, but in the end, Vargas took advantage of Katrina's opening. His sword imbued with dimensional energy broke through Katrina's defenses and captured her. Although Katrina was attacked, she did not give up and tried to fight back until the end, but she finally collapsed.
"It's over, Katrina," Vargas said coldly, taking Katrina into custody.
___________________


The appearance of Miyamoto and the deadly battle with Ninny
The next person sent was Miyamoto, the strongest samurai of the E16 series. He valued the Bushido spirit of maintaining a balance between mind and body during battle. His tactics were not simply based on physical strength, but were woven through the harmony of mind, technique, and body. His name was known throughout the galaxy as a legendary figure.
Ninny was already feeling tired after the battle in Seria D, but she still had the will to rebel. She learns of Miyamoto's arrival on Celia's orders and prepares for a confrontation with him. Miyamoto's fighting style was extremely sophisticated in its use of dimensional energy, and Ninny had to remain calm in order to respond to his tactics.

Vargas readied his sword and stood there, staring coldly at Katrina. "I'm here to defeat you." Vargas' voice was cold, but there was unwavering faith in it.
As the battle began, Vargas' sword flashed. The sword's blow, coated in dimensional energy, cut through space and was fired towards Katrina. However, Katrina quickly reacted and blocked Vargas' attack with dimensional energy. She then quickly distanced herself and tried to fight back again.
"He's strong after all," Katrina said calmly. "But I won't give up."
The battle between Vargas and Katrina became a fierce battle that seemed to transcend dimensions, and the collision of dimensional energy overwhelmed the surroundings. Vargas' sword attacked with great precision, trying to break through Katrina's defenses, but Katrina continued to fight back with her clever tactics.
The fight lasted for a long time, with both players making no concessions, but in the end, Vargas took advantage of Katrina's opening. His sword imbued with dimensional energy broke through Katrina's defenses and captured her. Although Katrina was attacked, she did not give up and tried to fight back until the end, but she finally collapsed.
"It's over, Katrina," Vargas said coldly, taking Katrina into custody.

The appearance of Miyamoto and the deadly battle with Ninny
The next person sent was Miyamoto, the strongest samurai of the E16 series. He valued the Bushido spirit of maintaining a balance between mind and body during battle. His tactics were not simply based on physical strength, but were woven through the harmony of mind, technique, and body. His name was known throughout the galaxy as a legendary figure.
Ninny was already feeling tired after the battle in Seria D, but she still had the will to rebel. She learns of Miyamoto's arrival on Celia's orders and prepares for a confrontation with him. Miyamoto's fighting style was extremely sophisticated in its use of dimensional energy, and Ninny had to remain calm in order to respond to his tactics.

"Miyamoto..." Ninny muttered his name and prepared for battle. "To me, you are a true samurai. But I will not give up."
Miyamoto skillfully used dimensional energy and approached Ninny with pride as a samurai. His sword was not just a weapon, but one that demonstrated its power when wielded with all his heart. That powerful blow released overwhelming energy around Ninny.
"I will continue to fight," Ninny murmured, using all of her dimensional energy to launch a counterattack. While brilliantly dodging Miyamoto's attacks, she was thinking of ways to exploit her opponent's gaps. The battle dragged on for a long time, and the sounds of their energies colliding with each other echoed around them.
"You are certainly strong," Miyamoto said quietly. "But with my pride, I must defeat you."
After that, Miyamoto suddenly strengthened his attacks and gradually broke down Ninny's defenses. His sword condensed dimensional energy with each blow, attacking Ninny's gap. Finally, Ninny could no longer withstand the attack and collapsed.
"It's over, Ninny," Miyamoto declared calmly, completely overpowering her.
___________________


Celia's rule and the end of the rebellion
Vargas defeated Katrina and Miyamoto defeated Ninny, ending the rebellion. The strongest fighters sent by Celia's orders accomplished their mission and completely eliminated the rebels. Katrina and Ninny's fate completely ended before Celia's cold-hearted decision.
Chapter 78: The Silence of the Execution Ground and the Last Words
Katrina Veiros and Ninny Offenbach stand up against Celia's rule as rebels. Their challenges are crushed by Celia's strict leadership, and they are finally captured and the time of execution approaches. For Celia, defeating these women was not just a symbol of power, but an absolute necessity to protect the peace and order of Selinopolis. However, even if it was necessary, execution was always a cold and painful decision, and Celia couldn't help but feel the weight of it in her heart.

"Miyamoto..." Ninny muttered his name and prepared for battle. "To me, you are a true samurai. But I will not give up."

Celia's rule and the end of the rebellion

Chapter 78: The Silence of the Execution Ground and the Last Words
Katrina Veiros and Ninny Offenbach stand up against Celia's rule as rebels. Their challenges are crushed by Celia's strict leadership, and they are finally captured and the time of execution approaches. For Celia, defeating these women was not just a symbol of power, but an absolute necessity to protect the peace and order of Selinopolis. However, even if it was necessary, execution was always a cold and painful decision, and Celia couldn't help but feel the weight of it in her heart.

The execution site was covered with cold stones and had an oddly quiet atmosphere. The surrounding area was lined with soldiers gathered under Celia's orders, and strict security was in place. Katrina and Ninny are already hung and just stand there. Their eyes were filled with anger and despair as they waited for the moment when Celia would appear.
When Celia stepped into the execution area, the atmosphere there became even heavier. She walks slowly and stands in front of Katrina and Ninny. The two stared at Celia with cold expressions, as if they knew their fate. Celia calmly accepted his gaze and took a deep breath.
"Katrina, Ninny," Celia called in a deep, quiet voice. "You were the greatest threat to me. You tried to destroy my chosen path and tear apart the future of Selinopolis."
Katrina reacted to his words by replying angrily. "What you have created is just a lie. Don't you realize how many people have died under your rule?"
Celia's expression changed slightly in response to those words. However, he quickly regained his cold side and looked at the two of them again. "Under my rule, Selinopolis has continued to thrive and evolve. I continue to protect what the likes of you sought to destroy."
Ninny reacted to those words and bit her lip. "What you're protecting is nothing more than power. You've probably forgotten a long time ago that you're protecting people."
Those words made Celia's heart flinch for a moment, but she quickly suppressed the emotion. We cannot be allowed to be swayed by the words of the rebels. She continued speaking calmly.
"Your ideals and mine were never going to intersect. But I understand that. But it's over."
Celia said quietly, urging the two to speak again. "Is there anything you'd like to say in closing?"

Katrina reacted to his words by replying angrily. "What you have created is just a lie. Don't you realize how many people have died under your rule?"
Celia's expression changed slightly in response to those words. However, he quickly regained his cold side and looked at the two of them again. "Under my rule, Selinopolis has continued to thrive and evolve. I continue to protect what the likes of you sought to destroy."
Ninny reacted to those words and bit her lip. "What you're protecting is nothing more than power. You've probably forgotten a long time ago that you're protecting people."
Those words made Celia's heart flinch for a moment, but she quickly suppressed the emotion. We cannot be allowed to be swayed by the words of the rebels. She continued speaking calmly.
"Your ideals and mine were never going to intersect. But I understand that. But it's over."
Celia said quietly, urging the two to speak again. "Is there anything you'd like to say in closing?"

Katrina was silent for a while in response to that question, but then she answered in a low voice. "My words won't reach anyone anymore. But if you really want to rule this world, do you realize how many sacrifices you'll have to make from now on?"
"I know," Celia replied coldly. "That's why I chose this path. I will continue to fight with all my might to prevent people like you from making the same mistakes again."
Ninny followed suit. "You made a mistake. The path you chose will ultimately cause people to suffer."
Celia calmly accepted those words and took a deep breath. She was no longer swayed by the words of the rebels. He was convinced that following the path he believed in was the only way to ultimately protect everything.
"Your words no longer reach me," Celia said calmly at last. "But, thank you. I will never forget what you have taught me as a lesson for the future."
Then, Celia gave an order. The execution signal sounds, and Katrina and Ninny's fate is sealed. The atmosphere at the execution site was silent for a moment, and the only thing that followed was the cold sound that signaled the end of life.
___________________


Celia's loneliness after the execution
After Katrina and Ninny were executed, Celia quietly left the scene. Although she made a cold-hearted decision, a deep sense of loneliness remained in her heart. Defeating the rebels was a must for her, an inevitable choice in order to maintain order in Selinopolis. However, the last words of the rebels had a considerable impact on Celia's heart.
``Did I really choose the right path?'' Celia asked herself as she walked alone. The path she chose was certainly to protect Selinopolis, but was it really the best choice for the people? She still couldn't find the answer.

Katrina was silent for a while in response to that question, but then she answered in a low voice. "My words won't reach anyone anymore. But if you really want to rule this world, do you realize how many sacrifices you'll have to make from now on?"
"I know," Celia replied coldly. "That's why I chose this path. I will continue to fight with all my might to prevent people like you from making the same mistakes again."
Ninny followed suit. "You made a mistake. The path you chose will ultimately cause people to suffer."
Celia calmly accepted those words and took a deep breath. She was no longer swayed by the words of the rebels. He was convinced that following the path he believed in was the only way to ultimately protect everything.

Celia calmly accepted those words and took a deep breath. She was no longer swayed by the words of the rebels. He was convinced that following the path he believed in was the only way to ultimately protect everything.
"Your words no longer reach me," Celia said calmly at last. "But, thank you. I will never forget what you have taught me as a lesson for the future."
Then, Celia gave an order. The execution signal sounds, and Katrina and Ninny's fate is sealed. The atmosphere at the execution site was silent for a moment, and the only thing that followed was the cold sound that signaled the end of life.
___________________


Celia's loneliness after the execution
After Katrina and Ninny were executed, Celia quietly left the scene. Although she made a cold-hearted decision, a deep sense of loneliness remained in her heart. Defeating the rebels was a must for her, an inevitable choice in order to maintain order in Selinopolis. However, the last words of the rebels had a considerable impact on Celia's heart.
``Did I really choose the right path?'' Celia asked herself as she walked alone. The path she chose was certainly to protect Selinopolis, but was it really the best choice for the people? She still couldn't find the answer.

That night, Celia returned to her quiet room alone and was once again lost in thought. In her mind, the words of the rebels of the past kept echoing. However, despite this confusion, Celia decided to move forward with a strong will.
"I will protect Selinopolis," Celia muttered to herself as she once again tried to confirm her decision. Her lonely battle will continue. However, no matter how difficult the choices were, she was determined to continue on that path.
Chapter 79: Celia’s new rule and lonely hegemony
After Celia made that cold-hearted decision, her control became even stronger. The results of Katrina's and Ninny's executions and her break with Alpha were undoubtedly one of her greatest victories. It wasn't just a victory, it meant establishing her supremacy and allowing her to rule the city of Selinopolis at her will.
"No one can stop me now," Celia calmly murmured as she sat in her vast office in front of a hologram displaying countless data and citizen activities. There was an unprecedented level of confidence in his voice. Celia had a deep-rooted belief that no one with such power would ever appear in this galaxy again.
After completing the execution, Selia reorganized the organization within Selinopolis in order to further strengthen her control. Not only her trusted subordinates, but also those who once stood up as rebels and hostile forces have pledged loyalty, and Celia's ruling system has become even more solid. There were no signs of rebellion anywhere anymore.
``Now, my control is complete.'' Celia prepared to make another big decision. She had set her next goal. It was the next step in the evolution of Selinopolis. She not only wanted to rule the entire galaxy, but she also wanted to be the one to usher in a new era.
___________________


Celia's lonely hegemony

That night, Celia returned to her quiet room alone and was once again lost in thought. In her mind, the words of the rebels of the past kept echoing. However, despite this confusion, Celia decided to move forward with a strong will.

___________________


Celia's lonely hegemony

As Celia's control was established, her loneliness deepened. The friends I once walked with, Alpha, Katrina, and Ninny. Those people have now been executed by Celia's hands, and the shadow of that remains in her world. Celia asked herself this question over and over again.
“Was this really the right thing for me?”
The answer to that question was always cold-hearted. Celia has made countless sacrifices to reach her current position. And no matter how great the sacrifice was, she was convinced that it was the right choice. However, the doubts lurking in her heart sometimes troubled her. The reason why his former friends betrayed him and became a rebel is still unknown to him.
"I don't know what they wanted, but I chose that path," Celia muttered to herself, forcing herself to shake the thought away. By reminding herself that protecting this city and its future is most important to her now, she once again steps forward as a level-headed leader.
However, it was only afterwards that Celia realized that she was a completely lonely ruler. Although those who worked in the highest echelons of the city respected her and swore loyalty to her, many harbored doubts about her in their hearts. Many people were affected by the decisions she made. While the traitors lost their lives and the rebellion was crushed, the foundations of Celia's rule seemed to be wavering.
In that lonely heart, Celia took a bold step. She further strengthened the city reconstruction project that she had planned to carry out in recent years, and began moving towards expanding into new territories. What she sought was not only the establishment of complete control. His goal was to create a plan to move beyond Selinopolis and move on to the next stage, establishing his position as the ruler of the galaxy's center.
___________________


Celia's New Goal: Domination of the Galaxy

As Celia's control was established, her loneliness deepened. The friends I once walked with, Alpha, Katrina, and Ninny. Those people have now been executed by Celia's hands, and the shadow of that remains in her world. Celia asked herself this question over and over again.

___________________


Celia's New Goal: Domination of the Galaxy

Celia now has a reputation as the ruler of Selinopolis. But her goal was more than just controlling the city. She decided to stamp her presence across the galaxy. Her ambitions go beyond just one city and aim to control the entire galaxy.
``The next target is the entire galaxy.'' Celia was preparing to announce a new plan she had been working on in secret. In order to spread the cities she rules throughout the galaxy, she first aims to deepen ties with surrounding planets and acquire new territory.
``The coming era is my era.'' Celia was pushing forward toward that ambition. While making all the preparations necessary to rule the galaxy, she and many of her subordinates were formulating strategies for that future.
During this time, Celia often reflected on what her former companions, especially Katrina and Ninny, felt, and why she ended up at odds with them. But no matter how hard she searched for the answer, she could never fully understand why.
"The path you all have chosen has already ended. The path I have chosen is the future." Celia muttered again as if to remind herself. There was no hesitation in her words. There is no longer any chance to bridge the gap between him and his former comrades. Celia was convinced in her heart that as long as she followed the path she had chosen, it was the only path and there were no other options.
___________________


The shadow of the rebellion and the next battle
However, even though Celia's control seemed to be stable, there were still people lurking around her that threatened her. The shadow of rebellion has not completely disappeared. Now that Katrina and Ninny are gone, she has to take on a new enemy. Many obstacles stand in the way of her goal of dominating the galaxy.

Celia now has a reputation as the ruler of Selinopolis. But her goal was more than just controlling the city. She decided to stamp her presence across the galaxy. Her ambitions go beyond just one city and aim to control the entire galaxy.

___________________


The shadow of the rebellion and the next battle
However, even though Celia's control seemed to be stable, there were still people lurking around her that threatened her. The shadow of rebellion has not completely disappeared. Now that Katrina and Ninny are gone, she has to take on a new enemy. Many obstacles stand in the way of her goal of dominating the galaxy.

A new challenge awaits Celia once again. Those who stand against her supremacy, and those who aim to fundamentally overturn the rule she has established. No matter how much Celia tries to strengthen her control, there will always be a force somewhere that threatens it. No matter how lonely Celia is, her hegemony is still unstable.
Chapter 80: Appearance of the Knights of Apollo and Celia's new trial
Selia's rule was strong, and Selinopolis was at the height of its glory. Celia, who seemed to have everything in hand, was preparing to move on to the next stage, aiming to rule the galaxy. With GDP reaching 70 quintillion dollars, she, who had previously ruled the country, now faces a new challenge. That was the appearance of Apollo, the largest civilization in the universe.
Apollo quickly became famous throughout the galaxy for its overwhelming economic size and political power. Apollon's total GDP was an astonishing $105 quintillion, far exceeding Selinopolis's $70 quintillion. In addition to its economic power, Apollo was home to the ``Knights of Apollo,'' which possessed powerful military power and flaunted its power. As their name suggests, they are known for their discipline and loyalty backed by military force, and will appear as Celia's first serious challenger.
The Knights of Apollo approached Selinopolis, a city-state founded by Selia, and sent messengers to negotiate. Celia was watching their movements and calmly thinking about how to proceed with dialogue with them. In order to maintain the control they have gained, how to deal with Apollo's power becomes an important decision.
At that time, Celia decided to meet with the leader of the Knights of Apollo. Celia herself was fully aware that this meeting was not just a political negotiation, but an important step towards galactic supremacy.
___________________


Meeting with the leader of the Knights of Apollo

A new challenge awaits Celia once again. Those who stand against her supremacy, and those who aim to fundamentally overturn the rule she has established. No matter how much Celia tries to strengthen her control, there will always be a force somewhere that threatens it. No matter how lonely Celia is, her hegemony is still unstable.

Chapter 80: Appearance of the Knights of Apollo and Celia's new trial

At that time, Celia decided to meet with the leader of the Knights of Apollo. Celia herself was fully aware that this meeting was not just a political negotiation, but an important step towards galactic supremacy.
___________________


Meeting with the leader of the Knights of Apollo

Celia received Apollo's messengers into her palace. The messengers wore luxurious and intimidating costumes, and were truly the elite of the Knights of Apollo. Their dignified appearance made Celia feel a little nervous. At the head of the messenger was a man named Ronan Ursa, the leader of the Knights of Apollo.
Ronan Ursa held a particularly high position among the Knights of Apollo, and was known for his great strength. He was a heroic figure who commanded Apollo's military forces and won numerous wars. As Celia deepens her understanding of him, she has a growing feeling that this meeting will not be just a diplomatic negotiation, but a battle to test the legitimacy of her rule.
"Celia Dominicus," Ronan's voice sounded deep. When he stepped into Celia's palace, the first thing he did was show off his imposing presence. "I admire the extent of your control over the galaxy. However, as Apollo's appearance shows, this universe needs more power."
Celia replied calmly without losing her expression. "Even though I may know the power of Apollo, I cannot destroy what I have built. Selinopolis, under my control, already has hegemony over the galaxy."
Ronan calmly accepted those words and answered after a short pause. "Your power is great, to be sure, but Apollo is greater than that, and our economy, military might, and cultural influence are the most influential in this galaxy."
While Celia listened to his words, she was thinking coldly in her heart. Apollo has overwhelming economic and military power, but she felt that she already had the power to counter it. However, Ronan's presence will be a new test for Celia, and a critical moment that will determine how her control will change in the future.

Their dignified appearance made Celia feel a little nervous. At the head of the messenger was a man named Ronan Ursa, the leader of the Knights of Apollo.

Ronan calmly accepted those words and answered after a short pause. "Your power is great, to be sure, but Apollo is greater than that, and our economy, military might, and cultural influence are the most influential in this galaxy."
While Celia listened to his words, she was thinking coldly in her heart. Apollo has overwhelming economic and military power, but she felt that she already had the power to counter it. However, Ronan's presence will be a new test for Celia, and a critical moment that will determine how her control will change in the future.

"No matter how powerful Apollo's power is, what I must protect is Selinopolis and its future," Celia answered coldly. "My city is the most stable and prosperous city in the entire galaxy. I will not tolerate anyone who threatens it."
Ronan seemed surprised by Celia's cold words for a moment, but his expression quickly tightened and he nodded deeply. "I see. I must acknowledge your strength. However, we have been searching for a way to coexist. If you accept this proposal and Apollo and Selinopolis join forces, we can rule the galaxy together and share prosperity."
Celia took those words seriously and thought about them over and over again. Although an alliance with Apollo seems like a powerful means of controlling the galaxy, it could also weaken her own control. Celia had to figure out whether the proposal truly had Apollo's best interests at heart, or if it was just a ploy to woo her.
"Coexistence?" Celia muttered quietly. "If I ever join forces with others, my control begins to crumble. I understand the benefits you offer, but right now I just want to protect Selinopolis and its future."
Ronan's expression deteriorated a little upon hearing those words. "What you seek is solitary domination?" he continued, his eyes narrowed and his tone serious. "But by remaining isolated, we are inviting future enemies. That is our view."
Celia listened to his words for a moment, but then her eyes sharpened and she answered. "My solitary rule is never about isolation. My rule is based on power. If you cannot recognize that power, then this is the end of negotiations."
Ronan was silent for a while, then heaved a deep sigh and slowly stood up. "I understand. Follow the path you choose, but we Apollos will never disappear."
Celia quietly nodded, unfazed by Ronan's words. "I decline your proposal. That is my choice."

"No matter how powerful Apollo's power is, what I must protect is Selinopolis and its future," Celia answered coldly. "My city is the most stable and prosperous city in the entire galaxy. I will not tolerate anyone who threatens it."
Ronan seemed surprised by Celia's cold words for a moment, but his expression quickly tightened and he nodded deeply. "I see. I must acknowledge your strength. However, we have been searching for a way to coexist. If you accept this proposal and Apollo and Selinopolis join forces, we can rule the galaxy together and share prosperity."

Ronan was silent for a while, then heaved a deep sigh and slowly stood up. "I understand. Follow the path you choose, but we Apollos will never disappear."
Celia quietly nodded, unfazed by Ronan's words. "I decline your proposal. That is my choice."

With those words, Apollo's messengers slowly left the room. Although Celia was somewhat wary of Ronan's presence, she told herself that she had made a choice that she would never regret towards him. Her rule will continue. And no matter how strong her control was, Celia was determined to protect it.
___________________


Signs of a new war
After her meeting with Apollo was over, Celia looked back at him and thought quietly for a while. Ronan's words certainly had a point. Apollo is powerful and cannot be ignored as a force aiming to dominate the galaxy. However, Celia rejected the proposal. She had only one choice, and that was the decision to continue to control everything with her own power, without giving up control.
Celia couldn't predict how Apollo would react after that. However, the next plan was already in motion in her mind. Celia no longer views Apollo's power as a mere threat, but begins to think about the means necessary to transcend it.
``If Apollo is going to challenge me, I need to be ready to meet it.'' Celia began walking toward the future, planning her next move. The battle for control of the galaxy has only just begun.
Chapter 81: The Birth of Dominion and the Call for a New Alliance
Celia Dominicus' name has finally begun to spread throughout the Apollo civilization. This was proof that she was not only the ruler of a city-state, but also a symbol of power throughout the galaxy. With the prospect of a confrontation with Apollo on the horizon, Celia is determined to take another step forward. Not satisfied with the name Selinopolis, she renamed the city "Dominion" and declared that her control would become stronger and more expansive.
"Dominion," Celia murmured, deeply proud of her new name and putting weight into her words. "This is the future I should aim for. Completely controlling the world under my control."

With those words, Apollo's messengers slowly left the room. Although Celia was somewhat wary of Ronan's presence, she told herself that she had made a choice that she would never regret towards him. Her rule will continue. And no matter how strong her control was, Celia was determined to protect it.

Chapter 81: The Birth of Dominion and the Call for a New Alliance
Celia Dominicus' name has finally begun to spread throughout the Apollo civilization. This was proof that she was not only the ruler of a city-state, but also a symbol of power throughout the galaxy. With the prospect of a confrontation with Apollo on the horizon, Celia is determined to take another step forward. Not satisfied with the name Selinopolis, she renamed the city "Dominion" and declared that her control would become stronger and more expansive.
"Dominion," Celia muttered, deeply proud of her new name and putting weight into her words. "This is the future I should aim for. Completely controlling the world under my control."

Under the new name, Celia proceeded to reorganize the city. She decided to reunite the four parts of Selinopolis and unite them into one large dominion. This was an important move to further strengthen her control and bring more order and efficiency to the city. Due to the reorganization carried out on Celia's orders, the Dominion was transformed into one giant kingdom, known throughout the galaxy.
Having gained the power of control, Celia began to move cautiously in preparation for the next challenger. In a situation where direct conflict with Apollo was inevitable, Celia chose who she should seek an alliance with in order to protect her power. And what she set her eyes on was the male-dominated galaxy called Evatron. Evatron was known for its great military power and economic size, despite having inherited generations of male-dominated culture. This galaxy could become an important force for Celia.
As the conflict between Evatron and Apollo continues, Celia attempts to contact Evatron and begins to formulate a plan to form an alliance. However, Evatron has historically had a strongly male-dominated culture, so it was not easy for it to bond with a female ruler like Celia. Still, in order to meet the challenge, Celia decided to send an assassin to contact Evatron's core.
___________________


Dispatch of assassins and contact with Evatron
Evatron continued to be ruled by military rule and a male-dominated social structure for many years. Women's position here was very low, and men were always allowed to occupy the position of ruler. Therefore, it was easy to imagine that if a woman like Celia tried to join forces with them, the ruling class of Evatron would become extremely wary. However, Celia had prepared a means to break through that wall and bring Evatron into her side.

___________________


Dispatch of assassins and contact with Evatron
Evatron continued to be ruled by military rule and a male-dominated social structure for many years. Women's position here was very low, and men were always allowed to occupy the position of ruler. Therefore, it was easy to imagine that if a woman like Celia tried to join forces with them, the ruling class of Evatron would become extremely wary. However, Celia had prepared a means to break through that wall and bring Evatron into her side.

Celia sent her most trusted assassin to contact Evatron's political core. The assassin was a man named Elliott Strass, who had successfully completed numerous missions under her orders.He was an excellent strategist and was invincible in diplomatic negotiations. Elliot heads to the capital of Evatron and is tasked with infiltrating the diplomatic negotiations taking place there.
``Negotiations with Evatron will not be easy. However, in order to prove our power and form an alliance, we must succeed, even if it is by force.'' Celia quietly instructed Elliot. "I believe in your abilities."
Elliot received Celia's orders and immediately departed for Evatron. His goal was to contact the ruling class of Evatron and propose an alliance against Apollo. When he arrived, he realized that Evatron's internal situation was more complicated than he had imagined, and that it would take time for him to accept Celia's existence.
``It's a rare exception for a woman to be recognized as a ruler in this land,'' Elliot said calmly. "However, Celia's ability is certain. If we do not succeed in this negotiation, we will have no future."
___________________


Evatron's reaction and the path to alliance
The moment Elliott contacted Evatron's ruling class, the reaction was harsher than he expected, and he felt resistance. On Evatron, allowing women to hold power was itself a major cultural hurdle. However, Elliott skillfully negotiated to overcome this difficult situation. He coldly demonstrated to the rulers of Evatron just how powerful Celia was, and emphasized the benefits of teaming up with her.
``Apollo is already closing in on us. It is impossible for us to fight alone in the face of Apollo's power.'' Elliot spoke quietly. "Celia Dominicus already boasts the greatest power in the galaxy. By forming an alliance with her, we can gain that great power."

Celia sent her most trusted assassin to contact Evatron's political core. The assassin was a man named Elliott Strass, who had successfully completed numerous missions under her orders.He was an excellent strategist and was invincible in diplomatic negotiations. ___________________


Evatron's reaction and the path to alliance
The moment Elliott contacted Evatron's ruling class, the reaction was harsher than he expected, and he felt resistance. On Evatron, allowing women to hold power was itself a major cultural hurdle. However, Elliott skillfully negotiated to overcome this difficult situation. He coldly demonstrated to the rulers of Evatron just how powerful Celia was, and emphasized the benefits of teaming up with her.
``Apollo is already closing in on us. It is impossible for us to fight alone in the face of Apollo's power.'' Elliot spoke quietly. "Celia Dominicus already boasts the greatest power in the galaxy. By forming an alliance with her, we can gain that great power."

At first, the rulers of Evatron looked at Elliot with surprise and suspicion, but gradually they began to listen to his words. As Apollo's pressure increases, Evatron is presented with options that cannot be ignored. Celia's proposal had the potential to be their last chance.
"Indeed, our military power alone cannot stand against Apollo," the elder Evatron finally spoke. "But joining forces with a city dominated by women is a huge challenge for our culture. But if it's the way to protect our future, we have no choice but to make it."
Seizing the moment, Elliot immediately contacted Celia and proceeded with the procedures to finalize the alliance with Evatron. His clever strategy and Celia's determination finally swayed the rulers of Evatron, and an alliance was formed.
"The alliance with Evatron has been established," Elliot reported to Celia. "Now I have the power to stand up to Apollo."
Celia received the report and nodded coldly. "Now the balance of power has been established against Apollo. But now the real battle begins."
___________________


The dawn of a new era and the evolution of Celia's rule
With the formation of an alliance with Evatron, Celia's control has further strengthened. The Dominion was able to evolve from being just a city-state to an empire with galaxy-wide influence. The alliance against Apollo was an important turning point for Celia, further cementing her control.
However, Celia was never satisfied with her success and continued to aim for even greater heights. In her eyes, there was still much unexplored territory and unexplored territory. And no matter how powerful Apollo was, Celia was determined to stand up to him.

Chapter 82: Elliott Strass’s rebirth and reaching new heights

Elliott Strass was once the leader of ZAMLT, a force that shook the galaxy. He went through many fateful trials until he was defeated by Alpha Cain and escaped from the dimensional Hazama. That time was the toughest and loneliest time for him, but it was also a time of valuable learning that helped him get back on his feet.
After returning from a long wandering in the Hazama dimension, Elliot was at first unsure of where to take shelter. However, the person who appeared before him was none other than Celia Dominicus. Selinopolis, under her control, boasted great power and was establishing itself as the ruler of the galaxy. Elliot abandoned his former ambitions and pride and decided to live a new life under Celia.
Celia saw through his knowledge and abilities and gave him an important position. It gave him the time he needed to regain his former strength and provided him with an opportunity to utilize his talents. Elliott worked hard to live up to those expectations, gradually gaining trust within Selinopolis. During that time, he completed many important missions, demonstrating his strategic talent to Celia, and gaining her trust.
Elliot's most important mission was negotiating an alliance with Evatron. In order to counter the enormous power of Apollo, forming a powerful alliance called Evatron was essential to stabilize the rule of Seria. Elliot masterfully orchestrated the negotiations and succeeded in forming an alliance with the ruling class of Evatron. His strategy and negotiation skills became an irreplaceable force for Celia, and she was finally able to obtain the powerful support of Evatron.
Due to his success, Celia decided to promote Elliott to a higher position. His role in Selinopolis's government was no longer just that of a trusted subordinate. Celia decided to make him a close advisor and promote him to an even more important position, giving him an opportunity to further test his skills.
___________________

Celia decided to make him a close advisor and promote him to an even more important position, giving him an opportunity to further test his skills.
___________________


Elliott's new role and its impact

The new position that Celia gave Elliott was ``High Advisor,'' in charge of foreign affairs and military affairs in Selinopolis. This was not just an honorary position, but a position of great responsibility that actually influenced the policies of the entire city. Celia fully trusted his strategic knowledge and political acumen, and needed his leadership in the aftermath of the alliance with Evatron.
Elliott accepted the new mission and immediately began carrying out his duties. In order to further strengthen his control over Selinopolis, he focused not only on diplomatic negotiations but also on formulating military strategies and strengthening the city's defense system. He took command, fighting against numerous dangers in order to achieve Celia's goal of ``balancing control and peace.''
These activities were essential to further solidifying Celia's control, and Elliott fulfilled his role admirably, becoming Celia's right-hand man in both name and reality. He became an important strategist in guiding Selinopolis to become an even more powerful force in the galaxy, and his presence became increasingly indispensable to Selia.
``Elliot, I appreciate your work,'' Celia said quietly to him one evening. "Now that the alliance with Evatron has been successful and the city's defenses have been strengthened, I can consider my next move. But I could not have gotten this far without your contributions."
Elliot bowed his head silently at those words and answered, "That is my duty. Celia, being able to live up to your trust is of the utmost importance to me." Those words contained the heart that overcame his past mistakes and pledged complete loyalty to Celia.
___________________

___________________


New trials and Celia's loneliness

While Elliot achieved success after success and won Celia's trust, new challenges gradually began to appear in her heart. As the galaxy's power relations swing between Apollo and Evatron, Celia must make new decisions to protect her control. With the successful alliance with Evatron, Celia strengthened her power, but was wary of Apollo's reaction.
Celia exercised her power while always feeling lonely. Her path was lonely, as her former friends Katrina and Ninny rebelled, and Alpha passed away, and sometimes that loneliness disturbed her. However, Elliot's presence alleviates her loneliness a little, and it is because of his support that Celia is able to aim for even greater heights.
"Even if I am alone, I will protect this city and build its future," Celia vowed strongly in her heart. "And, together with Elliot, we will continue to fight to gain control over the galaxy."
___________________


The shadow of a new enemy and the next battle
However, as Celia takes complete control and aims to make Dominion the most powerful entity in the galaxy, a new enemy begins to be felt in the shadows. The competition of power with Apollo is not over yet. Even with the addition of Evatron, there are many people in the galaxy who challenge Celia, and their every move makes Celia nervous.
While Apollo's existence remains a threat, Celia senses that the time to test his power is drawing near. She also understood that her power alone was insufficient to rule the entire galaxy. There is no doubt that the next war will test her again.
``From now on, the battle will continue.'' Celia muttered to herself on a quiet night, looking up at the starry sky. "But I won't give up."

Chapter 83: Test of strength from Apollo and Celia's defense preparations

The firing of the Centaur Laser, a symbol of the power under Apollo's control, meant a new test for Celia. The civilization of Apollo boasted overwhelming economic and military power in the galaxy, and its presence had a strong influence on other planetary systems. Until now, Celia has not taken this power lightly and has acted with a view to conflict with Apollo, but the time has finally come to actually test that power.
The firing of the "Centaur Laser" was Apollo's "test of strength" against Celia, and was also intended as a warning. This was an extremely powerful beam of energy fired towards the E16 system, and was predicted to take 2.6 years to reach. Its power was said to be enough to impact the center of the galaxy, and it had the potential to have a huge impact on the E16 system.
Celia quickly responded to this threat and decided to devise a grand defense plan to protect the entire E16 series. Although the 2.6 years it took for the centaur laser to arrive was not enough time for her to prepare, it was a valuable time for her to devise the best defense plan.
___________________


E16 series defense plan
Celia devised a plan to generate a huge radioactive shock wave throughout the E16 system in order to counter the Centaur Laser. This shock wave uses dimensional energy to emit radioactive energy over a wide area, blocking the Centaur Laser's progress and also absorbing its energy.
Devices that generate radioactive shock waves will be deployed throughout the E16 system and will be activated in coordination with each planet's defense system. The range of influence of the radiation waves was extremely large, and in order to protect the entire E16 system, it was necessary to precisely adjust the timing of the shock waves and the strength of the waves. Celia took charge of its design and execution, leading her most trusted troops and advancing the plan step by step.

The firing of the Centaur Laser, a symbol of the power under Apollo's control, meant a new test for Celia. The civilization of Apollo boasted overwhelming economic and military power in the galaxy, and its presence had a strong influence on other planetary systems. Until now, Celia has not taken this power lightly and has acted with a view to conflict with Apollo, but the time has finally come to actually test that power.

The firing of the Centaur Laser, a symbol of the power under Apollo's control, meant a new test for Celia. The civilization of Apollo boasted overwhelming economic and military power in the galaxy, and its presence had a strong influence on other planetary systems. Until now, Celia has not taken this power lightly and has acted with a view to conflict with Apollo, but the time has finally come to actually test that power.
The firing of the "Centaur Laser" was Apollo's "test of strength" against Celia, and was also intended as a warning. This was an extremely powerful beam of energy fired towards the E16 system, and was predicted to take 2.6 years to reach. Its power was said to be enough to impact the center of the galaxy, and it had the potential to have a huge impact on the E16 system.
Celia quickly responded to this threat and decided to devise a grand defense plan to protect the entire E16 series. Although the 2.6 years it took for the centaur laser to arrive was not enough time for her to prepare, it was a valuable time for her to devise the best defense plan.
___________________


E16 series defense plan
Celia devised a plan to generate a huge radioactive shock wave throughout the E16 system in order to counter the Centaur Laser. This shock wave uses dimensional energy to emit radioactive energy over a wide area, blocking the Centaur Laser's progress and also absorbing its energy.
Devices that generate radioactive shock waves will be deployed throughout the E16 system and will be activated in coordination with each planet's defense system. The range of influence of the radiation waves was extremely large, and in order to protect the entire E16 system, it was necessary to precisely adjust the timing of the shock waves and the strength of the waves. Celia took charge of its design and execution, leading her most trusted troops and advancing the plan step by step.

``If we cannot fully activate this radioactive shock wave by the time the Centaur Laser arrives, the E16 system's defenses will collapse. We need to gather all our strength and carry out the operation with precision.'' Celia calmly gave instructions and prepared to carry out the plan.
While proceeding with her defensive measures, Celia decided to take even more powerful countermeasures. It was the firing of a super powerful energy pulse called the "G4 Phantom Pulse." This pulse was fired towards the Apollo civilization area, giving an overwhelming impact of energy to their front lines, and was also meant to be Celia's "response" and to show off her power against Apollo.
"The G4 Phantom Pulse is expected to reach the Apollo civilization in 2.3 years. When it arrives, we will be able to show Apollo our power." Celia's confidence grew as she worked out her strategy. "No matter how powerful Apollo is, if they receive this pulse, they will have no choice but to understand that we are serious."
___________________


G4 Phantom Pulse launch preparation
"G4 Phantom Pulse" is the most powerful weapon of the E16 series, and its energy is many times more powerful than normal dimensional energy. Per Celia's orders, preparations were underway to launch this pulse using a specially designed launcher. The pulse that was fired was intended to proceed towards the Apollo civilization, and once it reached it, it would use its powerful energy to cause serious damage to Apollo's defense system.
"The launcher adjustment has been completed. Celia, preparations are complete." Elliott Strass checked the progress of the troops under his command and reported to Celia.
"Good job, Elliot," Celia replied calmly. "It will reach Apollo in 2-3 years, but in the meantime let us establish our defenses and achieve final victory."

``If we cannot fully activate this radioactive shock wave by the time the Centaur Laser arrives, the E16 system's defenses will collapse. We need to gather all our strength and carry out the operation with precision.'' Celia calmly gave instructions and prepared to carry out the plan.
While proceeding with her defensive measures, Celia decided to take even more powerful countermeasures. It was the firing of a super powerful energy pulse called the "G4 Phantom Pulse." This pulse was fired towards the Apollo civilization area, giving an overwhelming impact of energy to their front lines, and was also meant to be Celia's "response" and to show off her power against Apollo.
"The G4 Phantom Pulse is expected to reach the Apollo civilization in 2.3 years. When it arrives, we will be able to show Apollo our power." Celia's confidence grew as she worked out her strategy. "No matter how powerful Apollo is, if they receive this pulse, they will have no choice but to understand that we are serious."

___________________


G4 Phantom Pulse launch preparation
"G4 Phantom Pulse" is the most powerful weapon of the E16 series, and its energy is many times more powerful than normal dimensional energy. Per Celia's orders, preparations were underway to launch this pulse using a specially designed launcher. The pulse that was fired was intended to proceed towards the Apollo civilization, and once it reached it, it would use its powerful energy to cause serious damage to Apollo's defense system.
"The launcher adjustment has been completed. Celia, preparations are complete." Elliott Strass checked the progress of the troops under his command and reported to Celia.
"Good job, Elliot," Celia replied calmly. "It will reach Apollo in 2-3 years, but in the meantime let us establish our defenses and achieve final victory."

Celia then proceeded to prepare for further operations and continued to issue instructions to ensure that all planets in the E16 system and their defense systems worked together perfectly. Her goal was to sufficiently defend against the power of Apollo's Centaur Laser, and at the same time send out the G4 Phantom Pulse as a counterattack, giving Apollo an overwhelming warning.
___________________


Arrival of centaur laser and activation of defense system
2.6 years later, the day came when the Centaur Laser reached the E16 series. Its power was beyond imagination, and it had more than enough power to test the E16-type defense system. Preparations were made to activate the radioactive shock wave that Celia had instructed, and the defense systems of the entire E16 series began operating at once. Preparations were made to emit a shock wave using energy flows throughout the city, between planets, and in each dimension.
"Radioactive shockwave, activate," Celia ordered.
At that moment, the entire E16 system trembled violently, and a huge amount of energy was released across dimensions. The shockwave spread across the galaxy, attempting to stop the Centaur Laser from advancing. The power of that radiation wave was immeasurable, and by intersecting dimensional energy multiple times, some of it was dissipated before the laser was emitted, and a dimensional barrier was formed to strengthen the defense.
When the centaur laser collided with the E16 system's defenses, the energy shock caused a galaxy-shaking sound and a dimensional energy explosion spread out. However, Celia's defense system admirably absorbed the impact, and the damage was kept to a minimum. The effect of the radioactive shock wave appeared, and the Centaur laser lost its power, exceeding the range of the E16 system.
"It's a success." Celia watched the scene and murmured quietly.
___________________


Warning to Apollo
After that, Celia prepared to launch "G4 Phantom Pulse" and finally released its energy towards the Apollo civilization area. The G4 Phantom Pulse was fired with all the energy of the E16 series. No matter how powerful Apollo is, they will definitely be warned by this powerful energy wave.

Celia then proceeded to prepare for further operations and continued to issue instructions to ensure that all planets in the E16 system and their defense systems worked together perfectly. Her goal was to sufficiently defend against the power of Apollo's Centaur Laser, and at the same time send out the G4 Phantom Pulse as a counterattack, giving Apollo an overwhelming warning.
___________________

"Now Apollo will understand our power," Celia said calmly. Without letting the moment pass, she began to plan her next strategy. Her battle continues to gain control of the galaxy.
The next chapter will depict how Apollo will react after the "G4 Phantom Pulse" reaches the Apollo civilization area, and how Celia will overcome the subsequent situation.
Chapter 84: The outbreak of war with Apollo and Lisa's mission
A confrontation with the Apollo civilization has become inevitable. As Celia Dominicus strengthened her control, a challenge from Apollo became a reality, and Celia displayed an amazing defense against the "Centaur Laser" fired as a test of her strength. Now that it was clear that Apollo would not react to that power, Celia was determined not to take a step back, and the footsteps of the war finally began to echo.
After the launch of "G4 Phantom Pulse," the Apollon civilization immediately sensed its powerful energy wave, and Apollon's leader, Ronan Ursa, noticed its movements. The pulse that Celia fired had a serious impact on Apollo's front lines, and it thrust overwhelming force at Apollo, as if provoking him.
At that point, Ronan Ursa took Celia's firing of the "G4 Phantom Pulse" not as a mere defensive reaction, but as a declaration of war. Celia's intentions clearly appeared to him as heralding the "start of war."
``What are we going to do without taking this as a declaration of war?'' Ronan declared, looking around at the Apollo executives gathered at the scene with a cold expression on his face. "We declare war on Celia Dominicus."
At that moment, preparations were made to mobilize all military forces from "Apollo Centralis", the core planet of the Apollo civilization. Under Ronan Ursa's leadership, Apollo's military power rapidly increased, their most elite troops mobilized, and preparations for war began.

"Now Apollo will understand our power," Celia said calmly. Without letting the moment pass, she began to plan her next strategy. Her battle continues to gain control of the galaxy.
The next chapter will depict how Apollo will react after the "G4 Phantom Pulse" reaches the Apollo civilization area, and how Celia will overcome the subsequent situation.

Chapter 84: The outbreak of war with Apollo and Lisa's mission
A confrontation with the Apollo civilization has become inevitable. As Celia Dominicus strengthened her control, a challenge from Apollo became a reality, and Celia displayed an amazing defense against the "Centaur Laser" fired as a test of her strength. Now that it was clear that Apollo would not react to that power, Celia was determined not to take a step back, and the footsteps of the war finally began to echo.
After the launch of "G4 Phantom Pulse," the Apollon civilization immediately sensed its powerful energy wave, and Apollon's leader, Ronan Ursa, noticed its movements. The pulse that Celia fired had a serious impact on Apollo's front lines, and it thrust overwhelming force at Apollo, as if provoking him.
At that point, Ronan Ursa took Celia's firing of the "G4 Phantom Pulse" not as a mere defensive reaction, but as a declaration of war. Celia's intentions clearly appeared to him as heralding the "start of war."
``What are we going to do without taking this as a declaration of war?'' Ronan declared, looking around at the Apollo executives gathered at the scene with a cold expression on his face. "We declare war on Celia Dominicus."
At that moment, preparations were made to mobilize all military forces from "Apollo Centralis", the core planet of the Apollo civilization. Under Ronan Ursa's leadership, Apollo's military power rapidly increased, their most elite troops mobilized, and preparations for war began.

Apollo, who was provoked by Celia, could no longer retreat. They set out to test Celia's power and overthrow her rule. However, Celia was also making steady progress with her preparations. As she prepares for war with Apollo and plans her next strategy, she decides to send out a top secret mission.
Celia decides to send an assassin to Apollo's core planet, Apollo Centralis. The assassin had the code name "L.S.A." Her mission was to deal a serious blow to Apollo's core and turn the tide of the war in her favor. Lisa is an elite assassin who specializes in assassinations and sabotage, and Celia believed that if her mission was successful, she would be able to deal a psychological blow to Apollo.
``Lisa, I entrust you with the most important mission.'' Celia calmly instructed Lisa. "Your mission is to infiltrate Apollo Centralis and deal a fatal blow to their leadership."
Lisa silently nodded in response to that cold command without a moment's hesitation. "I will carry out my mission, Celia."
With those words at the end, Lisa disappeared from in front of Celia and started moving towards Apollo Centralis. Celia believes in her success, and at the same time prepares for war with Apollo while considering her next move.
___________________


Infiltration into Apollo Centralis and Lisa's mission
Lisa began moving towards Apollo Centralis using a top secret route. She didn't show her appearance to anyone and proceeded to hide like a shadow. Her goal was to infiltrate the ``Apollo Centralis Council Building'' where Apollo's leaders gather, and directly damage the Apollo leadership there.
Lisa wasn't just an assassin. Her mission was not only to infiltrate Apollo's core, steal information, and eliminate key personnel, but also to neutralize Apollo's war plans if possible. If Lisa succeeds, part of Apollo's military power will collapse, allowing Celia to gain an advantage over Apollo.

Apollo, who was provoked by Celia, could no longer retreat. They set out to test Celia's power and overthrow her rule. However, Celia was also making steady progress with her preparations. As she prepares for war with Apollo and plans her next strategy, she decides to send out a top secret mission.
Celia decides to send an assassin to Apollo's core planet, Apollo Centralis. The assassin had the code name "L.S.A." Her mission was to deal a serious blow to Apollo's core and turn the tide of the war in her favor. Lisa is an elite assassin who specializes in assassinations and sabotage, and Celia believed that if her mission was successful, she would be able to deal a psychological blow to Apollo.

Lisa silently nodded in response to that cold command without a moment's hesitation. "I will carry out my mission, Celia."
With those words at the end, Lisa disappeared from in front of Celia and started moving towards Apollo Centralis. Celia believes in her success, and at the same time prepares for war with Apollo while considering her next move.

___________________


Infiltration into Apollo Centralis and Lisa's mission
Lisa began moving towards Apollo Centralis using a top secret route. She didn't show her appearance to anyone and proceeded to hide like a shadow. Her goal was to infiltrate the ``Apollo Centralis Council Building'' where Apollo's leaders gather, and directly damage the Apollo leadership there.
Lisa wasn't just an assassin. Her mission was not only to infiltrate Apollo's core, steal information, and eliminate key personnel, but also to neutralize Apollo's war plans if possible. If Lisa succeeds, part of Apollo's military power will collapse, allowing Celia to gain an advantage over Apollo.

Lisa cleverly evades Apollo Centralis' defense systems and makes her way to the council building through a secret underground passageway. Along the way, she became more alert, breaking through one defense system after another. His movements were quick and efficient. Lisa's nimble movements and assassination techniques were perfect, and she was able to overcome any obstacles.
Once inside Apollo Centralis, Lisa quickly found her destination. The inside of the council building boasted high security, but Lisa easily broke through it. Without making any unnecessary noise, she entered the desired room and found the leaders of Apollo in a meeting.
Inside the council, Ronan Ursa and other top leaders of Apollo were gathered. Lisa sees this opportunity and sneaks into the conference room. Her mission was to eliminate Ronan and cause fatal damage to Apollo's leadership system.
``If we can defeat Ronan Ursa, Apollo's strength will be greatly reduced.'' Lisa thought calmly as she advanced toward her target.
However, at that moment, an unexpected obstacle stands in front of Lisa. It was Apollo's strongest escort force. They noticed that Lisa had infiltrated and reached the spot immediately. Lisa made an instant decision and got into a fighting stance. She was still aiming to get close to Ronan while engaging in a fierce battle with the escort force.
___________________


Apollo's declaration of war and Celia's reaction
Meanwhile, at Apollo's front line, Apollo Centralis, Ronan Ursa officially accepts Seria's G4 Phantom Pulse as a declaration of war, and begins preparations for war in the Apollo civilization. Under his command, he mobilized his entire army and prepared to launch a counteroffensive against Seria.
"If you challenge us, Celia Dominicus, we will meet you," Ronan declared coldly, ordering Apollo to make full use of his military power. As Apollo's war preparations progress, Celia pays close attention to his movements and decides to formulate his next strategy.

Lisa cleverly evades Apollo Centralis' defense systems and makes her way to the council building through a secret underground passageway. Along the way, she became more alert, breaking through one defense system after another. His movements were quick and efficient. Lisa's nimble movements and assassination techniques were perfect, and she was able to overcome any obstacles.
Once inside Apollo Centralis, Lisa quickly found her destination. The inside of the council building boasted high security, but Lisa easily broke through it. Without making any unnecessary noise, she entered the desired room and found the leaders of Apollo in a meeting.
Inside the council, Ronan Ursa and other top leaders of Apollo were gathered. Lisa sees this opportunity and sneaks into the conference room. Her mission was to eliminate Ronan and cause fatal damage to Apollo's leadership system.
``If we can defeat Ronan Ursa, Apollo's strength will be greatly reduced.'' Lisa thought calmly as she advanced toward her target.

___________________


Apollo's declaration of war and Celia's reaction
Meanwhile, at Apollo's front line, Apollo Centralis, Ronan Ursa officially accepts Seria's G4 Phantom Pulse as a declaration of war, and begins preparations for war in the Apollo civilization. Under his command, he mobilized his entire army and prepared to launch a counteroffensive against Seria.
"If you challenge us, Celia Dominicus, we will meet you," Ronan declared coldly, ordering Apollo to make full use of his military power. As Apollo's war preparations progress, Celia pays close attention to his movements and decides to formulate his next strategy.

If Lisa's mission is successful, it will have a serious impact on Apollo's military strength, but it is still unknown how the war will unfold. Celia proceeded with her cold-hearted tactics while preparing for the challenges that came one after another.
Chapter 85: Lisa vs Ronan Ursa and the attack of the Space Pirates
At the moment when Lisa and Ronan Ursa faced off, the deepest part of Apollo Centralis was enveloped in a heavy atmosphere. Lisa turned her cold eyes on Ronan, and Ronan glanced at her with a cold smile. She has only one mission. His goal was to eliminate Ronan Ursa and inflict decisive damage on Apollo. But Ronan is more than just a leader. Behind him stood Apollo's greatest military power and countless loyal troops.
``Lisa, what do you want from me?'' Ronan said in a quiet voice. The cold, intimidating feeling in that voice seeped into Lisa's heart. "Even if you defeat me, Apollo will not be shaken. Your fate ends here."
Lisa didn't show any reaction to those words and answered briefly. "Your fate also ends here."
At that moment, murderous intent radiated from Lisa's eyes, and she charged towards Ronan at once. Ronan also anticipated this move and immediately took a defensive stance. His dimensional energy flowed through his body, compressing the air around him. Ronan was a true Apollo tactician, and his fighting ability was extraordinary.
The battle between Lisa and Ronan was more than just a physical battle. Dimensional energy shook the space, and an overwhelming battle unfolded that seemed to distort time. Lisa's movements were unpredictable, her body surrounding Ronan like a shadow. On the other hand, Ronan did not leave the area and continued to counterattack while coldly parrying Lisa's attacks.
"I recognize your power, but I have the power to defeat it," Ronan declared calmly, instantly converging the dimensional energy and releasing an explosive shockwave. Space was torn apart, and Lisa narrowly avoided the impact, but the speed and power consumed her stamina.

If Lisa's mission is successful, it will have a serious impact on Apollo's military strength, but it is still unknown how the war will unfold. Celia proceeded with her cold-hearted tactics while preparing for the challenges that came one after another.

Lisa's movements were unpredictable, her body surrounding Ronan like a shadow. On the other hand, Ronan did not leave the area and continued to counterattack while coldly parrying Lisa's attacks.
"I recognize your power, but I have the power to defeat it," Ronan declared calmly, instantly converging the dimensional energy and releasing an explosive shockwave. Space was torn apart, and Lisa narrowly avoided the impact, but the speed and power consumed her stamina.

Lisa reacted quickly, sharply leaping towards Ronan in front of her and unleashing a slash. The blade narrowly tore through Ronan's defenses, but his reaction time allowed him to dodge it and immediately fire a counterattack. Just when Lisa's agility seemed to be winning, an arrow of dimensional energy shot from Ronan's hand and hit her, forcing her to temporarily stop on the spot.
"This is the power of Apollo, Lisa," Ronan said, catching his breath. "No matter how strong your power is, I have this."
Despite being attacked, Lisa calmly stood up. "My mission remains the same," she answered shortly, ready to attack again. The war situation was extremely fierce, but Lisa's will remained unwavering. If she succeeds, she can destroy Apollo's leadership. And Celia's control becomes even more solid.
However, as the battle continued, Celia faced another problem. It was an attack by the "Space Pirates" who came from the Apollo civilization at an unexpected time. For Celia, backed by Apollo's mighty military power and alliance with Evatron, the appearance of this pirate group could pose a new threat.
___________________


Invasion of space pirates and attack on E16 series
Before Apollo could take direct military action, they sought to use space pirates to gain an advantage in the war in order to expand their influence. The Space Pirates are an irregular army that is tacitly controlled by Apollo, and their size cannot be ignored. The pirate group was formed to protect the front lines of Evatron, and they proceeded to ravage numerous planetary systems.
Finally, the Space Pirates began their march towards the E16 series. They were trying to use their high-speed movement ability to break through the E16 series' defense network. Although Seria's defense system seemed perfect at first glance, the pirates' movements were unpredictable and their attack methods differed from traditional armies. The pirates' unique tactics meant a new challenge for Celia.

"The Space Pirates are advancing towards the E16 series. We can't leave this unattended." Celia received the report and ordered them to take immediate countermeasures. "Assemble a unit to intercept them, and first conduct reconnaissance and information gathering to accurately determine the strength of the pirate group."
Celia calmly gave instructions, but there was anxiety in her heart. Since Apollo is behind the scenes, the attack by the Space Pirates is not just a chaotic attack. This might just be Apollo's first move to test Celia's power.

The battle with the pirates and Lisa's fate
During their raids, the pirate group found numerous holes in the E16 series' defense system and cleverly launched attacks. They attempted to break through Seria's defenses by making full use of the most important elements of their tactics: speed and unpredictability. As the sound of a violent collision resounded through the E16 system's interplanetary defense system, Celia calmly watched the situation and reacted quickly.
Meanwhile, the battle between Lisa and Ronan Ursa is no longer just a battle. Her mission is to eliminate Apollo's leader, but during the battle, she is unable to completely defeat Ronan's power. Lisa's precise attacks were pushed back by Ronan's strong defense and waves of dimensional energy, and were gradually exhausted.
"I'm still not convinced of my victory," Lisa muttered in her mind as she found a momentary gap, then began her attack again while catching her breath. "But for Celia, I must win."
Ronan sensed Lisa's will and continued to fight even more calmly. He overwhelmed Lisa with his powerful energy and finally succeeded in blocking her movements. Lisa received that blow and was unable to fight. Ronan said coldly in front of him.
Chapter 86: Lisa's Execution and Space Pirate Invasion

Chapter 86: Lisa's Execution and Space Pirate Invasion
Risking her life, Lisa attempts to complete the important mission of infiltrating Apollo Centralis and defeating Ronan Ursa. However, during the harsh battle, she was finally pushed into Ronan's overwhelming power, and was eventually taken prisoner and handed over to Apollo.

Her capture was a great victory for Apollo, and after that, it was decided that Lisa would be executed in the deepest part of the Apollo civilization.アポロンの支配者層は、リサの暗殺未遂を容認せず、彼女を公開処刑することを選んだ。 This decision also served as a warning to Celia Dominicus, and was a symbolic action to further strengthen Apollo's authority.
On the day of the execution, a huge gallows was set up in the central square of Apollo Centralis. Apollo's soldiers set up strict security around him, and a large crowd of citizens gathered before the execution to watch his actions.リサは、手足を拘束され、無言でその場に立たされていた。 There was no fear of death in her eyes, but rather determination and coolness.
「私は、セリアのために命を捧げる。」リサは心の中で静かに誓った。
ロナン・アーサは、その場に立ち、リサを見下ろしながら言った。 "Lisa, no matter how strong you are, you are powerless in front of Apollo. Your life ends here."
Lisa didn't say a word and looked coldly at his words.彼女は、戦いの中で培った経験と誇りを胸に、最期を迎える準備をしていた。処刑の刃が降り、リサの命が絶たれる瞬間、彼女の心の中でセリアの顔が浮かんだ。 She believed that Celia would definitely take over the mission that she was unable to complete.
「これで終わりだ。」リサは心の中でそう呟き、静かに目を閉じた。
アポロンの支配者たちは、その瞬間、リサの命が絶たれる様子を見守り、勝利を確信した。しかし、彼らはこの瞬間がセリアの怒りを引き起こすことになるとは、まだ知らなかった。

Invasion of space pirates and rampage of Zodiac Divastations
With Apollo's execution completed and preparations for war for galactic supremacy underway, Celia soon faces her next threat. As if to test the strength of those responsible for Apollo's Dark Ages, Apollo sent a group of space pirates. This pirate group had sworn loyalty to Apollo and was acting under his orders, but their true identity was becoming a serious threat to Celia.

Her capture was a great victory for Apollo, and after that, it was decided that Lisa would be executed in the deepest part of the Apollo civilization. Apollo's ruling class did not condone Lisa's assassination attempt and chose to have her publicly executed. This decision also served as a warning to Celia Dominicus, and was a symbolic action to further strengthen Apollo's authority.
On the day of the execution, a huge gallows was set up in the central square of Apollo Centralis. Apollo's soldiers set up strict security around him, and a large crowd of citizens gathered before the execution to watch his actions. Lisa's hands and feet were bound and she was forced to stand there in silence. There was no fear of death in her eyes, but rather determination and coolness.
"I will sacrifice my life for Celia," Lisa vowed quietly in her heart.
Ronan Ursa said, standing there and looking down at Lisa. "Lisa, no matter how strong you are, you are powerless in front of Apollo. Your life ends here."
Lisa didn't say a word and looked coldly at his words. She prepared to meet her end with the experience and pride she had gained in battle in her heart. At the moment when the executioner's blade fell and Lisa's life ended, Celia's face appeared in her mind. She believed that Celia would definitely take over the mission that she was unable to complete.
"This is the end," Lisa said to herself and quietly closed her eyes.
At that moment, the rulers of Apollo watched Lisa's life end, confident of victory. But little did they know that this moment would provoke Celia's wrath.
