Invasion of space pirates and rampage of Zodiac Divastations
With Apollo's execution completed and preparations for war for galactic supremacy underway, Celia soon faces her next threat. As if to test the strength of those responsible for Apollo's Dark Ages, Apollo sent a group of space pirates. This pirate group had sworn loyalty to Apollo and was acting under his orders, but their true identity was becoming a serious threat to Celia.

宇宙海賊団の名は「ゾディアックディヴァステーションズ」と呼ばれ、12人の幹部からなる精鋭部隊がその中心であった。それぞれが異なる星座にちなんだコードネームを持つ彼らは、その名の通り、惑星を徹底的に破壊し、領域を拡張することを目的としていた。ゾディアックディヴァステーションズは、その軍事力と不規則な戦術で恐れられ、セリアが治めるDominionの平和を脅かす存在となった。
The Zodiac Divastations were planning to invade the E16 series and occupy its territory.セリアの防衛システムを越え、いきなりE16系に襲いかかってきた彼らは、すぐにその圧倒的な力を示し始めた。 The first to be attacked was the "Harmonia planet group" on the outer edge of the E16 system. This planet group was the least defended region, and the pirate group took advantage of this opportunity to launch a surprise attack.
「私たちが乗り越えるべき障害は、もはやアポロンだけではない。」セリアはその報告を受けて冷静に言った。 "We need to react immediately to the invasion of the Zodiac Devastations."
Celia knew that the enemy executives each had different special abilities. Their abilities went beyond mere combat ability and included spiritual tactics and the power to manipulate dimensions. Therefore, she needed to quickly formulate a plan for this battle.
最初の戦闘が勃発した時、セリアは「ゾディアックディヴァステーションズ」の最初の幹部、アリエスという名の兵器使いを知っていた。アリエスは、驚異的な肉体と、特殊な武器を使いこなす能力を持ち、彼女の戦闘スタイルはその力を最大限に活かしたものだった。次に登場したのは、タウラス。 He boasted overwhelming power and was unparalleled in physical destructive power.セリアは、彼らの力を最大限に引き出すために、最も強力な防衛システムを起動させ、最前線の戦力を増強した。
"First, we need to survive the first attack," Celia coldly ordered to her commanders. "Send in our most elite troops to take on Aries and Taurus."

The name of the Space Pirates was the ``Zodiac Divastations,'' and its core consisted of an elite unit consisting of 12 executives. Each of them has a code name associated with a different constellation, and as their name suggests, their goal is to completely destroy planets and expand their territory. Feared for their military power and erratic tactics, the Zodiac Devastations became a threat to the peace of Celia's Dominion.
The Zodiac Divastations were planning to invade the E16 series and occupy its territory. They overcame Seria's defense system and suddenly attacked the E16 series, and immediately began to demonstrate their overwhelming power. The first to be attacked was the "Harmonia planet group" on the outer edge of the E16 system. This planet group was the least defended region, and the pirate group took advantage of this opportunity to launch a surprise attack.
"Apollo is no longer the only obstacle we have to overcome," Celia calmly said after receiving the report. "We need to react immediately to the invasion of the Zodiac Devastations."
Celia knew that the enemy executives each had different special abilities. Their abilities went beyond mere combat ability and included spiritual tactics and the power to manipulate dimensions. Therefore, she needed to quickly formulate a plan for this battle.
When the first battle broke out, Celia knew the first leader of the Zodiac Devastations, a weapon wielder named Aries. Aries has an amazing physique and the ability to use special weapons, and her fighting style takes full advantage of that power. Next came Taurus. He boasted overwhelming power and was unparalleled in physical destructive power. In order to maximize their power, Celia activated the most powerful defense system and strengthened the front-line forces.
"First, we need to survive the first attack," Celia coldly ordered to her commanders. "Send in our most elite troops to take on Aries and Taurus."

Meanwhile, Celia orders Elliot to gather information on the Zodiac Divastations. ``Let's figure out why they got through our defenses and figure out a way to exploit that gap.'' Elliot quickly came up with a plan and prepared to strengthen Dominion's defenses.
___________________


Battle and Celia's reaction
As the onslaught of Aries and Taurus continues, the defense force commanded by Celia gradually engages in battle against the leaders of the pirate group. Her cold-blooded strategy combined with Elliot's trickery allowed them to survive the first attack. However, the executives of the Zodiac Diva Stations were not just ordinary soldiers, each of them had extremely advanced combat abilities, and cornered Celia's troops one after another.
``If this continues, their attacks will not stop.'' Celia spoke to the commanders and made the final decision. "Now is the time to show our true power. We will deploy all our defense power and face the final decisive battle."
After that, the forces commanded by Celia entered into an all-out war with the Zodiac Divastations. As the war situation intensified, and neither side was willing to give up an inch, Celia succeeded in advancing the war situation in her favor one after another with her cool-headed judgment.
Chapter 87: The Fierce Battle with the Zodiac Divastations
The sky over Dominion was darker and heavier than it had ever been before. The leaders of the Zodiac Divastations, Aries, Taurus, and 12 others, have extraordinary fighting abilities, and when they invade Dominion, the entire city is engulfed in unprecedented war. The magnificent system of control that Celia Dominicus has built is now about to be put to the test.
From the moment the first battle began, Celia coolly took command. She immediately mobilized troops and ordered the reinforcement of defense systems. The leaders of the Zodiac Divastations each have unique abilities and are not just combatants. Their techniques and tactics were beyond common sense.

Meanwhile, Celia orders Elliot to gather information on the Zodiac Divastations. 「彼らが我々の防衛を突破した理由を明確にし、その隙間を突く方法を考えろ。」エリオットは素早く計画を立て、Dominionの防衛を強化する準備を整えた。

Battle and Celia's reaction
アリエスとタウラスの猛攻が続く中、セリアの指揮する防衛部隊は、次第に海賊団の幹部たちとの戦いを繰り広げていった。彼女の冷徹な戦略と、エリオットの策略が見事に組み合わさり、最初の攻撃はなんとかしのぐことができた。しかし、ゾディアックディヴァステーションズの幹部たちはただの兵士ではなく、それぞれが非常に高度な戦闘能力を持ち、セリアの部隊を次々と追い詰めていった。

Chapter 87: The Fierce Battle with the Zodiac Divastations
The sky over Dominion was darker and heavier than it had ever been before.ゾディアックディヴァステーションズの幹部たち、アリエス、タウラス、そしてその他の12人の戦闘能力は異常に高く、彼らがDominionに侵攻してきたことで、都市全体が前代未聞の戦火に包まれた。 The magnificent system of control that Celia Dominicus has built is now about to be put to the test.
From the moment the first battle began, Celia coolly took command. She immediately mobilized troops and ordered the reinforcement of defense systems. The leaders of the Zodiac Divastations each have unique abilities and are not just combatants. Their techniques and tactics were beyond common sense.

Aries' fighting style boasted incredible speed and precision, and each attack was deadly. As if controlling space itself, she broke through enemy defenses one after another. Taurus possesses overwhelming power and overwhelms those around him with his physical destructive power. His blow was powerful enough to shake the ground and shatter buildings in an instant.
In order to fight against these two executives, Celia assembled the most elite troops and sent them to the front lines. However, her troops were unable to withstand the powerful attack and were forced to gradually retreat.
``At this rate, we'll be pushed back.'' Celia calmly received the report and quickly made a decision. "The time has come to ask Evatron for help."
Evatron was once a powerful ally of hers, and is also known as Apollo's rival. Evatron's military power is overwhelming, and if they can receive its support, they will be able to gain the strength to stand against the Zodiac Divastations. However, requesting emergency support from Evatron was a step back for her, and a different choice from her usual stance as a proud warrior.
It took Celia several minutes to make that decision. She believed that with Evatron's support, she could turn the tide of battle in her favor without causing further damage. However, at the same time, they feared that with support from Evatron, their influence would increase within the Dominion.

Emergency support request and Evatron's response
Celia's request for emergency assistance reaches Evatron's front-line commander, Maxim Veld. Maxim was Evatron's most accomplished military commander and was known for his cold judgment in war. When he received Celia's request, he immediately confirmed its contents.

Aries' fighting style boasted incredible speed and precision, and each attack was deadly. As if controlling space itself, she broke through enemy defenses one after another. Taurus possesses overwhelming power and overwhelms those around him with his physical destructive power. His blow was powerful enough to shake the ground and shatter buildings in an instant.

Emergency support request and Evatron's response
Celia's request for emergency assistance reaches Evatron's front-line commander, Maxim Veld.マクシムは、エヴァトロンの軍事部門の最も優秀な指揮官であり、戦争における冷徹な判断力で知られていた。 When he received Celia's request, he immediately confirmed its contents.

"The Zodiac Devastations are invading? What does that have to do with our war?" Maxim muttered, frowning, but quickly changed his mind. Celia is seeking vital help in order to protect the alliance she once formed with Evatron. Because she understood that it wasn't just for one war, but also to protect her rule.
``Celia Dominicus is without a doubt our ally, and if her rule were to crumble, our future would be in jeopardy.'' Maxim made up his mind and ordered the Evatron forces to prepare for action. "We will immediately come to your aid. We will use everything we have to crush the Zodiac Devastations."
At Maxim's direction, Evatron's most elite forces immediately departed and began their march toward the Dominion. It would take time for them to arrive, but Celia had to keep fighting with all her might in the meantime.
``We must survive this war until our most elite troops arrive.'' Celia renewed her resolve in her heart. "If I could rely on Evatron, that would be a big help. But in the meantime, I won't back down."

Fierce battle with Zodiac Divastations

Celia continued to calmly take command on the front lines of the battle. She understood that the executives of Zodiac Divastations each had different tactics, and took measures tailored to their characteristics. However, the overwhelming difference in military strength weighed heavily on her troops, and they were gradually forced to retreat.

Emergency support request and Evatron's response

エヴァトロンの到着と戦局の転換
As time passed, Evatron's support forces finally arrived at Dominion. When Evatron's elite forces joined the battle, the tide of battle changed rapidly. The leaders of the Zodiac Divastations were overwhelmed by its mighty power, and the battle situation was gradually turning in Seria's favor.
Maxim Veld commands the Evatron army and rushes into the battlefield, overwhelming the soldiers of the Zodiac Divastations. Aries and Taurus are surrounded by many powerful troops, and the battle is finally coming to an end.
``Now I can return to Celia,'' Maxim said calmly. "With Evatron's support, Dominion's future is secure."
The Zodiac Divastations' most powerful leaders were finally defeated, and the Dominion's defenses were once again on their feet. Celia decided to prepare for the next action while observing the battle situation.
___________________


戦いの終息と次なる戦争の兆し
Celia's victory over the Zodiac Divastations and with the support of Evatron was a major turning point for Dominion. However, there was still some anxiety in her heart. Celia was acutely aware that the war with Apollo had only just begun.

"The Zodiac Devastations are invading? What does that have to do with our war?" Maxim muttered, frowning, but quickly changed his mind. Celia is seeking vital help in order to protect the alliance she once formed with Evatron. Because she understood that it wasn't just for one war, but also to protect her rule.
``Celia Dominicus is without a doubt our ally, and if her rule were to crumble, our future would be in jeopardy.'' Maxim made up his mind and ordered the Evatron forces to prepare for action. "We will immediately come to your aid. We will use everything we have to crush the Zodiac Devastations."
At Maxim's direction, Evatron's most elite forces immediately departed and began their march toward the Dominion. It would take time for them to arrive, but Celia had to keep fighting with all her might in the meantime.
``We must survive this war until our most elite troops arrive.'' Celia renewed her resolve in her heart. "If I could rely on Evatron, that would be a big help. But in the meantime, I won't back down."
___________________


Fierce battle with Zodiac Divastations
Dominion's defense line was destroyed one by one by the Zodiac Divastations. Aries' clever movements and Taurus' overwhelming power neutralize numerous defense systems. The battle was truly fierce, with both armies fighting with all their might.
Celia continued to calmly take command on the front lines of the battle. She understood that the executives of Zodiac Divastations each had different tactics, and took measures tailored to their characteristics. However, the overwhelming difference in military strength weighed heavily on her troops, and they were gradually forced to retreat.

``Aries has broken through the defense again. The defense line is starting to collapse.'' Celia receives the report and calmly issues instructions. "All defense forces gather on the front lines and hold out. Hold out until Evatron's forces arrive."
Meanwhile, the leaders of the Zodiac Divastations have become more aggressive and are attacking Dominion, draining all of their resources. Celia never wavered during the fierce battle, changing tactics one after another and continuing to counterattack with all her might.
"We can't back out here," Celia shouted, continuing to take command. His eyes were cold and showed a strong will to never relinquish control.
___________________


エヴァトロンの到着と戦局の転換
As time passed, Evatron's support forces finally arrived at Dominion. When Evatron's elite forces joined the battle, the tide of battle changed rapidly. The leaders of the Zodiac Divastations were overwhelmed by its mighty power, and the battle situation was gradually turning in Seria's favor.
Maxim Veld commands the Evatron army and rushes into the battlefield, overwhelming the soldiers of the Zodiac Divastations. Aries and Taurus are surrounded by many powerful troops, and the battle is finally coming to an end.
``Now I can return to Celia,'' Maxim said calmly. "With Evatron's support, Dominion's future is secure."
The Zodiac Divastations' most powerful leaders were finally defeated, and the Dominion's defenses were once again on their feet. Celia decided to prepare for the next action while observing the battle situation.

The Justice Seven were made up of Apollo's strongest soldiers, and their abilities exceeded that of humans. Justice Seven composition and abilities
The Justice Seven were Apollon's elite soldiers, each possessing powers unrivaled by the others. As far as Celia knew, they were made up of seven individuals with different abilities, and each individual ability alone had enough power to shake up the Dominion.
1. Valfa (Sword of Justice)

Valfa is the leader of the Justice Seven, and his military strength is said to be truly invincible. The ``Sword of Justice'' he uses can cut through dimensions, and has enough power to destroy cities and planets with a single swing. Valfa is always calm on the battlefield and has excellent tactical judgment.
2. Aristas (infinite reflection)
Aristas has the ability to reflect any attack and can nullify physical attacks. His special energy shield repels most weapons, leaving him with no defense. It was called the "invincible shield" by Apollo, and its ability made a huge difference to Celia's defensive power.
3. Kain (Ruler of Time and Space)
Kain has the ability to manipulate time. His abilities include slowing enemy movement and reversing time. By making full use of this power, you can advance the battle to your advantage and completely control the rhythm of the battle. Even Celia's strongest defense system cannot cope with this ability.
4. Cygnus (mental interference)
Cygnus has the ability to manipulate the minds of his opponents. His attacks are not physical, but he manipulates the outcome of battle by manipulating the thoughts and emotions of his opponent. With this ability, she can confuse enemy soldiers and psychologically shake up Seria's leadership, making her an extremely troublesome presence.
5. Elysium (Messenger of the Dead)
Elysion has the ability to manipulate the energy of the dead, and can absorb the energy of those who died on the battlefield and use it as its own power. As he fights, the dead fill up around him and the battle becomes even more fierce. For Celia, this ability was extremely formidable.
6. Omega (Fog of Destruction)
Omega can spread destructive energy like a mist, neutralizing anything within its range. This fog nullifies physical defenses and collapses tactical forces. When Omega appears on the battlefield, the surroundings are instantly rendered powerless, increasing the possibility that the tide of battle will turn.
7. Callisto (Phantom Messenger)

Valfa is the leader of the Justice Seven, and his military strength is said to be truly invincible. The ``Sword of Justice'' he uses can cut through dimensions, and has enough power to destroy cities and planets with a single swing. Valfa is always calm on the battlefield and has excellent tactical judgment.
2. Aristas (infinite reflection)
Aristas has the ability to reflect any attack and can nullify physical attacks. His special energy shield repels most weapons, leaving him with no defense. It was called the "invincible shield" by Apollo, and its ability made a huge difference to Celia's defensive power.
3. Kain (Ruler of Time and Space)
Kain has the ability to manipulate time. His abilities include slowing enemy movement and reversing time. By making full use of this power, you can advance the battle to your advantage and completely control the rhythm of the battle. Even Celia's strongest defense system cannot cope with this ability.
4. Cygnus (mental interference)
Cygnus has the ability to manipulate the minds of his opponents. His attacks are not physical, but he manipulates the outcome of battle by manipulating the thoughts and emotions of his opponent. With this ability, she can confuse enemy soldiers and psychologically shake up Seria's leadership, making her an extremely troublesome presence.
5. Elysium (Messenger of the Dead)
Elysion has the ability to manipulate the energy of the dead, and can absorb the energy of those who died on the battlefield and use it as its own power. As he fights, the dead fill up around him and the battle becomes even more fierce. For Celia, this ability was extremely formidable.
6. Omega (Fog of Destruction)
Omega can spread destructive energy like a mist, neutralizing anything within its range. This fog nullifies physical defenses and collapses tactical forces. When Omega appears on the battlefield, the surroundings are instantly rendered powerless, increasing the possibility that the tide of battle will turn.
7. Callisto (Phantom Messenger)

Callisto has the ability to create illusions that deceive others' vision, and can completely confuse opponents on the battlefield. His illusions are extremely realistic, and he is extremely troublesome as he corners his enemies both physically and mentally. Once captured by Callisto's illusion, it becomes difficult to even fight.
___________________


Celia's decisions and preparations
Celia checked all the information on the Justice Seven and began thinking of strategies to fight against each of them. Instead of just putting up defense, she was looking for ways to actively fight. In order to counter the abilities of each executive, Celia gathered her military power and proceeded with preparations for the final war against Apollo.
"Varfa's sword of justice will break through our defenses," Celia said, analyzing it. "Aristas' infinite reflexes are also a threat, but to counter him you need to avoid physical attacks."
"Kain's time manipulation also requires countermeasures. Our soldiers must be specially trained to counteract the slowing of time."
Celia organized her thoughts and came up with countermeasures one after another. She gave instructions to the executives, led by Elliot, and ordered them to prepare the necessary tactics and equipment for the front-line troops.
"We must use those with the strongest will to interfere with Cygnus's mind," Celia said. "We also need to think of a way to nullify the energy of Elysium's dead. We must also prepare for Omega and Callisto's abilities, and ultimately defeat the Justice Seven."
Celia watched the battle with cold eyes, never retreating, and pouring all her strength into protecting the Dominion. There is only one path to take next. His goal was to win a full-scale war with Apollo and solidify his rule over Celia.

Arrival of Justice Seven

Following a challenge from Apollo, the Justice Seven finally reach the Dominion. Its intimidating presence quickly spread to the Dominion's front lines, threatening Celia's troops. Led by Valfa, their figures appeared out of nowhere, and the battle began.
The first fierce battle was between Valfa and Seria's elite forces. Valfa wields the sword of justice and unleashes a powerful blow that cuts through dimensions. That single swing tore through space, destroying Dominion's defenses. Celia continued to instruct her next move while dodging the attack.
``If things continue like this, everything will fall apart.'' Celia said calmly, but in her heart she felt uneasy about the progress of the war. However, she never wavered and continued to fight on the front lines.
At that time, a fierce battle with Apollo's strongest soldiers, the Justice Seven, began.
Chapter 89: ΣZ Unit vs. Justice Seven (J7)
Celia Dominicus was calmly reconsidering her strategy ahead of her battle with Justice Seven (J7). In order to counter the strongest troops sent by Apollo, she made the decision to mobilize her highest strength. This was Dominion's elite unit called the ``ΣZ Unit,'' whose combat power and technical prowess were unrivaled. The ΣZ unit has achieved numerous victories in battles to date, and is Celia's most trusted unit.
The ΣZ unit was characterized by not only superior combat ability, but also tactical flexibility and leadership in group battles. The members of the unit are all warriors with superhuman abilities, and can fight by making full use of dimensional energy control, mental endurance, and even physical reinforcement. Celia decides to take direct command of this unit and have it confront the Justice Seven.
"This may be our last battle," Celia said quietly to the commanders of her squad. "But we will use all of our power to defeat Apollo's strongest force."

Chapter 89: ΣZ Unit vs. Justice Seven (J7)
Celia Dominicus was calmly reconsidering her strategy ahead of her battle with Justice Seven (J7). In order to counter the strongest troops sent by Apollo, she made the decision to mobilize her highest strength. This was Dominion's elite unit called the ``ΣZ Unit,'' whose combat power and technical prowess were unrivaled. The ΣZ unit has achieved numerous victories in battles to date, and is Celia's most trusted unit.
The ΣZ unit was characterized by not only superior combat ability, but also tactical flexibility and leadership in group battles. The members of the unit are all warriors with superhuman abilities, and can fight by making full use of dimensional energy control, mental endurance, and even physical reinforcement. Celia decides to take direct command of this unit and have it confront the Justice Seven.
"This may be our last battle," Celia said quietly to the commanders of her squad. "But we will use all of our power to defeat Apollo's strongest force."

Hearing those words, the warriors of the ΣZ unit all stood up and prepared for battle. Each member of the unit swore to follow Celia's instructions and carry out their duties calmly. Their eyes held a strong will that would never give up. They were united by the belief that defeating the Justice Seven would complete Dominion's control and send a powerful message to Apollo.

Formation of ΣZ troops and preparation for battle
As the name suggests, the ΣZ Unit embodies Celia's will, and they are an elite unit that not only functions as one unit, but also each has special abilities and can fulfill their individual roles. The members of the unit are as follows.
   1. Zeus (Tactical Genius)
Zeus was the commander of his troops, and his tactical intuition and judgment were unparalleled. He was not only able to respond instantly to changes in the war situation, but also had the ability to command the entire ΣZ unit. With his calm judgment and quick actions, he leads his troops to victory on any battlefield.
   2. Atlas (Giant Warrior)
Atlas was a warrior who boasted overwhelming strength and was invincible in physical combat. His fists have dimension-shaking power and can pierce any defense. In the battle against Apollo's strongest executives, he plays the role of changing the course of the battle with his overwhelming power.
   3. Apollo (user of mental power)
Apollo has the ability to manipulate spiritual powers. He is able to calmly assess chaos on the battlefield and exploit the enemy's psychological weaknesses. This ability will be extremely important in the fight against the Justice Seven, as it can reduce the enemy's morale through mental interference.
   4. Hera (goddess of defense)
Hela is a warrior specialized in defensive abilities, capable of deploying a shield that negates physical and energy attacks. Its shield plays the most important role in combat, as it can protect against dimensional energy and offensive weapons. With her shield, the ΣZ squad can withstand any attack.
   5. Artemis (master sniper)

Hearing those words, the warriors of the ΣZ unit all stood up and prepared for battle. Each member of the unit swore to follow Celia's instructions and carry out their duties calmly. Their eyes held a strong will that would never give up. They were united by the belief that defeating the Justice Seven would complete Dominion's control and send a powerful message to Apollo.

   6. Hercules (Beast of Battle)

   7. Demeter (master of energy manipulation)
Demeter has the ability to freely manipulate dimensional energy, and can attack and defend by generating energy during battle. His energy manipulation ability was effective against enemies who could manipulate dimensions, such as the Justice Seven, and was indispensable for turning the tide of battle in his favor.

Collision with Justice Seven
Just when the ΣZ squad was fully prepared, the Justice Seven's onslaught began. They are Apollo's most elite force, and they attacked the Dominion controlled by Celia to prove their strength. The members of the Justice Seven, including Valfa, appeared on the battlefield one after another, trying to use their great power to break through Seria's defenses.
The first contact was at the battle between Zeus and Varfa. Although Zeus uses his tactical instincts to ward off Varfa's attacks, the power of Varfa's "Sword of Justice" is immense, and Zeus is overwhelmed by its power at times. However, with his characteristic calmness, Zeus calmly assesses the situation of the battle and considers his next move.
"Varfa's attack is more powerful than expected, but we have Atlas." Zeus quickly issued instructions, ordering Atlas to take over the battle. Atlas charged towards Valfa, shaking his huge body. His blow greatly shook Valfa's defenses, and the force caused Valfa to retreat for a moment.
``Even if we receive Valfa's power, we can manage as long as Atlas is there.'' Zeus continued to think about the next path to take, feeling the power of his trusted troops.

Artemis is a sniper who can kill enemies from long distances with extreme precision, and is responsible for quickly eliminating hidden threats on the battlefield. Her single sniper shot was powerful enough to defeat enemy leaders, and was an important weapon for turning the tide of battle in her favor.
   6. Hercules (Beast of Battle)
Hercules was a master of close combat, and his physical prowess in battle was unparalleled. His reflexes and combat skills allow him to quickly react to any attack on the battlefield and inflict deadly damage on his enemies.
   7. Demeter (master of energy manipulation)
Demeter has the ability to freely manipulate dimensional energy, and can attack and defend by generating energy during battle. His energy manipulation ability was effective against enemies who could manipulate dimensions, such as the Justice Seven, and was indispensable for turning the tide of battle in his favor.

Collision with Justice Seven
Just when the ΣZ squad was fully prepared, the Justice Seven's onslaught began. They are Apollo's most elite force, and they attacked the Dominion controlled by Celia to prove their strength. The members of the Justice Seven, including Valfa, appeared on the battlefield one after another, trying to use their great power to break through Seria's defenses.
The first contact was at the battle between Zeus and Varfa. Although Zeus uses his tactical instincts to ward off Varfa's attacks, the power of Varfa's "Sword of Justice" is immense, and Zeus is overwhelmed by its power at times. However, with his characteristic calmness, Zeus calmly assesses the situation of the battle and considers his next move.
"Varfa's attack is more powerful than expected, but we have Atlas." Zeus quickly issued instructions, ordering Atlas to take over the battle. Atlas charged towards Valfa, shaking his huge body. His blow greatly shook Valfa's defenses, and the force caused Valfa to retreat for a moment.
``Even if we receive Valfa's power, we can manage as long as Atlas is there.'' Zeus continued to think about the next path to take, feeling the power of his trusted troops.

At that time, a battle with Aristas was being waged on the battlefield. Aristas possessed the ability of "infinite reflexes" and was able to easily deflect the attacks of the ΣZ forces. No matter how strong Hela's shield was, Aristas' reflexes would change the direction of the attack, so the situation remained incapable of complete defense.
"Aristas needs Artemis to snipe," Zeus instructed, ordering Artemis to snipe at the right time. Artemis created a gap in Aristas' reflexes with her precise shots, and was able to break through his defenses with a single blow.
The war situation was gradually developing in Celia's favor. The executives of Justice Seven were overwhelmed one after another, and their power was whittled down by the tactics and abilities of the ΣZ unit. However, Valfa, the leader of the Justice Seven, never backs down easily, uses his strength to rebuild his troops, and tries to counterattack again.
``We'll show you our power,'' Valfa declared coldly, and once again drew out the ``Sword of Justice.'' That single swing made a sound that seemed to cut through dimensions, shaking the ΣZ unit's front lines once again.
The situation in the war was still severe, and both sides were fighting each other with all their might. As Celia's leadership and the fighting power of the ΣZ squad take on the Justice Seven, the situation has entered a situation where it is impossible to predict who will win or lose.
Chapter 90: The greatest battle in the universe and Dominion's devastating damage
The battle between Justice Seven (J7) and the ΣZ squad is not just a battle. Both are battles between those who stake control of the galaxy, and the intensity of the battle far exceeds expectations, causing explosions and shocks that tear apart dimensions. At the center of the battle, Dominion's tallest buildings were blown away one after another, leaving the vast city covered in rubble.

Against the overwhelming military power and tactical mobility of the ΣZ unit, Justice Seven continued to counterattack with their extraordinary power. Valfa's "Sword of Justice" was swung as if cutting through space, and with each blow, buildings collapsed, and a violent tremor was felt as if a dimensional rift was created. Aries tore through Celia's troops one after another with her frightening speed, Taurus overran the city with overwhelming power, and Cygnus broke the will of many warriors with his spiritual attacks.
Meanwhile, the members of the ΣZ squad demonstrated their full abilities, blocking Justice Seven's attacks and repeatedly counterattacking. Zeus dominated the battle with his superior tactical intuition, Atlas used his huge body to challenge Taurus, and Hela continued to deploy her shield, but her powerful defense finally reached its limit and could no longer withstand the Justice Seven's continuous attacks.
"Any further damage would be fatal to Dominion," Celia muttered involuntarily as she watched the battle progress. Once, she calmly gave instructions to the unit commanders. "Hold the line. We must hold out until Evatron's support forces arrive."
However, as the fighting intensified, economic concerns gradually came to Celia's mind. As such a battle raged, property was lost every second, and the damage to GDP was immeasurable. Collapsed buildings, destroyed infrastructure, and fierce fighting throughout the city threaten to shake Dominion's very economic foundations.
``The damage caused by this attack will reach 40% of GDP.'' Celia calmly received the report from among her troops and made calculations. She immediately contacted the economic sector and instructed them to take measures to minimize the spread of the damage.

``The damage amount reaches 30 quintillion dollars.'' Celia gasped as she reconfirmed the loss.この金額は、Dominionがこれまでに築き上げた全資産のほぼ4割に相当するものであり、これまでの経済成長を大きく妨げるものだった。 Recovering this damage will take decades of effort and huge investments. However, at that moment, Celia knew that winning the war had to be her top priority above all else.
「いくら失っても、Dominionの支配を守ることが最も重要だ。」セリアは心の中でその決断を固めながら、冷静に戦局を見守り続けた。

Chapter 91: Celia vs. Justice Seven—A fierce battle of 1 vs. 7

Standing in front of Celia Dominicus are the Justice Seven (J7), the strongest soldiers sent by Apollo. That power is no longer just a battle. Valfa, Aries, Taurus, Cygnus, Elysium, Omega, Callisto. Every time their names echo on the battlefield, their presence is overwhelming.

Her movements are beyond the comprehension of ordinary people, and she has reached the point where she can freely manipulate the flow of energy.

When her blow directly hit Varfa's Sword of Justice, the collision of dimensional energy created a huge shockwave that shook the surrounding buildings.

However, Celia instantly sensed its power and used dimensional energy to form a powerful barrier around herself.

"But I can't fall here!" Taurus was furious and tried to attack again, but Aries stopped him.

Valfa is the leader of the Justice Seven, and his military strength is said to be truly invincible. The ``Sword of Justice'' he uses can cut through dimensions, and has enough power to destroy cities and planets with a single swing. Valfa is always calm on the battlefield and has excellent tactical judgment.
2. Aristas (infinite reflection)
Aristas has the ability to reflect any attack and can nullify physical attacks. His special energy shield repels most weapons, leaving him with no defense. It was called the "invincible shield" by Apollo, and its ability made a huge difference to Celia's defensive power.
3. Kain (Ruler of Time and Space)
Kain has the ability to manipulate time. His abilities include slowing enemy movement and reversing time. By making full use of this power, you can advance the battle to your advantage and completely control the rhythm of the battle. Even Celia's strongest defense system cannot cope with this ability.
4. Cygnus (mental interference)
Cygnus has the ability to manipulate the minds of his opponents. His attacks are not physical, but he manipulates the outcome of battle by manipulating the thoughts and emotions of his opponent. With this ability, she can confuse enemy soldiers and psychologically shake up Seria's leadership, making her an extremely troublesome presence.
5. Elysium (Messenger of the Dead)
Elysion has the ability to manipulate the energy of the dead, and can absorb the energy of those who died on the battlefield and use it as its own power. As he fights, the dead fill up around him and the battle becomes even more fierce. For Celia, this ability was extremely formidable.
6. Omega (Fog of Destruction)
Omega can spread destructive energy like a mist, neutralizing anything within its range. This fog nullifies physical defenses and collapses tactical forces. When Omega appears on the battlefield, the surroundings are instantly rendered powerless, increasing the possibility that the tide of battle will turn.
7. Callisto (Phantom Messenger)

"Taurus, you're being too reckless. You still don't understand Celia's power," Aries says calmly, and once again uses her speed to join the fight.

However, Celia, anticipating his speed, instantly gathered energy and used her ability to manipulate dimensions to fend off Aries' attack.

This amount was equivalent to almost 40% of all the assets Dominion had accumulated to date, and was a major impediment to economic growth. Recovering this damage will take decades of effort and huge investments. However, at that moment, Celia knew that winning the war had to be her top priority above all else.
``No matter how much we lose, the most important thing is to maintain control of the Dominion.'' Seria continued to calmly watch the battle, making this decision in her heart.
___________________


Intensification of battle and breakthrough of ΣZ unit
Against the overwhelming power of the Justice Seven, the ΣZ unit is gradually beginning to see its limits. Valfa's swing of the "Sword of Justice" created a dimensional rift, and its power instantly destroyed the surrounding area. Aristas's "Infinite Reflection" deflects all attacks, and Demeter's energy attack further confuses the battle. Cygnus mentally cornered the warriors and gradually gained the upper hand in the battle.
"One more step, one more step!" Zeus desperately takes command and issues instructions to his troops. Tactics were being assembled one after another in his head, but he couldn't help but be horrified by the severity of the battle situation.
"Atlas! Use your power to hold down Taurus! Hela, reupholster the shield! Artemis, support us from a distance!" Zeus yelled, desperately slowing down the movement of his troops. However, before that order could reach them, Apollo's most elite forces further intensified their attacks and began to overwhelm the members of the ΣZ force one after another.
Atlas pushed Taurus with his overwhelming force, but he was no match for Taurus' attack power, and was finally knocked to the ground with a single blow. Hela's shield is broken, and Artemis's sniper is dodged by Aries' speed. Exploiting that gap, the ΣZ unit's defense line began to collapse.

``We can't cause more damage than this!'' Celia calmly watched the movements of the front lines, but behind the scenes she was already thinking of her next move. She was preparing other operations, considering that the support forces from Evatron had not yet arrived. The scale of the battle had become so large that a swift reaction was required no matter what method was used.
Without wasting any time, Celia issued new orders to the front lines. "I'll leave directly. My power is needed to stop Valfa."
With those words, Celia prepared herself to head to the battlefield. In order to regain control of Dominion, they had to go one step further. Her judgment was quick and calm, and she understood that her victory or defeat would have a decisive impact.
___________________


Celia descends on the battlefield
Celia landed on the battlefield and faced Valfa, the leader of the Justice Seven. As soon as I stood there, the battle around me instantly fell silent. Even as she watched as dimensional rifts appeared with each swing of Valfa's Sword of Justice, she calmly predicted its movements and prepared to counteract them.
"Celia Dominicus?" Valfa said coldly, her eyes sharp. "I never thought you would come this far. However, in the face of our power, your control ends here."
"I will not let anyone take away my control," Celia answered clearly and began to gather dimensional energy. "No matter who comes, I will protect this place."
At that moment, a violent shock ran through the battlefield, and waves of dimensional energy spread violently. Celia's power enveloped the place, and the final battle with the Justice Seven was about to begin.

Chapter 91: Celia vs. Justice Seven—A fierce battle of 1 vs. 7

Standing in front of Celia Dominicus are the Justice Seven (J7), the strongest soldiers sent by Apollo. That power is no longer just a battle. For her, this was a fierce battle that determined the future of Dominion and her own rule. The time has come for Celia to make the most of her combat experience and the abilities she has honed through years of hard work.
"I will not lose," Celia calmly murmured as she began to gather vast amounts of dimensional energy throughout her body. At that moment, the space around her distorted and a vortex of energy began to swirl. Celia's eyes were sharp, and the aura she emitted gave the impression of overwhelming power, as if it could erase everything.
"This is the power of Celia Dominicus," she swore inwardly, determined not to back down an inch from the Justice Seven executives standing in front of her.
The seven members of the Justice Seven each have extraordinary powers, and all of their abilities exist to test Celia. They are cold-hearted and will not tolerate any laxity in battle. Valfa, Aries, Taurus, Cygnus, Elysium, Omega, Callisto. Every time their names echo on the battlefield, their presence is overwhelming.
In order to cope with all of these abilities, Celia concentrated dimensional energy in a way that exceeded her own fighting methods up until now, and the space around her was filled with overwhelming power. Her movements are beyond the comprehension of ordinary people, and she has reached the point where she can freely manipulate the flow of energy.
"Let's go." The moment Celia's voice echoed quietly, the battle began.
___________________

Prelude to the Battle—Valfa vs Celia
The first to move was Valfa, the leader of the Justice Seven. His "Sword of Justice" already has enough power to cut through dimensional walls, and can even destroy space with a single swing. Valfa coldly swings her sword at Celia and tries to cut her into pieces, but Celia easily dodges the attack.

Celia's reaction speed was so fast that she couldn't even follow it with her eyes. She instantly manipulated dimensional energy, dodged Valfa's blows, and unleashed her power to counterattack.
"I'll show you all of your power," Celia murmured quietly, flashing her hand.
At that moment, Valfa's "Sword of Justice" cut through the dimensional wall and spread, but Celia gathered energy as if deflecting the sword, blocking Valfa's attack as if she was manipulating space itself. When her blow directly hit Varfa's Sword of Justice, the collision of dimensional energy created a huge shockwave that shook the surrounding buildings.
"This power...!" Valfa looked shocked for a moment, but then quickly returned her cold eyes and resumed her fighting stance. “But I don’t think this is the end!”
Valfa swung his sword again, his speed becoming even faster. However, Celia carefully watched his movements and continued to brilliantly dodge all attacks. Meanwhile, Celia instantly gathered her energy and prepared for a counterattack.
___________________


Fierce attack of Taurus and Aries
The next ones to move were Taurus and Aries. Taurus made full use of its overwhelming strength and charged furiously towards Celia. His attack power was tremendous, and had the power to crush the surrounding area with just one blow. No amount of defense will leave you unscathed if you receive such an attack. However, Celia instantly sensed its power and used dimensional energy to form a powerful barrier around herself.
When Taurus' blow hits the barrier, a violent blast waves around her, but Celia parries the impact unharmed and seizes another chance to counterattack.
"I know your power," Celia declared coldly, and at that moment, she gathered dimensional energy and unleashed an overwhelming counterattack against Taurus. Celia's energy waves pushed Taurus back, finally breaking through his defenses.
"But I can't fall here!" Taurus was furious and tried to attack again, but Aries stopped him.

Celia's reaction speed was so fast that she couldn't even follow it with her eyes. She instantly manipulated dimensional energy, dodged Valfa's blows, and unleashed her power to counterattack.

"But I can't fall here!" Taurus was furious and tried to attack again, but Aries stopped him.

"Taurus, you're being too reckless. You still don't understand Celia's power," Aries says calmly, and once again uses her speed to join the fight.
Aries' movements are truly superhuman, approaching Celia at a speed that transcends dimensions. If she were to be attacked at that speed, even Celia might not be able to avoid it. However, Celia, anticipating his speed, instantly gathered energy and used her ability to manipulate dimensions to fend off Aries' attack.
"I can predict all of your attacks," Celia said calmly, and the next moment she erected a powerful barrier of dimensional energy in Aries' direction. The barrier instantly blocked Aries' movements and completely blocked his attack.
___________________


Decisive battle with Cygnus, Elysium, Omega, and Callisto
Other members of the Justice Seven join the fight one after another and try to surround Celia. Cygnus attempts to interfere mentally and disrupt Celia's concentration, but Celia completely ignores the attack and continues to demonstrate overwhelming mental endurance. Elysium manipulates the energy of the dead and summons the dead to surround Celia, but Celia wipes out the dead and nullifies Elysium's abilities.
Omega and Callisto attacked at the same time. Omega's "Mist of Destruction" surrounded Celia and tried to nullify her physical attacks, but Celia broke it down with energy and completely broke through. Callisto was a user of illusions and tried to completely deceive Celia's vision, but Celia broke all of the illusions and completely nullified Callisto's power.
Celia's cold power defeats the Justice Seven one by one. The battlefield gradually became a premonition of Celia's victory, and the executives of the Justice Seven gradually lost their power.
"This is it," Celia declared confidently, ready to deliver the final blow.

Chapter 92: Celia's strongest technique "26-dimensional Great Brain", the disappearance of J7, and the arrival of the Falchion fleet

Celia Dominicus was finally coming to the end of her fierce battle with Justice Seven (J7). At that moment in battle, when she manipulated dimensional energy to its fullest extent and drew out overwhelming power, Celia made a decision in her heart. That was the most powerful technique she had ever prepared, "26th Dimension Great Brain."
The dimensional energy that Celia wore had a truly infinite expanse, and the space around her began to distort, and the boundary of the 26th dimension was about to open. This technique was not just an attack technique, but a power that could be called Celia's ultimate weapon, capable of sending the opponent to a completely different dimension. By using that power, she aimed to completely neutralize the Justice Seven and take decisive control of the war.
___________________


Activation of 26-dimensional Great Brain
Valfa, the leader of the Justice Seven, and all the executives of Aries, Taurus, Cygnus, Elysion, Omega, and Callisto were gradually overwhelmed by Celia's onslaught. Thanks to Celia's precise manipulation of dimensional energy, their attacks were completely ineffective, and she was drawn into the vortex of dimensional energy, causing her body to feel distorted.
"This is the end." Celia's eyes held a cold determination that never wavered. Around her, dimensional energy expands explosively, and she can feel as if space itself is being torn apart. The energy released from Celia's palm literally tore apart the dimension itself and opened the door to the 26th dimension.
At that moment, the executives of Justice Seven felt that everything was being sucked into another dimension. No matter how powerful they were, there was no way they could resist this technique. Valfa wields the sword and tries to muster the last of its power, but the moment the sword touches space, the sword itself is engulfed by dimensional power and completely disappears.

Celia Dominicus was finally coming to the end of her fierce battle with Justice Seven (J7). At that moment in battle, when she manipulated dimensional energy to its fullest extent and drew out overwhelming power, Celia made a decision in her heart. That was the most powerful technique she had ever prepared, "26th Dimension Great Brain."
The dimensional energy that Celia wore had a truly infinite expanse, and the space around her began to distort, and the boundary of the 26th dimension was about to open. By using that power, she aimed to completely neutralize the Justice Seven and take decisive control of the war.
___________________


Activation of 26-dimensional Great Brain
Valfa, the leader of the Justice Seven, and all the executives of Aries, Taurus, Cygnus, Elysion, Omega, and Callisto were gradually overwhelmed by Celia's onslaught. Thanks to Celia's precise manipulation of dimensional energy, their attacks were completely ineffective, and she was drawn into the vortex of dimensional energy, causing her body to feel distorted.
"This is the end." Celia's eyes held a cold determination that never wavered. Around her, dimensional energy expands explosively, and she can feel as if space itself is being torn apart. The energy released from Celia's palm literally tore apart the dimension itself and opened the door to the 26th dimension.
At that moment, the executives of Justice Seven felt that everything was being sucked into another dimension. No matter how powerful they were, there was no way they could resist this technique. Valfa wields the sword and tries to muster the last of its power, but the moment the sword touches space, the sword itself is engulfed by dimensional power and completely disappears.

"It's no use," Celia declared calmly, making her power even stronger. In the blink of an eye, the seven members of the Justice Seven were drawn into an infinite space of 26 dimensions. They can no longer exist in this dimension, and have completely disappeared beyond the dimensional wall.
"Dimensional weight, absolute control...that is my power," Celia muttered quietly, converging the dimensional energy and ending the battle. The Justice Seven completely lost their existence and disappeared before her eyes.
After that, Celia calmly looked around the battlefield, but there was a trace of fatigue on her face. Even though he had won, using the power to manipulate dimensions was by no means easy, and it was more exhausting than he had imagined. However, what awaited her was the arrival of an even greater threat.
___________________


Arrival of the Falchion Fleet
The moment the Justice Seven was defeated, Celia heard the roar of a huge fleet approaching while emitting abnormal sounds. It was the Falchion Fleet sent by Apollo, and its scale was the largest that Celia had ever seen. The Falchion fleet was part of Apollo's largest direct military campaign against the Dominion, and its purpose was to completely destroy Celia's control.
"Are they coming?" Celia calmly watched the fleet approach, thinking of her next move in her mind. The size of the Falchion fleet was several hundred ships, and its attack power was overwhelming. The giant battleship "Falchion Apollon" at the forefront of the fleet was a battleship that brought together Apollo's cutting-edge technology, commanding hundreds of thousands of troops and boasting overwhelming firepower.
"Looks like Apollo intends to overthrow me once and for all," Celia muttered as she watched the battleship approach. Her eyes held the confidence and cold will that had overcome her past battles, but at the same time she was wary of new threats.

Celia Dominicus was finally coming to the end of her fierce battle with Justice Seven (J7). At that moment in battle, when she manipulated dimensional energy to its fullest extent and drew out overwhelming power, Celia made a decision in her heart. That was the most powerful technique she had ever prepared, "26th Dimension Great Brain."

The Falchion fleet was part of Apollo's largest direct military campaign against the Dominion, and its purpose was to completely destroy Celia's control.
"Are they coming?" Celia calmly watched the fleet approach, thinking of her next move in her mind. The size of the Falchion fleet was several hundred ships, and its attack power was overwhelming. The giant battleship "Falchion Apollon" at the forefront of the fleet was a battleship that brought together Apollo's cutting-edge technology, commanding hundreds of thousands of troops and boasting overwhelming firepower.
"Looks like Apollo intends to overthrow me once and for all," Celia muttered as she watched the battleship approach. Her eyes held the confidence and cold will that had overcome her past battles, but at the same time she was wary of new threats.

As soon as the Falchion fleet reached Dominion's orbit, heavy fighting broke out in the area. The Falchion Apollo, leading the fleet, began to break through the Dominion's defenses one by one, firing devastating energy beams. Celia didn't miss his movements and immediately gave instructions.
"Restart all defense systems! Immediately stop the advance of the Falchion fleet!" Celia takes command and brings out her full potential. Meanwhile, she was thinking of waiting for support from Evatron. If Evatron arrives soon, the situation will change completely. However, it was not possible to predict how much damage would be caused by then.
___________________


Battle begins with the fleet
Using her cold judgment, Celia sent a powerful defense force to the front lines to face the onslaught of the Falchion fleet. The fleet's attack is overwhelming, and its energy beams destroy cities and infrastructure in the blink of an eye. While watching the battle, Celia began formulating strategies to avoid unnecessary losses.
``I will never back down.'' Celia renewed her resolve and decided to further increase her power. She gathered dimensional energy all at once and began to deploy a powerful dimensional barrier to temporarily contain the advance of the Falchion fleet. At that moment, the Falchion fleet was temporarily stopped from advancing, and Seria took advantage of the opportunity to prepare for a counterattack.
"I will defeat Apollo," Celia murmured in a confident voice. Her abilities had surpassed their limits and she had completely mastered the power to manipulate dimensions. She has no choice but to do everything in her power to end this battle.

Chapter 93: HEROS Invasion and Celia’s Counterattack—Thales Fleet’s Departure

At the head of the Falchion fleet was HEROS, one of the most powerful fleet commanders in the Apollo civilization. HEROS was known as Apollo's most powerful commander, and his name was known throughout the galaxy. His tactics and command are overwhelming, and he has won numerous battles. The ship HEROS rides is a gigantic battleship named ``Falchion Apollo'', with a total length of several thousand kilometers, and its destructive power is said to be infinite.
The fleet he led was a combination of Apollo's cutting-edge technology and most elite troops, and its power was a threat to Celia as well. When the Falchion fleet reached Dominion, Celia was keenly aware of its overwhelming intimidation and attack power.
"Has he come?" Celia calmly analyzed the situation and was thinking of her next move. "Facing the power of HEROS and the Falchion fleet, I cannot end this battle alone. But I will definitely win."
The HEROS fleet reached the Dominion's front line, countless battleships tearing through the sky. Their advance was accompanied by fear, as if they were foreshadowing the end of a galaxy. As soon as the battle began, the Falchion fleet unleashed its powerful energy beams and began to break through Dominion's defenses one by one.
"This is Apollo's power..." Celia draws out her dimensional energy to the maximum and prepares for a counterattack. In the meantime, in order to increase her own military strength, she decided to dispatch the Thales fleet, which had been secretly preparing for a counterattack against the Apollo civilization.

___________________


Departure of Thales fleet

The Thales fleet was a fleet secretly prepared by Celia to counterattack Apollo, and its size and power were beyond imagination. The Thales fleet was a collection of Celia's most cutting-edge battleships and weapons, and its fleet boasted a level of maneuverability and striking power that would be impossible to find in a normal fleet. In particular, the Thales Altios, the main ship of the Thales fleet, was a super-mobile ship that could move using dimensional energy, boasting speed and firepower that overwhelmed other fleets.
The Thales fleet had already made preparations for its sortie from the moment Celia decided to counterattack the Apollo civilization. Finally, the fleet heads towards the Apollo civilization area under Celia's orders. In command of the fleet is a commander who has Celia's full trust, and his name is "Darius Sevan." Darius was a cool-headed warrior with excellent tactics and the ability to carry out Celia's orders without fail.
"We need this fleet to defeat Apollo," Darius declares to everyone in the fleet, his eyes filled with a cold determination that is sure of victory. "Our mission is to follow Celia's orders and invade the Apollo civilization and break its control."
With its overwhelming speed and maneuverability, the Thales fleet broke through the security net of the Apollo civilization. By making full use of dimensional energy to travel at high speed, they were able to break through Apollo's defense lines at once. At that time, Celia was monitoring the fleet's progress on a monitor and formulating the final attack plan.
___________________


HEROS's overwhelming attack
Meanwhile, HEROS took command of its battle fleet and continued to relentlessly overwhelm Dominion's defenses. His tactics were always to exploit his opponents and destroy them in the most efficient way possible, resulting in parts of the city falling every few minutes and defense systems being disabled one after another. The power of the ``Falchion Apollo'' that HEROS rides is overwhelming, and its firepower is a beam of focused dimensional energy that turns gigantic cities one after another into scorched earth.

"Our attack will decide the fate of Celia Dominicus," HEROS calmly ordered his subordinates, directing the fleet's progress. His eyes were already focused on breaking Celia's control, and he was determined to accomplish that goal no matter what the cost.
Under the command of HEROS, the Falchion fleet unleashed its firepower one after another, destroying Dominion's defense systems with overwhelming force. A beam of dimensional energy is released, buildings collapse, and the entire city is reduced to ashes in an instant. Its power is truly extraordinary.
___________________


Celia's counterattack and the arrival of Thales' fleet
Celia continued to calmly react to HEROS' attacks. Even as she watched the Dominion under her control gradually collapse, her resolve remained unwavering as she took the next step. She maximized her power and used dimensional energy to create a new defensive wall, and then exploited the gaps in it to prepare for a counterattack.
Thales' fleet finally reached the outer edge of the Apollo civilization. Under the command of Darius Sevan, Thales' fleet began to break through Apollo's front lines with its overwhelming power. Attacks that make full use of dimensional energy break through Apollo's defense lines one after another.
``We will do our best to fulfill Celia's orders,'' Darius said to the soldiers of the fleet, and the fleet began its march toward the center of the Apollo civilization. Waiting ahead of their advance is the Falchion fleet controlled by HEROS. The Thales fleet is preparing for the final battle with Apollo, and the battle is about to begin.
"With this, everything is decided," Celia muttered in her heart as she began to prepare for the final battle with the Falchion fleet.

Chapter 94: Attack of Thales Fleet and Ronan’s Reaction—Secret Operations of the Assassin Corps

When Darius Sevan, the commander of the Thales fleet, began his invasion of the Apollonian civilization, he made the decision to unleash his most powerful weapon, a gamma ray burst, on Apollon's central planetary system. Gamma ray bursts were powerful enough to emit a wave of energy that transcended dimensions, incinerating all matter within its radius and collapsing the very structure of the planet. By using this technology, the Thales fleet aimed to neutralize the defenses of the Apollo civilization and ultimately end Apollo's rule.
Darius took this strike as a decisive attack and commanded his fleet to continue firing several bursts of gamma rays. A gigantic wave of light was released towards the Apollo planetary system, instantly traveling thousands of kilometers and burning everything down. Space was torn apart, dimensional walls were shaking, and Apollo's defense systems were constantly collapsing across the battlefield.
"With this, Apollo's power will be completely neutralized," Darius ordered coldly, ordering the fleet to wait for further action. He was confident that the gamma ray burst released into Apollo's central planetary system would completely break through its defenses and cause Apollo's strongest defense system to collapse.
However, as expected, Ronan Ursa responded exactly as Celia and Darius had envisioned. He calmly monitored the progress of the gamma ray burst, but to his surprise, the defense system of Apollo Centralis, located in the deepest part of Apollo, was completely unfazed by the gamma ray burst. As if Ronan had predicted this, he activated Apollo's strongest defense shield and prepared to nullify all of Apollo's attacks.
"As I thought, their attacks were nothing but futile," Ronan announced calmly, his eyes unperturbed as he watched the fleet advance. "It's not going to go as they planned."

At the moment when Apollo's defense shield had completely absorbed the gamma ray burst, rendering the energy harmless, Ronan silently issued instructions and prepared to launch Apollo's counterattack. The Falchion fleet was also preparing to unleash its firepower once again on Celia and the Thales fleet.
However, the plan of Darius and the commanders of the Thales fleet, who were completely convinced that Apollo had nullified the gamma ray burst, was about to take an unexpected turn.
___________________


The assassin corps' secret maneuvers and Ronan's sniping
At the moment when she was shocked that the gamma ray burst that the Thales fleet had released on the Apollo civilization area had been nullified, Celia immediately thought of her next move. She was working on a secret plan to break through Apollo's powerful defenses. That is the invasion of the assassin army.
The Assassin Corps is the most elite assassination unit that Celia has prepared in secret, and all of its members are warriors with the ability to cross different dimensions. They had the task of sneaking into the heart of the enemy, hidden from view, and eliminating the most important people. In the Apollo civilization, the Assassin Corps that Celia trusts is extremely valuable, and she considers their power to be essential in this war.
"Aim for Ronan Ursa," Celia instructed Adam, the leader of the Assassin army. "Infiltrate Apollo Centralis and take down Ronan. If he falls, Apollo's leadership will collapse."
Adam received this order and began infiltrating the Apollo civilization area with an army of assassins in tow. They approached Apollo's most guarded area completely unnoticed. Members of the Assassin Corps use their mental abilities rather than physical strength to neutralize Apollo's security system.
"We'll need the most precise attacks to target Ronan," Adam said calmly, directing the others. "Ronan's death is directly linked to victory in this war. We must act carefully and quickly."

At the moment when Apollo's defense shield had completely absorbed the gamma ray burst, rendering the energy harmless, Ronan silently issued instructions and prepared to launch Apollo's counterattack. The Falchion fleet was also preparing to unleash its firepower once again on Celia and the Thales fleet.
However, the plan of Darius and the commanders of the Thales fleet, who were completely convinced that Apollo had nullified the gamma ray burst, was about to take an unexpected turn.

The assassin corps' secret maneuvers and Ronan's sniping
At the moment when she was shocked that the gamma ray burst that the Thales fleet had released on the Apollo civilization area had been nullified, Celia immediately thought of her next move. She was working on a secret plan to break through Apollo's powerful defenses. That is the invasion of the assassin army.

They had the task of sneaking into the heart of the enemy, hidden from view, and eliminating the most important people. In the Apollo civilization, the Assassin Corps that Celia trusts is extremely valuable, and she considers their power to be essential in this war.
"Aim for Ronan Ursa," Celia instructed Adam, the leader of the Assassin army. "Infiltrate Apollo Centralis and take down Ronan. If he falls, Apollo's leadership will collapse."
Adam received this order and began infiltrating the Apollo civilization area with an army of assassins in tow. They approached Apollo's most guarded area completely unnoticed. Members of the Assassin Corps use their mental abilities rather than physical strength to neutralize Apollo's security system.
"We'll need the most precise attacks to target Ronan," Adam said calmly, directing the others. "Ronan's death is directly linked to victory in this war. We must act carefully and quickly."

The Assassin army penetrated numerous defense systems and finally approached the core of Apollo Centralis. Their mission was to assassinate Ronan Ursa, and their plan was perfectly laid out. However, what Ronan immediately sensed was not just the presence of an intruder. It was the presence of numerous assassins who were trying to completely surround and eliminate his existence, as per Celia's orders.
"Is this a trap set by Celia?" At that moment, Ronan sensed the movements of the Assassin army and made a cold judgment. "But I won't fall down easily."
At that moment, Ronan manipulated dimensional energy and activated the defense mechanism inside Apollo Centralis. Using his powers, he sensed the presence of the intruder and immediately took a fighting stance. The Assassins invaded with their speed and power, but Ronan's keen senses detected them and were closing in behind him.
"Here we come." Ronan's eyes sharpened and he set his sights on Adam, a member of the Assassin army. "But I won't tolerate any unnecessary attacks."
At that moment, Adam charged towards Ronan and moved to stab him with his dagger, but Ronan's reaction time was faster than him. Ronan reacted by making full use of dimensional energy, dodging Adam's attack, and then launched a powerful counterattack. Adam received the counterattack without avoiding it and immediately retreated.
"As I thought..." Adam declared calmly, catching his breath. "Ronan Ursa's power is beyond imagination."
At that moment, the other members of the Assassin Corps began attacking Ronan all at once, but Ronan nullified all of them using dimensional energy and instantly launched a counterattack.
Chapter 95: Adam’s “FPZ Conversion”—Ceria vs. Ronan duel
As a fierce battle rages inside Apollo Centralis, Adam coldly confronts Ronan Ursa. Adam, the leader of the Assassin army, has fighting ability that exceeds that of ordinary people, and together with other Assassins, he besieges Ronan. However, Ronan overwhelmingly dealt with all of them using dimensional energy, overwhelming the members of the Assassin Corps.

The Assassin army penetrated numerous defense systems and finally approached the core of Apollo Centralis. Their mission was to assassinate Ronan Ursa, and their plan was perfectly laid out. However, what Ronan immediately sensed was not just the presence of an intruder. The Assassins invaded with their speed and power, but Ronan's keen senses detected them and were closing in behind him.

Ronan reacted by making full use of dimensional energy, dodging Adam's attack, and then launched a powerful counterattack. Chapter 95: Adam’s “FPZ Conversion”—Ceria vs. Ronan duel
As a fierce battle rages inside Apollo Centralis, Adam coldly confronts Ronan Ursa. Adam, the leader of the Assassin army, has fighting ability that exceeds that of ordinary people, and together with other Assassins, he besieges Ronan. However, Ronan overwhelmingly dealt with all of them using dimensional energy, overwhelming the members of the Assassin Corps.

After a long battle, Adam finally found the right moment to activate the ``FPZ conversion device'' he held in his palm. FPZ conversion is a special interdimensional transport technology, and by activating it, Celia and Adam can instantly swap their existence. During the war between Apollo and the Dominion, this plan was hatched as a way for Celia to defeat Ronan without contacting him.
"Celia...please." Adam activated the FPZ conversion while thinking of Celia in his heart. Then, the surrounding space became distorted, and Adam and Celia's existence was instantly swapped. Things changed with incredible speed, with Celia instantly appearing on Apollo Centralis and Adam being teleported in her place to the safety of the Dominion, 300 million light years away.
Adam suddenly retreated on his own without Celia's help, but Celia was instantly standing in front of Ronan. Celia calmly assessed the situation of the battle and was determined not to back down once again in the face of an opponent she had faced many times before.
At that moment, Ronan realized that Celia had appeared in front of him, and her eyes flashed sharply. Ronan's combat experience foreshadowed her arrival. Calmly, Ronan further strengthened his dimensional energy and prepared to unleash a sharp blow at Celia.
"Celia Dominicus..." Ronan says quietly, staring at her. "It's time for the battle with you to finally come to a true conclusion."
Celia accepts this silently and looks back at Ronan with cold eyes. Just before the battle began, Celia gathered dimensional energy throughout her body and drew out its maximum power. In order to counter Ronan's attack, he had no choice but to make full use of this power and seize victory by any means necessary.
___________________


Celia vs Ronan: A deadly battle using dimensional energy

After a long battle, Adam finally found the right moment to activate the ``FPZ conversion device'' he held in his palm. FPZ conversion is a special interdimensional transport technology, and by activating it, Celia and Adam can instantly swap their existence. During the war between Apollo and the Dominion, this plan was hatched as a way for Celia to defeat Ronan without contacting him.
"Celia...please." Adam activated the FPZ conversion while thinking of Celia in his heart. Then, the surrounding space became distorted, and Adam and Celia's existence was instantly swapped. Things changed with incredible speed, with Celia instantly appearing on Apollo Centralis and Adam being teleported in her place to the safety of the Dominion, 300 million light years away.
Adam suddenly retreated on his own without Celia's help, but Celia was instantly standing in front of Ronan. Celia calmly assessed the situation of the battle and was determined not to back down once again in the face of an opponent she had faced many times before.
At that moment, Ronan realized that Celia had appeared in front of him, and her eyes flashed sharply. Ronan's combat experience foreshadowed her arrival. Calmly, Ronan further strengthened his dimensional energy and prepared to unleash a sharp blow at Celia.
"Celia Dominicus..." Ronan says quietly, staring at her. "It's time for the battle with you to finally come to a true conclusion."
Celia accepts this silently and looks back at Ronan with cold eyes. Just before the battle began, Celia gathered dimensional energy throughout her body and drew out its maximum power. In order to counter Ronan's attack, he had no choice but to make full use of this power and seize victory by any means necessary.
___________________


Celia vs Ronan: A deadly battle using dimensional energy

As soon as the battle begins, Ronan uses dimensional energy to close in on Celia. His movements were so fast that it was as if he was manipulating space itself, and it was difficult for Celia to judge his speed. However, at that moment, Celia calmly saw through his movements and began a counterattack while avoiding Ronan's attacks.
Ronan's dimensional energy approaches Celia, but Celia powerfully deflects the attack and fires a counterattack. When the dimensional energies collided, the surrounding space was distorted and a shock wave spread. Celia's counterattack instantly catches Ronan, and Ronan is forced to retreat.
"I won't let you have my way," Ronan says coldly, refocusing his dimensional energy. "As the ruler of Apollo, I will never lose this battle."
At that moment, Ronan distorted the space around him, focused the dimensional energy, and released it all at once towards Celia. A huge amount of energy was released towards Celia, the surrounding space collapsed and an explosive impact spread.
However, when Celia sensed that energy, she calmly gathered the dimensional energy within her body and manipulated the space around her, perfectly dodging Ronan's attack. Celia's reaction speed completely anticipated Ronan's attack, and she immediately counterattacked.
"Your power has no effect on me," Celia says calmly, gathering her energy again. She unleashed her power all at once, releasing a burst of dimensional energy towards Ronan. The energy wave had the power to obliterate space itself, and was powerful enough to break through Ronan's defenses.
Ronan was directly hit by the energy wave, and his body was instantly blown away as the dimensional shock spread, causing him to retreat significantly. Despite being shocked, Ronan calmly stands up and starts fighting back again.
"I won't let it end like this." Ronan refocused his dimensional energy and amplified the power emanating from his entire body. "Celia Dominicus, you are more than just a ruler. But in the face of my power, your fate is doomed."

Ronan's dimensional energy is even more powerful and violently released towards Celia. The waves of energy had such destructive power that it was impossible to look away, and the space around them collapsed, the ground cracked, and the sound of the air being torn apart echoed.
However, Celia calmly assesses the attack and releases her power once again. Manipulating dimensional energy to the fullest, Celia parried the impact and nullified Ronan's attack.
"I win." Celia spits out those words forcefully, releasing a burst of dimensional energy. The blow hits Ronan directly and he collapses on the spot. The surrounding space converged in an instant, and as if to signal the end of the battle, dimensional energy expanded and Ronan's consciousness disappeared.
___________________


The end of the battle and the next challenge
The moment Ronan collapsed, Celia was sure of victory. This was the moment when Celia's cold-hearted tactics and dimensional energy proved to be the absolute power to overcome his power. Celia's eyes coolly stared ahead, focused on the next battle.
However, Ronan's death only means one thing. Celia never backed down and continued to challenge with all her might, and as a result, she left the place thinking about what kind of impact it would have on the Apollo civilization area in the future, and how powerful the next challengers would be.
"This is just the beginning."
Chapter 96: Clash between Celia and Ronan—A fierce battle that transcends the laws of physics
The fierce battle between Celia and Ronan was no longer just a battle. The collision was so powerful that it shook the Apollo civilization and shook the laws of physics itself. Phenomena were observed where dimensional energies collided violently, space itself was distorted, and even time was being affected.
A huge amount of dark energy was gathering near the Apollo system, and abnormal physical phenomena were occurring one after another. Stars were changing their orbits, meteorites were scattering at abnormal speeds, and the flow of time was fluctuating erratically. Scientists named the phenomenon the "Celia-Ronan impact phenomenon" and reported that the entire Apollo system was affected by the aftermath of this battle.

Ronan's dimensional energy is even more powerful and violently released towards Celia. The waves of energy had such destructive power that it was impossible to look away, and the space around them collapsed, the ground cracked, and the sound of the air being torn apart echoed.
However, Celia calmly assesses the attack and releases her power once again. Manipulating dimensional energy to the fullest, Celia parried the impact and nullified Ronan's attack.
"I win." Celia spits out those words forcefully, releasing a burst of dimensional energy. The blow hits Ronan directly and he collapses on the spot. The surrounding space converged in an instant, and as if to signal the end of the battle, dimensional energy expanded and Ronan's consciousness disappeared.

Chapter 96: Clash between Celia and Ronan—A fierce battle that transcends the laws of physics
