Scientists named the phenomenon the "Celia-Ronan impact phenomenon" and reported that the entire Apollo system was affected by the aftermath of this battle.

However, Celia and Ronan simply continued to fight without worrying about such a situation. Their battle became a plane-slashing battle, with devastating shockwaves tearing apart the space around them and causing stars to be thrown out of orbit.
"This is the strongest ruler of the Apollo civilization..." Celia said, her eyes shining sharply and gathering dimensional energy. "But I can't stop here."
Ronan looked back at Celia with his cold eyes, concentrated his dimensional energy, and reacted forcefully. "Celia Dominicus, I know your power. Still, I must protect Apollo's future."
A blow of dimensional energy released by Celia directly hit Ronan, and the shock wave destroyed the surrounding space and even affected stars thousands of light years away. Ronan stepped back for a moment, enduring the impact, but soon began to fight back with his powerful energy. The energy emitted from his body had a power that transcended dimensions, making it difficult to even follow Celia's movements.
``No matter how strong you are, as the person who carries the future of Apollo, I will not fall!'' Ronan unleashed his mighty power towards Celia, firing blow after blow.
___________________


A battle that transcends dimensional walls
Celia senses Ronan's attack at that moment and instantly uses dimensional energy to avoid it. However, Ronan has a power that exceeds her reaction speed and immediately deploys a bundle of dimensional energy around Celia, trying to block her movements. Its power was so powerful that it could manipulate time and space, and even Celia had difficulty completely countering its attacks.
"Ceria, to defeat someone like you, I have no choice but to use another power," Ronan said with a cold smile on his lips. At that moment, the energy released from Ronan's body was incomparably stronger than before. The dimensional walls trembled, space distorted, and time began to rapidly converge.

Celia senses the abnormal power and releases dimensional energy all at once to fight back against the attack. However, the energy wave released by Ronan spreads around Celia and tries to nullify everything. Despite being attacked, Celia calmly reacts and seizes a chance to counterattack by manipulating the flow of dimensional energy.
"I feel your power. But this is the end." Celia muttered a single word, drawing out her dimensional energy to the maximum.
At that moment, the energy wave released from Celia's body completely destroyed Ronan's attack and spread as if cutting through space itself. The dimensional wall was completely destroyed, and the surrounding stars collapsed one by one due to the impact. Ronan's defenses were broken in an instant, and his body was torn apart and blown away.
"This is the end..." Celia's eyes flashed sharply, ready to completely obliterate Ronan. However, at that moment, Ronan did not fall and used his last strength to fight back.
"I'm not done yet," Ronan said, supporting her body. There was no hint of despair in his voice; on the contrary, it contained a cold will. "I cannot allow Apollo to lose control if I fall."
Those words instantly shook Celia's heart. However, she suppressed the tremor and calmly considered her next move. Realizing how powerful Ronan's power was, Celia moved to use her dimensional energy to its full potential to end the battle.

"I can't let my future end here," Ronan declared, throwing a bundle of dimensional energy at Celia.

Celia senses the abnormal power and releases dimensional energy all at once to fight back against the attack. Ronan's final moments and Celia's determination
Using dimensional energy, Ronan summoned the last of his strength and charged towards Celia. This power transcends dimensions and has the power to obliterate space itself, and it approaches her at a speed that exceeds Celia's reaction time.
"I can't let my future end here," Ronan declared, throwing a bundle of dimensional energy at Celia.

Even though Celia was under attack, she instantly manipulated dimensional energy to put up a defense and wait for an opportunity to counterattack. At that moment, waves of dimensional energy emitted from Celia's body enveloped Ronan, crushing his power. Ronan's body is enveloped in dimensional energy, and his existence is torn apart as if it were crumbling away.
"This is the end." With determination in her eyes, Celia let Ronan meet his end.
When Ronan's body completely disappeared, the surrounding space became stable, and the abnormal physical phenomena of the Apollo system gradually began to converge. However, its influence still continued, and the entire Apollo civilization was affected by it. Celia's victory meant the collapse of the Apollonian civilization.
Celia calmly watched the battle end and decided on her next move. In order to break Apollo's power and build the next era, she decided to take on all of it.
``I will create the next era.'' Celia quietly murmured as she took steps toward the next stage.
Chapter 97: Celia's Fury and the Destruction of Apollo Centralis
Celia defeated Ronan and dealt a serious blow to Apollo's ruling class, but the moment the battle ended, she learned what would happen next. Her cold eyes saw reports of devastating damage caused by the overwhelming force of the Falchion fleet that attacked Dominion. Celia heard the report for a moment and showed an expression of disbelief, but she quickly suppressed her emotions and began to calmly grasp the situation.
"Falchion Fleet..." Celia mutters silently, then calmly picks up the report. The Falchion fleet is Apollo's most elite force, known for its thousands of battleships and powerful attack power. That fleet invaded Dominion, which was controlled by Celia, and carried out devastating attacks for several months.
As a result, the Dominion's central cities and defense lines were almost completely destroyed, countless soldiers lost their lives, and the city's infrastructure was completely destroyed. And although the troops under Seria's orders continued to stand against the Falchion fleet, they continued to be overwhelmed by its power.

Chapter 97: Celia's Fury and the Destruction of Apollo Centralis
Celia defeated Ronan and dealt a serious blow to Apollo's ruling class, but the moment the battle ended, she learned what would happen next. Her cold eyes saw reports of devastating damage caused by the overwhelming force of the Falchion fleet that attacked Dominion. Celia heard the report for a moment and showed an expression of disbelief, but she quickly suppressed her emotions and began to calmly grasp the situation.
"Falchion Fleet..." Celia mutters silently, then calmly picks up the report. The Falchion fleet is Apollo's most elite force, known for its thousands of battleships and powerful attack power. That fleet invaded Dominion, which was controlled by Celia, and carried out devastating attacks for several months.
As a result, the Dominion's central cities and defense lines were almost completely destroyed, countless soldiers lost their lives, and the city's infrastructure was completely destroyed. And although the troops under Seria's orders continued to stand against the Falchion fleet, they continued to be overwhelmed by its power.

"This kind of thing..." Celia clenched her fists coldly and took a deep breath. What boiled up in her heart was intense anger and a desire for revenge. Celia had defeated many enemies in the past, but she could never forgive herself for such a merciless attack. Her feelings towards Apollo were turning cold.
"Apollo Centralis, I will destroy everything..." Celia's voice was low, but there was a strong determination in it. She was determined to completely destroy Apollo Centralis in revenge for the devastating attack by the Falchion fleet. There was no hesitation in Celia's mind anymore, her only goal was to break away from Apollo's control and destroy Apollo Centralis.
In order to take immediate action, Celia contacted Darius Sevan, who was commanding the Thales fleet, and immediately began making plans to attack Apollo Centralis. Meanwhile, numerous fleets were moving around Celia, and a counterattack against Apollo was being organized.
___________________


Battleship of Revenge "Venom"
Under Celia's instructions, preparations were made for a super battleship named ``Venom'', which had been developed to overthrow the core of the Apollo civilization. Venom was a ship developed for Celia, and all of its features had the strongest offensive and defensive power that she required. Battleships were characterized by their destructive power, which made full use of dimensional energy and could obliterate targets in an instant. The Venom's hull has a defensive power comparable to the cutting-edge technology of the Apollo civilization, and Celia decides to board the ship herself and set out.
"Venom, complete launch preparations and sortie towards Apollo Centralis," Celia coldly ordered, preparing to take command of the battleship on the spot. There was anger and determination in her eyes. Destroying Apollo Centralis was essential to her future rule, and symbolized her revenge against Apollo.

"This kind of thing..." Celia clenched her fists coldly and took a deep breath. What boiled up in her heart was intense anger and a desire for revenge. The battleship Venom began to move toward the center of the Apollo civilization, shaking its huge form. The soldiers and engineers on board the ship are doing their best to follow Celia's orders, sensing the battle that is approaching. However, Celia calmly took command from Venom's bridge without saying a word.
___________________


Assault on Apollo Centralis
By the time the Venom fleet approached Apollo Centralis, located in the center of the Apollo civilization, Celia already knew exactly when it would arrive. Apollo Centralis was the center of the Apollo civilization, and around it were countless defense fleets and the strongest fighting forces. Celia prepared to make full use of the dimensional weapons aboard Venom's battleship in order to break through their defenses.
"All ships, proceed towards Apollo Centralis at full speed." Celia calmly gave the command, and the moment she uttered those words, the Venom fleet began to advance at high speed. The energy of the dimensional weapon was charged, and the combat power of the fleet suddenly increased.
Apollo Centralis' defense systems were facing an attack with a power never seen before. Celia decides to release the energy of the Venom fleet all at once and launch the attack into Apollo's strongest defense system. The dimensional energy converges in an instant, distorting space, and the blow fired by Celia's hand breaks through Apollo Centralis' shield.
The shock wave had the power to tear apart space itself, and even the surrounding stars were affected by the aftermath and were thrown out of orbit. Celia continued onward, seeing how badly the attack had dealt Apollo's defenses.
"This is the end of your rule," Celia muttered, refocusing her energy.

Fall of Apollo Centralis

Without stopping the advance of the Venom fleet, Celia activated her dimensional weapon again and delivered the next blow to Apollo Centralis. This blow was far more powerful than the previous attack, and had enough power to change the dimension itself. Apollo Centralis' defense shield collapses all at once, and the system shuts down.
"This is the end, Apollo." Celia's voice was cold and determined. Apollo Centralis' core collapses, and it finally releases an explosive energy that obliterates its form. The surrounding stars exploded one after another, and a corner of the Apollo civilization completely disappeared.
Chapter 98: The End of the War and the World Afterward
The fierce war that took place between the Apollo civilization and the Dominion ultimately caused devastating damage to both sides, leaving it deeply etched in the history of the universe. Due to Celia's revenge, Apollo's GDP fell from 125 quintillion dollars to just 32 quintillion dollars, and almost all economic foundations collapsed. At the same time, Dominion's GDP fell from $81 quintillion to $23 quintillion, and both sides continued to endure the negative effects of the war. This war was no longer just a power struggle, but an event that had a major historical impact on the entire galaxy.
The destruction of Apollo Centralis caused the loss of the symbolic presence of the Apollo civilization, and with the death of its successor, Ronan Ursa, the center of civilization completely collapsed. Ronan's death caused the collapse of Apollo's leadership, and the subsequent leadership system fell into anarchy. Celia's overthrow of Apollo's rule created a seemingly temporary vacuum, but this led to the intervention of other powers.
Meanwhile, the Dominion's economic foundations were similarly hit hard, many of its cities collapsed, and it became seriously depleted of troops and resources. As a result of the devastating attack by the Falchion fleet and continued exhaustion from the war with Apollo, Celia was forced to manage its own territory, and it was extremely difficult to regain its former prosperity. However, Celia swore that she would continue to maintain control as she calmly planned her next move.
___________________

Chapter 98: The End of the War and the World Afterward
The fierce war that took place between the Apollo civilization and the Dominion ultimately caused devastating damage to both sides, leaving it deeply etched in the history of the universe. Due to Celia's revenge, Apollo's GDP fell from 125 quintillion dollars to just 32 quintillion dollars, and almost all economic foundations collapsed. At the same time, Dominion's GDP fell from $81 quintillion to $23 quintillion, and both sides continued to endure the negative effects of the war. This war was no longer just a power struggle, but an event that had a major historical impact on the entire galaxy.
The destruction of Apollo Centralis caused the loss of the symbolic presence of the Apollo civilization, and with the death of its successor, Ronan Ursa, the center of civilization completely collapsed. Ronan's death caused the collapse of Apollo's leadership, and the subsequent leadership system fell into anarchy. Celia's overthrow of Apollo's rule created a seemingly temporary vacuum, but this led to the intervention of other powers.
Meanwhile, the Dominion's economic foundations were similarly hit hard, many of its cities collapsed, and it became seriously depleted of troops and resources. As a result of the devastating attack by the Falchion fleet and continued exhaustion from the war with Apollo, Celia was forced to manage its own territory, and it was extremely difficult to regain its former prosperity. However, Celia swore that she would continue to maintain control as she calmly planned her next move.
___________________

Devastating damage on both sides and the subsequent world order
As the aftermath of the war spread across the galaxy, neither Apollo nor the Dominion, not completely destroyed economically, faced the challenge of how to rebuild their remaining territories and resources. In order to rebuild after the war, the leaders of both civilizations had no choice but to tackle rebuilding as a top priority.
Apollo's remaining territory is much smaller than its former glory, and its strong economic base is no longer there, and each planet has increased autonomy. The new leaders tried to repair the scars from the war with Celia in order to preserve Apollo's name, but their efforts were by no means easy, and in order to once again spread Apollo's name throughout the galaxy, internal maintenance was essential first.
Dominion's recovery was similarly difficult. Celia was busy rebuilding the territory and resources lost due to the attack by the Falchion fleet and the war with Apollo, and was devoting a great deal of time and effort to maintaining public order and rebuilding the territory within her control. However, thanks to Celia's skills, several central cities in the area under her control were revived, and the economy began to recover little by little. However, in order to regain its former glory, Celia herself needed to revise her diplomatic strategy to avoid another war.
The new order under Celia's rule was different from the old one, being more decentralized and allowing each region a degree of autonomy. However, this was only under her rule, and it did not shake Celia's absolute control.
___________________


The reason for the rivalry between Ronan and Celia
This war, and the process leading up to its conclusion, have been passed down from generation to generation by many people in the galaxy, and its history and outcome have been recorded as important historical events even in later generations. However, there is still no clear answer as to why Ronan and Celia developed such a fierce rivalry.

Devastating damage on both sides and the subsequent world order

The new leaders tried to repair the scars from the war with Celia in order to preserve Apollo's name, but their efforts were by no means easy, and in order to once again spread Apollo's name throughout the galaxy, internal maintenance was essential first.
Dominion's recovery was similarly difficult. Celia was busy rebuilding the territory and resources lost due to the attack by the Falchion fleet and the war with Apollo, and was devoting a great deal of time and effort to maintaining public order and rebuilding the territory within her control. However, thanks to Celia's skills, several central cities in the area under her control were revived, and the economy began to recover little by little. ___________________


The reason for the rivalry between Ronan and Celia
This war, and the process leading up to its conclusion, have been passed down from generation to generation by many people in the galaxy, and its history and outcome have been recorded as important historical events even in later generations. However, there is still no clear answer as to why Ronan and Celia developed such a fierce rivalry.

One theory holds that the root cause is a conflict between Ronan's loyalty to the Apollo civilization and Celia's desire for control. Ronan's mission is to protect Apollo's future and maintain its control, while Celia is determined to break that control and create a new order with her own power. There is no doubt that the difference in beliefs between these two men was the most important factor in causing the war.
Another theory is that Ronan and Celia's past connections and their respective destinies created a direct conflict between them. Ronan was fighting to raise his name as the leader of Apollo, but Celia, through her difficult childhood and tragic experiences in the past, was determined to rule the world with her own power and carve out a future.
As they fought, their personal feelings and past thoughts gradually became intertwined, and the war became more than just a power struggle, but a clash of individual beliefs. As a result, Celia succeeded in defeating Ronan and was able to completely break Apollo's control, but it also came at a great cost to her, and the price of victory was by no means small.
___________________


Postwar peace and new order
After the war, Celia achieved a temporary victory, but the scars of war were deeply engraved throughout the galaxy. The Apollonian civilization collapsed, and the Dominion began to rebuild itself, but both civilizations faced the reality that it would take several generations to regain their name.
Celia proceeded with numerous reforms in order to create a new world order. While incorporating the regions and cultures that were formerly under Apollo's control, she sought to restore them and build a new civilization under her rule. However, the order she sought to establish was by no means monolithic, and numerous forces and ideas intermingled, sometimes creating conflict.

One theory holds that the root cause is a conflict between Ronan's loyalty to the Apollo civilization and Celia's desire for control. Ronan's mission is to protect Apollo's future and maintain its control, while Celia is determined to break that control and create a new order with her own power. There is no doubt that the difference in beliefs between these two men was the most important factor in causing the war.
Another theory is that Ronan and Celia's past connections and their respective destinies created a direct conflict between them. Ronan was fighting to raise his name as the leader of Apollo, but Celia, through her difficult childhood and tragic experiences in the past, was determined to rule the world with her own power and carve out a future.
As they fought, their personal feelings and past thoughts gradually became intertwined, and the war became more than just a power struggle, but a clash of individual beliefs. As a result, Celia succeeded in defeating Ronan and was able to completely break Apollo's control, but it also came at a great cost to her, and the price of victory was by no means small.
___________________


Postwar peace and new order
After the war, Celia achieved a temporary victory, but the scars of war were deeply engraved throughout the galaxy. The Apollonian civilization collapsed, and the Dominion began to rebuild itself, but both civilizations faced the reality that it would take several generations to regain their name.
Celia proceeded with numerous reforms in order to create a new world order. While incorporating the regions and cultures that were formerly under Apollo's control, she sought to restore them and build a new civilization under her rule. However, the order she sought to establish was by no means monolithic, and numerous forces and ideas intermingled, sometimes creating conflict.

The peace after the war was no longer as violent as war, but Celia determined to take the necessary steps to maintain that peace. Under her rule, many reforms took place, sometimes requiring violence and control. Celia would eventually use her power to rebuild the Dominion and create a new order, but she knew that it would not bring complete stability.
And the question of why the conflict between Ronan and Celia occurred has still not been solved, and has been passed down from generation to generation by the people of the galaxy. In the end, the motivation behind their fight was a combination of deep personal beliefs and a desire for world domination. The fact that this came to the fore in the form of war may have been an inevitable fate.
However, Celia did not lose everything as a result of that battle. The control of Apollo that she defeated meant the beginning of a new order, and Celia herself was determined to build a new future within that order.
Chapter 99: Postwar world and new power map
After the war ended, the impact of Celia and Ronan's fierce battle on the entire galaxy was immeasurable. The decline of the Apollonian and Dominion civilizations, and the subsequent birth of a new order, fundamentally changed the balance of power in the entire universe. These changes had a serious impact not only on economics and politics, but also on culture, as the worldview established by the previous rulers was collapsing, and a completely new order was about to be born.
After the war, Apollo's rule completely collapsed, and the Dominion also lost much of its economic base. The territory Celia had built up had almost collapsed, and the remaining territory faced economic instability. Although Celia herself tried hard to regain control, much of her domain was gradually absorbed by other factions. In particular, the powerful faction known as Evatron has strengthened its influence, acquiring many former Dominion territories one after another.
___________________


Rise of the Granbell planetary system

Meanwhile, in the chaos that followed the war, the Granbell planetary system rapidly expanded in power and became the world's largest GDP. This planetary system, which had previously been in second place, quickly rose to prominence in the post-war chaos, and its economy swelled to 1.5 quintillion dollars. Unaffected by past wars, the Granbell planetary system used clever political and economic strategies to gain control over the galaxy's economy.
Granbell's economy has an overwhelming advantage, especially in technology and commerce, and the scale of its industry has already surpassed that of the entire galaxy. Many medium-sized asteroid systems were incorporated into Granbell's commercial sphere and came under its influence. With the end of the war, its economic power completely changed the world order, completely surpassing the influence of the once powerful Apollo and Dominion.
Behind the rapid growth of the Granbell planetary system was the development of advanced technology and the establishment of an efficient economic system. They also strengthened their ties with other star systems, expanding the galaxy's economic sphere through trade and diplomacy. As a result, Granbell was not just an economic zone, but essentially a new economic empire.
___________________


The collapse of Celia's Dominion and the acquisition of Evatron
The Dominion, ruled by Celia, was experiencing great turmoil after the war. Celia herself tried to vigorously defend her territory, but the resources and troops needed to maintain her rule were exhausted by the war and suffered a severe economic blow. Evatron, a former ally, gained strong influence over Dominion, absorbing its territory one by one.
Evatron was originally known as a male-dominated galaxy, but its strict rule and calculated diplomatic strategies gradually expanded its power. Not overlooking Dominion's deterioration, they gradually acquired Dominion's territory through economic transactions and military power. Eventually, much of the Dominion's vast star system was captured by Evatron, and Celia's control was all but eliminated.

By taking control of Dominion territory, Evatron began to force its culture and values ​​onto the region. Dominion's culture gradually became tainted by Evatron culture, and most of the unique values ​​and traditions that existed before the war disappeared. In particular, the division of roles between men and women and the social structure changed fundamentally, and Evatron's values ​​permeated throughout Dominion.
___________________


Cultural change and backlash
Cultural changes within the Dominion were intense, with issues surrounding women and their status becoming a major focus. Under Evatron's control, the male-dominated society was strengthened, and women's rights and freedoms were taken away. This caused strong opposition among Dominion's former residents and resistance groups.
The anti-Evatron movement expanded across the galaxy, and Celia, the former ruler of Dominion, once again gathered many supporters. Those who believed in her ideals began preparations to oppose Evatron under Celia's guidance. However, Celia herself was exhausted and unable to directly lead the rebellion. Her control was no longer strong enough, and she realized that something major had to change if Dominion was to regain its future.
Celia decides to take a cold-hearted approach to Evatron's rule, and at the same time secretly begins working to regain the power to unite the entire galaxy. He knew that the road would be difficult and that it would take considerable time and effort to regain his former control. However, Celia vows to regain control and is determined to prepare for the next battle.
___________________


Birth of a new galactic order
After the war, a new power structure emerged across the galaxy. At its center were the Granbell planetary system, Evatron, and some remaining forces. Due to the rapid growth of Granbell and the strengthening of Evatron's control, its former rulers lost their power, and a new empire was being established to become the center of the galaxy.

戦後の平和は、もはや戦争のように激しいものではなかったが、セリアはその平和を維持するために冷徹に必要な手段を講じていくことを決意した。 Under her rule, many reforms took place, sometimes requiring violence and control.セリアは、最終的にその力を持って、Dominionを再建し、新たな秩序を作り上げるが、それが完全な安定をもたらすものではないことを彼女は理解していた。
そして、ロナンとセリアの相克がなぜ起こったのかという問いは、今もなお解明されることはなく、銀河の人々によって語り継がれることとなった。二人の戦いの背後にあった動機は、結局のところ、次元を越えるほど深い個人的な信念と世界の支配に対する欲望の交錯によって引き起こされたものだった。 The fact that this came to the fore in the form of war may have been an inevitable fate.
However, Celia did not lose everything as a result of that battle.彼女が打破したアポロンの支配は、新たな秩序の始まりを意味し、セリア自身はその秩序の中で新たな未来を築くことを決意していた。
Chapter 99: Postwar world and new power map
After the war ended, the impact of Celia and Ronan's fierce battle on the entire galaxy was immeasurable.アポロンとDominionの両文明の衰退、そしてそれに続く新たな秩序の誕生が、全宇宙の勢力図を根本から変えることになった。その変動は、単なる経済や政治にとどまらず、文化的にも深刻な影響を与え、かつての支配者たちが築いてきた世界観が崩壊し、全く新しい秩序が生まれようとしていた。

Due to its economic power, Granbell gradually became the financial and commercial center of the galaxy, expanding its influence. Under their control, a new commercial zone was formed and played a role in the post-war reconstruction. Granbell's rule was primarily economic, and its culture and values ​​were more flexible than those of other factions, and it flourished around commercial activities.
Evatron steadily expanded its territory by leveraging its powerful military power and strict social structure. They exercised strong control over the star systems they controlled and succeeded in maintaining social order. However, its control was no longer complete, and internal opposition and dissatisfaction increased day by day.
Celia's actions continue to have an important impact on the galaxy, and her supporters rise again to protect her ideals. However, Celia was no longer as powerful as she once was, and she understood that rebuilding and reforming would take time.
___________________


last choice
After ending the war between Apollo and the Dominion, Celia calmly watched as the entire galaxy entered a new order. She lost a lot and learned a lot in the process. She was acutely aware that regaining control would not be easy, and that the new order she was trying to achieve would have to be different from the wars of the past.
``In order to build a new order, we need not only battle, but also dialogue and understanding.'' Celia quietly murmured, looking at her feet again, and deciding on her next step.
How will the galaxy change after the war ends? Celia's future is still uncertain, but everyone understands that the path to achieving her rule and ideals will not be easy.
Chapter 100: Celia's downfall and escape, and the rise of Granbell
After the war, amidst the great upheaval that engulfed the galaxy, Evatron's control became even stronger, their GDP reached 80 quintillion dollars, and they were rapidly developing to regain their former glory. Meanwhile, Dominion was exposed to pressure from both inside and outside the country, and Celia's control gradually began to waver.

By taking control of Dominion territory, Evatron began to force its culture and values ​​onto the region. Dominion's culture gradually became tainted by Evatron culture, and most of the unique values ​​and traditions that existed before the war disappeared. In particular, the division of roles between men and women and the social structure changed fundamentally, and Evatron's values ​​permeated throughout Dominion.
___________________


Cultural change and backlash
Cultural changes within the Dominion were intense, with issues surrounding women and their status becoming a major focus. This caused strong opposition among Dominion's former residents and resistance groups.

___________________


Birth of a new galactic order
After the war, a new power structure emerged across the galaxy. At its center were the Granbell planetary system, Evatron, and some remaining forces. Due to the rapid growth of Granbell and the strengthening of Evatron's control, its former rulers lost their power, and a new empire was being established to become the center of the galaxy.

As Evatron strengthens its control, it is inevitable that Celia will once again fall from grace and be pursued. The collapse of the ruling system she once built was due to Evatron's intervention. Evatron could not tolerate Celia remaining in her position as leader of the Dominion and began a series of moves to force her to abdicate. As a result, Celia was expelled from Evatron and fell from grace.
At that point, Celia decides to run away with her former close subordinates to prove her presence. Celia's most trusted subordinates, including Darius Severn, Isabella Khan, and her former allies, followed her and accepted her decision together. In the aftermath of the war and under the strong control of Evatron, they fled to the asteroid system in the Andromeda galaxy to avoid further conflict.
Celia flees to a quiet place far away from the center of the galaxy. The asteroid system in the Andromeda Galaxy was far from the conflicts between civilizations and had limited resources, but for Celia, it was a place that could become a new base from which to regain control.
___________________


Celia's determination and her hideout in the Andromeda galaxy
Celia continues to seek opportunities to regain her power as a leader, even while living a life on the run. Life in the asteroid system of the Andromeda Galaxy is not easy, and with limited resources, she and her subordinates live a small life, but are constantly envisioning the future.
``Right now, I'm living in hiding, but I'll definitely come back.'' Celia spoke with strong determination in her heart. In order to regain her former glory and stand against Evatron, Celia had to develop new powers. She devised many plans in her hideout, and vowed to gather the forces necessary to regain control.

Together with her subordinates, Celia prepares to gather new power and begins preparations for war once again. To do so, she continued to increase her power by gathering the necessary information and using her former allies and commercial routes. However, the quiet days in the Andromeda Galaxy did not last long. Her presence once again spread to every corner of the universe, and eventually became the source of a new battle.
___________________


The rise of the Granbell planetary system and the development of the multiverse
Meanwhile, the Granbell planetary system took advantage of the post-war chaos to rapidly expand its power, eventually becoming the largest civilization in the galaxy. Its economic scale reached 1.5 quintillion dollars, making it the most powerful being in the entire universe. Granbell's power boasted overwhelming superiority not only in politics and the military, but especially in the fields of commerce and technology, and its control had already transcended the galaxy.
What Granbell was most focused on was the development of the multiverse. They aim to advance to different universes and dimensions by making full use of technology that transcends dimensions. This innovative technology has the potential to completely change the entire universe, and Granbell's commercial sphere is trying to use this information to exert an overwhelming influence on other civilizations. Granbell conducted trade and technology exchange across dimensions, and as a result succeeded in obtaining resources from another dimension.
As the development of the multiverse progresses, Granbell successively incorporates energy sources and resources from other dimensions, and uses them to innovate new technologies. As a result, Granbell's economy achieved further growth, and the gap with other civilizations widened further.
``The power that transcends dimensions is in our hands.'' The leaders of Granbell took full control of that power and expanded their commercial empire beyond dimensions. Granbell's exploration of the multiverse was no longer just a commercial strategy, but one aimed at dominating the entire universe.
___________________


Signs of conflict between Celia and Granbell

Granbell's rise was becoming a threat that Celia couldn't ignore. Celia, who is trying to build a new power in the Andromeda Galaxy to regain her former control, is wary of Granbell's growing power. Celia saw Granbell's power to extend its control across dimensions as more than just an economic threat.
``We must consider how far Granbell will expand his power in the future and how to stop it.'' Celia never wanted to wage war like in the past, but she feared that with Granbell's increasing power, the galaxy would once again be dominated by one ruler.
Celia, along with her subordinates, began preparing to confront Granbell. The method was different from previous wars, and required diplomatic means and the gathering of forces capable of opposing Granbell. She seeks new alliances and begins preparing military and economic means to counter Granbell.
___________________


The battle for the new ruler of the universe
As Granbell, Evatron, Seria, and an unknown force become intertwined, the entire galaxy is once again embroiled in fierce competition and conflict. Granbell, who has a commercial zone that extends beyond dimensions and a powerful military power that supports it, is at the center, and Evatron's powerful control and Celia's efforts to regain her lost power intertwine.
In order to protect her ideals and regain control that had been lost, Celia decided to find a new way to fight without choosing war. In order to counter Granbell, who has power that transcends dimensions, Celia joins forces with many friends and begins to walk the path to once again become the ruler of the universe.
Chapter 101: Dominion's complete control and Granbell's evaluation

Together with her subordinates, Celia prepares to gather new power and begins preparations for war once again. To do so, she continued to increase her power by gathering the necessary information and using her former allies and commercial routes. However, the quiet days in the Andromeda Galaxy did not last long. Her presence once again spread to every corner of the universe, and eventually became the source of a new battle.

___________________


Signs of conflict between Celia and Granbell

After war and turmoil, Dominion was completely under Evatron's control. The territory and civilization that Celia was once proud of have now been incorporated into Evatron's control structure, and they have taken control of it. As Celia's power declined and the former ruling class collapsed, Evatron solidified its rule and established a system to thoroughly control Dominion.
Vylon Deax, an executive of Evatron, was appointed to rule Dominion. Vylon was a talented leader who was in charge of Evatron's internal affairs, and through his cold-blooded political skills and organizational management skills, he succeeded in establishing control over the Dominion in a short period of time. As the newly appointed ruler of the Dominion, he initiated all sorts of reforms and established order, eliminating all opposition forces once and for all.
``In order to usher in a new era, the old rulers have completely become a thing of the past,'' Vyron declared coldly, and under his rule Dominion's culture and values ​​became Evatron-like. The freedom and diversity of Dominion gradually disappeared, giving way to Evatron's rigid discipline and male-dominated values.
___________________


Evaluation of Granbell and evaluation of Seria era
At that time, a powerful new civilization called Granbell was beginning to dominate the economy and politics of the universe. Granbell had completely dominated the commercial sphere of space with its technology that transcended dimensions and its ultra-highly efficient economic system. Then, Master Quintius, the leader of Granbell, looked back on Dominion's time in Seria and spoke of his evaluation of Dominion's former rule.
"The Celia Era was the most successful era in the history of the universe," Quintius said, his words echoing throughout the galaxy. "In that era, technological innovation and social order were in perfect harmony. Under Celia's rule, the Dominion was at its most economically and politically prosperous."

Granbell's rise was becoming a threat that Celia couldn't ignore. Celia, who is trying to build a new power in the Andromeda Galaxy to regain her former control, is wary of Granbell's growing power. Celia saw Granbell's power to extend its control across dimensions as more than just an economic threat.
``We must consider how far Granbell will expand his power in the future and how to stop it.'' Celia never wanted to wage war like in the past, but she feared that with Granbell's increasing power, the galaxy would once again be dominated by one ruler.
Celia, along with her subordinates, began preparing to confront Granbell. The method was different from previous wars, and required diplomatic means and the gathering of forces capable of opposing Granbell. She seeks new alliances and begins preparing military and economic means to counter Granbell.
___________________


The battle for the new ruler of the universe
As Granbell, Evatron, Seria, and an unknown force become intertwined, the entire galaxy is once again embroiled in fierce competition and conflict. Granbell, who has a commercial zone that extends beyond dimensions and a powerful military power that supports it, is at the center, and Evatron's powerful control and Celia's efforts to regain her lost power intertwine.
In order to protect her ideals and regain control that had been lost, Celia decided to find a new way to fight without choosing war. In order to counter Granbell, who has power that transcends dimensions, Celia joins forces with many friends and begins to walk the path to once again become the ruler of the universe.
Chapter 101: Dominion's complete control and Granbell's evaluation

After Celia's fall from power, these words came as a surprise to many people as they looked back on her rule, and at the same time attracted strong praise. With Granbell's leader saying such things, the Celia era was reevaluated, and it was once again recognized that the temporary order and social foundation that she had built had a high degree of perfection.
"Seria's rule was temporarily stable, but it led to chaos, but the technology and social order of the time are still ones that other civilizations should emulate," Quintius continued. "Her era was a golden age before Granbell arrived."
___________________


The glory and failure of the Celia era
Celia's era should certainly have been recorded as a period of prosperity in the history of the universe. However, its glory was short-lived, and after it came to an end, the causes of its collapse were subject to much analysis.
Celia's rule had achieved extraordinary results in its first decades. Her economic policies and military strength have brought stability to Dominion society, increased trade and technological innovation, and led to Dominion's dominance throughout the universe. During her time, Dominion's GDP was at its peak, and its economic power was noted throughout the galaxy.
However, Celia had serious problems maintaining her power. In her growing power to maintain control, she has consolidated her power too much. Unable to adequately respond to internal and external pressures, especially the invasion from Evatron, Evatron took advantage of this gap and took complete control of Dominion.
Granbell's political commentators also said, ``If Celia's rule had continued, she might have reigned as the ruler of the universe by now.'' Celia's era was certainly highly acclaimed, but the cause of its demise is still unknown. The details of how Evatron achieved its dominance have been lost to time and remain unknown.
___________________


Celia's legacy and signs of revival

After war and turmoil, Dominion was completely under Evatron's control. The territory and civilization that Celia was once proud of have now been incorporated into Evatron's control structure, and they have taken control of it. As Celia's power declined and the former ruling class collapsed, Evatron solidified its rule and established a system to thoroughly control Dominion.
Vylon Deax, an executive of Evatron, was appointed to rule Dominion. Vylon was a talented leader who was in charge of Evatron's internal affairs, and through his cold-blooded political skills and organizational management skills, he succeeded in establishing control over the Dominion in a short period of time. As the newly appointed ruler of the Dominion, he initiated all sorts of reforms and established order, eliminating all opposition forces once and for all.

The freedom and diversity of Dominion gradually disappeared, giving way to Evatron's rigid discipline and male-dominated values.

Then, Master Quintius, the leader of Granbell, looked back on Dominion's time in Seria and spoke of his evaluation of Dominion's former rule.

"In that era, technological innovation and social order were in perfect harmony. Under Celia's rule, the Dominion was at its most economically and politically prosperous."

Celia lost control and ended up living in seclusion in a hideout in the Andromeda galaxy. However, even though Granbell and Evatron are making a name for themselves, Celia secretly works to start a new power so that her existence will not be forgotten.
In her hideout in the Andromeda Galaxy, Celia and her subordinates once again devised a plan to build military power and a commercial sphere, and began gathering resources. Celia's supporters believed that she would return to power and made the necessary preparations for that to happen. Although her actions were never carried out on a large scale, she was definitely gathering power and aiming for the day when she could once again build a mighty empire.
"I will return. My time is not yet over," Celia said quietly, preparing to rule the galaxy once again. Those words contained a strong determination to regain its former glory.
Celia's goal was clear: she planned the strategies necessary to regain control and ultimately gain the strength to stand up to powerful forces like Granbell and Evatron. The future may hold another war and change. However, Celia's heart is no longer in doubt, and a battle across the galaxy is about to begin once again, along with those who wish for her resurrection.
___________________


Granbell's new challenge and Celia's revival
Granbell's power now has the power to control the entire universe, and with its overwhelming economic and military power, it has expanded beyond dimensions, trading with other galaxies and expanding its territory. However, the expansion was no longer monolithic, and new challenges were about to be faced.
As Celia quietly makes preparations in the Andromeda galaxy, signs of her resurrection gradually spread throughout the galaxy, and an era of instability returns. Celia's former subordinates and supporters believed in her return and were determined to build a new force to oppose Granbell and Evatron.

After Celia's fall from power, these words came as a surprise to many people as they looked back on her rule, and at the same time attracted strong praise. ___________________


Celia's legacy and signs of revival

Celia's goal was not only to restore its former glory, but also to once again control the future of the universe. No one knew whether her resurrection would spark another war or bring about a new peace. However, it was certain that the day when Celia would fight to regain what she had lost was finally drawing near.
Chapter 102: Failure and devastation of Evatron's rule of Dominion
After some time, Evatron's rule over the Dominion proved to be less smooth than expected. After Celia's downfall, Evatron began a new reign in her place, but the results were disappointing. Evatron's rule caused serious rifts in the social structure of the Dominion, causing different values ​​to clash.
First of all, Evatron's political and social values ​​greatly influenced Dominion's traditions and culture. Evatron was based on a male-dominated social structure and coercive governance methods, which conflicted with Dominion's liberal and inclusive culture. Dominion achieved economic prosperity during the Seria era and flourished as a society where diverse cultures coexisted, but under Evatron's rule, its freedom was restricted, creating great anxiety and friction throughout society.
In particular, Evatron's oppressive policies regarding women's rights and civil liberties gradually became a source of dissatisfaction among the residents. The citizens, who once enjoyed the freedom and equality established by Celia, strongly rebelled against Celia's overwhelming rule, and riots and protests gradually became more frequent. The government's response has always been militaristic, with security forces often taking heavy-handed measures in the city, and the city falling into disrepair day by day.
___________________


Riots and deterioration of public order

Celia lost control and ended up living in seclusion in a hideout in the Andromeda galaxy. However, even though Granbell and Evatron are making a name for themselves, Celia secretly works to start a new power so that her existence will not be forgotten.
In her hideout in the Andromeda Galaxy, Celia and her subordinates once again devised a plan to build military power and a commercial sphere, and began gathering resources. Celia's supporters believed that she would return to power and made the necessary preparations for that to happen. Although her actions were never carried out on a large scale, she was definitely gathering power and aiming for the day when she could once again build a mighty empire.
"I will return. My time is not yet over," Celia said quietly, preparing to rule the galaxy once again. Those words contained a strong determination to regain its former glory.
Celia's goal was clear: she planned the strategies necessary to regain control and ultimately gain the strength to stand up to powerful forces like Granbell and Evatron. The future may hold another war and change. However, Celia's heart is no longer in doubt, and a battle across the galaxy is about to begin once again, along with those who wish for her resurrection.
___________________


Granbell's new challenge and Celia's revival
Granbell's power now has the power to control the entire universe, and with its overwhelming economic and military power, it has expanded beyond dimensions, trading with other galaxies and expanding its territory. However, the expansion was no longer monolithic, and new challenges were about to be faced.
As Celia quietly makes preparations in the Andromeda galaxy, signs of her resurrection gradually spread throughout the galaxy, and an era of instability returns. Celia's former subordinates and supporters believed in her return and were determined to build a new force to oppose Granbell and Evatron.

As Evatron's coercive rule progresses, the deterioration of security has reached its peak. Evatron's new security structure in Dominion goes beyond normal police functions, with military-equipped troops cracking down on civilians. Indiscriminate repression continued, affecting not only rebels and protesters but also ordinary citizens.
These repressive measures led to urban devastation and social unrest. Street protests and riots occurred almost every day, cities were destroyed, and commercial facilities and public infrastructure were severely damaged one after another. The Evatron government tried to suppress the riots by force, but their methods only made the problem even more serious.
Under these circumstances, the increase in homelessness became a serious problem. The number of unemployed and poor people increased rapidly, and the Dominion's former central city became a slum where countless people were forced to live. The streets of the city were filled with people suffering from cold and hunger, and even the bare basics of life were lost. Evatron was busy responding to the situation and tried to take relief measures, but the situation worsened as the policy of prioritizing the military put support for people on the back burner.
Government officials on Evatron viewed the riots and deteriorating security as "temporary instability," but the reality far exceeded their expectations. The order and prosperity that the Dominion had built in the past rapidly crumbled, and the people's trust was completely lost. An ever-deeper rift formed between the ruling class and the citizens, and Evatron's security policies only fueled the backlash and riots.
___________________


Social disparity and economic collapse
During the Celia era, Dominion was known as one of the most prosperous civilizations in the universe. Although there was a gap between the rich and the poor, there was economic stability and social security, and many citizens enjoyed a prosperous life. However, as Evatron's rule continued, its economy collapsed and the disparity only widened.

Celia's goal was not only to restore its former glory, but also to once again control the future of the universe. No one knew whether her resurrection would spark another war or bring about a new peace. However, it was certain that the day when Celia would fight to regain what she had lost was finally drawing near.
Chapter 102: Failure and devastation of Evatron's rule of Dominion
After some time, Evatron's rule over the Dominion proved to be less smooth than expected. After Celia's downfall, Evatron began a new reign in her place, but the results were disappointing. Evatron's rule caused serious rifts in the social structure of the Dominion, causing different values ​​to clash.
First of all, Evatron's political and social values ​​greatly influenced Dominion's traditions and culture. Evatron was based on a male-dominated social structure and coercive governance methods, which conflicted with Dominion's liberal and inclusive culture. Dominion achieved economic prosperity during the Seria era and flourished as a society where diverse cultures coexisted, but under Evatron's rule, its freedom was restricted, creating great anxiety and friction throughout society.
In particular, Evatron's oppressive policies regarding women's rights and civil liberties gradually became a source of dissatisfaction among the residents. The citizens, who once enjoyed the freedom and equality established by Celia, strongly rebelled against Celia's overwhelming rule, and riots and protests gradually became more frequent. The government's response has always been militaristic, with security forces often taking heavy-handed measures in the city, and the city falling into disrepair day by day.
___________________


Riots and deterioration of public order

Evatron's policies were mostly focused on strengthening military and control, leaving the provision of necessities and basic infrastructure on the back burner, with the poor and working class being the most affected. While an excessive number of military forces were stationed in urban areas, basic support such as housing, education, and medical care was insufficient, and the poor were forced to live increasingly harsh lives.
Citizens who rebelled against this situation gradually banded together, and underground rebel organizations and secret societies became active in earnest. They began an armed struggle to overthrow Evatron's tyranny, and were steadily gaining support beneath the city. Amid growing economic disparity and social unrest, the flames of this rebellion grew stronger, and complete social collapse became a reality.
___________________


Urban transformation and cultural collapse
The Dominion's former glory is now a distant memory, and the city lies in ruins. The social diversity and cultural richness that Celia had established completely faded under Evatron's rule, and the values ​​of the people under her rule quickly became unified. Dominion's originally diverse culture became increasingly monotonous and rigid under the influence of Evatron's strictly male-dominated society.
The once free art and ideas were suppressed, and art and ideas based on Evatron's values ​​were forcibly spread. The town square was lined with statues and monuments praising Evatron, and the heritage and culture of the Seria era was gradually erased. Many intellectuals and cultural figures opposed these values ​​and developed underground movements, but these were also severely cracked down by the government.
Dominion has lost its once gorgeous cityscape and is now a deserted place. The smiles of the people disappeared, and the city was filled with the cold, mechanical rule of Evatron. The quality of life plummeted, and many people were forced to live in dissatisfaction and despair.
___________________


Memories of the Celia era and the light of the future

As Evatron's coercive rule progresses, the deterioration of security has reached its peak. Evatron's new security structure in Dominion goes beyond normal police functions, with military-equipped troops cracking down on civilians. Indiscriminate repression continued, affecting not only rebels and protesters but also ordinary citizens.
These repressive measures led to urban devastation and social unrest. Street protests and riots occurred almost every day, cities were destroyed, and commercial facilities and public infrastructure were severely damaged one after another. The Evatron government tried to suppress the riots by force, but their methods only made the problem even more serious.
Under these circumstances, the increase in homelessness became a serious problem. The number of unemployed and poor people increased rapidly, and the Dominion's former central city became a slum where countless people were forced to live. The streets of the city were filled with people suffering from cold and hunger, and even the bare basics of life were lost.
