___________________


Memories of the Celia era and the light of the future

As Dominion fell into disrepair under Evatron's rule, the memories of Celia's rule became a ray of hope for the Dominion's former residents. Her name is still a symbol to rebels and underground groups, and the memory of the order and prosperity she created will never fade.
The era of Celia's rule was passed down to future generations as a lost golden age. Those who had hope for the future continued to talk about how many people her ideas influenced and how ideal the cosmic order she aimed for was.
Celia is quietly trying to make a comeback in the Andromeda Galaxy, dreaming of the day she will regain control. However, in the future, a conflict with Evatron and Granbell awaits, and there are signs that a new battle will begin.
Chapter 103: Celia's counterattack and the upheaval in the Andromeda galaxy
Celia was living a quiet life when suddenly loyal subordinates of her former Ronan Ursa flocked to her. Celia lives a humble life in a safe haven in the Andromeda galaxy, but as she attempts to rebuild the Dominion she once ruled over, a most unexpected enemy emerges.
Ronan's men are secretly plotting Celia's death. Once loyal soldiers of Ronan, they set out to carry out a plan to assassinate Celia. The movement is rapid, and an army of assassins secretly infiltrates the asteroid system in the Andromeda galaxy where Celia is hiding.
Celia was able to read the enemy's movements based on the experience she gained in the battle with Ronan. However, by the time their plan was put into motion, they were already ready to corner her. Celia's hideout was thought to be in an obscure location, but Ronan's men now have full knowledge of its location and decide to put their plan into action.
___________________


Andromeda galaxy anomaly

As they approached Celia's hideout, an abnormal energy wave surged through the Andromeda galaxy. An abnormal dimensional distortion appeared in the asteroid system, which was supposed to be empty, and the surrounding space instantly shook violently. It was as if a dimensional rift had opened, and an anomaly occurred around the Andromeda galaxy.
"This..." Celia's eyes widened and she felt the shock. She immediately sensed a dimensional energy anomaly and understood what it meant. Just as Ronan's men put their plan into action to kill her again, they invaded with transdimensional power. Celia didn't stand still and immediately took action.
Amidst the anomaly spreading throughout the Andromeda Galaxy, Celia calmly entered into a battle stance, using her former abilities to the fullest to capture the enemy's movements.
___________________


Celia's battle
Ronan's subordinate army possessed strong fighting power and advanced assassination techniques. They set up a complete siege around Celia's hideout, and combat troops and assassin squads closed in and surrounded Celia. Troops suddenly appeared from the darkness, armed with sharp weapons, and launched attacks one after another.
However, Celia is not just a ruler. She reacted instantly and released a dimensional energy that distorted space on the spot. Manipulating the space around her, she obliterates multiple attackers at once.
"I don't think this is the end," Celia's voice sounded cold.
The waves of dimensional energy emitted from Celia's body destroyed the powerful attacks of Ronan's subordinates, neutralizing all of their attacks. However, Ronan's men remain calm and dodge Celia's counterattack energy one after another, eventually challenging them to close-range combat.
Celia quickly changed her fighting stance and controlled the flow of battle within the dimension. By manipulating space itself, he can evade any attack Ronan's subordinates launch and instantly counterattack. Her fighting ability exceeded that of her former prime, and she was also skilled in handling dimensional energy.

Several of his subordinates were defeated one after another until the last unit leader was left. He tried to fight on equal terms with Celia, but Celia's overwhelming power pushed him down and his strength was diminished in the blink of an eye. In the end, the unit commander was completely incapacitated, and the battle came to an end.
However, Celia never let her guard down. The moment her battle ends, I sense another abnormal energy.
___________________


Attack of Evatron's troops
Before Celia had time to catch her breath, a new wave of battle suddenly attacked. She sensed a heavy military pressure that was different from the movements of Ronan's subordinates that she had defeated.
"Again..." Celia muttered coldly and began to gather dimensional energy again.
At that moment, Evatron's forces arrived at their hideout in the Andromeda galaxy. Evatron established control over Dominion and continued to monitor Celia's movements, but was wary of her comeback. Evatron decided that Celia should be completely eliminated before she regained her powers.
Celia's hideout was surrounded by Evatron's special forces, who used advanced combat techniques and dimensional energy to completely eliminate Celia. Unlike Ronan's men, Evatron's troops moved calmly and methodically, and began to surround Seria with overwhelming numbers and technology.
"There's no escape now." Celia smiled and murmured those words coldly. She began the battle by making the most of her dimensional waves and distorting the space around her.
Evatron's troops cleverly corner Celia, but Celia dodges their attacks and takes advantage of the opportunity to counterattack. Dimensional energy shook space, and a battle unfolded that twisted space and time. Celia's movements were fast, as if she were manipulating time, and she destroyed the enemies around her one after another.
However, Evatron's troops were large in number, and reinforcements were sent in one after another. Celia's battles gradually became tougher, and her energy was depleted. No matter how powerful Evatron's forces were, they were no match for Celia's coldness and fighting ability, and she was able to deftly get through the situation.

However, as it gradually becomes clear how powerful Evatron's control and military power is, Celia is once again forced to make a big choice.
Chapter 104: Collapse of Dominion rule and devastation of E16 system
Several years have passed since the Dominion's rule collapsed, and the situation continues to worsen. The glory of the mighty empire that Celia once built is now a thing of the past, and Evatron's rule is increasing its influence. Due to Evatron's military interference and economic pressure, Dominion's GDP had fallen to $1.8 quintillion, and it had completely lost its former prosperity.
This rapid economic decline was due not only to Evatron's increasing control, but also to internal rebellion and social instability. The backlash against Evatron's oppressive policies grows day by day, and riots and protests within the city have become the norm. The Dominion, which was originally a prosperous place with a diverse and free culture, gradually turned into a desolate place.
People suffered from extreme poverty, and the gap between the working class and the wealthy reached historic proportions. The once vibrant city is now filled with countless homeless people and nothing remains of its former glory. The streets of the city were in ruins, the huge infrastructure and public facilities that had existed during the Seria era were gradually crumbling, and Dominion was being torn apart both physically and socially.
___________________


Devastation and disappearance of the E16 series
Additionally, Dominion was forced to relinquish control of the E16 series. The E16 system once played an important role in commerce and culture as an outer region of the Dominion, but due to the loss of economic control and pressure from Evatron, the region gradually fell into disrepair. Several important planets in the E16 system were completely absorbed by Evatron, and their trade routes and commercial areas were completely controlled.

The devastation of the E16 series was not just physical destruction, but also serious cultural and social decline. What was once a vibrant city, educational institution, and art hub has been transformed into an inorganic world uniformly controlled by Evatron's policies. The voices of opposition were gradually silenced, and the original inhabitants were forced to submit to domination and oppression.
As a result, the E16 series was separated from Dominion and fell into disrepair under Evatron's control. Cities were devastated, resources were depleted, and technological innovation halted. The former prosperity passed away like a phantom, and the planets of the E16 system faded into shadow, and within a few generations, their existence was almost forgotten.
___________________


Order to attack Celia again
As Evatron's control tightened and the Dominion disintegrated, Celia continued to hold sway. Celia, who had been hiding in the Andromeda Galaxy in order to regain her former control, still had many supporters left. However, Evatron did not tolerate its existence and once again began a large-scale military campaign aimed at eradicating Seria.
Evatron's leadership decided to once again send combat troops to the surrounding area in order to completely eliminate the possibility of Celia rising again. Evatron, fearing that Celia's activities will once again become an entity that shakes the order of the universe, decides to send in state-of-the-art special forces and ultra-high-performance mobile forces to prevent her movements from expanding.
"Our rule is incomplete until Celia is completely eliminated," the Evatron leaders said, ordering Celia's assassination.
___________________


Celia's battle preparations
Celia began preparing for battle against Evatron's forces that were approaching her once again. Although she no longer had the power to rule an entire empire that she once had, she remained an expert in combat and her ability to harness dimensional energy remained undiminished.

From her hideout in the Andromeda Galaxy, Celia coldly analyzed her surroundings and prepared for the first attack. She once again focused on using waves of dimensional energy to dominate the battlespace, drawing on her past experience to prepare for the arrival of Evatron's forces.
"I will never back down. If I have the strength to pull back, I will definitely fight through." Celia made a strong determination and prepared to bring out her full potential.
___________________


Attack of Evatron troops and fierce battle
A few days later, Evatron's forces arrive in the Andromeda Galaxy, and they sense that they are approaching Celia's hideout. Celia had made all the preparations and was already on standby for the attack. As Evatron's forces approached, they prepared to manipulate dimensional energy to warp space and shake it beneath their feet.
At the moment the first blow was fired, a wave of dimensional energy shook the space of the Andromeda Galaxy, and a shockwave spread. Evatron's special forces immediately surround Celia's hideout and launch an attack. However, Celia instantly reacts to his movements and controls the pace of the battle within the dimension. The surrounding space became distorted, and Evatron's soldiers fell into the trap set by Celia one after another.
"Come, I'm ready to attack," Celia declared coldly, her appearance as poised as a battle machine.
One by one, Evatron's soldiers fall under Celia's counterattack, but their numbers are enormous, and the number of soldiers surrounding her increases rapidly. Celia continues to calmly counterattack, eliminating large numbers of enemy forces one after another, but her energy finally reaches its limit, and as the battle drags on, she gradually begins to show fatigue.
At that time, Evatron's troops brought in new forces. It was Evatron's most elite unit, a special force specializing in interdimensional combat. Celia used all her strength to fight against that powerful attack, drawing out even more dimensional energy.

However, the number of Evatron troops is overwhelming, and Celia alone has reached her limit. Gradually, the war situation becomes unfavorable to her, and the war eventually becomes such that her presence spreads throughout the universe.
Chapter 105: Celia’s end and the end of the battle
A long month has passed, and during that time Evatron's onslaught against Celia has not stopped. Evatron's forces sent hundreds of thousands of troops to the asteroid system in the Andromeda galaxy that she had chosen as her hideout, and used dimensional weapons and cutting-edge combat techniques to completely corner Celia.
During that time, Celia continued to fight, using all kinds of tactics to hold out and demonstrating her ability to manipulate dimensional energy to the fullest. However, no matter how much power he used, he gradually began to see its limits in front of Evatron's overwhelming military strength and tactics.
___________________


Evatron's constant attack
Evatron's combat forces constantly increased their strength and continued to surround Seria. For the first few days, Celia managed to survive with her clever tactics, but the pace gradually slowed down and Evatron's soldiers closed in on Celia with overwhelming force.
Just like in her former heyday, Celia freely manipulated dimensional energy, distorted space to evade attacks, and continued to defeat her enemies. However, as time passed, the dimensional energy that was the source of her power became more and more depleted, and her physical strength gradually diminished. Celia was acutely aware of this. She tried to recover many times and continued to fight, mustering all her strength, but the battle situation gradually turned against her.
In addition, while Celia fought alone, Evatron's troops continued to attack using highly controlled group tactics, suppressing Celia's counterattacks one after another. In front of these advanced weapons and tactics, Celia's abilities gradually became ineffective. She fought to the death and tried to fight back with all her strength, but Evatron's fighting force used all of its strength to close in on her without missing a single gap.
___________________


Celia exhausted

After fighting without rest for a month, Celia gradually used up her energy and finally ran out of strength. In the past, she would have stood up and defeated her enemies. However, this time he exceeded that limit.
In the final battle, Celia was finally surrounded by Evatron's most elite forces, and her overuse of dimensional energy finally defeated her. The energy emitted from her body was no longer strong enough to manipulate dimensions, and her body began to collapse due to the recoil. There was no longer any power left to regenerate.
"That's all..." Celia muttered, mustering the last of her strength. Her eyes held a mixture of cold determination and resignation. She once ruled the universe, and as a being who changed the future, she defeated many enemies. However, even with all his might, he was unable to defeat this large army.
For a moment, Celia's eyes darkened and she slowly fell to her knees. At that moment, Evatron's soldiers silently surrounded her and witnessed her death.
___________________


Celia's death and its impact
Celia's death shocked the entire universe. The fact that the person who once ruled the Dominion was defeated by the power of Evatron made a deep impression on many across the universe. Celia's name, as well as her glory, will be passed down even after her death.
Evatron was able to completely eliminate Celia and further solidify its control, but the effects of the war and devastating battles were immeasurable. After witnessing Celia's death, the rebels and underground organizations strengthened their resolve to continue a new battle with Celia's ideals in their hearts.
After Celia's death, her name was passed down as a hero and became a symbol of rebellion. Celia's legacy in Dominion did not disappear even under Evatron's rule. The rebels vowed to carry on Celia's will and continue to fight, passing it on to subsequent generations.
___________________


Evatron's victory and the future that lies ahead

Celia's death meant a complete victory for Evatron, but it did not guarantee long-term dominance. By defeating Celia, Evatron established its power, but on the other hand, there was no doubt that the influence she left behind would become a great test for Evatron as well.
While the leaders of Evatron celebrated Celia's death, they feared the vast vacuum her presence would leave and the unpredictable rebellion that would follow. The underground faction bearing the name of Celia has gradually become more active, and signs of a new revolution are once again beginning to appear throughout the galaxy.
From the day Evatron won, the seeds of the next war continued to smolder, and the history of the universe once again entered a new era.
Chapter 106: Impact on the Earth and Trends of the Great Union
While Celia's name continues to be passed down throughout the universe even after her death, her existence is gradually beginning to be recognized on Earth. A powerful force called Celia Dominicus, who once ruled the universe, and Evatron, who defeated her. As soon as the name reached Earth, it quickly became a rumor among Earthlings, and people began to discuss how alien wars would affect Earth.
At this point, Earth was already ruled by a huge nation called the Great Union. This nation became a major power in the galaxy centered on Earth during the War of the Worlds, and controlled diplomacy and trade with other star systems. However, as they conquered Earth and continued to live in a stable era, the Great Union gradually became wary of information from outside that threatened their existence.
Following Celia's death and the birth of the gigantic power known as Evatron, the upper echelons of the Great Union gradually began to pay attention to interplanetary movements. In particular, he becomes interested in the wars being waged in distant galaxies. Behind this war are the rapid growth of the Granbell planetary system and the collapse of the Apollo civilization, and the Great Union has no choice but to pay attention to these trends.
___________________


Great Union strategy and intergalactic competition

The Great Union aimed to dominate the galaxy, with Earth at its center, but its area of ​​control was limited. After several decades of peace, a new force called Evatron suddenly emerged, greatly shaking up the Great Union's diplomatic strategy. Evatron's control expanded rapidly, and his power gained power after the fall of the Dominion, now making its name known throughout the universe.
For this reason, the Great Union avoided contact with Evatron and carefully monitored its movements, gradually making preparations for intervention in a war in a faraway galaxy. The leaders of the Great Union were increasingly aware of Celia's death and the subsequent domination of Evatron, and were concerned about the impact it would have on Earth.
"Evatron is sweeping the universe. We can't let it go any longer," said Azel Dalt, Supreme Leader of the Great Union. His words contained a deep sense of crisis, and he immediately gave instructions to prepare for war. Azel decided to actively intervene in order to protect the territory of the Great Union, including Earth, and to counter the threat from Evatron.
As a result, the Great Union secretly began developing a number of military strategies to counter Evatron's expansion. They first explored the possibility of cooperating with other powerful forces, such as the Granbell planetary system and the Apollo civilization, and made preparations to form an anti-Evatron alliance.
___________________


The beginning of contact between Evatron and the Great Union
The Great Union was sensitive to the political and economic implications of Evatron's expansion, and monitored it to maintain the balance of power in the universe. However, the situation developed in an unexpected direction. Evatron gradually began to make contact with the Great Union, backed by its overwhelming military power. At first, the relationship between the two was fraught with tension, but over time they began to seek direct dialogue.

Evatron's emissary arrived on Earth several weeks after the leaders of the Great Union decided to hold a meeting. The Emissary was a diplomat from Evatron, sent to attempt to negotiate with the Great Union in order to establish a new order on a cosmic scale. His goal was to either form a direct alliance with the Great Union or incorporate Earth into a galaxy controlled by Evatron.
"It will be in your interest to bring Earth into our sphere of influence," the messenger said coldly. His words placed strong pressure on the Great Union's leadership, forcing them into a moment of decision.
The leaders of the Great Union decided to proceed with caution in negotiations with Evatron, first using diplomatic means to find out its intentions. Azel Dalt understood how much the future of Earth would be affected by the success of this negotiation.
___________________


Great Union War Preparations
Meanwhile, the Great Union was making its own military preparations. They continued to prepare for war, preparing to confront Evatron directly and exploring the possibility of forming an alliance. They secretly formed a high-performance battle fleet and continued to strengthen military bases spread across the galaxy.
In order to protect the territory under its control, the Great Union established a thorough military defense network and attempted to prevent the expansion of Evatron. In particular, they made full use of dimensional weapons and quantum shield technology, and tried to determine how Evatron would respond to these weapons. Preparations for war progressed at a rapid pace, and the entire galaxy began to show signs of great upheaval once again.
___________________


Approach and conflict between Evatron and Great Union
As time passed, the relationship between Evatron and the Great Union evolved step by step, becoming increasingly tense and close. The Great Union's leadership was unable to ignore the immense power of Evatron, and was struggling with the choice of whether to form an alliance with them or launch an all-out showdown to stop them.

Evatron's emissary arrived on Earth several weeks after the leaders of the Great Union decided to hold a meeting. The Emissary was a diplomat from Evatron, sent to attempt to negotiate with the Great Union in order to establish a new order on a cosmic scale. His goal was to either form a direct alliance with the Great Union or incorporate Earth into a galaxy controlled by Evatron.
"It will be in your interest to bring Earth into our sphere of influence," the messenger said coldly. His words placed strong pressure on the Great Union's leadership, forcing them into a moment of decision.
The leaders of the Great Union decided to proceed with caution in negotiations with Evatron, first using diplomatic means to find out its intentions. Azel Dalt understood how much the future of Earth would be affected by the success of this negotiation.
___________________


Great Union War Preparations

In particular, they made full use of dimensional weapons and quantum shield technology, and tried to determine how Evatron would respond to these weapons. Preparations for war progressed at a rapid pace, and the entire galaxy began to show signs of great upheaval once again.
___________________


Approach and conflict between Evatron and Great Union
As time passed, the relationship between Evatron and the Great Union evolved step by step, becoming increasingly tense and close. The Great Union's leadership was unable to ignore the immense power of Evatron, and was struggling with the choice of whether to form an alliance with them or launch an all-out showdown to stop them.

Evatron's messengers often visited Earth and spoke of the possibility of joint rule and cultural exchange with the Great Union. However, while the leaders of the Great Union probed Evatron's true intentions, they also strengthened their military power to counter the negotiations.
Gradually, Earth's policies were forced to make a major choice, and the answer to whether it was war or peace became an important question for the future of the galaxy.
What path will Great Union choose in the future? And will war with Evatron become a reality, or will a new power relationship be formed for supremacy in the galaxy? The outcome was sure to become a major turning point in history, both for Earth and for the entire universe.
 There is a tremendous amount of history that occurred in the distant E16 series. The Great Union is the rise and fall of the E16 system, from the war started by Alpha Cain against the existing controlling company ZAMLT, to Alpha Cain's temporary unification of Gigapolis, to the transfer of power to Celia, from there the conflict between Celia and Alpha Cain, and Alpha's defeat. North and Execution, the Golden Age led by Selia as Selinopolis, becoming the second most prosperous civilization in the universe, and the war with Apollo after being renamed Dominion, the Dominion destroyed by Apollo and ruled by Evatron was positioned as the universe's version of the Roman Empire. Currently, the E16 capital "Evapolis (formerly Dominion)" is in ruins.
Chapter 107: History of the E16 series and the collapse of Evapolis
The history that occurred in the E16 system was one of the most turbulent and dramatic events in the history of the universe, and the glory and decline of Dominion (later Selinopolis and Evapolis), which was at the center of it, had a tremendous impact on the entire universe. The Great Union had a keen interest in the history of the E16 series, and had a deep understanding of the significance of its rise, decline, and eventual collapse.

Chapter 107: History of the E16 series and the collapse of Evapolis
The history that occurred in the E16 system was one of the most turbulent and dramatic events in the history of the universe, and the glory and decline of Dominion (later Selinopolis and Evapolis), which was at the center of it, had a tremendous impact on the entire universe. The Great Union had a keen interest in the history of the E16 series, and had a deep understanding of the significance of its rise, decline, and eventual collapse.
War between Alpha Cain and ZAMLT

The story of the E16 series begins with a war against a giant corporate alliance called ZAMLT (Zebra, Aloe Oil, Mammon, Lrenz, and Tronics) led by Alpha Cain. Alpha Cain aimed to unify Gigapolis (later Selinopolis), which he had built for many years, and started a fierce war with ZAMLT in order to break down the existing corporate control structure. The war ended with Alpha's success, and he briefly assumed control of Gigapolis as its unifier.
Under Alpha's rule, Gigapolis briefly prospered, experiencing economic prosperity and cultural innovation, and his name became widely known. However, Alpha's rule did not last long, and a new leader named Celia gradually rose to power. Celia succeeded in overthrowing Alpha's power and seizing control of Gigapolis, and subsequently established a new golden age of civilization as Selinopolis.
The conflict between Celia and Alpha and Celia's golden age
Celia came to the end of her time ruling with Alpha and built Selinopolis based on her own vision. Her rule was accompanied by economic prosperity, social reforms, and diplomatic success. Selinopolis became the second most prosperous civilization in the universe and established itself as the center of the space economy.
However, the relationship between Celia and Alpha Cain gradually deteriorated, and power struggles and conflicts continued. Ultimately, Alpha Cain's defeat and execution was decisive, and Celia continued to hold her position as ruler of Gigapolis and later as leader of Selinopolis.
Under Selia's rule, Selinopolis entered a golden age, and its civilization enjoyed unprecedented prosperity. There were breakthroughs in commerce, culture, science and technology, and Celia's name was celebrated throughout the universe. However, Celia's rule was not eternal, and the war with Apollo that followed changed its future greatly.
The war with Apollo and the evolution of the Dominion

The war with Apollo was an event that fundamentally changed the fate of Selinopolis. Selinopolis, led by Celia, was completely defeated by the power of the Apollo civilization, and Selinopolis was finally renamed Dominion and brought under Apollo's control. This war, along with the struggle for supremacy in space, gradually became a factor that greatly changed the balance of power throughout the universe.
However, even after Dominion was taken over by Apollo, the spirit of Dominion and Celia's legacy never disappeared. Even under Apollo's control, the Dominion's culture and economic base remained intact, and Evatron later intervened, eventually placing the Dominion under Evatron's rule.
At this point, the Dominion became something of a cosmic version of the Roman Empire, and its former prosperity and glory became a major challenge for subsequent rulers.
Desolation of Evapolis
Evapolis (formerly Dominion), the capital of the Dominion, is now in complete ruin. The city, which once flourished as the center of the space economy and was responsible for many commercial and cultural exchanges, is now an uninhabited ruin.
Evapolis was once a symbol of prosperity and the glory of their civilization built by Celia and Alpha. However, due to the war with Apollo, the rule by Evatron, and subsequent wars, the city gradually fell into ruin. Several attempts were made to rebuild, but each time was met with external pressure, internal revolt, and economic collapse, ultimately failing to maintain its status.
Evapolis is surrounded by ruined buildings and once-prosperous commercial complexes, giving it the feel of a dead city. It has completely lost its former vibrancy, and fewer people now know its name.

The war with Apollo was an event that fundamentally changed the fate of Selinopolis. Selinopolis, led by Celia, was completely defeated by the power of the Apollo civilization, and Selinopolis was finally renamed Dominion and brought under Apollo's control. This war, along with the struggle for supremacy in space, gradually became a factor that greatly changed the balance of power throughout the universe.
However, even after Dominion was taken over by Apollo, the spirit of Dominion and Celia's legacy never disappeared. Even under Apollo's control, the Dominion's culture and economic base remained intact, and Evatron later intervened, eventually placing the Dominion under Evatron's rule.
At this point, the Dominion became something of a cosmic version of the Roman Empire, and its former prosperity and glory became a major challenge for subsequent rulers.
Desolation of Evapolis
Evapolis (formerly Dominion), the capital of the Dominion, is now in complete ruin. The city, which once flourished as the center of the space economy and was responsible for many commercial and cultural exchanges, is now an uninhabited ruin.
Evapolis was once a symbol of prosperity and the glory of their civilization built by Celia and Alpha. Evapolis is surrounded by ruined buildings and once-prosperous commercial complexes, giving it the feel of a dead city. It has completely lost its former vibrancy, and fewer people now know its name.

The devastation of Evapolis did not simply mean the collapse of the city, but an event that symbolized the decline of the E16 system as a whole. The Dominion, once the largest civilization in the universe, was ruled by the power of Apollo and Evatron, and eventually lost its culture and prosperity.
___________________


The future of the E16 series and new hope
However, with the devastation of Evapolis, new signs of hope are beginning to appear for the E16 series. In order to restore former glory and carry on Celia's legacy, rebels and new symbols of revolution who were active underground are beginning to make a name for themselves.
Among them were many who believed in the former Dominion's ideals, and based on Seria's ideals, they fought once again to liberate the E16 series. Believing that they could regain their former glory, they secretly gathered power and tried to build a new power.
Amidst the ruins of Evapolis, we gather together the remnants of our former glory, unsure of what the future holds. The spirit of Dominion never died, and its name and ideals became a permanent symbol for those who once again sought to rule the universe.
Will the E16 series be able to regain its former prosperity, or will a new force emerge? The future is still unknown, and no one knows what kind of changes will occur in the future. Still, Celia's name may once again shape the next era as a presence that shakes the universe.
Chapter 108: Those who inherit Celia's will
Decades have passed since Celia Dominicus' death. Her name echoed throughout the universe, and was deeply engraved in history as a symbol of the Dominion's former prosperity and subsequent decline. However, that philosophy and will never became a thing of the past. The foundation of civilization that Celia built and the ideas she left behind still live on in the hearts of many people.

The devastation of Evapolis did not simply mean the collapse of the city, but an event that symbolized the decline of the E16 system as a whole. The Dominion, once the largest civilization in the universe, was ruled by the power of Apollo and Evatron, and eventually lost its culture and prosperity.

Chapter 108: Those who inherit Celia's will
Decades have passed since Celia Dominicus' death. Her name echoed throughout the universe, and was deeply engraved in history as a symbol of the Dominion's former prosperity and subsequent decline. However, that philosophy and will never became a thing of the past. The foundation of civilization that Celia built and the ideas she left behind still live on in the hearts of many people.

In the ruins of the former Evapolis (formerly Dominion), a movement has secretly begun to raise her name and once again spread her ideas throughout the universe. It wasn't just a rebellion. It was a movement to regain the freedom, prosperity, and equality that Celia had dreamed of, and at the center of it were those who would inherit her will.
___________________


Hope sprouting underground
As the E16 series continued to fall into disrepair, those who knew the former Dominion came together in secret and began a movement to rebuild Seria's ideals. This movement was born to counter Evatron's tyranny that continued even after Celia's death, and was promoted by those who wanted to spread the ideas Celia left behind once again.
At the center of the movement were a small number of loyal subordinates who once served Celia, as well as intellectuals who continued to believe in the culture and values ​​of the Dominion era. They formed the underground organization ``Therians'', named after Celia, and expanded their activities throughout the galaxy. Therians' mission was clear.
      * To revive Celia's ideals.
      * To break the control of Evatron and regain the freedom of the E16 system.
      * To establish a new order throughout the universe.
"Celia's will lives on. We must never forget the ideals she left behind," said Verna Kailas, leader of the Cerians. She had previously worked under Celia as a diplomat for the Dominion, and used her knowledge and influence to expand the movement.
___________________


Therians’ Growth and Influence
Therians' activities gradually expanded and began to affect not only the entire E16 system, but also other galaxies. Through their underground activities, they sought to undermine Evatron's control and restore the Dominion's culture and values. Their activities gradually involved people around them and developed into a large-scale movement.
      * In the ruins of Evapolis, a gathering was held to commemorate the former Dominion, and voices rang out in praise of Celia's name.

In the ruins of the former Evapolis (formerly Dominion), a movement has secretly begun to raise her name and once again spread her ideas throughout the universe. It wasn't just a rebellion. It was a movement to regain the freedom, prosperity, and equality that Celia had dreamed of, and at the center of it were those who would inherit her will.

___________________


Therians’ Growth and Influence
Therians' activities gradually expanded and began to affect not only the entire E16 system, but other galaxies as well. Through their underground activities, they sought to undermine Evatron's control and restore the Dominion's culture and values. Their activities gradually involved people around them and developed into a large-scale movement.
      * In the ruins of Evapolis, a gathering was held to commemorate the former Dominion, and voices rang out in praise of Celia's name.

* In the E16 system of planets, new educational and cultural activities based on Celia's ideals are spreading, and attempts are underway to pass on these values ​​to the next generation.
      * In the neighboring galaxy, the Therians movement gradually gained support, and opposition to Evatron's tyranny grew.
The Serians were more than just a rebel force. They are proceeding with a plan to build a new order based on Celia's ideals, and it is not just a war, but a grand attempt to change the future of the entire universe.
___________________


A new leader emerges
As the activities of the Serians expanded, a new leader emerged to represent the movement. His name is Elios Wald. He was a scientist who once worked in Dominion's technology development department, and remained true to Celia's principles even after Celia's death.
As the leader of Therians, Elios used his skills and knowledge to take the movement to the next level. He developed a new technology based on Celia's legacy and proceeded with a plan to use it as a weapon against Evatron.
"The idea of ​​Celia is not dead. The power to make it a reality is still in our hands," Elios said, leading the Celians to liberate areas under Evatron's control one after another.
Under Elios' leadership, Therians gradually expanded their influence, eventually extending their influence to the heart of the E16 system. Elios' vision was not just a rebellion, but to return the entire E16 series to its glory days.
___________________


Confrontation with Evatron
As Therians' activities expanded, Evatron began to recognize the threat. Evatron's leadership saw the Therians as the greatest threat to Dominion's control and began a plan to eliminate them once and for all.
Evatron mobilized dimensional weapons and new type combat units and attacked the Serians' bases one after another. However, under the leadership of Elios, Therians withstood Evatron's attack, and on the contrary, their power was whittled away.

* In the E16 system of planets, new educational and cultural activities based on Celia's ideals are spreading, and attempts are underway to pass on these values ​​to the next generation.
      * In the neighboring galaxy, the Therians movement gradually gained support, and opposition to Evatron's tyranny grew.
The Serians were more than just a rebel force. They are proceeding with a plan to build a new order based on Celia's ideals, and it is not just a war, but a grand attempt to change the future of the entire universe.
___________________


A new leader emerges
As the activities of the Serians expanded, a new leader emerged to represent the movement. His name is Elios Wald. He was a scientist who once worked in Dominion's technology development department, and remained true to Celia's principles even after Celia's death.
As the leader of Therians, Elios used his skills and knowledge to take the movement to the next level. He developed a new technology based on Celia's legacy and proceeded with a plan to use it as a weapon against Evatron.
"The idea of ​​Celia is not dead. The power to make it a reality is still in our hands," Elios said, leading the Celians to liberate areas under Evatron's control one after another.
Under Elios' leadership, Therians gradually expanded their influence, eventually extending their influence to the heart of the E16 system. Elios' vision was not just a rebellion, but to return the entire E16 series to its glory days.
___________________


Confrontation with Evatron
As Therians' activities expanded, Evatron began to recognize the threat. Evatron's leadership saw the Therians as the greatest threat to Dominion's control and began a plan to eliminate them once and for all.
Evatron mobilized dimensional weapons and new type combat units and attacked the Serians' bases one after another. However, under the leadership of Elios, Therians withstood Evatron's attack, and on the contrary, their power was whittled away.

"We are fighting to protect the Seria ideals. We will never give in," Elios said, continuing to inspire the Seria members.
The battle intensified and developed into a large-scale conflict involving the entire E16 series. Evatron did everything in its power to maintain its dominance, but the Therians' ideals and the power of those who supported them gradually undermined Evatron's power.
___________________


The future of Therians and the new order of the universe
The Therians movement was more than just a rebellion, it was developing as a revolution to establish a new order in the universe. Their activities had an impact not only on the E16 system, but also on other galaxies, and there were signs that Celia's ideals were once again spreading throughout the universe.
Elios and his allies fought to restore Dominion's former glory, but that was not all. They aimed to build a new civilization based on Celia's ideals. It envisioned a new future that would surpass the glory of the past and pursue freedom, equality, and prosperity.
``Celia's will lives within us. Our mission is to pass it on to the next generation.'' Elios' words resonated in the hearts of many people.
Chapter 109: Evatron vs Therians: End of the conflict
The battle between Evatron and the rebel force Therians, which took place on the E16 series, became a fierce conflict that will go down in the history of the universe. The Cerians, who stood up to oppose Evatron's rule and protect Celia's ideals, expanded their power in a short period of time and became influential enough to cause a crack in Evatron's rule. However, its growth and repulsion eventually led to an all-out conflict on a galactic scale.
Evatron decided to do everything in his power to completely suppress this rebellion and solidify his rule. In the midst of this, Granbell, which boasts the largest economy in the universe, announces its support for Evatron, which will decisively change the course of the war.
___________________

Chapter 109: Evatron vs Therians: End of the conflict
The battle between Evatron and the rebel force Therians, which took place on the E16 series, became a fierce conflict that will go down in the history of the universe. The Cerians, who stood up to oppose Evatron's rule and protect Celia's ideals, expanded their power in a short period of time and became influential enough to cause a crack in Evatron's rule. However, its growth and repulsion eventually led to an all-out conflict on a galactic scale.
Evatron decided to do everything in his power to completely suppress this rebellion and solidify his rule. In the midst of this, Granbell, which boasts the largest economy in the universe, announces its support for Evatron, which will decisively change the course of the war.
___________________


Granbell's weapon supply

Granbell was the centerpiece of the current space economy, second only to the era when the Dominion led by Celia boasted prosperity in space. Its total GDP exceeded 1.5 quintillion dollars, overwhelmingly exceeding the scale of the economy of other galaxies. Granbell remained ostensibly neutral, but agreed to provide state-of-the-art weapon technology to Evatron's war plans.
Granbell provided high-dimensional energy weapons, quantum-controlled missile systems, and most deadly of all, the Gravity Collapse Warhead. These weapons had the ability to cause dimensional distortion and have devastating effects over large areas.
Evatron planned to use these weapons to destroy the Therians' bases one after another and whittle away their influence. Thanks to Granbell's technical support, Evatron's military power was strengthened to an unprecedented level, and the tide of the war suddenly turned in Evatron's favor.
___________________


Therians' resistance and the deterioration of the war situation
On the other hand, the Celians were far inferior to Evatron in military power, but they advocated Celia's ideals and struggled to protect her will. Elios Wald, the leader of the Serians, bravely stood up against the Evatron army that attacked one after another, and continued to resist using guerrilla tactics.
The Cerians achieved temporary victories in local battles and surprise attacks targeting Evatron's bases, but as Evatron began to deploy weapons provided by Granbell in earnest, their inferiority gradually became clear.
Weapons made by Granbell destroyed the defense bases and hideouts built by the Serians one after another, greatly reducing their combat power. In particular, when the gravity collapse warhead was released, the Selians' forces suffered severe damage, and one of their main bases, Elios Base, was completely destroyed. This attack was a fatal blow to the Serians and drastically changed the course of the war.
___________________


Stage of decisive battle: Ruins of Evapolis

Granbell was the centerpiece of the current space economy, second only to the era when the Dominion led by Celia boasted prosperity in space. ___________________


Stage of decisive battle: Ruins of Evapolis

In the end, the battle between Evatron and Therians came to a final battle in the ruins of Evapolis (former Dominion capital), which once symbolized the glory of the Dominion. This place was a city that symbolized the golden age built by Celia, and was the last stronghold for the Cerians.
Evatron mobilized overwhelming military force and technology and launched an all-out attack on Evapolis. Hundreds of thousands of soldiers and cutting-edge weapons were deployed, and a fierce battle took place in the ruined city.
Meanwhile, the Serians mobilized all of their limited military strength and continued their resistance to the end. Led by Elios Wald, they fought hard to protect Celia's ideals, but their resistance gradually reached its limit in the face of Evatron's overwhelming offensive power.
The battle lasted for several weeks, and the entire city of Evapolis was once again engulfed in flames and left in ruins. Therians' soldiers fell one by one, and eventually the main leaders, including Elios, were captured, and the Selians' resistance came to a complete end.
___________________


Domination of the Cerians and victory of Evatron
After the Cerians were completely subdued, Evatron declared its victory. Major members of Therians, including Elios Valt, were publicly executed in the central plaza of Evapolis, and the scene was broadcast across the universe. This execution was a demonstration of Evatron's overwhelming control, and also signified the complete end of the Cerians' rebellion.
With this victory, the leaders of Evatron declared complete control over the E16 series, and once again proceeded with policies to strengthen their control. However, the cost of this victory was high. The entire E16 series, centered around Evapolis, was further devastated by the war and had completely collapsed economically and socially.
___________________


The future of Celia's philosophy

In the end, the battle between Evatron and Therians came to a final battle in the ruins of Evapolis (former Dominion capital), which once symbolized the glory of the Dominion. This place was a city that symbolized the golden age built by Celia, and was the last stronghold for the Cerians.

___________________


The future of Celia's philosophy

Even after the Cerians were conquered and Evatron was victorious, Celia's name and her ideals never completely disappeared. A monument bearing Celia's name was secretly erected in the ruins of Evapolis, and continued to be guarded by those who believed in her cause.
In addition, the remnants of the Cerians continued their underground activities and developed a movement to pass on the Celia's ideals to the next generation. No matter how strong Evatron's control was, the ideals built by Celia could not be completely erased.
___________________


Towards a new order of the universe
Evatron's victory and the control of the Cerians meant the beginning of a new era for the E16 series as a whole. However, what this victory brought about was not complete domination, but deepening social divisions and economic turmoil. The future of the E16 series remained uncertain, and it was clear that much time and battle would be needed before a new order could be established.
Granbell further expanded its influence by providing weapons to Evatron, further solidifying its economic control over the entire universe. The cooperative relationship between Evatron and Granbell will be the key to greatly changing the future balance of power in the universe.
Chapter 11: Formation of cosmic order and new challenge of Evatron
After the control of the Cerians and the devastation of the E16 series, the entire universe entered an era in which a new order was being sought. It was once a universe where the Dominion and Apollo fought for supremacy, but after the decline of both powers, the balance of power across the galaxy beyond the galaxy has become more complex and multipolar.
Granbell currently reigns as the greatest force in the universe. Its economic and military power is unrivaled, and its total GDP is said to account for 25% of the entire universe. They are followed by runner-up powers such as Elyseon and Tyeria**, each with their own unique characteristics and culture, joining the intergalactic race.

Even after the Cerians were conquered and Evatron was victorious, Celia's name and her ideals never completely disappeared. A monument bearing Celia's name was secretly erected in the ruins of Evapolis, and continued to be guarded by those who believed in her cause.
In addition, the remnants of the Cerians continued their underground activities and developed a movement to pass on the Celia's ideals to the next generation. No matter how strong Evatron's control was, the ideals built by Celia could not be completely erased.
___________________


Towards a new order of the universe
Evatron's victory and the control of the Cerians meant the beginning of a new era for the E16 series as a whole. However, what this victory brought about was not complete domination, but deepening social divisions and economic turmoil. The future of the E16 series remained uncertain, and it was clear that much time and battle would be needed before a new order could be established.
Granbell further expanded its influence by providing weapons to Evatron, further solidifying its economic control over the entire universe. The cooperative relationship between Evatron and Granbell will be the key to greatly changing the future balance of power in the universe.
Chapter 11: Formation of cosmic order and new challenge of Evatron
After the control of the Cerians and the devastation of the E16 series, the entire universe entered an era in which a new order was being sought. It was once a universe where the Dominion and Apollo fought for supremacy, but after the decline of both powers, the balance of power across the galaxy beyond the galaxy has become more complex and multipolar.
Granbell currently reigns as the greatest force in the universe. Its economic and military power is unrivaled, and its total GDP is said to account for 25% of the entire universe. They are followed by runner-up powers such as Elyseon and Tyeria**, each with their own unique characteristics and culture, joining the intergalactic race.

Meanwhile, within this new order, Evatron was content to be the 14th force in the universe. It once dominated Dominion and reigned as a central figure in the E16 series, but it still had its limits in competition with other powerful powers, and its position could hardly be called stable.
___________________


major forces of the universe
1. Granbell
It is currently the largest force in the universe, and its total GDP far exceeds any other force. Granbell uses interdimensional technology and quantum economy to strengthen its control over the entire universe. Its influence extends not only to the economy, but also to culture, education, and the military, and many small and medium-sized powers seek refuge by forming alliances with Granbell.
2. Elyseon
The second largest force in the universe. It has the second highest economic power after Granbell and specializes in unique science and technology. In particular, they dominate other powers in terms of medical technology and environmental regeneration technology, and their influence has spread throughout the galaxy. Elesion has gained support from many smaller civilizations through its peaceful attitude and technical assistance.
3. Tyeria
Tieria is a force that is considered to be at the pinnacle of military technology in the universe, and is known for its powerful fleet and tactical power. It has adopted a unique system of control that differs from Granbell, and has built a space-scale defense network. In recent years, in competition with other powers, it has strengthened exports of military technology and further expanded its economic base.
4. Fallujah
A force specialized in cultural influence, it serves as the center of diverse civilizations throughout the universe. Fallujah may be less economically powerful than other powers, but its cultural influence and diplomatic power serve as a bridge between powers across the universe.
5. Dioclenis
Dioclenis is a force specializing in scientific and technological research and space exploration. They are exploring unknown dimensions and new planetary systems, and the results of their research have become an important resource for other factions.
6. Eresh

Meanwhile, within this new order, Evatron was content to be the 14th force in the universe. It once dominated Dominion and reigned as a central figure in the E16 series, but it still had its limits in competition with other powerful powers, and its position could hardly be called stable.
___________________


major forces of the universe
1. Granbell
It is currently the largest force in the universe, and its total GDP far exceeds any other force. Granbell uses interdimensional technology and quantum economy to strengthen its control over the entire universe. Its influence extends not only to the economy, but also to culture, education, and the military, and many small and medium-sized powers seek refuge by forming alliances with Granbell.
2. Elyseon
The second largest force in the universe. It has the second highest economic power after Granbell and specializes in unique science and technology. In particular, they dominate other powers in terms of medical technology and environmental regeneration technology, and their influence has spread throughout the galaxy. Elesion has gained support from many smaller civilizations through its peaceful attitude and technical assistance.
3. Tyeria
Tieria is a force that is considered to be at the pinnacle of military technology in the universe, and is known for its powerful fleet and tactical power. It has adopted a unique system of control that differs from Granbell, and has built a space-scale defense network. In recent years, in competition with other powers, it has strengthened exports of military technology and further expanded its economic base.
4. Fallujah
A force specialized in cultural influence, it serves as the center of diverse civilizations throughout the universe. Fallujah may be less economically powerful than other powers, but its cultural influence and diplomatic power serve as a bridge between powers across the universe.
5. Dioclenis
Dioclenis is a force specializing in scientific and technological research and space exploration. They are exploring unknown dimensions and new planetary systems, and the results of their research have become an important resource for other factions.
6. Eresh

Eresh is a force of spiritual guidance and religious influence, and many civilizations base their orders on its doctrines. Its power is not economic, but its ideological influence is very strong, and it sometimes exerts enough power to influence other forces.
7. Prokio
It is a force that focuses on trade and logistics as an economically specialized area. Prokio controls trade routes throughout space, and its activities directly impact the economic activities of other factions.
8. Roastar
It is a leading force in technological innovation, leading the way in the development of new interdimensional communications and quantum networks. The technology is used by many factions and has a major impact on the entire universe.
14. Evatron
Evatron, which once ruled the Dominion, is now ranked as the 14th faction. Its control is limited, and its influence is still weak compared to powers such as Granbell and Elesion. However, they aim to maintain their control over the E16 series and rebuild.
___________________


Evatron issues and challenges
Evatron continues its challenge to regain its position within the new order. In particular, they faced three challenges:
      1. Restoration of E16 series
The E16 series, which was the center of the Dominion era, is still in ruins, and its economic and social recovery has not progressed. A rebuilding plan centered on Evapolis has been put in place, but the lack of funds and human resources is a serious problem.
      2. Competition with other powers
In competition with powerful forces such as Granbell and Elesion, Evatron is inferior in terms of economic and military power. In order to overcome this, Evatron is searching for new technological innovations and diplomatic strategies.
      3. Influence of Celia's philosophy
A movement that inherits Celia's ideals continues to operate underground, posing a challenge to Evatron's rule. It is necessary to maintain peace and order in the E16 system while suppressing this movement.

___________________


Formation of a new cosmic order
The universe has entered a multipolar order, and each force is trying to build a new order by leveraging its own characteristics. Among them, while the powerful forces centered on Granbell take the lead, mid-ranking forces like Evatron also continue to strive to establish their own position.
However, the overall order of the universe is never completely stabilized, and the seeds of new competition and conflict continue to smolder. The existence of those who inherit Celia's ideals and new discoveries in the unknown galaxy have the potential to shake up this order once again.
No one yet knows which force will ultimately take control of the entire universe in this new era. But one thing is certain: this cosmic order will continue to change. And in the midst of these changes, new heroes and ideas will once again be born, shaping the future of the universe.
Chapter 111: The beginning of the Space Federation meeting
The universe has finally reached a historic moment. The numerous civilizations that have developed across countless galaxies have continued to compete and antagonize each other while avoiding most of their interference, but in order to put an end to this trend, the **First Universal Federation Summit** will be held.
The venue will be Alder City, the capital of Granbell. Granbell, who boasts the greatest power in the universe, took center stage and set up a place for the leaders of the top five powers to gather together. This meeting was not just a diplomatic formality, but the first step toward establishing a framework for intergalactic order, economic cooperation, and peacekeeping.
___________________


5 top cosmic forces participating
Invited to this meeting were five powers that are especially influential in the economy, military, and technology of the entire universe. This was the first time in history that these leaders would gather together in the same place, and their words and decisions were expected to determine the future fate of the entire universe.
1. Granbell
         * Leader: President Arzen Karleen

Chapter 111: The beginning of the Space Federation meeting
The universe has finally reached a historic moment. ___________________


5 top cosmic forces participating
Invited to this meeting were five powers that are especially influential in the economy, military, and technology of the entire universe. This was the first time in history that these leaders would gather together in the same place, and their words and decisions were expected to determine the future fate of the entire universe.
1. Granbell
         * Leader: President Arzen Karleen

* Features: It has the largest economic zone in the universe, and its total GDP overwhelms other powers. A center of technological innovation and quantum economy. Orda City is the birthplace of interdimensional communication technology and is also the symbol of Granbell.
         * Agenda: Indicates the intention to take the lead in creating economic stability and order throughout the universe.
2. Elyseon
         * Leader: Queen Liana Solis
         * Features: Contribute to maintaining life throughout the galaxy with medical technology and environmental regeneration technology. It has established social infrastructure on many planets and is expanding its influence with its peaceful diplomatic stance.
         * Agenda: Reducing arms races and intergalactic stability through technology sharing.
3. Tyeria
         * Leader: Commander Greymond Hauser
         * Features: Possesses the strongest military force in the universe, and its tactics and defense are unrivaled. Export of defense technology is the basis of the economy.
         * Agenda: Promote the conclusion of a security treaty and legitimize your country's military power.
4. Fallujah
         * Leader: Council Representative Madris Carnell
         * Characteristics: It has extremely large cultural influence and leads exchanges between civilizations throughout the universe. He is good at diplomacy and mediation, and often plays the role of mediator to avoid war.
         * Agenda: Strengthening intergalactic cultural exchange and achieving cosmic harmony.
5. Dioclenis
         * Leader: Science Chancellor Nathan Korindo
         * Features: A force at the forefront of space exploration and scientific research. It influences many factions through the development of new planetary systems and dimensional technology.
         * Agenda: Proposals for new space exploration projects through joint scientific and technological development.
___________________


Venue stage: Orda City

* Features: It has the largest economic zone in the universe, and its total GDP overwhelms other powers. A center of technological innovation and quantum economy. Orda City is the birthplace of interdimensional communication technology and is also the symbol of Granbell.
         * Agenda: Indicates the intention to take the lead in creating economic stability and order throughout the universe.
2. Elyseon
         * Leader: Queen Liana Solis
         * Features: Contribute to maintaining life throughout the galaxy with medical technology and environmental regeneration technology. It has established social infrastructure on many planets and is expanding its influence with its peaceful diplomatic stance.
         * Agenda: Reducing arms races and intergalactic stability through technology sharing.
3. Tyeria
         * Leader: Commander Greymond Hauser
         * Features: Possesses the strongest military force in the universe, and its tactics and defense are unrivaled. Export of defense technology is the basis of the economy.
         * Agenda: Promote the conclusion of a security treaty and legitimize your country's military power.
4. Fallujah
         * Leader: Council Representative Madris Carnell
         * Characteristics: It has extremely large cultural influence and leads exchanges between civilizations throughout the universe. He is good at diplomacy and mediation, and often plays the role of mediator to avoid war.
         * Agenda: Strengthening intergalactic cultural exchange and achieving cosmic harmony.

         * Leader: Science Chancellor Nathan Korindo
         * Features: A force at the forefront of space exploration and scientific research. It influences many factions through the development of new planetary systems and dimensional technology.
         * Agenda: Proposals for new space exploration projects through joint scientific and technological development.
___________________


Venue stage: Orda City

Granbell's capital, Olda City, is the most developed city in the universe, known as the center of interdimensional communication technology and the quantum economy, and its futuristic architecture and advanced infrastructure astound all who visit. In particular, Orda Prime Hall, where the meetings are held, is a huge venue designed using interdimensional distortion, and boasts a scale that can accommodate tens of thousands of people at once.
A circular table was set up in the center of the venue, allowing the leaders to discuss on an equal footing. The area was surrounded by diplomats, engineers, and journalists dispatched from various powers, all ready to witness this historic moment.
___________________


The start of the meeting: From the beginning to the tension
The meeting began with greetings from President Arzen Karleen, the leader of Granbell. He spoke forcefully about the importance of this meeting, clarifying the challenges facing the entire universe.
"We have come together here to share the challenges of the entire universe and to work together to build a future. It is our responsibility to the next generation to rise above conflict and find a path to coexistence and prosperity."
Arzen's words resonated heavily with everyone gathered in the hall.
However, the ensuing discussion soon became tense. In particular, the concerns of other factions about Tieria's military power and Granbell's economic influence surfaced, and conflicts among the leaders became apparent.
Conflict between Tieria and Elesion
Greymond, the commander of Tieria, justified his country's military power and argued that it was essential to protect the safety of the entire universe, but Queen Lyanna of Elesion objected to this.
"Militarization only invites more conflict. We must build peace through cooperation and technology sharing."
"Power is what keeps the peace. Without power, you can't maintain order," Greymond replied, and the discussion quickly became heated.
Doubt about Granbell
In addition, Madris, the representative of Fallujah, expressed concern about Granbell's overwhelming economic power, saying, ``It might force other forces into a subordinate position.'' Although Arzen denied this, he acknowledged that Granbell's influence was a fact that could not be ignored.

Granbell's capital, Olda City, is the most developed city in the universe, known as the center of interdimensional communication technology and the quantum economy, and its futuristic architecture and advanced infrastructure astound all who visit. In particular, Orda Prime Hall, where the meetings are held, is a huge venue designed using interdimensional distortion, and boasts a scale that can accommodate tens of thousands of people at once.
A circular table was set up in the center of the venue, allowing the leaders to discuss on an equal footing. The area was surrounded by diplomats, engineers, and journalists dispatched from various powers, all ready to witness this historic moment.

___________________


Dioclenis' proposal: a path to the future
Meanwhile, Diocrenis' Science Chancellor Nathan Korindo proposed a new project for all factions to work on together, shifting the focus of the discussion to "future possibilities."
"We still do not fully understand this vast universe. Beyond the dimensions, there must be an unknown world. Shouldn't we go beyond our conflicts and work together on space exploration?"
This proposal brought temporary calm to the area where the conflict had continued, and many people felt a glimmer of hope. In particular, this topic emerged as a central theme of the meeting, with the support of Elesion and Fallujah, which emphasize cooperation through science and technology.
Chapter 112: Reflections on Apollo and the Dominion, Thucydides' Trap
The first Space Federation meeting was held in Alder City, the capital of Granbell, and as the leaders of the top five powers of the universe gathered together, the proceedings gradually shifted to serious issues. What drew particular attention was the lessons to be learned from the clash between the former Apollo civilization and the Dominion, and the Thucydides Trap that is likely to be repeated on a cosmic scale.
The agenda highlighted the dangers of the modern space order, while also considering how competition between powers could lead to future large-scale wars.
___________________


Reconsidering the historical conflict between Apollo and the Dominion
In the middle of the meeting, the historical conflict between the Apollonian civilization and the Dominion was brought up as a topic of discussion, based on a report presented by Nathan Corindo, Dioclenis' science chancellor.
The Rise and Fall of the Dominion
Once upon a time, the Dominion (formerly Selinopolis), led by Celia Dominicus, became the second most prosperous civilization in the universe, and its Golden Age had a great influence throughout the universe. However, the Dominion's expansionist policies and economic pressure intensified the conflict with the neighboring Apollo civilization. Eventually, all-out war by Apollo broke out, with devastating losses on both sides.

Chapter 112: Reflections on Apollo and the Dominion, Thucydides' Trap
The first Space Federation meeting was held in Alder City, the capital of Granbell, and as the leaders of the top five powers of the universe gathered together, the proceedings gradually shifted to serious issues. What drew particular attention was the lessons to be learned from the clash between the former Apollo civilization and the Dominion, and the Thucydides Trap that is likely to be repeated on a cosmic scale.
The agenda highlighted the dangers of the modern space order, while also considering how competition between powers could lead to future large-scale wars.
___________________


Reconsidering the historical conflict between Apollo and the Dominion
In the middle of the meeting, the historical conflict between the Apollonian civilization and the Dominion was brought up as a topic of discussion, based on a report presented by Nathan Corindo, Dioclenis' science chancellor.
The Rise and Fall of the Dominion
Once upon a time, the Dominion (formerly Selinopolis), led by Celia Dominicus, became the second most prosperous civilization in the universe, and its Golden Age had a great influence throughout the universe. However, the Dominion's expansionist policies and economic pressure intensified the conflict with the neighboring Apollo civilization. Eventually, all-out war by Apollo broke out, with devastating losses on both sides.

"Apollo and the Dominion were both highly prosperous civilizations, but their competition inevitably led to their destruction," Nathan warned. "We should not see this as just an example of history. Similar dangers lurk in the modern cosmic order."
Apollo's lessons
Furthermore, it was pointed out that after Apollo destroyed the Dominion, he himself suffered from rebuilding his economy and social structure, resulting in a significant weakening of his power. Currently, the Apollo civilization has lost its former glory and has fallen out of the ranks of the major powers. The lesson is that even the victors cannot escape the devastating effects of large-scale wars.
___________________


What is Thucydides' trap?
What emerged from this discussion was the so-called "Thucydides Trap." This concept refers to a situation in Earth's history where a rising power came into conflict with an existing dominant power, making war inevitable. Nathan of Dioclenis argued that this theory is likely to apply to the current situation on a cosmic scale.
"Granbell's overwhelming economic power and influence could become a factor that creates friction with other powers. And if the rising military power of Tieria, the cultural influence of Fallujah, and even the technological innovations of Elesion are intertwined, we cannot deny the possibility that a conflict similar to the one between Apollo and the Dominion will repeat in the past." Nathan pointed out.
Current cosmic order and potential conflicts
This theory accurately reflected the current tensions between the top powers in the universe. In particular, the following points were the focus of discussion:
         * Granbell vs Tieria
Tieria's policy of balancing Granbell's economic control with military force is likely to create potential conflict. Tieria's Commander-in-Chief Greymond continued to insist that "peace cannot be maintained without military force," but his statements made other factions wary.
         * Elesion vs Fallujah

"Apollo and the Dominion were both highly prosperous civilizations, but their competition inevitably led to their destruction," Nathan warned. "We should not see this as just an example of history. Similar dangers lurk in the modern cosmic order."
Apollo's lessons
Furthermore, it was pointed out that after Apollo destroyed the Dominion, he himself suffered from rebuilding his economy and social structure, resulting in a significant weakening of his power. Currently, the Apollo civilization has lost its former glory and has fallen out of the ranks of the major powers. The lesson is that even the victors cannot escape the devastating effects of large-scale wars.
___________________


What is Thucydides' trap?
What emerged from this discussion was the so-called "Thucydides Trap." This concept refers to a situation in Earth's history where a rising power came into conflict with an existing dominant power, making war inevitable. Nathan of Dioclenis argued that this theory is likely to apply to the current situation on a cosmic scale.
"Granbell's overwhelming economic power and influence could become a factor that creates friction with other powers. And if the rising military power of Tieria, the cultural influence of Fallujah, and even the technological innovations of Elesion are intertwined, we cannot deny the possibility that a conflict similar to the one between Apollo and the Dominion will repeat in the past." Nathan pointed out.
Current cosmic order and potential conflicts
This theory accurately reflected the current tensions between the top powers in the universe. In particular, the following points were the focus of discussion:
         * Granbell vs Tieria
Tieria's policy of balancing Granbell's economic control with military force is likely to create potential conflict. Tieria's Commander-in-Chief Greymond continued to insist that "peace cannot be maintained without military force," but his statements made other factions wary.
         * Elesion vs Fallujah

The economic influence of Elesion's technological innovations could create friction with Fallujah, which holds cultural leadership. In particular, differences in values ​​regarding the use of technology became clear.
___________________


Leaders' reaction
As soon as this topic was brought up, the atmosphere suddenly became tense. Granbell President Arzen Karleen acknowledged that the current situation is dangerous, but stated that Granbell stands ready to work with other factions to maintain order.
"We must not repeat the mistakes of the past. Granbell will spare no effort in providing financial support and cooperation in the pursuit of harmony throughout the universe."
On the other hand, Tieria's commander Greymond expressed skepticism towards Arzen's statement.
"Whether you trust his words or not, you have to see his concrete actions. Don't you intend to use your economic power as a shield to subjugate other forces?"
This remark had a ripple effect on other leaders, particularly the Madris representative in Fallujah, who spoke out in support of it.
"If the economic benefits provided by Granbell result in over-dependence on a few factions, the balance of the universe as a whole will be lost."
___________________


Proposals for the future
Toward the end of the meeting, Nathan Colind offered concrete suggestions for using the lessons of the past to avoid the Thucydides Trap.
            1. Conclusion of a universal peace agreement
Prevent large-scale wars by curbing arms races among powers and adopting a joint defense policy.
            2. Establishment of the Space Economic Cooperation Organization (UECO)
Build a system in which each power is economically interdependent and prevent competition from escalating into conflict.
            3. Promoting technology sharing
Led by Elesion and Dioclenis, rules are set to avoid monopolizing science and technology.
            4. Expansion of cultural exchange
Establish events and institutions that promote cultural understanding, with a focus on the role of Fallujah.
___________________


Conclusion of the meeting and future developments

The economic influence of Elesion's technological innovations could create friction with Fallujah, which holds cultural leadership. In particular, differences in values ​​regarding the use of technology became clear.
___________________
